The outcome was already decided. Today, he would definitely die.
Fang Yuan could see the situation clearly, but even at the brink of death, his expression did not change, and his expression was calm.
His gaze was faint, like a deep well, bottomless as always.
The heroes of the Good Faction who besieged him were either the distinguished elders of a sect or the young heroes who were famous all over the world.
At this moment, they firmly surrounded Fang Yuan. Some were roaring, some were sneering, some were squinting their eyes with vigilance, and some were clutching their wounds in fear.
They did not make a move. They were all afraid of Fang Yuan's final counterattack before his death.
This tense confrontation lasted for six hours. As the sun set in the west, the afterglow of the setting sun lit up the sunset glow on the mountainside, and for a moment, it was as gorgeous as fire.
Fang Yuan, who had been as still as a statue, slowly turned around.
The heroes immediately became restless, and all took a big step back.
At this moment, the gray stone under Fang Yuan's feet had long been dyed dark red by blood.
Due to the excessive loss of blood, her pale face was illuminated by the sunset, suddenly adding a beautiful luster to it.
Looking at the setting sun on the green mountain, Fang Yuan chuckled. "The setting sun on the green mountain, the autumn moon and the spring breeze.
It's really like black hair in the morning, turning into snow at dusk, success or failure turning into nothingness. "
As he said this, various scenes from his previous life on Earth suddenly appeared before his eyes.
He was originally a student from Huaxia on Earth who had transmigrated to this world by chance.
He had been tossing and turning for three hundred years, roaming the world for more than two hundred years. Five hundred years passed in the blink of an eye.
Many of the memories buried deep in his heart came alive at this moment, vividly replaying in front of his eyes.
"In the end, I still failed." Fang Yuan sighed in his heart. He was a little emotional, but he didn't regret it.
He had already foreseen this outcome.
When he made his choice, he was already mentally prepared.
The so-called Devil Dao was to not cultivate good karma, but to commit murder and arson.
Heaven and Earth did not tolerate it. The entire world was his enemy, yet he still wanted to do as he pleased.
"If the newly refined Spring and Autumn Cicada is effective, I will still be an evil spirit in my next life!" Thinking of this, Fang Yuan couldn't help but laugh out loud.
"Old Devil, what are you laughing at?"
"Everyone be careful, the devil is about to die, he's going to counterattack!"
"Quickly hand over the Spring and Autumn Cicada!!"
The group of experts closed in, but right at this time, with a loud explosion, Fang Yuan self-detonated.
…
The spring rain continued, quietly nourishing Qing Mao Mountain.
It was already late at night, and a cool breeze blew through the drizzle.
Qing Mao Mountain was not dark. From the mountainside to the foot of the mountain, there were many glimmers of light, as if it was draped in a brilliant belt of light.
These lights came from many tall buildings. Although it couldn't be said to be the lights of ten thousand households, there were still thousands of them.
This was the Guyue Village that was located in the middle of Qing Mao Mountain, adding a dense atmosphere of human habitation to the vast and quiet mountain range.
At the very center of the Guyue Village was a grand and magnificent pavilion.
At this time, a ceremony was being held, so the lights were brightly lit, and the radiance was dazzling.
"Ancestors bless us, I hope that in this Awakening Ceremony, there will be many talented youths, to add new blood and hope to the family!"
The leader of the Guyue Village was middle-aged, his temples were slightly white, and he wore a solemn white ceremonial robe. He knelt on the brown floor, straightened his upper body, put his hands together, closed his eyes, and prayed sincerely.
He faced a tall black lacquer table. There were three layers of the table, and the ancestral tablets were enshrined there.
On both sides of the tablets, there were red copper incense burners, and smoke curled up.
Behind him, there were also more than ten people kneeling.
They wore loose white ceremonial robes, and were the elders of the family. They were in charge of all aspects of the family.
After praying for a while, the leader of the Guyue Village took the lead to bow, spread out his hands, and tightly pressed his palms against the floor, and kowtowed.
His forehead hit the brown floor, and there was a soft thud.
The elders behind him all had solemn expressions, and silently followed suit.
For a moment, the ancestral hall was filled with the sound of forehead hitting the floor.
After the ceremony ended, everyone slowly stood up from the floor, and quietly walked out of the solemn ancestral hall.
In the corridor, the elders silently breathed a sigh of relief, and the atmosphere relaxed.
Gradually, the sounds of discussion rose.
"Time really flies. In the blink of an eye, a year has passed."
"The last Awakening Ceremony seems like it happened yesterday, and it's still vivid in my mind."
"Tomorrow is the annual Awakening Ceremony, I wonder what kind of new blood will emerge this year?"
"Sigh, I hope there will be a youth with A grade talent.
Our Guyue Village has not had such a genius in three years. "
"That's right, the Bai clan and Xiong clan have all had geniuses these years.
Especially the Bai clan's Bai Ning Bing, his talent is really terrifying. "
Someone mentioned Bai Ning Bing's name, and the elders could not help but show a layer of worry on their faces.
This child's talent was extremely outstanding, and in just two years, he had already cultivated to Rank three Gu Master.
Among the younger generation, he could be said to be the most outstanding.
Even the older generation could feel the pressure from this rising star.
In time, he would definitely become the pillar of the Bai clan.
At the very least, he would be a strong individual.
No one doubted this.
"But among the youths participating in this year's Awakening Ceremony, there is still hope."
"That's right, a talented youth has appeared in Fang Zhi's bloodline.
Able to speak in three months, able to walk in four months.
At the age of five, he could compose poems and recite lyrics. He was exceptionally intelligent and talented.
Unfortunately, his parents died early, and now he is being raised by his aunt and uncle. "
"Yes, this is early intelligence, and he has great ambitions.
In recent years, he has created 'Jiang Jing Jiu', 'Ode to Plum', and 'Jiang Cheng Zi'. I have also heard of them. What a genius! "
The Guyue clan leader was the last to walk out of the ancestral hall. As he slowly closed the door, he heard the elders discussing in the corridor.
Immediately, he knew that the elders were discussing a youth called Guyue Fang Yuan.
As the clan leader, he would naturally pay attention to those outstanding and outstanding disciples.
And among the younger generation, Guyue Fang Yuan was one of the most outstanding and dazzling ones.
And experience had shown that those who had photographic memory from a young age, or were as strong as an adult, had outstanding cultivation aptitude.
"If this child is tested to have A grade aptitude, with proper training, he may be able to compete with Bai Ning Bing.
Even if it is B grade aptitude, in the future, he will be able to hold his own, and become a flag of the Guyue clan.
But with his precocious intelligence, the possibility of him being a B grade talent isn't high, and is most likely an A grade talent. "With this thought, the Gu Yue clan leader's mouth couldn't help but curl up, revealing a slight smile.
Immediately after, he coughed and said to the elders, "Everyone, it is getting late. For tomorrow's Awakening Ceremony, please rest well tonight and maintain your spirit."
When the elders heard this, they were all slightly startled.
They looked at each other with a hint of vigilance.
The clan leader's words were implicit, but everyone understood his meaning.
Every year, in order to fight for these talented juniors, the elders would fight with each other until their faces were red and their heads were bleeding.
It was time to conserve his energy and wait until tomorrow to fight for it.
Especially that Guyue Fang Yuan, the possibility of him having A grade aptitude was very high.
And his parents had already passed away, and he was one of the two orphans of Fang Zhi's bloodline.
If they could take him into their bloodline, and properly train him, they could ensure their bloodline's prosperity for a hundred years!
"But, I will say the ugly words first.
The fight must be open and aboveboard, and must not use underhanded methods to harm the unity of the clan.
Elders, please keep this in mind! "The clan leader said with a serious tone.
"I don't dare.
I don't dare. "
"I will definitely remember it."
"I will take my leave now, Lord Clan Leader, please stay."
The elders, full of thoughts, dispersed one by one.
Not long after, the long corridor became deserted.
The spring rain and wind blew through the window. The clan leader lightly walked to the window.
Immediately, his mouth was filled with the fresh and moist mountain air, refreshing and refreshing.
This was the third floor of the loft. As far as the eye could see, more than half of the Guyue village was in sight.
It was late at night, but most of the houses in the village still had lights, which was very different from usual.
Tomorrow was the Awakening Ceremony, which concerned everyone's interests.
An excited and nervous atmosphere enveloped the hearts of the clansmen. Naturally, many people could not sleep well.
"This is the hope of the clan's future." The clan leader sighed as the lights reflected in his eyes.
At this time, there was also a pair of clear eyes, quietly watching the lights in the dark night, full of complicated feelings.
"Guyue village, this is five hundred years ago?!
The Spring Autumn Cicada really worked … "Fang Yuan's eyes were gloomy as he stood by the window, letting the wind and rain hit his body.
The Spring Autumn Cicada's effect was to reverse time.
It was ranked seventh among the top ten mystical insects, so naturally it was no small matter.
Simply put, it was rebirth.
"I used the Spring Autumn Cicada to be reborn, to go back to five hundred years ago!"
Fang Yuan stretched out his hand, his eyes fixed on his young and pale palm, and then he slowly clenched it, trying hard to feel the reality.
He heard the light sound of the drizzle hitting the window. He slowly closed his eyes, opened them after a long time, and sighed, "Five hundred years of experience, it really is like a dream."
But he clearly knew that this was not a dream.

Chapter 2
According to legend, there was a river of time in this world, supporting the flow of the world.
Using the Spring Autumn Cicada's power, one could go against the current and return to the past.
Regarding this rumor, there were many opinions.
Many people didn't believe it, and some people were skeptical.
Almost no one was sure.
Because every time the Spring Autumn Cicada was used, one had to pay with their life, sacrificing their entire body and all their cultivation to power it.
This price was too high. What was even more unacceptable was that one often paid with their life, not knowing what the result would be.
Even if someone obtained the Spring Autumn Cicada, they would not dare to use it carelessly.
What if the rumor was false, and it was just a scam?
If not for Fang Yuan's desperation, he would not have used it so quickly.
But now, Fang Yuan completely believed it.
Because the truth was right in front of him, there was no way to refute it.
He had indeed been reborn!
"It's a pity for this good Gu. I spent a lot of effort, slaughtered hundreds of thousands of people, incurred the wrath of the heavens, and painstakingly refined it …" Fang Yuan sighed in his heart. Although he had been reborn, he did not bring the Spring Autumn Cicada with him.
Man was the spirit of all creatures, and Gu was the essence of heaven and earth.
There were countless Gu of all shapes and sizes.
Some Gu would disappear after being used once or twice or thrice.
Some Gu, as long as it was not overused, could be reused.
Perhaps the Spring Autumn Cicada was a consumable Gu that could only be used once.
"But even if it's gone, I can refine another one.
I could refine it in my previous life, can't I do it in this life? "After the pity, Fang Yuan could not help but feel a surge of ambition and heroism.
He could be reborn, and the loss of the Spring Autumn Cicada was completely acceptable.
Moreover, he had treasures on him, he did not have nothing.
This treasure was his five hundred years of memories and experience.
There were many treasures in his memory, but no one had opened them yet.
There were many major events that allowed him to easily grasp the context of history.
There were countless figures of people, some were reclusive seniors, some were geniuses, and some were not even born yet.
It also contained the arduous cultivation and rich combat experience he had accumulated over the past five hundred years.
With these, he undoubtedly grasped the big picture and had the initiative.
As long as he manipulated it well, it wouldn't be a problem for him to roam the world unhindered and recreate the demeanor of a great demon. In fact, he might even be able to reach a higher realm!
"Then how should I operate it …" Fang Yuan was very rational. He quickly collected his emotions and pondered while facing the night rain outside the window.
When he thought about it this way, he felt that there were a lot of things to think about.
After thinking for a moment, his frown deepened.
Five hundred years was indeed a long time.
Let's not talk about those blurry memories that I can't recall.
Even though there were many hidden treasures and Immortal Masters' fortuitous encounters, most of them were either thousands of miles apart or could only be opened at a specific time.
"The most important thing is still cultivation.
His primeval sea had yet to open and he had yet to embark on the path of a Gu Master's cultivation. He was simply a mortal!
I have to cultivate as soon as possible and increase my cultivation. I have to seize the initiative and reap as many benefits as possible before history. "
Furthermore, if one's cultivation wasn't high enough, they wouldn't be able to digest the treasures even if they obtained them.
On the contrary, it was a hot potato, a crime of possessing a jade.
The first problem in front of Fang Yuan was cultivation.
He had to raise his cultivation as soon as possible. If it was as slow as in his previous life, it would be too late.
"To raise my cultivation as soon as possible, I have to use the clan's resources.
With my current situation, I don't have the ability to travel through the dangerous mountains. Even a normal wild boar can take my life.
If I can reach the cultivation of a Rank three Gu Master, I will have the basic ability to protect myself and travel through the mountains and rivers in this world. "
From the perspective of a Demonic Path Overlord who had trained for five hundred years, this Qing Mao Mountain was really too small. The Guyue village was more like a cage.
However, while a cage imprisons freedom, a sturdy prison cell often represents a certain kind of security.
"Hmph, for the time being, I'll just toss and turn around in this prison cell.
As long as I advance to Rank three, I can leave this poor mountain.
But luckily, tomorrow is the Awakening Ceremony. Not long after, I can officially start my Gu Master cultivation. "
Once he thought of the Awakening Ceremony, the dusty memories in Fang Yuan's heart surfaced.
"Aptitude …" Looking out the window, he couldn't help but laugh coldly.
At this moment, the door was gently pushed open, and a young man walked in.
"Brother, why are you standing by the window in the rain?"
This young man was thin, slightly shorter than Fang Yuan, and his face was very similar to Fang Yuan's.
Fang Yuan turned around to look at this young man, a complicated expression flashing across his face.
"Oh, it's you, my twin brother." He raised his eyebrows slightly, his expression returning to its usual indifference.
Fangzheng lowered his head, looking at his toes. This was his signature move. "I saw that brother's window was not closed, so I wanted to sneak in and close it.
Tomorrow is the Awakening Ceremony. Brother, it's so late and you're still not sleeping. If uncle and aunt knew, they would be worried. "
He was not surprised at Fang Yuan's indifference, because his brother had always been like this since he was young.
Sometimes he would think that maybe geniuses were different from ordinary people like this.
Although he looked very similar to his brother, he was as ordinary as an ant.
They were born from the same mother's womb, so why was the heavens so unfair?
His brother was gifted with the talent of a diamond, while he was as ordinary as a pebble.
Everyone around him would say "This is Fang Yuan's younger brother" when talking about him.
Uncle and aunt often told him to learn from his brother.
Even when he looked in the mirror and looked at his own face, he felt disgusted!
These thoughts had been accumulating in the depths of his heart for many years.
Like a huge rock pressing on his chest, Fangzheng's head drooped lower and lower over the years, and he became more and more taciturn.
"Worry …" Thinking of his uncle and aunt, Fang Yuan sneered silently in his heart.
He remembered very clearly that the parents of this body had both died because of a family mission.
When he was three years old, he and his brother became orphans.
In the name of raising them, his uncle and aunt openly took over his parents' inheritance, and treated him and his brother harshly.
As a transmigrator, he had planned to hide his strength and bide his time.
But the hardships of life forced Fang Yuan to choose to reveal his extraordinary "talent".
The so-called genius was actually just the rationality of a mature soul, and a few famous poems from the Tang and Song dynasties on Earth.
Even with such a small display of skill, he was still regarded as a celestial being, and received widespread attention.
Under the external pressure, the young Fang Yuan had no choice but to maintain a cold and indifferent expression to protect himself and reduce the possibility of being exposed.
Over time, indifference became his habitual expression.
Just like that, his uncle and aunt could no longer treat him and his brother harshly. As he grew older, his future became more promising, and his treatment also increased.
But this was not love, but a kind of investment.
It was laughable that his brother did not see the truth. Not only was he deceived by his uncle and aunt, but he also buried his hatred towards him.
Although he looked obedient now, in his memory, after he was tested to have an A grade aptitude, he was nurtured by the family, and his hidden hatred and jealousy was released. He often targeted, made things difficult, and suppressed his own brother.
As for his own aptitude …
Hehe, the highest he had was only a C grade.
Fate was always joking.
A pair of twins, the elder brother's aptitude was only C grade, but he enjoyed the title of genius for more than ten years.
The younger brother was unknown, but he had an A grade aptitude.
The result of the enlightenment shocked the clansmen.
It also caused the treatment of the two brothers to be completely reversed.
The younger brother was like a dragon rising to the sky, while the older brother was like a phoenix falling to the ground.
After that, there were many difficulties from the younger brother, the cold eyes of his uncle and aunt, and the contempt of the clansmen.
Hate?
Fang Yuan had hated in his previous life. He hated his lack of aptitude, hated the ruthlessness of the clan, and hated the unfairness of fate.
But now, with 500 years of life experience, he re-examined this process. His heart was calm, and there was no hatred.
What was there to be angry about?
Thinking about it from another perspective, he could also understand his younger brother, uncle and aunt, and the righteous enemies who besieged him 500 years later.
The weak were prey to the strong, survival of the fittest. This was the nature of this world.
Moreover, everyone had their own ambitions, and they were all fighting for the heavenly secrets. What was there not to understand about killing and suppressing each other?
500 years of experience had long made him see through all of this. In his heart, there was only the path of immortality.
If someone stood in his way, no matter who it was, it would only be a matter of life and death.
The ambition in his heart was too great. Once he set foot on this path, he was destined to be the enemy of the whole world. He was destined to be alone, and he was destined to kill.
This was the realization condensed from 500 years of life.
"Revenge is not my plan. The path of an evil demon has never been one of compromise." Thinking of this, Fang Yuan could not help but laugh.
He turned his head to look at his younger brother, and said, "You can leave."
Fangzheng's heart could not help but palpitate. He felt that his brother's gaze was as sharp as an ice blade, as if it could penetrate the deepest part of his heart.
Under such a gaze, he felt as if he was naked in the snow, and there was no secret to speak of.
"Then I'll see you tomorrow, brother." Not daring to say anything else, Fangzheng slowly closed the door and retreated.
S-REV-003.summary: Fang Yuan stands by his window, confirming his rebirth 500 years in the past and reflecting on his lost Spring and Autumn Cicada while leveraging his vast future memories for strategic planning. He quickly dismisses sentimental feelings, prioritizing cultivation and power. His twin brother, Fangzheng, enters, expressing concern, but Fang Yuan perceives Fangzheng's underlying resentment and naivety, confirming his cynical view of familial love.

continuityMutations.content: He views family members (including his brother, aunt, and uncle) and Shen Cui as mere 'passers-by' in his quest for immortality, not worthy of his emotional investment or strategic effort unless they directly impede him.
He recalls Shen Cui's past betrayal and manipulative nature in his previous life.
She is a spy for Fang Yuan's aunt and uncle, and her mother is the powerful housekeeper, Shen momo.
She attempts to gain Fang Yuan's favor and become his concubine.
He feels suffocated by Fang Yuan's shadow and the constant comparisons, wishing for Shen Cui's service.
Fang Yuan's personal maidservant, also acting as a spy for his aunt and uncle.
Hopes to elevate her status by becoming Fang Yuan's concubine due to his perceived talent.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked out of the residence

S-REV-004.prose:
Chapter 3
Bang, bang, bang, bang, bang.
The patrolling night watchman banged the clapper rhythmically.
The sound traveled to the tall building. Fang Yuan opened his dry eyelids and thought to himself, "It's the fifth day of the night."
Last night, he lay in bed and thought for a long time. He made a lot of plans, but he only slept for a little more than two hours.
This body had not started cultivating yet, so he did not have much energy. Therefore, waves of tiredness still enveloped his body and mind.
However, more than five hundred years of experience had forged Fang Yuan's steel-like determination.
This bit of drowsiness was nothing at all.
Immediately, he pushed away the thin silk bedding on his body and got up neatly.
When he opened the window, the spring rain had stopped.
The smell of soil, trees, and wildflowers was fresh and moist.
Fang Yuan felt his head clear and his drowsiness was completely dispelled.
The sun had not risen yet. The sky was a deep blue, dark and bright at the same time.
As far as the eye could see, the tall building made of green bamboo and trees contrasted with the mountains. It was a quiet and dark green color.
The tall building had at least two floors. It was the unique structure of the mountain people's houses.
Because the mountain was rugged, the first floor was a huge wooden pile, and the second floor was the people's residence.
Fang Yuan and his brother Fangzheng lived on the second floor.
"Young Master Fang Yuan, you're awake.
I'll go upstairs and help you wash up. "At this moment, a young girl's voice came from downstairs.
Fang Yuan looked down. It was his personal maid, Shen Cui.
Her looks could only be considered average, but she was well dressed. She wore a green shirt, long sleeves, long pants, and embroidered shoes. There was even a pearl hairpin in her black hair. Her whole body exuded the vitality of youth.
She looked at Fang Yuan with joy. Carrying a basin of water, she went upstairs.
The water was warm and was used to wash his face.
Rinsing his mouth with a willow branch dipped in snow salt could clean and whiten his teeth.
Shen Cui served him tenderly. There was a smile on her face, and her eyes were filled with love.
After that, she helped Fang Yuan put on his clothes. In the process, she rubbed her ample breasts against Fang Yuan's arm or back from time to time.
Fang Yuan was expressionless, and his heart was as calm as still water.
Not only was this maidservant a spy for her uncle and aunt, but she was also vain and had a cold temperament.
In his previous life, he had been deceived by her. After the Awakening Ceremony, when his status had plummeted, she had immediately turned against him and rolled her eyes at him.
When Fangzheng arrived, he saw Shen Cui smoothing out the creases on Fang Yuan's clothes. His eyes couldn't help but flash a trace of envy and jealousy.
He had been living with his brother for the past few years and was taken care of by Fang Yuan. He also had a servant to serve him.
However, it wasn't a young maidservant like Shen Cui, but a fat and swollen old maidservant.
"If one day, Shen Cui can serve me like this, how would it feel?" Fangzheng had some thoughts in his heart, but he didn't dare to think about it.
His aunt and uncle favored Fang Yuan, and this was a matter that everyone in the fu knew.
Originally, he didn't have a servant to serve him. It was Fang Yuan who took the initiative to ask for one for Fangzheng.
Although there was a difference in status between master and servant, Fangzheng didn't dare to look down on Shen Cui.
This was because Shen Cui's mother was the Shen momo who served his aunt and was also the housekeeper of the entire fu. She was deeply trusted by his aunt and had a lot of power.
"Alright, you don't have to tidy up."
Fang Yuan impatiently brushed away Shen Cui's soft hands. His clothes had long been tidied, and Shen Cui was more of a seduction.
For her, his future was bright, and the possibility of having an A grade aptitude was very high. If she could become Fang Yuan's concubine, she could change from a slave to a master. It could be said that she had reached the sky in one step.
In his previous life, Fang Yuan had been deceived and even liked this maidservant.
After his rebirth, he was as clear as a fire, and his heart was as cold as frost.
"You can leave." Fang Yuan didn't even look at Shen Cui as he tidied up his cuffs.
Shen Cui slightly pouted. She felt a little strange and wronged for Fang Yuan's lack of understanding today.
She wanted to say something coquettish, but she was deterred by Fang Yuan's inexplicable temperament. She opened her mouth a few times, but finally said "Yes" and obediently retreated.
"Are you ready?" Fang Yuan looked at Fangzheng.
His younger brother stood at the door in a daze. He lowered his head to look at his toes and softly said "En".
In fact, he had woken up at the fourth watch. He was too nervous to fall asleep, so he secretly got up and prepared early. Both of his eyes had dark circles.
Fang Yuan nodded. In his previous life, he wasn't clear about his younger brother's thoughts, but in this life, how could he not understand?
But it was meaningless to point it out at this time, so he lightly ordered, "Then let's go."
Thus, the two brothers walked out of the residence. Along the way, they met many people of the same age, in twos and threes. Obviously, they had the same destination.
"Look, those are the two brothers of the Fang family." A careful whisper came into their ears.
"The one walking in front is that Fang Yuan. He's the one who wrote the poem, Fang Yuan." Someone emphasized.
"So it's him. He's expressionless, as if there's no one else around. He's really as arrogant as the rumors say." Someone said in a sour tone, with jealousy and envy.
"Hmph, if you can be like him, you can also be arrogant!" Someone replied with a cold snort, hiding a kind of dissatisfaction.
Fangzheng listened with an expressionless face. He had long been used to this kind of discussion.
He lowered his head and followed behind his brother, walking in silence.
At this time, the horizon had already lit up with the morning light. Fang Yuan's shadow was cast on his face.
The sun was gradually rising, but Fangzheng suddenly felt that he was walking towards darkness.
This darkness originated from his brother. Perhaps in this life, he would never be able to break free from his brother's huge shadow.
He felt a burst of pressure in his chest, and even had difficulty breathing. This damned feeling even made him think of the word "suffocation"!
"Hmph, this kind of discussion really is the case of the tree that stands out in the forest being blown down by the wind." Listening to the discussion in his ears, Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart.
It was no wonder that after the test of his C grade aptitude, he was surrounded by enemies on all sides. For a long time, he was treated harshly, looked down upon, and treated coldly.
Behind him, his brother Fangzheng's increasingly muffled breathing was also heard by him.
What he did not notice in his previous life, he was able to see clearly in this life.
This was the keen insight brought about by 500 years of life experience.
He suddenly thought of his uncle and aunt. They really had some tricks up their sleeves.
They assigned Shen Cuilai to monitor him, and assigned an old nanny to his brother.
In fact, there were other differences in treatment in the details of life.
This was all done intentionally. It was to provoke the anger in his brother's heart, and to provoke the brotherly relationship between him and his brother.
The world did not worry about scarcity, but about inequality.
In his previous life, he had too little experience, and his brother was too stupid and naive, so he was successfully provoked by his uncle and aunt.
Since his rebirth, the Awakening Ceremony was about to begin. The situation seemed difficult to reverse, but with Fang Yuan's demonic methods and wisdom, it was not impossible to change.
This brother could be completely suppressed and subdued. Shen Cuilai, a little girl, could be added into the harem early.
There were also his uncle and aunt, the clan leader, and the elders. There were at least hundreds of ways to beat them.
"But, I don't want to do this …" Fang Yuan sighed leisurely in his heart.
So what if he was his biological brother? There was no familial love to speak of. He was just an outsider, so it was fine to let him go.
No matter how beautiful Shen Cuilai was, without love and loyalty, she was just a corpse.
Added into the harem?
She was not worthy.
Even if it was his uncle and aunt, the clan leader, and the elders, they were all passers-by in his life. Why did he have to rack his brain and waste his energy to beat these passers-by?
Hehe.
As long as they did not hinder his journey, then he would play with his own eggs. He would not even bother to step on them.
S-REV-004.summary: Fang Yuan wakes early, his 500 years of experience making him impervious to fatigue. His personal maid, Shen Cui, serves him, subtly attempting to seduce him, but Fang Yuan, aware of her true motives and past betrayal, remains indifferent. Fangzheng observes with envy, aware of his own inferior treatment. As they leave for the Awakening Ceremony, Fang Yuan dismisses past grievances, viewing all obstacles as irrelevant to his path to immortality.

continuityMutations.content: Observes Guyue Mobei achieve B-grade aptitude and recalls Guyue Cheng's falsified B-grade, confirming past memories of clan politics and deception relevant to the ceremony.
Experiences pride in Guyue Mobei's B-grade aptitude, which he uses to subtly provoke Guyue Lian.
Is provoked by Guyue Mo Chen's boasting and remains sullen after his own grandson's aptitude is not yet revealed.
Expresses deep concern and disappointment over the thinning bloodline and lack of high-aptitude youths, reflecting on the clan's past glory.
Remembers his past life and the details of the Awakening Ceremony, including Guyue Cheng's false B-grade aptitude and his own C-grade.
Strategizes how to maximize benefits from his foreknowledge without exposing himself to danger from powerful clan elders.
Maintains inner calm and indifference despite receiving a C-grade aptitude, contrasting with his past life's despair.
Possesses knowledge of the 'Hope Gu' legend and its significance in the Awakening Ceremony, details not explicitly shared with the youths.
Oversees the Awakening Ceremony and calls out the names of youths for the aptitude test.
Shows concern and disappointment over low aptitude results and joy over high ones, reflecting his dedication to the clan's future.
Revealed to have no Gu Master aptitude after taking only three steps in the test.
Revealed to have no Gu Master aptitude after taking four steps in the test.
Achieves B-grade aptitude, taking 36 steps, and has a 66% primeval sea.
Identified as the grandson of Guyue Mo Chen, one of the clan elders.
Feels proud of his grandson Guyue Mobei's B-grade aptitude.
Considered one of the two most powerful elders and a leader of a major faction in the clan, rivaling Guyue Lian.
Considered one of the two most powerful elders and a leader of a major faction in the clan, rivaling Guyue Mo Chen.
Falsified his grandson Guyue Cheng's aptitude to appear B-grade.
Holds the highest position in the clan, residing in the Clan Pavilion, and oversees major ceremonies like the Awakening.
Worries about the thinning bloodline and declining aptitudes among the younger generation.
Intervenes in the elders' dispute over Fangzheng, asserting his right to personally raise the A-grade talent.
Believed to have B-grade aptitude after taking 36 steps, but Fang Yuan knows it's a falsified C-grade.
Identified as the grandson of Guyue Lian, one of the clan elders.
Identified as Fang Yuan's younger brother.
Unexpectedly achieves A-grade aptitude, taking 43 steps, after a clumsy start.
Center of power for the Guyue village.
Home to the patriarch and site for major discussions and ceremonies.
Front square enshrines ancestor tablets.

C-REV-19.transition: Crosses the river and walks into the sea of flowers to determine aptitude.

S-REV-005.prose:
Chapter 4
The morning sun rose, its rays shining brightly.
The mountain fog was not very thick, and was easily penetrated by the sword-like sunlight.
More than a hundred fifteen-year-old youths gathered in front of the Clan Pavilion.
The Clan Pavilion was located in the center of the village. It was five stories high, with curved eaves and was heavily guarded.
In front of the pavilion was the square, where the tablets of the ancestors of the Guyue were enshrined.
Every generation's patriarch also lived here. Whenever there was a major ceremony or an unexpected event, the patriarch would gather the elders here to discuss and discuss.
This was the center of power of the entire village.
"Very good, all of you are here on time.
Today is the Awakening Ceremony, a major turning point in your lives.
Without further ado, follow me. "The one in charge of this trip was the academy elder.
His hair and beard were all white, and he was spirited as he led the youths into the Clan Pavilion.
But they did not go upstairs. Instead, they went down through the entrance of the hall.
Following the well-made stone stairs, they entered the underground cave.
The youths all gasped in admiration.
The underground cave was magnificent. The stalactites gave off seven colors of red, orange, yellow, green, blue and purple. The colors shone on the faces of the youths, like a rainbow.
Fang Yuan was in the middle of the crowd, quietly observing everything. He thought to himself, "Hundreds of years ago, the Guyue clan migrated from the Middle Plains to the Southern Border, and settled here at Qing Mao Mountain.
They took a fancy to the spirit spring in this underground cave.
This spirit spring produces large amounts of Yuan stone, and can be said to be the foundation of the Guyue village. "
After a few hundred steps, it got darker and darker, and they could hear the sound of water.
Turning a corner, an underground river about three feet wide appeared in front of them.
The colorful lights of the stalactites had completely disappeared.
But in the darkness, the river emitted a faint blue light, like a galaxy in the night sky.
The river flowed from the dark depths of the cave. It was crystal clear, and they could even see the swimming fish, aquatic plants, and the sand and stones at the bottom of the river.
On the other side of the river was a sea of flowers.
This was the moon orchid that the Guyue clan had specially cultivated. Its petals were like crescent moons, showing a beautiful and elegant blue-pink color.
The stem of the flower was like jade, and the center of the flower was shining like a pearl under the light.
At first glance, in the dark background, the sea of flowers by the riverside looked like a large blue and green carpet dotted with countless pearls.
"Moon orchid is an ingredient for many Gu worms.
This sea of flowers can be said to be the family's largest breeding ground. "Fang Yuan was well aware of this.
"So beautiful."
"So beautiful."
The youngsters' horizons had been broadened. Their eyes lit up, and they were both excited and nervous.
"Okay, now listen to me. The person I call will cross the river and go to the other side.
He would go as far as he could. Of course, the farther, the better.
Are you all clear? "The elder said.
"Understood." The youths responded.
Actually, before coming here, he had heard from his family and seniors that the further he went, the better his aptitude would be, and the greater his future achievements would be.
"Guyue, Chen Bo." The elder pointed out the first person on the list.
Although the river was wide, it was not deep. It only reached the youth's knees.
Chen Bo's expression was solemn as he stepped into the sea of flowers by the riverside.
Immediately, he felt an invisible pressure, as if there was an invisible wall in front of him, preventing him from moving forward.
Just as he was struggling to move forward, a speck of light suddenly appeared in the sea of flowers by his feet. The speck of light was very thin, and it was a plain white colour.
The light gathered towards Chen Bo and entered his body.
Chen Bo immediately felt the pressure decrease.
That invisible wall suddenly became soft.
He gritted his teeth and walked forward, forcing his way in.
After three steps, the pressure in front of him increased again. Just like before, it was like a wall, and he could not go any further.
Seeing this, the elder sighed, and while recording, he said, "Guyue, Chen Bo, three steps, no Gu Master aptitude.
Next, Guyue, Zao Xie. "
Chen Bo's face turned pale, and he gritted his teeth as he crossed the river and returned to his original position.
Without aptitude, he could only live as a mortal, and would only have the lowest position in the clan.
His body was on the verge of collapse. The blow was too great, and it was equivalent to killing his life's hope.
Many people gave him pitiful gazes, but even more people paid attention to the second young man who reached the other shore.
Unfortunately, this young man could only advance four steps, and similarly had no aptitude.
Not everyone had the aptitude to cultivate. Normally speaking, five out of ten people could cultivate, and that was already not bad.
In the Guyue clan, this ratio was even higher, reaching six people.
This was because Guyue's ancestor, who was the first generation clan leader, was a famous legendary expert. Because of his cultivation, his bloodline contained the genes to bear the burden of strength.
Guyue clansmen had his bloodline, so their aptitude was generally higher.
Two consecutive cases of no aptitude made the other elders who were observing in secret have ugly expressions. Even the old and wise Guyue clan leader frowned slightly.
At this moment, the academy elder shouted the third name, "Guyue Mobei."
"Here!" A horse-faced young man dressed in linen robes shouted softly, and stepped out of the crowd.
He was tall, and much thicker than others of his age. He had a valiant aura about him.
He crossed the river in two to three steps, and stepped onto the other shore.
Ten steps, twenty steps, thirty steps. Faint light entered his body one after another.
He walked all the way to the 36th step, and finally he could not go any further.
The young men on the other shore were dumbfounded. The academy elder shouted happily, "Good, Guyue Mobei, B grade aptitude. Come here, let me see your primeval sea."
Guyue Mobei returned to the academy elder's side. The latter stretched out his hand, and placed it on the young man's shoulder. He closed his eyes and examined it, and then retracted his hand. He nodded and recorded on a piece of paper, "Guyue Mobei, primeval sea sixty-six percent, can be nurtured vigorously."
The aptitude, from top to bottom, was divided into four grades: A, B, C, and D.
A D grade aptitude youngster, after three years of nurturing, can become a Rank one veteran Gu Master, becoming the clan's cornerstone.
A C grade aptitude youngster, after two years of nurturing, would most likely become a Rank two Gu Master, becoming the backbone of the clan.
A B grade talent needed to be taken care of.
They are often nurtured as future clan elders, and after six to seven years, they can become Rank three Gu Masters.
As for A grade aptitude, even if one appeared, it would be the entire family's fortune.
With careful care and resources, he would be able to become a Rank four Gu Master in around ten years. At that time, he would be able to compete for the position of clan leader!
In other words, as long as this Guyue Mobei grew up, he would become the clan elder of the Guyue clan in the future.
It was no wonder that the academy elder was so happy that he laughed, and the elders who were secretly watching all let out a sigh of relief. Then, they all cast envious glances at one of the elders.
This elder also had a long face, it was Guyue Mobei's grandfather, Guyue Mo Chen.
His face was already filled with a smile, and he looked at his old rival provocatively, "How is it, my grandson is not bad, right? Guyue Lian."
Clan elder Guyue Lian had a head of red hair, and at this moment, he snorted coldly and did not reply, his face gloomy and ugly.
An hour later, half of the youngsters had already stepped into the sea of flowers, and there were many C and D grade aptitudes. Of course, almost half of them had no aptitudes at all.
"Sigh, the bloodline is getting thinner, and in these years, the clan has not produced many Rank four experts to strengthen the bloodline.
The fourth generation clan leader was the only Rank five expert, but in the end, he perished together with the Flower Wine Monk, not leaving behind any descendants.
The Guyue clan's younger generation's aptitudes are getting weaker and weaker. "The clan leader sighed deeply.
At this moment, the academy elder shouted, "Guyue Cheng."
Hearing this name, the elders all looked at Guyue Lian, this was Guyue Lian's grandson.
Guyue Cheng was short, his face was full of pockmarks, he clenched his fists, his face was full of sweat, and he seemed especially nervous.
He stepped onto the opposite shore, and the light dots entered his body, he walked thirty-six steps in a row before stopping.
"Another B grade!" The academy elder shouted.
The youngsters were in an uproar, and all cast envious glances at Guyue Cheng.
"Hahaha, thirty-six steps, thirty-six steps!" Guyue Lian shouted, and stared at Guyue Mo Chen to show off.
This time, it was Guyue Mo Chen's turn to be livid.
"Guyue Cheng …" In the crowd, Fang Yuan thoughtfully rubbed his chin.
In his memory, because he cheated in the Awakening Ceremony, he was severely punished by the clan.
In reality, his aptitude was only C grade, but his grandfather Guyue Lian had falsified it for him, so he had the false impression of a B grade aptitude.
In fact, if he wanted to cheat, Fang Yuan had dozens of plans in his mind, and some plans were even more perfect than Guyue Cheng's.
If he showed B grade or A grade aptitude, he would definitely be heavily nurtured by the clan.
But firstly, Fang Yuan's rebirth time was too short, and with his current situation, it was hard for him to prepare any cheating methods.
Secondly, even if he cheated successfully, his cultivation speed in the future would not be able to be concealed, and it would still be exposed.
But this Guyue Cheng was different, his grandfather was Guyue Lian, one of the two most powerful elders in the clan, and he could cover for him.
"Guyue Lian and Guyue Mo Chen have always been enemies, and these two elders are the two biggest factions in the clan.
In order to suppress his opponent, he needed his grandson to have outstanding aptitude.
It was also because he was covering for him that Guyue Cheng was able to hide it for a while.
In my memory, if not for that accident, I would not have been exposed. "
Fang Yuan's eyes flashed, and he thought about how to use this to maximize his benefits.
If he exposed it on the spot, although he would receive a little reward from the clan, he would offend the powerful Guyue Lian, so he could not do it.
In the short term, he could not extort or extort money.
Because his strength was too low, he would bring disaster upon himself.
As he was thinking, he suddenly heard the academy elder call out his name, "Guyue Fang Yuan!"
S-REV-005.summary: Over a hundred fifteen-year-old youths gather for the Awakening Ceremony at the Clan Pavilion. The Academy Elder leads them into an underground cave for the aptitude test. Fang Yuan, possessing memories from his past life, observes the process, recalling the clan's lore and internal politics. Several youths are tested, revealing a range of aptitudes from none to B-grade, with Guyue Mobei achieving B-grade, sparking pride and rivalry among the elders. Fang Yuan also recalls Guyue Cheng's falsified B-grade aptitude and strategizes about his own approach to the test, considering the implications of revealing a higher talent.

continuityMutations.content: Gains a 'Primeval Sea Aperture' with 44% green copper primeval essence, officially becoming a Rank one Gu Master with C-grade talent.
Confirms his memory of receiving C-grade aptitude, and feels indifferent about it, contrasting with his despair in his past life.
Knows the detailed legend of Ren Zu and the Hope Gu, understanding the mechanics of the Awakening Ceremony which is not publicly explained.
Frowns upon Fang Yuan's performance, expecting a higher aptitude, indicating his disappointment.
Central figure in the 'Hope Gu' legend, whose life story illustrates the function and importance of Strength Gu, Wisdom Gu, and Hope Gu.
Generates 'Hope Gu' during the Awakening Ceremony, which coalesce in the bodies of youths and help determine their aptitude.

S-REV-006.prose:
Chapter 5
In an instant, the surroundings became quiet as countless gazes landed on him.
"This is getting more and more exciting." Fang Yuan laughed in his heart. Under everyone's gaze, he crossed the river and stepped onto the other side.
Immediately, he felt a layer of pressure.
This pressure came from the spirit spring in the depths of the flower sea. The spirit spring produced primeval energy, and because the primeval energy was too dense, it caused the pressure.
But soon, from the flowers around Fang Yuan's feet, a light dot rose.
The light dot floated and covered Fang Yuan's entire body, before entering his body.
"This is the Hope Gu." Fang Yuan muttered in his heart.
Although the person in charge did not explain, he knew it clearly.
Every speck of light was a Gu.
The Gu was called Hope.
One of the most ancient legends was about the Hope Gu.
Legend has it that when this world was just formed, it was a desolate land where wild beasts roamed. The first human appeared, his name was Ren Zu.
He ate raw meat and drank blood, living a difficult life.
Especially there was a group of wild beasts called Predicaments, they loved the taste of Ren Zu and wanted to eat him.
Ren Zu did not have a rock-like body, nor did he have the sharp claws of wild beasts, how could he fight against these Predicaments?
His food source was unstable, he had to hide all day, staying at the bottom of the food chain, he could barely survive.
At this time, three Gu came to Ren Zu and said: "As long as you use your life to support us, we will help you get through this."
Ren Zu had no choice, he could only agree to these three Gu.
He first used his youth to nurture the biggest Gu among the three, and that Gu gave him strength.
With strength, Ren Zu's life started to improve, he started to have a stable food source, he had the strength to protect himself.
He was brave and ruthless, defeating many Predicaments.
But soon, he suffered.
In the end, he found that strength was not omnipotent, it needed to be recovered and nurtured, it could not be squandered.
And to the entire Predicament group, his strength alone was too small.
Ren Zu pondered over this painful experience and decided to use his prime years to nurture the most beautiful Gu among the three.
Thus, the second Gu gave him wisdom.
Ren Zu had wisdom, he learned to think and reflect, and started to accumulate experience.
He found that using wisdom was often more effective than using strength.
Relying on his wisdom and strength, he conquered many targets that he couldn't conquer before and killed even more Predicaments.
They ate the flesh and drank the blood of the Predicaments to survive tenaciously.
However, good things didn't last long. The Ren Ancestor grew older and older.
This was because he had given the youngster and middle-aged man to strength Gu and wisdom Gu.
When people get old, their muscles atrophy and their brains slow down.
"Oh human, what else can you give us? You have nothing left to offer us." After the Strength Gu and Wisdom Gu realized this, they left heartlessly.
Ren Zu lost his power and intelligence, and was discovered by the Predicament, he was surrounded by the beast horde.
He was old and couldn't run anymore. His teeth had all fallen off, and he couldn't even chew wild fruits and vegetables.
He powerlessly collapsed to the ground, surrounded by the densely packed predicaments, his heart was filled with despair.
Right at this time, the third Gu said to him: "Oh human, worship me, I can help you escape your predicament."
Ren Zu shed tears: "Gu, what else can I have?
Look, strength Gu and wisdom Gu have abandoned me.
And I only have old age left.
Compared to youngster and middle-aged, old age isn't worth mentioning, but if I worship you with my old age, my life will end immediately.
Although I am surrounded by the Predicaments now, I won't die anytime soon.
I want to live a little longer, even if it's just a second.
So leave, I can't worship you anymore. "
That Gu said: "Among the three Gu, my request is the smallest.
Oh human, you only need to give me your heart. "
"Then I will give you my heart." Ren Zu said: "But oh Gu, what else can you give me?
In this Predicament, even if strength Gu and wisdom Gu return to me, they can't change it. "
Compared to strength Gu, this Gu was the weakest, it was only a small dot of light.
Compared to wisdom Gu, this Gu was the dimmest, it could only emit a weak white light and was not beautiful at all.
But when the human gave his heart to this Gu, this Gu suddenly shone with limitless light. In this light, the Predicaments screamed in fear: "This is the Hope Gu, retreat, we Predicaments are most afraid of hope."
The Predicament beasts immediately retreated in panic.
Ren Zu was dumbstruck, from that moment on, he knew — when facing a Predicament, give your heart to hope.
And at this time, the Hope Gu turned into a beam of light and entered Fang Yuan's body.
Because of the external pressure, they quickly gathered at Fang Yuan's abdomen, forming a ball three inches below his navel.
Fang Yuan immediately felt the pressure lessen.
He took a step forward and continued forward.
With every step he took, there would be Hope Gu flying out from the sea of flowers, entering his body and joining the ball of light.
The ball of light became bigger and brighter.
But the person in charge on the other side of the river frowned.
"The number of Hope Gu seems to be too little." Many elders who had been secretly observing Fang Yuan saw this scene and their hearts sank.
The clan leader also frowned, this was definitely not an A grade talent!
Fang Yuan withstood the pressure and continued forward.
"Below ten steps, they have no cultivation talent.
Between ten to twenty steps, they have D grade talent.
Between twenty to thirty steps, they have C grade talent.
Between thirty to forty steps, they have B grade talent.
Between forty to fifty steps, they have A grade talent.
So far, I have walked twenty-three steps. "
"Twenty-four, twenty-five, twenty-six … twenty-seven."
Fang Yuan silently counted in his heart. When he reached twenty-seven steps, he seemed to hear a boom, the ball of light between his two kidneys in his abdomen had accumulated to its limit and suddenly exploded.
This explosion only happened within Fang Yuan's body, outsiders could not feel it at all. Only Fang Yuan felt an earth-shattering mystery at that moment.
In an instant, all the hairs on his body stood up, his pores closed tightly, his mind was like a drawn bowstring, suddenly tensing up.
Immediately after, his mind suddenly went blank, his entire body limp, as if he had fallen into the clouds.
His heartstrings relaxed, his sweat pores smoothed, and all the pores on his body opened up.
In an instant, his entire body was covered in a thin layer of sweat.
This process, although it sounded long, was actually very short.
It came quickly, and left suddenly.
Fang Yuan was in a daze for only a moment, then he came back to his senses.
He secretly looked into his body, and found that below his belly button, in the middle of his two kidneys, an aperture had appeared out of nowhere.
Opening the aperture was a success!
This was the hope of longevity!!

Chapter 6
The aperture was mysterious, even though it was in Fang Yuan's body, it was not in the same space as his organs.
You could say it was infinitely big, or infinitely small.
Some called it the Zi Fu, some called it the Hua Chi.
But more people called it the Primeval Sea Aperture.
The entire aperture was spherical, the surface of the aperture flowing with white light, it was a layer of light.
It was the layer of light that formed when the Hope Gu exploded.
It was because of this layer of light that the aperture did not collapse.
Inside the aperture was naturally the Primeval Sea.
The seawater was smooth like a mirror, showing a jade-green color, but it was extremely thick, with a copper luster.
This was the condensation of green copper primeval essence that only Rank one Gu Masters had, commonly known as the Bronze Sea.
The sea was less than half of the aperture's height, only 44%.
This was the limitation of a C grade talent.
Every drop of seawater was primeval essence, representing the condensation of Fang Yuan's spirit, symbolizing the life potential he had accumulated over the past fifteen years.
Gu Masters used this primeval essence to activate their Gu worms. This meant that from this moment onwards, Fang Yuan had officially entered the ranks of a Rank one Gu Master.
The aperture was opened, and no more Hope Gu entered Fang Yuan's body.
Fang Yuan retracted his mind, feeling the pressure in front of him was as thick as a wall, and he could not take another step.
"Just like my previous life." He smiled indifferently at this result.
"Can't he walk anymore?" The academy elder held onto a tiny bit of hope, shouting from the other side of the river.
Fang Yuan turned around and walked back, using his actions to answer him.
At this moment, even the youths reacted.
Immediately, there was a buzz, and the crowd was in an uproar.
"What?
Fang Yuan walked twenty-seven steps? "
"So he's only a C grade talent?!"
"Unbelievable, he's such a genius, but only a C grade?"
The crowd was in an uproar.
"Brother …" In the crowd, Guyue Fangzheng raised his head, looking at Fang Yuan who had just returned from the river in shock.
He could not believe the scene in front of him. His brother was only a C grade talent?
He had always thought that his brother would be an A grade talent.
No, not only him, his uncle, aunt, and many others in the clan thought so too.
But now, the result was like this!
"Damn it, it's only a C grade!" The Gu Yue clan leader secretly clenched his fists and sighed deeply, his disappointment evident on his face.
Some of the clan elders who were watching from the shadows frowned, some lowered their heads and discussed, and some sighed at the sky.
"Could there be a mistake in the test?"
"How is this possible?
This method is extremely accurate. Moreover, with us constantly watching, it will be difficult to cheat. "
"But how do you explain his previous performance and talent?"
"The higher the aptitude of the primordial sea, the more extraordinary the characteristics will be.
For example, intelligence, comprehension, memory, strength, agility, and so on.
But conversely, these characteristics don't necessarily mean that one's aptitude is high. Everything depends on the results of the test. "
"Sigh, the greater the hope, the greater the disappointment.
The Guyue Clan is getting worse with each generation. "
…
The ice-cold river water soaked her socks, and it was bone-chilling.
Fang Yuan was still walking expressionlessly. As the distance got closer, he could clearly see the solemn expression of the academy elder, and he could keenly sense the gazes of hundreds of youths.
The gazes were filled with surprise, shock, mockery, schadenfreude, realization, and indifference.
The exact same scene reminded Fang Yuan of his previous life.
At that time, he felt as if the sky had collapsed. He lost his footing and fell while crossing the river. He was drenched and despondent.
But no one helped him up.
These disappointed, indifferent expressions and gazes were like sharp knives cutting into his heart.
His thoughts were in a mess, and his chest was aching.
It was like falling from the clouds to the ground. The higher he stood, the harder he fell.
But, in this life.
Looking at such a scene again, Fang Yuan's heart was extremely calm.
He thought of the legend. When difficulties come, one must give one's heart to hope.
Now, this hope was within him.
Although this hope was not great, it was better than those who had no aptitude for cultivation.
If others were disappointed because of this, then so be it. What could he do?
What did the disappointment of others have to do with him?
The most important thing was that he had hope in his heart!
Five hundred years of life had made him understand one thing: The most interesting part of a person's life was the process of pursuing one's dreams.
There was no need to expect others to not be disappointed or to like you.
Walk your own path, and let others be disappointed and dislike you!
"Sigh …" The academy elder sighed deeply, and shouted, "Next, Guyue Fangzheng."
But no one answered.
"Guyue Fangzheng!" The clan leader shouted, his voice reverberating in the cave.
"Ah?
I'm here, I'm here! "
Fangzheng broke free from his shock, and hurriedly ran out. Unfortunately, he stumbled and fell. With a splash, he coincidentally rolled into the river.
Instantly, everyone laughed.
"The Fang brothers are only so-so." The clan leader of the Guyue clan snorted coldly. He was starting to feel annoyed with Guyue Fangzheng.
"This is so embarrassing!" Fangzheng struggled a few times in the river, but the bottom of the river was too slippery, and he could not stand up.
The result of his efforts was that he became even more clumsy.
He heard waves of laughter in his ears, and this made him even more flustered.
But at this moment, he suddenly felt a strong force pulling him up. His head finally left the water, and his body regained its balance.
He wiped his face awkwardly, and looked again. It was his brother, Fang Yuan, who was grabbing his collar and lifting him up.
"Brother …" He opened his mouth to speak, but all he got in return was choking on the water, which led to another bout of violent coughing.
"Haha, the Fang family's brothers in hardship!" Someone on the bank laughed.
The laughter grew louder, and the academy elder did not stand up to stop them. He frowned deeply, and his heart was filled with disappointment.
Fangzheng did not know what to do, and heard his brother's voice in his ear, "Go, the road ahead will be very exciting."
Fangzheng could not help but open his mouth in shock. At this moment, Fang Yuan's back was facing the crowd, so the people on the bank could not see clearly.
But Fangzheng could clearly feel Fang Yuan's calmness. When he spoke, the corner of his mouth even slightly curled up, revealing a deep and playful smile.
"It's obviously only a C grade talent, why is brother so calm?" Unconsciously, Fangzheng's heart was filled with doubts.
Fang Yuan did not say anything more, and patted Fangzheng's back, and turned to leave.
Fangzheng's expression was blank, and he walked towards the sea of flowers.
"I did not expect brother to be so calm. If it was me, I'm afraid …" He lowered his head, and walked forward unconsciously.
But he did not know that he was performing a miraculous performance.
When he woke up, he was already standing in the depths of the sea of flowers, a distance that no one had reached before.
Forty-three steps!
"Oh my god, A grade talent!!!" The academy elder lost his composure and shouted.
"A grade, it's actually A grade talent?!"
"It's been three years, the Guyue clan has finally produced a genius with A grade talent!"
The clan elders who were watching in secret also shouted at the same time, greatly losing their composure.
"Yes, the Guyue Fangzheng bloodline was originally separated from our Chi bloodline, so this Guyue Fangzheng will be adopted by our Chi bloodline." Guyue Lian immediately announced.
"How is that possible?
You, Chi Lian old ghost, what virtue or ability do you have, but your ability to mislead people is not bad.
Why don't you give this child to me, Guyue Mochen, to raise? "Guyue Mochen roared as if he had been electrocuted.
"Everyone stop arguing.
No one can raise this child better than me, the clan leader, raising him personally.
Whoever has an objection is opposing me, Guyue Bo! "Guyue clan leader's eyes were scarlet red, and his previous disappointment and dispiritedness were swept away. His entire person had gone mad.
S-REV-006.summary: Fang Yuan is called for his aptitude test. As he steps into the sea of moon orchids, he feels pressure and observes 'Hope Gu' entering his body. He recalls the ancient legend of Ren Zu and the Hope Gu, understanding the process while outwardly appearing calm. He consciously counts his steps, reaching 27, at which point the accumulated Hope Gu explodes, forming his 'Primeval Sea Aperture' with 44% green copper primeval essence, indicating a C-grade talent. He smiles indifferently at this result, which aligns with his past life's experience.

continuityMutations.content: Demonstrates composure and indifference to the clan's disappointment in his C-grade aptitude, contrasting with his past life's emotional turmoil.
Subtly manipulates Fangzheng into stepping forward for his test, hinting at foreknowledge of Fangzheng's A-grade aptitude.
Is profoundly shocked by Fang Yuan's C-grade aptitude and later by his own A-grade aptitude, changing his perception of his brother.
Sweeps away his previous disappointment with Fang Yuan and becomes ecstatic and aggressive in claiming Fangzheng as an A-grade talent for the clan.
Becomes livid when Guyue Lian attempts to claim Fangzheng and actively fights for the right to adopt the A-grade talent.
Immediately attempts to claim Fangzheng for his bloodline upon the revelation of his A-grade aptitude, further escalating his rivalry with Mo Chen.
Original reason for Guyue clan's settlement at Qing Mao Mountain due to its spirit spring.
Spirit spring produces Yuan stone, vital for the clan.
Contains the clan's largest breeding ground for moon orchids, an ingredient for Gu worms.
Part of the Awakening Ceremony's aptitude test; crossing it and progressing through the sea of flowers determines one's talent level.

C-REV-04.transition: Stumbles, falls into the river, is helped up by Fang Yuan, and then walks into the sea of flowers.

S-REV-007.summary: Fang Yuan, having received a C-grade aptitude, calmly walks back across the river, prompting widespread surprise and disappointment among the youths and elders. His brother, Guyue Fangzheng, is particularly shocked. The clan leader expresses deep disappointment. Fang Yuan, unmoved by the negative reactions, helps a clumsy Fangzheng into the river after he stumbles. With a subtle, playful smile, Fang Yuan encourages Fangzheng, who then unconsciously walks an unprecedented 43 steps, revealing A-grade talent. This discovery throws the elders into an uproar, leading to an immediate, heated dispute between Guyue Mo Chen, Guyue Lian, and the Guyue Clan Leader over who will adopt and nurture Fangzheng.

events: lecture on Gu Master ranks and talent

relationshipMutations.type: Growing envy and subtle disdain due to differing talent.

S-REV-008.prose:
Chapter 7 Very quickly, a week had passed. "Man is the spirit of all living beings, Gu is the essence of heaven and earth. In this world, there are thousands and tens of thousands of Gu, countless of them. They live all around us, in the mines, in the grass, and even in the bodies of wild beasts. " "In the process of human reproduction, our ancestors gradually discovered the mysteries of Gu worms. Those who have already opened their apertures and used their own primeval essence to feed, refine, and control these Gu to achieve their goals, we call them Gu Masters. " "And all of you have already successfully opened your apertures in the Awakening Ceremony seven days ago, condensing your primeval sea, and are now Rank one Gu Masters." In the village's academy, the academy elder was speaking with fervor and assurance. In front of him sat 57 youths, each of them listening attentively. The mysteries and power of Gu Masters had long been engraved into the hearts of the youths. Thus, everything that the clan elder had said deeply attracted them. At this time, a youth raised his hand, and after getting permission from the elder, he stood up and asked, "Sir elder, I have known since I was young that Gu Masters are divided into Rank one, Rank two, and so on. Can you explain in detail to us?" Master Guyue nodded, gesturing for the youth to sit down, "Gu Masters have a total of nine realms, from bottom to top, they are Rank one, Rank two, Rank three, all the way to Rank nine. Every Rank realm is divided into initial stage, middle stage, upper stage, and peak stage, four small realms. You have just become Gu Masters, and are all Rank one initial stage. " "If you work hard in your cultivation, your cultivation will naturally increase, and it is even possible to advance to Rank two or Rank three. Of course, the higher the talent, the higher the possibility of advancement. " "D grade talent, the primeval sea takes up 20-30% of the aperture, and can usually cultivate to Rank one or Rank two. C grade talent, the primeval sea takes up 40-50% of the aperture, and usually stops at Rank two. Only a few are lucky enough to break through to Rank three initial stage. B grade talent, the primeval sea takes up 60-70% of the aperture, and can cultivate to Rank three or even Rank four. A grade talent, the primeval sea is sufficient, and the aperture is formed.

This kind of person naturally has the highest talent, and is most suitable for Gu Master cultivation, and can cultivate to Rank five. " "As for Gu Masters above Rank six, each one is a legend, and I am not too sure about the specifics. Our Guyue tribe has never produced a rank six Gu Master, but we have had rank five and rank four Gu Masters. " The youths' ears perked up, their eyes shining brightly as they listened. Many people couldn't help but look at Guyue Fangzheng, who was sitting upright and still in the first row. This was an A grade aptitude! Their eyes were filled with envy and jealousy. At the same time, there were also some gazes that drifted towards the corner of the last row of the classroom. In the corner by the window, Guyue and Fang Yuan were sleeping soundly on the table. "Look, he's still sleeping," someone said softly. "You've been sleeping for a week, haven't you recovered yet?" Someone curled their lips. "That's not all. I heard that he doesn't even return at night and loiters outside the village." "Some people saw him more than once, hugging a jar of wine at night, drunk outside. Fortunately, the area around the village has been purged in recent years, so it's relatively safe. "His classmates whispered to each other, and all kinds of rumors quickly spread. "Sigh, the blow is indeed too great. He's been known as a genius for so many years, but in the end, he's only a C grade, hehe. " "If that's the case, then it's fine. But that little brother of his, was tested to be an A grade, and is now the center of attention, enjoying the best treatment. The little brother is in the sky, and the big brother is on the ground, hehe … " Listening to the increasingly loud discussions, the academy elder's eyebrows had already formed a knot. In the entire classroom, all the youths were sitting upright and still, glowing with vitality.

Because of this, the sleeping Fang Yuan on the table was even more eye-catching and eye-catching. "It's already been a week, and he's still so dispirited. Hmph, I made an error in judgment, how could this kind of person be a genius! "The elder snorted coldly in his heart. Regarding this situation, he had already told Fang Yuan many times. But it was to no avail, and Fang Yuan continued to do as he pleased. He slept through every class, causing the elder in charge of teaching to have a headache and frustration. "Forget it, he's just a C grade. He can't even take this little blow, if he were to be nurtured with this kind of temperament, he wouldn't be of much use, and would instead be a waste of the clan's resources. "The elder was extremely disappointed in Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan was only a C grade talent, and in comparison, his brother Fangzheng had an A grade talent. This was the person who was worth the clan spending a lot of effort to nurture. As the academy elder thought, he continued the topic from before, "In the history of our clan, there have been many strong people. Among them, there were two Rank five strong people. One was the first generation clan leader, our ancestor, and he was the one who founded the Guyue village. The other was the fourth generation clan leader. His talent was outstanding, and he cultivated all the way to the realm of a Rank five Gu Master. If not for that despicable and shameless demon, the Flower Wine Monk's sneak attack, he might have even advanced to Rank six Gu Master. Sigh … " At this point, the Guyue clan leader sighed deeply. Below the podium, the youths started to shout with righteous indignation. "It's all because of that Flower Wine Monk, he's too cunning!" "It's a pity that our fourth generation clan leader was kind-hearted and died young." "I only hate that I wasn't born a few hundred years earlier, or else when I see that demon, I'll definitely expose his ugly face."

The story of the fourth generation clan leader and the Flower Wine Monk, everyone in the Guyue clan knew of it. The Flower Wine Monk was also a Rank five Gu Master, a rapist who had done evil for many years, and was famous in the demonic path at that time. Hundreds of years ago, he fled to Qing Mao mountain and attempted to commit a crime in the Guyue village, but was seen through by the fourth generation clan leader. After an earth-shattering battle, the Flower Wine Monk was beaten to the point of kneeling and begging for mercy. The fourth generation clan leader was kind and merciful, and decided to spare his life. In the end, the Flower Wine Monk suddenly launched a sneak attack and heavily injured the fourth generation clan leader. The clan leader was furious, and killed the Flower Wine Monk on the spot, but he died from his heavy injuries and passed away. Thus, in the hearts of all the Guyue clan members, the fourth generation clan leader was a hero who sacrificed himself for the village. "The Flower Wine Monk huh …" Awakened by the condemnation in the academy, Fang Yuan opened his sleepy eyes in the corner. He stretched his body, and his heart was full of resentment. "This Flower Wine Monk, where did he die? Why haven't I found his inheritance even after looking all around the village? " In his memory, about two months later, a clan Gu Master was drunk from a breakup, lying outside the village in a drunken stupor. In the end, the fragrance of the wine attracted a Liquor worm. The Gu Master was overjoyed, and wanted to capture it. The Liquor worm hurriedly escaped, and the Gu Master chased after it. Following the Liquor worm's trail, he found a secret cave entrance that led underground. The Liquor worm was a very precious Gu. This Gu Master was drunk, and took the risk to enter the cave entrance, coming to the secret underground cave. Then he found the Flower Wine Monk's corpse, and the inheritance he left behind. After the Gu Master returned to the village, he reported all his findings, and immediately caused a huge commotion in the clan. And that Gu Master also benefited from this, and his cultivation became more and more outstanding, even attracting the lover who had abandoned him to change his mind. He became an influential figure for a time.

"It's a pity that I only heard the gist of the news, and did not know the exact location. At that time, I did not think that I would be reborn one day. Flower Wine Monk, where did you die? " These days, he had bought a lot of wine, and when night fell, he would wander around the village. He wanted to use the smell of wine to attract the Liquor worm. Unfortunately, he did not see the Liquor worm, and the result was very disappointing. "If I could find that Liquor worm and refine it as my vital Gu, it would be much better than the Moonlight Gu in the clan. In the blink of an eye, it's already April. Time waits for no man. "Fang Yuan sighed, and his gaze turned towards the window. Under the blue sky and white clouds, a verdant mountain range stretched out. Nearby was a bamboo forest. This was the unique spear bamboo of Qing Mao mountain. Each was as straight as a straight line, and at the same time, the tip was abnormally sharp, like the tip of a spear. In the forest not far away, there was already a new green. The sprouts that came out were yellow and green. From time to time, there would be beautiful colorful sparrows landing on the branches. The spring wind blew, wrapping around the fresh scent of green mountains and clear waters, and blowing it into the world. Unknowingly, the class was nearing its end. The academy elder finally informed, "In this week, I have taught you how to meditate, and examine your own aperture's primeval sea. How to meditate, and move the primeval essence in your body. Now, it's time to refine your vital Gu. After this class ends, you will go to the academy's Gu room, and choose your Gu.
S-REV-008.summary: The Academy Elder instructs new Gu Masters on cultivation ranks and talent grades, emphasizing the importance of A-grade aptitude. Guyue Fangzheng basks in the attention his A-grade talent garners, while whispers spread about Fang Yuan's C-grade talent and perceived decline. The elder expresses disappointment in Fang Yuan, subtly dismissing his potential. The elder then recounts the clan's history, demonizing the Flower Wine Monk, before announcing the time for students to select their vital Gu.

continuityMutations.content: The knowledge that the Moonlight Gu is the Guyue clan's guardian Gu, cultivated by secret methods, and not found elsewhere.
The realization that he doesn't know the exact location of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, only the general timing.
The understanding that refining the Liquor worm as his vital Gu would be 'much better' than the Moonlight Gu.
The place where new Gu Masters select their first vital Gu.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked out of the Gu room and into the academy.

S-REV-009.prose:
After choosing your Gu, go home and cultivate. Until you have refined the Gu, then come back to the academy to continue your lessons. At the same time, this is also your first test. Whoever can come out on top will receive a generous reward of twenty Yuan stone. " Oh! The next moment, the entire academy cheered. "Finally, it's time to refine the Gu. Then what Gu should I choose?" Fang Yuan's eyes flashed. ================================================== Chapter 8 A Gu room was set up beside the classroom. The Gu room was not big, only sixty square meters. When a Gu Master cultivated, Gu worms were the key to their strength. Once the lesson ended, the excited youths swarmed towards the Gu room. "Line up, come in one by one." An angry voice sounded. There were naturally guards outside the Gu room. The youths went in one by one and came out. It was Fang Yuan's turn to enter the Gu room. The room was huge, the four walls were made into partitions, and these square cubicles were connected to each other. The cubicles were big and small, the big ones were bigger than a casserole, the small ones smaller than a fist. In the densely packed cubicles, there were all kinds of utensils. Some were grey stone basins, some were green jade plates, some were exquisite grass cages, and some were pottery stoves. These utensils contained all kinds of Gu worms.

Some Gu worms were silent, but some were very noisy. They made all kinds of sounds, such as squeaking, gurgling, rustling, and so on, forming a symphony of life. "Gu worms are also divided into nine levels, corresponding to the nine realms of a Gu Master. These Gu worms are all Rank one. "Fang Yuan looked around and immediately understood. Generally speaking, a Rank one Gu Master could only use Rank one Gu worms. If they used a higher level Gu worm, the Gu Master would have to pay a heavy price. And Gu worms also needed to be fed, and the price of feeding a higher level Gu worm was not something a lower level Gu Master could afford. For a new Gu Master, unless it was a special situation, they would choose a Rank one Gu worm for their first refinement. And the first Gu worm that a Gu Master refined had great significance. It was called the vital Gu, and was connected to the Gu Master's life. Once it died, the Gu Master would suffer a heavy loss.
