As the night deepened, Fang Yuan walked in the bamboo forest around the village, recalling all the known clues in his mind. "Putting myself in his shoes, if I were that Gu Master and found the Flower Wine Monk's treasure, why didn't I take it for myself, but report it to the clan? Don't mention the clan's honor, humans are greedy. What made that Gu Master go against his heart and willingly give up all his benefits to report this to the clan's higher-ups? " The truth was always hidden in the fog of history. Fang Yuan racked his brains, but to no avail. After all, there were too few clues. There were only two clues, but they were also mixed and could not be fully trusted. Fang Yuan couldn't help but think of himself, "No matter what, after buying this jar of Green Bamboo Wine, I only have two Yuan stone left. If he still couldn't find the inheritance, it would be troublesome. Today's action can be considered as staking everything on a single throw! " However, he did not have enough Yuan stone to refine Gu worms. Instead, it was better to invest in this wine to increase the success rate of this trip. If it was someone else, most of them would have collected Yuan stone step by step. However, this was too inefficient for Fang Yuan. He would rather take the risk and fight. People of the Devil Dao always liked to take risks.

At this moment … The night deepened, and the spring moon hung like a bow. Floating clouds covered the moonlight, as if covering the crescent moon with a thin veil. Because of the three days and three nights of heavy rain, the turbid air in the mountains was washed clean, leaving only the purest fresh air. Such fresh air was as pure as a piece of white paper, and was more conducive to the spread of the wine's fragrance. This was one of the reasons why Fang Yuan was so confident tonight. "Only this area is left unexplored." Walking into a bamboo forest, he stopped. The seven days of exploration were not without results. At least it proved that the Flower Wine Monk did not die in those places. This was the second reason why Fang Yuan was so confident. In the bamboo forest, the grass was luxuriant, the white flowers were endless, and the Green Spear Bamboos were straight like jade poles. Fang Yuan opened the small jar's mud seal, and immediately a strong fragrance of wine assaulted his nose. Green Bamboo Wine could be said to be the best wine in the Guyue village. This was the third reason why Fang Yuan was so confident tonight. "With these three reasons, if I want to succeed, it must be tonight!" Fang Yuan secretly cheered in his heart, and slowly tilted the jar, pouring a small amount of Green Bamboo Wine onto a stone. If those hunters saw this scene, they would definitely be distressed. This wine was worth a whole two primeval stones …. But Fang Yuan was indifferent. The mellow fragrance of the wine quickly spread. In the night, the wind was gentle, and the fragrance floated, soaking the bamboo forest. Fang Yuan stood where he was, smelling the wine, and waited for a moment, but there was no movement. He only heard a nightingale-like bird, not far away, its voice like a string of silver bells. His eyes were calm, and he was not surprised. He moved his feet, turned around, and went to the next place a few hundred meters away. At this place, he did the same thing, poured out some wine, and stood still for a moment.

He did this three or five times, changed a few places, and poured wine a few times. There was not much Green Bamboo Wine left in the jar. "This is the last time." Fang Yuan sighed in his heart, and completely inverted the jar in his hand. The bottom of the jar was facing the sky, and he poured out all the remaining wine. The wine spilled on the grass, and the grass swayed. The wild flowers were wet with the wine, and slightly drooped their heads. Fang Yuan stood still, holding on to his last hope, and gazed around. It was already late at night. A thick cloud obscured the moonlight here. The shadow was like a layer of curtain, covering the bamboo forest. The surroundings were silent, the stalks of Qing Mao Bamboos stood alone, leaving behind straight up and down silhouettes in Fang Yuan's eyes. He quietly stood in the same place, listening to his extremely clear breathing, and then feeling the little remaining hope in his chest, constantly fading away. "Still failed." He murmured in his heart, "Tonight, three big advantages accumulated together, but still failed. I can't find the shadow of the Liquor worm. This means that the success rate will be even lower in the future. I only have two Yuan stone left, and I still need to refine the Moonlight Gu. I can't take any more risks. " The result of taking risks was often not ideal. But if it was the ideal result, then the profits would be considerable. Fang Yuan liked to take risks, but he was not addicted to gambling. He was not the kind of gambler who would lose red eyes and want to win back his losses. He had his own bottom line, and he was clear about his own capital. Now, five hundred years of life experience told him that it was time to stop. Sometimes, life was like this.

There was often such a goal, and it was so beautiful and full of temptation. It seemed to be close at hand, but no matter how much effort he put in, he could never reach it. It made people toss and turn, thinking about it day and night. "This is the helplessness of life, but also the charm of life." Fang Yuan shook his head with a bitter smile, and turned around to leave. At this time. A gust of wind blew, like a gentle arm, gently brushing away the floating clouds in the night sky. The floating clouds leisurely passed, revealing the hidden crescent moon. The crescent moon hung in the sky, like a white jade cup, pouring the clear moonlight down. The moonlight poured on the green bamboo forest, poured on the rocks, poured on the mountain streams, poured on Fang Yuan's body. Fang Yuan wore a simple robe, his young face under the gentle touch of the moonlight, looked even whiter. The darkness seemed to disappear in an instant, and was replaced by a snow-like frost. As if infected by the moonlight, the silent nightingales began to sing again. This time, it was not just one, but several, scattered in the bamboo forest, responding one after another. At the same time, a kind of Dragonpill cricket that lived in the mountains, under the moonlight, also sang the song of life. They were insects that only came out at night, and their bodies emitted a red light. At this moment, they jumped out in groups, each of their bodies flashing with a red agate like brilliance. At first glance, Fang Yuan thought that this group of Dragonpill crickets was like a jumping scarlet water, stepping on the grass and wild flowers, leaping in the bamboo forest under the moonlight. The bamboo forest was as clear as a pool of water, and the green spear bamboo, under the moonlight, flashed with a jade-like brilliance. There was light at the end of the tunnel, nature was showing its beauty to Fang Yuan at this moment. Fang Yuan unconsciously stopped, feeling like he was in a fairyland. He was about to turn and leave, but at this moment, he subconsciously turned back to look. The wild flowers and grass that were poured with the green bamboo wine, slightly trembling in the wind, still empty. Fang Yuan laughed at himself, withdrawing his gaze. However. He did not think that in the process of raising his eyes, he would see a white snow shadow.

This snow shadow was attached to a green spear bamboo pole not far away, under the moonlight, like a perfectly round pearl hanging. Fang Yuan's pupils suddenly dilated, his body slightly trembled, his heart thumping faster and faster. It was the Liquor worm!
S-REV-017.summary: Fang Yuan walks through the bamboo forest, reflecting on the unreliable nature of historical accounts and the high-risk gamble of his current treasure hunt, having spent most of his resources. He systematically pours Green Bamboo Wine in various spots, hoping to attract the Liquor worm. After several failed attempts and a moment of despair, a shift in the moonlight illuminates a Liquor worm on a bamboo pole, validating his efforts and renewing his hope.

continuityMutations.content: Decides to keep the Photo-audio Gu's recording of the Guyue clan's suppressed history to sell to rival clans for personal gain, rather than report it to his own clan.
Learns the true, suppressed history of the Flower Wine Monk's death and the Guyue clan's fourth generation leader's betrayal, directly contradicting the clan's official narrative.
Acquires a Liquor worm and 15 Yuan stones from the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
Reaffirms his belief in self-reliance, rejecting dependence on the clan for his cultivation.
Discovered the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance in Fang Yuan's previous life but reported it to the clan due to fear and perceived low value of the findings.
Is successfully captured by Fang Yuan after becoming intoxicated.
Usually dry, but recently flooded due to heavy rains.
A miniature waterfall has carved a crack into a large boulder, leading to a secret cave.

C-REV-01.transition: Ran with all his might through the bamboo forest, pursuing the Liquor worm under the moonlight.

C-REV-22.transition: Flew drunkenly through the bamboo forest, leading Fang Yuan.

S-REV-018.prose:
Chapter 14
The Liquor worm's body was like a silkworm, its whole body exuding a pearl-like white light. It was a little chubby and looked very cute.
It fed on wine and could fly in the air.
When flying, it would curl its body into a ball, and its speed was very fast.
Although it was a Rank one Gu, its value was more precious than some Rank two Gu worms.
If it was used as a vital Gu, it would be much better than the Moonlight Gu.
At this moment, such a Liquor worm was attached to a green spear bamboo that was only fifty or sixty steps away from Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan held his breath. He did not approach rashly, but slowly retreated.
He knew that although this distance was very close, to capture the Liquor worm directly was extremely difficult for a newly enlightened Gu Master like himself. In other words, there was no hope of success at all.
With Fang Yuan's current eyesight, although he could not clearly see the Liquor worm's appearance, he could vaguely feel the Liquor worm's vigilance towards him.
Fang Yuan retreated very slowly and gently, trying not to disturb the Liquor worm.
He knew that if the Liquor worm wanted to fly away, he would not be able to catch up with it at his speed. He had to wait until it was drunk and its flying speed slowed down to have a chance to capture it.
Seeing Fang Yuan retreating further and further, the Liquor worm lying on the bamboo pole could not help but become restless.
The strong wine aroma in front of it tempted it, attracted it, and captivated it.
If it had saliva, it would have already dripped a large pool of saliva.
But the Liquor worm's vigilance was still very high. Fang Yuan had retreated two hundred steps before it bounced and jumped into the air.
As it floated in the air, its body curled into a ball, like a small white glutinous ball.
The glutinous ball drew a round arc in the air and landed on the grass where Fang Yuan had dripped the green bamboo wine.
With the delicious food in front of it, the Liquor worm let down its guard. It anxiously crawled to the flower bud that contained the wine and poked its head in, leaving only its chubby tail outside.
It was very hungry, and the green bamboo wine was so delicious. It took a big gulp and was soon immersed in the delicious food, forgetting Fang Yuan at the back of its mind.
At this time, Fang Yuan began to carefully and quietly approach.
He saw the tail of the liquor worm outside the flower bud.
The tail was like the tail of a silkworm. It was chubby and round, and the halo it emitted reminded people of pearls.
At first, its tail hung outside, motionless.
After a while, the tail began to curl up and down. It was obvious that the Liquor Worm was very happy to drink.
In the end, when Fang Yuan was only ten steps away from it, its tail began to sway left and right with a cheerful rhythm.
He was completely drunk!
Seeing this scene, Fang Yuan almost laughed out loud.
He did not move forward, but waited patiently.
If he were to pounce on it now, there was a high chance that he would be able to capture the Liquor worm. However, Fang Yuan still wanted the Liquor worm to lead the way and lead him to the Flower Wine Monk's corpse.
After a while, the Liquor worm withdrew from the flower bud.
Its body had grown fatter, and its head was swaying back and forth like a drunkard. It was completely unaware of Fang Yuan's presence.
It climbed to another bright yellow wildflower, perched in the pistils, and feasted on the nectar.
After drinking this time, it finally felt full.
Its body slowly shrank into a ball on the flower petals, and then slowly flew up until it was about one and a half meters above the ground. Only then did it leisurely fly into the depths of the bamboo forest.
Fang Yuan hurriedly followed.
The Liquor worm was already drunk, and its flying speed was reduced to half of its usual speed.
But even so, Fang Yuan still had to run with all his might to keep up with its figure.
The night was like a wash. The youth quickly shuttled through the bamboo forest, chasing after a bead of snow not far ahead.
The moonlight was gentle, and the cool breeze was gentle.
The bamboo forest was as clear as a pool of water. Green spear bamboos quickly flashed in front of Fang Yuan's eyes, and then fell behind the youth.
On the ground, there was lush green grass, dotted with wildflowers.
There were also small stones with moss growing on them, and tender yellow bamboo shoots that had yet to mature.
Fang Yuan's faint shadow also quickly traversed the ground, passing through the black lines that the Green Spear bamboos had left on the ground.
He closely stared at the snow shadow, and in the faint fragrance of the wine, he breathed in the fresh air of the mountain forest, and moved his legs to follow closely behind.
Because of the rapid movement, the moonlight in his eyes was like water. Light and shadow moved frequently, as if he was running on water overgrown with aquatic plants.
The Liquor worm flew out of the bamboo forest, and Fang Yuan also rushed out.
A large field of white flowers with a yellowish center scattered petals by his legs with the help of the strong wind.
A group of Dragonpill crickets, like a flowing poem, coincidentally flowed to the front. Fang Yuan rushed straight past them. Suddenly, with a splash, a red cloud bloomed in front of him, and a field of Red Star Fireflies was dispersed.
A quietly flowing mountain stream, paved with pebbles, gurgling, and reflecting the spring moon in the night sky.
With a few popping sounds, Fang Yuan waded through the water and crushed it into thousands of silver ripples.
Unfortunately, a stream of Moon Breeze had crushed Qiong Yao.
Fang Yuan chased relentlessly, following closely behind the Liquor worm.
Going up the mountain stream, he could already faintly hear the sound of a waterfall. After turning around a sparse forest, he saw the Liquor worm fly into a narrow crack of a boulder.
Fang Yuan's eyes suddenly brightened, and he stopped.
"So it's here."
He panted heavily, his heart pounding. When he stopped, he immediately felt sweat all over his body. A wave of hot air, along with the accelerated flow of his blood, surged through his body.
Looking around, he found that this was a shallow river bank.
Pebbles of all sizes covered the ground, and the river water was only about a finger's height above the pebbles.
There were also pieces of grey-white boulders scattered randomly here.
At the back of Qing Mao Mountain was a large waterfall.
The flow of the waterfall changed according to the weather. It plunged thousands of feet, crashing into a deep pool.
Beside the deep pool was the Bai family's stronghold. It was powerful, and not weaker than the Guyue's stronghold.
The waterfall also had branches. Obviously, what Fang Yuan was facing was a branch within a branch.
This river bank was usually dry.
But there was a recent heavy rain, which lasted for three days and three nights, causing a shallow stream of water to accumulate here.
The source of the water was the boulder that the Liquor worm had drilled into.
The boulder was leaning against the vertical mountain wall.
A slender miniature waterfall branched out from the large waterfall, like a silver python hanging down the mountain wall, hitting the boulder. After a long time, it washed out the center of the boulder, creating a crack.
At this time, the waterfall was washing down, and the water was slightly roaring.
Like a white curtain, it completely blocked the gap between the boulder.
Taking advantage of the time of observation, Fang Yuan's breath was no longer so rushed.
His eyes flashed with a determined light. He walked to the boulder, took a deep breath, and rushed in.
The gap between the boulder was quite large, and two adults walking side by side would have no problem.
Moreover, Fang Yuan's body was only that of a fifteen-year-old youth.
As soon as he rushed in, the rapid flow of water pressed down on Fang Yuan's body. At the same time, the ice-cold water soaked Fang Yuan's body from top to bottom.
Fang Yuan shouldered the water pressure, and quickly moved forward. After a few dozen steps, the water pressure gradually decreased.
But the gap was also shrinking, and Fang Yuan had to walk sideways.
The roaring sound of water was in his ears, and the top of his head was bright white. Deep inside the boulder was a mass of darkness.
What was hidden in the darkness?
Perhaps it was a sinister poisonous snake, perhaps it was a highly poisonous gecko, perhaps it was a trap set by the Flower Wine Monk, or perhaps it was nothing.
Fang Yuan turned sideways, and slowly squeezed into the darkness.
The water above his head was already gone.
The stone wall was covered with moss, and when it rubbed against Fang Yuan's body, it was extremely slippery.
Fang Yuan was completely swallowed by the darkness, and the gap between the boulder became narrower and narrower. Gradually, his head was unable to move freely.
Fang Yuan gritted his teeth, and continued to move forward.
After walking for more than twenty steps, he noticed that there seemed to be a red shadow in the darkness.
At first he thought it was an illusion, but after blinking and looking again, he confirmed that it was indeed light!
This discovery made him excited.
After another 50 or 60 steps, the red light became brighter, and in Fang Yuan's retina, it gradually expanded into a long vertical slit.
He stretched out his left arm, and suddenly felt the stone wall in front of him bend.
Fang Yuan was instantly overjoyed, he knew that there was a space inside the boulder.
He quickly walked a few steps, and finally squeezed into the light slit.
His eyes suddenly widened, and a space of about 80 square meters, appeared in front of Fang Yuan.
"I've walked such a long distance, I've already passed the boulder, I should be in the mountain wall now." He moved his arms and legs, and stretched his limbs, while sizing up this hidden space.
The entire space was filled with a dim red light, and he did not know where the source of the light came from.
The surrounding stone walls were very damp, and covered with moss, but the air here was very dry.
On this stone wall, there were already withered vines attached to it.
The vines intertwined with each other, weaving most of the stone walls in all directions.
There were also some withered flower roots growing on it.
Fang Yuan looked at these withered flowers and leaves, feeling that they were somewhat familiar.
"It's the Wine Sack Flower Gu and the Rice Bag Grass Gu." Suddenly, he had a flash of inspiration, recognizing these withered flower stems and vines.
There were many forms of Gu.
Some looked like ores, such as the blue crystal Moonlight Gu.
Some looked like bugs, such as the silkworm-like Liquor worm.
And then there were the forms of flowers and plants, such as the Wine Sack Flower Gu and the Rice Bag Grass Gu in front of Fang Yuan.
These two Gu were both Rank one natural Gu.
As long as primeval essence was injected, they could grow.
After growing, the flower core would secrete nectar wine, and the grass bag would grow fragrant rice.
Fang Yuan followed the roots of the vines, and moved his gaze. Sure enough, in the corner of the wall, the withered roots were bunched up, bulging together.
The Liquor worm was resting on top of this bundle of dead roots, snoring away. It was already within his reach.
Fang Yuan walked over, and first kept the Liquor worm in his arms. Then he squatted down, and pushed aside the dead roots and withered vines, and found a white skeleton wrapped inside.
"I've finally found you, Flower Wine Monk." Seeing this, his lips curled into a smile.
Just as he was about to reach out and peel off the withered vines, at this moment!
"Why don't you try moving?" A voice filled with murderous intent suddenly sounded from behind Fang Yuan.
S-REV-018.summary: Fang Yuan observes a Liquor worm in the bamboo forest and strategically retreats to bait it with green bamboo wine. After the worm becomes intoxicated, he cautiously approaches and then pursues it through the night. The intoxicated worm's slower flight allows Fang Yuan to keep pace, guiding him deeper into the mountain landscape.

continuityMutations.content: The Liquor worm, 15 Yuan stones, and knowledge of the Flower Wine Monk's true demise and the Guyue clan's historical cover-up.
The existence and function of Photo-audio Gu, Wine Sack Flower Gu, and Rice Bag Grass Gu.
His true history, including his fight with the Guyue fourth generation leader and his subsequent death, is revealed through the Photo-audio Gu.
His corpse is discovered by Fang Yuan, containing the Liquor worm and some Yuan stones.
Is revealed to have betrayed and ambushed the Flower Wine Monk, leading to both their deaths, a historical truth suppressed by the Guyue clan.
Witnessed the battle between the Flower Wine Monk and the Fourth Generation Tribe Leader, and later engaged in battle with the Monk.
Contains the remains of the Flower Wine Monk.
Home to a Photo-audio Gu that records past events.

Chapter 15
In this secret cave, another person's voice could be heard from behind him.
Even Fang Yuan had goosebumps, his scalp tingling.
He was actually being followed!
Could it be that these past few days, he had repeatedly gone out and attracted the attention of others?
Or could it be someone sent by his uncle?
Even in his mind, the Rank one Gu Master in the inn, the youth called Jiang Ya, flashed past.
In that instant, countless thoughts and guesses flashed through his mind, and he quickly thought of a solution.
Fang Yuan could feel that this short sentence was filled with deep killing intent.
This made him groan inwardly. He was only a Rank one initial stage now, and did not even have a vital Gu. To a Gu Master, his battle strength was close to zero, how could he fight?
"Too weak, too weak!" He roared in his heart.
"You have already been poisoned by my unique Gu. Without my corresponding antidote, after seven days, you will definitely turn into pus and blood and die." The voice behind him sounded again.
Fang Yuan gritted his teeth, his expression calm, his tone low, "You want the Liquor worm?
I can give it to you. "
He slowly stood up, his movements very slow.
But at this moment, another person's voice sounded.
This voice was filled with fear, trembling, "I can give it to you, I can give it to you, as long as you spare my life, Flower Wine Monk!"
"Wait, this is …" Fang Yuan's brows furrowed into a knot, and he suddenly turned around.
On the stone wall in front of him, light and shadow fluctuated, and a scene appeared.
A valiant Gu Master stood at the peak of the mountain, and at his feet, was another Gu Master kneeling.
Around the two Gu Masters, there was a collapsed pit and shattered rocks. It was obvious that they had just experienced an intense battle.
Not far away from the two, there was a group of spectating elders. Looking at this scene, they all had an expression of anger and fear.
The victorious Gu Master raised his head and laughed, "Hahaha, hero Guyue, at such a young age, you already have Rank five cultivation.
I thought you were someone, but I did not expect you to be so weak.
Hmph! "
This laughing Gu Master had long and narrow eyes, wearing a pink robe with wide sleeves that fluttered in the wind. The collar of his robe was wide open, revealing his firm and jade-like chest muscles.
The most eye-catching thing was his bald head. It was shiny, without a single strand of hair.
"Flower Wine Monk!" Fang Yuan saw through this Gu Master's identity at a glance.
"Compared to Lord Flower Wine, this junior is nothing!
Junior was muddle-headed, to actually have eyes but failed to recognize Mount Tai and offended Lord Flower Wine.
Lord Flower Wine, please take into account our tribe's hospitality earlier and spare my life! "The Gu Master kneeling on the ground trembled, cold sweat dripping down his face as he begged for mercy with tears and mucus flowing down his face.
Fang Yuan squinted his eyes and looked carefully, he found this Gu Master was wearing Guyue tribe leader attire, looking at his appearance, he was the fourth generation tribe leader!
As for those old spectators, they should be the clan elders of that era.
"Hehe, treat me with all my heart?
You have the nerve to say that!
I was originally sincere in making a deal with you, using Yuan stone to exchange for your tribe's moon orchid, the price was very fair.
It was you who had ulterior motives, pretending to welcome me and coaxing me into the banquet, wanting to poison the wine.
You underestimate me too much, I roam the world and make a name for myself with Flower Wine, how could I be poisoned? "
The Flower Wine Monk pointed at the fourth generation tribe leader kneeling on the ground, laughing coldly. "If we had cooperated properly, this would not have happened.
In the end, you wanted to use my head to fish for fame, you are the one who brought this upon yourself! "
"Lord, please spare my lowly life!"
The fourth generation tribe leader screamed in fear, using his knees to crawl towards the Flower Wine Monk's feet, hugging his thigh.
"Lord, our tribe has a spirit spring that produces Yuan stone, and we have planted a large patch of moon orchid in the underground cave.
I am willing to eat Lord's enslavement Gu and become Lord's slave. My life and death is in Lord's hands, and I will serve Lord for the rest of my life! "
Fang Yuan was speechless, and the expressions of the elders in the image changed.
The Flower Wine Monk squinted his eyes, his anger had already subsided, but his eyes shone brightly. "Hmph, the enslavement Gu is incomparably precious, it is a Rank five Gu, do you think I would have it?
However, you have been poisoned by my unique Gu, only I can cure it, so I am not afraid of you resisting.
Since that is the case, your tribe will provide me with fifteen kilograms of moon orchid petals every week, along with three thousand Yuan stone.
Every once in a while, I will come over to collect the goods, and at the same time, I will cure you once and spare your lowly life. "
"Thank you Lord for not killing me, thank you Lord for not killing me!" The fourth generation tribe leader cried out continuously, kowtowing non-stop, his forehead hitting the mountain rocks, blood flowing non-stop.
"Hmph, don't kowtow, I hate lowly people like you the most!
What Guyue genius, Rank five powerhouse, you don't live up to your name.
You better serve me well, this is also to save your life … Ah! "The Flower Wine Monk suddenly cried out, his face trembling with fear.
He kicked the fourth generation tribe leader, his body swaying as he retreated a few large steps in panic, shouting at the fourth generation tribe leader, "How do you still have Gu?"
The fourth generation tribe leader was kicked in the chest, spitting out a mouthful of blood. He stood up with difficulty, his face revealing a smile of success. "Hehehe, people of the demonic path, everyone has the right to punish them!
This Gu is called Lunar Shadow, it is best at hiding.
Although it is only Rank four, it has the ability to restrict the primeval sea and primeval essence.
Demon, you and I have fought for a long time, you do not have many Gu worms left, how can you restrain the Lunar Shadow Gu?
Surrender obediently and become my slave, as long as you serve me well, you will have a way to live! "
The Flower Wine Monk flew into a rage, shouting, "Go to hell!!"
Before he finished speaking, his body shot forward like lightning, his fist landing on the fourth generation tribe leader's chest.
The fourth generation tribe leader did not expect the Flower Wine Monk to be so radical, even when his primeval sea was threatened, he still refused to compromise.
With a huge force, he flew out in an instant, his body falling to the ground like a broken sack.
Pu.
He spat out a mouthful of blood, mixed with countless pieces of his internal organs.
"Are you crazy, we can totally discuss this …" He stared at the Flower Wine Monk, his lips moving with great effort.
Before he finished speaking, his legs gave way, his head tilted, and he died.
"Tribe leader!!"
"People of the demonic path are indeed all crazy."
"Kill, kill this demon, take revenge for the tribe leader!"
"He has been hit by the Lunar Shadow Gu, his primeval essence can no longer be used as he wishes, if this goes on, even his primeval sea will be threatened."
The watching tribe elders all roared, flocking forward.
"Hahaha, come if you want to die!" The Flower Wine Monk howled towards the sky, facing the tribe elders' charge, directly facing them head-on.
A fierce battle unfolded, and the Flower Wine Monk quickly took control of the situation. Soon, the tribe elders were either dead or injured, all lying paralyzed on the ground.
He was about to kill the remaining tribe elders, when his expression suddenly changed, and he covered his abdomen with his hand. "Damn it!"
"I'll take care of you later."
The Flower Wine Monk stared fiercely at the tribe elders, and his body escaped like lightning, drilling into the forest, disappearing without a trace in the blink of an eye.
S-REV-019.summary: Fang Yuan follows the Liquor worm into a narrow crack in a boulder, eventually reaching a hidden cave. Inside, he finds the Liquor worm and the skeleton of the Flower Wine Monk. A Photo-audio Gu activates, playing a scene of the Monk's final battle, revealing the Fourth Generation Tribe Leader's betrayal and the Monk's death, exposing a suppressed historical truth.

continuityMutations.content: The knowledge that the Photo-audio Gu is a consumable, single-use recording Gu.
A renewed conviction in his self-serving philosophy and distrust of clan loyalty.

C-REV-01.transition: Squeezed out of the boulder, fighting against the water pressure, to return to the outside of the mountain.

S-REV-020.prose:
Chapter 16
"Why don't you try moving?"
"You've already been poisoned by my unique Gu. Without my corresponding antidote, seven days later, you'll definitely turn into pus and die."
"Compared to Lord Flower Wine, I'm nothing!
I was muddle-headed, to not recognize Mount Tai and offend Lord Flower Wine.
Lord Flower Wine, please consider my clan's hospitality earlier and spare my life! "
On the wall, the scene repeated for the second time.
Fang Yuan was silent, until the scene repeated for the third time. Only then did he sigh faintly, saying, "So it was like this."
This method of leaving images and sounds on the stone wall should be the Flower Wine Monk's Photo-audio Gu.
This Gu could record images and project them.
The Photo-audio Gu relied on absorbing light and sound to survive. For some reason, this secret cave always emitted red light. At the same time, the stone crack was connected to the outside world, so it did not block out the sounds of the outside world.
Fang Yuan was here, and all he could hear was the roar of the small waterfall.
Thus, the Photo-audio Gu was able to survive in this secret cave in the mountain wall.
Just now, when Fang Yuan pushed away the withered vines, it should have alerted the Photo-audio Gu hidden in the stone wall.
As long as one's brain was not stupid, with just a little deduction, they would know that this video was real.
That year, the fourth generation clan leader failed in his plot against the Flower Wine Monk, and after his defeat, he launched a sneak attack. Although he repelled the latter, he also died.
This part of history was not glorious, and the few clan elders who survived covered up the truth.
They flipped the roles of the fourth generation clan leader and the Flower Wine Monk.
The Flower Wine Monk became a defeated sneak attack, a demon who was killed on the spot.
The Fourth Generation became a righteous and upright hero.
But this story had a big loophole.
The Flower Wine Monk was clearly killed on the spot, and his corpse should be in the hands of the Guyue clan. But why was there another corpse?
In his previous life, the Gu Master who discovered this place must have felt fear after seeing this video.
The few surviving clan elders had already passed away, but to prevent the Flower Wine Monk from returning, this truth must have been secretly spread among the clan's higher-ups.
That Gu Master realized that if he took the treasure for himself, there would be a huge risk.
In the future, if anyone found out that he was involved with the Flower Wine Monk, the upper echelons of the family would naturally purge him.
Therefore, after some consideration, he didn't dare to hide this relic and made the decision to report it to his superiors.
This kind of performance proved his loyalty to the family.
What happened to him later also showed that he had made a wise choice.
However, just because he did this didn't mean that Fang Yuan would do the same.
"It wasn't easy to find this treasure, so it should be taken by one person. Why should it be shared with others?
So what if he was discovered?
Without taking risks, how can there be gains? That Gu Master is really cowardly. "
Fang Yuan smiled coldly. He no longer cared about the repeated images on the stone wall. Instead, he turned around and stretched out his hand, pulling the dead vines away with all his might.
The Flower Wine Monk's corpse was also affected. It was originally very complete, but now it was broken into several pieces.
Fang Yuan didn't care at all. He kicked away a leg bone that was in the way and squatted down again to search for the treasure.
First, he found a bag of Yuan stone. When he opened it, there were only 15 pieces.
"Pauper." Fang Yuan ridiculed. The Flower Wine Monk looked glamorous on the outside, but he didn't expect his savings to be so little.
But he quickly thought of the reason. After the fierce battle, the Flower Wine Monk was also hit by the Moonshadow Gu, so he would definitely use the Yuan stone to heal himself.
To have 15 pieces left was already not bad.
Then, Fang Yuan found the remains of a few dead Gu.
Most of them were flowers and plants, and they had already completely withered.
Gu were also living creatures, and they also needed food to raise, and most of them were very picky.
Grass Gu and Flower Gu had very little requirements for food, but this secret cave didn't even have a trace of sunlight.
And then …
And then, there was nothing.
The Flower Wine Monk first fought with the fourth generation clan leader, who was of the same level as him, and then he fought with almost ten clan elders.
His own Gu worms had already been used up a lot. After coming here, he wanted to heal himself, so he stimulated the growth of the Wine Sack Flower Gu and the Rice Sack Grass Gu.
But in the end, he was dragged down to death by the Moonshadow Gu.
After three hundred years, the remaining Gu worms on his body were all dead.
The only ones left were the Photo-audio Gu in the stone wall, and the Liquor worm.
This Liquor worm, should have relied on the Wine Sack Flower Gu to survive with difficulty.
But as the Wine Sack Flower Gu withered one by one, it also lost its source of food.
This forced it to go out and search for wild Wine Sack Flowers.
Then on this night, it was attracted by the rich fragrance of the green bamboo wine, and came to Fang Yuan.
"The Photo-audio Gu can only record once, and is a consumable type Gu.
It seems that the Liquor worm is the biggest reward of this trip, no wonder that Gu Master reported to the clan.
It seems that the benefits are too small, and not worth the risk. "Fang Yuan came to a realization.
In his memory, that Gu Master was already Rank three, and the Liquor worm was only a Rank one Gu.
To Fang Yuan, it was more precious, but to that Gu Master, it was dispensable.
But it was obvious that because of the Gu Master's report, the clan gave him a big reward.
"Should I also report to the clan?" Fang Yuan thought for a while, then gave up on this thought.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance seemed to be only the Liquor worm and the Yuan stone, but that was not the case.
What was truly valuable was this stone wall where the Photo-audio Gu was hidden.
Or rather, it was the image that was being played repeatedly on the wall.
This image could be sold to other villages.
He believed that this kind of concrete evidence that would strike at the clan's beliefs would definitely attract the interest of the other two villages on Qing Mao Mountain.
The price they would offer would definitely be higher than the clan's reward.
What?
You mean the clan's sense of honor and belonging?
Sorry, but Fang Yuan did not have any of that.
Moreover, this image was not some powerful force that would wipe out the entire clan, so it would not cause much damage.
And the cold clan would not value Fang Yuan. He needed to work hard on his own, to develop cultivation resources, and in the early stages of cultivation, he needed to borrow strength from all around.
"Rely on the clan?
Hehe. "Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart," How can I be as naive as I was in my previous life. "
Don't rely on anyone, you have to rely on yourself for everything in this world.
After confirming that this secret cave had been ransacked clean, Fang Yuan went back the way he came.
Against the water pressure, he squeezed out of the boulder and returned to the outside of the mountain.
Looking back at the boulder, Fang Yuan suddenly thought of his previous life's memories. It was said that there were corpses found in the underground secret cave.
But how was this underground?
It was clearly the inside of the mountain wall.
No wonder he had wasted so much effort and could not find it for seven consecutive days.
It seemed that after the clan in his previous life discovered this place, they must have destroyed the image wall at the first moment and sent out mixed news to mislead the clan.
To be able to find this place tonight, part of it was luck, part of it was accumulation, but the biggest factor was probably the green bamboo wine.
This wine fragrance was really rich, it could be said to be the best in Qing Mao Mountain.
Maybe in his previous life, after the Gu Master broke up, he drank this wine.
But these were no longer important. The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance had been completely excavated by Fang Yuan. Although the results were not satisfactory, it was still within reason.
The most important thing was that Fang Yuan's original goal (Liquor worm) was already in his hands, and he also had what he needed the most (Yuan stone).
"Next, I'll just stay in the inn and refine the Gu worm.
As long as I have the vital Gu, I can return to the academy, qualify to live in the student dormitory, and use the clan's resources to cultivate.
Staying in this inn once or twice is fine, but staying for too long will cost too much. "Fang Yuan thought, his footsteps did not stop, and he rushed to the village.
He originally had two pieces of Yuan stone, and now he had 15 pieces, making a total of 17 pieces.
But for a Gu Master, what was this bit of Yuan stone?
S-REV-020.summary: Fang Yuan watches the Photo-audio Gu's recording multiple times, deducing the full historical truth and the clan's subsequent cover-up. He critically evaluates the previous life's Gu Master's decision to report the inheritance, contrasting it with his own mercenary approach. Deciding against reporting to the clan, Fang Yuan chooses to leverage the sensitive information for his own benefit, finding the Monk's remaining meager resources but confirming the Liquor worm as the most valuable find.

continuityMutations.content: His C-grade aptitude makes Gu refinement significantly harder and more resource-intensive.
The Liquor worm, despite being Rank one, is more precious and harder to refine than the Moonlight Gu.
Gu Masters face significant financial burdens for cultivation, battle, and refinement.
Believes being a Gu Master is inherently good and powerful, unaware of the costs.
Estimates the Yuan stone needed to refine the Moonlight Gu and Liquor worm, plans to acquire more resources.
Understands the financial and resource demands of being a Gu Master, contrasting it with mortal perceptions.
Guesses the Liquor worm's true origin as the Flower Wine Monk's vital Gu, explaining its tenacity.
Acknowledges the impossibility of refining the Liquor worm quickly without external help, but resolves to do it anyway.
Is aware of his uncle and aunt's scheming, specifically their desire to prevent him from inheriting.
Manipulates Fangzheng's feelings for Shen Cui and his naivete to acquire Yuan stones and sever their relationship.
Recalls his past sacrifices and care for Fangzheng, which Fangzheng has forgotten.
Recognizes the Gu worm's backlash and anticipates its consequences.
Identifies the Spring Autumn Cicada appearing in his aperture.
Acquires 5.5 Yuan stones from Fangzheng.
Expresses envy for Gu Masters' status and power.
His previous actions are cited as an example of Gu Masters' financial struggles.
Identified as the original owner of the Liquor worm, a Rank five expert whose willpower remains.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked into the inn

S-REV-021.prose:
Chapter 17 "With my C grade aptitude, my aperture can only store 44% of the primeval sea. The speed at which the Gu repels primeval essence is much faster than the speed at which my primeval essence recovers. If I want to refine the Gu, I need to use external forces, which means I need to consume Yuan stone. " "The weaker the Gu's will, the less resistance it has, and the easier it is for me to refine. But all living things have the will to live. If I want to refine the Moonlight Gu, I need at least five Yuan stone, and at most eight. "Relying on his rich cultivation experience, Fang Yuan estimated the total amount of Yuan stone he would need to consume. "If I want to refine the Liquor worm now, I need at least eleven, and at most sixteen." Although the Liquor worm is the same as the Moonlight Gu, both Rank one Gu, it is undoubtedly more precious, and the difficulty of refining is also higher. That is to say, even though Fang Yuan had seventeen primeval stones now, after refining the Liquor worm, he would at most be left with six primeval stones, or at least one primeval stone. In the night sky, the bright blue crescent moon emitted a bright moonlight. The moonlight was like the gentle hand of a fairy, gently caressing Guyue's stronghold. Along the way, the bamboo buildings were like a forest of jade tokens. The night wind blew gently. Fang Yuan returned to the inn under this moonlight. The inn's door was already closed. Fang Yuan knocked on the door. "I hear you! I hear you! Who is it, knocking on the door so late … "The inn's waiter mumbled as he opened the door with sleepy eyes. But when he saw Fang Yuan at the door, his slightly dissatisfied and lazy expression immediately changed. He bent down and smiled flatteringly, "It is young master. I am very fortunate to be able to open the door for young master. " Fang Yuan nodded, his expression cold as he walked into the inn. This expression made the waiter smile even more humbly, and he took the initiative to ask, "Young master, are you hungry? Do you want me to inform the chef to make some side dishes for supper?" "No need," Fang Yuan shook his head, and only said, "Prepare some hot water for me, I want to wash up." "Yes!" The waiter hurriedly nodded.

"Young Master, please return to your room first. This little one guarantees that the hot water will be delivered right away." Fang Yuan nodded and went up the stairs to the second floor. The shop assistant looked at Fang Yuan's back, his eyes shining in the lantern light, revealing an obvious look of envy. "This is a Gu Master, if only I had the aptitude to cultivate, how good would that be!" He clenched his fists and sighed deeply. When these words drifted into Fang Yuan's ears, he couldn't help but smile bitterly in his heart. Gu Masters can possess strength that surpasses mortals and become a person above all others, but the price to pay for this is also very high. The first problem was financial resources. Gu Masters needed Yuan stone for cultivation, Yuan stone for battle, Yuan stone for Gu refinement, and Yuan stone for transactions. Without Yuan stone, how could one cultivate? This point, as a mortal inn assistant, because he was only a spectator, he could not understand this dilemma. Just like this evening, that young Gu Master Jiang Ya, when he smashed the wine jug, he indignantly vented to the hunters: I can't even bear to spend Yuan stone to drink this green bamboo wine, but you bunch of mere mortals actually have the money to spare! Looking at the big picture through a tube, just this sentence alone can explain the situation of a Gu Master's cultivation. Gu Masters have powerful abilities, and can earn more than mortals, but their expenditure is also higher. Many times, every piece of Yuan stone has to be haggled over. Especially low level Gu Masters, it is even more so. Don't look at how some Gu Masters look on the surface, but in reality their lives are very tight. "Moreover, as a Gu Master's realm increases, their need for resources will also increase. Without a backer, a Gu Master's cultivation is very difficult. "Fang Yuan thought of his previous life and deeply understood this. He returned to the guest room and had just lit the lamp when the inn assistant brought a basin of hot water over. Of course, there were also cloth towels and other toiletries. Fang Yuan let the assistant leave, closed the door and locked it. After washing up, he got on the bed. Although his body was somewhat tired, there was still a trace of excitement in his heart: "I finally got the Liquor worm. The Liquor worm is even more precious than the Moonlight Gu. In a sense, it is a Gu that can raise a Gu Master's aptitude! " Fang Yuan sat cross-legged on the bed and took out the Liquor worm.
S-REV-021.summary: Fang Yuan returns to his inn room under the moonlight, reflecting on the immense Yuan stone cost and difficulty of refining Gu, particularly the Liquor worm, due to his C-grade aptitude and the Gu's inherent resistance. He interacts coldly with the inn waiter, who envies Gu Masters, prompting Fang Yuan to inwardly muse on the financial burdens of their path. After washing up, Fang Yuan settles down, excited to begin refining the Liquor worm.

continuityMutations.content: The Liquor worm can purify primeval essence to a higher stage, improving cultivation.
The Liquor worm's willpower is incredibly strong, suggesting it was once a vital Gu of a powerful expert.
Refining the Liquor worm is equivalent to competing with the Flower Wine Monk's lingering willpower, requiring external suppression.

S-REV-022.prose:
The Liquor worm was still snoring loudly. Its body was slightly bigger than the Moonlight Gu, white and tender, like a silkworm. Under the light, its body was shrouded in a layer of faint light, like the glossy luster of a pearl. Its two eyes were like two black sesame seeds, embedded on its white and chubby head, looking charmingly naive. Holding it in his hand, it was not heavy, about the weight of half an egg. Carefully smelling it, there was still a whiff of wine fragrance on its body. This wine fragrance was not the aroma of the green bamboo wine, but the smell of the Liquor worm itself. The fragrance was faint and indistinct, faintly discernible. Fang Yuan's nose twitched, inhaling this wine fragrance into his body. The wine fragrance flowed downwards, entering his aperture and entering the bronze primeval sea. The primeval sea fluctuated, quickly absorbing this wine fragrance. A trace of extremely pure primeval essence was produced. The other primeval essences were all emerald green, flickering with a bronze metallic luster. But this trace of primeval essence was pale green, more condensed than the original primeval essence. This was the primeval essence that only middle stage Rank one Gu Masters could possess. Sensing this pale green primeval essence, Fang Yuan showed a satisfied smile: "My current cultivation is only Rank one initial stage. But with the Liquor worm's refinement, after the primeval essence is purified, I can possess Rank one middle stage primeval essence. The beauty of this cannot be explained in one or two sentences. " But very quickly, he restrained his smile: "But I have not truly mastered the Liquor worm yet. Only by completely refining the Liquor worm and making it my vital Gu can I freely control it, and then use the greatest efficiency to refine my primeval essence." Thinking of this, he no longer hesitated, transferring a trace of green copper primeval essence from his primeval sea. The primeval essence tightly wrapped around the Liquor worm, suspending it in front of Fang Yuan, and began to invade its body. The Liquor worm sensed the danger of its survival and immediately woke up. It began to struggle violently, transferring its own strength to drive away Fang Yuan's primeval essence. "This Liquor worm has such a strong resistance." Fang Yuan's expression turned solemn, feeling that the rate of consumption of primeval essence was more than double that of the Moonlight Gu. "No matter what, I am going to refine the Liquor worm." His eyes flashed with a hint of determination, and he continued to transfer primeval essence towards the Liquor worm. In the inn's room, the candlelight on the table quietly burned, illuminating the center of the room with a bright light.

As for the far corners of the room, it was dark. The candlelight shone on Fang Yuan's face. He had already closed his eyes, concentrating on dealing with the Liquor worm. A continuous stream of green copper primeval essence, like a mist, was emitted from Fang Yuan's body, and then gathered together, firmly wrapping around the Liquor worm. The Liquor worm floated in the air, less than a foot away from Fang Yuan's face. It struggled vigorously in the green copper primeval essence's encirclement. Time quietly passed. The candlelight burned lower and lower, and the candlelight also became dimmer. The crescent moon outside the window had already slowly descended, and a new day had arrived. The early morning sun shone through the cracks in the window into the room. It was like a light border was placed on the window. Fang Yuan opened his eyes, looking at the Liquor worm in front of him. On the Liquor worm's white body, there was already a trace of green. This was the result of Fang Yuan's hard work for half a night. But it was clear that this bit of green was not even one percent of the Liquor worm's body. Fang Yuan's expression was solemn. This Liquor worm's willpower was too tenacious, and its resistance was extremely strong, almost exceeding the limits of a Rank one Gu worm. "This Gu worm is very likely to be the Flower Wine Monk's vital Gu. The Flower Wine Monk was a Rank five expert, and this Liquor worm was originally also a Rank five expert. But these past few years, it did not have enough food, and as a result, its grade dropped. Now it is only a Rank one Gu worm, but its willpower is as tenacious as a rock! " Fang Yuan guessed the truth. This Liquor worm was originally the Flower Wine Monk's vital Gu, and its original natural willpower had been cleansed by the Flower Wine Monk. It had accompanied the Flower Wine Monk all the way from north to south, roaming the pugilistic world. After the Flower Wine Monk died, his strong willpower still existed in the Liquor worm. Fang Yuan wanted to refine the Liquor worm now, which was equivalent to competing with the Flower Wine Monk's willpower. This was much more difficult than refining a natural Gu worm. A person's willpower was generally higher than a natural Gu worm's, and at the juncture of life and death, they could erupt with strength that even they could not imagine. And the Flower Wine Monk was a demonic path expert, a loner, roaming the pugilistic world.

His willpower was even more tenacious than a righteous path expert of the same level. "It's impossible to refine this Liquor worm within a month. Unless an expert uses a Rank two or Rank three Gu's aura to suppress this Liquor worm, and suppress the Liquor worm's willpower to the lowest level. With this kind of help, I can achieve twice the result with half the effort. "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan could not help but sigh. His parents had already passed away, and his uncle and aunt were scheming against him. He himself had no backing, so where could he find external help? If he had A grade aptitude, it would be fine, but now his aptitude was only C grade. None of the clansmen thought highly of him, so who would be willing to spend so much effort to help him? More importantly, the existence of the Liquor worm could not be exposed. Guyue's village did not have a Gu like the Liquor worm, so Fang Yuan could not explain the origin of this Liquor worm. If it was exposed, it was very likely to be noticed by the higher-ups, and thus form a connection with the Flower Wine Monk. It was too easy to link the two together. "According to this calculation, seventeen pieces of Yuan stone is not enough. I need at least thirty pieces of Yuan stone! This is really troublesome, but no matter how difficult it is, I will refine this Liquor worm. "Fang Yuan's willpower was like iron, and he had already made up his mind to refine the Liquor worm. A vital Gu was very important, and to a large extent, it would affect a Gu Master's future cultivation direction. Although the Liquor worm was not the most ideal choice for a vital Gu in this world, it was much better than the Moonlight Gu. It was also the best level that Fang Yuan could achieve in his current situation. Grumble, grumble … At this time, Fang Yuan's stomach protested. He had not slept the whole night, and had put all his effort into refining the Liquor worm, so Fang Yuan was naturally hungry. "I should first fill my stomach, then think of how to accumulate Yuan stone." Fang Yuan rubbed his stomach and went downstairs. When he reached the dining hall on the first floor, he chose a corner seat and ordered a few dishes for breakfast. Just as he started to eat, his younger brother Guyue Fangzheng appeared. "Brother, why are you staying at the inn, why don't you go back to sleep at night?" He was very rude, and his tone carried an interrogative tone. ================================================== Chapter 18 In the face of his brother's questioning, Fang Yuan didn't speak and continued to eat his breakfast.
S-REV-022.summary: Fang Yuan attempts to refine the Liquor worm, observing its unique properties and the pure primeval essence it generates. However, the Liquor worm exhibits an unexpected, tenacious resistance, far exceeding a typical Rank one Gu. Fang Yuan deduces that it must have been the vital Gu of the Rank five Flower Wine Monk, its original willpower still present. This revelation significantly increases the estimated Yuan stone cost and difficulty, making him realize he needs external help he doesn't have.

continuityMutations.content: Is deeply shocked and hurt by Fang Yuan's physical and verbal abuse, and the unexpected disowning.
Secretly desires Shen Cui and is relieved she was not violated, but also feels guilt over the transaction.
Acquires 5.5 Yuan stones from Fangzheng by exploiting his feelings for Shen Cui.
Successfully severs his ties with Fangzheng, removing a potential emotional burden.
Is 'given' to Fangzheng as his personal maid.
Displays concern for Shen Cui and anger towards Fang Yuan regarding her treatment.
Is oblivious to Fang Yuan's past sacrifices for him and his uncle/aunt's manipulations.
Harbors strong, unacknowledged feelings for Shen Cui, which Fang Yuan exploits.
Possesses 5.5 Yuan stones, given by his aunt and uncle, which he gives to Fang Yuan.
Develops a deep sense of guilt and loss regarding his interaction with Fang Yuan, but also renewed conviction regarding Shen Cui.
Becomes a pawn in his uncle's scheme against Fang Yuan, receiving more Yuan stones for cultivation.
Her emotional distress is used by Fangzheng to confront Fang Yuan, and she is 'sold' to Fangzheng.
Is the focus of Fangzheng's romantic longing and guilt.

relationshipMutations.type: Brotherly bond severed and replaced by transaction

C-REV-01.transition: Went downstairs

C-REV-09.transition: Walked out of Fang Yuan's sight

S-REV-023.prose:
His willpower was even more tenacious than a righteous path expert of the same level. "It's impossible to refine this Liquor worm within a month. Unless an expert uses a Rank two or Rank three Gu's aura to suppress this Liquor worm, and suppress the Liquor worm's willpower to the lowest level. With this kind of help, I can achieve twice the result with half the effort. "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan could not help but sigh. His parents had already passed away, and his uncle and aunt were scheming against him. He himself had no backing, so where could he find external help? If he had A grade aptitude, it would be fine, but now his aptitude was only C grade. None of the clansmen thought highly of him, so who would be willing to spend so much effort to help him? More importantly, the existence of the Liquor worm could not be exposed. Guyue's village did not have a Gu like the Liquor worm, so Fang Yuan could not explain the origin of this Liquor worm. If it was exposed, it was very likely to be noticed by the higher-ups, and thus form a connection with the Flower Wine Monk. It was too easy to link the two together. "According to this calculation, seventeen pieces of Yuan stone is not enough. I need at least thirty pieces of Yuan stone! This is really troublesome, but no matter how difficult it is, I will refine this Liquor worm. "Fang Yuan's willpower was like iron, and he had already made up his mind to refine the Liquor worm. A vital Gu was very important, and to a large extent, it would affect a Gu Master's future cultivation direction. Although the Liquor worm was not the most ideal choice for a vital Gu in this world, it was much better than the Moonlight Gu. It was also the best level that Fang Yuan could achieve in his current situation. Grumble, grumble … At this time, Fang Yuan's stomach protested. He had not slept the whole night, and had put all his effort into refining the Liquor worm, so Fang Yuan was naturally hungry. "I should first fill my stomach, then think of how to accumulate Yuan stone." Fang Yuan rubbed his stomach and went downstairs. When he reached the dining hall on the first floor, he chose a corner seat and ordered a few dishes for breakfast. Just as he started to eat, his younger brother Guyue Fangzheng appeared. "Brother, why are you staying at the inn, why don't you go back to sleep at night?" He was very rude, and his tone carried an interrogative tone. ================================================== Chapter 18 In the face of his brother's questioning, Fang Yuan didn't speak and continued to eat his breakfast.

He knew his brother's character well. Fangzheng couldn't keep his composure. Sure enough, Fangzheng saw that his brother didn't even look at him, as if he was air. In the next moment, he shouted with a dissatisfied tone, "Brother, what did you do to Shen Cui? Since she came out of your room yesterday, she cried loudly. I tried to comfort her, but she cried even more fiercely. " Fang Yuan looked up at his brother with an expressionless face. Fangzheng frowned and stared at his brother, waiting for his answer. The atmosphere became more and more tense. However, Fang Yuan only glanced at him, then lowered his head and continued to eat. His brother, Fangzheng, suddenly became flustered. Fang Yuan's attitude was simply looking down on him. He slammed the table in anger and shouted, "Guyue, Fang Yuan, how can you be like this! She's just a little girl, but she has served you for so many years. I've seen her gentleness and consideration for you. Yes, I know you're disappointed, and I can understand your decadence. You only have a C grade aptitude, but you can't vent your anger on others because of your own experience. This is unfair to her! " Before he finished speaking, Fang Yuan suddenly stood up and raised his hand like lightning. Slap! With a crisp sound, Fangzheng received a solid slap in the face. Fangzheng covered his right cheek and took two steps back with a face full of shock. "Bastard, what kind of tone are you using to talk to your brother like this?! That Shen Cui is just a little maid. Have you forgotten that I'm your brother because of a little girl? "Fang Yuan reprimanded in a low voice. Fangzheng reacted, and the pain on his face was transmitted to his nervous system. He widened his eyes and gasped for breath. He said in disbelief, "Brother, you hit me?

You've never hit me since we were young! Yes, I was tested to have an A grade aptitude, and you're only a C grade. But you can't blame me. This is all God's arrangement … " Pa! Before Fangzheng could finish, Fang Yuan gave him another backhand slap. Fangzheng covered his face with both hands. He was stunned. "Naive fool, what do you remember! How have I taken care of you since you were young? When our parents died, we lived in poverty. Uncle and Aunt only gave us one new dress for the New Year. Did I wear it? Who did I put it on? You loved to eat candied porridge when you were little, so I would ask the kitchen to make an extra bowl for you every day. When you were bullied by others, who helped you get back at them? There are other things, but I don't want to talk about them. Hmm, now you're talking to me like this because of a maidservant, questioning me? " Fangzheng's face turned red. His lips trembled. He was embarrassed and angry, but he couldn't say a word to refute. Because what Fang Yuan said was the truth! "Forget it." Fang Yuan sneered, "Since you abandoned your own parents and recognized someone else, what am I, your brother, to you?" "Brother, how can you say that? You know that I've longed for the warmth of a family since I was young, I … "Fangzheng quickly tried to explain. Fang Yuan waved his hand to stop him from continuing, "From today onwards, you're not my brother, and I'm not your brother anymore." "Brother!" Fangzheng was shocked and opened his mouth to speak. At this time, Fang Yuan spoke again, "Don't you like Shen Cui?

Don't worry, I didn't do anything to her. She's still a virgin, a virgin. Give me six pieces of Yuan stone, and I'll give her to you. From now on, she'll be your personal maid. " "Brother, why did you …" Suddenly exposed, Fangzheng panicked and was caught off guard. But at the same time, he was relieved that the thing he was most worried about did not come true. That night not long ago, Shen Cui personally helped him bathe. Although nothing substantial happened, Fangzheng could never forget the gentleness of that night. Every time he thought of Shen Cui, thinking of her deft hands and soft red lips, his heart would palpitate. The feelings of youth had already accumulated and sprouted in the young man's chest. So when he found out about Shen Cui's strange condition yesterday evening, his heart suddenly surged with anger. He immediately gave up on refining the Moonlight Gu and turned around to look for Fang Yuan, asking for an explanation. Seeing that Fangzheng did not agree, Fang Yuan frowned, "It's normal for a man and a woman to be in love. You should be honest, what's the point of hiding? Of course, if you don't want to exchange, then forget it. " Fangzheng suddenly panicked, "Exchange, why wouldn't I exchange? But I don't have enough Yuan stone for six pieces. " As he said this, he took out his money bag, his face flushed red. Fang Yuan took the bag and found that there were six pieces inside, but one of them was half the size of a complete Yuan stone. He immediately knew that Fangzheng had absorbed the primeval essence from the Yuan stone in order to refine the Moonlight Gu as soon as possible. As more of the natural primeval essence was absorbed, the volume of the Yuan stone became smaller and lighter. Although it was only five and a half pieces, Fang Yuan also knew that this was all the Yuan stone Fangzheng had. He did not have any savings, and these six Yuan stones were given to him by his aunt and uncle not long ago. "I'll accept the Yuan stone, you can go now." Fang Yuan's expression was cold as he put the bag into his arms. "Brother …" Fangzheng wanted to say something. Fang Yuan slightly raised his eyebrows and said slowly, "Before I change my mind, you better disappear from my sight." Fangzheng's heart tightened. He gritted his teeth and finally turned around to leave.

Stepping out of the inn, he subconsciously covered his chest, feeling waves of guilt in his heart. There was a feeling in the darkness that told him that he seemed to have lost something very important at this moment. But his heart quickly warmed up. He thought of Shen Cui and that night that haunted him. "I can finally have you officially, Cui Cui." He did not look back and walked out of Fang Yuan's sight. Fang Yuan was expressionless. He stood there for a while before slowly sitting down. The bright and beautiful sunlight shone through the window onto his indifferent face, making people feel cold just by looking at it. Business in the cafeteria was somewhat quiet. There were more and more people on the street, and the noise made the silence even more obvious. The breakfast was already cold. The waiter came over and asked if he needed to reheat it. Fang Yuan turned a deaf ear to him. His eyes were like a cloud of smoke, as if he was recalling something. The waiter waited for a while, but saw that Fang Yuan was still in a daze and did not respond. He could only rub his nose and walk away resentfully. After a while, Fang Yuan's eyes focused. The memories in his heart were like smoke, gradually fading away. He returned to the real world. The sunlight shone in, illuminating more than half of the table. The heat from the food had already dissipated, and the noise of the people on the street could be heard. Through his clothes, he reached out to touch the five and a half Yuan stone in his bosom. The corner of his mouth revealed a bitter and mocking smile. But the smile disappeared as soon as it appeared. "Waiter, take this food down and heat it up." Fang Yuan looked at the food and called out lightly. At this moment, his eyes were incomparably clear. … "What!
S-REV-023.summary: Hungry after his refinement attempt, Fang Yuan heads to the inn's dining hall. He is abruptly confronted by Fangzheng, who interrogates him about Shen Cui's distress. Fang Yuan, ignoring him, provokes Fangzheng into an angry lecture about his C-grade aptitude and unfairness. Fang Yuan then brutally slaps Fangzheng twice, reminding him of his past sacrifices and Fangzheng's ingratitude, before disowning him. He then coldly 'sells' Shen Cui, whom Fangzheng secretly desires, to his brother for 5.5 Yuan stones, further solidifying their estrangement.

continuityMutations.content: Reveals his detailed plot to undermine Fang Yuan's cultivation and inheritance claim using clan rules and resource control.
Recognizes Fang Yuan's cunning and is surprised by his ability to counter initial plots.
Identifies Fangzheng's resentment as a valuable tool against Fang Yuan.
Understands the full scope of her husband's manipulative plan.
Receives 6 more Yuan stones from his uncle for cultivation, unaware of the underlying manipulation.
Plots against Fang Yuan to impede his cultivation and prevent him from inheriting family property.
Knows the clan rules regarding inheritance and cultivation levels.
Uses Fangzheng's resentment towards Fang Yuan as a 'weapon'.
Is surprised by Fang Yuan's cunning and his ability to counter his initial plots.
Provides Fangzheng with 6 Yuan stones for cultivation.
Feigns concern for Fangzheng while subtly directing him against Fang Yuan.
Supports her husband's schemes against Fang Yuan, though she initially misunderstands the depth of his intent.

C-REV-09.transition: Left the inn and went to his uncle and aunt's residence

S-REV-024.prose:
Your brother said that? "In the hall, his uncle frowned and his voice was cold. His aunt sat at the side, speechless as she looked at the bright red palm print on Fangzheng's face. "Yes, when I saw my brother, he was eating breakfast at the inn. That's the whole story." Fangzheng replied respectfully. His uncle's brows furrowed even deeper, forming a 'Chuan' character. After a few breaths, he sighed deeply and said in a serious tone, "Fangzheng, my child, you have to remember, the maid Shen Cui is not Fang Yuan's private property, but we assigned her to him. How can he sell her? Moreover, if you wanted her, you should have told us earlier, we would have just assigned her to you. " "Ah?" Fangzheng was dumbfounded. His uncle waved his hand, "You can leave first. You gave all your Yuan stone to Fang Yuan, I will give you another six. Remember, use them well on your Gu refinement. We will be proud of you if you win first place. " "Father, I am ashamed …" Fangzheng was so moved that tears flowed down his face. His uncle sighed, "Go, go, go back to your room to refine the Gu, you have already wasted a lot of time." Fangzheng left, and his uncle showed an angry and ferocious expression. Bang! He fiercely slapped the table and growled in a low voice, "Hmph, this little bastard, using our people to do business, he is really cunning!" His aunt hurriedly consoled him, "Master, calm down. It is only six Yuan stone. " "You are a woman, what do you know! He, Fang Yuan, only has C grade talent, to refine the Moonlight Gu, he needs to use Yuan stone. With his first Gu refinement skills, six Yuan stone is definitely not enough. But now he has twelve, it is more than enough. "His uncle gritted his teeth in hatred. He continued, "A Gu Master's cultivation, as long as they have enough resources and are not stuck at a bottleneck, it will be very fast.

In two to three years, the clan will be able to nurture a Rank two Gu Master. The lower Fang Yuan's cultivation is, the smaller the chance of getting back the family property in a year's time. Right now he is young and has just started cultivating, we will stop him and let him fall behind his peers at the starting stage. The academy's resources are awarded to outstanding students. With his talent, once he falls behind, he will not be able to get any resources, and without resources to aid his cultivation, he will fall further behind. If this vicious cycle continues, will he still have the ability to inherit the family property in a year's time? " Aunt did not understand, "Even if we don't stop him, he will at most be Rank one middle stage in a year's time. Master, you are Rank two, why are you afraid of him? " Uncle stomped his feet in anger, "Woman, your hair is long but your knowledge is short! With my status as an elder, do I have to fight with a junior? It is reasonable for him to ask for the inheritance back, we cannot stop him directly, we can only act according to the clan rules. The clan rules state clearly: To start a family at the age of sixteen, one must have at least Rank one middle stage cultivation. If not, it means that Fang Yuan does not have the qualifications to waste the clan's resources. Do you understand what I am saying? " Aunt was enlightened. Uncle squinted his eyes, a sinister glint flashing in them. He shook his head slightly, sighing, "This Fang Yuan is too smart, too cunning. He can even see through the seduction, what kind of intelligence is this? He is so scheming at such a young age, terrifying! I originally wanted to plot against him, but he moved out directly. I also wanted to rely on Shen Cui to monitor and interfere with him, but he sent me away and even earned six Yuan stone. " "Sigh, if only he could be as stupid as Fangzheng. Oh right, you have to treat Fangzheng better from now on, he is an A grade talent. Moreover, I can see that he is very unconvinced towards Fang Yuan, he is very unresigned. This mood is good, you have to guide it well. I have a feeling that he will be the best weapon to deal with Fang Yuan in the future! " … In the blink of an eye, another two days passed. There was no light in the room of the inn. The moonlight shone in, covering the floor with frost.
S-REV-024.summary: Fangzheng reports Fang Yuan's actions to his uncle and aunt, who feign outrage over Shen Cui's 'sale' but quickly pivot to plotting against Fang Yuan. The uncle reveals his plan to use clan rules and resource deprivation to prevent Fang Yuan, with his C-grade aptitude, from reaching the necessary cultivation level to inherit the family property. He further manipulates Fangzheng, giving him more Yuan stones and encouraging his resentment towards Fang Yuan, seeing him as a perfect 'weapon' for their scheme.

continuityMutations.content: His refinement progress on the Liquor worm is extremely slow despite significant Yuan stone expenditure and effort.
Experiences a powerful Gu worm backlash from the Liquor worm.
Witnesses the unexpected appearance of the Spring Autumn Cicada in his aperture.

S-REV-025.prose:
In two to three years, the clan will be able to nurture a Rank two Gu Master. The lower Fang Yuan's cultivation is, the smaller the chance of getting back the family property in a year's time. Right now he is young and has just started cultivating, we will stop him and let him fall behind his peers at the starting stage. The academy's resources are awarded to outstanding students. With his talent, once he falls behind, he will not be able to get any resources, and without resources to aid his cultivation, he will fall further behind. If this vicious cycle continues, will he still have the ability to inherit the family property in a year's time? " Aunt did not understand, "Even if we don't stop him, he will at most be Rank one middle stage in a year's time. Master, you are Rank two, why are you afraid of him? " Uncle stomped his feet in anger, "Woman, your hair is long but your knowledge is short! With my status as an elder, do I have to fight with a junior? It is reasonable for him to ask for the inheritance back, we cannot stop him directly, we can only act according to the clan rules. The clan rules state clearly: To start a family at the age of sixteen, one must have at least Rank one middle stage cultivation. If not, it means that Fang Yuan does not have the qualifications to waste the clan's resources. Do you understand what I am saying? " Aunt was enlightened. Uncle squinted his eyes, a sinister glint flashing in them. He shook his head slightly, sighing, "This Fang Yuan is too smart, too cunning. He can even see through the seduction, what kind of intelligence is this? He is so scheming at such a young age, terrifying! I originally wanted to plot against him, but he moved out directly. I also wanted to rely on Shen Cui to monitor and interfere with him, but he sent me away and even earned six Yuan stone. " "Sigh, if only he could be as stupid as Fangzheng. Oh right, you have to treat Fangzheng better from now on, he is an A grade talent. Moreover, I can see that he is very unconvinced towards Fang Yuan, he is very unresigned. This mood is good, you have to guide it well. I have a feeling that he will be the best weapon to deal with Fang Yuan in the future! " … In the blink of an eye, another two days passed. There was no light in the room of the inn. The moonlight shone in, covering the floor with frost.

On the bed, Fang Yuan sat cross-legged with his eyes closed, mobilizing his green bronze primordial essence, concentrating on refining the Liquor worm. A small part of the Liquor worm's body was dyed green bronze, but its will was still tenacious, constantly struggling in the smoky primordial essence. Fang Yuan's refining progress was not smooth, it could be said to be very difficult. "I spent a full two days and two nights, only resting for two hours a day, consuming twelve Yuan stone, but I only refined one-fifteenth of the progress. According to the time, in the next few days, someone will succeed in refining the Gu. " Fang Yuan was clear about the situation. But his talent was originally inferior, and now the Liquor worm's will to survive was extremely tenacious, much higher than the ordinary Moonlight Gu. It was normal for him to fall behind in this situation. "Falling behind for a while is nothing, as long as I have the Liquor worm …" Fang Yuan's heart was like a mirror, without a trace of anxiety or discouragement. But at this moment, the Liquor worm suddenly curled up, curling into a ball. "Not good, the Gu worm's backlash!" Fang Yuan suddenly opened his eyes, a trace of surprise flashing in his eyes. In front of him, the Liquor worm had curled into a round glutinous ball, suddenly bursting with a dazzling white light. It was staking it all on one throw! Suddenly, Fang Yuan felt a strong will coming from the Liquor worm, directly passing through the primordial essence and descending into his primordial sea in his aperture. The situation of a Gu worm's backlash was very rare. Only those Gu worms with extremely strong wills would try their best to succeed or die trying. If it were any other youth, they would definitely panic in the face of such a situation. But although Fang Yuan was shocked, he did not panic. Instead, he was a little happy. "It's good to stake it all on one throw. As long as I can withstand this backlash, the Liquor worm's will will will be greatly weakened. But next, I will have to concentrate all my energy to resist the impact of this will, without the slightest external interference. Otherwise, it will be bad, sigh … I hope no one will disturb me during this period. " He finished thinking, and was about to activate the primordial essence in his aperture to meet the will. Entangle with it, and fight for three hundred rounds. But at this moment, something strange happened again! A Gu worm appeared in the center of his aperture, above the primordial sea. Rumble!

This Gu worm burst out with an extremely strong aura. This aura was like the Milky Way pouring down, or the eruption of a mountain torrent, or like a horrifying beast whose dignity was violated, opening its scarlet eyes to see who dared to violate its territory! "This is the Spring Autumn Cicada?!" Seeing this Gu worm, Fang Yuan was completely shocked!!
S-REV-025.summary: Two days later, Fang Yuan continues his arduous attempt to refine the Liquor worm, having consumed twelve Yuan stones with minimal progress. Despite the difficulty and knowing he's falling behind other cultivators, he remains determined.
