Because its attack range was only ten meters.
If it was a close combat Gu Master, this martial arts instructor was the best example.
They would usually choose a Gu worm that could amplify their body, and carry out cultivation.
These Gu worms gave them strength, agility, reaction, endurance and so on that surpassed normal people.
Just like this martial arts instructor, his skin was bronze in color.
This was not his natural skin color, but the effect of a Copper Skin Gu.
The Copper Skin Gu would greatly increase the defense of the Gu Master's skin, allowing the Gu Master to take more damage.
"One moonblade consumes 10% of primeval essence.
How many times can a Gu Master use it in battle?
The number of times is very few, especially for novices, it cannot form an effective attack.
It can only be used as a trump card, its deterrence is greater than its destructive power.
To a Rank one Gu Master, what is useful is still martial arts.
Because martial arts attacks last longer, and are more reliable.
It's a pity that they have not experienced this personally, so they don't know. "
Fang Yuan used his gaze to glance at his peers around him, and his lips curled into a cold smile.
The basic martial arts class finally ended. After a short break, the academy elder arrived late under the anticipating gazes of the youths.
He waved his hand, pointing at the row of grass puppets under the bamboo wall, and went straight to the point, "Alright, today is the day to check the results.
You guys form a group of five, come up one by one, and use the moonblade to attack three times. "
Swoosh swoosh swoosh.
The first group of students walked up, the moonblades dancing in the air.
After three rounds, only nine moonblades hit the grass puppets.
The academy elder shook his head slightly, somewhat dissatisfied.
This hit rate was too low, and the key was that out of the five, two of them only managed to use two moonblades.
"You guys have to practice well from now on, especially you, and you." The elder reprimanded them slightly, and waved his hand, "Next group."
The two who were reprimanded walked down the stage dejectedly.
One of the young girls' eyes were red, feeling wronged.
She only had C grade talent, and she could not bear to use Yuan stone to recover her primeval essence quickly. Thus, she did not practice much these three days, causing her to not be familiar with using the moonblade.
Gu Masters needed money to refine Gu, to raise Gu, and to practice using Gu also needed money.
But where did she get so much money?
Although she had the support of her parents, every family had their own difficulties.
Being short of money was a common predicament for Gu Masters.
"Since I have no hope of getting first, I might as well give up and save Yuan stone, isn't that better?" Thinking of this, the young girl calmed down.
There were many who had the same thoughts as the young girl.
Because of the lack of practice, many students performed poorly.
The academy elder's brows furrowed even deeper.
Fang Yuan saw this, and shook his head in his heart, "These people are so pitiful and pitiful. For some Yuan stone, they gave up on the chance to improve themselves.
Yuan stone is for use, like a miser saving Yuan stone, why did they become a Gu Master? "
In other words, only the short-sighted would haggle over every penny, often neglecting the essentials.
On the other hand, those with lofty ambitions were usually able to display a magnanimous and forgiving attitude.
"It's finally my turn." At this time, Guyue Mobei's horse walked onto the stage with a confident smile on its face.
His body was sturdy, and emitted a valiant aura.
After standing still, he raised his hand and released three moonblades, all three hitting.
Two of them hit the puppet's chest, and one hit the puppet's left arm, cutting off a few green grass pieces.
Such a result naturally attracted a wave of praise from the youths.
"Not bad." The elder's brows relaxed slightly.
Another group came up, and one of them was Guyue Cheng.
Guyue Cheng was short, his face full of pockmarks, and his expression showed slight nervousness.
He consecutively released three moonblades, all hitting the puppet's chest, leaving three crisscrossing scars.
The scars turned from deep to shallow, and after a few breaths, because of the grass puppet's self-healing, it returned to its original appearance.
But such a performance was already on par with Guyue Mobei, and received the elder's praise as well.
Chicheng held his head high as he walked down the stage, giving Mobei a provocative look on the way.
"Hmph!"
Off the stage, Guyue Mobei snorted coldly, but he did not stare back at Chicheng, instead looking at Guyue Fangzheng who had yet to go on stage.
He was clear that the only ones who posed a threat were Guyue Cheng and Guyue Fangzheng.
The former was the same as him, a B grade talent, and had a constant supply of Yuan stone.
The latter was an A grade talent, and even though the Yuan stone wasn't as abundant as theirs, relying on the recovery speed of his Qi, he could still practice a lot in a short period of time.
Now that Guyue Cheng's result was out, and he was on par with Mobei, only Guyue Fangzheng was left.
In the last few groups, Guyue Fangzheng finally went on stage.

Chapter 25
"Is he Fang Yuan or Fangzheng?" Some of the students muttered. There were still some who couldn't tell the difference between Fang Yuan and Fangzheng, the twins.
"It's Fangzheng.
Fang Yuan always has a cold expression on his face, there's never a nervous expression on his face. "Someone answered.
"Oh, then there's something to see.
Fangzheng is the only A grade prodigy in our stronghold in the past three years. "Everyone looked at him.
Fangzheng could feel the pressure from their gazes, which made him even more nervous.
Standing in the arena, his fingers were trembling slightly.
His first Crescent Blade was originally aimed at the chest of the Straw Puppet, but because of his nervousness, he missed.
In the end, the Crescent Blade landed on the Straw Puppet's neck.
The youths immediately let out soft gasps of surprise.
They thought that Fangzheng had done it on purpose, not aiming for the Straw Puppet's chest, which was the easiest to hit, but the neck. This was a sign that he was confident in his attacking technique.
They couldn't help but look forward to Fangzheng's next performance even more.
Guyue Mobei and Guyue Chengcheng's expressions darkened.
The only ones who could see that Fangzheng had made a mistake were the academy elder and Fang Yuan.
"That was close!" Seeing this Crescent Blade, Fangzheng exclaimed in his heart, secretly feeling that he was lucky.
He took a few deep breaths, forced himself to calm down, and released two more Crescent Blades.
This time, he didn't make a mistake, and both Crescent Blades hit the Straw Puppet's chest accurately.
This result made the academy elder nod his head, while Mobei and Chicheng calmed down.
Fangzheng's result was on par with theirs, and it was up to the academy elder to grade.
The other students let out sighs of disappointment.
Fangzheng's subsequent performance was not outstanding, and they were slightly disappointed.
There was nothing interesting about the next few groups.
No one could perform better than Mobei, Chicheng, and Fangzheng.
The youths began to whisper to each other.
"It seems that the first place in today's assessment will be decided between the three of them."
"All three of them hit the Straw Puppet, I wonder who the elder will favor."
"Wait, it's the last group, Fang Yuan is up."
"Oh, you mean that 'cold genius' of the C grade?
Hehe. "
Until the last group, Fang Yuan went up on stage.
"It's that Fang Yuan …" Guyue Mobei looked up at Fang Yuan, then lowered his eyes, not paying much attention to him.
"Last time, you got lucky and accidentally chose a weak-willed Moonlight Gu, which allowed you to get first place.
Let's see how you perform this time! "Gu Yue Chi Cheng crossed his arms, waiting to see Fang Yuan make a fool of himself.
"Brother … this time is not the same as last time, I've trained hard for so long, I can definitely surpass you." In the crowd, Guyue Fangzheng pursed his lips, his fists clenched tightly.
Last time in the assessment to refine the vital Gu, he got second place with his A grade aptitude, so naturally he was not convinced.
Especially when he understood the reason for Fang Yuan's victory, it was because of his good luck that he got first place.
This made him even more dissatisfied.
To Guyue Fangzheng, winning against his brother Fang Yuan had a special meaning to him.
Many gazes were focused on Fang Yuan, even the academy elder was looking at him.
Fang Yuan was unmoved, his expression cold.
After he stood still, he channeled his primeval essence into the Moonlight Gu in his palm, and with a wave of his hand, he released the first moonblade.
The moonblade flew high, not only over the Straw Puppet's head, but also above the bamboo wall.
After flying for about fifteen meters, the light dimmed and disappeared into the air.
"Pfft …" Some people could not help but laugh.
"That's too far off." Some people laughed coldly.
"He's indeed a genius, no wonder he got first place in refining Gu." Some people said sarcastically.
In the early years, when Fang Yuan created poems and displayed his early wisdom, these people were dissatisfied.
Later on, he got first place in refining Gu with 'luck', adding to their dissatisfaction was jealousy.
Many people were waiting to watch a good show, waiting for the 'genius' Fang Yuan to make a fool of himself, and Fang Yuan's moonblade did not disappoint them.
The crowd burst into laughter.
The academy elder shook his head slightly, laughing at himself in his heart. Why did he pay attention to Fang Yuan for no reason?
He was only a C grade, and only got first place in refining Gu because of a moment of luck.
He had already made up his mind, although Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng's results were the same, he would choose Fangzheng as first place.
The battle between Guyue Mobei and Guyue City was the epitome of the political struggle between the two powerful elders in the clan.
The academy elder had always been in the middle, and did not want to get involved in the political whirlpool.
The academy elder was more inclined towards the clan leader, Guyue Bo, while Fangzheng was on the clan leader's side.
Furthermore, he had an A grade aptitude, so choosing him as first place was somewhat biased towards him, and could be accepted by the clan's higher-ups.
A warm spring breeze blew, and the fragrance of flowers floated into the battle arena.
The sunlight shone on Fang Yuan's body, casting a lonely shadow on the ground.
His expression was still cold, quietly looking at the Straw Puppet ten meters away, the moonblade imprint in the center of his hand emitting a faint blue light.
The first moonblade was of course purposely missed by him.
Now, he only had two chances left, and considering the academy elder's standpoint, if he wanted to get first place, he had to create an effect that far surpassed everyone else's attack.
"There are only two chances left, it's impossible.
Brother, I've finally won, "Guyue Fangzheng's eyes stared unblinkingly at Fang Yuan.
Since young, the shadow that his brother had cast in his life was finally fading away at this moment.
Fangzheng felt that victory was close at hand, and subconsciously clenched his fists, his whole body trembling slightly with excitement.
"Brother, winning you this time is only the beginning.
Next, I will win you again and again, until the shadow in my heart is completely removed.
I want to prove to the clan the excellence of an A grade prodigy! "Fangzheng said to himself in his heart.
But at this moment, Fang Yuan made his move.
His right palm was like a knife, chopping through the air.
With a soft sound, the blue light that enveloped his palm broke free, flew into the air, and turned into a blue moonblade, shooting towards the Straw Puppet.
In the next second, Fang Yuan's right palm lit up with a layer of blue light again.
With a flip of his palm, he chopped out the third moonblade.
His two attacks were connected smoothly and perfectly.
The two moonblades flew out one after the other, and were less than half a meter apart in the air.
Under the shocked gazes of the crowd, the two moonblades accurately hit the Straw Puppet's neck.
"This …" Fangzheng's pupils shrank, and he suddenly had a bad feeling in his heart.
In the next moment, the students had a shocked expression, and slowly opened their mouths wide.
They saw the Straw Puppet's head slowly tilt to one side, then fall from its neck, and finally fall to the ground, bouncing once, and rolling a distance of two to three meters.
Fang Yuan had chopped off its head!
This result was out of everyone's expectations.
"Is this luck or skill?" The academy elder frowned.
The same doubt also circled in the hearts of the rest of the students.
For a moment, the Martial Arts Arena fell into silence.
"How could this be …" Fangzheng murmured, and he stared blankly at Fang Yuan. The surging emotions in his heart suddenly disappeared, and he fell into a deep valley.
Fang Yuan narrowed his eyes, as if he didn't notice the gazes of the crowd on him.
Coo coo coo …
Under the blue sky and white clouds, a flock of colorful parrots suddenly flapped their wings, and flew into the air.
They dragged their beautiful and slender tails, cooing as they flew in circles in the air.
Fang Yuan stood in the middle of the Martial Arts Arena, and looked up.
Under the bright sunlight, the colorful feathers of the birds were even more dazzling.
His expression was calm, as if he wasn't the one who had just chopped off the Straw Puppet's head.
"The spring sun is really bright …" He sighed in his heart.
S-REV-034.summary: A boxing instructor attempts to teach basic combat techniques, but students are largely distracted, focusing on the upcoming moonblade test. Fang Yuan observes critically, noting the instructor's flawed teaching method but also the value of the lessons. During the test, many students perform poorly, struggling with moonblade accuracy. Fang Yuan initially appears to miss his first shot, creating a false impression of incompetence, before expertly severing the head of a straw puppet with his last two moonblades, shocking everyone.

continuityMutations.content: Mo Chen suspects Fang Yuan's repeated success is due to 'dog shit luck' rather than skill.
Fangzheng is motivated to win the class monitor position to finally surpass Fang Yuan and make his brother 'bow and greet' him.
Guyue Cheng is worried about the new competition focusing purely on cultivation talent, as his B-grade talent is a fabricated illusion.
Provides basic education and training for aspiring Gu Masters.
Distributes weekly Yuan stone allowances to students.
Serves as a hub for competition and social hierarchy among young Gu Masters.

C-REV-01.transition: Leaves the main hall of the academy to stand at the entrance.

S-REV-035.prose:
Chapter 26
It was close to evening, and the setting sun was like blood.
The afterglow shone on the academy, and more than fifty students sat upright. On the stage, the academy elder was reading out the names one by one, distributing the allowance.
This was the Yuan stone allowance that the academy gave out every seven days, as a form of financial aid for these youths.
After all, with their strength, to feed their own Gu worms was a huge financial burden.
"Guyue, Fang Yuan." The elder read.
Fang Yuan stood up from the last row by the window, walking up to the stage and receiving the two money bags.
In one bag, there were three Yuan stones as the clan allowance.
The other bag had ten Yuan stones as a reward.
"Work hard." The elder looked deeply at Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan had obtained first place twice in a row, causing the clan elder who was originally disappointed to start paying some attention to him.
Fang Yuan nodded, keeping the money bags and returning to his seat.
"Damn it, he took first place again …" Guyue Mo Chen stared at Fang Yuan, feeling indignant.
"Those two moonblades hit the puppet's neck consecutively, is this his dog shit luck or his true strength?"
Guyue Mo Chen squinted his eyes. From the end of the exam until now, this question had been lingering in his heart.
Not only him, but many of the students' gazes either intentionally or unintentionally drifted towards Fang Yuan.
This question tormented them. Even though they had lost, they were still unwilling and wanted to get to the bottom of it.
When it was about to end, the academy elder announced something, "You have all been in the academy for some time now, and are familiar with the usage of the vital Gu.
In the following days, I will teach you how to nurture your aperture and raise your Gu Master's cultivation realm.
The higher the Gu Master's realm, the more condensed their primeval essence.
Rank one Gu Masters have green copper primeval essence, Rank two Gu Masters have red iron primeval essence, and Rank three Gu Masters have white silver primeval essence.
One portion of red iron primeval essence is equivalent to ten portions of green copper primeval essence.
Similarly, one portion of white silver primeval essence is equivalent to ten portions of red iron primeval essence! "
"You have to remember, Gu worms are just tools we use, cultivation is the foundation of us Gu Masters.
The higher the cultivation, the stronger the Gu worm.
In the following three months, whoever could advance to Rank one middle stage first would be rewarded with thirty Yuan stones, and would also have the right to choose the second Gu worm.
Three months later, we will appoint a class monitor and two deputy class monitors based on the results.
Yuan stone allowance will be 10 Yuan stone allowance for the class monitor, and Yuan stone allowance for the vice class monitor will be increased to 5 Yuan stones!
Alright, that's all for today. Everyone, disperse. "
The elder's words caused the entire academy to buzz.
"They're going to appoint a class monitor and deputy class monitor!" Someone excitedly clenched his fist.
"The monitor gets ten Yuan stone every seven days, and the deputy monitor gets five?
If I can be the first to advance to the middle stage of the first job transition, I will definitely become the chairman. "Someone's eyes shone brightly.
"Yuan stone is not the main point. The main point is that the positions of class monitor and deputy monitor represent glory, and their statuses are above everyone else.
When ordinary students see the class monitor, they have to bow and greet him. "Guyue Mobei, Chicheng and the rest did not lack Yuan stone, but they valued this glory very much.
"Becoming the class monitor, that's right, being the first to advance to the middle stage of the first job transition!
Let big brother bow and greet me when he sees me in the future.
Wait, where's big brother? "Guyue Fangzheng subconsciously looked back, but Fang Yuan's seat was already empty.
The students walked out of the academy one after another.
"Guyue, where's Fang Yuan?" Guyue Mobei wanted to find Fang Yuan and ask him face to face.
But Fang Yuan had already left a step earlier.
"Hmph, he ran pretty fast.
Is he afraid?
Looks like he got lucky again in today's assessment. "Guyue Cheng sneered.
"Forget it, it's just a reward of ten Yuan stone, there's no need to care about this. The most important thing now is to advance to the middle stage and get the position of the class monitor." Guyue Mobei squinted his eyes, looking at Guyue Cheng and Guyue Fangzheng beside him.
These two were his real opponents. As for Fang Yuan, he was just a C grade talent, he was not enough.
"The first two assessments, Fang Yuan was lucky enough to get first place.
But this time's assessment only focuses on cultivation talent.
If one's talent is one grade higher, the advantage is huge. "
Guyue Cheng felt depressed. His real talent was only C grade, it was only because he cheated that he gave the false impression of being B grade.
"A position of the class monitor and two positions of the vice class monitor are enough to make them rub their fists.
What a hot-blooded and naive age. "Fang Yuan leaned against the entrance of the academy, laughing coldly in his heart.
The so-called glory was just a value tool used by the superior to motivate the subordinates.
In the end, it was just a layer of illusory halo, what use was it?
With 500 years of life experience, Fang Yuan had long understood the mystery behind it.
"Whether it's a family, a sect, or a demonic cult, whether it's this world or Earth, any organization is the same.
Setting up a high and low position, clearly defining the promotion method, allows the people in the organization to continuously climb up from a low position.
Because it's human nature to chase after profits, and power often gives people the illusion that they are superior to others, that their lives are more valuable than others. "
"The word 'power' is like a carrot dangling in front of a donkey. People are stimulated by it, one after another, trying to curry favor.
After climbing up a level, there's an even higher level.
Little do they know, in the process of currying favor, their labor is squeezed, and the value they produce is exploited by the superior. "
"All organizations, as long as they have a subordinate relationship, serve the superior.
The so-called class monitor and vice class monitor are the smallest carrot, luring others into the family system.
And in order to prevent the inferior from seeing through this truth, the superior often unifies the values, clearly defining the concepts of glory, merit, and so on, setting up high and low positions, unequal benefits, or using religion to rule the hearts of people. "
"This is the truth, but unfortunately, most people in the world don't understand, foolishly working hard for others.
And all the organizations in the world, the most fundamental essence is only one, and that is — — the redistribution of resources. The higher the level, the more resources they can enjoy. "
In his previous life, Fang Yuan founded the Blood Wing Demonic Cult in the Central Continent, teaching tens of thousands of people.
He also set up the positions of Demonic Soldier, Demonic General, Demonic General, and so on, and gave corresponding benefits, causing countless people to flock to them and be ordered around by Fang Yuan.
This kind of experience allowed him to have a clear understanding of the Dao.
"So, any organization is just a facade, the real foundation is only one word — — resources.
Without resources to eat, they will starve to death.
Without resources to drink, they will die of thirst.
Without resources to cultivate, they will be weak, and sooner or later, they will be bullied to death. "
"And Yuan stone is the most important resource for a Gu Master's cultivation!" Fang Yuan's eyes were as deep as a serene lake. Thinking of this, the corner of his mouth curled up, forming a cold smile.
He had left the academy early, and now stood at the academy's entrance, seeing the first batch of students walking out, gradually approaching him.
"It's Fang Yuan."
"What is he doing blocking the entrance?"
"Hmph, every time I see him like this, I get annoyed."
"Don't mind him, he's probably waiting for someone."
The youngsters did not mind, and just as they were about to walk over, Fang Yuan took a step forward, blocking them, "This is a robbery.
Everyone hand over a piece of Yuan stone, and you can leave. "
S-REV-035.summary: As evening falls, the Academy Elder distributes Yuan stone allowances and rewards. Fang Yuan receives a reward for his first-place finish, drawing stares and suspicion from other students like Guyue Mo Chen. The Elder then announces a new competition: whoever reaches Rank one middle stage first will become class monitor, with significant rewards and prestige. This news excites most students, who immediately focus on the competition, while Fang Yuan cynically observes their motivations.

S-REV-036.prose:
Chapter 26
It was close to evening, and the setting sun was like blood.
The afterglow shone on the academy, and more than fifty students sat upright. On the stage, the academy elder was reading out the names one by one, distributing the allowance.
This was the Yuan stone allowance that the academy gave out every seven days, as a form of financial aid for these youths.
After all, with their strength, to feed their own Gu worms was a huge financial burden.
"Guyue, Fang Yuan." The elder read.
Fang Yuan stood up from the last row by the window, walking up to the stage and receiving the two money bags.
In one bag, there were three Yuan stones as the clan allowance.
The other bag had ten Yuan stones as a reward.
"Work hard." The elder looked deeply at Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan had obtained first place twice in a row, causing the clan elder who was originally disappointed to start paying some attention to him.
Fang Yuan nodded, keeping the money bags and returning to his seat.
"Damn it, he took first place again …" Guyue Mo Chen stared at Fang Yuan, feeling indignant.
"Those two moonblades hit the puppet's neck consecutively, is this his dog shit luck or his true strength?"
Guyue Mo Chen squinted his eyes. From the end of the exam until now, this question had been lingering in his heart.
Not only him, but many of the students' gazes either intentionally or unintentionally drifted towards Fang Yuan.
This question tormented them. Even though they had lost, they were still unwilling and wanted to get to the bottom of it.
When it was about to end, the academy elder announced something, "You have all been in the academy for some time now, and are familiar with the usage of the vital Gu.
In the following days, I will teach you how to nurture your aperture and raise your Gu Master's cultivation realm.
The higher the Gu Master's realm, the more condensed their primeval essence.
Rank one Gu Masters have green copper primeval essence, Rank two Gu Masters have red iron primeval essence, and Rank three Gu Masters have white silver primeval essence.
One portion of red iron primeval essence is equivalent to ten portions of green copper primeval essence.
Similarly, one portion of white silver primeval essence is equivalent to ten portions of red iron primeval essence! "
"You have to remember, Gu worms are just tools we use, cultivation is the foundation of us Gu Masters.
The higher the cultivation, the stronger the Gu worm.
In the following three months, whoever could advance to Rank one middle stage first would be rewarded with thirty Yuan stones, and would also have the right to choose the second Gu worm.
Three months later, we will appoint a class monitor and two deputy class monitors based on the results.
Yuan stone allowance will be 10 Yuan stone allowance for the class monitor, and Yuan stone allowance for the vice class monitor will be increased to 5 Yuan stones!
Alright, that's all for today. Everyone, disperse. "
The elder's words caused the entire academy to buzz.
"They're going to appoint a class monitor and deputy class monitor!" Someone excitedly clenched his fist.
"The monitor gets ten Yuan stone every seven days, and the deputy monitor gets five?
If I can be the first to advance to the middle stage of the first job transition, I will definitely become the chairman. "Someone's eyes shone brightly.
"Yuan stone is not the main point. The main point is that the positions of class monitor and deputy monitor represent glory, and their statuses are above everyone else.
When ordinary students see the class monitor, they have to bow and greet him. "Guyue Mobei, Chicheng and the rest did not lack Yuan stone, but they valued this glory very much.
"Becoming the class monitor, that's right, being the first to advance to the middle stage of the first job transition!
Let big brother bow and greet me when he sees me in the future.
Wait, where's big brother? "Guyue Fangzheng subconsciously looked back, but Fang Yuan's seat was already empty.
The students walked out of the academy one after another.
"Guyue, where's Fang Yuan?" Guyue Mobei wanted to find Fang Yuan and ask him face to face.
But Fang Yuan had already left a step earlier.
"Hmph, he ran pretty fast.
Is he afraid?
Looks like he got lucky again in today's assessment. "Guyue Cheng sneered.
"Forget it, it's just a reward of ten Yuan stone, there's no need to care about this. The most important thing now is to advance to the middle stage and get the position of the class monitor." Guyue Mobei squinted his eyes, looking at Guyue Cheng and Guyue Fangzheng beside him.
These two were his real opponents. As for Fang Yuan, he was just a C grade talent, he was not enough.
"The first two assessments, Fang Yuan was lucky enough to get first place.
But this time's assessment only focuses on cultivation talent.
If one's talent is one grade higher, the advantage is huge. "
Guyue Cheng felt depressed. His real talent was only C grade, it was only because he cheated that he gave the false impression of being B grade.
"A position of the class monitor and two positions of the vice class monitor are enough to make them rub their fists.
What a hot-blooded and naive age. "Fang Yuan leaned against the entrance of the academy, laughing coldly in his heart.
The so-called glory was just a value tool used by the superior to motivate the subordinates.
In the end, it was just a layer of illusory halo, what use was it?
With 500 years of life experience, Fang Yuan had long understood the mystery behind it.
"Whether it's a family, a sect, or a demonic cult, whether it's this world or Earth, any organization is the same.
Setting up a high and low position, clearly defining the promotion method, allows the people in the organization to continuously climb up from a low position.
Because it's human nature to chase after profits, and power often gives people the illusion that they are superior to others, that their lives are more valuable than others. "
"The word 'power' is like a carrot dangling in front of a donkey. People are stimulated by it, one after another, trying to curry favor.
After climbing up a level, there's an even higher level.
Little do they know, in the process of currying favor, their labor is squeezed, and the value they produce is exploited by the superior. "
"All organizations, as long as they have a subordinate relationship, serve the superior.
The so-called class monitor and vice class monitor are the smallest carrot, luring others into the family system.
And in order to prevent the inferior from seeing through this truth, the superior often unifies the values, clearly defining the concepts of glory, merit, and so on, setting up high and low positions, unequal benefits, or using religion to rule the hearts of people. "
"This is the truth, but unfortunately, most people in the world don't understand, foolishly working hard for others.
And all the organizations in the world, the most fundamental essence is only one, and that is — — the redistribution of resources. The higher the level, the more resources they can enjoy. "
In his previous life, Fang Yuan founded the Blood Wing Demonic Cult in the Central Continent, teaching tens of thousands of people.
He also set up the positions of Demonic Soldier, Demonic General, Demonic General, and so on, and gave corresponding benefits, causing countless people to flock to them and be ordered around by Fang Yuan.
This kind of experience allowed him to have a clear understanding of the Dao.
"So, any organization is just a facade, the real foundation is only one word — — resources.
Without resources to eat, they will starve to death.
Without resources to drink, they will die of thirst.
Without resources to cultivate, they will be weak, and sooner or later, they will be bullied to death. "
"And Yuan stone is the most important resource for a Gu Master's cultivation!" Fang Yuan's eyes were as deep as a serene lake. Thinking of this, the corner of his mouth curled up, forming a cold smile.
He had left the academy early, and now stood at the academy's entrance, seeing the first batch of students walking out, gradually approaching him.
"It's Fang Yuan."
"What is he doing blocking the entrance?"
"Hmph, every time I see him like this, I get annoyed."
"Don't mind him, he's probably waiting for someone."
The youngsters did not mind, and just as they were about to walk over, Fang Yuan took a step forward, blocking them, "This is a robbery.
Everyone hand over a piece of Yuan stone, and you can leave. "
S-REV-036.summary: Fang Yuan, having left the academy early, waits at the entrance. As the first group of students approaches, he steps forward and declares his intention to rob them, demanding a Yuan stone from each student before they can leave. This act reveals his complete disregard for established social norms and his direct, ruthless pursuit of resources, startling his classmates.

continuityMutations.content: His precise knowledge of human weak points and strategic combat application.
His plan to continue extorting students every seven days for Yuan stones.
Recognition of Fang Yuan's battle talent despite his C-grade aptitude.
The philosophy that controlled fighting fosters student development and fighting spirit.
The inherent power dynamic between Guyue clan members and mortal guards.
His specific threshold for acceptable extortion (one Yuan stone).
His demotion by the Academy Elder for disrespect.
His shock and disapproval of Fang Yuan's actions, but eventual forced compliance.
Fang Yuan strategically exploits academy rules and social dynamics to extort resources from his peers, knowing he won't be severely punished.
Fang Yuan believes in using any method to achieve his goals, including violence and extortion, without moral compunctions.
Fang Yuan identifies extortion and robbery as the most profitable business for acquiring Yuan stones.
Fang Yuan demonstrates precise knowledge of human anatomy's weak points for incapacitation rather than lethal injury during combat.
Fang Yuan learns to use the Liquor worm to condense his primeval essence, accelerating his cultivation to middle stage Rank one.
Guyue Mobei is quickly defeated and rendered unconscious by Fang Yuan's precise attack to his collarbone.
The Academy Elder recognizes Fang Yuan's natural talent for battle and strategic thinking, despite his C-grade aptitude.
The Academy Elder understands the inherent power dynamic between Guyue clan members (Gu Masters) and mortal guards, and uses it to assert authority.
The Academy Elder uses a 'stick and carrot' approach to control his guards, removing one and offering promotion to others.
The Academy Elder believes controlled fighting among students is beneficial for tempering their fighting spirit, rather than detrimental.
The Academy Elder sets a specific threshold for Fang Yuan's extortion – one Yuan stone is acceptable, two would warrant intervention.
The Guard Leader is stripped of his position by the Academy Elder for questioning his judgment and disrespecting a clan member.
Fangzheng is deeply shocked and disapproves of Fang Yuan's violent extortion of classmates, including himself.
Fangzheng is compelled by Fang Yuan's threat and the situation to comply with the extortion.
Guyue Cheng learns he is a pawn in his grandfather's clan power struggles and must maintain a strong image for the Red Branch Family.
Guyue Cheng is aware that his B-grade aptitude is a deception orchestrated by his grandfather.
The only way to leave the academy for students.
Humans live in clans for survival against harsh environments, beast tides, and other Gu Masters.

C-REV-01.transition: Swaggered away from the academy gate after his coercive acts.

S-REV-037.prose:
Chapter 27
The youths were both shocked and furious.
"What? Did I hear that right?"
"Fang Yuan, have you lost your mind? How dare you stand in front of the academy's gate and blackmail us?!"
"Have you gone mad from poverty?
Who gave you the guts to set your sights on us? "
"Get lost! You're just a Third Grade Martial Artist and you dare to block my way?
If you don't scram, I'll send you flying with a kick … Ugh! "
Fang Yuan suddenly attacked.
He formed a palm with his right hand and ruthlessly chopped down.
His movements were accurate and fast, and the lower edge of his palm struck the left side of a person's neck.
How could this unfortunate youth have expected Fang Yuan to suddenly attack him? Just as he was cursing, he suddenly suffered a heavy blow.
His eyes rolled back and he fainted on the spot.
"F * ck!
You really dare to make a move!? "The crowd was in an uproar, and the youths subconsciously took a step back.
"Guyue, Northern Giant has fainted, what do we do?" Someone shouted in alarm and fear.
"What else can we do?
There are so many of us, but Fang Yuan is alone.
Let's rush over and give him a good beating! "Someone shouted, exploding with anger.
"That's right. He doesn't know what's good for him and dares to challenge us alone.
He must have eaten the guts of a leopard!
Everyone, attack together!! "
However, before they could do anything, Fang Yuan had already made his move.
He took a few steps forward and rushed into the crowd first.
His palm slashed diagonally, chopping a youth's neck.
The youth rolled his eyes and collapsed.
"Ah —!" A young man shouted and swung his fist at Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan lowered his body and dodged, raising his leg and kicking this person's crotch.
"Ahhhh —!"
The youth's shout was originally loud and passionate, but after being struck by this attack, the pitch of his voice suddenly rose, becoming sharp and sharp, filled with misery and pain.
Plop.
He covered his crotch with both hands, and his knees went soft. He knelt on the ground and rolled on the ground, screaming and screaming. The pain made him break out in a cold sweat.
Fang Yuan raised his palms, like a tiger entering a flock of sheep!
He had 500 years of battle experience, and these youths were just a bunch of newbies who had just started cultivating. How could they be a match for him?
In the blink of an eye, this group of youths were all taken down by Fang Yuan.
All of them either fainted or lay on the ground. They were in so much pain that they sucked in a breath of cold air.
"What's going on?!" Guyue Mobei arrived a step later and exclaimed.
He saw Fang Yuan standing at the entrance of the academy, and five or six students lying around him.
"Fang Yuan, he, he wants to extort us for our Yuan stone!" A youth who was lying on the ground, clutching his stomach, shouted angrily.
"Quite energetic." Fang Yuan's expression was calm as he kicked the youth's abdomen.
Woo!
The youth immediately screamed in pain, his body curling up like a shrimp.
A look of fear appeared on his face. Tears and mucus flowed down his face, and he no longer dared to speak carelessly.
Seeing this scene, the youths who rushed over all felt Fang Yuan's cruelty, and their hearts palpitated.
"Alright, all of you obediently hand over a piece of Yuan stone and I will let you go.
Otherwise, you will end up like these people on the ground. "Fang Yuan took a big step forward, his voice cold.
"Bullshit!
You're just a mere C grade, and you want to defeat me, a B grade? "Guyue Mobei was enraged. He raised his fist and rushed towards Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan's ankle turned slightly, and he lightly leaned to the side, dodging his fist.
Then he stretched out his left hand, raised his index and middle finger, and accurately poked the center of the Mobei's collarbone, below his throat.
The Mobei's vision immediately turned black, and with a plop, he fell to the ground and fainted.
"Hiss …"
Seeing this scene, the youths who still wanted to charge forward all gasped, and their momentum came to a halt.
Fang Yuan's attack, in the eyes of these youths, suddenly became profound and unfathomable.
The fact that they did not pay attention to basic fist and leg techniques was vaguely mentioned in class.
The human body had many weak parts, and the few parts that Fang Yuan attacked were some of them.
If these parts were attacked, it would cause a person to faint on the spot, and if it was serious, it would be life-threatening.
But Fang Yuan knew when to stop.
Those who were knocked down by him either fainted, or felt intense pain, and temporarily lost the ability to fight.
None of them were seriously injured.
This was the terror of 500 years of battle experience!
"Hand it over, or not?" Fang Yuan took a step forward, and forced the other youths.
The youths looked at each other, then gritted their teeth or roared, and rushed towards Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan dodged and attacked at the same time.
His cultivation level was low, but it was still there. His heart was as calm as ice, and his movements were fast and accurate.
Plop plop …
After a few breaths, another group of youths fell to the ground.
"Too cruel!
Too scary! "
"Don't tell me they're dead?"
There were still a few girls who did not rush forward.
Their eyes were wide open, and seeing this scene, their bodies trembled more and more.
Fang Yuan's gaze swept across them, and their beautiful faces paled. They hurriedly waved their hands and retreated, "Don't, don't come over.
We'll hand it over, we'll hand it over! "
Fang Yuan took a few Yuan stones, and let them go.
They stumbled out of the academy's main gate, and more and more students came over.
To leave the academy, this main gate was the only way.
If Fang Yuan blocked this gate, he would be able to block all the students.
"Damn, what happened?!" The youths widened their eyes in shock.
"Isn't that Guyue Mobei?" Guyue Cheng looked at the unconscious Mobei on the ground, and was dumbfounded.
Fang Yuan opened his mouth to speak, and the youths were instantly enraged. They attacked, and then fell.
"Master Elder, are we just going to keep watching, and not stop him?
What if someone dies, how are we going to clean up this mess? "The guards' faces were full of worry.
But some of the guards were furious, "This Fang Yuan, he is too daring.
You actually dared to blackmail your classmate right in front of our eyes, right in front of the academy's main gate.
He is simply lawless!
As long as Master gives the order, I will take him down. "
Fang Yuan blocking the academy's main gate, and publicly admitting that he was a violent act of blackmailing his classmates, had already attracted attention from the start.
But the mortal guards did not have the authority to punish the students, and could only report to the academy elder first.
When the academy elder heard the news, he did not immediately give the order to stop him, but went up to the pavilion, and observed from afar.
"Seems like this child, has a talent for battle." The academy elder was getting more and more interested as he watched.
Fang Yuan's performance in using the crescent blade, had already attracted the elder's suspicions, and now he was able to single-handedly fight against an entire group of students, with the elegance of someone who dominated the battlefield.
The doubts in his heart, were solved.
In this world, there were some people who were especially sensitive to battle, and this was a hidden talent.
They were good at fighting, and loved to fight. In battle, they would often be inspired.
They would often create shocking, and even unimaginable results.
"This child is a natural battle Gu Master.
Unfortunately, his aptitude is only C grade, and he is still lacking by a level. "The academy elder sighed.
"Master, are you not going to stop this farce?
If we let him continue like this, I'm afraid it won't be a good influence. "The guards beside him all had an anxious look on their faces.

==================================================

Chapter 28
"Why should I stop him?" The academy elder raised his eyebrows and laughed.
He stretched out his finger and pointed at Fang Yuan, saying, "This kid already has control of the entire situation and knows when to stop.
Look at how he slashes at people's necks, he only slashes at the left and right sides, never at the back of the head or neck.
This is because he knows that slashing at the left and right side of the neck can cause people to faint on the spot.
But slashing at the back of the head and neck can cause death, so he gave up on this method of attack. "
"Look at all these youngsters on the ground, which one of them is heavily injured?
None!
So what if they are heavily injured, with our academy's healing Gu Masters, can't they heal this kind of injury? "
"But lord elder, this kid is too arrogant.
He is blocking the entrance and does not even put us guards in his eyes.
It is fine if we are ignored, but the key is how the clansmen will look at our academy.
They actually allowed a small C grade student to create havoc in the academy and did not stop him.
If this matter spreads, it will affect lord's reputation. "The guard squinted his eyes and said.
"Hmph, it is you who feel that this kid is ignoring you and offending your dignity, right?"
The academy elder was displeased and sneered, his sharp gaze sweeping over the guards. All of them lowered their heads, Qi Dao did not dare to.
"What's wrong with fighting?
As long as no lives are lost, it can stimulate the competitive mentality of the students and temper their fighting spirit.
If we want to stop this kind of fighting, we will be killing the students' fighting spirit!
Were there no fights in the previous years? There were fights every year and they happened very frequently.
But in the past, it happened in the second half of the year, when the youngsters had grasped some fighting techniques and with strength, they could not help but itch to fight.
Why did you not stop these people in the past? "The academy elder questioned coldly.
"Maybe it is because the fights in the previous years were all one on one battles and rarely on such a large scale.
But this Fang Yuan is really too much of a troublemaker! "The guard leader replied.
"No, no, no." The academy elder shook his head, "This is because you do not dare to stop him.
Because in the second half of the year, Gu Masters have battle strength that surpasses mortals. What can you, mere mortals, use to stop him?
Now you want to stop Fang Yuan, maybe you feel that he has just started cultivating and does not have enough strength.
They also felt that he had disregarded them and offended their dignity.
But you must remember, these students' surnames are all Guyue!
He is a member of the Guyue Clan, your master!
No matter how young or weak he is, he is still your master! "
The elder's tone suddenly turned severe.
"If your surname isn't Guyue, who do you think you are?
Seeing how loyal you are, I gave you the position of a guard and rewarded you with some benefits.
But in reality, you are still slaves.
He was just a servant!
A servant dares to talk nonsense about his master and meddle in his master's affairs? "The elder's face was as gloomy as water.
"That's not what I meant. That's not what I meant!"
"This subordinate dares not!
This subordinate dares not! "
The guards were so scared that their faces turned ashen. One by one, they knelt on the ground and kowtowed incessantly.
The academy elder snorted coldly and pointed at the head of the guards who had just said that Fang Yuan was too noisy. "You talked nonsense about your master. You are stripped of your position as head."
After pausing for a moment, the elder said to the others, "In half a month's time, a new head will be tested."
The eyes of the other guards immediately lit up and their hearts were suddenly filled with excitement.
"The head of the guards will be able to get half an extra piece of Yuan stone every month!"
"To be able to become the head of the guards means that you are a person above others.
Apart from the masters, let's see if anyone else dares to give me any face. "
"If I were to become the head of the guards, how glorious would that be …"
"Alright, what are you all standing there for?
Get the hell down. When the fight is over, go clean up the place! "The elder scolded.
"Yes, yes, yes."
"This subordinate will take his leave!"
The guards went down the stairs in fear and trepidation.
On the stairs, someone lost his footing and fell down.
Immediately, a series of falling sounds could be heard.
But because of the academy elder's power, the guards' faces were all red. They tried hard to hold it in and did not make any noise.
"Hmph, a servant is like a dog. Every once in a while, the bones all over my body will itch and I will have to beat them a little to let them know respect.
Then I will throw some dog bones for small gains and let them fight amongst themselves, fighting to give their lives to my clan.
As the saying goes, a stick in one hand and a carrot in the other, this is the only way to be in a superior position. "
The academy elder heard the commotion downstairs and laughed coldly in his heart. He turned his head and looked through the window at the academy entrance.
On the ground at the entrance, there were more than ten new students.
Fang Yuan stood proudly with his head held high. Opposite him, there were three young girls standing back to back, cowering at the side.
"You, you, don't come any closer!"
"If you come any closer, we will shoot you with our moonblades!!"
A layer of blue light appeared on their hands. It looked like they were forced into a corner and actually used their primeval essence to activate the Moonlight Gu.
Fang Yuan's body was still that of an ordinary fifteen year old boy. If they used their moonblades to attack, it would not be easy to handle.
But he was not afraid. He laughed coldly in disdain and approached the girls step by step, "You all have guts. Have you forgotten the rules of the academy?
The academy does not allow the use of Gu to fight, or else you will be expelled.
If you want to be expelled, then go ahead and make your move. "
"This …" The girls hesitated.
"There is indeed such a rule." The blue light on their hands gradually dissipated.
Fang Yuan's eyes flashed. Taking advantage of this opening, he rushed forward and waved his palms, ruthlessly destroying flowers. Two of them fainted.
There was only one left. She lost all will to fight, her knees went soft and she collapsed on the ground.
She cried like a pear blossom in the rain, begging Fang Yuan, "Fang Yuan, don't come any closer, please let me go."
Fang Yuan looked down at the girl from above and said in a cold voice, "A piece of Yuan stone."
The girl's delicate body trembled and she suddenly understood. She quickly opened her money pouch and took out three or four pieces of Yuan stone. Holding them in her hands, she raised them towards Fang Yuan, "Don't hit me, I'll give it all to you, I'll give it all to you!"
Fang Yuan was expressionless. He slowly stretched out his right hand, stretching out his index finger and thumb, and gently pinched a piece of Yuan stone from the girl's hand.
The girl's delicate body trembled uncontrollably. Fang Yuan's hand was pale and slender, but in her eyes, it was as sinister and terrifying as a demon's claw.
"I've said it before, I'll only take one piece of Yuan stone." Fang Yuan paused for a moment, then said plainly, "You can leave now."
The girl stared blankly at Fang Yuan for a while before wanting to get up. But her limbs were soft and she could not even stand up.
Her heart was filled with fear towards Fang Yuan, and she was so scared that she could not muster any strength.
The academy elder saw this and could not help but shake his head.
Using this opportunity to discover the individual battle talents of the students was one of the objectives of his observation.
Although this girl who was paralyzed on the ground had C grade aptitude, with such a temperament, she could only be a logistics Gu Master, working in the clan's production. She could not be expected to be on the battlefield.
"But this Fang Yuan …" The academy elder rubbed his chin, his eyes squinting and flashing with brilliance.
He felt that this Fang Yuan was really interesting. Not only did he have battle talent, he also knew his limits.
Extorting one piece of Yuan stone did not cross the bottom line in his heart.
But if Fang Yuan wanted to extort two pieces, that would be too much, and he would have to interfere.
The academy's allowance was originally only three pieces.
Extorting one piece was not a big deal.
But extorting two pieces, then what was the point of giving out the allowance?
He might as well just give it all to Fang Yuan.
Soon, the last batch of students arrived.
There were only five of them, and one of them was Fang Yuan's twin brother.
"Brother, how can you do this?!
You are too daring, actually beating up your classmates at the entrance and extorting Yuan stone from them! "
Guyue Fangzheng was dumbstruck, he simply could not believe the scene in front of him, "I advise you to quickly admit your mistake to the academy elder, otherwise you will cause such a huge commotion. This is not a joke, you might even be expelled!"
Fang Yuan laughed, "You are right."
Fangzheng heaved a sigh of relief. It seemed that his brother had not gone completely crazy, it was good that he could listen to advice.
But soon he heard Fang Yuan say, "Everyone, one piece of Yuan stone."
"What?" Fangzheng opened his mouth wide in astonishment, "Even I have to hand it over?"
"My dear brother, of course you can choose not to hand it over." Fang Yuan's tone was very gentle, "But you will end up like them."
Fang Yuan pointed at the youths who were either unconscious or groaning on the ground.
"He won't even let off his own brother!"
"This Fang Yuan is crazy, he is too savage …"
"We can't beat him, a wise man knows better than to fight when the odds are against him, let's hand it over first to get through this difficult situation."
"That's right, hand over the Yuan stone first, it's only one piece anyway, when we go back and report it to the teacher, he will suffer!"
With the previous example, the remaining youths all had indignant looks in their eyes as they obediently accepted Fang Yuan's extortion.
"Wait a minute." They were just about to leave when they were stopped by Fang Yuan.
"Fang Yuan, are you going back on your word?" The youths suddenly became nervous.
Fang Yuan looked at the youths on the ground and sighed softly, "Do you think that I will squat down and search their bodies one by one?"
The youths were stunned for a moment, then they all came to a realization, their faces all flushed red as they stood there hesitantly.
Fang Yuan stared at them and narrowed his eyes.
A cold light flashed through his eyes, the five youths suddenly felt their hearts palpitate and their scalps go numb at the same time.
"Okay, Fang Yuan, we understand what you mean."
"I'll help you this time."
Due to Fang Yuan's abuse of power, they could only lower their heads and search the money pouches of the youths on the ground, taking out a piece of Yuan stone.
Then they gathered them together and handed them to Fang Yuan.
There were a total of fifty-seven people in the class, and each of them was extorted and robbed of a piece of Yuan stone. Fang Yuan had fifty-six pieces in his hands.
He originally had twenty pieces, but spent ten to buy a few jars of green bamboo wine.
In addition to his own subsidies and rewards, he now had seventy-nine pieces of Yuan stone.
"Robbery and extortion are the most profitable business." Fang Yuan put away the money pouch that had suddenly increased into his clothes and swaggered away.
He left behind a group of youths lying on the ground like corpses.
There were also a few youths, Fangzheng among them, who stared blankly at Fang Yuan's gradually leaving figure.
"Quickly go."
"All of you, hurry up and settle the little masters properly."
"Where is the healing Gu Master, quickly invite him over!"
The guards made a big fuss and swarmed forward, competing to show off their abilities.
For a small position as the leader, they were full of enthusiasm.
S-REV-037.summary: Fang Yuan confronts and brutally incapacitates numerous classmates at the academy gate, demanding Yuan stones. His efficient, precise combat skills overwhelm the students, including Guyue Mobei, and even force his brother, Guyue Fangzheng, to comply. The academy guards are horrified but powerless, while an observing Academy Elder finds Fang Yuan's actions strategically interesting and beneficial for tempering students' fighting spirit, disciplining a guard who questions his judgment.

continuityMutations.content: His method of using the Liquor worm to condense primeval essence to advance his cultivation stage.
His current financial status (39 Yuan stones after purchases).

S-REV-038.prose:
==================================================

Chapter 29
"Put the wine under the bed." Fang Yuan commanded the four workers of the inn.
Each of them held several jars of green bamboo wine in their hands.
After Fang Yuan extorted the other students, he came to the inn and bought twenty jars in one go.
Each jar cost two Yuan stone, but Fang Yuan threw out forty Yuan stone for the sake of the Liquor worm.
The bulging money pouch instantly deflated by half, leaving behind only thirty-nine Yuan stone.
But it was still worth the money, as these wines could support the Liquor worm for a long time.
"Okay." The workers quickly replied, not daring to show the slightest disrespect to a Gu Master.
Adding on the fact that Fang Yuan bought so much wine, he could be said to be a big customer of the inn.
With just a few words from the innkeeper, these workers could easily lose their jobs.
After the workers left, Fang Yuan closed the door of the dormitory and sat cross-legged on the bed.
It was already night time.
The moon was bright and the stars were sparse, and the night wind carried a faint fragrance.
The room was not lit, so Fang Yuan calmed his emotions and threw his mind into the primeval sea.
The primeval sea was like waves, the seawater giving off a bronze luster.
Every wave of seawater was the unique bronze primeval essence of a Rank one Gu Master.
The primeval sea only reached 44% of the entire aperture, this was the limit of Fang Yuan's C grade talent.
The four walls of the aperture were a thin layer of white light film, supporting and enveloping the aperture.
Above the primeval sea, there was nothing.
Under Fang Yuan's command, the Spring Autumn Cicada had hidden itself again, recuperating in its deep sleep.
But on the primeval sea, there was a white, fat and cute Liquor worm floating.
It wantonly played around in the primeval sea, sometimes diving into the sea, sometimes swaying its head and tail, splashing water droplets.
Fang Yuan's thoughts moved, and the Liquor worm immediately responded, stopping its playfulness and curling into a rice-ball shape. It slowly floated up to the center of the aperture, leaving the bronze sea.
"Go."
Fang Yuan mobilized ten percent of his primeval essence, forming a thin stream that rushed upwards, pouring into the Liquor worm's body.
The Liquor worm had already been refined by him, so it did not reject it, absorbing all the primeval essence into its body.
Immediately, 44% of the sea level decreased by a small amount.
Transforming the True Essence into power, the Liquor Worm, which had curled into a ball, began to blossom with a white light.
The dense smell of wine gradually emerged from the scattered light, and finally converged into a cloud of pale white wine mist.
The wine mist was wondrous. It did not disperse, but instead enveloped the Liquor Worm's body.
"Rise." With a thought, Fang Yuan mobilized another ten percent of his Quintessential Essence.
The bronze seawater pounced on the wine mist. The wine mist merged with the seawater and became less and less. In the end, there was nothing left.
And that 10% of the Green Bronze True Essence also disappeared out of thin air, leaving only 5%.
However, this 5% True Origin Energy was much more condensed than before.
His original True Yuan was emerald green and emitted a copper luster.
Now, although this True Essence also had a copper color, the green color was deeper, it was a pale green color.
Pale green primeval essence was the primeval essence that only Rank one middle stage Gu Masters possessed.
The Liquor worm's effect was to condense primeval essence and raise a Gu Master's primeval essence by a small realm!
Gu Masters had nine great realms, from low to high, Rank one, Rank two, all the way to Rank nine.
Every great realm was further subdivided into four smaller realms, which were initial stage, middle stage, upper stage and peak stage.
Fang Yuan was currently only a Rank one initial stage Gu Master, but with the help of the Liquor worm, he possessed 5% of a Rank one middle stage Gu Master's primeval essence!
"If I want to condense 5% middle stage primeval essence, I will need to consume 20% of my initial stage primeval essence.
If I want to convert 44% of the primeval sea in my aperture into middle stage primeval essence, I will need to consume close to 18% of my initial stage primeval essence.
If I want to achieve this goal quickly, I will need to use the Yuan stone. "
Thinking of this, Fang Yuan opened his eyes and took out a complete Yuan stone the size of a duck egg from his bag.
Yuan stone was a translucent oval-shaped stone with a grey-white color. As the natural primeval essence in the stone continued to be depleted, its size would also continue to shrink.
He slowly closed his right hand, holding the Yuan stone tightly in his palm. He absorbed the natural primeval essence in it and continuously replenished his own aperture.
The originally falling sea level in his aperture slowly rose.
Yuan stone was meant to be used, and Fang Yuan was not stingy at all, nor did he know how to be thrifty.
"I have no backing, no friends or family to support me, so I can only rely on extortion and robbery.
Today is only the first time, but from now on, every seven days when the school distributes the Yuan stone allowance, I will continue to block the school entrance. "
How could extortion and robbery satisfy Fang Yuan's appetite?
Yuan stone was lacking in Gu Master cultivation.
As for the repercussions of this robbery, Fang Yuan was not the least bit worried.
This world was different from Earth.
On Earth, schools often forbade fighting in order to maintain stability and harmony.
But in this world, fighting was the main theme.
Be it Gu Masters or mortals, they all had to fight for survival.
Sometimes they had to fight with terrifying wild beasts, sometimes they had to fight against the harsh and violent weather, and sometimes they had to fight with other Gu Masters for resources.
Therefore, controlled fights were instead encouraged and advocated by the people.
From childhood to adulthood, from fighting to life and death battles, this was the portrayal of most people's lives.
This world was vast and boundless, just the Southern Border where Fang Yuan lived was larger than seven or eight times the size of Earth.
The living environment here was extremely harsh, and humans usually lived in clans, building villages and holing up in a corner.
Every once in a while, there would be a beast tide or extremely harsh weather that would attack the village.
Gu Masters became the backbone of the village's defense, and the situation of losing people every year was quite serious.
Life required people with strong fighting will.
Clans needed fighting Gu Masters, and they would never complain about having too many of them.
Moreover, Fang Yuan had a sense of propriety when he attacked.
He never attacked the chin, because it could easily cause skull fractures, which could easily lead to death.
He also did not attack the back of other people's heads. When fighting, he did not use his fists, elbows or fingers, but instead used his palms.
The number of times he kicked could be counted on one hand.
The students who fell were not heavily injured, at most lightly injured.
Fang Yuan was not addicted to killing, he only treated killing as a method.
Every time he attacked, he had a clear goal.
Whatever method could allow him to achieve his goal, he would use it.
In other words, he would do anything by hook or by crook.
… …
Dark clouds floated over, covering the moonlight.
A layer of shadow shrouded Guyue's village.
The night watchman banged his clapper, reminding the people that it was already late at night, to be careful of candles, beasts, and Gu Masters who could infiltrate the village.
There were still many lights in the village that were not extinguished.
In the Red Branch Family, Guyue's study room was brightly lit.
This old man with high authority was using a gentle tone to console his grandson Guyue Cheng, "I heard you were beaten up by that Fang Yuan today?"
Guyue Cheng's right eye turned black, and he angrily said, "Yes, grandfather.
Fang Yuan is only a mere C grade, but he is so arrogant.
He blocked all of us at the door, disregarding our friendship as classmates, and robbed our Yuan stone.
What was even more infuriating was that the academy actually turned a blind eye to it.
Only when Fang Yuan left did the guards arrive.
Grandpa, you have to help your grandson vent his anger this time! "
Guyue Cheng shook his head, "This is a matter between you juniors.
You were only extorted from a mere piece of Yuan stone, and you were not heavily injured. Grandfather did not have a proper reason to act.
Moreover, even if you were heavily injured, grandfather would not stand up for you, do you understand why? "
Guyue Cheng was stunned. He thought hard, and after a while, he hesitantly said, "Grandfather, I somewhat understand what you mean.
You want me to rely on my own strength to get back at him, right? "
"You only understood one aspect."
Guyue Cheng nodded, "You have to remember, you are not only representing yourself, but also the image of our Red Branch Family.
Our Red Branch Family and Mo Branch Family have been at odds for many years, and your every move represents the future of our Red Branch Family.
Grandfather can help you in secret, but you have to erect the image of a strong and independent person. Otherwise, the elders who support us will not see any hope for the future and abandon our Red Branch Family. "
At this point, Guyue Cheng sighed, "This is also why grandfather helped you cheat and let you pretend to have a 'B' grade aptitude.
Our Red Branch Family needs a strong successor, so that those who support us can continue to persevere. "
Guyue Cheng finally understood, "Grandfather, I understand now."
Guyue Cheng shook his head, "It's useless to just understand, you have to work hard.
Fang Yuan's matter is just a small problem, so you have to work hard and practice your basic martial arts to get back at him.
At the same time, don't forget to cultivate diligently and advance to the intermediate level as soon as possible.
It's best if you can obtain the position of class chairman. This is a great honor, and also a kind of help to our Red Branch Family. "
"Yes, grandfather," Guyue Cheng responded loudly.
"Hehehe, this spirit is what a successor of our Red Branch Family should be like.
Grandson, work hard, grandfather will do his best to help you. "
S-REV-038.summary: Fang Yuan arrives at the inn with his newly acquired Yuan stones, purchasing twenty jars of green bamboo wine. He then retreats to his dormitory to cultivate, using the wine to feed his Liquor worm. He activates the Liquor worm to condense his primeval essence, successfully advancing a portion of it to Rank one middle stage, demonstrating his method for overcoming his C-grade aptitude.

continuityMutations.content: His knowledge of the long-standing rivalry between the Red Branch and Mo Branch families.
His role in faking Guyue Cheng's B-grade aptitude.
His understanding that his B-grade aptitude is a deception.
His realization that he is a representation of the Red Branch Family's image in clan politics.
Guyue Bo uses his grandson's experience to reinforce the importance of clan image and power struggles against the Mo Branch Family.
Guyue Bo admits to helping Guyue Cheng cheat to appear to have B-grade aptitude to secure the Red Branch Family's future.
Guyue Bo advises Guyue Cheng to develop strength and independence, promising secret help, for the sake of their family's standing.
