S-REV-039.summary: In his study, Guyue Bo consoles his grandson, Guyue Cheng, who was beaten by Fang Yuan. Instead of offering direct help, Guyue Bo uses the incident to lecture Cheng on the long-standing rivalry between the Red and Mo Branch Families. He reveals that Cheng's B-grade aptitude was faked to maintain their family's image and encourages him to cultivate diligence and seek influence within the academy, promising secret support.

continuityMutations.content: His plan to sow discord between Fangzheng and Fang Yuan, using the latter's actions to secure Fangzheng's loyalty.
Her strong desire for Fang Yuan's expulsion and belief that his actions will lead to it.
Her misunderstanding of the academy's rules regarding student fighting.
His internal debate about whether to plead for Fang Yuan, highlighting his moral conflict.
Fangzheng is aware of Fang Yuan blocking the academy door and robbing students, and the negative influence this caused.
Fangzheng struggles internally on whether to plead for his brother Fang Yuan, weighing family ties against Fang Yuan's perceived misdeeds.
Guyue Dong Tu plans to sow discord between Fangzheng and Fang Yuan, using Fang Yuan's actions to distance Fangzheng from him and make Fangzheng useful to their household.
Guyue Dong Tu understands the academy's hidden rules regarding student fighting and why Fang Yuan won't be punished.
The Aunt harbors deep resentment towards Fang Yuan, perceiving him as a 'little bastard' and wishing for his expulsion.
The Aunt initially believes Fang Yuan's actions will lead to severe punishment or expulsion, demonstrating a lack of understanding of the clan's martial culture.

C-REV-09.transition: Left the hall with a heavy heart to cultivate.

S-REV-040.prose:
Chapter 30
Almost at the same time, on the other side.
"Father, mother, that's basically what happened." Fangzheng stood straight and said respectfully.
In the hall, Fang Yuan's uncle, Guyue Dong Tu, and aunt sat on a wide back chair, both frowning.
Aunt gritted her teeth, feeling injustice for Fangzheng while gloating, "Fang Yuan that little bastard, he extorted other people, but I can't believe he won't even let his own brother go.
How could he be so heartless!
But he made such a big mistake this time, I think he'll be expelled from the academy soon. "
"Alright, you can stop talking."
Uncle sighed and said to Fangzheng, "You lost Yuan stone, but it's just one piece, don't worry.
Go to the accountant and get another one. This has nothing to do with you, go and cultivate.
With your A grade talent, it's very possible for you to become the first middle stage Gu Master.
Don't waste your talent, mother and I are looking forward to you becoming number one. "
"Yes, father, mother, I'll take my leave." Fangzheng left with a heavy heart.
He thought to himself, "Big brother blocked the academy door today and robbed all the students.
He caused such a bad influence, I'm afraid he'll really be expelled.
At that time, should I plead for him? "
There were two voices in his mind.
One voice said, "No need to plead, he even wanted to rob his own brother's Yuan stone.
Even if he's expelled, he only has himself to blame.
You can survive a natural disaster, but you can't survive a self-inflicted disaster! "
Another voice said, "He's your biological brother, you have a similar face, blood is thicker than water.
Alright, even if you don't acknowledge him, you have to plead for him.
If you don't plead for him, how will others see you? They'll think you're heartless. "
Seeing Fangzheng leave the hall, aunt could not help but say happily, "Master, we've cut off Fang Yuan's living expenses.
This little bastard couldn't hold it in and made a big mistake this time!
He actually dared to block the entrance of the academy and fight in public, and even extorted money. This was no different from provoking the academy elder.
I think it's only a matter of time before he gets fired. "
His uncle shook his head. "You're oversimplifying things.
Fang Yuan won't be fired. He might not even be punished. "
"Why?" His aunt was puzzled.
Uncle sneered, "Fighting is encouraged, as long as there are no serious consequences.
Did any of the students die in this fight?
No. "
Aunt was a little unconvinced. "How do you know it's not there, Master?
Accidents are bound to happen in a fight. "
Her uncle closed his eyes and leaned against the back of the chair. "You are so naive, my wife.
Do you really think the Academy Elder is just a decoration?
When did the guards move out?
They were the last to make a move, which meant that the situation had been under control.
If someone was seriously injured, they would have rushed out long ago. They wouldn't have waited until the end. "
"You are not a Gu Master, so you won't understand. The academy does not forbid students from fighting, and even encourages it.
The more he fought, the more helpful it would be to the battle.
Some students could even forge a solid friendship through fighting.
The elders would not pursue this matter.
This is already the norm.
If anyone tries to protect their own, that person would be breaking this rule. "
His aunt was dumbfounded, and said unwillingly, "That Fang Yuan robbed such a large amount of Yuan stone, and nothing happened to him?
We're letting him off just like that?
With such a large amount of Yuan stone, it would be of great help to his cultivation. "
Uncle opened his eyes, his face clouded. "What else can I do?
Do you want me to go over and snatch his Yuan stone with my own hands?
But it's not like we can't make use of this.
Fang Yuan even robbed and blackmailed his brother, Fangzheng. This is his downfall.
Fangzheng is an A grade talent, and one day he will be stronger than him. We can use this matter to sow discord between Fangzheng and him.
Let Fangzheng distance himself from Fang Yuan completely, and be of use to us! "
Just like that, three days passed.
The storm caused by Fang Yuan's robbery and blackmail did not spread, nor did it grow bigger. Instead, it seemed to be gradually calming down.
There were no elders who broke the rules and personally came to cause trouble for Fang Yuan, and the academy elder naturally closed one eye.
Although during this period, there were two or three youths who were dissatisfied with the fact that the Yuan stone had been robbed, and challenged Fang Yuan again.
But after Fang Yuan easily defeated them, everyone realized that if they did not train hard, they would not be able to win against Fang Yuan.
Among these youths, there was a wave of hard work in training the basics of martial arts.
The martial arts instructor was overjoyed. He had never seen a batch of students with such passion and dedication towards basic martial arts.
In the past, when he was teaching, the students all lacked interest and yawned non-stop.
But now, their eyes were bright and full of spirit, and they constantly asked for advice.
The academy elder specially came to ask about the situation here.
The martial arts instructor reported with an excited tone, "The students have displayed unexpected passion, the change is too big.
But one of them is called Fang Yuan, and he is still as lazy as before. "
The academy elder laughed, and patted his shoulder, "The student you speak of, is the source of the change in the others."
The martial arts instructor did not understand.
Of course, the change was not limited to this.
After this incident, Fang Yuan undoubtedly became the public enemy of all the students, and was viewed as an enemy and isolated by everyone.
No one spoke to him anymore, and no one greeted him.
The youths all mustered up their energy, and secretly trained hard in the basics of martial arts.
Under the encouragement and instructions of the elders behind them, they had already decided, that they must get back at Fang Yuan with their own hands.
Under the calm surface, the undercurrent was turbulent.
Another four days passed.
The academy elder once again distributed the Yuan stone, and it was time for Fang Yuan to make his move again.
"Fang Yuan, it's not enough for you to steal once, you still want to steal our Yuan stone?!" The students were blocked by Fang Yuan at the door again, and were both shocked and angry.
Fang Yuan stood in the middle of the door, his hands behind his back, his expression cold, and his tone calm, "Everyone gets one Yuan stone, and you will be spared from physical pain."
"Fang Yuan, you've gone too far.
I want to challenge you! "Guyue Mobei roared, and took the lead to fight.
"Oh?" Fang Yuan's eyebrows slightly raised.
Mobei raised both his fists and rushed over, after a few rounds, he fainted on the ground.
"Mobei, you're too useless, watch me!" Guyue Mobei roared, and rushed towards Fang Yuan.
After a short exchange of attack and defence, he followed in Mobei's footsteps.
Fang Yuan's battle experience was thousands of times more than theirs, even though he had just started cultivating, but every bit of his strength was used to the point.
This group of youths had only just started, if they all rushed at him, they might cause him some trouble.
But to challenge him one by one, it was even easier than the first time he robbed someone.
After a quarter of an hour, he carried a bulging money bag, and left leisurely.
Leaving behind a group of youths, some were unconscious, some were hugging their stomachs or holding their crotch, moaning and howling.
"Brothers, quickly clean up the mess." The guards shouted, and all rushed forward.
S-REV-040.summary: Fangzheng reports Fang Yuan's academy actions to his uncle and aunt, who express their disdain for Fang Yuan and gloat over his potential downfall. His aunt advocates for his expulsion, while his uncle, Guyue Dong Tu, dismisses Fangzheng's lost Yuan stone and subtly plans to exploit Fang Yuan's actions to alienate Fangzheng from him. Fangzheng leaves, conflicted about whether to defend his brother, as two internal voices debate his responsibility.

continuityMutations.content: His continued role as a catalyst for student development through aggressive, challenging behavior.
His observation of increased student passion for martial arts and his misunderstanding of its source.
His understanding that Fang Yuan's actions are beneficial for student development and his strategic inaction.
His increased motivation for training due to humiliation by Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan has established a reputation among students as a ruthless extorter and fighter.
Fang Yuan demonstrates superior combat experience and strategy, easily defeating multiple challengers.
Fang Yuan understands clan power dynamics and how to leverage them, as well as the 'testing' nature of the academy's fighting culture.
Fang Yuan intentionally allows Mo Yan to mistake him for Fangzheng, then reveals his true identity to provoke a reaction.
The Martial Arts Instructor observes a dramatic increase in student passion and dedication to basic martial arts, unaware of Fang Yuan's role as the catalyst.
The Academy Elder understands that Fang Yuan's actions are beneficial for student development and chooses to 'close one eye', actively encouraging the conflict as a training method.
Guyue Mobei feels significant shame and anger after being defeated twice by Fang Yuan.
Guyue Mobei's defeats at Fang Yuan's hands spur him to train harder in martial arts.

S-REV-041.prose:
Chapter 30
Almost at the same time, on the other side.
"Father, mother, that's basically what happened." Fangzheng stood straight and said respectfully.
In the hall, Fang Yuan's uncle, Guyue Dong Tu, and aunt sat on a wide back chair, both frowning.
Aunt gritted her teeth, feeling injustice for Fangzheng while gloating, "Fang Yuan that little bastard, he extorted other people, but I can't believe he won't even let his own brother go.
How could he be so heartless!
But he made such a big mistake this time, I think he'll be expelled from the academy soon. "
"Alright, you can stop talking."
Uncle sighed and said to Fangzheng, "You lost Yuan stone, but it's just one piece, don't worry.
Go to the accountant and get another one. This has nothing to do with you, go and cultivate.
With your A grade talent, it's very possible for you to become the first middle stage Gu Master.
Don't waste your talent, mother and I are looking forward to you becoming number one. "
"Yes, father, mother, I'll take my leave." Fangzheng left with a heavy heart.
He thought to himself, "Big brother blocked the academy door today and robbed all the students.
He caused such a bad influence, I'm afraid he'll really be expelled.
At that time, should I plead for him? "
There were two voices in his mind.
One voice said, "No need to plead, he even wanted to rob his own brother's Yuan stone.
Even if he's expelled, he only has himself to blame.
You can survive a natural disaster, but you can't survive a self-inflicted disaster! "
Another voice said, "He's your biological brother, you have a similar face, blood is thicker than water.
Alright, even if you don't acknowledge him, you have to plead for him.
If you don't plead for him, how will others see you? They'll think you're heartless. "
Seeing Fangzheng leave the hall, aunt could not help but say happily, "Master, we've cut off Fang Yuan's living expenses.
This little bastard couldn't hold it in and made a big mistake this time!
He actually dared to block the entrance of the academy and fight in public, and even extorted money. This was no different from provoking the academy elder.
I think it's only a matter of time before he gets fired. "
His uncle shook his head. "You're oversimplifying things.
Fang Yuan won't be fired. He might not even be punished. "
"Why?" His aunt was puzzled.
Uncle sneered, "Fighting is encouraged, as long as there are no serious consequences.
Did any of the students die in this fight?
No. "
Aunt was a little unconvinced. "How do you know it's not there, Master?
Accidents are bound to happen in a fight. "
Her uncle closed his eyes and leaned against the back of the chair. "You are so naive, my wife.
Do you really think the Academy Elder is just a decoration?
When did the guards move out?
They were the last to make a move, which meant that the situation had been under control.
If someone was seriously injured, they would have rushed out long ago. They wouldn't have waited until the end. "
"You are not a Gu Master, so you won't understand. The academy does not forbid students from fighting, and even encourages it.
The more he fought, the more helpful it would be to the battle.
Some students could even forge a solid friendship through fighting.
The elders would not pursue this matter.
This is already the norm.
If anyone tries to protect their own, that person would be breaking this rule. "
His aunt was dumbfounded, and said unwillingly, "That Fang Yuan robbed such a large amount of Yuan stone, and nothing happened to him?
We're letting him off just like that?
With such a large amount of Yuan stone, it would be of great help to his cultivation. "
Uncle opened his eyes, his face clouded. "What else can I do?
Do you want me to go over and snatch his Yuan stone with my own hands?
But it's not like we can't make use of this.
Fang Yuan even robbed and blackmailed his brother, Fangzheng. This is his downfall.
Fangzheng is an A grade talent, and one day he will be stronger than him. We can use this matter to sow discord between Fangzheng and him.
Let Fangzheng distance himself from Fang Yuan completely, and be of use to us! "
Just like that, three days passed.
The storm caused by Fang Yuan's robbery and blackmail did not spread, nor did it grow bigger. Instead, it seemed to be gradually calming down.
There were no elders who broke the rules and personally came to cause trouble for Fang Yuan, and the academy elder naturally closed one eye.
Although during this period, there were two or three youths who were dissatisfied with the fact that the Yuan stone had been robbed, and challenged Fang Yuan again.
But after Fang Yuan easily defeated them, everyone realized that if they did not train hard, they would not be able to win against Fang Yuan.
Among these youths, there was a wave of hard work in training the basics of martial arts.
The martial arts instructor was overjoyed. He had never seen a batch of students with such passion and dedication towards basic martial arts.
In the past, when he was teaching, the students all lacked interest and yawned non-stop.
But now, their eyes were bright and full of spirit, and they constantly asked for advice.
The academy elder specially came to ask about the situation here.
The martial arts instructor reported with an excited tone, "The students have displayed unexpected passion, the change is too big.
But one of them is called Fang Yuan, and he is still as lazy as before. "
The academy elder laughed, and patted his shoulder, "The student you speak of, is the source of the change in the others."
The martial arts instructor did not understand.
Of course, the change was not limited to this.
After this incident, Fang Yuan undoubtedly became the public enemy of all the students, and was viewed as an enemy and isolated by everyone.
No one spoke to him anymore, and no one greeted him.
The youths all mustered up their energy, and secretly trained hard in the basics of martial arts.
Under the encouragement and instructions of the elders behind them, they had already decided, that they must get back at Fang Yuan with their own hands.
Under the calm surface, the undercurrent was turbulent.
Another four days passed.
The academy elder once again distributed the Yuan stone, and it was time for Fang Yuan to make his move again.
"Fang Yuan, it's not enough for you to steal once, you still want to steal our Yuan stone?!" The students were blocked by Fang Yuan at the door again, and were both shocked and angry.
Fang Yuan stood in the middle of the door, his hands behind his back, his expression cold, and his tone calm, "Everyone gets one Yuan stone, and you will be spared from physical pain."
"Fang Yuan, you've gone too far.
I want to challenge you! "Guyue Mobei roared, and took the lead to fight.
"Oh?" Fang Yuan's eyebrows slightly raised.
Mobei raised both his fists and rushed over, after a few rounds, he fainted on the ground.
"Mobei, you're too useless, watch me!" Guyue Mobei roared, and rushed towards Fang Yuan.
After a short exchange of attack and defence, he followed in Mobei's footsteps.
Fang Yuan's battle experience was thousands of times more than theirs, even though he had just started cultivating, but every bit of his strength was used to the point.
This group of youths had only just started, if they all rushed at him, they might cause him some trouble.
But to challenge him one by one, it was even easier than the first time he robbed someone.
After a quarter of an hour, he carried a bulging money bag, and left leisurely.
Leaving behind a group of youths, some were unconscious, some were hugging their stomachs or holding their crotch, moaning and howling.
"Brothers, quickly clean up the mess." The guards shouted, and all rushed forward.
S-REV-041.summary: Three days after his initial extortion, Fang Yuan again blocks the academy entrance, demanding Yuan stones. He easily defeats Guyue Mobei and other challenging students who face him one by one. The students, motivated by humiliation, begin training diligently. The Martial Arts Instructor is thrilled by their newfound passion, though puzzled by Fang Yuan's continued laziness. The Academy Elder, however, reveals to the instructor that Fang Yuan is the catalyst for this positive change, while Guyue Dong Tu's previous assessment of the Academy's true rules are confirmed.

continuityMutations.content: Her awareness of Mobei's injuries and suspicion about their cause, as well as her recent mission.
His attempt to hide the shameful truth of his defeats from his sister.
Guyue Mo Yan is fiercely protective of her younger brother, Mobei, and seeks to avenge his humiliation.
Guyue Mo Yan has recently completed a scouting mission concerning a wolf den and its potential for a wolf tide.
Guyue Mo Yan is initially fooled by Fang Yuan's similar appearance to Fangzheng, leading to hesitation before confronting him.
Despite her grandfather's advice, Guyue Mo Yan intends to intervene in Mobei's conflict with Fang Yuan in her own way.

C-REV-59.transition: Walked quickly through the courtyard after leaving Mobei.

S-REV-042.prose:
Chapter 31
"I trained hard for seven days, but I only managed to last two moves against Fang Yuan before he knocked me out again.
Shame, shame! "Guyue Mobei's heart was filled with anger and humiliation.
In the courtyard of his house, he constantly punched and kicked the wooden puppet, making loud banging sounds.
At this time, a light laugh could be heard, "Little brother, do you have a deep grudge against the wooden puppet? Why do you hate it so much?"
Hearing this familiar voice, Guyue Mobei's expression relaxed. He stopped attacking and turned around, "Sister, you're back!"
"Yes, the clan assigned me a scouting mission, and I was gone for more than ten days …" Guyue Mo Yan replied with a smile. She was Mobei's sister, and was already a Rank two middle stage Gu Master.
But her expression quickly changed, and her gaze became sharp, "Little brother, what happened to the scars on your face?
Who bullied you? "
"Ah, nothing much.
I accidentally tripped while walking and hit my head. "
Mobei's face flashed with a trace of panic, and he gave a random excuse. He did not want his sister to know about such an embarrassing matter.
The future head of the Mo branch family, Guyue Mo Chen's grandson, had actually been knocked out twice in a row.
But fortunately, he was not the only unlucky one, everyone else was involved.
"Oh, is that so? Then you have to be careful.
Oh right, you need to practice your martial arts, this won't do.
You don't have a defensive Gu, so you need to wrap your body with a thick cloth.
That way, your limbs won't get hurt. "Guyue Mo Yan reminded him, and then left.
"Greetings, missy."
"Greetings, missy."
"Missy, you're back, this servant greets missy."
Guyue Mo Yan's expression was cold, and she walked quickly.
Along the way, all the servants she met bowed to her.
She walked to the study room, and without reporting, she pushed open the door and entered.
In the study room, Guyue Mo Chen's back was facing her, and he was standing in front of the desk, practicing calligraphy.
"You're back?"
Guyue Mo Chen did not turn around. Instead, he asked, "You've been scouting outside for more than half a month. How's the situation at the wolf's den?"
"Grandpa, how did you know it was me?" Mo Yan was stunned.
"Hmph, in the whole family, only you can rely on my love to break the rules and not even knock on the door.
Who else can it be? "
Guyue Mo Chen said in a reproachful tone. However, when he turned around, his expression was very gentle. He looked at Mo Yan with a smile in his eyes.
Mo Yan pursed her lips. "If we're talking about doting, Grandpa actually dotes on his younger brother more.
It's just that my younger brother is going to be in power in the future, and grandfather is very strict with him. Others can't understand this kind of love. "
He paused for a moment before asking, "Grandpa, why was I beaten up?
When I asked him, he lied.
I couldn't force him, so I came to ask Grandpa. "
Guyue Mochen's expression turned serious. "You still haven't answered my question."
He put down his pen, pulled out a chair, and slowly sat down.
Mo Yan had no choice but to report, "The wolf den is almost full. Based on this rate of reproduction, although there won't be a wolf tide this year, there will definitely be a wolf tide next year."
Guyue Mochen asked again, "There's a wolf tide every three years, so it's not rare.
But how many Thunder Crown Wolves are there in that wolf pack? "
"About three," Mo Yan replied.
Guyue Mochen nodded and relaxed.
The Thunder Crown Wolf was the leader of the wolf pack. When the wolf tide attacked the village, it was the most troublesome existence.
Three Thunder Crown Wolves was not a lot, because there were three villages on Qing Mao Mountain.
Each village shared one wolf, so the pressure of the wolf tide would be greatly reduced.
"Grandpa, you still haven't told me about my younger brother," Mo Yan said unwillingly.
"There's no harm in telling you. Mobei was beaten up by someone. Once seven days ago, and the second time today.
He was beaten up in front of the school gate, and he fainted on the spot both times, "Guyue Mochen said with a smile.
"Who had the guts to knock out my younger brother?" Mo Yan stared at him.
"It's his classmate, Fang Yuan.
He did a good job … "Guyue Mochen laughed out loud.
Mo Yan's eyes widened, and she asked in confusion, "Grandpa, what do you mean?
Mobei is your grandson! "
Guyue Mochen looked at his granddaughter deeply, and said earnestly, "Mo Yan, you're a girl, so you might not understand.
Failure and humiliation will make people improve.
Without failure, you can't make a mature man. "
"Mobei was beaten up, and that was his own failure.
As soon as he woke up, he started to learn from the guards. This is a kind of improvement.
And this improvement was brought about by Fang Yuan, who woke him up.
As his sister, if you really want to love him, don't interfere with his growth.
Fang Yuan is only a C-grade poor boy, and Mobei is B-grade. He has us behind him, and sooner or later, he will step on Fang Yuan. "
"Leave this opponent to Mobei.
In a woman's life, she needs friends and lovers.
In a man's life, friends and lovers are not essential, but he can't lack opponents.
Don't cause trouble for Fang Yuan, understand?
This is a matter for the younger generation.
If you get involved, you'll be bullying the young.
If you break the rules, others will look down on us. "
Mo Yan opened her mouth a few times, but under Guyue Mochen's gaze, she finally lowered her head and replied, "Yes, grandpa.
I understand. "
She left the study with her head down. Even Guyue Mobei didn't notice that her eyes were shining with a different light.
"Grandpa, this is your way of spoiling your grandson.
And I, Mo Yan, have my own way of doting on my younger brother! "Mo Yan already had another plan in mind.
…
In the inn's dining hall, there were a few tables with people sitting and eating, making the place seem a little lively.
One or two waiters were carrying plates of food, shuttling between the tables.
Fang Yuan sat at a table near the window, ordering a few dishes. He looked out the window as he ate.
In the sky, the sunset glow was like fire, quietly burning.
The sun was already halfway down. It gazed at the earth for the last time, and the afterglow was its reluctant gaze.
The mountains in the distance were already covered by the twilight.
On the nearby streets, there were people returning home.
Some were barefoot farmers covered in mud, some were herb gatherers carrying medicine baskets, some were hunters carrying pheasants, wild boars and other prey, and some were Gu Masters.
They wore blue martial attire, looking capable and capable.
Their heads were tied with headbands, and their waists were tied with wide belts.
This belt was very particular. A Rank one Gu Master would wear a green belt, with a copper plate on the front, and the word '1' on the copper plate.
Rank two Gu Masters' belts were red, with a metal plate in the center, and the word "2" was carved on it.
Fang Yuan sat by the window and observed for a while. He saw six or seven Rank one Gu Masters, most of them young.
There was also a Rank two Gu Master, a middle-aged man.
As for Rank three Gu Masters, they were usually clan elders.
Rank four Gu Masters were the clan leader, the head of the village.
Rank five Gu Masters were very rare. In the history of the Guyue clan, there were only the first generation clan leader and the fourth generation clan leader.
"Actually, observing a clan's strength is a very simple matter.
As long as you find a place to sit in the village and observe the passersby for an hour, and see how many Rank one Gu Masters and Rank two Gu Masters there are, you can see the clan's foundation and strength. "Fang Yuan combined his five hundred years of experience and came up with this conclusion.
In the case of the Guyue village, out of the twenty passersby on the streets, there would be six Gu Masters.
Among these six Gu Masters, there would be a fifty percent chance that there would be a Rank two Gu Master.
The Guyue village relied on this strength and foundation to occupy one of the best resource points in Qing Mao mountain.
It could be said to be the overlord of Qing Mao mountain.
But Qing Mao mountain was just a small corner of the vast southern border.
The Guyue village in the entire southern border could only be considered a lower middle class clan.
"I've only just started cultivating, and with my Rank one initial stage cultivation, I don't even have the qualifications to roam the southern border alone.
I need at least Rank three strength to travel far. "Fang Yuan ate a mouthful of food and sighed in his heart.
Qing Mao mountain was too small, and could not contain his ambitions. He was destined to leave.
"Haha, Guyue Fang Yuan, I've finally found you." At this moment, a middle-aged man walked over with a sinister smile.
"Hmm?"
Fang Yuan turned his head slightly and saw that the man's face was waxy yellow, and he had drooping eyebrows, but he was tall and muscular.
At this moment, he walked over with big strides and crossed his arms in front of his chest, looking down at the young Fang Yuan who was eating. His slender eyes flashed with a cold light.
"Fang Yuan, do you know that you're in big trouble?
Hehehe, you actually dared to hit our Mo family's young master, and now the young lady, Mo Yan, is looking for you everywhere. "The middle-aged man laughed coldly.
He used his gaze to size up Fang Yuan, faintly emitting a threatening aura.
S-REV-042.summary: Guyue Mobei furiously trains in a courtyard, filled with anger and humiliation after his second defeat by Fang Yuan. His sister, Guyue Mo Yan, a Rank two Gu Master, returns from a mission and discovers his injuries. Mobei, ashamed, lies about the cause, but Mo Yan suspects something is amiss.

continuityMutations.content: His specific knowledge of the wolf tide's timing and the number of Thunder Crown Wolves.
His belief that Mobei's defeats by Fang Yuan are beneficial for his growth and development.
Her intention to act against Fang Yuan to protect her brother, despite her grandfather's advice.
Guyue Mo Chen possesses deep insight into clan dynamics, the value of 'failure' for growth, and the importance of adhering to clan rules.
Guyue Mo Chen views Mobei's defeats as an opportunity for growth and wants him to overcome Fang Yuan independently.
Guyue Mo Chen is aware of the wolf den situation and the potential for a wolf tide the following year.

C-REV-59.transition: Left the study with her own plan in mind.

Hehehe, you actually dared to hit our Mo family's young master, and now the young lady, Mo Yan, is looking for you everywhere. "The middle-aged man laughed coldly.
He used his gaze to size up Fang Yuan, faintly emitting a threatening aura.
S-REV-043.summary: Guyue Mo Yan enters her grandfather Guyue Mo Chen's study without knocking, reporting on the wolf den situation and the impending wolf tide. She presses him for information about Mobei's injuries, and Guyue Mo Chen reveals Mobei was beaten twice by Fang Yuan. He advises Mo Yan not to interfere, emphasizing the value of failure for a man's growth and the importance of Mobei overcoming Fang Yuan himself. Despite his counsel, Mo Yan leaves with a secret plan to help her brother.

continuityMutations.content: His strategic use of his resemblance to Fangzheng to deceive Mo Yan and control the confrontation.
Her initial hesitation and misidentification of Fang Yuan as Fangzheng.
His misidentification of Fang Yuan and his eagerness to please Mo Yan.
Gao Wan mistakenly identifies Fang Yuan as Fangzheng due to their similar appearance, causing him significant embarrassment.
Gao Wan is a loyal servant of the Mo family, eager to prove himself and earn his master's favor.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked away with his head held high, leading Mo Yan and her servants.

C-REV-59.transition: Followed Fang Yuan to the academy.

C-REV-60.transition: Followed Guyue Mo Yan to the academy.

S-REV-044.prose:
Chapter 31
"I trained hard for seven days, but I only managed to last two moves against Fang Yuan before he knocked me out again.
Shame, shame! "Guyue Mobei's heart was filled with anger and humiliation.
In the courtyard of his house, he constantly punched and kicked the wooden puppet, making loud banging sounds.
At this time, a light laugh could be heard, "Little brother, do you have a deep grudge against the wooden puppet? Why do you hate it so much?"
Hearing this familiar voice, Guyue Mobei's expression relaxed. He stopped attacking and turned around, "Sister, you're back!"
"Yes, the clan assigned me a scouting mission, and I was gone for more than ten days …" Guyue Mo Yan replied with a smile. She was Mobei's sister, and was already a Rank two middle stage Gu Master.
But her expression quickly changed, and her gaze became sharp, "Little brother, what happened to the scars on your face?
Who bullied you? "
"Ah, nothing much.
I accidentally tripped while walking and hit my head. "
Mobei's face flashed with a trace of panic, and he gave a random excuse. He did not want his sister to know about such an embarrassing matter.
The future head of the Mo branch family, Guyue Mo Chen's grandson, had actually been knocked out twice in a row.
But fortunately, he was not the only unlucky one, everyone else was involved.
"Oh, is that so? Then you have to be careful.
Oh right, you need to practice your martial arts, this won't do.
You don't have a defensive Gu, so you need to wrap your body with a thick cloth.
That way, your limbs won't get hurt. "Guyue Mo Yan reminded him, and then left.
"Greetings, missy."
"Greetings, missy."
"Missy, you're back, this servant greets missy."
Guyue Mo Yan's expression was cold, and she walked quickly.
Along the way, all the servants she met bowed to her.
She walked to the study room, and without reporting, she pushed open the door and entered.
In the study room, Guyue Mo Chen's back was facing her, and he was standing in front of the desk, practicing calligraphy.
"You're back?"
Guyue Mo Chen did not turn around. Instead, he asked, "You've been scouting outside for more than half a month. How's the situation at the wolf's den?"
"Grandpa, how did you know it was me?" Mo Yan was stunned.
"Hmph, in the whole family, only you can rely on my love to break the rules and not even knock on the door.
Who else can it be? "
Guyue Mo Chen said in a reproachful tone. However, when he turned around, his expression was very gentle. He looked at Mo Yan with a smile in his eyes.
Mo Yan pursed her lips. "If we're talking about doting, Grandpa actually dotes on his younger brother more.
It's just that my younger brother is going to be in power in the future, and grandfather is very strict with him. Others can't understand this kind of love. "
He paused for a moment before asking, "Grandpa, why was I beaten up?
When I asked him, he lied.
I couldn't force him, so I came to ask Grandpa. "
Guyue Mochen's expression turned serious. "You still haven't answered my question."
He put down his pen, pulled out a chair, and slowly sat down.
Mo Yan had no choice but to report, "The wolf den is almost full. Based on this rate of reproduction, although there won't be a wolf tide this year, there will definitely be a wolf tide next year."
Guyue Mochen asked again, "There's a wolf tide every three years, so it's not rare.
But how many Thunder Crown Wolves are there in that wolf pack? "
"About three," Mo Yan replied.
Guyue Mochen nodded and relaxed.
The Thunder Crown Wolf was the leader of the wolf pack. When the wolf tide attacked the village, it was the most troublesome existence.
Three Thunder Crown Wolves was not a lot, because there were three villages on Qing Mao Mountain.
Each village shared one wolf, so the pressure of the wolf tide would be greatly reduced.
"Grandpa, you still haven't told me about my younger brother," Mo Yan said unwillingly.
"There's no harm in telling you. Mobei was beaten up by someone. Once seven days ago, and the second time today.
He was beaten up in front of the school gate, and he fainted on the spot both times, "Guyue Mochen said with a smile.
"Who had the guts to knock out my younger brother?" Mo Yan stared at him.
"It's his classmate, Fang Yuan.
He did a good job … "Guyue Mochen laughed out loud.
Mo Yan's eyes widened, and she asked in confusion, "Grandpa, what do you mean?
Mobei is your grandson! "
Guyue Mochen looked at his granddaughter deeply, and said earnestly, "Mo Yan, you're a girl, so you might not understand.
Failure and humiliation will make people improve.
Without failure, you can't make a mature man. "
"Mobei was beaten up, and that was his own failure.
As soon as he woke up, he started to learn from the guards. This is a kind of improvement.
And this improvement was brought about by Fang Yuan, who woke him up.
As his sister, if you really want to love him, don't interfere with his growth.
Fang Yuan is only a C-grade poor boy, and Mobei is B-grade. He has us behind him, and sooner or later, he will step on Fang Yuan. "
"Leave this opponent to Mobei.
In a woman's life, she needs friends and lovers.
In a man's life, friends and lovers are not essential, but he can't lack opponents.
Don't cause trouble for Fang Yuan, understand?
This is a matter for the younger generation.
If you get involved, you'll be bullying the young.
If you break the rules, others will look down on us. "
Mo Yan opened her mouth a few times, but under Guyue Mochen's gaze, she finally lowered her head and replied, "Yes, grandpa.
I understand. "
She left the study with her head down. Even Guyue Mobei didn't notice that her eyes were shining with a different light.
"Grandpa, this is your way of spoiling your grandson.
And I, Mo Yan, have my own way of doting on my younger brother! "Mo Yan already had another plan in mind.
…
In the inn's dining hall, there were a few tables with people sitting and eating, making the place seem a little lively.
One or two waiters were carrying plates of food, shuttling between the tables.
Fang Yuan sat at a table near the window, ordering a few dishes. He looked out the window as he ate.
In the sky, the sunset glow was like fire, quietly burning.
The sun was already halfway down. It gazed at the earth for the last time, and the afterglow was its reluctant gaze.
The mountains in the distance were already covered by the twilight.
On the nearby streets, there were people returning home.
Some were barefoot farmers covered in mud, some were herb gatherers carrying medicine baskets, some were hunters carrying pheasants, wild boars and other prey, and some were Gu Masters.
They wore blue martial attire, looking capable and capable.
Their heads were tied with headbands, and their waists were tied with wide belts.
This belt was very particular. A Rank one Gu Master would wear a green belt, with a copper plate on the front, and the word '1' on the copper plate.
Rank two Gu Masters' belts were red, with a metal plate in the center, and the word "2" was carved on it.
Fang Yuan sat by the window and observed for a while. He saw six or seven Rank one Gu Masters, most of them young.
There was also a Rank two Gu Master, a middle-aged man.
As for Rank three Gu Masters, they were usually clan elders.
Rank four Gu Masters were the clan leader, the head of the village.
Rank five Gu Masters were very rare. In the history of the Guyue clan, there were only the first generation clan leader and the fourth generation clan leader.
"Actually, observing a clan's strength is a very simple matter.
As long as you find a place to sit in the village and observe the passersby for an hour, and see how many Rank one Gu Masters and Rank two Gu Masters there are, you can see the clan's foundation and strength. "Fang Yuan combined his five hundred years of experience and came up with this conclusion.
In the case of the Guyue village, out of the twenty passersby on the streets, there would be six Gu Masters.
Among these six Gu Masters, there would be a fifty percent chance that there would be a Rank two Gu Master.
The Guyue village relied on this strength and foundation to occupy one of the best resource points in Qing Mao mountain.
It could be said to be the overlord of Qing Mao mountain.
But Qing Mao mountain was just a small corner of the vast southern border.
The Guyue village in the entire southern border could only be considered a lower middle class clan.
"I've only just started cultivating, and with my Rank one initial stage cultivation, I don't even have the qualifications to roam the southern border alone.
I need at least Rank three strength to travel far. "Fang Yuan ate a mouthful of food and sighed in his heart.
Qing Mao mountain was too small, and could not contain his ambitions. He was destined to leave.
"Haha, Guyue Fang Yuan, I've finally found you." At this moment, a middle-aged man walked over with a sinister smile.
"Hmm?"
Fang Yuan turned his head slightly and saw that the man's face was waxy yellow, and he had drooping eyebrows, but he was tall and muscular.
At this moment, he walked over with big strides and crossed his arms in front of his chest, looking down at the young Fang Yuan who was eating. His slender eyes flashed with a cold light.
"Fang Yuan, do you know that you're in big trouble?
Hehehe, you actually dared to hit our Mo family's young master, and now the young lady, Mo Yan, is looking for you everywhere. "The middle-aged man laughed coldly.
He used his gaze to size up Fang Yuan, faintly emitting a threatening aura.

Chapter 32
If it was a normal person being stared at by this middle-aged man, they would probably be scared.
But after Fang Yuan looked at him, he lost interest and returned his attention to the food on the table, treating the middle-aged man as if he was invisible.
"Who is that person?
He's dressed like a servant, and he's not a Gu Master, yet he dares to question Young Master Fang Yuan? "One of the waiters saw that the situation was not good and shrank in a corner, asking in confusion.
"Hmph, he's just a fox exploiting the tiger's might.
One look and you can tell he's a servant of the Mo family, relying on the backing of the Gu Master to be arrogant.
If it was any other mortal, who would have the guts to do so? "Someone beside him sneered in disdain.
"Even so, he's just a mortal, yet he dares to shout at a Gu Master.
Tsk tsk, this kind of experience must be very satisfying. "
"Tsk, don't think too highly of a Gu Master.
Young Master Fang Yuan is only a Rank one beginner stage, and has just refined his natal Gu. If they really fight, he might not be able to beat this strong and skillful mortal. "
"Sigh, I hope they don't break anything in our inn when they fight."
The waiters spoke one after another, not daring to move forward, only daring to shrink their heads and look around.
"Eh?
You still have the mood to continue eating and drinking. "
Seeing that his words did not scare Fang Yuan, the tall and strong middle-aged man's eyes flashed coldly. "You think I'm lying to you?
Someone has already gone to inform Missy, and she'll be here soon.
Kid, don't think of running away.
Of course, you can't run either, I'm here to watch over you.
You'll have a good time later. "
Fang Yuan turned a deaf ear and continued to eat.
The middle-aged servant frowned, he did not see a trace of fear or panic on Fang Yuan's face.
This made him feel like he was being ignored, and his dignity was being violated.
He had been a servant in the Mo family for more than ten years, and was trusted by the masters.
After interacting with them for a long time, he knew some things about Gu Masters.
Rank one beginner stage Gu Masters mostly relied on their fists and feet in fights.
In battle, the deterrent effect of Gu worms was far greater than its practical use.
Especially when he knew that a young Gu Master like Fang Yuan had just started cultivating, his strength was far inferior to a person in his prime.
If they were to fight with their fists and legs, he would definitely be able to gain the upper hand after training for a long time.
At the same time, Fang Yuan had only refined the Moonlight Gu, so he could at most shoot out a few moonblades.
The middle-aged man had been used as a sparring partner for a long time.
He had personal experience and was clear in his heart: If the moonblade activated by first rank initial stage primeval essence were to really be imprinted on a human body, it would at most be able to leave a wound the size of a palm, and its destructive power would be very limited.
In addition, he had the support of the Mo family. Therefore, he was fearless when facing Fang Yuan. He wanted to perform well and earn his master's favor.
"Kid, you've got guts …" The middle-aged man's tone became even more unfriendly. As he spoke, he rolled up his sleeves, revealing his muscular arms.
His arms were very thick and covered with scars.
The veins on his forearms were bulging and twisting, and his upper arms were thicker than Fang Yuan's thighs.
The waiters of the inn felt a chill in their hearts. Some of the customers had already gotten up and hurriedly paid their bills, wanting to leave this troublesome place.
"Have you found Fang Yuan?" At this moment, a clear and arrogant female voice came from the door.
Mo Yan took big steps and stepped into the inn.
Behind her was a group of rich family servants.
Her figure was not bad, she was slightly tall and had a nice figure.
However, she had a horse-like face and inherited the characteristics of the Mo bloodline, causing her beauty to be greatly reduced. She could barely be considered average.
However, she wore a blue martial attire with a wide red belt around her waist. There was a square metal plate embedded on the belt.
The metal plate was engraved with an eye-catching "two".
Moreover, she had just returned from a family mission, so there was still some traces of hardships left on her body.
These things condensed a trace of a sharp and threatening aura.
Thus, once she stepped into the inn, her imposing aura caused the entire inn's dining hall to fall into silence.
"This servant, Gao Wan, pays his respects to Miss Mo!" The middle-aged man's expression suddenly changed when he saw Mo Yan.
A flattering smile appeared on his face as he bent his waist and took a few small steps. Then, with a plop, he knelt on the ground and greeted Mo Yan.
The waiters of the inn were a little dumbfounded when they saw the middle-aged man's transformation.
Gao Wan was tall and burly, so the way he bowed was a little out of place and a little ridiculous.
However, the waiters of the inn couldn't laugh. This middle-aged family servant's behavior highlighted Mo Yan's power.
Some of the waiters couldn't help but secretly sweat for Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan was their big customer, if anything happened to him, they would definitely be shocked.
It would be bad if they couldn't take care of the inn's business in the future.
Even more people were praying in their hearts: I hope Fang Yuan will surrender without putting up a fight.
If a fight really broke out and the inn's things were damaged, it would be even worse.
Mo Yan didn't look at Gao Wan who was kneeling on the ground. Her eyes were fixed on Fang Yuan. She took a few big steps to the table and said in an extremely fierce tone, "You are Fang Yuan?
Seems like you're enjoying your meal.
Hahaha, have you ever tasted a fist?
I'll let you have a taste. Perhaps it'll be even more delicious. "
Although she said this, Mo Yan didn't immediately make a move.
Fang Yuan's behavior was too calm and too strange.
Could it be that he had a hidden backer behind him?
"But that shouldn't be the case. Before I came, I already investigated.
This Fang Yuan is a typical example of a person who is not loved by his uncle or grandmother. His parents passed away when he was young and he was chased out by his aunt and uncle.
In addition, his aptitude is only C grade. What kind of background could a weak young man have? "Mo Yan couldn't help but mutter in her heart.
But no matter what, it was strange.
This matter was strange and she had to probe further.
Fang Yuan chuckled and glanced at Mo Yan. "Who told you that I am Guyue Fang Yuan?"
Mo Yan was momentarily stunned and immediately turned to look at Gao Wan.
Gao Wan had just stood up, but he immediately knelt down again. His forehead was dripping with cold sweat. He stuttered, not knowing how to answer, "Master, your servant, your servant …"
They had Fang Yuan's portrait, but they also knew that Fang Yuan and Fangzheng were twins. They looked very similar.
"No wonder this young man is so fearless. He is Fangzheng and not Fang Yuan." For a moment, the servants around Mo Yan all had this guess.
"Fangzheng is not someone that Fang Yuan can compare to.
The latter is only a C grade talent and is alone without any backing.
The former is an A grade talent and was recruited by the Clan Leader during the Awakening Ceremony. As long as he grows up, his future will be limitless! "Mo Yan didn't get a definite answer from Gao Wan, so she was even more hesitant.
At this moment, only a group of servants in the corner of the inn knew about Fang Yuan's identity.
But they couldn't afford to offend either side.
Hence, they all kept their mouths shut.
Fang Yuan was full. He slowly stood up and looked at Mo Yan. "Aren't you looking for Fang Yuan?
Follow me, I'll bring you to the school dormitory. "
"If this person in front of me is Fangzheng, I don't want to offend him.
If it's Fang Yuan, I'll follow him closely. I'm not afraid of him pretending to be me. "Mo Yan's thoughts turned and she made a decision.
"Alright, I'll follow you to the school.
Please! "Mo Yan stepped aside and extended her hand. Her eyes were shining as she gestured to Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan smiled and walked away with his head held high.
Mo Yan followed closely behind him, and the servants followed behind her.
"That was close."
"They're finally gone."
"Even if they fought, it has nothing to do with our inn."
The servants were left behind. Most of them patted their chests in relief.
The group of people arrived at the school entrance.
"Halt!"
"Stop! Only our clan's Gu Masters are allowed to enter the school." Two guards at the door stopped Fang Yuan, Mo Yan, and the others.
"How dare you!
You don't even recognize me?
How dare you stop me! "Mo Yan glared at the two guards and shouted.
"We don't dare." The guards quickly cupped their fists.
"Miss Mo Yan, we've engraved you in our hearts.
But the clan rules are absolute. How about this, Miss, we'll allow you to bring in a servant.
This is the greatest concession we can make. "An old guard replied respectfully.
Mo Yan snorted. Although she was reluctant, she didn't dare to go against the clan's rules.
The Mo family was powerful, but it attracted the most attention.
Don't forget that other than the Mo family, there was also the Chi family.
Other than the Chi family, there was also the clan leader's faction waiting to catch the Mo family's weakness.
"All of you stay. Gao Wan, follow me," Mo Yan ordered after thinking for a while.
Gao Wan immediately puffed out his chest, his face full of joy. "Thank you for your appreciation, Miss!"
"Let's go, junior." Mo Yan smiled meaningfully at Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan's face was still calm as he led the way.
He arrived at the door of the dormitory, opened the lock, and pushed the door open.
He took a step into the room, then stopped.
The door was wide open, and the room was unobstructed. The furnishings were simple, and there was no one else in the room.
Mo Yan stood at the door and looked inside. Her face darkened. "Junior, you better explain yourself. There's no one in the room!"
Fang Yuan smiled. "Am I not a person?"
Mo Yan stared at Fang Yuan. Her eyes flashed as if she realized something. "I'm looking for Gu. Yue. Fang. Yuan!"
Fang Yuan chuckled. "I never said I wasn't Guyue Fang Yuan."
S-REV-044.summary: Fang Yuan eats at an inn, observing the Gu Master population to gauge the clan's strength and reflecting on his ambition to leave Qing Mao Mountain. He is confronted by Gao Wan, a Mo family servant, who threatens him for beating Mobei. Guyue Mo Yan then arrives, aggressively seeking Fang Yuan. Due to Fang Yuan's resemblance to Fangzheng, Gao Wan and Mo Yan mistake him for Fangzheng, causing Mo Yan to hesitate. Fang Yuan, playing along, offers to lead her to the 'real' Fang Yuan at the academy dormitory.

continuityMutations.content: Her realization that she has been tricked by Fang Yuan's resemblance to Fangzheng and his intentional deception.
His further embarrassment at having misidentified Fang Yuan.
His successful manipulation of Mo Yan's expectations and his direct challenge to her.

This is the greatest concession we can make. "An old guard replied respectfully.
Mo Yan snorted. Although she was reluctant, she didn't dare to go against the clan's rules.
The Mo family was powerful, but it attracted the most attention.
Don't forget that other than the Mo family, there was also the Chi family.
Other than the Chi family, there was also the clan leader's faction waiting to catch the Mo family's weakness.
"All of you stay. Gao Wan, follow me," Mo Yan ordered after thinking for a while.
Gao Wan immediately puffed out his chest, his face full of joy. "Thank you for your appreciation, Miss!"
"Let's go, junior." Mo Yan smiled meaningfully at Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan's face was still calm as he led the way.
He arrived at the door of the dormitory, opened the lock, and pushed the door open.
He took a step into the room, then stopped.
The door was wide open, and the room was unobstructed. The furnishings were simple, and there was no one else in the room.
Mo Yan stood at the door and looked inside. Her face darkened. "Junior, you better explain yourself. There's no one in the room!"
Fang Yuan smiled. "Am I not a person?"
Mo Yan stared at Fang Yuan. Her eyes flashed as if she realized something. "I'm looking for Gu. Yue. Fang. Yuan!"
Fang Yuan chuckled. "I never said I wasn't Guyue Fang Yuan."
S-REV-045.summary: Fang Yuan leads Mo Yan and her entourage to the academy entrance, where guards enforce clan rules, limiting their entry. After a brief negotiation, Mo Yan enters with Gao Wan. Fang Yuan then leads them to a dormitory room, where he opens the door to an empty room. When Mo Yan demands to know where Fang Yuan is, he reveals, "Am I not a person?" and then, "I never said I wasn't Guyue Fang Yuan," confirming his identity and setting up a direct confrontation.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan is adept at using the family rules to his advantage.
Fang Yuan is a 'wolf cub' and 'cunning'.
Mo Yan's character makes her cautious and less likely to break rules when directly dared.
Fang Yuan has offended the Mo faction.
Mo Yan is outsmarted by Fang Yuan's exploitation of family rules and her own psychological weaknesses, failing to capture or punish him.
Mo Yan is forced to leave Fang Yuan's dormitory due to family rules and her inability to provoke him, leaving Gao Wan to guard.
Fang Yuan expertly uses the academy's family rules to protect himself from Mo Yan's aggression.
Fang Yuan manipulates Mo Yan's caution and adherence to rules by leaving his door wide open, preventing her from attacking.
Fang Yuan continues to cultivate using Yuan stones and the Liquor worm, refining middle stage primeval essence and identifying the next cultivation stage.
Fang Yuan demonstrates brutal and pragmatic combat skills, targeting vital points and ultimately killing Gao Wan with his refined moonblades.
Fang Yuan recognizes the need to conceal the secret of his middle stage primeval essence and the Liquor worm after killing Gao Wan.
Fang Yuan kills Gao Wan without hesitation or remorse, displaying a chilling detachment.
Fang Yuan's calm demeanor and unquestioning tone command fear and obedience from the academy guards after he commits murder.
Gao Wan is ordered by Mo Yan to guard Fang Yuan's dormitory.
Gao Wan is a skilled mortal martial artist, trained in fists and legs, capable of posing a significant threat to an initial stage Gu Master.
Gao Wan initially underestimates Fang Yuan's cunning and fighting ability, leading to his severe injury and eventual death.
Gao Wan is unaware of Fang Yuan's refined middle stage primeval essence, which makes his moonblade far more lethal than expected.
Protected by strict family rules, no one is allowed to break in and capture students.
Has strict rules protecting students, especially within dormitories.
Gu Masters are forbidden from using Gu to fight within the academy grounds.

C-REV-68.transition: Leaves Fang Yuan's dormitory, stomping her feet in anger to the courtyard

S-REV-046.prose:
Chapter 33
"Hmm?" Mo Yan frowned, anger appearing on her horse-like face. She finally understood that she had been played by Fang Yuan.
"Heh, such guts, you even dare to deceive your grandaunt!" Saying so, she stretched out her right hand, about to grab Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan did not take a step back. He raised his head and laughed, "Mo Yan, you better think this through!"
Mo Yan stopped. She was still outside the door, her right hand suspended in mid-air. A hint of hesitation and anger flashed across her face.
There were clear rules in the family.
Students were protected in the academy. No one was allowed to break into the dormitory and capture students.
Mo Yan only wanted to teach Fang Yuan a lesson today, to let him taste the pain.
She did not want to take the risk of breaking the family rules.
"It's fine if I break the rules myself.
I'm just afraid that I'll implicate my family and grandfather. "Thinking of this, Mo Yan retracted her hand.
She looked at Fang Yuan in the room, her eyes wide open.
The anger in her eyes, if turned into flames, could burn Fang Yuan to ashes in an instant.
"I never lied to you.
I said I'll bring you to Fang Yuan, and now you've found him.
It seems like you have something to say to me. "
Fang Yuan held his hands behind his back, a slight smile on his face. He did not fear the power of a Rank two Gu Master, and he met Mo Yan's angry gaze without fear.
He was only one step away from Mo Yan.
One was in the room, and the other was outside.
But this distance was like the distance between heaven and earth.
"Hehehe, Fang Yuan, oh Fang Yuan, you've studied the family rules very thoroughly."
Mo Yan suppressed her anger, a cold smile on her face. "Unfortunately, you can only delay it by relying on the family rules.
You can't stay in the dormitory. I want to see how long you can hide! "
Fang Yuan laughed, looking at Mo Yan with disdain. "Then I want to see how long you can keep me here.
Ah, it's already night, and you have a bed to sleep in. What about you?
If I'm not in class the next day, and the academy elder investigates, what do you think I'll say? "
"You!"
Mo Yan was enraged. She pointed at Fang Yuan and said, "Do you really think I won't dare to come in and take you away?"
Creak.
Fang Yuan left the dormitory door wide open. His lips curled into a smile, and his eyes were as deep as the abyss. His tone was filled with confidence as if he was in control of the situation. He said to Mo Yan in a provocative tone, "Then do it."
"Hehehe …" Mo Yan calmed down. She narrowed her eyes and looked at Fang Yuan. "Do you think I'll fall for your trick?"
Fang Yuan shrugged. He had already seen through Mo Yan's character.
If he closed the door or left it half-open, there was at least a 50% chance that Mo Yan would force her way in.
However, if he deliberately opened the door completely, it would make Mo Yan calm down and be more cautious. The possibility of her breaking in by force was very small.
Five hundred years of experience had allowed him to understand the weaknesses of human nature.
He turned around and exposed his back to Mo Yan.
If Mo Yan came to grab him now, she would most likely succeed in one strike.
However, Mo Yan stood outside the door without moving, as if there was an invisible mountain in front of her, blocking her way.
Until Fang Yuan sat cross-legged on the bed, Mo Yan looked at him angrily. She gritted her teeth but did not make a move.
"This is the sad thing about humans."
Fang Yuan sat cross-legged and looked at Mo Yan, who was standing foolishly outside the door. He sighed. "Sometimes, it's not material problems that stop people from taking action, but the shackles of the soul."
In terms of cultivation, Fang Yuan was definitely not Mo Yan's match.
However, even though she was a rank two cultivator, she could only look at Fang Yuan and did not dare to make a move.
She was only a few steps away from Fang Yuan. The door was wide open, and there was no obstruction.
The one that was holding her back was herself.
"Humans learn by all means to understand the world, to understand the rules, and to make use of the rules.
If you are restrained by the rules, you will be restrained because of what you have learned. That is the real tragedy. "
Fang Yuan took one last look at Mo Yan, then slowly closed his eyes and sank his consciousness into the primordial sea.
"This Fang Yuan is actually cultivating in front of me!
You're simply looking down on me!! "Seeing this scene, Mo Yan was so angry that her chest felt agitated and she almost vomited blood.
She wanted to rush up and give Fang Yuan a few punches!
However, she knew that she could not.
Mo Yan suddenly felt a tinge of regret. She stood outside the door, feeling awkward and unable to back down.
She was not willing to give up, but she could not bring herself to do so.
She had mobilized so many people to teach Fang Yuan a lesson, but in the end, she was disgraced.
Especially when there was a servant looking at her.
"Damn it!
This brat Fang Yuan is too uncooperative, too cunning! "Mo Yan thought angrily and began to scold Fang Yuan outside the door, trying to provoke him.
"Fang Yuan, you little bastard, come out if you have the guts!"
"Fang Yuan, as a man, you should be brave and take responsibility for what you have done.
Now, you are a turtle hiding in its shell. How despicable! "
"Don't put on an act in front of me. If you know what's good for you, come out now."
"You coward, good-for-nothing!!"
Fang Yuan turned a deaf ear and did not respond at all.
Mo Yan scolded for a while, but she did not feel the pleasure of scolding people. Instead, she felt more and more depressed.
She felt more and more like a clown or a shrew. Her behavior of blocking the door was really embarrassing.
"Ah ah ah, I'm so angry!" Mo Yan was going crazy and finally gave up trying to provoke him.
"Fang Yuan, you can hide now, but you can't hide forever." She stomped her feet and left unwillingly.
Before she left, she gave an order, "Gao Wan, stand here and stare at him!
I don't believe he won't come out. "
"I will obey!" The muscular servant Gao Wan quickly replied, sending Mo Yan off with a respectful gaze.
But in his heart, he was complaining. The night in the mountains was cold and humid, but he had to guard the place all night. If he was not careful, he would catch a cold.
This was a tough job.
Swish swish swish …
The primeval sea rose and fell, waves rose and fell.
The bronze primeval essence gathered like water, forming a wave. Under the control of Fang Yuan's will, it continuously rushed towards the aperture walls.
The aperture walls of a Rank one initial stage Gu Master were all made of white light.
At this moment, under the impact of the bronze primeval essence, it showed a multi-colored light, giving off an indescribable charm.
Time passed by bit by bit, and the bronze primeval sea's water level also slowly decreased.
From the original 44%, it dropped to 12%.
"A Gu Master needs to continuously expend primeval essence to nurture the aperture.
Initial stage Gu Masters have light walls, middle stage Gu Masters have water walls, and high stage Gu Masters have stone walls.
If I want to advance from initial stage to middle stage, I need to wash the light walls and nurture them into water walls. "
The five hundred years of memories from his previous life allowed Fang Yuan to grasp this period's cultivation like the back of his hand.
He slowly opened his eyes.
At this time, it was already late at night.
The crescent moon hung high in the night sky, shedding moonlight that was as white as water.
The door was wide open, and the moonlight shone in, making Fang Yuan think of a famous poem on Earth — The bright moonlight in front of my bed, I suspect it to be the frost on the ground.
The night wind blew gently, bringing with it a cold feeling.
Fang Yuan did not have a Gu worm that could keep him warm. Even with his fifteen year old body, he could not help but shiver.
The night in the mountains was still very cold.
"Brat, you finally opened your eyes.
How long are you going to cultivate?!
Hurry up and come out, if you stick your head out, you will still be stabbed.
You hit our family's Mobei young master, sooner or later you will be taught a lesson by our missy. "Seeing that Fang Yuan finally moved, the noble servant Gao Wan who had been standing at the door immediately became spirited.
Fang Yuan squinted his eyes. It seems that the Rank two female Gu Master had already left?
"Brat, did you hear that?
Hurry up and come out. You have a room to stay in and a bed to sleep in, but I have to stand in this courtyard.
If you don't come out, do you believe I won't barge in?! "Seeing that Fang Yuan did not react, Gao Wan threatened.
Fang Yuan was still indifferent.
"Bastard, hurry up and come out to be captured.
You have offended our Mo faction, you will not have a good life in the future.
Hurry up and kowtow to missy and admit your wrongs, maybe she will forgive you. "Gao Wan continued to scold.
Fang Yuan turned a deaf ear to him. He slowly took out a Yuan stone from his money bag, holding it in his palm.
Then, he slowly closed his eyes.
Gao Wan saw that Fang Yuan still wanted to continue cultivating, and immediately became anxious, scolding, "You are just a mere C grade talent, at most you are a Rank two Gu Master, what is there to cultivate?
With just you alone, how can you contend against the entire Desert Branch Family?
Brat, are you deaf?
Did you hear what I said?! "
S-REV-046.summary: Mo Yan confronts Fang Yuan at his dormitory, enraged by his deception. Fang Yuan, leveraging his knowledge of academy rules, provocatively challenges Mo Yan to enter, knowing she won't risk breaking the rules. Mo Yan, frustrated, eventually leaves, ordering her servant Gao Wan to guard the door. Fang Yuan then calmly cultivates, using Yuan stones and the Liquor worm to refine his primeval essence.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan is a 'wolf cub' whose attacks are 'ruthless and sneaky'.
Fang Yuan's moonblade is unusually powerful, capable of cutting bone.
Fang Yuan killed Gao Wan without emotion.
Fang Yuan's power as a Gu Master is terrifying.
The guards witnessed Fang Yuan's use of middle stage primeval essence.
The academy guards are bound by clan rules to protect students within the academy, especially Fang Yuan.
The guards witness Fang Yuan's brutal killing of Gao Wan and are struck with fear and terror, recognizing the power of a Gu Master.
The guards are compelled to obey Fang Yuan's commands, even after he commits murder, due to his status as a Gu Master and their fear.
The guards witness Fang Yuan's use of middle stage primeval essence via the moonblade, which could expose his secret if they understand its implications.

C-REV-01.transition: Drags Gao Wan's headless corpse back into his dormitory

S-REV-047.prose:
==================================================

Chapter 34
Fang Yuan turned a deaf ear, multitasking.
He absorbed the natural primeval essence from the Yuan stone while observing his aperture.
The originally low primeval essence sea in the aperture, with the continuous infusion of natural primeval essence, had begun to slowly rise.
This recovery speed was somewhat slow, but Fang Yuan was not anxious.
Cultivation was accumulation, it could not be rushed.
The one who was really anxious was the middle-aged male servant outside the room.
After about half an hour, Fang Yuan's green copper primeval essence sea reached the limit of 44%.
But this was not the end.
At this time, the primeval essence sea showed a kind of emerald green color, this was only Rank one initial stage green copper primeval essence.
The primeval essence that Fang Yuan used to warm the aperture wall was not initial stage primeval essence.
It was middle stage primeval essence refined by the Liquor worm.
"Liquor worm."
With a thought from Fang Yuan, the Liquor worm in the primeval sea immediately flew up and hovered in the air, shrinking into a white glutinous rice ball.
Swoosh.
Ten percent of the initial stage primeval essence was mobilized and entered the Liquor worm's body, it was quickly absorbed.
Then, a fragrant wine mist emitted from the Liquor worm's body, condensing into a ball.
Fang Yuan mobilized another ten percent of primeval essence and entered this wine mist.
After the wine mist was completely consumed, the original ten percent of the initial stage primeval essence suddenly shrunk by half, and at the same time, the color changed from emerald green to pale green.
This was middle stage primeval essence.
"Ordinary students, to advance their cultivation, they all use Rank one initial stage primeval essence.
But I use middle stage primeval essence, the efficiency is at least two times higher than them.
At the same time, using middle stage primeval essence to activate the Moonlight Gu, the moonblade is also more powerful than the initial stage primeval essence. "
Only when the primeval sea was purified into Rank one middle stage primeval essence did Fang Yuan open his eyes.
Cultivation knew no time, it was already early in the morning.
The sky was no longer pure black. Instead, it was a deep dark blue color.
The moon had already disappeared, leaving only a few broken stars.
The door had been open for almost the entire night, the corner of the wooden door had been soaked, revealing a kind of black color brought by water stains.
This was the disadvantage of the school dormitory. It was not as comfortable as a normal bamboo house. It sat directly on the ground, so it was more humid.
When he came back to his senses, Fang Yuan also felt a chill wrapping around his body.
After sitting cross-legged for so long, his legs seemed to be a little numb.
He loosened his clenched right hand and immediately sprinkled a layer of greyish-white stone powder.
This was the residue left behind after the natural Zhen Yuan in the Yuan stone was completely absorbed.
"I've used up three Yuan stone in one night of cultivation." Fang Yuan calculated in his mind.
He only had C grade aptitude, but in order to increase his cultivation speed, he had been using Yuan stones to replenish his True Yuan.
More importantly, he used the Liquor worm to refine the middle grade true essence.
This greatly increased the consumption of Yuan stone.
"Although I managed to rob a large sum of money yesterday, I used up three Yuan stone pieces in one night.
In this way, even though Yuan stone seems to be a lot, it won't be able to withstand the long term consumption of cultivation … However, the pursuit of cultivation speed and efficiency naturally comes with a price. "
Fang Yuan looked out of the door again.
He saw the strong servant called Gao Wan squatting at the corner of the wall, his body curled up into a ball as if he had fallen asleep.
"Looks like that Rank two female Gu Master has already left.
She left Gao Wan here to guard me.
Hehe. "Fang Yuan's lips curled into a cold smile. He got off the bed and began to quietly move his fists and legs.
As his body gradually warmed up, he stepped out of the dormitory.
"Kid, you're finally willing to come out.
How about it, obediently surrender and follow me. Kowtow to my mistress and admit your wrongs. "Gao Wan's ears twitched as he caught the sound of Fang Yuan's footsteps and stood up abruptly.
His body was thick and strong, almost twice the size of Fang Yuan.
The muscles on his body bulged, and under his slanted eyebrows, a pair of narrow eyes flashed with a cruel and evil light, like a hungry hyena.
Fang Yuan was expressionless as he continued to walk towards him.
"Kid, it's fine if you came out earlier.
Now that you've come out, do you know how much I've suffered in order to guard you? "He chuckled as he strode towards Fang Yuan, his expression filled with evil intentions.
At this moment, Fang Yuan suddenly shouted and leapt up, raising his fists and rushing towards Gao Wan.
"Stinking brat, you're courting death!!"
Gao Wan's expression was twisted, he was filled with anger now. He raised his earthen bowl-sized fist and smashed it towards Fang Yuan.
This fist was extremely powerful, breaking through the air and actually bringing with it the sound of the wind.
Fang Yuan's gaze was as clear as water. Seeing the fist coming towards him, he shifted his feet and swayed to Gao Wan's side.
He stretched out his finger and poked Gao Wan's waist.
Gao Wan blocked with his arm, but Fang Yuan did not manage to poke him and hit Gao Wan's left forearm instead.
Fang Yuan felt as if his finger had poked a metal plate, it was painful and numb.
"This Gao Wan is already at the peak of a mortal's martial arts.
I only have the Moonlight Gu to fight now. Without the help of other Gu worms, I'm not his match with just my fists and legs! "Fang Yuan's gaze flashed and he wisely gave up on attacking. He took a few steps back and pulled apart the distance.
In the Guyue village, only the Guyue clansmen had the right to cultivate as Gu Masters.
The rest of the clansmen, regardless of whether they had the talent to cultivate or not, did not have the right to participate in the Awakening Ceremony.
But these mortals could cultivate their fists and legs.
Just like Gao Wan in front of him. Although he was not a Gu Master, he had definitely trained hard in his fists and legs. His basic skills were quite solid, and he was also a middle-aged man, the prime of a mortal's life.
Other than the Moonlight Gu which could be used for battle, Fang Yuan's body was only that of a fifteen-year-old youth.
Whether it was strength, agility or endurance, he was not Gao Wan's match.
A martial artist like Gao Wan was enough to kill a Rank one initial stage Gu Master.
Even a middle stage Gu Master could pose a certain threat.
"This kid, he's too vicious!" Seeing Fang Yuan pull away from him, Gao Wan's heart still had lingering fear.
The waist was a person's vital point, and if someone forcefully poked it, the injury would not be light.
If one used too much strength, it could even kill someone.
Gao Wan had stayed outside the courtyard for most of the night. His body was wrapped in the cold and damp air, and his reaction was somewhat slow.
Just that one strike, and Fang Yuan had almost succeeded.
Luckily, although he usually sucked up to others, he had also trained hard. At the crucial moment, his body's instincts overrode his brain's reaction, and he had narrowly defended against Fang Yuan's attack.
"I can't be careless anymore.
This kid is a wolf cub, his attacks are ruthless and sneaky. If I'm not careful, I'll fall into his trap.
No wonder young master was knocked unconscious by him twice, "Gao Wan wiped the cold sweat off his forehead, sweeping away the contempt he had earlier, and started to take Fang Yuan seriously.
"If I catch this kid, I'll have made a great contribution.
When the time comes, young miss will definitely reward me!
A Rank one initial stage moonblade can at most be considered a knife. As long as it doesn't hit a vital point, it'll just be a superficial wound. "
Thinking of this, Gao Wan's heart started to heat up.
He stretched out his iron pincer like hands, grabbing towards Fang Yuan.
Bam bam bam.
Fang Yuan was not the least bit afraid. He faced Gao Wan head-on, engaging in close combat.
For a moment, fists and legs clashed, and the exchange of offense and defense produced continuous muffled sounds.
When robbing the students, he only used his palms, mainly to control the situation.
Now that he was fighting with Gao Wan, he no longer held back.
Sometimes he used his fingers to dig his eyes, sometimes he stabbed his throat, sometimes he used the base of his palm to hit his chin, sometimes he used the edge of his hand to chop the back of his head, sometimes he used his knee to hit his crotch, and sometimes he used his elbow to stab his waist.
Gao Wan broke out in cold sweat.
Fang Yuan's every move did not leave Gao Wan's vital points. His methods were ruthless and ruthless, as if he wanted to kill Gao Wan.
Gao Wan was only a mortal, not a Gu Master. Although he trained hard, his vital points were still vital points.
It was impossible for a mortal to turn their eyelids into steel. This was the limitation of a mortal's martial arts training.
On the other hand, Gao Wan did not dare to kill Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan was from the Guyue clan. If he killed Fang Yuan, Gao Wan would incur the wrath of the public. He would definitely be dismembered, and the Mo family would be the first to clean up the mess.
Thus, his idea was to capture Fang Yuan alive. It would be best if he could make him suffer in the process.
One side had misgivings, while the other had killing intent. On the battlefield, it was actually Fang Yuan who was suppressing Gao Wan!

==================================================

Chapter 35
Fang Yuan's temporary advantage would not last long.
As the punches and kicks intertwined, he was already panting.
On the other hand, Gao Wan's breathing was still long and deep. There was a huge gap between their stamina.
At the same time, Gao Wan began to move. His body gradually heated up, and his punches became faster and faster. The numbness and sluggishness brought by the cold were gradually swept away, and he began to display the strength that he had trained for decades.
"Kid, you can't beat me.
The clan rules state that you cannot use the Moonlight Gu in the academy.
You are finished. Today, you are destined to become my prisoner! "Gao Wan laughed sinisterly. He had a lot of battle experience, and he tried to use words to break Fang Yuan's fighting spirit.
"I am still a teenager after all. My body has not matured, and my quality is not as good as this slave." Fang Yuan's heart was like ice. After five hundred years of training, how could his fighting spirit be shaken?
"The Moonlight Gu!" His heart moved. He activated his primeval essence and leaped back, pulling away from Gao Wan.
Gao Wan wanted to chase after him, but he suddenly saw a layer of blue light emitting from Fang Yuan's palm.
His face immediately darkened, and he shouted, "Kid, you are using a Gu to fight in the academy. That is against the clan rules!"
"So what if I am?" Fang Yuan laughed coldly.
He studied the clan rules and was proficient in them, but it was never for the sake of obeying them.
Immediately, his palm slashed towards Gao Wan.
With a soft sound, the blue crescent blade flew towards Gao Wan's face.
Gao Wan gritted his teeth and raised his arms in front of his face, forming an arm shield.
At the same time, he did not stop and rushed towards Fang Yuan, intending to resist and end the battle quickly.
The moonblade hit his arm, and with a puff, flesh and blood splattered under the moonlight. An extremely intense pain was transmitted to Gao Wan's nerves. Gao Wan was caught off guard and almost fainted from the pain.
"How can this be?!"
