His momentum came to a halt, and he was horrified to find that his two forearms had been cut open horizontally.
Blood flowed out of the wound, and from the side, one could see the bloody flesh.
Even the pale broken arm bones could be seen.
Gao Wan was shocked. "This is impossible!
A Rank one beginner moonblade can at most hurt my flesh.
How can you cut my bones?
Only a Rank one middle stage can do this!! "
Of course he didn't know that although Fang Yuan was only a Rank one initial stage Gu Master, he was a Rank one initial stage Gu Master.
But because of the Liquor worm's refinement, there was Rank one middle stage primeval essence.
Under the activation of middle stage primeval essence, the moonlight Gu's moonblades were naturally powerful, surpassing initial stage.
"Not good! There's something strange about this kid!!" Gao Wan was caught off guard, and was severely injured.
His fighting spirit was completely gone, and he made a prompt decision to retreat.
"Do you think you can escape?" Fang Yuan sneered and chased after him. The Crescent Blade in his hand shot out continuously.
"Help!!" Gao Wan screamed as he ran for his life. His voice traveled far and wide in the silent academy.
"What's going on?
Someone is calling for help! "The voice alerted the nearby academy guards.
"It's a servant left behind by Miss Mo Yan of the Mo Family." The guards rushed over and stopped when they saw the scene of the chase.
"This is just a servant, there's no need to protect him!"
"Letting him stay is already giving face to the Mo Family."
"We still need to be careful to prevent him from doing something desperate and hurting that Fang Yuan."
The nervous guards surrounded them, but they did not make a move and only watched from the sidelines.
If this servant called Gao Wan died, then he died. It had nothing to do with them.
But if Fang Yuan died or was injured, then it would be their responsibility.
Seeing this, Gao Wan's heart turned cold. He screamed mournfully, "We are all outsiders, you can't just watch me die."
He lost more and more blood, and his speed gradually slowed down.
Fang Yuan caught up from behind. His voice was as cold as ice, pronouncing Gao Wan's death sentence. "Scream, no matter how loud you scream, it's useless."
As he said that, he flipped his hand and two moonblades flew out.
With two swishing sounds, the moonblades hit Gao Wan's neck.
Gao Wan felt a chill in his heart, as if he had fallen into an abyss.
The next moment, he felt his vision suddenly spin. He saw his feet, chest, back … and his neck that had been cut off.
Following that, he welcomed complete darkness.
Gao Wan was dead.
After being beheaded by Fang Yuan's two moonblades, his head flew out. His body flew for more than ten meters before he fell to the ground.
Bright red blood gushed out of his neck like a fountain, dying the surrounding flowers and plants red.
"Murder!"
"Fang Yuan killed someone!!"
The guards could not help but exclaim softly.
They witnessed the whole process with their own eyes, and their bodies trembled, feeling a sense of fear and terror.
Fang Yuan was only a weak fifteen-year-old boy, but he killed a strong adult without any expression.
This was the power of a Gu Master!
The outcome of the battle was decided.
Fang Yuan slowed down his footsteps and slowly walked over.
His expression was calm, as if he had just done something as trivial as eating and drinking.
This expression caused the guards to feel a chill in their hearts.
Gao Wan's head lay on the ground, his eyes wide open, dying with everlasting regret.
Fang Yuan was expressionless. He lifted his leg and kicked the head away.
The corners of the guards' eyes twitched when they saw this.
Fang Yuan approached Gao Wan's body, and found that the body was still trembling. Blood quickly flowed all over the ground, forming a small pool of blood.
He looked at the wounds on Gao Wan's body, his face somewhat gloomy.
These wounds were very deep, enough to expose the secret of his middle stage primeval essence.
Once this secret was exposed, it would quickly implicate his Liquor worm.
Once the Liquor worm appeared, the higher ups of the clan would naturally think of the Flower Wine Monk.
Thus, Fang Yuan had to keep this secret.
"But there are too many people who saw it." Fang Yuan glanced at the surrounding guards, there were more than ten of them.
He only had less than ten percent of his primeval essence left, and it was impossible to kill them all.
After thinking for a while, Fang Yuan bent down, lifted Gao Wan's ankle, and dragged the corpse back.
"Young master Fang Yuan, leave this to us." The guards endured the chill in their hearts and walked forward. Fang Yuan said respectfully.
In this kind of respect, there was a clear sense of fear.
Fang Yuan quietly glanced at the crowd. The guards subconsciously held their breath, and lowered their heads.
"Give me the knife." He stretched out his hand and said indifferently.
In his commanding tone, there was an unquestionable power.
The guard closest to him involuntarily handed over the knife at his waist.
Fang Yuan took the knife and continued to walk.
More than ten guards were left standing blankly on the spot, looking at Fang Yuan's back.
The sun rose from the east, and the first ray of light passed through the side of the mountain, shining into the school.
The fifteen year old Fang Yuan's body was thin and weak, and his skin was pale.
Under the light of the dawn, he walked unhurriedly.
In his left hand, he held a shining knife.
In his right hand, he dragged a headless corpse.
As he walked, bright red blood was dragged on the greenish black stone bricks.
The guards looked at him in a daze, and a chill made their bodies stiff.
The morning sun shone on them, but they did not feel a trace of warmth and light.
Gulp.
Someone's Adam's apple moved, and he swallowed a mouthful of saliva.

==================================================
S-REV-047.summary: Fang Yuan emerges from his dormitory to find Gao Wan guarding him. Gao Wan, taunting Fang Yuan, initiates a physical confrontation. Fang Yuan, realizing his physical disadvantage as a mortal, strategically uses his Moonlight Gu, despite academy rules. He unleashes a powerful moonblade, refined by his Liquor worm, cutting Gao Wan's arms. As Gao Wan attempts to flee and screams for help, Fang Yuan ruthlessly pursues and kills him, beheading him with two more moonblades. The academy guards, witnessing the murder, are terrified but do not intervene, showing deference to a Gu Master. Fang Yuan then takes a knife from a guard and drags Gao Wan's corpse back into the dormitory, planning to conceal his use of middle-stage primeval essence.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan killed Gao Wan, a Mo family servant, and dismembered his body.
Fang Yuan is a dangerous and ruthless killer.
He feigns self-defense and frames Gao Wan as a spy to the academy elder.
He dismembered Gao Wan's body and delivered it to the Mo family's back door as a multi-layered message of threat and compromise.
He admits to using Moonlight Gu in the academy, incurring a penalty.
He is deeply shocked, worried, and afraid after learning Fang Yuan killed Gao Wan, someone he knew.
He was present when Mo Yan brought servants, including Gao Wan, to confront Fang Yuan.

S-REV-048.prose:
Chapter 36 "Did you guys hear? Fang Yuan killed someone! "A student whispered to his deskmate. "I heard that too. He really killed someone." His deskmate covered his heart with a pale face. "Many guards saw it. Fang Yuan chased that person. That person wanted to beg for mercy, but Fang Yuan didn't allow it. He chopped off his head!" "Not only that. Fang Yuan killed that person. He didn't even let his headless body go. He dragged it back to the dormitory and chopped it into meat paste. " "Really?" "It couldn't be any more real. I came early this morning. I even saw the bloodstains in the cracks of the bluestone bricks. " "Aiya, why would I lie to you! Just now, the school elder called Fang Yuan away because of this! " The youngsters in the classroom weren't in the mood to listen to the lesson. They were all whispering to each other. Killing was still too foreign to this group of fifteen-year-old youths, and it was also very scary. Since young, they were under the protection of their families. At most, they only sparred with their fists and killed chickens and dogs. As for killing, it was still far away from them. "Who did Fang Yuan kill?"

"I heard it was a servant from the Mo branch." "Hey, I know this the best. Last night, I saw with my own eyes that senior Mo Yan from the Mo family brought a bunch of servants to cause trouble for Fang Yuan. " "It's the Mo family. Not good. The Mobei is in trouble." Many youngsters looked at Guyue Mobei. The Mobei sat on his seat with a pale face. He just got the news this morning. Fang Yuan actually killed someone. He even killed someone he was familiar with, Gao Wan! The Mobei was very familiar with Gao Wan. He was very active among the servants. He was good at flattering people. He also trained hard in martial arts. He was a capable lackey. A while ago, Gao Wan even sparred with the Mobei. He didn't expect to be killed by Fang Yuan just like that! Because of this, the shock and disbelief in the Mobei's heart was twice as strong as the others. Other than shock, there was also worry and fear. Facing a murderer like Fang Yuan, it would be a lie if the 15-year-old Mobei said he wasn't afraid. In fact, he was not the only one who was afraid. The other youths were also afraid. Fang Yuan had robbed them twice, and each of them had fought with Fang Yuan. "I've actually fought with such a cruel murderer? I'm actually still alive. "Many people patted their chests, feeling a wave of lingering fear.
S-REV-048.summary: Students in the classroom are abuzz with whispered rumors about Fang Yuan brutally killing a servant, Gao Wan, and dismembering his body. Guyue Mobei, who knew Gao Wan, is particularly shaken by the news, experiencing profound shock, disbelief, and fear, recognizing the danger Fang Yuan poses. The collective fear of the students, many of whom had fought with Fang Yuan, highlights the terrifying impact of his actions.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan killed Gao Wan in cold blood and dismembered his body.
Fang Yuan delivered Gao Wan's dismembered body to the Mo family's back door.
Fang Yuan is a 'battle seed' with exceptional combat talent and ruthlessness.
The Academy Elder is aware of his violation of clan rules and his strategic ruthlessness.
He encourages fights among students for growth but tries to suppress Fang Yuan's overwhelming limelight.
He is deeply disturbed by Fang Yuan's cold indifference and dismemberment of Gao Wan's body.
He struggles with how to handle the political fallout of Fang Yuan killing a Mo family servant within the academy and provoking the Mo family.
He admires Fang Yuan's battle talent and ruthlessness, seeing him as a 'battle seed'.

C-REV-01.transition: Leaves the Academy Elder's office after being dismissed

S-REV-049.prose:
It was one thing for Fang Yuan to kill people, but the key was that he had dismembered the corpses and chopped them into minced meat. This was too cruel! Such a terrifying crime deeply impacted the innocent hearts of the youths. … In the room, there were only the academy elder and Fang Yuan. The academy elder sat, while Fang Yuan stood. No one spoke, and the atmosphere was heavy and oppressive. The academy elder looked at Fang Yuan silently, a complicated light flashing through his eyes. Early in the morning, a guard reported to him about Fang Yuan's murder. This news made him shocked and suspicious. He was a Rank three old Gu Master, and was also in charge of the academy, so he naturally knew what kind of battle power a Rank one initial stage Gu Master had. Fang Yuan could kill Gao Wan, it could be said that he had defeated the strong with the weak. In fact, yesterday evening, a guard had reported to him that Mo Yan had held Fang Yuan hostage and barged into the academy. At that time, he did not care, nor did he stop it. He was the academy elder, and his goal was to nurture future Gu Masters, not to protect them. As long as there were no casualties among the students, he encouraged fights in the dark. Mo Yan came to find trouble with Fang Yuan, and he was happy to see it happen. Firstly, he knew that regardless of victory or defeat, the fight would be beneficial to Fang Yuan's growth. Secondly, he wanted to suppress Fang Yuan's limelight. Fang Yuan had blocked the academy's entrance twice, snatching away all the students. This limelight was too strong, and he had to suppress it. But he did not expect that Mo Yan would return empty-handed, leaving behind the family servant Gao Wan. And Gao Wan could not beat Fang Yuan, and was killed by Fang Yuan! In this world, strength reigned supreme. Killing someone was not rare, especially to Gu Masters, it could be said to be an extremely common thing. But for a fifteen year old youth to kill someone for the first time, it was not simple. The academy elder still had a vivid memory of his first kill. At that time, he was already a Rank two Gu Master, nineteen years old, and in a conflict, he killed a Gu Master from the Bai family village.

After killing the person, he vomited a mess, and his heart was in a mess. For a few days, he had no appetite, and did not want to eat. He did not comfort himself when he slept, and the moment he closed his eyes, he would see the person's angry eyes when he died. Looking at Fang Yuan now, his face was calm as usual, where was the panic? There was no discomfort, as if he had just slept the night before, and the one who killed someone was not him. Especially when the academy elder heard that after Fang Yuan killed the family servant, he did not let him go, and dragged the body back to the dormitory, chopping the body into meat paste to vent his anger. Such ruthless methods, it was terrifying to hear! So, at this moment, the academy elder looked at Fang Yuan with a complicated gaze. On one hand, he was shocked at Fang Yuan's indifference towards life, his heart as cold as ice. On the other hand, he admired Fang Yuan, he was born to be a battle seed. He had just mastered the Moonlight Gu, and he could already use it to kill someone. Ordinary youths, even those A grade geniuses, might not be able to do it. This was the talent of battle! If he was nurtured to fight for the family, he would be the enemy's nightmare. The third aspect was worry and distress. He was worried that after this incident, Fang Yuan's momentum would grow, and he would not be able to suppress him. This Fang Yuan was too daring. Not only did he violate the clan rules, he used a Gu in the academy, and even killed someone because of it. He had to suppress his limelight, or else how could he manage this academy? What was distressing was how to deal with the aftermath of this incident, since it involved the clan's Mo bloodline. "Fang Yuan, do you know why I summoned you?" The academy elder used a low voice, breaking the silence in the room. "I know." Fang Yuan nodded, "I used the Moonlight Gu in the academy, and violated the clan rules. According to the rules, this is the first time I violated it, and I should pay thirty Yuan stone as a punishment. " He avoided the main point, and did not talk about Gao Wan's death. The academy elder was stunned, he did not expect Fang Yuan to answer like this.

His face darkened, and he snorted, "Don't try to act dumb in front of me! Let me ask you, what's the matter with Gao Wan's death? " Fang Yuan squinted his eyes, "Hmph! Gao Wan offended his superiors, and his intentions were vicious. Last night, not only did he block my door, he also wanted to kill me. In self-defense, I had to use the Moonlight Gu, and luckily killed the thief. I suspect that this person is very likely to be a spy from the other mountain strongholds. Family elder, please investigate this matter! " The academy elder heard this, and frowned, not knowing what to say. Now that Gao Wan was dead, Fang Yuan could say whatever he wanted. He was just an outsider, not a member of the clan. If he died, then so be it. The academy elder did not care at all. But he was worried about the Mo family's reaction. Gao Wan was a servant of the Mo family, but he died in the academy. He was in charge of the academy, and he needed to give the Mo family an explanation. After thinking for a while, the academy elder stared at Fang Yuan and asked, "Then let me ask you, how did you deal with Gao Wan's body?" Fang Yuan's lips curled into a cruel smile, "I chopped up Gao Wan's body, and put it in a wooden box. When the sun rose, I placed it at the back door of the Mo family." "What?!" The academy elder was shocked, and almost stood up from his seat. Fang Yuan not only killed a servant, but also chopped up the body, and placed it at the back door of the Mo family. This was a blatant provocation! To the academy elder who wanted to settle this matter, this was definitely a real nightmare. Fang Yuan was just a small Rank one Gu Master, what kind of reaction would the huge Mo family have? When the academy elder thought of this, he felt a headache. Things had already gotten out of his control.

This Fang Yuan was really a troublemaker! "Sigh, since it has already happened, there's no point in talking about it. You can leave first, there will be punishment in a few days, you better be mentally prepared, "the elder was in a mess, and waved his hand to let Fang Yuan leave. He needed to calm down and think of a solution. ================================================== Chapter 37 At the same time, in the Mo Family. "What did I tell you? Look at what you've done! "In the study, Guyue Mo Chen slammed the table and flew into a rage. Mo Yan stood in front of the old man with her head lowered. Her eyes were filled with shock and anger. She had just received the news that Gao Wan had been killed by Fang Yuan! That fifteen-year-old boy actually had such means and determination. Gao Wan was a servant of the Mo Family. Fang Yuan killed him, which meant that he didn't respect the Mo Family at all! "Grandpa, don't be angry. Gao Wan was just a servant. It doesn't matter if he's dead. After all, his surname isn't Guyue. But that Fang Yuan is too daring. Even if he beats a dog, he has to look at the owner first. Not only did he beat our dog, but he also killed it! "Mo Yan said angrily. Guyue Mo Chen roared, "You still have the cheek to say that? You've grown up and don't care about what I said anymore, right? What did I warn you about? You've completely forgotten it! " "Your granddaughter doesn't dare."
S-REV-049.summary: The Academy Elder confronts Fang Yuan regarding Gao Wan's murder. Fang Yuan calmly denies culpability for murder, claiming self-defense and portraying Gao Wan as a spy, while admitting to a minor clan rules infraction. The Elder is shocked by Fang Yuan's indifference and tactical intelligence, particularly after learning Fang Yuan dismembered the body and delivered it to the Mo family, creating a major political problem for the academy and the clan.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan sent Gao Wan's dismembered body to the Mo family's back door.
Her grandfather, Guyue Mo Chen, is extremely angry at her for violating clan rules by escalating the conflict with Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan's act of sending the body is a complex strategic message, not just a simple provocation.
Fang Yuan possesses exceptional wisdom, tolerance, and determination despite his C-grade aptitude.
Fang Yuan delivered Gao Wan's dismembered body to his family's back door.
Fang Yuan's actions are a brilliant strategic move, combining threat and compromise, and exploiting the Mo family's vulnerabilities regarding reputation and internal politics.
Fang Yuan's C-grade aptitude belies his remarkable wisdom and cunning.
His granddaughter, Mo Yan, is short-sighted and arrogant, needing to learn to prioritize clan interests over personal feelings.
She is enraged and humiliated by Fang Yuan's actions and the perceived disrespect to her family by killing Gao Wan.
She initially misinterprets Fang Yuan's delivery of the body as pure provocation.
She is confined for seven days by her grandfather for her role in instigating the conflict and failing to recognize Fang Yuan's strategic depth.
She resolves to kill Gao Wan's entire family to uphold the Mo family's reputation, showing her ruthlessness.
He is furious at Mo Yan for escalating the conflict with Fang Yuan and disrespecting clan rules.
He correctly interprets Fang Yuan's delivery of the dismembered body as a nuanced message combining a threat and an offer of compromise.
He is impressed by Fang Yuan's strategic mind, wisdom, tolerance, and determination, despite his C-grade aptitude.
He punishes Mo Yan and makes a calculated decision regarding Gao Wan's family to protect the clan's reputation.

S-REV-050.prose:
This Fang Yuan was really a troublemaker! "Sigh, since it has already happened, there's no point in talking about it. You can leave first, there will be punishment in a few days, you better be mentally prepared, "the elder was in a mess, and waved his hand to let Fang Yuan leave. He needed to calm down and think of a solution. ================================================== Chapter 37 At the same time, in the Mo Family. "What did I tell you? Look at what you've done! "In the study, Guyue Mo Chen slammed the table and flew into a rage. Mo Yan stood in front of the old man with her head lowered. Her eyes were filled with shock and anger. She had just received the news that Gao Wan had been killed by Fang Yuan! That fifteen-year-old boy actually had such means and determination. Gao Wan was a servant of the Mo Family. Fang Yuan killed him, which meant that he didn't respect the Mo Family at all! "Grandpa, don't be angry. Gao Wan was just a servant. It doesn't matter if he's dead. After all, his surname isn't Guyue. But that Fang Yuan is too daring. Even if he beats a dog, he has to look at the owner first. Not only did he beat our dog, but he also killed it! "Mo Yan said angrily. Guyue Mo Chen roared, "You still have the cheek to say that? You've grown up and don't care about what I said anymore, right? What did I warn you about? You've completely forgotten it! " "Your granddaughter doesn't dare."

Mo Yan was shocked. She realized that her grandpa was really angry, so she quickly knelt down. Guyue Mo Chen pointed outside the window and reprimanded, "Hmph, it's fine if that servant is dead, but you still won't let go of Fang Yuan. You're so short-sighted and don't know what's important! Do you know what you're doing? It's their business to fight among the younger generation. As the elders, we shouldn't get involved. This is the rule! Now that you're looking for trouble with Fang Yuan, you're breaking the rule. Who knows how many people are looking at the Mo Family as a joke now! " "Grandpa, please calm down. Anger is harmful to the body. It's my fault for dragging the Mo Family down. I'll do whatever grandpa tells me to do! But I can't take this lying down. That Fang Yuan is too despicable and shameless. First, he tricked me into entering the school. Then, he hid in the dormitory and didn't come out no matter how I scolded him. Once I left, he killed Gao Wan. This is extremely treacherous and shameless! "Mo Yan reported. "Oh, is that so?" Guyue and Mo Chen furrowed their brows. This was the first time they had heard of this information. A glint flashed through their eyes. He took a deep breath and suppressed the anger in his heart. Stroking his beard, he muttered, "I've heard of this Fang Yuan before.

He composed poems in his early years and has early wisdom. Unexpectedly, his aptitude was only C grade, which made it difficult for him to be of great use. Thus, he gave up on recruiting him. Now that I think about it, it's quite interesting. " After a pause, Guyue and Mo Chen knocked on the table with their fingers. "Someone, bring that box over." There were servants waiting outside the door. Soon, a box was brought in. The box was neither too big nor too small, but it was a bit heavy. The servant carried it with both hands and stood beside the desk. "Grandpa, what is this?" Mo Yan asked curiously when she saw the wooden box. "Why don't you open it and take a look?" Guyue Mo Chen narrowed his eyes, his tone a little complicated. Mo Yan stood up and opened the wooden lid to take a look inside. Immediately, her expression changed and her pupils shrunk to the size of a needle. She could not help but take a big step back and let out an uncontrollable cry of shock. The wooden lid in her hand also fell to the ground. Without the wooden lid, the contents of the wooden box appeared in front of everyone. It was a pile of flesh and blood! These pieces of flesh and blood were obviously cut into pieces and placed in the box. Scarlet blood accumulated inside. Some were pale white flesh and some were long intestines. There were even one or two pieces of bones mixed in, either leg bones or ribs. In the corner of the blood pool, there were two fingers and half a toe. Ugh … Mo Yan's beautiful face paled and she took another big step back. Her stomach was boiling and she almost vomited on the spot.

Although she was a Rank two Gu Master and had gone through a lot of training and killed before, this was the first time she had seen such a disgusting scene. The flesh and blood in the box was obviously a human corpse that was cut up and stuffed inside. A strong stench of blood instantly filled the entire study room. The servant's hands were trembling and his face was deathly pale. Although he had seen this box and vomited, he still felt waves of fear and disgust when he held it. Among the three people in the study room, only Elder Guyue Mo Chen's expression did not change. He glanced at the flesh and blood in the box and said slowly to Mo Yan, "This box was placed by Fang Yuan at the back door of my house this morning." "What, it's really him?!" Mo Yan was shocked and couldn't help but think of Fang Yuan's image. The first time she saw Fang Yuan was at the inn. At that time, Fang Yuan was sitting by the window, eating quietly. His face was ordinary, his eyes were dark, his body was thin, and his skin was pale like a teenager's. He was obviously such an ordinary and quiet teenager, but he actually did such a perverted and crazy thing! After the shock came anger. Mo Yan shouted, "This Fang Yuan is too arrogant, he must have eaten a leopard's guts! He actually dared to do this, this is a provocation to our Mo family! I'll go over now and bring him here for questioning!! "She was about to walk out. "Scoundrel, stop right there!" Gu Yue Mo Chen was even angrier than her, casually grabbing a piece of inkstone on the table and throwing it out. The hard and heavy inkstone hit Mo Yan's shoulder and fell to the ground with a bang. "Grandpa!" Mo Yan held her shoulder and cried out. Guyue Mo Chen stood up and pointed at his granddaughter. He said agitatedly, "It seems that all these years of training have been in vain. You really disappoint me! To deal with a small Rank one initial stage Gu Master, not only did you mobilize so many people, you were also led by the nose by the opponent.

Now you've been blinded by anger. Do you still understand the meaning of Fang Yuan's actions? " "What meaning?" Mo Yan was confused. Guyue Mo Chen snorted, "If Fang Yuan wanted to provoke us and make a big deal out of this, why didn't he place this box at the front door where people come and go? Why did he place it at the back door?" "Could it be that he wants to reconcile? No, if he wants to reconcile, wouldn't it be better to apologize in person? Why did he send this box of dismembered corpses? This is a provocation! "Mo Yan said. Guyue Mo Chen shook his head and nodded, "He wants to reconcile, but it is indeed a provocation. He placed the wooden box at the back door to reconcile. Putting dismembered corpses in the wooden box is a provocation. " "Look." The old man pointed at the box. "This wooden box is not big, it can't contain a complete corpse. So there is only a part of the corpse inside. He wants to tell us that he doesn't want to make a big deal out of this and wants to keep the peace. But if the Mo family still doesn't let this go, he will throw the rest of the dismembered corpses at the front door and make a big deal out of this. When that happens, it will be a lose-lose situation. The whole family will know that the Mo family broke the rules first, and that the future leader of the Mo family is actually so weak that he needs to be pampered and protected by the elders. " When Mo Yan heard this, she was momentarily stunned. She had never expected that Fang Yuan's move would have such a deep meaning. "This is a brilliant move," Guyue Mo Chen sighed, "It is just a move, but it is a combination of strength and gentleness, and he knows when to advance and when to retreat. This simple wooden box not only shows Fang Yuan's intention to compromise, but it is also his threat to the Mo family. Unfortunately, he has really grasped our Achilles heel.

If the Mo family's reputation is damaged because of this, the Chi family will rise in revolt, and the family head will attack us. " Mo Yan did not believe in this. She said, "Grandpa, aren't you overestimating him? He's only fifteen years old. " "Overestimating?" Mo Chen looked at his granddaughter unhappily. "It seems that you have been used to having a smooth life all these years, and you have developed an arrogant habit. You can't see reality clearly. This Fang Yuan was calm in the face of danger, and he tricked you into entering the school. Then, he was quick-witted and hid in the dormitory to avoid trouble. He allowed you to insult him, but he did not try to be brave. This is tolerance and calmness. After you left, he immediately killed Gao Wan. This is determination and bravery. Now, he sent this box. This is obviously a clever plan. Don't you think I overestimated him? " Mo Yan was stunned. She really did not expect her grandpa to admire Fang Yuan so much. She immediately said, unconvinced, "Grandpa, he is only a C-grade." Guyue Mo Chen stroked his beard and sighed. "Yes, he is only a C-grade. He has such wisdom, but he is only a C-grade. It is a pity. If his aptitude is a little higher, and he is a B-grade, he will definitely be the future leader of the Guyue family. Unfortunately, he is only a C-grade. " The old man's sigh was full of emotion.

He seemed to be regretting, but also rejoicing. Mo Yan was silent. She could not help but think of Fang Yuan's image again. Under her psychological influence, Fang Yuan's originally weak and scholarly face was now shrouded in a layer of sinister and dangerous shadow. "You're the one who caused this. How do you think we should deal with it? "Guyue Mo Chen suddenly broke the silence and started to test Mo Yan. Mo Yan thought for a while, then said with a cold tone, "Gao Wan is just a slave. It is fine if he dies. Fang Yuan is only a C-grade, so it is a small matter. The key is to protect the Mo family's reputation. In order to settle this matter, we might as well kill Gao Wan's entire family to show the whole family that we uphold the rules. " "Yes, it is good that you can look at the big picture and temporarily put aside your personal feelings to protect the family's interests. However, this way of dealing with it is not appropriate. "Guyue Mo Chen stroked his beard and commented. "Please instruct me, Grandpa." Mo Yan bowed. Guyue Mo Chen thought for a while and said, "This matter was caused by you, so Grandpa will punish you by confinement for seven days. From now on, don't cause trouble for Fang Yuan. Gao Wan offended his superior, and a slave offended his master. He deserves to die. He should be punished! Because he is a slave of the Mo family, the Mo family is also responsible for not disciplining him properly. Compensate Fang Yuan with 30 Yuan stone. As for Gao Wan's family, give them 50 Yuan stone as an allowance, then kick them out of the mansion. " He paused for a while and said, "For the next seven days, rest well at home and don't go out. At the same time, think about Grandpa's intentions in dealing with this matter.

" "Yes, Grandpa."
S-REV-050.summary: Guyue Mo Chen furiously chastises Mo Yan for instigating the conflict with Fang Yuan, reminding her of the clan's rules. A servant then delivers a wooden box containing Gao Wan's dismembered body, horrifying Mo Yan. Guyue Mo Chen, however, calms his granddaughter, strategically analyzing Fang Yuan's act as a nuanced message of both provocation and compromise, designed to protect his reputation while threatening the Mo family. He then punishes Mo Yan and resolves the matter by compensating Fang Yuan and displacing Gao Wan's family to protect the clan's image.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan gains a deeper understanding of the 'rules' governing the world's social and natural order, equating it to the Ren Zu legend.
Fang Yuan confirms his status as a 'chess piece' in the current game but believes his past life experience makes him a 'chess player' who understands the rules.
Fang Yuan deduces Guyue Mo Chen's underlying fear of elders interfering in younger generations' fights, specifically concerning his grandson, Guyue Mo Bei, which leads him to uphold the rules.
The Old Man recounts the legend of Ren Zu and the Hope Gu to his grandson.
Gao Wan was killed by Fang Yuan, and his death is used by Fang Yuan as part of a strategic message to the Mo family.
Fang Yuan believes Guyue Mo Chen will interpret the delivery of Gao Wan's dismembered corpse as both a compromise and a threat, leading the Mo family not to pursue Gao Wan's death.
Mo Yan previously caused trouble for Fang Yuan, which Fang Yuan now interprets as 'breaking the rules'.
Guyue Mo Bei is identified by Fang Yuan as a potential vulnerability for Guyue Mo Chen, whose safety motivates the elder to uphold social rules.
One of the hundred thousand mountains in Southern Border, home to Guyue village.
Known for deep, serene forests, steep cliffs, fierce beasts, and strange Gu worms, making travel difficult for mortals.

S-REV-051.prose:
Chapter 38 In the sky, there were layers of dark clouds, and the spring rain continued to fall. The rain was as thin as a cow's hair, and as it fell, Qing Mao Mountain was covered in a thin layer of smoke. The first floor of the inn's dining hall was still deserted, with only four tables of guests. Fang Yuan sat by the window, and a gust of wind blew, carrying with it a poetic and floral scent. "The light rain on the heavenly street is soft, the color of the grass is nowhere to be seen." Fang Yuan looked at the window, softly muttering, before retracting his gaze. The table in front of him was filled with good wine and dishes, all looking and smelling good. Especially the Green Bamboo Wine, the fragrance of the wine was mellow and fresh. The dark green wine quietly sat in the bamboo cup, and from this angle, it gave off a warm amber luster. The table closest to him was the grandfather and grandson. They were dressed in plain clothes, and were both mortals. The old man drank the rice wine while looking at Fang Yuan with envy. He was obviously attracted by the green bamboo wine, but did not have the money to buy it. His grandson was eating the braised beans, making crunching sounds in his mouth. At the same time, he was pestering his grandfather, shaking the old man's arm, "Grandfather, grandfather, tell me the story of Ren Zu. If you don't, I'll go back and tell grandma that you came out to steal wine! " "Sigh, I can't even eat in peace." The old man sighed, but his face showed a loving expression. He used his bony hand to touch his grandson's head, "Then I'll tell you. It is said that Ren Zu gave his heart to the Hope Gu, and escaped from the trap … " The story of Ren Zu, was the world's most widespread, and also the oldest legend. The old man's story was roughly like this. It was said that Ren Zu escaped from the trap because of hope. But he was old, without strength and intelligence, and could not continue hunting. Even his teeth had fallen out, and he could not chew on many wild fruits and vegetables. Ren Zu could already feel death approaching. At this time, the Hope Gu told him, "Human, you cannot die.

If you die, your heart will be gone, and my hope will lose its home. " Ren Zu was helpless, "Who wants to die, but heaven and earth want me to die, I have no choice." Hope Gu said: "Everything has hope. As long as you grab the lifespan Gu, you will gain a new lifespan. " Ren Zu had already heard of the existence of lifespan Gu, but he shrugged helplessly: "When lifespan Gu is still, no one can sense it. When it flies, it is faster than light. How could I possibly catch it? This is too difficult! " The Hope Gu told Ren Zu a secret: "Humans, never give up hope. Let me tell you, in the northwest corner of the earth, there is a huge mountain. There was a cave at the top of the mountain. There were two Gu worms, one round and one square, living in the cave. As long as you can subdue these two Gu worms, there is no Gu in the world that you cannot capture, even lifespan Gu is no exception! " Ren Zu was already at his wit's end, and this was his only hope. He spent a lot of effort to find this mountain. Then, he braved countless dangers and climbed to the top of the mountain. At the entrance of the cave at the top of the mountain, he staggered in with his last bit of strength. The cave was so dark that Ren Zu could not even see his own fingers. Ren Zu walked and walked in the darkness. From time to time, he would bump into something, causing his head to bleed. From time to time, he felt that this darkness was vast and boundless, as if it was another world, and other than himself, there was nothing around him. He spent a lot of time, but could not walk out of this boundless darkness. Not to mention subduing the two round and square Gu worms. Just as he was in a daze, two voices came from the darkness. One said: "Oh human, you also want to capture us? Go back, even if you have strength Gu, it is impossible.

" The other voice said: "Oh human, go back, we will not take your life. Even with wisdom Gu's help, you may not be able to find us. " Ren Zu fell on the ground powerlessly, gasping for breath: "Strength Gu and wisdom Gu have left me long ago, I do not have much lifespan left, I have nowhere else to go. But as long as there is a trace of hope in my heart, I will not give up! " Hearing Ren Zu's words, the two voices became silent. After a while, they said: "I understand, human, you have already given your heart to the Hope Gu. You are saying that you will not give up no matter what. " The other voice continued: "Since that is the case, we will give you a chance. As long as you say our names, we will be yours to use. " Ren Zu was stunned, trying to find two accurate names from the sea of words was like looking for a needle in a haystack. Moreover, he did not even know how many words were in the names of these two Gu. Ren Zu quickly asked the Hope Gu, but the Hope Gu did not know either. Ren Zu had no other way out, he could only bite the bullet and say the names. He said many names, spending a long time, but there was no response from the darkness, he had clearly called the wrong names. Gradually, Ren Zu's aura became weaker, in this cave, he went from an old man to an old man. It was like the evening sun was gradually setting, half of it had already fallen into the horizon, becoming the setting sun. The food he brought with him became less and less, his mind moved slower and slower, and he did not have much strength to speak. The voice in the darkness urged: "Oh human, you are dying, let us let you go. You can use your last moments to crawl out of the cave and take a last look at this world. But you have offended us, as punishment, leave the Hope Gu here to accompany us. " Ren Zu tightly held his chest, resolutely rejecting: "Even if I die, I will not give up hope!" The Hope Gu was moved, it used all its strength to respond to Ren Zu, letting out a pure white light. Around Ren Zu's chest, specks of white light appeared. But this white light was too weak, it could not light up the darkness, it could not even cover Ren Zu's entire body, it could only light up his chest. Ren Zu, on the other hand, felt a new formless strength, entering his body from the Hope Gu. He continued to speak, saying the names.

He was already muddle-headed, there were many names that he had said before, but he could not remember them clearly, saying them again wasted a lot of effort. His life flowed with time, Ren Zu did not have much time left. Finally, when he only had one day left to live, he said the word "Ju". A sigh came from the darkness, a voice said: "Oh human, I admire your perseverance. You said my name, from today onwards, I will listen to your orders. But I can only be together with my brothers, to capture all the Gu worms in the world for you. Otherwise, with just my Gu, it is not enough. So give up, you are already on the verge of death, you might as well make use of this world, take a last look at it. " Ren Zu, however, shook his head resolutely, he made use of his time and continued to speak, guessing the other Gu worm's name. Time ticked by, and he only had one hour left. But at this time, he unintentionally said the word "Ju". In an instant, the darkness disappeared. Two Gu appeared in front of him. Just like what the Hope Gu said, one Gu was square, it was called "Ju". The other Gu was round, it was called "Gui". Together, it was called "Rules". The two Gu spoke together: "No matter who it is, as long as they know our names, we will listen to them. Oh human, since you already know our names, we will be used by you. But you must remember, it is best not to let other living beings know our names. The more that know our names, we will have to subdue them all at once. Now, you are the first person to subdue us, tell us your request. " Ren Zu was overjoyed: "Then I order you to capture a lifespan Gu for me." Rules and Rules Gu worked together and captured an eighty year lifespan Gu. Ren Zu was already a hundred years old, after eating this lifespan Gu, the wrinkles on his face disappeared, his skinny limbs were filled with healthy muscles, and the aura of youth was once again emitted. He jumped up like a carp doing a somersault. He joyfully looked at his own body, knowing that he had once again become a twenty year old youth!

… "We will stop here for today, let's go home, my good grandson." The old man finished his story and finished his wine. "Grandpa, continue, what happened to Ren Zu afterwards?" The grandson did not give up, shaking the old man's arm. "Let's go, we will talk when we have time." The old man wore a conical hat and a raincoat, and put a small one on his grandson. The grandfather and grandson left the inn and walked into the rain, gradually getting further away. "Rules …" Fang Yuan's gaze was eerie, he swirled the wine cup and looked at the green bamboo wine in the cup, feeling emotional. The legend of Ren Zu was widely spread in this world, almost no one did not know of it. Fang Yuan had naturally heard of it long ago. But whether it was a legend or a story, the benevolent saw benevolence and the wise saw wisdom. Earlier, the grandfather and grandson had only treated it as a story, but Fang Yuan could sense the deeper meaning behind it. Like that Ren Zu. When he did not know the rules, he would fumble around in the darkness. Sometimes, he would stumble around, bumping into things, getting injured and in a sorry state. Sometimes, it would be a vast expanse, falling into confusion, with no direction or goal. This darkness was not pure darkness or darkness, strength, wisdom and hope could not restrain it. Only when Ren Zu knew the 'rules', and said the name of the rules, did the darkness disappear, and Ren Zu welcomed light. The darkness was the darkness of rules, and this light was also the light of rules. Fang Yuan moved his gaze away from the wine cup and looked outside the window. Far away outside the window, the sky was dark and gloomy, the green mountains were endless, and the drizzle was like fog. Nearby, tall bamboo buildings appeared one after another, extending outwards. On the road, there were two or three pedestrians, their feet wet and muddy from the rain. If they were not wearing grey-green clothes, they were carrying yellow umbrellas. Fang Yuan concluded in his heart, "This world is like a big chessboard, all living beings are chess pieces, moving according to their own rules. The four seasons have rules, spring, summer, autumn and winter cycle in order.

The water has rules, flowing to the bottom. The heat has rules, rising to the top. Humans naturally have rules. " "Everyone has their own standpoint, and principles. Take Guyue village for example, the lives of servants are cheap, but the lives of the masters are precious, this is the rule. Thus, Shen Cui wanted to climb up to the nobles, and racked her brains to get rid of her slave status. Gao Wan tried every possible way to win the favor of the masters, relying on his master's power. " "Towards uncle and aunt, he was greedy, wanting to swallow up his parents' inheritance. The academy elders mainly nurture Gu Masters, and maintain their own position in the academy. " "Everyone has their own rules, every industry has its own rules, and every social group has their own rules. As long as one understands the rules, they can see the situation clearly. Get rid of the darkness and obtain the light, and deal with it with ease. " Fang Yuan thought of his own situation, and already had a plan in his heart, "To the Mo family's leader, Guyue Mo Chen, it is to protect the family's prosperity and benefits. Mo Yan looking for trouble with me is already breaking the rules, and to protect the family's reputation, he will definitely not make a move on me. He might even take the initiative to compensate me. " "Actually, the Mo family is strong, and with their damaged reputation, they want to punish me, and I will not be able to resist. But Guyue Mo Chen was afraid. He was not afraid that he would break the rules, but worried that others would follow him and start to break the rules. In a fight between the younger generation, if the elders interfered, the situation would escalate, and if it involved the higher-ups, it would be a huge threat to the whole village. What Guyue Mo Chen was afraid of was that in future fights, others would lay their hands on his grandson, Guyue Mo Bei. In his family, he only has one son, and if he dies, what should he do? This kind of fear, perhaps even he himself does not know. He just subconsciously wants to maintain the rules. " Fang Yuan's eyes were clear, and he was clear about this matter from beginning to end. Gao Wan was not Guyue, so he was an outsider, a servant. What was the big deal if the master executed a servant?

In this world, there were many normal things. Fang Yuan had killed Gao Wan. Gao Wan's death was not the key, the key was his master, the Mo family behind him. "But this time, I sent a box of dismembered corpses. I guess Guyue Mo Chen will interpret it as a compromise and a threat. This is what I want him to understand. If nothing goes wrong, the Mo family will not pursue the matter of Gao Wan's death. Of course, if my aptitude is a grade higher, like a B grade, the Mo family will feel threatened, and even if their reputation is damaged, they will suppress me, this future threat. "Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart. Strength can be relied on, weakness can also be used. Although Fang Yuan was currently in the game, he was also a chess piece. But he was well-versed in the rules, and had the heart of a chess player. Ordinary people were mostly like Guyue Mo Chen or the academy elder, and they only knew their own rules. Different professions were worlds apart. Like Fang Yuan, who could see the big picture and was well-versed in the rules, it was extremely difficult! To know the rules, one had to be like Ren Zu, struggling in the dark, and wandering around in confusion. At this time, strength, wisdom, and hope were not very useful. He had to spend time and experience it for himself in order to gain experience. Ren Zu was able to say the names of the Gu, Rules, and Gu, because he spent time and tried countless times under the shroud of death. Fang Yuan was well-versed in the rules because of his 500 years of experience in his previous life. Since his rebirth, he was confident that he could create a glorious future. Not because of the Spring Autumn Cicada's reappearance, not because he knew many treasures in the mystic realms, and not because he had a grasp of the general direction of the future. Instead, it was the life experience he had accumulated over the five hundred years of his previous life. Just like Ren Zu, who mastered the Gu, could easily capture all the insects in the world! And Fang Yuan, who was well-versed in the rules and regulations, could look down from above, and see through the complicated affairs of the world. Or he could delve into a cocoon, or hit the nail on the head.

I am proud and arrogant, coldly looking at the people of the world like chess pieces, following their own rules and moving forward step by step. Darkness is the darkness of the rules, and light is the light of the rules. And the reborn demon is already walking in the light. ================================================== Chapter 39 May, was the transition between spring and summer. The fragrance of flowers pervaded the air, and the mountains were green. The sun began to gradually show its warm side. Under the clear blue sky, white clouds floated like cotton. On Qing Mao Mountain, the bamboo forest was still as straight as a spear, pointing towards the sky. Weeds grew wildly everywhere, and unknown wildflowers dotted the grass. When the wind blew, the weeds moved up and down, and the strong smell of pollen and grass assaulted one's senses. Halfway up the mountain, there were large numbers of terraced fields. Layer by layer, step by step, tender green wheat seedlings were planted, and from afar, it looked like a green sea. There were many farmers in the terraced fields, busy working. Some were cleaning the canals to divert water, while others rolled up their trousers and stood in the fields to plant seedlings. These people were naturally mortals with other surnames, as Guyue's clansmen did not engage in such lowly work. Ding ding ding … The sound of camel bells could be faintly heard in the spring wind. The farmers straightened their bodies, turning their heads towards the foot of the mountain. Only to see a caravan, like a colourful long worm, slowly peeking out from the mountain path. "It's a caravan!" "Yes, it's already May, the caravan should be here by now." The adults understood in their hearts. The naughty children gave up playing with the water and the mud in their hands, skipping towards the caravan. Southern Border had a hundred thousand mountains, and Qing Mao Mountain was just one of them. Every mountain was inhabited by a village, and the people maintained the village with their blood and kinship. Between the mountains, the forests were deep and serene, with steep cliffs and steep cliffs. The environment was complex, with large numbers of fierce beasts and strange Gu worms.
S-REV-051.summary: Sitting in a deserted inn, Fang Yuan observes an old man telling his grandson the legend of Ren Zu. This prompts Fang Yuan to deeply reflect on the 'rules' that govern the world, seeing them as a chessboard upon which all beings move. He applies this philosophy to his recent actions, analyzing Guyue Mo Chen's likely motivations regarding Gao Wan's death, and solidifies his conviction that his past life experience gives him an unparalleled advantage in navigating these rules.

continuityMutations.content: Jia Fu is revealed to be a Rank four Gu Master and the leader of the caravan.
Jia Fu explains the caravan's delay, citing encounters with dark blood bats and the mountain fog on Precipice Mountain.
Guyue Bo personally greets Jia Fu, recognizing the importance of proper protocol for a Rank four Gu Master.
Inhabited by the Guyue clan, whose members do not engage in lowly labor like farming.
Relies on caravans for trade, especially for a year's worth of income.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked with the flow of people from the village into the temporary market area.

S-REV-052.prose:
I am proud and arrogant, coldly looking at the people of the world like chess pieces, following their own rules and moving forward step by step. Darkness is the darkness of the rules, and light is the light of the rules. And the reborn demon is already walking in the light. ================================================== Chapter 39 May, was the transition between spring and summer. The fragrance of flowers pervaded the air, and the mountains were green. The sun began to gradually show its warm side. Under the clear blue sky, white clouds floated like cotton. On Qing Mao Mountain, the bamboo forest was still as straight as a spear, pointing towards the sky. Weeds grew wildly everywhere, and unknown wildflowers dotted the grass. When the wind blew, the weeds moved up and down, and the strong smell of pollen and grass assaulted one's senses. Halfway up the mountain, there were large numbers of terraced fields. Layer by layer, step by step, tender green wheat seedlings were planted, and from afar, it looked like a green sea. There were many farmers in the terraced fields, busy working. Some were cleaning the canals to divert water, while others rolled up their trousers and stood in the fields to plant seedlings. These people were naturally mortals with other surnames, as Guyue's clansmen did not engage in such lowly work. Ding ding ding … The sound of camel bells could be faintly heard in the spring wind. The farmers straightened their bodies, turning their heads towards the foot of the mountain. Only to see a caravan, like a colourful long worm, slowly peeking out from the mountain path. "It's a caravan!" "Yes, it's already May, the caravan should be here by now." The adults understood in their hearts. The naughty children gave up playing with the water and the mud in their hands, skipping towards the caravan. Southern Border had a hundred thousand mountains, and Qing Mao Mountain was just one of them. Every mountain was inhabited by a village, and the people maintained the village with their blood and kinship. Between the mountains, the forests were deep and serene, with steep cliffs and steep cliffs. The environment was complex, with large numbers of fierce beasts and strange Gu worms.

Mortals could not pass through at all. If a single person wanted to pass through these obstacles, they would need to be at least a Rank three Gu Master. Thus, the economy was in decline, and trade was difficult. The main form of trade was the caravan. Only by forming such a large scale caravan could Gu Masters form groups, and have the ability to help each other, overcoming the difficulties on the way, and travel from one mountain to another. The arrival of the caravan was like a bowl of boiling water, suddenly pouring into the calm and peaceful Qing Mao Mountain. "In the past, they came in April, but this year, it's May. But he's finally here. "The innkeeper heaved a sigh of relief when he heard the news. The inn's business was extremely slow in other months. They could only count on the arrival of the merchant caravan to bring them a year's worth of income. At the same time, he still had some Green Bamboo Wine in his inventory, which he could sell to the caravans. Not only the inns, but the taverns' business would also flourish. The caravan entered Guyue's village one after another. The one in the lead was a Treasure Brass Toad. The toad was two and a half meters tall and had an orange-yellow body. Its back was broad and thick, and it was covered in warts and bumps, like the huge copper rivets on ancient city gates. On the back of the Treasure Brass Toad, a large pile of goods was secured with thick ropes. At first glance, it looked like the Treasure Toad was carrying a huge bag. A middle-aged man with a round, pockmarked face and a round belly was sitting cross-legged on the head of the treasure toad. His eyes narrowed into slits as he smiled and cupped his fists to greet the Guyue villagers around him. This person's name was Jia Fu, and he had Rank four cultivation. He was the leader of this caravan. The Treasure Toad hopped forward, and Jia Fu sat on the toad's head steadily. When he hopped, his height was level with the window of the second floor. Even if he landed, he would be higher than the first floor of the bamboo buildings.

The originally spacious street suddenly seemed narrow. The Treasure Brass Toad was like a monster that charged into the forest of bamboo buildings. After the Treasure Toad was a big fat bug. Its eyes were like stained glass windows, bright and colorful. It was fifteen meters long, and its body resembled a silkworm. But its surface was covered with a thick layer of black glazed leather armor. The leather armor was also piled with goods, tied with hemp ropes. In the gaps between the goods, Gu Masters were sitting, some old and some young. There were also mortals, all of them strong and healthy martial artists, following the black skin fat beetle as it slowly moved forward. After the fat beetle, there was an ostrich with colorful feathers, a hairy mountain spider, a winged snake with two wings and so on. But these were only the minority, and most of them were toads. These toads were similar to the Treasure Brass Toad, just that they were slightly smaller, about the size of a cow or horse. They carried goods and people, their bellies bulging as they hopped forward. The caravan zigzagged deep into the village. Along the way, the children opened their eyes wide, looking curiously, cheering and exclaiming. The windows of the second floor opened one by one, and the villagers observed closely. Some of their eyes shone with fear, while some waved their hands to express their warm welcome. "Brother Jia, you are a little late this year, it must have been hard on you." Guyue Bo used his status as the tribe leader to personally welcome the leader of this caravan. Jia Fu was a Rank four Gu Master, if a Rank three clan elder was in charge of receiving him, it would undoubtedly be a form of neglect and contempt. Jia Fu cupped his fists, sighing: "This year was not smooth sailing, we met a group of dark blood bats on the way, and lost many experts. And on Precipice Mountain, we met the mountain fog, and really did not dare to go. Thus, we delayed a lot of time. Sorry for making Brother Guyue wait. " His tone was very polite. Guyue village needed the caravan to trade every year, and the caravan also needed harmony to make money.

"Hehehe, it's good that you can come. Please, the tribe has already prepared food and wine, let me welcome you. "Guyue Bo extended his hand in invitation. "Tribe leader is too polite, too polite." Jia Fu acted as if he was overwhelmed by the favor. The caravan arrived at Qing Mao mountain in the morning, and camped at Guyue village in the afternoon. By evening, the surroundings of the village had formed a large area of temporary shops. All sorts of red, blue, yellow and green tents were set up, and in between the tents, there were also countless small stalls. Night had fallen, but the place was still ablaze with lights. An endless stream of people poured into this place from the village. There were mortals, and also Gu Masters. The children were jumping around in joy, and the adults also had a joyous expression as if they were celebrating a festival. Fang Yuan followed the flow of people, walking in and out of the tents. The crowd was bustling, surrounding the stalls in groups, or moving in and out of the tents. The surroundings were filled with shouts of hawking. "Come, come, come, let's take a look. High quality blue sea cloud tea, drinking this tea makes one feel as happy as a deity! Even if people don't drink it, feeding the tea Gu is also cheap and delicious. One piece only costs five Yuan stone! " "Brute Strength Longhorn Beetle Gu, when activated by a Gu Master, it can increase the strength of a bull. Don't miss it! " "Intimate Grass, high quality Intimate Grass, look at the quality, it's as fresh as if it was just picked. Two Yuan stone per catty, what a cheap price … " Fang Yuan heard this, and his footsteps paused, looking towards the source of the sound. He saw an ostrich pulling a two-wheeled cart. On the cart was a pile of pink green grass. Every blade of grass was a meter long, very slender, and on average only the width of a fingernail.
S-REV-052.summary: A caravan, led by the Rank four Gu Master Jia Fu, finally arrives at Guyue Village, generating excitement among the villagers and relief for the innkeeper. Jia Fu explains their delay was due to encounters with fierce dark blood bats and mountain fog, highlighting the dangers of travel. Guyue Bo personally greets Jia Fu, observing proper protocol. By evening, a bustling temporary market of tents and stalls is set up, drawing crowds of both mortals and Gu Masters.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan calculates his current Yuan stone wealth, factoring in fines, compensation, robberies, and daily expenses, totaling ninety-eight Yuan stones.
Fang Yuan prioritizes finding the Mudskin Toad, believing it will lead to significant profit, and avoids smaller gains that might distract him.
Fang Yuan acknowledges that his brutal actions have instilled fear in other students, making further robbery easier.

S-REV-053.prose:
"Hehehe, it's good that you can come. Please, the tribe has already prepared food and wine, let me welcome you. "Guyue Bo extended his hand in invitation. "Tribe leader is too polite, too polite." Jia Fu acted as if he was overwhelmed by the favor. The caravan arrived at Qing Mao mountain in the morning, and camped at Guyue village in the afternoon. By evening, the surroundings of the village had formed a large area of temporary shops. All sorts of red, blue, yellow and green tents were set up, and in between the tents, there were also countless small stalls. Night had fallen, but the place was still ablaze with lights. An endless stream of people poured into this place from the village. There were mortals, and also Gu Masters. The children were jumping around in joy, and the adults also had a joyous expression as if they were celebrating a festival. Fang Yuan followed the flow of people, walking in and out of the tents. The crowd was bustling, surrounding the stalls in groups, or moving in and out of the tents. The surroundings were filled with shouts of hawking. "Come, come, come, let's take a look. High quality blue sea cloud tea, drinking this tea makes one feel as happy as a deity! Even if people don't drink it, feeding the tea Gu is also cheap and delicious. One piece only costs five Yuan stone! " "Brute Strength Longhorn Beetle Gu, when activated by a Gu Master, it can increase the strength of a bull. Don't miss it! " "Intimate Grass, high quality Intimate Grass, look at the quality, it's as fresh as if it was just picked. Two Yuan stone per catty, what a cheap price … " Fang Yuan heard this, and his footsteps paused, looking towards the source of the sound. He saw an ostrich pulling a two-wheeled cart. On the cart was a pile of pink green grass. Every blade of grass was a meter long, very slender, and on average only the width of a fingernail.

Some of the grass even had heart-shaped flower buds at the tip. Intimate Grass was one of the supplementary food for Gu worms, and its value was that it could be paired with some food to feed Gu worms. For example, when Fang Yuan fed the Moonlight Gu, he needed to feed it two flower petals for every meal. If he mixed in a Intimate Grass, the Moonlight Gu would be full after eating a moon orchid petal. Intimate Grass was only two Yuan stone per catty, and every ten moon orchid petals were one Yuan stone. With a little calculation, he knew that mixing in the Intimate Grass to feed the Gu worms was more cost-effective. "Half a month ago, I killed Gao Wan, and because I used the Moonlight Gu in the academy, I was fined thirty Yuan stone. But the Mo family compensated me with thirty Yuan stones, so it's not considered a loss. These days, I robbed twice, totaling a total of 118 Yuan stone. But recently, I have been constantly using the refined middle stage primeval essence to nourish the four walls of my aperture. Every day, I have to use three Yuan stone. In addition to the Gu worm's feeding costs, my own living expenses, and the Yuan stone that I continuously invested to buy green bamboo wine. I still have ninety-eight Yuan stones in my hands. " Ever since Fang Yuan killed someone, his cruel and cold image was deeply ingrained in the students' hearts, and for a while, no one dared to challenge him. This made robbing much easier. Every time, only a small number of people dared to go against him. Fang Yuan calculated in his heart, and shifted his gaze, continuing to walk deeper into the temporary shop area. At the Intimate Grass stall, a group of people surrounded it. They were all Gu Masters or students, holding Yuan stone in their hands, fighting to buy it. It was not that Fang Yuan did not have the money to buy this Intimate Grass, but he did not have the time. "If I remember correctly, that Mudskin Toad is in that shop. In my previous life, there was a Gu Master who gambled on it on the first night, and thus made a huge profit. I have to hurry, I can't lose the big picture because of a small gain.
S-REV-053.summary: Fang Yuan navigates the bustling temporary market, observing various stalls selling Gu-related items like tea, Gu worms, and Intimate Grass. He pauses to calculate his finances, noting his current Yuan stone balance after factoring in fines, compensation, robberies, and daily expenses. Despite the desirability of Intimate Grass, he prioritizes finding the Mudskin Toad, recalling a past life memory of a significant gambling opportunity, and decides not to be distracted by smaller gains.

continuityMutations.content: His memory of a specific purple-gold fossil containing a Mudskin Toad found in this gambling den.
His strategic calculation of primeval stone reserves before making a gamble.
Her initial assessment of Fang Yuan as a 'student' and 'newbie' gambler.
Remembers working in a gambling den in his previous life, managing one larger than this, and understanding its workings, including how to cheat and how he lost Gu worms himself.
Vaguely recalls a specific instance of someone finding a Mudskin Toad in a purple-gold fossil in this particular gambling den on the first night of the caravan's arrival.
Starts with 98 primeval stones, spends 60, and ends with 538 after selling the Mudskin Toad.
Calculates his primeval stone reserves to ensure he has enough for basic living and Gu worm sustenance before gambling.
Demonstrates advanced control over Moonlight Gu, using its blue light to precisely grind stone, a skill usually achieved after 2-3 years of use.
Refines the newly unsealed Mudskin Toad, demonstrating the process of absorbing a dormant Gu into one's service.
Displays detailed knowledge of the Mudskin Toad's rarity, feeding requirements, and market value, using it to counter Jia Jin Sheng's attempts to devalue it.
Successfully leverages his 'Guyue' clan affiliation and the presence of other Gu Masters to deter Jia Jin Sheng from a forceful acquisition.
Assesses Fang Yuan as a student based on his appearance and age, and incorrectly assumes he is a 'newbie' gambler.
Expertly guides Fang Yuan through the gambling den's options, provides encouragement, and attempts to console him when he finds empty stones.
Is utterly shocked and excited when Fang Yuan unearths a living Mudskin Toad, an event she has never witnessed despite her experience.
Believes Fang Yuan is a 'rich young master' due to his spending and demeanor, and hopes to curry favor with him.
Initially dismiss Fang Yuan as a 'newbie' or 'hothead' due to his youth and perceived recklessness in stone gambling.
Gain a new level of respect for Fang Yuan after witnessing his precise use of the Moonlight Gu.
Are angered by Jia Jin Sheng's attempt to strong-arm a Guyue clan member (Fang Yuan) in a public setting.
React with disbelief, shock, and intense envy when Fang Yuan successfully uncovers and refines a living Mudskin Toad.
A place where Gu Masters gamble on sealed Gu worms found within fossilized rocks.
Nine out of ten stones are solid or contain dead Gu worms.
Successful unsealing of a living, rare Gu can lead to immense profit or danger.
Owned and operated by Jia Jin Sheng, who uses spies to identify potential finds and attempts to buy them cheaply.
Rules are generally enforced against forceful buying, especially when clan affiliation is invoked.
Home to the Guyue clan.
Its specific environment (green mud) makes feeding certain Gu worms (like the Mudskin Toad) difficult.

S-REV-054.prose:
Chapter 40
The deeper he went, the more prosperous it was.
There were fewer small stalls and more big tents.
There were red, blue, yellow and green tents. Some were square, some were round.
Some of them had two pillars at the entrance, while others had red lanterns hanging from them.
Some were brightly lit, while others were dark.
Fang Yuan looked around as he walked, and finally stopped in front of a grey tent.
"It's here."
He looked up and saw that there were two pillars at the entrance of the tent. The pillars were engraved with a pair of couplets.
On the left: Show your courage, get the four seasons.
On the right: Show your skills, get wealth in all directions.
In the middle, there was a horizontal line: Luck changes.
That's right, this was a casino.
This casino covered an acre of land, and was already a large tent.
Fang Yuan walked in.
Inside the tent, there were three rows of counters.
On the counters were pieces of amber or fossils.
The small ones were the size of a palm, while the big ones were the size of a basin.
There were also bigger ones, as tall as a person.
Naturally, the counters could not fit them, so they stood on the ground.
Different from the liveliness of the other tents, this place was quiet.
There were Gu Masters in twos and threes standing in front of the counters. Some carefully examined the stones on the counters, some picked up the fossils and rubbed them carefully in their palms, feeling the texture. Some discussed with their companions, and some discussed the price with the shop assistants.
But no matter what they said, they spoke softly, trying not to disturb others.
This was a gambling den.
In this world of Gu, there were all kinds of strange and innumerable Gu.
Gu worms had their own specific food. Without food, Gu worms could only last for a period of time before dying.
But nature was cruel and merciful to life.
If there was a lack of food, Gu worms had a chance of survival.
That was to fall into a deep sleep and seal themselves.
For example, the Moonlight Gu, without the moon orchid petals, might seal itself.
It would shrink its strength as much as possible, like hibernation, falling into the deepest sleep.
At this time, its body would not only dissipate the blue light, but it would also turn from a transparent crystal into a grey stone, covered in a stone shell.
As time passed, the stone shell would become thicker and thicker, turning into a stubborn stone.
Another example was the Liquor worm. If it sealed itself, it would form a white silkworm cocoon.
It would curl up its body and sleep in the cocoon.
Of course, this kind of sealed dormancy did not happen to all Gu worms.
The probability of it happening was very small. Under normal circumstances, Gu worms would not fall asleep but starve to death.
Only a small number of Gu worms would seal themselves under certain circumstances.
Some Gu Masters accidentally obtained these sealed Gu worms on rocks or cocoons, awakening the Gu worms within.
Some of them made a small fortune from this.
Some of them had a meteoric rise, their lives ushering in a turning point.
These situations happened frequently in the Gu Master world, there were often rumors that were true or false, causing people to have wild and fanciful thoughts.
This was the source of the stubborn stones in this gambling den.
Of course, these stones were similar in appearance.
He had to open it to determine if there really was a Gu worm hidden inside.
"For a small scale gambling den like this, nine out of ten stones are solid, and there are no Gu worms inside.
Even if there were Gu worms in the stones, they might not all be living worms. Most of them were dead Gu worms.
But once they bet on a living Gu, under most circumstances, they would make a huge profit.
If the Gu worm is extremely rare, then they would either have a meteoric rise, or they would be killed and robbed. "
Fang Yuan's heart was clear, he was very clear about the workings of this place.
In his previous life, he had joined a caravan and worked as a worker in a gambling den.
After a period of time, he even managed a gambling den that was bigger than this one. It was a medium-sized gambling den.
He had cheated many gamblers, but also made a few mistakes, losing valuable Gu worms to others several times.
Fang Yuan stood at the door for a while, his gaze sweeping around before he slowly walked to the counter on the left.
Behind the counter, there was a shop assistant a few meters apart, there were both men and women.
They had green belts on their waists, they were not mortals, they were all Rank one Gu Masters.
Most of them were initial stage, some were middle stage.
Seeing Fang Yuan come to the counter, a female Gu Master closest to him walked over, a smile on her face as she said softly, "Young master, what Gu do you need?
Every stone on this counter was sold for ten primeval stones.
If it's your first time and you want to gamble a little, you can go to the counter on the right, the rocks there are only selling for five Yuan stone.
If you want excitement, you can go to the higher level counter in front, the rocks there are selling for twenty Yuan stone. "
This was an experienced female Gu Master, she had been working in the gambling den for a long time.
When she saw Fang Yuan come in, from his appearance, age, height and other aspects, she guessed that he was a student.
Those who came to gamble were all Gu Masters, not mortals.
And students could only be considered as reserve Gu Masters, they had just started cultivating and were usually short on money due to feeding their Gu worms, where would they have the spare money to gamble?
Students like this often came in to take a look, to broaden their horizons, and to seek novelty.
Most of them only looked and did not buy, a few with good family backgrounds might buy one to give it a try.
But they usually only bought the cheapest fossils.
Thus, the female Gu Master did not look forward to how many rocks Fang Yuan could buy.
"Let me take a look first." Fang Yuan nodded at her expressionlessly, and then buried his head to look.
In his memory, it should be this counter in this gambling den.
But five hundred years was really too long.
Many things were very blurry, especially the five hundred years of memory, it was a huge storage.
Honestly speaking, Fang Yuan did not remember it very clearly.
He only vaguely remembered that it was in this year, on the first night of the caravan's arrival, there was a lucky person who spent ten Yuan stone to buy a purple gold fossil.
He opened the rock on the spot, and obtained a Mudskin Toad.
Then this Gu Toad was bought by someone, and he earned a lot of Yuan stone.
Fang Yuan looked for a while, his brows slightly furrowing.
On this counter, there were over twenty fossils with purple gold luster.
Which one was hiding the Mudskin Toad?
Every rock here was sold for ten Yuan stone.
Fang Yuan had ninety-eight Yuan stone on him now, and according to this estimation, he could buy at most nine.
But in reality, it could not be calculated like this.
Any risk and gamble had to be considered.
Fang Yuan was no longer that kind of hothead, nor was he a gambler who thought highly of himself.
Those who thought they were favored by fate usually fell under the hands of fate.
"I am alone, without the support of friends and family.
I need to leave some Yuan stone to support my life, and to buy food to feed the Gu Worm. "He calculated slightly, with the basic guarantee, he could buy at most seven fossils.
"This rock is decorated with purple gold, but it is flat like a cake, there is no Mudskin Toad inside."
"This purple gold is dazzling, but it is only the size of a fist.
If there is really a Mudskin Toad inside, it should be at least thirty percent bigger. "
"This purple gold fossil is big, but its surface is extremely smooth, while the Mudskin Toad's rock skin is full of holes.
Obviously not … "
Fang Yuan continued to size it up, eliminating and filtering.
After the Gu Worm was sealed and hibernated, the fossil formed was one, and blocked most of the world's detection methods.
The remaining detection methods were forceful and brutal, and once used, they would kill the dying Gu Worm inside.
Thus, when Gu Masters chose rocks, they could only rely on guessing, experience, luck, and the occasional flash of inspiration.
If not for that, this place would not be called a casino.
Of course, in this world, there were all sorts of strange things, and it was possible that there were some extremely gentle detection methods that could let the Gu Master know if there was a Gu Worm inside the rock.
Fang Yuan had heard of some rumors in his previous life, but after verification, he found that they were all rumors.
Fang Yuan secretly thought, "If there really is such a method, it must be a secret inheritance, and would only be in the hands of an extremely small number of mysterious people."
It would not affect the overall situation of the gambling industry.
It was better around Qing Mao mountain, but the further east one went, the more popular the casinos became.
In the Bai Tou mountain region, every village had a casino.
In some of the larger villages, there were also large casinos.
In the three villages famous for their stone gambling foresight: Boulder village, Ancient Tomb village, and Grey Whale village, there were even larger stone gambling dens.
These three large stone gambling dens each had a history of over a thousand years.
Even now, their business was still booming, and there was an endless stream of gamblers.
There had never been any incidents of them being swept clean.
Right now, the tent that Fang Yuan was in could barely be considered a small scale casino.
But if any other fifteen year old came here, they would definitely be dazzled by all these fossils, and even if they chose a fossil, it would be purely a blind guess.
But Fang Yuan was different.
First of all, he already knew a portion of the answer, so the range of choices was suddenly narrowed to less than thirty.
Of course, from these twenty over fossils, it was not easy to choose the only one.
But Fang Yuan had five hundred years of experience as a foundation. Relying on this solid foundation, he observed for a while, and chose the six purple gold fossils that fit the criteria.
He was eighty percent sure — the Mudskin Toad was sleeping in one of the purple gold fossils!
