S-REV-054.summary: Fang Yuan enters a prosperous gambling den, observing the various sealed 'stubborn stones' and the quiet, focused atmosphere. He recalls his past life's experience and knowledge of such establishments. After being greeted by a Female Gu Master, he feigns casual observation while strategically narrowing down his choices for a specific purple-gold fossil, confident he can find a Mudskin Toad from his vague memories.

continuityMutations.content: His precise and advanced use of the Moonlight Gu to grind stones.
His resilience and calm demeanor in the face of initial failures and public skepticism.
Her growing surprise and changing perception of Fang Yuan.
Their initial dismissal turning into respect for Fang Yuan's skill.

relationshipMutations.type: Shift from disdain to grudging respect

S-REV-055.prose:
Chapter 41
"I want to buy some stones." After choosing his target, Fang Yuan said to the female Gu Master.
"Newbie!" The female Gu Master immediately thought of this.
No matter how bad a gambler is, if they want to buy it, they have to inspect it first.
First observe it carefully, then rub the stone in their hands, feeling the texture and weight of the stone.
After observing it for a while, if they feel something is wrong, the gamblers will give up.
They will not immediately say they want to buy it.
And people like Fang Yuan, who immediately say they want to buy, are undoubtedly newbies who are gambling for the first time.
But although the female Gu Master thought so, her expression did not change, her smile was still like a flower as she softly asked Fang Yuan: "Then which one do you want to choose?"
Fang Yuan pointed, "This one."
The female Gu Master immediately took it out.
Fang Yuan pointed again, "This one."
The female Gu Master was slightly surprised, she did not expect this young man to buy two at once.
"Looks like this young man's gambling habits are more intense." She evaluated in her heart.
But immediately after, Fang Yuan pointed again, "And this one, that one, I'll buy them both."
The female Gu Master was stunned, feeling greatly surprised. She could not help but size up Fang Yuan again.
"Looks like this ordinary looking young man, his family background should be very good.
Otherwise, how can a normal Gu Master have so much spare money? "Thinking of this, the female Gu Master's smile became gentler and friendlier.
She did not expect the young man in front of her to be a customer.
This was an unexpected surprise.
But Fang Yuan surprised the female Gu Master again. He pointed to the furthest purple gold stone, "Right, and the two over there."
The female Gu Master's heart couldn't help but be slightly shocked, "Which Gu Yue village's rich young master is this?
He seems to be the successor of a branch family.
If I can get close to him, maybe I won't have to stay here, and work so hard as a shop assistant. "
Thinking of this, the female Gu Master's smile became even gentler, even her gaze towards Fang Yuan had a hint of charm.
Six stones, placed in front of Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan took out sixty Yuan stone and handed it to the female Gu Master without hesitation.
His action of paying the bill immediately attracted the attention of other Gu Masters in the tent.
"Hmm?
Someone is starting to gamble on stones. "
"We watched for more than an hour, but we didn't dare to make a move.
Now that someone is testing the waters, it's good to see. "
"He's just a student. To be able to take out 60 pieces of Yuan stone in one go, he must be quite wealthy.
Looks like he's a real hothead. Hmph, is stone gambling that easy to gamble?
I'm going to hit my head hard today. "
The Gu Masters stood on the spot, discussing softly as they looked at Fang Yuan.
"Sir, do you want to open the stone on the spot?
Our casino will open the stone for you for free. "The female Gu Master gently suggested, her eyes sending flirtatious glances.
Fang Yuan glanced around with the corner of his eyes, and an inexplicable smile appeared on his lips.
He waved his hand, rejecting the female Gu Master: "Purple gold is my lucky colour, this is my first time gambling on rocks, it has great significance.
I want to open the stone myself! "
The female Gu Master's eyes shone brighter, thinking: Such heroism, he is indeed a rich young master.
She would never have thought that Fang Yuan could be said to have no relatives or friends in the Guyue village. He was like duckweed, without any backing, and had to rely on himself for everything.
"Tsk, so what if you have money?"
"I wonder which rascal is it, wasting his father's hard-earned money!"
"This kid doesn't know the immensity of heaven and earth.
Who relies on lucky colour to choose a stone. Sigh, this kind of behavior is simply throwing a Yuan stone into the water, and then smashing it into the water for fun. "
The gazes of the Gu Masters in the tent dimmed. After confirming that Fang Yuan was a prodigal, their originally low expectations were immediately reduced to nothing.
Some Gu Masters even retracted their gazes, turning their heads and observing the fossils on the counter again.
The changes in the surroundings did not affect Fang Yuan's state of mind at all.
He was expressionless, silently mobilizing the primeval essence in his primeval sea and putting it into the Moonlight Gu.
In the next moment, the crescent moon mark on his right palm emitted a water-like pale blue light.
Fang Yuan used this right hand to grab a purple gold stone, holding it in his palm.
Then he closed his fingers, slowly kneading and rubbing the surface of the fossil.
The blue light flashed continuously, the light rippling like water. The purple gold stone became smaller and smaller, and large amounts of powdery stone chips fell from between Fang Yuan's fingers, falling onto the carpet in the tent.
"Good move, young master!" The female Gu Master seized the opportunity and immediately opened her mouth to praise.
"This young man, he isn't completely useless.
He has real skills. "Seeing this scene, the Gu Masters' eyes flashed with a trace of complex light.
They had a whole new level of respect for Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan used the blue light to grind the surface of the stone. This was a subtle use of the Moonlight Gu.
Usually, only Gu Masters who had used the Moonlight Gu for two to three years could reach this level.
With Fang Yuan's age and status as a student, it was very rare to be able to do this.
"Look, he is using our Guyue clan's unique Moonlight Gu." Some Gu Masters discovered this and immediately felt proud, looking at Fang Yuan more pleasing to the eye.
"But this method is still too rough to use for cutting rocks." Some of the more experienced Gu Masters shook their heads.
The purple gold stone became smaller and smaller. At first, it could not be closed with one palm, but after a while, it shrunk to the size of a fist and was wrapped by Fang Yuan's fingers.
The blue light became stronger, and the fossil became the size of a marble.
In the end, only a pile of stone powder was left, falling onto the carpet and forming a small puddle.
This was completely a solid rock, there were no Gu worms inside.
"As expected, unreliable." The Gu Masters shook their heads.
"Young master, there are still five more purple gold stones." The female Gu Master encouraged warmly.
Fang Yuan's expression was calm, not the slightest bit affected.
He grabbed the second purple gold stone and continued to grind it.
But the result of this one was still a solid rock, there were no Gu worms inside.
It was the same for the third one.
One of the Gu Masters said impatiently, "Stop looking, there is no need to gamble on a rock chosen based on color."
"If he can get a good Gu, I will eat all the stone powder on the floor." Someone laughed lightly.
"Young master, don't be discouraged.
Aren't there three more, you have only cut through half. "The female Gu Master exhaled, cheering for Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan grabbed the fourth piece, and when he grinded it to the size of a palm, he suddenly stopped.
"Eh?
There is material! "
"The stone material has changed, it is not purple gold stone, but a black ink colour."
"Is he really going to catch a dead mouse with a blind cat?"
The surrounding Gu Masters let out a soft gasp.
"Young master, please be careful when you cut the rock.
Don't move too much, the sleeping Gu worms are extremely weak.
If you use too much strength, you will accidentally kill the Gu worm inside. "
The female Gu Master did not expect such a situation to occur, she was stunned for a moment before cautiously reminding him.
Fang Yuan's movements were much slower, and as he rubbed his fingers, the stone fell off with a sizzling sound.
It was intermittent, no longer as continuous as before.
The black stone powder fell, the stone became smaller and smaller, and Fang Yuan's movements became even slower and gentler.
The stone powder on the carpet piled up higher, and the black ink stone core in Fang Yuan's hands was finally used up.
"Sigh, what a pity, it is only a stone in a stone."
"What a waste of my emotions, I thought there was really a Gu worm."
"You guys are too gullible, is stone gambling such an easy thing?
Ten out of ten are empty, otherwise how can the shop make money? "
"Young master, your luck is actually quite good.
You got a stone in a stone on your first try, normal people can't do it. "The female Gu Master used another method to console Fang Yuan, and at the same time, to prepare his heart for the following outcome.
It was common for people to end up empty-handed from stone gambling.
From her point of view, Fang Yuan was just doing it casually, the possibility of him choosing a Gu stone was close to zero.
Fang Yuan smiled, and did not reply, but took out the fifth piece.
He carefully grinded it, and this time, in just ten breaths of time, the purple gold stone surface was ground away, revealing a bumpy yellow mud ball.
S-REV-055.summary: Fang Yuan, ignoring the Female Gu Master's assumptions about his inexperience, purchases six purple-gold fossils. He begins to meticulously grind the first three stones using his Moonlight Gu, revealing them to be empty. The other Gu Masters present initially scoff at his methods but then show surprise and some respect upon seeing his refined control over the Moonlight Gu and his discovery of a material change in the fourth stone.

continuityMutations.content: His knowledge of the Mudskin Toad's market value and specific traits.
His ability to leverage social dynamics and clan affiliation to protect his interests.
His failed attempt to exploit Fang Yuan and his forced acquisition of the Mudskin Toad at a loss.
Their collective support for Fang Yuan against Jia Jin Sheng's aggressive tactics.
Reveals himself as the shopkeeper of the gambling den and possibly the half-brother of caravan leader Jia Fu.
Demonstrates a narrow-minded and jealous personality, frequently attempting to forcefully buy Gu worms found by others at reduced prices.
Attempts to intimidate Fang Yuan into selling the Mudskin Toad at a low price by claiming to be giving him a favor and warning him of future losses.
Is forced to back down from his aggressive stance due to Fang Yuan's quick thinking and the potential social backlash from other Guyue clan Gu Masters.
Feels a sense of 'bleeding heart' and immense regret for having to pay full market price for the Mudskin Toad he tried to acquire cheaply.

relationshipMutations.type: Antagonism over business ethics and profit
Envy and grudging admiration for success

C-REV-01.transition: Turned around and left the gambling den leisurely without looking back.

S-REV-056.prose:
Chapter 42
"Eh?"
"Don't tell me it's a rock in a rock again."
"Seems like it.
But it's weird, this yellow soil is wrapped in a hard purple gold rock, it should be smooth and round, why is the surface uneven? "The surrounding Gu Masters were puzzled.
Looking at the yellow soil ball in his hand, Fang Yuan's expression did not change, but his heart moved slightly.
He continued to grind, and the blue light was like water, turning the soil into powder.
In the powdery soil, there were many lumps of soil, falling onto the pile of stone powder at his feet.
"Don't tell me there's really something inside?!" Some Gu Masters saw this and stared with their eyes wide open.
"It's hard to say." Some people's tone was uncertain.
"I feel like there's something inside, it seems like there's something inside," someone said softly.
The yellow soil ball gradually became smaller, and when it was about the size of a palm.
Someone suddenly barged into the tent, "Lad, take it easy.
I, Jia Jin Sheng, will buy this soil ball! "
Fang Yuan's hands stopped, and at once, the Gu Masters in the tent focused their attention on this person.
This person looked young, about twenty to twenty-five years old.
He wore a golden robe, with a silk belt around his waist, and in the middle of the belt was a square jade piece.
The jade piece had a horizontal jade rune, forming the rarely seen "One" word.
Obviously, this was a Rank one Gu Master.
Twenty years old, and still a Rank one Gu Master, it seems his aptitude was not that great.
But this person's status was somewhat special.
Seeing this person, the Gu Masters in the tent bowed and said in unison, "Subordinate greets second young master."
"Second young master?"
"He called himself Jia Jin Sheng, could he be the half-brother of the caravan leader Jia Fu …"
"That means, this gambling den should be opened by him.
But now that he interfered, it seems like he is breaking the rules of the casino. "
The Gu Masters discussed softly.
"That's right, I am the shopkeeper of this shop.
Little brother, so young yet you are gambling on stones.
Aren't you afraid of being scolded by your family?
I will offer forty Yuan stone to buy the soil ball in your hand.
What do you think?
Forty pieces of Yuan stone is quite a lot, and there might not be any Gu inside. It's just that I'm in a good mood today, and since it's your first time gambling, I don't want you to lose all your money. Take it as me giving you some back. "Jia Jin Sheng quickly walked in front of Fang Yuan and said.
"Forty Yuan stone?"
Fang Yuan raised his eyebrows slightly, squinted at Jia Jin Sheng, and sneered, "It seems that you want to forcefully buy the mud ball fossil in my hand?
Forcefully buying was against the rules of the casino.
Moreover, on Qing Mao Mountain, you want to bully me, a person with the surname Guyue, in public? "
"Hmm?"
Hearing Fang Yuan's final words, the other Gu Masters present could not stand still, they could not help but feel a sense of common hatred towards the enemy as they rushed towards Fang Yuan's direction.
The way he looked at Jia Jin Sheng also became unfriendly.
Jia Jin Sheng had thought that a fifteen-year-old boy like Fang Yuan would be easy to deal with, and that he would be able to move his heart with just a few words.
He did not expect Fang Yuan's methods to be so good, with just a few words, he had fallen into a disadvantageous situation!
Seeing the posture of the Gu Masters rushing over, Jia Jin Sheng's expression immediately changed, he changed his tone and hurriedly waved his hands, "Little brother, you misunderstood!
I am the shopkeeper of the gambling den, how can I destroy my own platform and break my own rules?
Then how can I still do business in the future?
Hehehe.
I just saw that your mud ball was interesting, so I wanted to buy it.
If you don't want to sell, then forget it.
But if you don't have anything later, don't blame me for not warning you. "
Fang Yuan did not bother with him anymore, turning his head and concentrating on rubbing the mud ball in his hand.
His movements were very slow, very meticulous.
Often, after a while, wisps of dry mud powder would fall down.
As he moved, a dormant Gu worm gradually appeared in front of everyone.
"Oh my god, there really is a Gu worm!"
"He really opened a Gu!!"
"Are you kidding me, this kind of stone gambling can work?"
"This young man's luck is off the charts, he actually used his luck to forcefully open a Gu worm."
At once, the Gu Masters exclaimed in shock.
The female Gu Master subconsciously covered her mouth, looking at this scene in disbelief.
She had become a shop assistant, and had been to many villages, meeting all kinds of people and many customers, but she had never seen such a dramatic scene.
"There really is a Gu worm!" Jia Jin Sheng's eyes flashed with a cold light, his heart filled with hatred.
He was narrow-minded and easily jealous.
What he liked to do the most was to take advantage of others.
What he hated the most was to be taken advantage of.
He opened this gambling den, and arranged a tight network of spies inside.
Once a customer seemed to be opening a Gu worm, he would get the news and appear, usually forcefully buying it.
Right now, Fang Yuan was in his gambling den, opening a Gu worm right under his nose.
Jia Jin Sheng felt his heart bleed.
What he opened was a Toad Gu.
It was yellow all over, its belly was pale yellow, its back was brown and bumpy, covered with warts that were unique to toads.
At first glance, it was somewhat horrifying.
It was not big, only the size of a palm.
Holding it in his palm, it was like holding two or three eggs.
Under all kinds of shocked, envious and jealous gazes, Fang Yuan's expression was calm as he carefully mobilized his primeval essence, injecting it into the toad's body.
Immediately, this toad was refined by him.
Gu worms obtained from unsealing fossils were extremely weak.
Not only did they have little strength left, their will was also muddled, without any ability to resist, and could be easily refined by the Gu Master.
The Toad Gu was awakened from its slumber by Fang Yuan. It slowly opened its eyes, its belly slightly bulging as it softly called out.
Croak.
Although this sound was weak, it caused the expressions of the people present to become extremely interesting.
The difference in value between a living Gu and a dead Gu was huge.
"It's a living Gu, he opened a living Gu!!" Someone rubbed his eyes, not daring to believe it.
"This is a mudskin toad, damn it, it really is a mudskin toad." Someone recognized the Toad Gu's identity, shouting excitedly.
"This young lad is so lucky.
Why don't I have such luck! "Someone sighed, his emotions complicated, containing envy, jealousy and hatred.
"Young master, congratulations.
This, this, this is the most precious Gu worm I've seen so far! "The female Gu Master was so excited that her words were somewhat incoherent, her eyes shining brightly.
"It's actually a mudskin toad!
This is a rare Rank two Gu worm, worth a whole five hundred Yuan stone.
Damn it, damn it.
Someone actually opened such a Gu worm in my shop.
I've lost big, I've lost big! "
Jia Jin Sheng's face was pale, staring at the toad. He had a strong urge to snatch it over.
But he knew he couldn't, if he really did that, he would be seeking his own death.
This was not his clan's village, but a foreign land, the territory of Guyue clan.
"Maybe I should offer a few dozen more Yuan stone, maybe he will transfer it to me.
That's right, he's just a student.
If I offer a hundred Yuan stone, I'm not afraid he won't be moved.
Why didn't I do that? "Jia Jin Sheng was filled with regret.
"No, maybe this lad doesn't know what's good for him.
Although he opened this mudskin toad, I should be able to suppress the price and buy it! "Jia Jin Sheng had a glimmer of hope in his heart.
But the next moment, this glimmer of hope was mercilessly shattered by Fang Yuan's words.
Fang Yuan stared indifferently at the mudskin toad in his hands, not caring about the exclamations of shock and admiration from others.
He used a calm tone and said to Jia Jin Sheng, "Mudskin toad, Rank two Gu worm, eats a catty of yellow mud every meal, the more fertile the mud, the better.
It is rare, and is the main Gu needed to refine the Treasure Brass Toad.
The market price is five hundred Yuan stone.
Jia Jin Sheng, do you want to buy it? "
"You, you actually know so much …" Jia Jin Sheng's lips trembled, almost speechless after such a blow.
Fang Yuan laughed lightly and continued, "If you're not willing, then forget it.
I'll sell it to others, I believe there will be people who will buy it.
"Hold on, hold on.
I'll buy it, I'll buy it.
But can you lower the price a little? "Jia Jin Sheng's face showed a bitter smile.
Fang Yuan turned around and left.
Jia Jin Sheng quickly chased after him, "Don't!
Don't go.
I'll buy it, I'll buy it! "
Fang Yuan did not have any plans to nurture this mudskin toad.
It was a Rank two Gu worm, and Fang Yuan was only at Rank one initial stage.
Although it ate yellow mud, Qing Mao Mountain was covered in green mud, and it was troublesome to get food.
Moreover, if he did not sell this toad Gu, Fang Yuan would have to feed three Gu worms at the same time with his own strength.
Yuan stone consumption would increase, and the Yuan stone he had now was not enough to feed them.
Thus, Fang Yuan's goal had always been to sell the mudskin toad and earn five hundred Yuan stone, earning a sum of money.
Five hundred Yuan stone, to a Rank one initial stage Gu Master like Fang Yuan, was already a huge sum of money.
The transaction was completed quickly, and Fang Yuan transferred the mudskin toad to Jia Jin Sheng in front of everyone, and at the same time received five heavy money bags.
Each money pouch contained a hundred pieces of primeval stones.
Fang Yuan's original wealth was ninety-eight pieces, and after spending sixty in stone gambling, he was left with thirty-eight pieces.
This way, his wealth multiplied by several times, and he now had five hundred and thirty-eight Yuan stone!
Many Gu Masters saw this scene with their own eyes, and their eyes turned red.
Fang Yuan kept the five money bags in his arms, and picked up the last purple gold fossil, walking out of the tent leisurely.
"Young master, is this Yuan stone not working?" The female Gu Master blinked, and looked at Fang Yuan's back, reminding him loudly.
Fang Yuan turned a deaf ear, and left the gambling den without looking back.
Leaving behind a group of stunned Gu Masters, looking at each other in silence.

==================================================
S-REV-056.summary: Fang Yuan discovers a yellow mud ball within the fifth stone, drawing the attention of the surrounding Gu Masters. Jia Jin Sheng, the owner, dramatically interrupts, attempting to forcefully buy the mud ball at a low price. Fang Yuan deftly uses his Guyue clan affiliation to rally the other Gu Masters against Jia Jin Sheng, forcing him to back down. Fang Yuan then meticulously unseals a living Mudskin Toad, much to the shock and envy of everyone present. He then negotiates a high price, selling the toad to a reluctant Jia Jin Sheng for 500 primeval stones and leaves with his increased wealth.

continuityMutations.content: His classmates Guyue Mobei, Chicheng, and Fangzheng are becoming more proficient in combat, making future extortions more difficult and less sustainable.
The Bai Gu mountain holds a secret inheritance from a Rank four righteous Gu Master, but it requires two people to obtain.
He can sell the image wall from the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance to merchants.
Plans to use the failed purple-gold fossil gambling result as an excuse for possessing the Liquor worm, claiming it was awakened from the fossil.
Has 538 Yuan stones and jars of green bamboo wine hidden near his bed, but feels a sense of danger due to their quantity and his vulnerability.
Understands that a Rank one Liquor worm is precious to Rank one Gu Masters but less so to higher-ranked ones, making its exposure less risky than the Spring Autumn Cicada.
Observes his classmates' improvement in combat due to his extortions, recognizing that his current method of income is unsustainable.
Intentionally exposes the Liquor worm in a public setting to make its possession seem less suspicious and to gauge reactions.
Recognizes Jia Jin Sheng, the gambling den owner, involved in a dispute over a fake Gu.
Observes Jia Jin Sheng's subtle reaction to Jia Fu's arrival, indicating a deeper dynamic between the brothers.
Has improved fist and leg skills due to being extorted by Fang Yuan.
Location where Fang Yuan refines his primeval essence and stores his illicit gains.

S-REV-057.prose:
Chapter 43 Waves rose and fell in the green copper primeval sea, rising and falling. Above the sea, the Liquor worm curled up into a ball, emitting a faint white mist of wine. A gust of primeval essence rushed upwards, straight into the wine mist. By the time it landed, half of it was gone, and the color was deeper. From the initial stage emerald green, it turned into the middle stage pale green. The middle stage primeval essence fell into the primeval sea, but it did not mix with the initial stage primeval essence. It was as if it was heavier, sinking into the bottom. The upper half of the primeval sea was initial stage primeval water, and the lower half was middle stage primeval essence. As time passed, the wine mist lingered in the aperture. Under the refinement of the Liquor worm, the initial stage primeval essence gradually decreased, and the middle stage primeval essence gradually increased. It could be clearly seen that the middle stage primeval essence in the lower half was getting higher and higher, while the initial stage primeval essence in the upper half was dropping and rising. Fang Yuan refined the primeval essence while absorbing the natural primeval essence from the Yuan stone, quickly replenishing the aperture in his body. Finally, 45% of the primeval sea in the aperture was completely refined into middle stage primeval essence. "Thanks to the middle stage primeval essence, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to cut the rock five times in a row in the gambling den." Sitting cross-legged on the bed in the dormitory, Fang Yuan slowly opened his eyes. It was already late at night. After he came out of the gambling den, he did not go to any other shops, but went straight back to the academy. Although it was near the Guyue village, as a Rank one initial stage Gu Master, having 538 Yuan stones was still too much. This was not only because these Yuan stones were heavy and inconvenient to carry around. It also attracted covetous eyes, and could endanger one's life. If a Rank one upper stage, or even a Rank two Gu Master had evil intentions, with Fang Yuan's current ability, he would not be able to handle them.

"Money is just a worldly possession, and it is sad that people die because of money. It is laughable that many people in the world cannot see through this. The boat of profit carries many people, and also how many people sink. "Fang Yuan's lips curled into a cold smile, looking at the grey Yuan stone in his hand. A complete Yuan stone was the size of a duck egg. But the one in his hand, because half of the true essence had been absorbed, had already shrunk a whole circle. Fang Yuan did not feel heartache at all. Everything has its pros and cons. He only had C grade aptitude, and he had to use the Liquor worm to refine his Zhen Yuan. Yuan stone consumption was several times that of his peers. However, it was also because of this that he was able to overcome his lack of aptitude. In terms of true cultivation progress, he could be ranked in the top three. Fang Yuan put the Yuan stone back into his coin pouch and took out the last piece of the purple-gold fossil. He had bought a total of six pieces at the casino, opened five on the spot, and brought the last one back with him. His eyes shone brightly and he activated the Moonlight Gu again. His five fingers rubbed together as he dissected the rock. Under the blue light, the purple-gold fossil rapidly shrunk, and in the end, it was ground into nothingness, leaving only a small pile of stone powder on the ground beside the bed. Fang Yuan was not surprised. When it came to stone gambling, nine out of ten gambles were lost. Even if he had 500 years of experience, he could only lose eight out of ten gambles. The remaining twenty percent chance of winning was divided into dead Gu and live Gu.

The dead Gu did not have much value. As for the live Gu, it might not be that rare Gu. If it was really a live Gu with great value, it would instead attract a fatal disaster. Fang Yuan's current cultivation was very low, he was at the bottom of the Gu Master hierarchy. If the Mudskin Toad that he had just opened was not near the Guyue village, he might have been robbed by Jia Jin Sheng. Gambling was never a way to get rich. Instead, many people went bankrupt because of it. This was not Fang Yuan's path of development. Although the last purple-gold fossil did not have a Gu worm, Fang Yuan was not disappointed. But Fang Yuan was not disappointed, instead looking at the pile of stone powder on the ground, he gradually smiled. That's right, his ultimate goal in entering the casino was this pile of stone powder. As for the Mudskin Toad, it was just something he did in passing. He dissected the rock in private, and other than him, no one knew the true result. From now on, he could make an excuse and say that the Liquor worm was awakened from this purple-gold fossil. This was a great idea. First, no one could be sure what kind of Gu was sealed in the fossil. Who would dare say that the Liquor worm could not sleep in the purple-gold fossil? This was completely possible! Secondly, he had a few eyewitnesses. Him opening the Mudskin Toad must have left a deep and distinct impression on the Gu Masters in the casino. Thirdly, even if someone did not give up, he could attribute it all to luck.

Luck was the hardest thing to understand. Even if someone suspected that this was the Flower Wine Monk's Liquor worm, with the excuse of "luck", there was nothing they could do. In the dark room, Fang Yuan's gaze was gloomy. Blindly hiding it was like trying to cover a fire with paper. One day, he would be exposed. To get rid of the Liquor worm, he had to take the initiative. This was Fang Yuan's style. Moreover, he had thought about it carefully. In the following cultivation process, he needed to expose the Liquor worm. "A Rank one Gu like the Liquor worm is very precious to a Rank one Gu Master. But at Rank two, it is no longer useful. Thus, if it is exposed, it will at most attract some attention. It does not affect the big picture, so it is not important. It is not like the Spring Autumn Cicada. If the Spring Autumn Cicada is exposed, I might die without a burial place. " With five hundred years of life experience, Fang Yuan had long since seen through people's psychology, and understood it like the back of his hand. "The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance and the Mudskin Toad. In my memory, these were the only two things that could be taken advantage of, and now I have picked them up. From now on, I can only rely on myself to cultivate step by step. " Fang Yuan sighed and stretched his body, feeling a kind of fatigue. A Gu Master's primeval sea cultivation could not replace sleep.

Fang Yuan pulled up the bedding and laid on the bed, his eyes still half open. Although there were more than five hundred pieces of Yuan stone hidden at the head of the bed, and many jars of green bamboo wine stored under the bed, he still felt a faint sense of danger. These five hundred pieces of Yuan stone was already a limit. Extreme prosperity leads to decline, Fang Yuan was clear that his primeval stone expenditure would only increase in the future. And most of his income came from extorting his classmates. He could already feel that the classmates around him had obvious improvements. Especially in the recent extortions, Guyue Mobei, Chicheng and his brother Guyue Fangzheng, these three had great improvements in their fist and leg skills. In the past, they could be dealt with in one or two moves, but now they needed five or six. "After three or four more robberies, their fist and leg skills will be honed. They will challenge me one by one, and with my current stamina, I can't take that kind of continuous battle. Five hundred pieces of Yuan stone may seem like a lot, but with my intense consumption of four pieces of Yuan stone a day, it is actually not much. " "There are no more treasures on Qing Mao mountain, but the nearby Bai Gu mountain has a secret inheritance left behind by a Rank four righteous Gu Master. But to obtain this inheritance is very troublesome. There is an important checkpoint that requires two people to work together to pass. " "Sigh, the main thing is that the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance is too little, and I only got a Liquor worm. Hmm … there is still that image wall. Maybe I can sell it to one of the merchants in the caravan … " As Fang Yuan pondered, his eyelids became heavier and heavier until he fell asleep. ================================================== Chapter 44 The next day at noon, Fang Yuan went to the merchant district outside the village while he was eating lunch. Because they had to work during the day, there were not many villagers in the tents and stalls. Fang Yuan followed his memory and walked to the place where the Intimate Grass was sold last night. But he saw an empty handcart, parked on the spot.
S-REV-057.summary: Fang Yuan successfully refines 45% of his primeval sea into middle-stage essence using the Liquor worm, acknowledging it was crucial for his gambling success. Alone in his dormitory, he reflects on the danger of possessing so many Yuan stones as a low-ranked Gu Master. He then attempts to open the last purple-gold fossil, which yields only stone powder. Unfazed, Fang Yuan plans to use this 'failure' as a cover story for his Liquor worm, asserting it was awakened from the fossil. He also contemplates the unsustainability of extorting his increasingly skilled classmates and the need for new resource acquisition, feeling a sense of fatigue before falling asleep.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan possesses a Liquor worm, which is extremely valuable to a Rank one Gu Master.
Fang Yuan is unwilling to sell his Liquor worm.
Utilizes a specific type of 'grass Gu' (true mushrooms) for air purification and crystal ladybugs (a type of Gu) for wine storage and dispensing.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked from the academy to the merchant district in the afternoon.

S-REV-058.prose:
Dragging the handcart, was an ostrich. It stood proudly on the spot, its body was as big as an ostrich and its appearance was like a chicken, but its back was bulging, forming an arc. A pair of wide wings were folded at its side, its colorful feathers bright and dazzling. The chicken's head was raised high, its bright red comb like an agate crown. Under the illumination of the sun, it shone with a lustrous luster. "It seems I was a step too late, the Intimate Grass has already been sold out. What a pity, if I had bought a few kilograms of Intimate Grass, I could have saved a lot of Yuan stone. "Fang Yuan's footsteps paused for a moment, before he left and continued walking inside. "Come, let's taste the village's wine. There are over a hundred types of fine wine here. There's the best Lantern Grass Wine, the lingering Nine Melody Wine, the quiet and elegant Gu Longjing Wine, the sweet and sour Flower Stone Wine, the mouth-watering Hundred Springs Old Cellar, the rich and fragrant Drunken Three Autumns … "In front of a blue barrel-shaped tent, the waiter was shouting with all his might. Fang Yuan's gaze flashed, his interest immediately piqued. He turned around and entered this wine shop. The wine shop's facilities were very unique. At the innermost part of the tent, there was a long counter. A Gu Master was guarding it, behind him were tens of wicker basket sized crystal ladybugs, clinging to the tent's cloth. The tent's floor was not covered with carpet, but directly exposed the mountain rocks and soil. In the soil grew a group of colorful mushrooms. These mushrooms were colorful, round and round, somewhat cute. Some were as big as a table, some as small as a stool. Around a table sized mushroom, there were a few stool sized mushrooms.

"These are true mushrooms, intentionally grown by a Gu Master. They can absorb dust and turbid air, purifying the air, a type of grass Gu. "Fang Yuan immediately recognized these mushrooms. He chose a small mushroom and sat down. The surface of the mushroom immediately caved in slightly, giving Fang Yuan the illusion that he was sitting on a sofa on Earth. "Young Master, this is the wine list. What kind of wine would you like? "A waiter came over. Fang Yuan looked at the wine list and found that the wine here was more expensive than the Green Bamboo Wine. "I'll have a glass of monkey wine," Fang Yuan said as he put down the wine menu. "A cup of monkey wine!" The waiter turned his head and shouted. At the counter, the Rank one Gu Master heard it and immediately bent down, taking out a bamboo wine cup from the counter. Then, glass in hand, he turned to face the tent behind him. On the blue canvas of the tent, there were dozens of large crystal ladybugs quietly clinging to the tent with their heads down and their tails up. It was like a decoration hanging on the wall of a tent. These crystal ladybugs were also a type of Gu, their stomachs were hollow and were often used by Gu Masters to store precious liquid. They were transparent, as if they were made of crystal. From the outside, one could see what kind of wine was stored in the round stomachs of the ladybug. The Gu Master quickly found the crystal ladybug with the monkey wine in it. He placed the bamboo wine cup under the mouth of the ladybug and used his other hand to gently stroke the ladybug's crystal carapace.

An extremely small amount of primeval essence flowed into the crystal ladybug's body. Then, the ladybug opened its mouth and a stream of wine flowed down, pouring into the bamboo wine cup. The wine splashed for a while and suddenly stopped. The Gu Master placed the bamboo wine cup filled with monkey wine on the counter. The waiter outside the counter had been waiting for a long time. He carefully picked it up and walked a few steps, bringing it to Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan only took a light sip. The monkey wine was a fruit wine, it was mellow and sweet, soft in the mouth. He did not drink again, but with a thought, he called out the Liquor worm. The white and fat Liquor worm turned into a white light, drawing a half arc in the air, and with a plop, it fell into the wine cup. The wine splashed everywhere, splashing on the mushroom table. The Liquor worm happily rolled around in the wine cup, the monkey wine dropping at a speed visible to the naked eye. In a few breaths, the wine cup was empty, not a single drop left. "It's the Liquor worm!" The Gu Master at the counter exclaimed, his eyes shining. He was a Rank one Gu Master, with only D grade talent. He followed the caravan and worked in this wine shop. He wanted to travel while looking for opportunities. The Liquor worm could refine primeval essence and raise a small realm. To a Rank one Gu Master, it could be said to be an extremely precious Gu worm. Wasn't this the opportunity he was looking for?

"Young master, I wonder if you can part with your Liquor worm?" He excitedly walked over, his face full of sincerity. Fang Yuan shook his head, firmly rejecting him, then got up and left. His purpose in coming here was to expose the Liquor worm, he never thought of selling it. "Young master, young master, please wait. I am very sincere, maybe we can sit down and slowly discuss. "The Gu Master reluctantly followed Fang Yuan to the entrance of the tent. But Fang Yuan did not respond. In the end, he could only stand still, looking at Fang Yuan's back with great regret as he turned the corner and disappeared from his sight. … Unknowingly, the sun gradually set, the crescent moon flying up. In the night, the moonlight shone like water, but was evaporated by the lights of countless shops. Tonight, the shops were crowded, and business was still booming. Fang Yuan was pushed forward by the crowd, all kinds of discussions unavoidably entering his ears. "Shops usually open for three days and three nights. Tonight is already the second night, by the morning of the day after tomorrow, the caravan will set off again. So if we want to buy something, we have to hurry. " "Yesterday I saw a Golden Bell Gu, sigh, it's too expensive. After haggling with the shopkeeper for half a day, it didn't get much cheaper. I'll go take a look tonight. " "Did you guys hear, just last night. A young man actually opened a Mudskin Toad in the gambling den, earning a total of five hundred Yuan stone!
S-REV-058.summary: The next day, Fang Yuan visits the merchant district, finding the Intimate Grass already sold out. He enters a unique wine shop, selecting a monkey wine. After taking a sip, he intentionally summons his Liquor worm, letting it consume the wine publicly. The wine shop's Gu Master, a Rank one with D-grade talent, immediately recognizes the Liquor worm's value and excitedly tries to buy it from Fang Yuan, who firmly rejects him and leaves, having achieved his goal of public exposure.

continuityMutations.content: Jia Jin Sheng is the younger, illegitimate brother of Jia Fu, a Rank four Gu Master, and uses this connection to act tyrannically.
Jia Jin Sheng shows a distinct negative reaction (paleness, anger) to his brother Jia Fu's arrival, suggesting a complex and potentially strained relationship.
Jia Jin Sheng is the younger brother of Jia Fu, a Rank four Gu Master.
He was sold a 'fake' Black Boar Gu that was actually a common smelly fat worm for 250 Yuan stones.
Accused of selling a fake Black Boar Gu for an exorbitant price, denying the accusation.
Is the younger brother of Jia Fu, a powerful Rank four Gu Master, which he uses to intimidate others.
Shows anger and paleness upon his brother Jia Fu's unexpected arrival, suggesting a strained relationship or fear of his brother's intervention.
Believes he was sold a fake Black Boar Gu by Jia Jin Sheng for 250 Yuan stones and confronts him publicly.
Is intimidated by the mention of Jia Jin Sheng's Rank four Gu Master brother, Jia Fu, and restrains his actions.
Is a Rank four Gu Master and the leader of the caravan, arriving to settle a dispute.
Is the older brother of Jia Jin Sheng, whose name is used to intimidate others.
A temporary market that appears for three days and three nights, serving as a hub for commerce and information exchange for caravans and local Gu Masters.
A common scene of marketplace disputes, highlighting the risks of commerce and the power dynamics among Gu Masters.

S-REV-059.prose:
"Young master, I wonder if you can part with your Liquor worm?" He excitedly walked over, his face full of sincerity. Fang Yuan shook his head, firmly rejecting him, then got up and left. His purpose in coming here was to expose the Liquor worm, he never thought of selling it. "Young master, young master, please wait. I am very sincere, maybe we can sit down and slowly discuss. "The Gu Master reluctantly followed Fang Yuan to the entrance of the tent. But Fang Yuan did not respond. In the end, he could only stand still, looking at Fang Yuan's back with great regret as he turned the corner and disappeared from his sight. … Unknowingly, the sun gradually set, the crescent moon flying up. In the night, the moonlight shone like water, but was evaporated by the lights of countless shops. Tonight, the shops were crowded, and business was still booming. Fang Yuan was pushed forward by the crowd, all kinds of discussions unavoidably entering his ears. "Shops usually open for three days and three nights. Tonight is already the second night, by the morning of the day after tomorrow, the caravan will set off again. So if we want to buy something, we have to hurry. " "Yesterday I saw a Golden Bell Gu, sigh, it's too expensive. After haggling with the shopkeeper for half a day, it didn't get much cheaper. I'll go take a look tonight. " "Did you guys hear, just last night. A young man actually opened a Mudskin Toad in the gambling den, earning a total of five hundred Yuan stone!

" … Fang Yuan listened attentively, and could not help but feel disappointed, he did not hear any news about the Liquor worm. "The Liquor worm is only a Rank one Gu, it is very important to Rank one Gu Masters, but to Rank two and Rank three Gu Masters, it cannot refine their primeval essence. So it is normal that no one paid attention to it. But the matter of exposing the Liquor worm, I can't be too hasty. If I do it too pretentiously, I will be exposed, "Fang Yuan thought to himself as he walked. At this moment, the crowd in front of him surged. Immediately after, Fang Yuan heard someone shout, "Come and see, there is a black-hearted shop, selling fake Gu to our clansmen!" Immediately, there were people in the crowd who were filled with righteous indignation. "Huh? Something like this actually happened. " "Quick, go and see which shop dares to deceive our clansmen!" Fang Yuan followed the flow of people, following them. He saw a group of people surrounding the entrance of a large red tent, three layers inside and three layers outside. Some were looking curiously, some crossed their arms and looked coldly, but most of their faces were shrouded in a thin layer of anger. Two people stood at the entrance of the tent. One was a young Rank two Gu Master, looking at his attire, he was obviously a Guyue clansman. The other person was a familiar face, it was the owner of the gambling den, Jia Jin Sheng. The young Gu Master held a black Gu worm in his hand, raising it up high and shouting at the surrounding people, "Clansmen, this is the person in front of me, yesterday he sold me a fake Gu. He lied to me and said it was a Black Boar Gu, selling me two hundred and fifty Yuan stone. But when I bought it and refined it, I found out that it was not a Black Boar Gu, it was just the most common smelly fat worm! " Jia Jin Sheng laughed coldly, "Don't slander me.

When did I say this Gu was a Black Boar Gu? What proof do you have? " The young Gu Master saw Jia Jin Sheng's denial and was furious, grabbing Jia Jin Sheng's arm, "You unscrupulous merchant, you dare to deny it! You dare to lie to your Lord Guyue on Qing Mao mountain, are you looking for death?! " "Let go!" Jia Jin Sheng was also furious, swinging his sleeves and slapping the young Gu Master's hand away, "You want to cause trouble and extort money, but you don't know who you are dealing with. I'm not afraid of you! My brother is Jia Fu, a Rank four Gu Master, what can you do to me? " "You!" The young Gu Master stared angrily, but did not dare to make another move. The title of a Rank four Gu Master had already scared him. "Ah pui!" Jia Jin Sheng spat on the ground, raising his head and looking at the young Gu Master, letting out a disdainful laugh, "You are the one who wanted to take advantage of me. Why don't you use your brain to think, the Black Boar Gu can increase a Gu Master's strength from the root. It is such a rare Rank one Gu, its market price is even higher than the Liquor worm, usually selling for six hundred Yuan stone. You think you can buy a Black Boar Gu with two hundred and fifty? Dream on! " "Bastard …" The young Gu Master gritted his teeth, his face red and his body trembling in anger. His chest was filled with anger from the humiliation. The crowd was buzzing, restless and discussing. But no one dared to step forward.

Jia Fu's title as a Rank four Gu Master was like an invisible mountain, suppressing the crowd. "This lad is too despicable, what an unscrupulous merchant!" "No wonder he dared to be so arrogant on Qing Mao mountain, so he is Jia Fu's younger brother." "I heard they have the same father but different mothers. He himself is only a Rank one Gu Master, but using this relationship to act like a tyrant in the caravan." … "What exactly is going on?" Right at this moment, a loud and clear voice rang out. "Jia Fu is here!" "The leader is here to settle the dispute, everyone move aside." The discussion suddenly stopped, and the crowd quickly dispersed, forming a narrow passageway. A short and sturdy middle-aged Gu Master with a fat belly walked along the passageway and walked in. He wore a long sleeve yellow robe, it was the leader of this caravan, Jia Fu. "Lord Jia Fu, greetings." Even though the young Gu Master was filled with anger, he did not dare to show it. He forcefully held it in and cupped his fists towards Jia Fu. Jia Jin Sheng stood on the spot, as if he did not expect his brother to come. His face turned pale and his eyes flashed with anger. This slight change in expression made Fang Yuan, who had been observing from afar, fall into deep thought.
S-REV-059.summary: Later that night, Fang Yuan, observing the bustling market, overhears news of a young man opening a Mudskin Toad but no mention of his Liquor worm. He is then drawn to a commotion where a Guyue clan Gu Master publicly accuses Jia Jin Sheng, the gambling den owner, of selling him a fake Black Boar Gu. Jia Jin Sheng denies the claim, uses his brother Jia Fu's Rank four status to intimidate the young Gu Master and the crowd. The tension escalates with the unexpected arrival of Jia Fu himself, prompting the crowd to clear a path and leaving Jia Jin Sheng visibly agitated.

continuityMutations.content: Jia Fu's public display of integrity and generosity is a strategic move to suppress Jia Jinsheng and maintain his own image, rather than genuine altruism.
The caravan's impending departure offers a safe avenue to sell the image wall without direct involvement or risk from the Guyue clan.
Jia Fu uses his authority and wealth to publicly resolve his brother's scam, portraying himself as righteous while likely using the situation to further suppress Jia Jinsheng.
Jia Jinsheng is competing with his brothers for the family inheritance, which is distributed based on caravan performance.
Jia Jinsheng deeply resents his older brother, Jia Fu, feeling continuously suppressed and outmaneuvered by him.
Jia Jinsheng desires to prove himself and gain acknowledgement within his clan, especially in the context of his D-grade talent.
Jia Jinsheng knows about the Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider and its association with the Flower Wine Monk, and speculates about its presence.
Jia Jinsheng plans to kill Fang Yuan to secure the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance for himself.
Fang Yuan plans to sell the image wall to a merchant from the caravan to minimize personal risk and exploit inter-clan rivalries.
Fang Yuan knows the specific details of the Jia clan's internal succession dispute, including the eventual demise of Jia Fu and Jia Gui.
Fang Yuan deliberately chooses Jia Jinsheng over Jia Fu for the image wall transaction due to Jia Jinsheng's weaker cultivation and easier manipulability.
Fang Yuan murders Jia Jinsheng immediately upon sensing his betrayal, securing the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance for himself.

C-REV-78.transition: Stomped angrily and retreated into his tent, then out the back.

S-REV-060.prose:
Chapter 45
"Hello, young Gu Master, do you have any questions?" Jia Fu walked to the center of the crowd and asked in a friendly manner.
The young Gu Master was overwhelmed by the favor, and bowed again.
He glanced at the clansmen around him, then gathered his courage and told them everything that had happened.
"So that's what happened!" Jia Fu listened and nodded.
He then asked Jia Jinsheng, "Little brother, is there such a thing?"
Jia Jin Sheng turned his head and snorted, not looking at him.
Jia Fu muttered to himself.
The surrounding people were quiet, not daring to disturb his thoughts, and were waiting for his judgment.
Speaking of this matter, it was all Jia Jin Sheng's business scam.
But this young Gu Master was at fault, if not for his greed clouding his mind, how could he have fallen for it?
If Jia Fu wanted to protect his brother, with his Rank four cultivation, even the Guyue clan leader could not do anything to him.
Jia Fu muttered to himself for a while, before finally speaking, "I understand this matter, it is all my brother's fault, causing this brother to suffer losses and buy fake goods, I am really sorry!" Saying so, he cupped his fists towards the young Gu Master.
"Lord Jia Fu!"
The young Gu Master was surprised, and quickly declined, "You are a Rank four Gu Master, I am only a Rank two.
This cannot be done, this cannot be done! "
Jia Fu waved his hand, "Hehe, this has nothing to do with the Gu Master's cultivation, I only deal with matters and not people.
A mistake is a mistake, I represent the caravan to apologise to you.
As for compensation, how about this, you lost two hundred and fifty Yuan stone, I represent the Jia family to compensate you double. "
He was a man of his words, and immediately a follower beside him took out five money bags, handing them to the young Gu Master in front of everyone.
Every money pouch was bulging, each containing a hundred primeval stones.
The young Gu Master received the money bags, and was so excited that he could not say anything.
"But brother, I have something to advise you." Jia Fu continued, "The Black Boar Gu is very rare, it can increase a Gu Master's strength from the root.
Although it is only Rank one, it is hard to find in the market.
As long as it appears in the market, it would be bought immediately.
Their prices were all around six hundred Yuan stone.
Trying to buy a Black Boar Gu with two hundred Yuan stone is not realistic. "
"Junior has learnt his lesson!" The young Gu Master sincerely bowed to Jia Fu.
Cheers came from the crowd.
"Lord Jia Fu is wise!"
"Amazing, as expected of Lord Jia Fu!"
"As a Rank four Gu Master, he doesn't use his strength to bully the weak, Lord Jia Fu is truly a role model of the righteous path."
…
"No, no."
Jia Fu smiled and cupped his fists towards everyone. He said humbly, "Our Jia Family has always been doing business with integrity.
Everyone, my younger brother is young and ignorant, and likes to tease others, but he is actually kind-hearted.
I hope everyone can be magnanimous. "
The surrounding cheers became even louder.
"Humph!" Jia Jin Sheng's face was livid. He stomped his feet angrily and turned around to enter the tent.
Then he passed through the tent and walked out from the back of the tent.
Fang Yuan watched coldly from the side. Seeing this, his heart settled, "Looks like the image wall left behind by the Flower Wine Monk can be sold now."
The Flower Wine Monk used the Photo-audio Gu to record the ugly state of the fourth generation Guyue clan leader.
Before he died, he was filled with indignation and used this Photo-audio Gu, slapping it on the stone wall and forming an image wall.
The images on the image wall cycled continuously, showing the truest scene of that time to the world.
Following the principle of maximizing profits, Fang Yuan had wanted to sell this image wall for a long time.
He was sure that the other two clans on Qing Mao mountain, the Bai clan and Xiong clan, would be very interested in this image wall.
But for him to personally sell this image wall was not appropriate.
His cultivation was still too weak. If he brought the image wall to the other clans, he would most likely be killed.
Even if the transaction was successful and he returned safely.
There is no such thing as an impenetrable wall. If the news leaked to the higher ups of the Guyue clan, he would be chased out of the clan at the very least.
According to Fang Yuan's plan, he still needed to make use of the Guyue clan.
Thus, the safest method was to sell it to one of the merchants in the caravan.
These merchants were outsiders, and not participating in the power struggles of Qing Mao mountain was the most ideal choice.
In another day, this caravan would set off, leaving the Guyue village towards the Xiong clan, and then the Bai clan.
Selling it to them, Fang Yuan would be able to minimize the risks of the transaction. It was the safest and most reliable method.
… …
"Another cup of wine!"
"Wine, where's the wine?"
"Quickly bring it over, are you afraid that I can't afford it?"
Jia Jin Sheng slammed the mushroom table, roaring.
"Young master Jia, your wine!" The waiter quickly brought the wine over.
Jia Jin Sheng immediately grabbed the bamboo wine cup, raising his head and drinking it in one gulp.
"Good wine!" He laughed loudly, his voice desolate and hoarse.
With a bang, he slammed the wine cup on the table and shouted again, "Give me another cup, no, as much as you have!"
The waiter in the wine shop naturally did not dare to offend him, and could only do as he said.
Fortunately, the tavern was already overcrowded.
Not only were there people sitting around the mushroom table and stools.
Even the surrounding aisles were crowded with people.
Jia Jin Sheng was in a drunken frenzy, shouting and yelling, but in this noisy tent, it did not stand out.
Jia Jin Sheng drank cup after cup, trying to drown his sorrows.
His back was facing the crowd, and no one noticed that as he drank, two streams of tears flowed down his cheeks.
Who could understand his pain, who could understand his sorrows?
A pitiful place would definitely have a hateful person, and vice versa.
Everyone had their own backstory.
Among the brothers, he was the youngest, the most handsome, and the most similar to his father, so he was doted on by his father.
But the Heavens played a trick on him, and he only had a mere D grade talent.
Ever since he was young, he had lived under the oppression of his brothers.
He was not satisfied, he wanted to resist, but due to his lack of talent, he could not do it.
His father felt that his time was up, and wanted to split the family property.
He let his brothers lead a caravan in pairs.
He promised to split the family property according to their results.
Jia Jin Sheng wanted to rely on his own methods to obtain the family property, as well as the acknowledgement of the clan.
But he did not expect that he would once again become his brother Jia Fu's stepping stone.
The moment Jia Fu appeared, he knew that he had fallen into a trap again.
This whole thing was a conspiracy from the beginning to the end.
But what could he do?
Ever since he entered this caravan, he had always been firmly suppressed by Jia Fu.
The huge difference between a Rank four and a Rank one made him even more powerless.
"Jia Fu!" He squeezed out this name from between his teeth, his eyes burning with the flames of hatred. He was really not satisfied!
"You want to deal with your brother?
I can help you. "At this moment, a voice entered his ears.
Jia Jin Sheng was stunned, he turned his head to look, and found that there was someone sitting beside him.
He shook his head a few times, blinking his eyes, and finally saw the person clearly.
If it was not Fang Yuan, who else could it be?
"It's you!" He stared at Fang Yuan, slightly angry, "I remember you!
Such a lucky lad, you actually got a Mudskin Toad from the gambling den you gave me!
Are you trying to make a fool out of me? "
Fang Yuan looked at Jia Fu, his gaze as cold as water, "I have a big business deal.
If you want to get better results and get a bigger share of the family's assets, why don't you listen to me? "
Jia Jin Sheng's face instantly revealed a shocked expression, he straightened his back and sat up straight, "How do you know about the family's assets?"
This matter was kept secret, outsiders could not possibly know.
But Fang Yuan pointed it out with one sentence.
"These trivial matters of the Jia clan are not secrets, why can't they be hidden from the people of this world?" Fang Yuan laughed coldly, and could not help but think of the memories of his previous life.
The Jia clan leader was a legendary figure, he had started from scratch, made his fortune with a caravan, and revitalized the Jia clan.
He was old and sensed that his life was coming to an end, so he let his children lead a caravan in pairs, and split the huge family assets according to their results.
The better the results, the more assets they would get.
But his eldest son, Jia Fu, and his second son, Jia Gui, were both extremely outstanding.
They competed for six to seven years, and there was no clear winner until the Jia clan leader died of old age.
After the Jia clan leader died, he left behind an extremely huge family assets.
In order to fight for the family assets, Jia Fu and Jia Gui turned on each other, escalated their internal strife, and brought in external help.
This triggered a large-scale Gu Fighting Conference, and finally, both sides perished together.
The Jia clan was strong for a while, but soon fell, causing people to sigh.
Jia Jin Sheng squinted his eyes, and did not comment on Fang Yuan's explanation.
He thought to himself, Father announced the rules of splitting the family assets last year, and now it is already the second year.
There are no walls in this world that have ears, and it is not strange for this matter to be leaked out.
What he was really worried about was whether this was another trap set by Jia Fu.
But no matter what, there is no harm in listening first.
Fang Yuan did not speak immediately. He looked around, and this wine shop was the one he entered at noon.
The wine shop's shopkeeper had a unique way of operating, and business was almost bursting at night. The tent was noisy and overcrowded.
Talking here was actually safer than in a secluded place, and could avoid being eavesdropped by Gu insects.
He crooked his finger at Jia Jin Sheng, "Come closer."
Jia Jin Sheng snorted unhappily, but he still leaned over.
After listening to Fang Yuan's narration, he frowned, and looked at Fang Yuan with a cold gaze, "This business involves the three mountain strongholds of Qing Mao Mountain, and it is taboo for us businessmen to get involved in the local power's internal strife.
Hmph, you were sent by Jia Fu to frame me, right? "
Fang Yuan had already expected him to have such suspicions, and did not explain at all. He stood up and left, "Haha, if that is the case, then I will go talk to your brother."
Jia Jin Sheng squinted his eyes, and kept staring at Fang Yuan.
Until Fang Yuan was about to walk out of the wine shop, he finally could not sit still anymore.
He stood up and chased after Fang Yuan outside the tent, "Don't go, we can talk again."
Fang Yuan put his hands behind his back, and glanced at him, saying coldly, "I know you have doubts about me, but now you are completely suppressed by your brother, and have almost lost everything.
If you believe me, there is still a sliver of hope, if not, there is no hope.
Let's see if you dare to take this gamble. "
Jia Jin Sheng's expression changed, and he corrected, "Jia Fu is just a little older, I have never promised him that he is my brother!
But what you said is right, I will take this gamble. "
Fang Yuan said solemnly, "Two thousand Yuan stone, no bargaining."
Jia Jin Sheng smiled bitterly, "This price is too high, this business is risky."
"The higher the risk, the higher the profit," Fang Yuan shook his head, and his attitude was firm, "If you sell it to those two strongholds, I guarantee you will earn even more."
Jia Jin Sheng nodded, and a trace of seriousness appeared on his face, "I believe you on this point.
These years, the Bai clan's power has been expanding rapidly, and they have produced another A grade genius called Bai Ning Bing, who has great prospects.
The power structure of Qing Mao Mountain is already gradually changing.
Your Guyue stronghold's position as the overlord has already been shaken.
If I sell it to the Bai clan, I believe I can at least double the profit! "
Hearing that Jia Jin Sheng had such a thorough understanding of Qing Mao Mountain's situation, Fang Yuan could not help but re-evaluate him, and thought to himself, "This Jia Jin Sheng, after all, has a background, and has been nurtured by his family, he is not a good-for-nothing playboy."
Jia Jin Sheng sighed, "Whether this is a trap or not, I have jumped into it.
I promise you, two thousand Yuan stone, deal!
But, I want to see the goods first. "
"Of course, follow me." Fang Yuan laughed, and immediately turned to lead the way.
Jia Jin Sheng was already in the trap, and everything was in his control.
S-REV-060.summary: Jia Fu publicly addresses a scam involving his brother, Jia Jinsheng, and a young Gu Master. He apologizes on behalf of his family and offers double compensation, portraying himself as righteous to the cheering crowd. Jia Jinsheng, humiliated, stomps off in anger. Fang Yuan observes the scene coldly, recognizing Jia Fu's manipulation and seeing an opportunity to sell the image wall he possesses.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan knows about the secret Jia clan competition for family assets, which is meant to be confidential.
The Bai clan is rapidly expanding, with an A-grade genius Bai Ning Bing, shifting the power balance of Qing Mao Mountain and threatening the Guyue clan's dominance.
Jia Jinsheng is well-informed about the political landscape of Qing Mao Mountain, indicating a strategic mind despite his perceived flaws.
The Jia clan leader organized a competition among his children to divide family assets based on caravan performance, and this competition has been ongoing for two years.

C-REV-78.transition: Chased after Fang Yuan out of the wine shop.

addedNodes.concept: Power Balance of Qing Mao Mountain

S-REV-061.prose:
Chapter 45
"Hello, young Gu Master, do you have any questions?" Jia Fu walked to the center of the crowd and asked in a friendly manner.
The young Gu Master was overwhelmed by the favor, and bowed again.
He glanced at the clansmen around him, then gathered his courage and told them everything that had happened.
"So that's what happened!" Jia Fu listened and nodded.
He then asked Jia Jinsheng, "Little brother, is there such a thing?"
Jia Jin Sheng turned his head and snorted, not looking at him.
Jia Fu muttered to himself.
The surrounding people were quiet, not daring to disturb his thoughts, and were waiting for his judgment.
Speaking of this matter, it was all Jia Jin Sheng's business scam.
But this young Gu Master was at fault, if not for his greed clouding his mind, how could he have fallen for it?
If Jia Fu wanted to protect his brother, with his Rank four cultivation, even the Guyue clan leader could not do anything to him.
Jia Fu muttered to himself for a while, before finally speaking, "I understand this matter, it is all my brother's fault, causing this brother to suffer losses and buy fake goods, I am really sorry!" Saying so, he cupped his fists towards the young Gu Master.
"Lord Jia Fu!"
The young Gu Master was surprised, and quickly declined, "You are a Rank four Gu Master, I am only a Rank two.
This cannot be done, this cannot be done! "
Jia Fu waved his hand, "Hehe, this has nothing to do with the Gu Master's cultivation, I only deal with matters and not people.
A mistake is a mistake, I represent the caravan to apologise to you.
As for compensation, how about this, you lost two hundred and fifty Yuan stone, I represent the Jia family to compensate you double. "
He was a man of his words, and immediately a follower beside him took out five money bags, handing them to the young Gu Master in front of everyone.
Every money pouch was bulging, each containing a hundred primeval stones.
The young Gu Master received the money bags, and was so excited that he could not say anything.
"But brother, I have something to advise you." Jia Fu continued, "The Black Boar Gu is very rare, it can increase a Gu Master's strength from the root.
Although it is only Rank one, it is hard to find in the market.
As long as it appears in the market, it would be bought immediately.
Their prices were all around six hundred Yuan stone.
Trying to buy a Black Boar Gu with two hundred Yuan stone is not realistic. "
"Junior has learnt his lesson!" The young Gu Master sincerely bowed to Jia Fu.
Cheers came from the crowd.
"Lord Jia Fu is wise!"
"Amazing, as expected of Lord Jia Fu!"
"As a Rank four Gu Master, he doesn't use his strength to bully the weak, Lord Jia Fu is truly a role model of the righteous path."
…
"No, no."
Jia Fu smiled and cupped his fists towards everyone. He said humbly, "Our Jia Family has always been doing business with integrity.
Everyone, my younger brother is young and ignorant, and likes to tease others, but he is actually kind-hearted.
I hope everyone can be magnanimous. "
The surrounding cheers became even louder.
"Humph!" Jia Jin Sheng's face was livid. He stomped his feet angrily and turned around to enter the tent.
Then he passed through the tent and walked out from the back of the tent.
Fang Yuan watched coldly from the side. Seeing this, his heart settled, "Looks like the image wall left behind by the Flower Wine Monk can be sold now."
The Flower Wine Monk used the Photo-audio Gu to record the ugly state of the fourth generation Guyue clan leader.
Before he died, he was filled with indignation and used this Photo-audio Gu, slapping it on the stone wall and forming an image wall.
The images on the image wall cycled continuously, showing the truest scene of that time to the world.
Following the principle of maximizing profits, Fang Yuan had wanted to sell this image wall for a long time.
He was sure that the other two clans on Qing Mao mountain, the Bai clan and Xiong clan, would be very interested in this image wall.
But for him to personally sell this image wall was not appropriate.
His cultivation was still too weak. If he brought the image wall to the other clans, he would most likely be killed.
Even if the transaction was successful and he returned safely.
There is no such thing as an impenetrable wall. If the news leaked to the higher ups of the Guyue clan, he would be chased out of the clan at the very least.
According to Fang Yuan's plan, he still needed to make use of the Guyue clan.
Thus, the safest method was to sell it to one of the merchants in the caravan.
These merchants were outsiders, and not participating in the power struggles of Qing Mao mountain was the most ideal choice.
In another day, this caravan would set off, leaving the Guyue village towards the Xiong clan, and then the Bai clan.
Selling it to them, Fang Yuan would be able to minimize the risks of the transaction. It was the safest and most reliable method.
… …
"Another cup of wine!"
"Wine, where's the wine?"
"Quickly bring it over, are you afraid that I can't afford it?"
Jia Jin Sheng slammed the mushroom table, roaring.
"Young master Jia, your wine!" The waiter quickly brought the wine over.
Jia Jin Sheng immediately grabbed the bamboo wine cup, raising his head and drinking it in one gulp.
"Good wine!" He laughed loudly, his voice desolate and hoarse.
With a bang, he slammed the wine cup on the table and shouted again, "Give me another cup, no, as much as you have!"
The waiter in the wine shop naturally did not dare to offend him, and could only do as he said.
Fortunately, the tavern was already overcrowded.
Not only were there people sitting around the mushroom table and stools.
Even the surrounding aisles were crowded with people.
Jia Jin Sheng was in a drunken frenzy, shouting and yelling, but in this noisy tent, it did not stand out.
Jia Jin Sheng drank cup after cup, trying to drown his sorrows.
His back was facing the crowd, and no one noticed that as he drank, two streams of tears flowed down his cheeks.
Who could understand his pain, who could understand his sorrows?
A pitiful place would definitely have a hateful person, and vice versa.
Everyone had their own backstory.
Among the brothers, he was the youngest, the most handsome, and the most similar to his father, so he was doted on by his father.
But the Heavens played a trick on him, and he only had a mere D grade talent.
Ever since he was young, he had lived under the oppression of his brothers.
He was not satisfied, he wanted to resist, but due to his lack of talent, he could not do it.
His father felt that his time was up, and wanted to split the family property.
He let his brothers lead a caravan in pairs.
He promised to split the family property according to their results.
