S-REV-061.summary: Jia Jinsheng drowns his sorrows in a noisy caravan wine shop, lamenting his D-grade talent and his constant suppression by his brother, Jia Fu. Fang Yuan approaches him, offering a 'big business deal' that he claims will help Jia Jinsheng gain a larger share of his family's assets. Jia Jinsheng, initially suspicious and angered by a past interaction, is intrigued by Fang Yuan's knowledge of his secret family affairs and, despite his doubts, agrees to hear him out, leading them to a private discussion.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan chose him for this transaction because of his weaker cultivation and manipulability, not because of his 'honesty'.
The Flower Wine Monk possessed a Rank five Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider, which was key to his mobility and likely created the secret cave.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance is contingent on destroying the Guyue clan and slaughtering its village.
He plans to kill Fang Yuan to claim the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance entirely for himself.
His image wall can replay for extended periods, activated by those with 'no good feelings towards the Guyue clan'.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance is conditional on destroying the Guyue clan and slaughtering its village.
The Flower Wine Monk is revealed to have died in the secret cave, leaving behind his inheritance.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance is conditional on the successor destroying the Guyue clan and slaughtering its village.
This cave was likely created by the Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider, not naturally formed.
It contains the image wall and the inheritance of the Flower Wine Monk.

S-REV-062.prose:
==================================================

Chapter 46
According to his memory, Fang Yuan brought Jia Jin Sheng to the crack in the mountain wall again.
The two entered the crack, the path became narrower, and their vision became dark. Jia Jin Sheng became more bewildered as he walked, after all he was not familiar with this place.
Finally, he could not hold it in anymore: "I have a question, Jia Fu has always been honest, kind, and trustworthy.
But I am a swindler, forcing people to buy and sell.
Why did you choose me for this transaction, and not him? "
Fang Yuan's reply came from the crack: "Because his cultivation is too high, if he saw the image wall, he could choose to trade with me, or he could choose to give up and give the image wall to Guyue clan leader.
I don't like to put the initiative in other people's hands.
Moreover, I have never believed in honesty.
The so-called reputation is bullshit, it's just that the benefits are small, and can't move my heart. "
The main reason was that Jia Jin Sheng's status was special, and his cultivation was weak, so it was easier to manipulate him.
But Fang Yuan naturally would not say this out loud.
"Hehe."
Jia Jin Sheng laughed dryly, his suspicions were mostly dispelled, "Your last sentence resonated deeply with me."
The two finally squeezed into the secret cave in the mountain.
Jia Jin Sheng saw the image wall at the first moment, and could not help but laugh heartily: "Haha, I made the right bet, you didn't lie to me!"
Fang Yuan stood behind him, laughed lightly, and did not say anything.
Jia Jin Sheng looked at the image wall, the images on the mountain wall kept changing, replaying the enmity between the Flower Wine Monk and the fourth generation clan leader.
After looking at it once, he looked away, and turned to look at Fang Yuan, saying: "Looks like that fourth generation ancestor of yours is not that great after all."
Fang Yuan said: "This is nothing.
The Guyue clan needs a hero, so the fourth generation became a hero.
Not long after, the Bai clan needs a despicable villain, and the fourth generation will become one.
Hero, villain, these are just other people's opinions. "
"That's wonderful." Jia Jin Sheng clapped his hands and laughed as he looked around the secret cave.
His gaze paused on the skeleton of the Flower Wine Monk, and said: "It's a pity for a fifth rank expert.
Brother, you must have gotten a lot of benefits from him, right? "
The inheritance of a rank five Gu Master was no small matter.
When Jia Jin Sheng thought of this, he couldn't help but be tempted. He couldn't help but ask Fang Yuan about the situation.
Fang Yuan shook his head: "It has been so long, many of the Gu are dead, I only got a Liquor worm."
Jia Jin Sheng didn't believe him. "Brother, don't lie to me.
As long as this deal goes through, we'll all be in cahoots. I won't tell anyone.
Tell me honestly, how much did you gain? "
Fang Yuan sneered, he could not be bothered to reply and did not explain further.
Fang Yuan had already expected Jia Jin Sheng's reaction.
This was the reason why he chose Jia Jin Sheng over Jia Fu.
Jia Jin Sheng continued, minding his own business. "Let's not talk about anything else. I know that the Flower Wine Monk has a famous Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider.
This is a rank five mount Gu. It has a huge body and is extremely good at burrowing into the ground.
The Flower Wine Monk is a demonic cultivator. He can move freely and easily because of this Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider, allowing him to escape from the encirclement of the righteous cultivators. "
"Oh, there's such a thing?" Fang Yuan frowned slightly.
He really hadn't heard much about the Flower Wine Monk.
Jia Jin Sheng said proudly: "When I came to your village last year, I heard this legend and found it interesting, so I went home to ask around.
The Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider and the Flower Wine Monk are inseparable. From what I can see, this secret cave in the mountain was created by the Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider.
Otherwise, how could Qing Mao Mountain's thick and sticky green soil form a secret cave naturally?
Brother, don't try to hide it anymore.
The Flower Wine Monk died here, so his Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider is definitely here! "
Fang Yuan's frown deepened. He faintly felt something was wrong. His gaze was gloomy as he said: "That's right, there are no other exits here.
The Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider's body is huge. If we went through the crack we came in from, we wouldn't be able to squeeze out.
But, there's also the possibility that this Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider was killed by the fourth generation.
Look at the image wall, the Flower Wine Monk did not summon the Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider during the intense battle. "
"Then this matter is even more fishy.
This secret cave can't be formed naturally. It must have been created by the Flower Wine Monk at the last minute.
Without the Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider, does he have other methods? "Jia Jin Sheng looked suspiciously at Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan's eyebrows were knitted into a knot. He felt that something was wrong.
From the new information he had just received from Jia Jin Sheng, he vaguely felt that he had missed out on something.
He couldn't help but fall into deep thought.
Jia Jin Sheng was also thinking. The image wall could no longer satisfy his appetite.
When he confirmed that this matter was true, he really wanted to dig out the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance from Fang Yuan.
Neither of them expected that at this moment, something strange would happen!
Suddenly, the image on the screen wall, which had been in a cycle, flashed.
A heavily injured and extremely pale bald Gu Master replaced the original image and appeared on the image wall.
He slumped weakly on the ground, his back leaning against the mountain wall.
His chest and limbs were filled with deep wounds. But the strange thing was that although these wounds were skin and flesh exposed, they did not bleed.
It was as if all the blood in his body had been sucked dry.
"I am the Flower Wine Monk."
The bald Gu Master snickered, his face sinister and terrifying. "Successor, no matter who you are, to be able to make my image wall replay for close to a hundred days, it is enough to prove that you have no good feelings towards the Guyue clan.
Very well, you are my successor!!
I will leave all my inheritance to you, but I have one condition. You must destroy the Guyue clan for me, and slaughter the entire village, leaving no one alive! "
Jia Jin Sheng stood rooted to the ground, his face full of shock.
"The Rank five Flower Wine Monk's inheritance!"
He was stunned, and for a moment his head buzzed, his thoughts tumbling.
"Oh my god!
A Rank five expert, what kind of concept is that?
A Rank three is a clan elder, and a Rank four is the head of a village.
And a Rank five Gu Master is a mountain lord, able to dominate a mountain and act like a tyrant!
To think that in this small place, there would be a Rank five Gu Master's inheritance. "
"Wait, the Flower Wine Monk is a demonic cultivator, if I inherit his strength, isn't that a little inappropriate?
No, strength has nothing to do with good or evil.
The Flower Wine Monk wants his successor to exterminate the Guyue clan, do you think I will do it?
He is already dead, I just need to inherit his inheritance and not care about it. "
"This is a huge opportunity.
Although I only have D grade talent, if I inherit the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, I might be able to change my talent.
Those rare Gu worms that can raise talent might even be in this inheritance.
If I inherit this wealth and become a Rank four or five Gu Master, I will be able to fight against Jia Fu! "
"Wait!
I almost forgot, there is still an outsider.
What should I do? "
"Do I have to split the inheritance with him?
No, kill him!
Only by killing him will I be able to keep this secret.
Right, calm him down first, and say that we will split the inheritance equally to deceive him, so that he will let down his guard. Then I will ambush him and kill him here.
This place is so well hidden, even if I kill him, no one will know. "
Although he thought so much, it was only a short moment.
Having made up his mind, Jia Jin Sheng squinted his eyes and a fake smile appeared on his face.
He slowly turned around and faced Fang Yuan. Just as he was about to speak, he saw two eerie blue moonblades shooting towards him!
His pupils shrunk to the size of a needle. The distance was too short, he could not react in time!
"You …" His voice stopped abruptly.
The moonblades accurately hit his neck.
In an instant, his head flew up into the sky, blood gushing out like a fountain.
After a second or two, his body fell to the ground with a thud.
Boiling hot blood sprayed on the mountain wall, dying the withered vines red.
"Killing is killing, why think so much." Fang Yuan looked at the corpse on the ground indifferently, before turning his gaze to the image wall.
"To think that there would be such a twist.
Really interesting. "He mumbled, his eyes shining with a faint light.

==================================================

S-REV-062.summary: Fang Yuan leads Jia Jinsheng through a narrow mountain crack to the secret cave, where he reveals the image wall. Jia Jinsheng, impressed by the wall's content, becomes suspicious of Fang Yuan's prior gains from the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, particularly mentioning the Thousand Miles Earthwolf Spider. Suddenly, the image wall reveals a final message from the Flower Wine Monk, offering his Rank five inheritance on the condition that his successor exterminates the Guyue clan. Overwhelmed by greed, Jia Jinsheng immediately plots to kill Fang Yuan to claim the inheritance for himself, but Fang Yuan, anticipating this, strikes first with moonblades, decapitating Jia Jinsheng and securing the inheritance.

continuityMutations.content: He was previously killed by Fang Yuan, contributing to Fang Yuan's fearsome reputation.

S-REV-063.prose:
Chapter 48 The rain continued to fall. Dark clouds covered the sky, and the mountains in the distance merged into a lump of ink. The curtain of rain interweaved heaven and earth together. Crack! The sky suddenly brightened, and a bolt of lightning like a silver snake cut through the sky, then suddenly disappeared. It was almost summer, and this late spring rain seemed to bring a hint of summer's warmth. On Qing Mao Mountain, large patches of green spear bamboos stood tall, resisting the wind and rain. The bamboo bodies were still straight like spears, the bamboo tips pointing towards the sky. In the Gu Yue Village, countless tall buildings were lined up in rows, their heads buried as they endured the washing of the heavy rain. Outside the village, the caravan had already set off again. "The rain is heavy, pay attention to the road." "Don't fall behind, Gu Masters lead the Gu worms, especially the fat beetles, don't get stuck on the mountain path!" "You mortal martial artists, keep your eyes open and take good care of the goods. If you lose even one, I'll settle the score with you! " Shouts rose and fell from the caravan. After staying in the Guyue village for three days, the caravan left, following the Qing Mao mountain path towards their next destination. The rain washed the land, and the roads around the village were paved with cobblestones. But after 500 meters, there was a muddy and narrow mountain path. The proud ostrich hung its head down at this time. Its brightly colored feathers were soaked by the rain and stuck together into pieces. It was truly a drenched chicken. The fat beetle twisted its fat body, moving forward very slowly. The rain hit its black leather armor, forming streams of water that slid down to the ground on both sides. The furry mountain spiders were also drenched, their green-black fur sticking together. But those toad Gu happily cried out, carrying the goods and Gu Masters, jumping up and down the mountain. There was also the winged serpent, already keeping its wings. The thick snake body moved happily in the muddy water. To protect the goods and prevent them from being drenched by the rain, the Gu Masters displayed their abilities.

On the bodies of a few fat fat beetles, there were Gu Masters standing in the middle. Their hands were raised high, and an inch above their palms, each had a single qi golden light worm floating in the air. The Green Bronze True Essence rose like water vapor and poured into the body of the Golden Light Insect. The Gu worm's whole body was shining like a golden bean, and with this circle as the center, it held up a huge pale golden air barrier. The hemispherical air shield covered a large area. Apart from covering a fat beetle completely, there was still more than enough space. When the raindrops hit the air shield, they bounced off as if they were hitting an umbrella. But this Yi Qi Golden Light Worm expended primeval essence continuously, and after a long time, a Rank one Gu Master would not be able to endure it. Sure enough, after a while, a Gu Master shouted, "I can't hold on any longer, my primeval essence is almost depleted. Who will replace me? " "I'll do it!" Almost immediately, a Gu Master rushed over and took over his position. Some Gu Masters who were pulling carts or riding mountain spiders activated the green silk Gu in their bodies. Under the green silk Gu's power, the Gu Master's hair grew wildly. A normal person would have at least a hundred thousand strands of hair. A hundred thousand strands of hair would each grow to five to six meters long. They interweaved with each other, wrapping around the Gu Master's body and the Gu mount under their buttocks, forming a temporary impenetrable black hair cloak. Green Silk Gu was a Rank one Gu worm, often used by Gu Masters to defend and attack. When used, it expended thirty percent of the green bronze primeval essence, unlike the Yi Qi Golden Light Worm which required continuous primeval essence output. If this Green Silk Gu was refined with the Rank one Black Boar Gu, it would advance to the Rank two Black Mane Gu. When the Black Mane Gu was activated, not only the hair, but all the hair on the body would become black and thick. In a few breaths, the Gu Master's body would grow into a black mane armor. If the Black Mane Gu continued to advance, it would become the famous Rank three Gu, the Steel Mane Gu. Other than the Yi Qi Golden Light Worm and Green Silk Gu, many Gu Masters in the caravan chose the Water Spider Gu. It could be seen that these Gu Masters were covered in a thin layer of light blue water cloak. On the surface of the water cloak, water flowed continuously. When the raindrops hit the water cloak, they immediately fused with the water cloak. The Gu Masters were continuously drenched, and the water cloak on their body became thicker.

Every once in a while, the Gu Master would need to activate the Water Spider Gu to drain the excess water from the water cloak. At this time, the thick water cloak would be reduced to a thin layer. As for those mortal martial artists, they were rushing back and forth on the muddy road, taking care of the goods. Most of them were wearing straw raincoats, but in the chaos, the straw raincoat's effect was limited, and they were all drenched by the rain. "This damned weather!" The martial artists cursed in their hearts. In the rain, the mountain roads were even harder to walk. In such weather, no matter how strong the martial artists were, they were still mortals. If they were drenched and overworked, it was extremely easy to catch a cold. A serious illness would be a light one, but there might even be repercussions. If the illness was serious, they might even be abandoned by the Gu Master on the road. If they met with a landslide on the mountain road, or if they were attacked by wild beasts or Gu worms, they might even lose their lives. The caravan was huge, and there were many Gu Masters. But every time they travelled, there would be a large number of casualties. Mortal martial artists died the most, and Gu Masters would also have casualties. If the caravan was unlucky enough to meet with a large migrating beast group, there was a possibility of the entire caravan being wiped out. In fact, other than these natural disasters, there were also man-made disasters. The villages along the way might not all welcome the caravan. Some of the mountain strongholds liked to rob outsiders. "Let's go, see you next year!" Some Gu Masters sat on their Gu worms, turning their bodies and waving goodbye to the Guyue village. At the entrance of the village, many people gathered together, sending off the caravan with their gazes. "You must come again next year." The children shouted reluctantly. The adults' gazes were much more complicated. "The future is uncertain, the world is difficult. Next year, I wonder how many familiar faces will be left in the village? " "Whether it is a caravan or living in a village, it is not easy to make a living."
S-REV-063.summary: A heavy late spring rain falls on Qing Mao Mountain, as a merchant caravan departs Guyue Village. Gu Masters use various Gu worms like the Yi Qi Golden Light Worm, Green Silk Gu, and Water Spider Gu to protect themselves and their goods from the downpour, highlighting the challenges of travel and the utility of Gu worms. Mortal martial artists struggle, exposed to the elements and contemplating the dangers of the journey.

continuityMutations.content: Jia Jin Sheng's father intended for him to gain experience and humility by traveling with Jia Fu, not for him to be directly killed.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance is a more valuable target than using Jia Jin Sheng as a pawn, altering his previous plans.
He must temporarily hide in the village and avoid the secret cave to prevent exposure of Jia Jin Sheng's murder.
He killed Jia Jin Sheng to acquire the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, viewing Jia Jin Sheng as expendable after the inheritance was discovered.
He plans to use the murder of Jia Jin Sheng to sow discord between the three villages, infiltrate the Jia Family, and dispose of stolen goods, though these plans are now altered by the inheritance.
He understands his current cultivation level is low and his body's stamina is limited, requiring him to be strategic and use heavy attacks in combat.
He deliberately maintains a fearsome and undefeatable image to intimidate peers and facilitate extortion.
He was murdered by Fang Yuan the previous night, his body disposed of and the scene covered by the heavy rain.
He never understood his father's intention for him to learn humility by traveling with Jia Fu, a detail revealed by Fang Yuan's inner thoughts.
He was tasked by the Jia Family Head to lead the caravan with Jia Jin Sheng, partly as a test of his temperament and ability to tolerate his brother.
He deliberately arranged for Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu to travel together, hoping Jia Jin Sheng would learn reality and live a peaceful life, and to test Jia Fu's character.
Left behind an inheritance of strength, altering Fang Yuan's original plans regarding Jia Jin Sheng.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked towards the village in the rain, holding an umbrella.

S-REV-064.prose:
The caravan moved further and further away, and the crowd gradually dispersed. The lively atmosphere of the market also disappeared without a trace. The place where the tents and stalls were set up was left with a huge mess. The turf was trampled by the endless stream of people, revealing grass roots and soil. When the rain fell on it, it immediately turned into mud, and there were countless potholes and muddy puddles. Other than that, there was also a lot of household garbage left behind. Fang Yuan stood alone on a secluded hill, looking at the caravan from afar. The caravan was like a fat colourful python, under the grey rain, following the narrow mountain path, slowly entering the dense forest. "The heavens are really on my side …" Fang Yuan sighed lightly. He held a butter paper umbrella, standing quietly in the rain. He wore the most ordinary linen clothes, his body was thin, his skin was pale like a fifteen year old, and he had a head of clean black short hair. The ends of his hair trembled slightly under the umbrella. Others cursed the horrible weather, but he sighed at the timing of the rain. He killed Jia Jin Sheng last night, and cleaned up the scene. But it happened suddenly, and there was something wrong. Especially the smell of blood, because the secret cave was not ventilated, it was not easy to get rid of. This heavy rain washed the land and the air, and greatly weakened the detection methods that relied on smell. There would definitely be a small waterfall falling from the stone crevice, and after the fresh water vapor was diluted, it was almost impossible to be exposed in a short period of time. Of course, the longer the time, the higher the possibility of being exposed. In this world, there were all kinds of wonderful Gu worms, and a variety of detection methods. Even Fang Yuan only knew a part of them. The rain hit the surface of the butter paper umbrella, making dripping sounds. Then, along the ribs of the umbrella, streams of water flowed down, hitting the green stone under Fang Yuan's feet, splashing water. Seeing the caravan turn around the corner, and completely entering the dense forest, Fang Yuan did not show a trace of happiness, but instead had a serious look. "Although Jia Jin Sheng's cultivation is weak, and his talent is low, his status is special. Everyone in the caravan is busy, so no one noticed his disappearance in a short period of time. However, it wouldn't be long before someone noticed. At that time, Jia Fu will come back to investigate, and the real challenge will come.

" "The Jia Family Head purposely arranged for Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu to lead the caravan together. In terms of cultivation, Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu are worlds apart. In terms of wisdom, Jia Jin Sheng is even more inferior. This arrangement by the Jia Family Head is to let Jia Jin Sheng suffer a blow, to let him see the reality, and live a peaceful life. At the same time, it is also to test Jia Fu's temperament. If the blow is too great, to the point where he can't even tolerate his own brother, how can he pass the position of Jia Family Head to him? " "Jia Jin Sheng never truly understood his father's good intentions. Although he has some intelligence, it is a pity that he is only a superficial person. What a pity. What a pity for such a good chess piece. " Fang Yuan sighed in his heart. With 500 years of experience, he had long seen through the surface, and perceived the deep nature of this matter. When he saw the complicated relationship between Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu in the dispute last night, he immediately had a vague plan in his mind. In his plan, Jia Jin Sheng was a very suitable chess piece. His cultivation was weak, but his status was very high. Although he was clever, his experience was too shallow, and he could completely control him. Once this chess piece was controlled, it would be very useful. Firstly, he could establish a stable channel to dispose of stolen goods, and prepare to kill and rob in the future. Secondly, Fang Yuan would hide behind the scenes, and use him and the shadow wall to provoke the conflict between the three villages on Qing Mao Mountain, causing a civil war, and benefit from it. Thirdly, he could rely on him to infiltrate the Jia Family. In the future, the Jia Family's property dispute would cause the Venomous Insect Fighting Conference, and it would be a major event. There were many benefits, and Fang Yuan could definitely get the most out of it. "My current cultivation is too low, and my hands and feet are tied when I do things. If I have a chess piece that I can use, I can do things that I cannot do. Not only is it convenient, but the risk is also greatly reduced. If I am exposed in the future, I can just abandon this chess piece, and I will still be free. " "The people around me are all loyal to the family, and not easy to manipulate. Only an outsider like Jia Jin Sheng can solve the problem easily.

What a pity, I did not expect the Flower Wine Monk to leave behind an inheritance of strength. " The Flower Wine Monk was a Rank five Gu Master, and his inheritance was naturally more valuable than a chess piece like Jia Jin Sheng. Of course, if he could have both, that would be the best. But facing such a precious treasure, Jia Jin Sheng could no longer be controlled, so he could only abandon it. "Most things in this world do not go your way." Fang Yuan shook his head and sighed. The appearance of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance broke Fang Yuan's original plan. And after the shadow wall changed, the previous scene disappeared, and only a line of words appeared, telling Fang Yuan to break the shadow wall, and a hole would appear. Walk down the hole, and you will receive the inheritance of strength. The words only appeared for a few breaths, and then disappeared. The shadow wall also returned to the most ordinary mountain wall. Fang Yuan had been busy last night dealing with the murder scene, and had no time to break the shadow wall. "Killing Jia Jin Sheng in a hurry, there are many repercussions, just that it has not been revealed yet. Although I have successfully destroyed the corpse, there will definitely be a lot of trouble. This way, the method of exposing the Liquor worm will have to be changed. Also, I can't go to the secret cave in the rock crevice for now. I have to hide in the village for the time being, and guard against the investigation. " Fang Yuan turned around, holding the umbrella, and walked towards the village in the rain. "But this is also good. Recently, I have been consuming large amounts of Yuan stone, and have refined middle stage primeval essence. Using middle stage primeval essence to nourish my aperture, I can break through to middle stage in the near future. Once I reach middle stage, my strength will double. At that time, I will have a higher chance of inheriting the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance. " The inheritance of the demonic path was not as gentle as that of the righteous path. There would usually be dangerous tests. If one could not pass the test, the price would often be their life. "Life is hard to predict, but it is also because of this that it is interesting." Fang Yuan's lips curled into a cold smile.

Under the heavy rain, the green mountains stretched endlessly, suffused with greyish green, appearing oppressive and heavy. A gust of wind blew, and the raindrops slanted, hitting Fang Yuan's shoulder, and a chill assaulted him. He then thought of Jia Jin Sheng. He sighed in his heart: "Jia Jin Sheng, actually … I didn't want to kill you." What a waste of a good chess piece. ================================================== Chapter 49 This heavy rain lasted for four days before it stopped. The sun rose high into the sky, lifting the curtain of rain, as if it was opening the curtains for summer. The breath of summer was already faintly discernible. The weather became clearer, sweeping away the lingering breath of spring, and the temperature gradually rose. In the spring night, the active dragonpill crickets retreated, hiding deep in the ground to lay eggs. The unique green spear bamboo on Qing Mao mountain began to grow crazily, growing taller almost every day. The leaves of the plants started to turn from emerald green to dark green. The green mountains stretched on, looking even more verdant. The sky was clear, blue like a crystal. Clap clap clap. In the arena of the academy, there was the sound of fists and legs clashing. After more than ten moves, Guyue Mobei was kicked in the stomach by Fang Yuan. He staggered back five to six steps, just out of the circle drawn on the ground. The martial arts instructor stood outside the arena, presiding over the match. Seeing this, he immediately announced, "Guyue Mobei has been knocked out of the arena, Guyue Fang Yuan wins 33 rounds in a row!" "Hmph, I lost to you again this time." Guyue Mobei gritted his teeth, his eyes staring at Fang Yuan, "But don't be arrogant. One day, I will defeat you. And I can already feel it, that day is getting closer and closer! " Fang Yuan looked at him expressionlessly, then lowered his eyelids, "That kick just now has caused you to bleed internally. You'd better heal your injuries first before we talk. " "What's this small injury?" Guyue Mobei had just retorted half a sentence when his expression suddenly changed.
S-REV-064.summary: Fang Yuan stands alone on a secluded hill, observing the departing caravan. He reflects on his murder of Jia Jin Sheng the previous night, noting how the heavy rain fortuitously washed away evidence, greatly aiding his concealment. He re-evaluates his initial complex plans involving Jia Jin Sheng due to the unexpected discovery of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, realizing he must now hide and prepare for the inheritance challenges.

continuityMutations.content: His physical stamina is nearing its limit after 33 consecutive matches, despite his powerful facade.
The academy, specifically the elder, wants to curb his dominance to prevent other students from losing their fighting spirit.
His participation in the matches is primarily to maintain his intimidating image for future extortion, not for the prize money.
He is aware that Fang Yuan is close to exhaustion and that aggressive students could defeat him.
He frequently challenges Fang Yuan in the academy arena and is repeatedly defeated.
He is kicked in the stomach by Fang Yuan, causing him to vomit blood, marking a more severe injury than usual.
He presides over the academy matches and attempts to motivate students.
He is frustrated by the students' fear of Fang Yuan and their unwillingness to fight.
He clashes verbally with Fang Yuan over his aggressive fighting style and defiance.
He attempts to use the prize and his authority to force Fang Yuan to continue fighting or lose face, but fails.
He instructs the instructor to suppress Fang Yuan's influence to prevent other students from losing courage.
A place for combat practice and fostering fighting spirit among young Gu Masters.

S-REV-065.prose:
Under the heavy rain, the green mountains stretched endlessly, suffused with greyish green, appearing oppressive and heavy. A gust of wind blew, and the raindrops slanted, hitting Fang Yuan's shoulder, and a chill assaulted him. He then thought of Jia Jin Sheng. He sighed in his heart: "Jia Jin Sheng, actually … I didn't want to kill you." What a waste of a good chess piece. ================================================== Chapter 49 This heavy rain lasted for four days before it stopped. The sun rose high into the sky, lifting the curtain of rain, as if it was opening the curtains for summer. The breath of summer was already faintly discernible. The weather became clearer, sweeping away the lingering breath of spring, and the temperature gradually rose. In the spring night, the active dragonpill crickets retreated, hiding deep in the ground to lay eggs. The unique green spear bamboo on Qing Mao mountain began to grow crazily, growing taller almost every day. The leaves of the plants started to turn from emerald green to dark green. The green mountains stretched on, looking even more verdant. The sky was clear, blue like a crystal. Clap clap clap. In the arena of the academy, there was the sound of fists and legs clashing. After more than ten moves, Guyue Mobei was kicked in the stomach by Fang Yuan. He staggered back five to six steps, just out of the circle drawn on the ground. The martial arts instructor stood outside the arena, presiding over the match. Seeing this, he immediately announced, "Guyue Mobei has been knocked out of the arena, Guyue Fang Yuan wins 33 rounds in a row!" "Hmph, I lost to you again this time." Guyue Mobei gritted his teeth, his eyes staring at Fang Yuan, "But don't be arrogant. One day, I will defeat you. And I can already feel it, that day is getting closer and closer! " Fang Yuan looked at him expressionlessly, then lowered his eyelids, "That kick just now has caused you to bleed internally. You'd better heal your injuries first before we talk. " "What's this small injury?" Guyue Mobei had just retorted half a sentence when his expression suddenly changed.

His throat could not help but roll, and he vomited a mouthful of blood. His face turned pale, this was the first time he had suffered such an injury! He could not help but reveal a look of terror in his eyes. The martial arts instructor quickly walked over, comforting him, "Don't worry, this injury will be healed after a few days of rest. Just that you have to stop training for a few days, you can't do any intense activities. " The moment he said that, two healing Gu Masters outside rushed over and carefully supported Guyue Mobei out. Guyue Mochen didn't dare to speak again. He looked deeply at Fang Yuan, his eyes filled with anger, resentment, regret, and unwillingness. "Although Mobei's martial arts are very good, he still can't beat Fang Yuan." "Fang Yuan is too powerful. No one can beat him!" "The Mobei was actually beaten to the point of vomiting blood. How terrifying. I don't want to fight this guy. " "Sigh, but the instructor said that today is actual combat practice, fighting in the arena! Everyone has to go up and fight. " The students stood outside the arena. Some looked at Fang Yuan in fear, some sighed, some looked pale, and some were on tenterhooks. Among them, there were even some who were injured. Some of them covered their bruised and swollen faces, while others pressed down on their arms and sucked in cold air. There were even some lying on the ground, massaging their thighs. "Next!" No one went up for a long time, and the instructor shouted. But no one answered. Usually, only Guyue Mobei, Guyue Cheng, and Guyue Fangzheng had the courage to challenge Fang Yuan. But these three had already been beaten down. The students were silent, and some of them even took a few steps back. The instructor looked at the students' cowering expressions, and frowned.

He couldn't help but think of the academy elder's words, "These days, Fang Yuan's limelight is too much, we need to suppress him. The other students are suppressed by him to the point they can't even lift their heads. If this goes on, their courage will be destroyed. Our academy is nurturing tigers and wolves that dare to fight against strong enemies, not lambs that are afraid to fight. " "What's wrong with all of you? No matter how strong Fang Yuan is, he is only fifteen years old, he is the same age as all of you! He is the same age as all of you, he eats the same food and drinks the same water as all of you. He doesn't have three heads and six arms, he is not a monster! Gather your courage, let me see the pride of the Guyue family buried in your hearts! "The instructor roared, trying his best to motivate the students. "But he is too strong, we can't beat him at all." "The students that fought with him were all so pitiful. Mobei was even beaten until he vomited blood. " "Fang Yuan's attacks are getting heavier, instructor, we don't dare to fight with him." The students retorted in a small voice, cowardly. The instructor was so angry he almost stomped his feet. This bunch of ignorant kids! He could clearly see that Fang Yuan had fought thirty-three consecutive battles without any rest. Although Fang Yuan had been adjusting his breathing, he was almost out of energy. Fang Yuan's attacks were getting heavier, this meant that he was no longer as skilled as before, he was slowly losing control of the situation. If they put in a bit more effort, they could force him to show signs of fatigue. If they put in a few more people, they could defeat him on the spot! Once they defeated Fang Yuan, his power would drop drastically, the students' courage would be ignited, and the goal of suppressing Fang Yuan would be achieved. But now, the students were all intimidated by Fang Yuan's tiger skin. Sometimes, what defeated oneself was not the strong enemy, but one's own heart. The instructor was anxious and continued to encourage them. But he was not good with words, he had said the same thing before, igniting the students' blood and igniting a few challengers. But he had said the same thing too many times, the students were already numb to it.

Fang Yuan crossed his arms, coldly watching everything. Although he was standing in the center of the field, he seemed like an outsider. The instructor had been encouraging for a long time, but the students were still looking at each other, no one moved. The instructor could not help but feel angry and helpless. He turned to face Fang Yuan, and unhappily scolded, "Fang Yuan, you are also at fault. Your attacks are getting more and more vicious, sparring with fellow students should be more gentle and friendly, how can you be so heavy-handed? Next, you need to be more careful, be careful when you attack. If you beat your fellow students until they vomit blood again, I will judge you as the loser and let you leave the field! " "Instructor, you are wrong." Fang Yuan coldly snorted, his eyes did not show any signs of weakness, facing the instructor, "Sparring, naturally we need to give it our all, otherwise how can we achieve the purpose of training? Don't tell me that when we fight in the future, can we also ask our enemies to be gentle and friendly? " The instructor was enraged, "Hmph, your attacks are vicious, you hurt your fellow students, and you still dare to twist words and force logic!" "Instructor, you are wrong again." Fang Yuan coldly sneered, "You are the one who arranged this sparring, and raised the prize to twenty Yuan stone. Without your instigation, would these people be injured? " "Bastard!" The instructor was not good with words, pointing at Fang Yuan, he roared, "Do you still want the prize or not? If you continue to quibble, even if you get the first place, I will still judge you as the loser! You are not united and friendly, and you dare to contradict your teacher, how can you be qualified to get twenty Yuan stone! " Fang Yuan laughed, "It is only a win or lose, only twenty Yuan stone, do you think I care?" As he spoke, he turned around and walked out of the center of the field, under the astonished gaze of the crowd. Although the screen wall was not sold, but Fang Yuan had more than a hundred Yuan stone in his hands. Moreover, this time, he was not here for the Yuan stone. "You!" Seeing Fang Yuan really walk out of the field, the instructor could not help but be stunned, revealing a look of shock and confusion. Shouldn't a fifteen year old youth be full of vigor, eager to fight? Fang Yuan had such fighting talent, his temperament should be even more so. Why did he just leave the field?

Moreover, this Fang Yuan did not have any funding, so the Yuan stone should be very tight. Why couldn't he be attracted by these twenty Primal Stones? For a moment, the instructor was stunned on the spot, not knowing what to do. Fang Yuan did not fall into the trap, directly walking out of the field. The instructor suddenly realized: There was really no way to deal with Fang Yuan. With his status, he could not blatantly find trouble and force Fang Yuan to go on stage, right? The surrounding students all retreated, keeping a distance from Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan stood outside the field, with no one beside him. With him as the center, five steps around him, there was a circular empty space. Unfortunately. If they stood beside Fang Yuan, they would hear Fang Yuan trying his best to suppress his breathing. "I don't have enough stamina." Fang Yuan sighed in his heart. On the surface, he looked energetic, but his body, which was covered by his clothes, was trembling slightly. His body was only that of a fifteen year old, and he did not have the help of a Gu worm. Thirty-three matches consecutively, he was close to his limit. Although he had rich fighting experience from his previous life, but in this period of time, the other youngsters' martial arts had improved greatly. From their bodies, Fang Yuan could already feel an increasingly strong pressure. This pressure was directly reflected in Fang Yuan's attacks. His attacks were getting heavier, and he could not hold back anymore. In the previous battles, the students were too weak, thus he could handle them easily, and the youngsters only suffered some injuries at most. But now, his control over the field was getting weaker, and he had to use heavy attacks to stabilize the situation. "Experience is not omnipotent after all. The power of any thought needs a material foundation to have a medium. "Fang Yuan squinted his eyes. Actually, he had already seen through the instructor's thoughts. He was not surprised, and had already expected that there would be pressure from the academy. Ever since he killed Gao Wan, there were fewer and fewer people who dared to challenge him.

When he was extorting, many people were pressured by his pressure, and did not dare to resist, obediently handing over Yuan stone. If this went on for a long time, Fang Yuan's undefeatable image would be established. It would leave a shadow in the hearts of the other youngsters, and cause them to lose confidence in their martial arts from the start. This was something the academy elder did not want to see. He needed Fang Yuan to promote the improvement of the students, but he did not want Fang Yuan to completely extinguish the students' fighting spirit. He wanted to see Fang Yuan fail. Once Fang Yuan fails, the undefeatable image he had built up in the early stages would be destroyed. At the same time, it would awaken the other students' fighting spirit. And after a setback, it would mold their unyielding fighting spirit. But to Fang Yuan, he needed this kind of deterrence, to make it easier to extort Yuan stone. If he fails, the youngsters would realize his weakness, and attack together. Although Fang Yuan had a lot of Yuan stone, but extortion was his main source of Yuan stone. If he lost this source, he would be like a water without a source. So Fang Yuan went on stage, and fought 33 consecutive matches. His real goal, was not the 20 Yuan stone reward, but to maintain his deterrence. If he avoided battle from the start, it would only show his weakness. But if he continued to fight, he would be exposed. "What are you all standing there for, who hasn't gone on stage yet, go on. The first place gets 20 Yuan stone reward, don't you want it? "The martial arts instructor was stunned for a while, before shouting out loud. The remaining students immediately became enthusiastic. Fang Yuan had already left the stage, and it was as if an invisible boulder had been lifted from their hearts. "I'll go!" "I'll go!" The two youngsters fought to be the first, jumped onto the stage, and began exchanging blows. "Sigh, if I had known, I would have waited, and not rushed to go on stage, and wouldn't have been chased off the stage by Fang Yuan." "What a pity, I didn't expect Fang Yuan to go on stage." "He really dares, look, even the instructor can't do anything to him."

… … The instructor heard the whispers behind him, and immediately felt his prestige dropping. He was very annoyed, and really wanted to punish Fang Yuan. But Fang Yuan didn't do anything wrong, taking the initiative to leave the stage was allowed. The instructor was depressed and helpless, in the end, he looked at Fang Yuan, and glared at the latter. Fang Yuan's lips curled into an angle, and thought: "Such shallow methods, this instructor is quite cute."
S-REV-065.summary: Fang Yuan dominates the academy arena, defeating Guyue Mobei with a kick that causes internal bleeding, further intimidating the other students. The Martial Arts Instructor, acting on the Academy Elder's concerns, attempts to motivate the cowering students and scolds Fang Yuan for his aggressive tactics. Fang Yuan defiantly argues his methods are necessary for true training and strategically withdraws from the arena after making his point, leaving the instructor frustrated and the students energized by his absence.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan's independence and lack of fear challenge the clan's traditional methods of control.
The emergence of social circles around Fangzheng, Chicheng, and Mobei presents an opportunity to exert control and suppress Fang Yuan.
The clan uses a long-term strategy of 'brainwashing,' rewards, and systemic integration to control its members, even the rebellious ones.
Fang Yuan's rejection of other youths who tried to rely on him because he considered them useless.
The Academy Elder feels an unusual disgust towards Fang Yuan, which clashes with his motto of teaching without discrimination, leading him to question his own composure.
The Academy Elder believes Fang Yuan's refusal to revere the clan or his teachers makes him a threat to the clan's control and influence over other students, necessitating his suppression.
The Academy Elder identifies Guyue Fangzheng, Chicheng, and Mobei as the most likely candidates to advance to Rank one middle stage first, hoping they can suppress Fang Yuan's influence.
The Academy Elder understands the clan's system of 'brainwashing' and resource control to integrate and control its members, believing it will eventually bind even Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan is depicted as slippery, knowledgeable about rules, calm under pressure, and unafraid of authority, treating disobedience as insignificant.
Fang Yuan rejects other youths who try to rely on him, viewing them as having too little value as pawns.
Fang Yuan has successfully advanced to Rank one middle stage using a Liquor worm.
Guyue Fangzheng is short on Yuan stones due to Fang Yuan taking his allowance and his aunt's financial difficulties.
Guyue Fangzheng is determined to surpass Fang Yuan in cultivation due to his A-grade talent.
Guyue Fangzheng is close to Rank one middle stage, expecting to advance in three to four days.
Guyue Chicheng is receiving dangerous primeval essence infusions from his grandfather, Guyue Lian, to accelerate his advancement to middle stage.
Guyue Chicheng is willing to sacrifice his future cultivation potential and development space for the Chi family's benefit by accepting foreign primeval essence.
Guyue Chicheng has been told about the Cleansing Water Gu as a potential future solution to the side effects of his accelerated cultivation.
Guyue Chicheng's grandfather has arranged for him to receive a Liquor worm to aid his cultivation.
Guyue Mobei has sustained internal injuries but has recovered.
Guyue Mobei noticed Fang Yuan's hurried breathing during their fight, concluding Fang Yuan is not as strong as generally perceived.
Guyue Mobei receives encouragement and care from his sister, Mo Yan.
Guyue Mobei plans to use his recovery time to nourish his aperture walls and advance to middle stage, aiming to become class monitor and suppress Fang Yuan.
Guyue Mobei is determined to defeat Fang Yuan in a fair fight and prove the importance of talent in cultivation.
A place for nurturing battle instincts and identifying future leaders
Social circles form naturally among students, indicating nascent power structures
Contains the Academy Elder's study table with his motto: 'As a teacher, teach without discrimination'

S-REV-066.prose:
Chapter 50
A pair of deep eyes, stared at the training field from afar.
The academy elder stood by the window on the third floor, watching everything that happened in the training field.
He frowned deeply.
The moment Fang Yuan took the initiative to enter the stage, he could not help but feel astonished.
He did not expect Fang Yuan to do so.
"This kid, he is quite slippery.
He is well versed in the academy's rules, and has never made any mistakes.
Although he often sleeps in class, but once he is asked, his answers are always comprehensive, and no one can pick out any mistakes.
To catch his weakness and suppress his aura, it will be difficult. "
Unknowingly, the academy elder felt a slight sense of disgust towards Fang Yuan.
As a teacher, he naturally liked obedient and smart students.
He hated those who did not follow the rules, and were mischievous.
But the academy elder had been in charge of the academy for many years, and was very experienced. He had seen countless students.
Among them, there were those who were extremely obedient and obedient.
There were also those who caused trouble all day long, and always broke the rules.
He had already achieved a state of calm, and treated everyone equally.
And at the same time, he carved the words "As a teacher, teach without discrimination" on the right corner of his study table, as his motto.
He had never felt such disgust towards a student.
Feeling the disgust in his heart, the academy elder was a little surprised.
In the previous years, even the most mischievous students, he was able to tolerate them. Why did he lose his composure when facing Fang Yuan?
He thought about it carefully, and after a while, he finally found the reason.
Fang Yuan, this kid, had a kind of arrogance in his bones!
It was as if he did not care about the teachers at all.
Not only did he not listen to the martial arts instructor's words, he even publicly refuted him.
Actually, the phenomenon of students refuting their teachers in public was a common occurrence in the previous years.
But those kids, always had agitated emotions.
If it was not rebellious, then it was anger, arrogance, etc.
The academy elder was very clear, the more agitated the youths were, the more fearful they were.
But Fang Yuan did not have any.
He did not have the slightest bit of fear in his heart, as if he had seen through the academy's tricks.
His face was cold, and even when he stepped down from the stage, there was no change in his expression.
It was as if he had done something insignificant.
Yes, he treated the matter of disobeying his teacher as a trivial matter!
In short —
He was not afraid.
It was this point that caused the academy elder to feel displeased and disgusted!
The academy elder could tolerate youngsters who were ten times more troublesome and mischievous than Fang Yuan. That was because these students all knew fear, and they were all controlled by their agitated emotions.
As long as they were afraid, as long as they were impulsive, they would be easily manipulated.
But not Fang Yuan.
He was calm and collected, not taking his teacher seriously.
He did not revere it!
If one did not revere the clan, even if he was raised, how could he be used by the clan?
"Once such a person appears, he must be suppressed. He must be suppressed!
Otherwise, his existence would plant the seeds of resistance in the hearts of the other students.
As time went on, it infected the others, and they no longer respected their teachers.
As a school, how are we supposed to manage the students? "
The Academy Elder squinted his eyes and made up his mind.
But soon, a worried expression appeared on his face again.
How was he going to suppress Fang Yuan?
Fang Yuan did not make any mistakes, and he could not find any weaknesses.
Fang Yuan's slipperiness gave him a helpless feeling of not knowing where to start.
He had never met a student who was so familiar with all the rules of the academy.
As the academy elder, he had always been fair and just.
He could not be like a hooligan, purposely finding fault with Fang Yuan.
He had placed his hopes on the martial arts instructor, but he was deeply disappointed.
"Looks like to suppress Fang Yuan's limelight, I can only wait for the other students to advance to Rank one middle stage."
For a Gu Master to advance, the biggest factor was their talent.
With his rich experience, the academy elder had already calculated in his heart: The ones who had the chance to advance first were Guyue Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei.
One of them was A grade, the other two were B grade, and they had the support of their elders, so they did not lack Yuan stone.
No matter which one it was, they had the possibility of becoming this year's first Rank one middle stage.
"Guyue Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei, these three are the true hope of this year." The Academy Elder looked at the training field and sighed.
With his sharp eyes, he had already discovered: On the training field, the students seemed to be standing casually, but in reality, they had already formed into three circles.
In one circle, Guyue Cheng was holding his shoulder, surrounded by a group of people of the same age.
The second circle's center was Guyue Fangzheng.
The descendants of the clan leader were all subtly relying on this A grade genius.
The third circle was Guyue Mobei.
His internal injuries had already been healed, and he stood in the middle of the training field, his face pale.
The students beside him were asking about his well-being.
"This is the meaning of allowing them to fight." Looking at the three circles, the Academy Elder smiled, full of gratification.
Letting the students fight was not only to nurture their battle instincts, but more importantly, it was to select leaders in advance.
In the previous years, the small circles could only be separated in the second half of the year.
But this year, because of Fang Yuan's sudden appearance and extortion, the fights were brought forward greatly.
Facing Fang Yuan, only Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng dared to challenge him head-on.
After a long period of time, the other youths naturally took these three as their leaders after a subtle and imperceptible influence.
As long as there were no accidents, these three circles would be the future leaders of the clan.
"But these circles are not stable yet, and there are still people moving between the circles.
When the three of them advance to the middle stage, they will be given the positions of class monitor and vice class monitor, and with power, the circle will be stabilized. "The Academy Elder thought.
Of course, there were people who were not in these three circles.
There was only one, and that was Fang Yuan.
It was human nature to rely on the strong.
In fact, even though Fang Yuan extorted the students and stood on the opposite side of everyone.
But it was not that there were no youths who wanted to rely on him.
But these people, were all rejected by Fang Yuan.
To him, only those who were useful were pawns, and these people of the same age had too little value.
This was another reason why the Academy Elder hated Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan was too eccentric, and did not fit in with the group.
For such a person, the clan did not have as much control over him as they did over the other youths.
The Academy Elder's gaze, once again landed on Fang Yuan in the middle of the field.
Fang Yuan stood alone in a corner, his hands behind his back, his eyelids slightly closed. No matter how the youths in the field fought for the prize, his expression did not change at all.
His surroundings were empty, and none of the youths were willing to stand with him.
It was obvious that he did not want these people to stand with him.
He stood alone, and loneliness enveloped him.
He drifted away from the group.
"But, there is no need to worry too much.
This Fang Yuan is still young, he can be trained slowly. "The Academy Elder's eyes flashed as he thought to himself.
"The next step is to set up a class monitor and vice class monitor.
After a year, they will be divided into groups, with a leader and vice leader.
Every year, there will be all sorts of glory and rewards, such as the Little Red Flower Award, Blue Scarf Award, Five Merit Student Award.
If he wants to cultivate, he will need resources, and he will have to compete for these positions and rewards.
After a long time, he will be bound by family, friendship, and love.
There is no need to worry that he will leave the clan's control. "
Over the years, the Academy Elder had gradually come to understand.
Once a new member of the clan was born, the clan would brainwash them.
First, they would be instilled with the clan's supreme values.
Then, they would be taught morals, and they would realize the beauty and importance of family, friendship, and love.
They would also be taught the concept of glory, and in the process of growing up, they would constantly use material rewards to attract them.
Using the clan's established positions, they would select and recruit the most loyal clansmen.
Don't think that the positions of class monitor and vice class monitor were small, but once they became one, they would be integrated into the clan's system.
Under such a system, they would be influenced.
On one side were the benefits and sweetness of power, and on the other side were the disadvantages of leaving the system.
With a carrot in one hand and a stick in the other, who could escape?
Even the most rebellious person, the most eccentric person, would be assimilated into the clan step by step.
Even if there was no loyalty, loyalty would be cultivated.
Even if there was no family, friendship, or love would be involved.
That was the power of the system.
That was the power of rules.
That was the clan's way of survival!
S-REV-066.summary: From his office, the Academy Elder observes Fang Yuan's calm defiance and the emerging social circles among the students on the training field. He feels an unusual disgust towards Fang Yuan, perceiving his lack of fear and reverence as a threat to clan control. The Elder identifies Fangzheng, Chicheng, and Mobei as potential counterweights to Fang Yuan's influence, hoping their advancement will suppress him, and reflects on the clan's long-term strategy for assimilation.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan showed a moment of weakness (hurried breathing) during their fight.
He plans to use his recovery time to advance to Rank one middle stage and secure the class monitor position to suppress Fang Yuan.
Her past regret of only being a vice class monitor motivates her support for Mobei's ambition.
Guyue Mo Yan was worried about Guyue Mobei's injury and potential emotional trauma.
Guyue Mo Yan encourages Mobei's fighting spirit and ambition, reminding him he is a future leader.
Guyue Mo Yan expresses a past regret about only being a vice class monitor, hoping Mobei can achieve the monitor position.

S-REV-067.prose:
Chapter 51
Night fell.
The moon was like a silver plate, appearing between the clouds.
Sparse stars adorned the surroundings.
Guyue Mobei stood in the yard, looking up at the moon, his eyes shining.
"Little brother, I heard you got injured today." Guyue's Mo Yan's voice came from behind him.
"Sister, are you worried that I'll be traumatized after being beaten up so badly?" The Mobei turned around and smiled.
Mo Yan looked at her brother's smile and heaved a sigh of relief.
Even though she was worried, she said, "Of course not. I know you the best.
My good brother, you have an indomitable fighting spirit. You are the future leader of the Mo family. How could you be scared by such a small injury? "
"Hehehe, I know you love me the most." The Mobei scratched his head and laughed.
"Do you know, sister?"
Under the bright moonlight, this fifteen year old youngster's eyes shone with a bright luster. "Although I failed again this time, I heard that Fang Yuan guy's hurried breathing during the battle.
In the past, I was beaten down by him in two or three moves, but he was always calm and composed.
His panting already revealed his weakness.
He is definitely not as strong as most people think.
One day, I will defeat him fair and square! "
"Good, you are indeed a good man of the Mo bloodline!"
Mo Yan laughed and patted her brother's head, showing concern on her face. "But you have internal injuries, so don't practice for the next few days."
"Sister, don't touch my head like that, I'm already a grown-up." The Mobei shook his head and said in a slightly dissatisfied tone, "I know what you are saying.
I already have a plan. I will use these few days to nourish my aperture walls and complete my advancement from initial stage to intermediate stage.
I will first get the class monitor position and suppress Fang Yuan's limelight.
I will let him know that a Gu Master's cultivation focuses on talent! "
"If you think that way, I can rest assured.
I was only a vice class monitor in the past.
If you become a monitor, it will make up for my regret. "
"Sister, don't worry.
I must take the position of class monitor! "
Almost at the same time, in the Chi family …
In the secret room, there was only a torch inserted into the groove of the bluestone wall.
The fire burned fiercely, illuminating the small secret room.
Guyue Lian, one of the two elders in power, was facing his grandson, Guyue Cheng.
The two of them sat cross-legged on the cattail hassock. Their shadows were cast on the ground, swaying along with the dancing flames.
Guyue stretched out his hand and pressed his palm against Chicheng's lower abdomen.
Strands of white silver primeval essence followed the old man's thoughts and poured into Guyue City's aperture.
Guyue Cheng's face was filled with nervousness. His mind was completely focused on his aperture, trying his best to suppress the fluctuation of his primordial sea.
In this world, there are no two identical leaves.
To different Gu Masters, there was no such thing as identical primeval essence.
Once foreign primeval essence entered the aperture, it would cause the primeval essence in the aperture to resist.
If Guyue Cheng did not suppress it and allowed the primeval essence to resist, it would definitely cause a clash of primeval essence.
The violent fluctuation caused by the clash would cause damage to the aperture.
The primordial sea in the aperture was the foundation of a Gu Master's cultivation, it was of utmost importance.
Once the aperture was injured, the cultivation would drop, and the aptitude would drop.
Once the aperture was completely destroyed, the Gu Master would die immediately.
After a while, Guyue Lian slowly stopped the primeval essence injection and retracted his hand.
Guyue Cheng immediately heaved a long sigh of relief, his tense body relaxing. "Thank you grandfather, you have to pour primeval essence into me every three days to nourish the aperture.
I've made you tired! "
Guyue Lian's forehead was full of sweat. He sighed and said, "There is no other way.
Your aptitude is only C grade. If you rely on your strength to advance to middle stage, it would take a long time.
This time is usually twice the time of B grade and four times the time of A grade.
This way, you will be exposed.
So although this method is dangerous, it has to be used. "
"Grandson understands grandfather's good intentions."
"It's good that you understand." The old man sighed again, "This method has a huge side effect.
The aperture walls are being nourished by my white silver primeval essence.
Although the effect of the white silver primeval essence is outstanding, to you, it is still a foreign primeval essence.
From now on, even if the aperture walls change from a light film to a water film, it will still be mixed with my aura.
The more foreign aura there is, the more the aperture will not exist. This is pulling up seedlings to help them grow, it will shrink your future development space. "
Guyue Cheng tightly pursed his lips, "Grandfather, for the future of my Chi family, grandson is willing to sacrifice my own future!"
Guyue Lian's heart was immediately at ease, he nodded and stroked his beard, "You have such thoughts, very good, very good.
But heaven's secrets always leave a way out, you are not without hope.
If you can find the Cleansing Water Gu in the future, you can cleanse your aperture walls and get rid of the foreign aura in the aperture primeval sea, eliminating this side effect. "
"Also.
Grandfather has already used my connections to get people to buy the Liquor worm for you.
This worm can help a Gu Master refine their primeval essence in the Rank one realm, advancing by a small realm.
The primeval essence refined this way is your own primeval essence, and not a foreign primeval essence.
If you use it to nourish the aperture, there are no side effects or risks, and the nourishing effect is even better! "
Guyue Lian was overjoyed, "Thank you grandfather!"
"But the Liquor worm is hard to find.
Among the Rank one Gu worms, the Liquor worm, Boar Gu, Bookworm and so on are the rarest Gu.
Once they appear on the market, they are bought almost immediately.
Of course, there are some Gu worms in this world that are rumored to be able to change a Gu Master's aptitude.
But for most of my life, I have only vaguely heard about it, and have never seen it with my own eyes. "The old man said leisurely.
The night wind blew into the room from the window.
Guyue Fangzheng sat on the bed with his eyes closed, both hands holding a Yuan stone.
The green bronze primeval sea surged without any wind, waves crashing against the white aperture walls.
He had A grade aptitude, and his primeval sea took up more than eighty percent of the aperture.
His primeval essence recovery speed was two times that of Fang Yuan!
This unique advantage allowed him to be close to Rank one middle stage.
Whoosh.
After a long while, Guyue Fangzheng breathed out a mouthful of turbid air, and slowly opened his eyes.
Outside the window, the moon was bright, and the stars were sparse.
The green bamboo buildings were lined up, and it was quiet and peaceful.
"When cultivating, time always passes very quickly.
In the blink of an eye, it's already late at night. "Fangzheng's mouth moved, and he muttered softly.
He slowly opened his hands, and immediately, two handfuls of grey stone powder fell from his hands onto the floor in front of the bed.
Once the natural primeval essence in the Yuan stone is completely absorbed, it will turn into a pile of stone powder.
Seeing the stone powder fall, Fangzheng frowned slightly.
He took out his money pouch, which had already dried up.
Opening the pouch, he saw that there were only three Yuan stone left.
Every seven days, Fangzheng would receive three Yuan stone from the academy as an allowance, but Fang Yuan would snatch one away, so he only had two left.
Uncle and Aunt would also give him a living allowance, which was also three Yuan stone every seven days.
How could these Yuan stones be used?
Fangzheng wanted to surpass his brother Fang Yuan, so he took the initiative to look for Uncle and Aunt many times to ask for some Yuan stone.
After a few times, Aunt would talk to him, and tell him that their family was in dire straits, and that they had no spare money.
Fangzheng was too embarrassed to ask for more.
"Father and mother have already done their best to nurture me for my cultivation.
I can't make things difficult for them anymore, and ask for Yuan stone from them.
There are only three Yuan stone left, so I have to use them sparingly.
I will use one every day.
This way, I can use it for three days. "
"I have a feeling that after three or four days, I will definitely advance to the middle stage!
I just don't know how big brother's progress is? "Thinking of this, Fangzheng subconsciously looked out of the window, at the direction of the academy dormitory.
"I have A grade talent, and big brother is only C grade. His progress will definitely not be as fast as mine.
Big brother will definitely not be my opponent this time!
Big brother, I will let you know the power of A grade talent! "
Thinking of this, Fangzheng could not help but clench his fists.
Academy dormitory.
In the dark, he did not sleep, but sat cross-legged on his bed.
In the darkness, he did not sleep. Instead, he sat cross-legged on the bed.
In the dark, he did not sleep, but sat cross-legged on his bed.
In the past, at this time, Fang Yuan would have already laid down and slept.
But in today's cultivation, he felt that he was just a step away from entering the middle stage.
"I might as well not sleep tonight, and directly rush to the middle stage!" His eyes flashed with determination.
Then, he closed his eyes, and his mind entered his aperture.
Forty-four percent of the green copper primeval sea had just been refined by the Liquor worm into pale green middle stage primeval essence.
"Rise." Fang Yuan's mind moved, and the calm green copper primeval sea immediately began to ripple.
The ripples became more and more numerous, becoming bigger and bigger, forming wave after wave.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh …
The waves came one after another, crashing into the aperture walls all around.
It was like crashing into a reef. Most of the primeval essence broke into emerald green waves, splashing high, and then merging into the sea.
A small portion of the primeval essence was consumed, turning into traces of mysterious invisible energy, seeping into the white light membrane aperture walls.
"Rise again." Fang Yuan's mind stirred, and the scale of the pale green waves grew larger and larger.
The previous waves were at most like dogs and rabbits running, but now they were like a herd of horses, crashing into the aperture's light membrane.
Horses like dragons, waves flying into the sky!
The primeval essence was consumed intensely, and the water level continued to drop.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!
The waves were endless, and finally the quantitative change triggered a qualitative change.
That white light membrane suddenly trembled, and the originally gentle white light suddenly blossomed with an aggressive light.
Seeing this, Fang Yuan was overjoyed, knowing that it was a crucial moment, he quickly activated his primeval essence, and continued to wash it.
The white light became brighter and brighter, and the light rays began to distort and intertwine, giving people a feeling that it was getting thicker and thicker.
In a dozen breaths' time, streaks of light appeared on the light membrane.
The streaks of light were like streams of water that flowed continuously, colliding with each other.
In the process of collision, they continued to merge and strengthen, forming a white stream of light.
Finally, the light streams merged into one, and completely covered the light membrane.
The white light dimmed, and the original white light membrane around the aperture walls had disappeared, and was replaced by a spherical white water membrane.
The surface of the light membrane was smooth, without any impurities.
The water membrane was obviously thicker than the light membrane, and the light on it flowed, flickering.
The primeval sea regained its calmness, and there was still twenty percent seawater left in the aperture.
"Advanced to middle stage!" Fang Yuan laughed brightly, and opened his eyes.
Bright sunlight passed through the cracks of the window, and entered.
Unknowingly, a night had passed, and it was already morning.
S-REV-067.summary: Guyue Mobei, recovering from internal injuries, stands in his yard under the moonlight with his sister, Mo Yan. He reveals to his sister that despite his loss, he noticed Fang Yuan's weakness during their fight and reaffirms his determination to defeat him and become class monitor. Mo Yan reassures him and offers support, also revealing her past regret of only being a vice class monitor.

continuityMutations.content: His C-grade aptitude necessitates dangerous primeval essence infusions to accelerate his advancement, which will shrink his future development space.
He is aware of the Cleansing Water Gu's ability to cleanse foreign aura from an aperture and has secured a Liquor worm for Chicheng.
He is willing to sacrifice his personal cultivation future for the Chi family's benefit.
Guyue Lian is performing a dangerous primeval essence infusion to accelerate Chicheng's cultivation, sacrificing his grandson's future potential for the Chi family's immediate gain.
Guyue Lian knows about the Cleansing Water Gu as a potential cure for Chicheng's cultivation side effects and about the rarity of the Liquor worm.
Guyue Lian has used his connections to acquire a Liquor worm for Guyue Chicheng.
