"Grandson understands grandfather's good intentions."
"It's good that you understand." The old man sighed again, "This method has a huge side effect.
The aperture walls are being nourished by my white silver primeval essence.
Although the effect of the white silver primeval essence is outstanding, to you, it is still a foreign primeval essence.
From now on, even if the aperture walls change from a light film to a water film, it will still be mixed with my aura.
The more foreign aura there is, the more the aperture will not exist. This is pulling up seedlings to help them grow, it will shrink your future development space. "
Guyue Cheng tightly pursed his lips, "Grandfather, for the future of my Chi family, grandson is willing to sacrifice my own future!"
Guyue Lian's heart was immediately at ease, he nodded and stroked his beard, "You have such thoughts, very good, very good.
But heaven's secrets always leave a way out, you are not without hope.
If you can find the Cleansing Water Gu in the future, you can cleanse your aperture walls and get rid of the foreign aura in the aperture primeval sea, eliminating this side effect. "
"Also.
Grandfather has already used my connections to get people to buy the Liquor worm for you.
This worm can help a Gu Master refine their primeval essence in the Rank one realm, advancing by a small realm.
The primeval essence refined this way is your own primeval essence, and not a foreign primeval essence.
If you use it to nourish the aperture, there are no side effects or risks, and the nourishing effect is even better! "
Guyue Lian was overjoyed, "Thank you grandfather!"
"But the Liquor worm is hard to find.
Among the Rank one Gu worms, the Liquor worm, Boar Gu, Bookworm and so on are the rarest Gu.
Once they appear on the market, they are bought almost immediately.
Of course, there are some Gu worms in this world that are rumored to be able to change a Gu Master's aptitude.
But for most of my life, I have only vaguely heard about it, and have never seen it with my own eyes. "The old man said leisurely.
The night wind blew into the room from the window.
Guyue Fangzheng sat on the bed with his eyes closed, both hands holding a Yuan stone.
The green bronze primeval sea surged without any wind, waves crashing against the white aperture walls.
He had A grade aptitude, and his primeval sea took up more than eighty percent of the aperture.
His primeval essence recovery speed was two times that of Fang Yuan!
This unique advantage allowed him to be close to Rank one middle stage.
Whoosh.
After a long while, Guyue Fangzheng breathed out a mouthful of turbid air, and slowly opened his eyes.
Outside the window, the moon was bright, and the stars were sparse.
The green bamboo buildings were lined up, and it was quiet and peaceful.
"When cultivating, time always passes very quickly.
In the blink of an eye, it's already late at night. "Fangzheng's mouth moved, and he muttered softly.
He slowly opened his hands, and immediately, two handfuls of grey stone powder fell from his hands onto the floor in front of the bed.
Once the natural primeval essence in the Yuan stone is completely absorbed, it will turn into a pile of stone powder.
Seeing the stone powder fall, Fangzheng frowned slightly.
He took out his money pouch, which had already dried up.
Opening the pouch, he saw that there were only three Yuan stone left.
Every seven days, Fangzheng would receive three Yuan stone from the academy as an allowance, but Fang Yuan would snatch one away, so he only had two left.
Uncle and Aunt would also give him a living allowance, which was also three Yuan stone every seven days.
How could these Yuan stones be used?
Fangzheng wanted to surpass his brother Fang Yuan, so he took the initiative to look for Uncle and Aunt many times to ask for some Yuan stone.
After a few times, Aunt would talk to him, and tell him that their family was in dire straits, and that they had no spare money.
Fangzheng was too embarrassed to ask for more.
"Father and mother have already done their best to nurture me for my cultivation.
I can't make things difficult for them anymore, and ask for Yuan stone from them.
There are only three Yuan stone left, so I have to use them sparingly.
I will use one every day.
This way, I can use it for three days. "
"I have a feeling that after three or four days, I will definitely advance to the middle stage!
I just don't know how big brother's progress is? "Thinking of this, Fangzheng subconsciously looked out of the window, at the direction of the academy dormitory.
"I have A grade talent, and big brother is only C grade. His progress will definitely not be as fast as mine.
Big brother will definitely not be my opponent this time!
Big brother, I will let you know the power of A grade talent! "
Thinking of this, Fangzheng could not help but clench his fists.
Academy dormitory.
In the dark, he did not sleep, but sat cross-legged on his bed.
In the darkness, he did not sleep. Instead, he sat cross-legged on the bed.
In the dark, he did not sleep, but sat cross-legged on his bed.
In the past, at this time, Fang Yuan would have already laid down and slept.
But in today's cultivation, he felt that he was just a step away from entering the middle stage.
"I might as well not sleep tonight, and directly rush to the middle stage!" His eyes flashed with determination.
Then, he closed his eyes, and his mind entered his aperture.
Forty-four percent of the green copper primeval sea had just been refined by the Liquor worm into pale green middle stage primeval essence.
"Rise." Fang Yuan's mind moved, and the calm green copper primeval sea immediately began to ripple.
The ripples became more and more numerous, becoming bigger and bigger, forming wave after wave.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh …
The waves came one after another, crashing into the aperture walls all around.
It was like crashing into a reef. Most of the primeval essence broke into emerald green waves, splashing high, and then merging into the sea.
A small portion of the primeval essence was consumed, turning into traces of mysterious invisible energy, seeping into the white light membrane aperture walls.
"Rise again." Fang Yuan's mind stirred, and the scale of the pale green waves grew larger and larger.
The previous waves were at most like dogs and rabbits running, but now they were like a herd of horses, crashing into the aperture's light membrane.
Horses like dragons, waves flying into the sky!
The primeval essence was consumed intensely, and the water level continued to drop.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!
The waves were endless, and finally the quantitative change triggered a qualitative change.
That white light membrane suddenly trembled, and the originally gentle white light suddenly blossomed with an aggressive light.
Seeing this, Fang Yuan was overjoyed, knowing that it was a crucial moment, he quickly activated his primeval essence, and continued to wash it.
The white light became brighter and brighter, and the light rays began to distort and intertwine, giving people a feeling that it was getting thicker and thicker.
In a dozen breaths' time, streaks of light appeared on the light membrane.
The streaks of light were like streams of water that flowed continuously, colliding with each other.
In the process of collision, they continued to merge and strengthen, forming a white stream of light.
Finally, the light streams merged into one, and completely covered the light membrane.
The white light dimmed, and the original white light membrane around the aperture walls had disappeared, and was replaced by a spherical white water membrane.
The surface of the light membrane was smooth, without any impurities.
The water membrane was obviously thicker than the light membrane, and the light on it flowed, flickering.
The primeval sea regained its calmness, and there was still twenty percent seawater left in the aperture.
"Advanced to middle stage!" Fang Yuan laughed brightly, and opened his eyes.
Bright sunlight passed through the cracks of the window, and entered.
Unknowingly, a night had passed, and it was already morning.
S-REV-068.summary: In a secret room, Guyue Lian performs a dangerous primeval essence infusion on his grandson, Guyue Chicheng, to accelerate his advancement. Guyue Lian explains the severe side effects: Chicheng's future development space will shrink due to the foreign primeval essence, but Chicheng accepts the sacrifice for the Chi family. Guyue Lian also reveals he has secured a rare Liquor worm for Chicheng and mentions the even rarer Cleansing Water Gu.

continuityMutations.content: He is struggling with limited Yuan stones, affecting his cultivation pace.
He believes his A-grade talent guarantees he will advance faster than Fang Yuan and eventually surpass him.
Fangzheng's aunt implies their family is in dire financial straits and cannot provide more Yuan stones.

relationshipMutations.type: Competitive ambition fueled by perceived talent disparity

S-REV-069.prose:
Chapter 51
Night fell.
The moon was like a silver plate, appearing between the clouds.
Sparse stars adorned the surroundings.
Guyue Mobei stood in the yard, looking up at the moon, his eyes shining.
"Little brother, I heard you got injured today." Guyue's Mo Yan's voice came from behind him.
"Sister, are you worried that I'll be traumatized after being beaten up so badly?" The Mobei turned around and smiled.
Mo Yan looked at her brother's smile and heaved a sigh of relief.
Even though she was worried, she said, "Of course not. I know you the best.
My good brother, you have an indomitable fighting spirit. You are the future leader of the Mo family. How could you be scared by such a small injury? "
"Hehehe, I know you love me the most." The Mobei scratched his head and laughed.
"Do you know, sister?"
Under the bright moonlight, this fifteen year old youngster's eyes shone with a bright luster. "Although I failed again this time, I heard that Fang Yuan guy's hurried breathing during the battle.
In the past, I was beaten down by him in two or three moves, but he was always calm and composed.
His panting already revealed his weakness.
He is definitely not as strong as most people think.
One day, I will defeat him fair and square! "
"Good, you are indeed a good man of the Mo bloodline!"
Mo Yan laughed and patted her brother's head, showing concern on her face. "But you have internal injuries, so don't practice for the next few days."
"Sister, don't touch my head like that, I'm already a grown-up." The Mobei shook his head and said in a slightly dissatisfied tone, "I know what you are saying.
I already have a plan. I will use these few days to nourish my aperture walls and complete my advancement from initial stage to intermediate stage.
I will first get the class monitor position and suppress Fang Yuan's limelight.
I will let him know that a Gu Master's cultivation focuses on talent! "
"If you think that way, I can rest assured.
I was only a vice class monitor in the past.
If you become a monitor, it will make up for my regret. "
"Sister, don't worry.
I must take the position of class monitor! "
Almost at the same time, in the Chi family …

Strands of white silver primeval essence followed the old man's thoughts and poured into Guyue City's aperture.

In this world, there are no two identical leaves.

Once foreign primeval essence entered the aperture, it would cause the primeval essence in the aperture to resist.
If Guyue Cheng did not suppress it and allowed the primeval essence to resist, it would definitely cause a clash of primeval essence.
The violent fluctuation caused by the clash would cause damage to the aperture.
The primordial sea in the aperture was the foundation of a Gu Master's cultivation, it was of utmost importance.
Once the aperture was injured, the cultivation would drop, and the aptitude would drop.
Once the aperture was completely destroyed, the Gu Master would die immediately.
After a while, Guyue Lian slowly stopped the primeval essence injection and retracted his hand.
Guyue Cheng immediately heaved a long sigh of relief, his tense body relaxing. "Thank you grandfather, you have to pour primeval essence into me every three days to nourish the aperture.
I've made you tired! "
Guyue Lian's forehead was full of sweat. He sighed and said, "There is no other way.
Your aptitude is only C grade. If you rely on your strength to advance to middle stage, it would take a long time.
This time is usually twice the time of B grade and four times the time of A grade.
This way, you will be exposed.
So although this method is dangerous, it has to be used. "
"Grandson understands grandfather's good intentions."
"It's good that you understand." The old man sighed again, "This method has a huge side effect.
The aperture walls are being nourished by my white silver primeval essence.
Although the effect of the white silver primeval essence is outstanding, to you, it is still a foreign primeval essence.

"But the Liquor worm is hard to find.

S-REV-069.summary: Guyue Fangzheng cultivates in his dormitory, exhausting his Yuan stones. He reflects on his financial difficulties, exacerbated by Fang Yuan and his aunt's limited resources, forcing him to carefully manage his remaining three Yuan stones. Despite this, his A-grade talent makes him confident he will advance to middle stage soon and surpass his C-grade brother, Fang Yuan.

continuityMutations.content: He has successfully advanced to Rank one middle stage.
He used a Liquor worm to aid in his cultivation advancement.

That white light membrane suddenly trembled, and the originally gentle white light suddenly blossomed with an aggressive light.
Seeing this, Fang Yuan was overjoyed, knowing that it was a crucial moment, he quickly activated his primeval essence, and continued to wash it.
The white light became brighter and brighter, and the light rays began to distort and intertwine, giving people a feeling that it was getting thicker and thicker.
In a dozen breaths' time, streaks of light appeared on the light membrane.
The streaks of light were like streams of water that flowed continuously, colliding with each other.
In the process of collision, they continued to merge and strengthen, forming a white stream of light.
Finally, the light streams merged into one, and completely covered the light membrane.
The white light dimmed, and the original white light membrane around the aperture walls had disappeared, and was replaced by a spherical white water membrane.
The surface of the light membrane was smooth, without any impurities.
The water membrane was obviously thicker than the light membrane, and the light on it flowed, flickering.
The primeval sea regained its calmness, and there was still twenty percent seawater left in the aperture.
"Advanced to middle stage!" Fang Yuan laughed brightly, and opened his eyes.
Bright sunlight passed through the cracks of the window, and entered.
Unknowingly, a night had passed, and it was already morning.
S-REV-070.summary: Fang Yuan, feeling close to a breakthrough, decides to cultivate through the night. He uses a Liquor worm to refine his primeval essence and continually washes his aperture walls. After an intense process, his aperture light membrane transforms into a spherical white water membrane, signifying his successful advancement to Rank one middle stage by morning.

continuityMutations.content: Killed by Fang Yuan the previous night, his body disposed of to conceal the crime.
Fang Yuan initially saw him as a chess piece for disposing of stolen goods, inciting conflict, and infiltrating the Jia family.
Is being tested by the Jia family head through his leadership of the caravan alongside Jia Jin Sheng.
Home to Gu Yue Village and a common travel route for caravans.
A regular stop for caravans, serving as a hub for trade and interaction between mortals and Gu Masters.

S-REV-071.prose:
Chapter 53 The rain continued to fall. Dark clouds covered the sky, and the mountains in the distance merged into a lump of ink. The curtain of rain interweaved heaven and earth together. Crack! The sky suddenly brightened, and a bolt of lightning like a silver snake cut through the sky, then suddenly disappeared. It was almost summer, and this late spring rain seemed to bring a hint of summer's warmth. On Qing Mao Mountain, large patches of green spear bamboos stood tall, fighting against the wind and rain. The bamboo bodies were still straight like spears, the bamboo tips pointing towards the sky. In the Gu Yue Village, countless tall buildings were lined up in a row. They buried their heads and endured the washing of the heavy rain. Outside the village, the caravan had already set off. "The rain is heavy, pay attention to the road." "Don't fall behind, Gu Masters lead the Gu worms, especially the fat beetle section 47: Jia Jin Sheng, I don't want to kill you, don't get stuck on the mountain path!" "You mortal martial artists, keep your eyes open and look after the goods. If you lose even one, I'll settle the score with you! " Shouts rose and fell from the caravan. After staying in the Guyue village for three days, the caravan left, following Qing Mao Mountain's mountain path towards their next destination. The heavy rain washed over the land, and the roads around the village were paved with cobblestones, which was still okay. But after 500 meters, there was a muddy and narrow mountain path. The proud ostriches hung their heads, their brightly colored feathers drenched by the rain, sticking together into pieces. They were truly drenched. The fat beetle twisted its fat body, moving forward very slowly. The rain hit its black leather armor, forming streams of water that slid down to the ground on both sides. The furry mountain spiders were also drenched, their green-black fur sticking together. But those toad Gu happily cried out, carrying the goods and Gu Masters, jumping up and down the mountain. There was also the winged serpent, already keeping its wings. The thick snake body moved through the muddy water. In order to protect the goods from the rain, section 47: Jia Jin Sheng, I don't want to kill you. The Gu Masters were also showing their abilities. On the bodies of the fat beetles, there were Gu Masters standing in the middle.

They raised their hands up high, and a Golden Radiant Qi Insect hovered an inch above their palms. The Green Bronze True Essence rose like water vapor and poured into the body of the Golden Light Insect. The Gu worm's whole body was shining like a golden bean, and with this circle as the center, it held up a huge pale golden air barrier. The hemispherical air shield covered a large area. Apart from covering a fat beetle completely, there was still more than enough space. When the raindrops hit the air shield, they bounced off as if they were hitting an umbrella. But this Yi Qi Golden Light Worm expended primeval essence continuously, and after a long time, a Rank one Gu Master would not be able to endure it. Sure enough, after a while, a Gu Master shouted: "I can't take it anymore, my primeval essence is exhausted. Who will replace me? " "I'll do it!" Almost immediately, a Gu Master rushed over and took over his position. Some Gu Masters who were pulling carts or riding mountain spiders activated the green silk Gu in their bodies. Under the green silk Gu's power, the Gu Master's hair grew wildly. A normal person would have at least a hundred thousand strands of hair. A hundred thousand strands of hair would each grow to five to six meters long. They intertwined with each other, wrapping around the Gu Master's body and the Gu mount under their buttocks, forming a temporary impenetrable black hair cloak. Green Silk Gu was a Rank one Gu worm, often used by Gu Masters to defend and attack. When used, it expended thirty percent of the green bronze primeval essence, unlike the Yi Qi Golden Light Worm which required continuous primeval essence output. If this Green Silk Gu was refined with the Rank one Black Boar Gu, it would advance to the Rank two Black Mane Gu. When the Black Mane Gu was activated, not only the hair, but all the hair on the body would become black and thick. In a few breaths, the Gu Master's body would grow into a black mane armor. If the Black Mane Gu continued to advance, it would become the famous Rank three Gu, the Steel Mane Gu. Other than the Yi Qi Golden Light Worm and Green Silk Gu, many Gu Masters in the caravan chose the Water Spider Gu. It could be seen that these Gu Masters were covered in a thin layer of light blue water cloak. On the surface of the water cloak, water flowed continuously. When the raindrops hit the water cloak, they immediately fused with the water cloak. The Gu Masters were continuously drenched, and the water cloak on their body became thicker. Every once in a while, the Gu Master would need to activate the Water Spider Gu to drain the excess water from the water cloak. At this time, the thick water cloak would be reduced to a thin layer. As for those mortal martial artists, they were rushing back and forth on the muddy road, taking care of the goods.

Most of them were wearing straw raincoats, but in the chaos, the straw raincoat's effect was limited, and they were all drenched by the rain. "This damned weather!" The martial artists cursed in their hearts. In the rain, the mountain roads were even more difficult to walk. In such weather, no matter how strong the martial artists were, they were still mortals. If they were drenched and overworked, it was extremely easy to catch a cold. A serious illness was a light one, but there was a chance that they would contract some sequelae, and if the illness was serious, they might even be abandoned by the Gu Master on the road. If there was a landslide on the mountain road, or if they were attacked by wild beasts or Gu worms, they might lose their lives. The caravan was huge, and there were many Gu Masters. But every time they travelled, there would be a large number of casualties. Many mortal martial artists died, and Gu Masters would also have casualties. If the caravan encountered a large migrating beast group, it was possible that they would be completely annihilated. In fact, other than these natural disasters, there were still others. The villages along the way might not all welcome the caravan. Some of the mountain strongholds liked to rob outsiders. "Let's go, see you next year!" Some Gu Masters sat on their Gu worms, turning their bodies and waving goodbye to the Guyue village. At the entrance of the village, many people gathered together, sending off the caravan with their gazes. "You must come again next year." The children shouted reluctantly. The adults' gazes were much more complicated. "The future is uncertain, the ways of the world are difficult. Next year, I wonder how many familiar faces will remain in the village? " "Whether it is a caravan or living in the village, it is not easy to make a living." The caravan moved further and further away, and the crowd gradually dispersed. The lively atmosphere of the market also disappeared without a trace. The place where the tents and stalls were set up was left with a huge mess. The turf was trampled by the endless stream of people, revealing grass roots and soil. When the rain fell on it, it immediately turned into mud, and there were countless potholes and muddy puddles. Other than that, there was also a lot of household rubbish left behind.
S-REV-071.summary: Amidst a heavy, late spring rain, a large caravan departs Gu Yue Village, heading along the treacherous mountain path. Gu Masters utilize various Gu worms like the Yi Qi Golden Light Worm, Green Silk Gu, and Water Spider Gu to protect themselves and their goods from the elements, while mortal martial artists struggle through the mud, facing harsh conditions and the threat of abandonment or death. The scene highlights the stark contrast between the capabilities of Gu Masters and the vulnerability of mortals during travel.

continuityMutations.content: The rain helped cover up the scent of blood from Jia Jin Sheng's murder.
Jia Jin Sheng was a strategic 'chess piece' for Fang Yuan's initial plans for stolen goods, inciting conflict, and infiltrating the Jia family.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance is a better path to power than using Jia Jin Sheng.
The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance focuses on strength and will involve dangerous tests.
He needs to reach middle stage to have more confidence in inheriting the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
Used the heavy rain to obscure evidence of Jia Jin Sheng's murder, particularly the smell of blood in the secret cave.
Abandoned his plan to use Jia Jin Sheng as a pawn due to the unexpected emergence of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
Successfully advanced to Rank one middle stage, which he publicly announced and demonstrated.
Concocted a story about his breakthrough being disturbed by guards, fabricating an insult to his ancestors to justify his actions and deflect blame.
Demonstrated a profound understanding of social rules and power dynamics to corner the academy elder.
His inheritance, focusing on strength, unexpectedly appeared, disrupting Fang Yuan's original plans.
His inheritance is expected to involve dangerous tests typical of demonic cultivators.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked back towards the village in the rain, holding his umbrella.

S-REV-072.prose:
Fang Yuan stood alone on a secluded hill, looking at the caravan from afar. The caravan was like a fat colourful python, under the grey rain, following the narrow mountain path, slowly entering the dense forest. "The heavens are really on my side …" Fang Yuan sighed lightly. He held a butter paper umbrella, standing quietly in the rain. He wore an ordinary linen shirt, his body was thin, his skin was pale like a fifteen year old, and he had a head of clean black short hair. The ends of his hair trembled under the umbrella with the wind. Others cursed the horrible weather, but he sighed at the timing of the rain. He killed Jia Jin Sheng last night, and cleaned up the scene. But it happened too suddenly, and there was something wrong. Especially the smell of blood, because the secret cave was not ventilated, it was not easy to get rid of. With this heavy rain, it washed the earth and the air, greatly weakening the detection methods that relied on smell. There was definitely a small waterfall coming from the stone crevice, and after the fresh water vapor was diluted, it was almost impossible to be exposed in a short time. Of course, the longer the time, the higher the possibility of being exposed. In this world, there were all kinds of amazing Gu worms, and a variety of detection methods. Even Fang Yuan only knew a part of them. The rain hit the surface of the butter paper umbrella, making dripping sounds. Then, along the ribs of the umbrella, streams of water flowed down, hitting the green stone under Fang Yuan's feet, splashing water everywhere. Seeing the caravan turn around the corner, completely entering the dense forest, Fang Yuan did not show a trace of happiness, but instead had a serious expression. "Although Jia Jin Sheng's cultivation is weak, and his talent is low, his status is special. Everyone in the caravan is busy, so no one noticed his disappearance in a short time. However, it wouldn't be long before someone noticed. At that time, Jia Fu will come back to investigate, and the real challenge will come. " "The Jia family head purposely arranged for Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu to lead the caravan together. In terms of cultivation, Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu are worlds apart. In terms of wisdom, Jia Jin Sheng is far behind. The Jia family head arranged this to let Jia Jin Sheng suffer a setback, to let him see the reality and live a peaceful life. At the same time, it is also to test Jia Fu's character. If the setback is too great, to the point that even his own brother can't be tolerated, how can the Jia family head position be given to him? " "Jia Jin Sheng never truly understood his father's good intentions. Although he has some intelligence, it is a pity that he is only a superficial person.

What a pity. What a pity for such a good chess piece. " Fang Yuan sighed in his heart. With 500 years of experience, he had long seen through the surface, and perceived the deep nature of this matter. When he saw the complicated relationship between Jia Jin Sheng and Jia Fu in the dispute last night, he immediately had a vague plan in his heart. In his plan, Jia Jin Sheng was a very suitable chess piece. Jia Jin Sheng's cultivation was weak, but his status was high. Although he was a little clever, his experience was too shallow, and he could completely control it. Once this chess piece was controlled, it would be very useful. Firstly, he could establish a stable channel to dispose of stolen goods, in preparation for killing and robbing in the future. Secondly, Fang Yuan would be hiding behind the scenes, using him and the shadow wall to incite conflict between the three villages on Qing Mao mountain, triggering a civil war, and reaping the benefits. Thirdly, he could rely on him to infiltrate the Jia family. In the future, the Jia family's property dispute would cause a Gu Fighting Tournament, and it would be a huge matter. There were many benefits, and Fang Yuan could definitely obtain great benefits from it. "My current cultivation is too low, and my hands and feet are tied when I do things. If I have a chess piece that I can use, I can do things that I cannot do. Not only is it convenient, but the risk is also greatly reduced. If I am exposed in the future, I can just abandon this chess piece and still be free. " "The people around me are all loyal to the family, and not easy to manipulate. Only an outsider like Jia Jin Sheng can easily break out of this situation. What a pity, I did not expect the Flower Wine Monk to leave behind an inheritance of strength. " The Flower Wine Monk was a Rank five Gu Master, and his inheritance was naturally more precious than Jia Jin Sheng. Of course, if he could have both, that would be great. But facing such a precious treasure, Jia Jin Sheng could no longer be controlled, so he could only abandon it. "Ten out of ten things in this world do not go your way." Fang Yuan shook his head and sighed. The appearance of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance broke Fang Yuan's original plan. And after the shadow wall changed, the previous scene disappeared, and only a line of blood words appeared, reminding Fang Yuan to break the shadow wall, and a hole would appear. Walk down the hole, and you will receive the inheritance of strength. The blood words only appeared for a few breaths, and then disappeared.

The shadow wall also reverted to a normal mountain wall. Fang Yuan had been busy last night dealing with the murder scene, and had no time to break the shadow wall. "Killing Jia Jin Sheng in a hurry, there will be many repercussions, just that it has not been revealed yet. Although I have successfully destroyed the corpse, there will definitely be a lot of trouble. This way, the method of exposing the Liquor worm will have to be changed. Also, I can't go to the secret cave in the rock crack for the time being. I have to hide in the village for the time being, and guard against the investigation. " Fang Yuan turned around, holding the umbrella, and walked towards the village in the rain. "But this is also good. In this period of time, I have consumed large amounts of Yuan stone, and refined middle stage primeval essence. Using middle stage primeval essence to nourish my aperture, I will be able to break through to middle stage soon. Once I reach middle stage, my strength will double. At that time, I will have more confidence in inheriting the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance. " The inheritance of a demonic cultivator, was not as gentle as that of a righteous cultivator, there would usually be dangerous tests. If the test was not passed, the price to pay would be his life. "The affairs of the world are hard to predict, but because of this, it is very interesting." Fang Yuan's lips curled into a cold smile. Under the heavy rain, the green mountains stretched endlessly, suffused with greyish green, appearing oppressive and heavy. A gust of wind blew, and the raindrops slanted, hitting Fang Yuan's shoulder, a wave of cold air assaulted him. He then thought of Jia Jin Sheng. He sighed in his heart: "Jia Jin Sheng, actually … I did not want to kill you." What a waste of a good chess piece!!! ================================================== Chapter 54 In the academy, everyone's gaze was focused on Fang Yuan. These gazes contained shock, fear, mockery and coldness. Fang Yuan turned a blind eye to these gazes. He looked at the academy elder, pointing at the unconscious guard on the ground, his expression solemn. "Reporting to elder, these two guards had malicious intentions, they deserve to die! They forcefully broke in at the critical moment when I was about to break through to the middle stage. As everyone knows, a Gu Master's cultivation cannot be disturbed. Especially when breaking through to a higher realm.
S-REV-072.summary: Fang Yuan stands on a secluded hill, observing the caravan's departure and noting how the heavy rain aids in masking the evidence of Jia Jin Sheng's murder from the previous night. He reflects on Jia Jin Sheng's true role as a pawn in complex family politics and his own abandoned plans to exploit him. The unexpected appearance of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance forces Fang Yuan to change his strategy, realizing the greater potential for power it offers, even if it means further complications.

continuityMutations.content: He has advanced to Rank one middle stage.
He fabricated a story about guards attempting to disrupt his breakthrough and insulting his ancestors.
Fang Yuan has truly advanced to Rank one middle stage, despite his C-grade talent.
Fang Yuan's explanation for his advancement ('Heaven rewards the diligent') is suspicious.
He cannot punish Fang Yuan for his actions against the guards due to clan rules and Fang Yuan's 'outstanding' achievement.
Fang Yuan is highly cunning and manipulative, seeing through the elder's attempts to suppress him.
Fang Yuan's advancement deeply shocked him and shattered his self-confidence.
He is frustrated and disbelieving of Fang Yuan's rapid advancement.
His authority was directly challenged and undermined by Fang Yuan's actions and public performance.
Forced to acknowledge Fang Yuan's advancement and unable to punish him due to clan rules and public perception, despite his suspicions.
Felt publicly shamed and outmaneuvered by Fang Yuan, likening it to Fang Yuan 'pooping on his face'.
His confidence was severely impacted by Fang Yuan's unexpected advancement.
Expressed frustration and disbelief at Fang Yuan's rapid advancement despite his low talent.
Had his arm cut off by Fang Yuan during an altercation.
Had his leg cut off by Fang Yuan during an altercation.
The primary institution for nurturing new Gu Masters for the clan.

relationshipMutations.type: Public challenge and undermining of authority

S-REV-073.prose:
If one is careless, not only will the breakthrough fail, the aperture will also be damaged. Fortunately, I was lucky enough to step into the middle stage the moment they barged in. " "But!" Without waiting for the others to react, Fang Yuan continued, "These two still refuse to admit the mistake they made earlier, actually boasting shamelessly about attacking me, and even insulting my clan's ancestor, falsely claiming that it was lord clan elder's idea to disturb this junior's cultivation. The student did not believe it, and resisted fiercely. These two were highly skilled, and I fought bravely, defeating them both. " "But seeing that these two are the academy's guards, I didn't kill them. Only one had his arm cut off, and the other had his leg cut off. Although they lost a lot of blood, they did not die. This matter is like this, please uphold justice for me, elder! "Finishing, Fang Yuan cupped his fists towards the academy elder. His tone was hurried, saying a lot, and the others did not have the right to interrupt. After he finished, the surrounding people slowly reacted. "What did Fang Yuan just say, I don't think I heard it clearly." "I think he said he advanced to the middle stage!" "How can it be, he's just a C grade talent trash, how could he be the first to advance to the middle stage?" "He must be lying, he's afraid of the academy's punishment, so he lied!" The students all began to discuss loudly. Compared to Fang Yuan advancing to the middle stage, the life and death of the two guards were no longer important. They were not surnamed Guyue, who would care about their life and death? "You said that you have already advanced to Rank one middle stage?" The academy elder's voice was cold, a cold glint flashed in his eyes, "Fang Yuan, you can't say such things carelessly. If you admit your mistake now, I can still deal with you leniently because it's your first offense. However, if you continue to make mistakes and try to cover up with lies, then this old man will tell you right now that lies are easy to see through. " Fang Yuan did not try to defend himself. He only chuckled and said to the academy elder, "Elder, please check." Without needing him to say anything, the academy elder had already walked over. He placed his hand on Fang Yuan's lower abdomen and diverted a bit of his attention into it. He immediately saw the scene of Fang Yuan's aperture. Inside the aperture, there was no Gu.

The Spring Autumn Cicada had already hidden itself. A Rank six Gu's level was far higher than a Rank three academy elder's. If it wanted to hide, it would not be easily discovered. As for the Liquor worm, Fang Yuan temporarily put it in the wine jar in the dormitory and did not carry it with him. The academy elder closed his eyes and saw a bronze primordial sea, calm and undisturbed. Every drop of primordial water was the pale green color of middle stage primordial essence. Looking at the surrounding aperture walls, the white aperture walls were rippling with light, as if they were made up of water. Waves of water were flowing rapidly. Water membrane! "He really advanced to middle stage, how is this possible!?" The academy elder shouted in his heart, a trace of shock flashing in his eyes. But he tried his best to hide it, his face as solemn as water. After a moment, he digested this fact and slowly retracted his hand, saying in a low voice, "It is indeed middle stage." The students had long held their breaths, quietly waiting for the result. Once the academy elder said this, the entire academy seemed to explode. The students were bewildered, each of their faces showing an expression of disbelief. Fang Yuan was only a C grade, but he was the first to advance to middle stage. This was something that defied common sense! When a Gu Master cultivated and broke through realms, the most important thing was talent. Are you kidding me, even a C grade could advance first? How could those A and B grade talents endure this! "This!" Guyue Fangzheng's face turned pale. He was still full of confidence last night, but now the truth was in front of him. He could not take the impact and sat down. Guyue Mobei clenched his fists. Guyue Fangzheng gritted his teeth. The academy elder could not be fooled, so how did Fang Yuan do it? At that moment, all the youths stared at Fang Yuan. They all had the same question in their hearts — with Fang Yuan's C grade talent, how did he advance so quickly?

The academy elder's heart was also filled with doubts. Under such a huge doubt, he threw the idea of suppressing Fang Yuan to the back of his mind, and asked directly, "Fang Yuan, I hope you can explain, how did you advance to middle stage." Fang Yuan smiled silently, "Heaven rewards the diligent. As a student, I studied hard and trained hard, accumulating over time, so success came naturally." "Liar!" "Tch, if Heaven rewards the diligent, I would have been number one long ago!" "Studied hard and trained hard? Just a while ago, I saw him leisurely strolling around the shops. " The students were obviously not satisfied with such an answer. "Is that so?" The academy elder did not deny it. His eyes were cold as he stared at Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan's face was calm, and he stared back at the elder without fear. He was bathed in blood, and his linen clothes were messy, as if he had just gone through an intense battle. His eyes were as deep as a lake, revealing a kind of calmness, a kind of indifference, and even a hint of mockery. Seeing such a pair of eyes, the academy elder's heart could not help but waver. "This Fang Yuan is not afraid, not afraid, not scared, not shocked, how could I force him to reveal it? With his C grade talent, he was able to advance to middle stage first, there must be a secret. But since he does not want to reveal this secret, as the academy elder, I cannot force him to reveal it. Looks like I can only investigate in secret. " Thinking of this, the academy elder could only retract his gaze, and his cold and stern face softened. But Fang Yuan did not let it go, "This student is terrified. Sir elder, how are you going to deal with these two guards? These two have lost too much blood, and if they are not treated, they will die. " "You are terrified?" The academy elder could not help but snort coldly in his heart. His eyebrows furrowed deeply. Now that things had developed to this stage, as the person in charge of the academy, he had to step up and deal with it. "But how should I deal with it?" The academy elder could not help but feel that it was a little tricky.

He could not help but ponder. Fang Yuan took in the academy elder's change of expression. He laughed in his heart, the academy elder must be in a difficult position right now. These two guards, were just servants with a different surname, and their lives were as cheap as grass. If it was under normal circumstances, it would be fine if they died, no one would care. But the situation now was different, these two were personally sent out by the academy elder. If they really died, it would be a disgrace to the academy elder! So these two guards would not die, and the academy elder would treat them. What really troubled the academy elder was the way to deal with Fang Yuan. In his original plan, Fang Yuan played truant first, and then killed the guards, going against his teacher and being arrogant. According to the clan rules, he would be locked up in the clan's prison, to reflect and admit his mistakes. But these mistakes, when added to the fact that Fang Yuan had advanced to the middle stage, suddenly became different. Fang Yuan, because of his cultivation, had no choice but to play truant and kill the guards. This was pardonable. The key was that he had successfully advanced to the middle stage, becoming the first person in this batch. This was the right thing to do. What did Fang Yuan rely on to advance to the middle stage, this secret could be put aside. Winner takes all, everyone cared about the results. No one would criticize such an outstanding junior. The academy elder could not punish him in any way. What did the academy do? It was to nurture outstanding Gu Masters, to inject fresh blood into the clan. With such an outstanding youth appearing, as the academy elder, it would be a dereliction of duty to suppress him! Just like when a student achieved good results, as the teacher, he had to praise and encourage him, not punish or criticize him. A teacher who criticized and punished a student because of their outstanding results would never be acknowledged. Maybe the other elders, because they were afraid of Fang Yuan's development prospects, or because of grudges, would suppress Fang Yuan in the dark. But only you, the academy elder, cannot! Because you are in charge of the academy, you have to be fair and just, at least on the surface. These are the rules! "Are we just going to let him go like this?

It was not easy to get a hold of his weakness. "The academy elder felt very unresigned. He knew in his heart that all the youths in the academy were outsiders. Outsiders could only watch the show, unable to see the intricacies, unable to experience the excitement in the dark! In fact, this was the first time he, the academy elder, and the scholar, Fang Yuan, exchanged blows! First, he did not let go of the rules, wanting to punish Fang Yuan, and destroy his strong image in the hearts of the other youths. Then, Fang Yuan brazenly counterattacked! His move seemed rash, but it hit the nail on the head. Using the excuse of advancing to the intermediate level, he immediately regained his footing. As for the two unlucky guards, they were just pawns that were innocently implicated in the fight between the two, and were sacrificed. "This Fang Yuan, he is too scheming! If he really killed the two guards, I could still use this reason to counterattack. Although his talent is not much, but his methods are so experienced and thorough, it is hard to imagine that this was done by a fifteen year old youth. But I can't even counterattack. No wonder in the early years, there were rumors of his early intelligence and poetry! "The academy elder suddenly realized that he had already lost. His failure, was due to his identity, he was the academy elder in charge of the academy. This was his strength, but it was also his weakness. One point of strength, was one point of weakness. Fang Yuan had long seen through this logic! The academy elder felt helpless and annoyed. He had once asked Fang Yuan to explain, but Fang Yuan's explanation was actually full of loopholes, and could not stand up to scrutiny. These guards were all chosen by the academy elder, and their temperaments could not be so rash, and would not be so stupid as to insult the ancestors of Guyue. Fang Yuan's words, were said on purpose. It was undisguised slander, and was framing and framing in front of an insider! The academy elder was very clear on this point, but he was clear that he could not pursue this matter. This was a trap. Once he pursued this matter, and the truth was revealed, how would he deal with this matter? If he did not punish Fang Yuan, the two guards would be wronged, and he, as the academy elder, would not be fair in handling matters. How would he be able to convince the masses in the future?

If he punished Fang Yuan, he would be suppressing the good, and being jealous of the talented! For the sake of two foreign servants, suppressing the younger generation of the clan, if this matter were to spread, it would cause the dissatisfaction of the clan. So the best way to deal with this was to turn a blind eye, and treat these two guards as disposable. Then he would determine that these two had committed a grave mistake. At the same time, he would commend Fang Yuan. This way, the clansmen would be satisfied, and the guards, who had been deceived, would also think that this was fair. This way of dealing with it, was undoubtedly in the best interest of the academy elder. Logic told the academy elder that this was the way to deal with it. But emotionally, the academy elder could not overcome this hurdle. This Fang Yuan was too despicable! This time, not only did the academy elder not suppress Fang Yuan's limelight, but he had become a stepping stone, stepped on by Fang Yuan, and lost face in front of everyone! Fang Yuan did not respect him in the slightest, and dared to target him in front of everyone. This made him, the academy elder, feel a sense of shame and humiliation. The key was, in the future, if these two guards felt wronged, and wanted to expose the truth, in order to protect his image and identity, the academy elder would have to be the first to jump out and suppress these two guards! But this was all caused by Fang Yuan! What kind of feeling was this? To make an analogy, it was as if Fang Yuan had pooped on the academy elder's face, and the academy elder had to praise Fang Yuan, and at the same time clean up his mess. If there was an outsider who wanted to point it out, and say that the academy elder had pooped on his face, he would have to shut the outsider's mouth at the first possible moment. This kind of grievance and humiliation, was almost unbearable for the academy elder. There was a growing urge in his heart, to directly slap Fang Yuan a few times! But in the end, the academy elder only reached out his hand, and lightly patted Fang Yuan's shoulder. "So small." The academy elder's face was as dark as water, and he squeezed out these words from between his teeth. "It's all thanks to the academy's nurturing." Fang Yuan's tone was calm. The academy elder's eyes twitched.
S-REV-073.summary: In the academy, Fang Yuan, amidst the stunned gazes of his peers and the Academy Elder, dramatically announces his advancement to Rank one middle stage. He falsely accuses two unconscious guards of disturbing his breakthrough and insulting his clan's ancestors, justifying his violent actions. The Academy Elder, despite his suspicion and initial attempts to suppress Fang Yuan, is forced to verify Fang Yuan's cultivation, confirming his advancement and leaving him publicly outmaneuvered and humiliated, while the other students react with shock and disbelief.

continuityMutations.content: His rejection of the class monitor position is perceived as a direct challenge to the clan's system and the Academy Elder's authority.
He realizes Fang Yuan's rejection of the class monitor position is a refusal to be integrated into the family system, deepening his frustration.
He is surprised to become the class monitor after Fang Yuan's rejection.
He feels further overshadowed and demoralized by his brother's actions and his own secondary position.
He is surprised and glad to become a vice-class monitor due to Fang Yuan's actions.
He intentionally conceals the method of his rapid advancement, attracting clan-wide curiosity and speculation.
He openly rejects the position of class monitor, directly defying the academy elder's attempt to integrate him into the clan system.
He continues his extortion, targeting the new class and vice-class monitors, effectively re-establishing his predatory financial control over the students.
He is perceived by the clan as potentially derelict for not understanding Fang Yuan's advancement, pressuring him to provide an explanation.
He attempts to integrate Fang Yuan into the clan system by offering him the class monitor position, hoping to control his behavior and uncover his secrets.
He becomes enraged and frustrated by Fang Yuan's open rejection of the system and continued predatory actions, which undermine his authority and the clan's structure.
He realizes that intervening directly against Fang Yuan would lead to political pressure from the clan leader and other influential families, limiting his options.
He is actively investigating Fang Yuan's background and recent activities to understand his secret advancement, finding his life meticulously simple but yielding no answers.
He becomes the class monitor after Fang Yuan's rejection, a position he initially did not expect.
He is physically assaulted and knocked unconscious by Fang Yuan in front of other students, demonstrating Fang Yuan's continued dominance.
He is demotivated by Fang Yuan's early advancement and the subsequent events, feeling overshadowed despite his own progress.
He is appointed a vice-class monitor but finds the position undermined and is still extorted by Fang Yuan, feeling powerless against his brother.
He is appointed a vice-class monitor due to Fang Yuan's rejection, seeing it as a step towards greater power.
He is still subjected to Fang Yuan's extortion despite his new position, realizing the limitations of his authority.
The place where young Gu Masters are trained, and where clan hierarchy and power struggles manifest among the youth.

S-REV-074.prose:
Chapter 55 Everything was within Fang Yuan's expectations. After that, the academy elder ordered a healing Gu Master to save the two guards. The guards' lives were saved, but they were heavily injured, and were chased out of the academy by the academy elder. Fang Yuan did not receive any punishment, but was instead praised. Such an outcome caused the other youths to feel even more fear. But this matter was far from over. As time passed, the storm spread to the entire clan. Fang Yuan was the first to advance to middle stage with his C grade aptitude, and this became the topic of discussion in the clan. After meals, many people were discussing this matter. After the initial shock, people started to speculate about the mystery of Fang Yuan's advancement. "Actually, with C grade talent, surpassing A and B grade, advancing to middle stage first, is not a strange thing." "That's right, there are many ways to achieve this in this world." "For example, the Relic Gu. Once this Gu is used, it can refine the aperture walls and boost one's cultivation. Advancing a small realm is a piece of cake. " … At once, there were all sorts of opinions, and all sorts of possible answers were discussed. As for the Liquor worm, variant primeval essence, and so on, many people naturally brought up the topic. If Fang Yuan had revealed the existence of the Liquor worm at the first moment, there would not have been such an uproar. But by covering it up like this, he had unknowingly attracted everyone's curiosity. Guyue village looked calm on the surface, but there was already an undercurrent. Countless pairs of eyes stared at the academy, waiting for the academy elder's explanation. As the academy elder, if he did not even know how his students advanced. That would be a dereliction of duty. So the academy elder had to give an explanation. Time passed day by day.

The second youth to advance from initial stage to middle stage appeared. It was Guyue Mobei. Soon after, with just a difference of three hours, Guyue Fangzheng also advanced successfully. He was dragged down by the lack of Yuan stone. Of course, there was also the fact that Fang Yuan's matter dealt a blow to him. The third was Guyue Cheng. Even though he had Guyue personally pouring his True Essence into it, the efficiency of this method was not very high. It could only be used once every three days, and it was also very dangerous. However, being able to obtain third place with a C grade aptitude was already a success. On the fifth day, the academy elder distributed the Yuan stone again. "Guyue, Fang Yuan." Standing in front, he was the first to call out Fang Yuan's name. Fang Yuan stood up and walked forward with a calm expression. The gazes of the youths followed him, their gazes revealing jealousy, envy, suspicion, probing, hatred, and so on. "Today, Lord Elder is not only distributing the allowance, but he is also arranging the positions of the class monitor and vice class monitor!" "As expected, the first person the Family Elder called was Fang Yuan." "He's the first to be promoted. The position of class monitor is going to be his." "It's hard to imagine this result. I thought it was Fangzheng. " "It's too strange that he advanced to the Intermediate Level first. There must be a huge secret, but he's not telling us!" "Hehe, if it were me, I wouldn't tell you either. Wouldn't it be better to get rich quietly? " As the students whispered to each other, Fang Yuan walked in front of the academy elder.

"Guyue, Fang Yuan, you are the first Rank one middle stage Gu Master this year. This is your reward." Saying so, the academy elder passed him a blue and white coin pouch. Fang Yuan took the coin pouch and opened it in front of everyone, looking inside. "Don't worry, there's a total of thirty Yuan stone inside. The academy won't shortchange you." The academy elder squeezed out a smile. To be honest, he did not expect that the first youth to advance to the Intermediate Level would be Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan did not hear the academy elder's words. He rarely trusted others, but he trusted himself the most. He checked carefully and found that there were indeed thirty Yuan stone, not a single one missing. Only then did he keep the coin pouch in his arms. … Seeing Fang Yuan's behavior, the academy elder thought that he was short on money, and the smile on his face widened. "That's right, he's only a C grade talent. To advance to the Intermediate Level, he'll need more Yuan stone. He doesn't have anyone else to help him, so Yuan stone is definitely tight. As long as he has a need for Yuan stone, he won't be out of control. As long as he enters the family's system, the secret he's keeping, even if we can't find out, one day, he'll spill it. "Regarding this, the academy elder was very confident. In fact, from that day onwards, he had sent people to investigate Fang Yuan in secret. Almost every day, there would be new developments in the investigation. But it was obvious that those people had not found out that Fang Yuan had hundreds of Yuan stone on hand, and was actually quite generous. The academy elder continued, "Fang Yuan, you are the first to advance to Rank one middle stage. According to the academy's rules, not only will you receive thirty Yuan stone as a reward, you will also have priority in choosing your second Gu worm. Now, I appoint you as the class monitor!

" "In the end, Fang Yuan is finally appointed as the class monitor!" Once this was said, some of the students sighed. "Damn it." Guyue Mobei gritted his teeth, unwilling to give up. "Hmph!" Guyue Mobei crossed his arms, watching coldly from the side. The one who suffered the greatest blow was still Fang Yuan's younger brother, Guyue Fangzheng. His face was pale, his eyes flickering, and a dark cloud shrouded his heart, "When normal students see the class monitor and vice class monitor, they have to bow and greet them. With my results, I'll definitely be able to get the position of vice class monitor. But in the future, when I meet my brother, I still have to bow. " "Wait." But just as Fang Yuan opened his mouth. He smiled at the academy elder, and said slowly, "Sir elder, your student's talent is shallow, and it's hard for me to take on the position of class monitor. Such a position should be given to a talented person. " "What? You mean you don't want to be the class monitor? If you become a class monitor, you'll receive ten Yuan stone every time. Are you sure you want to reject? "The academy elder's eyebrows immediately twisted into a knot. He had been teaching for decades, and had never seen anyone reject this position! Actually, he had thought about it, letting Fang Yuan be the class monitor had its benefits. Once he became the class monitor, he would be included in the family's system. Fang Yuan would have to enjoy the benefits, and at the same time fulfill his duties. No matter what the specific duties of the class monitor were, he must at least stop extorting and robbing his classmates. This was definitely not something a class monitor could do.

Just like previously, even if the academy elder was humiliated by Fang Yuan, he still had to praise Fang Yuan because of his cultivation results. Under the system, he couldn't handle things as he pleased, and many times he wouldn't have the freedom to do as he pleased. Of course, it wasn't that the academy elder disliked Fang Yuan for extorting so many Yuan stones every time. He was thinking for the sake of all the students. Once Fang Yuan became the class monitor, he wouldn't be able to bully his classmates anymore. This would allow the other youths, under the heavy pressure of Fang Yuan, to breathe a sigh of relief. After that, he would then take advantage of the situation to create a scene where hundreds of schools of thought contend. As long as he could cultivate Fangzheng, Mobei, Chicheng, these seeds of hope, what was sacrificing a small class monitor position? However, although the academy elder's plan was good, the reality was completely different from what he had expected. Fang Yuan rejected! He actually rejected!! Although the position of class monitor was small, in the hearts of these youths, it represented the glory of being number one. Not only glory, but becoming a class monitor, the allowance was as much as ten Yuan stone every time! This kind of temptation, there had never been a youth who could resist it. But Fang Yuan actually rejected it. Fang Yuan saw the academy elder stunned, and asked him in reply, "Don't tell me the academy has a rule that only the first can be the class monitor? Can't one reject the position of class monitor? " The academy elder's face sank, "Of course there isn't such an unreasonable rule." Fang Yuan laughed heartily, "Thank you for your understanding, elder." After saying that, he cupped his hands, walked down, and returned to his seat. The students who had witnessed this with their own eyes, were instantly in an uproar. For a moment, the academy was boiling! "Fang Yuan actually rejected it? Are you kidding me?! " "Is there something wrong with his brain?"

"I don't know what's wrong with his brain, hehe, he'll regret it in the future." … "Fang Yuan gave up the position of class monitor, does that mean, I'm the class monitor now?!" The surprise came too quickly, the second place Guyue Mobei couldn't react in time. Guyue Cheng's face was full of disbelief, he really couldn't understand, someone actually gave up the position of class monitor, what a complete idiot! "Brother …" Guyue Fangzheng's eyes widened, and he stared blankly at Fang Yuan as he walked back to his seat. According to Fangzheng's results, he would definitely be the assistant class monitor. But when Fang Yuan gave up the position of class monitor, Fangzheng suddenly felt that his position as the assistant class monitor was so dull and uninteresting. The academy elder's face was livid, he was really livid this time. Previously when Fang Yuan skipped class, his face was also very ugly, but that was just an act for others to see. He was in a terrible mood, even worse than the previous time. Fang Yuan gave up the position of class monitor, which meant that he refused to join the family system. The academy elder had been in charge of the academy for decades, but this was the first time he had seen such a student, who could actually refuse such a great temptation! He had wanted to invite him into the trap, but Fang Yuan refused, and the academy elder couldn't do anything about it. The subsidies were distributed. In the end, Guyue Mobei obtained the second place, which was unprecedented, outside of the class monitor. Fangzheng and Chicheng were each assistant class monitor. The allowance for the class monitor was 10 Yuan stone. The allowance for the assistant class monitor was increased to 5 Yuan stone. ================================================== Chapter 56 A red sun, slowly descended towards the mountains in the west. Its light was no longer glaring and dazzling. Instead, it was gentle and bright. The sky in the west, was dyed red by it, the sunset was continuous, like a concubine receiving a reward, happily crowding around the emperor, wanting to sleep together. Everything in Qing Mao Mountain, was enveloped in a blurry rose color. The tall buildings, were also draped with a layer of golden silk. The trees planted around the academy, seemed to be smeared with a thin layer of oil.
S-REV-074.summary: Following Fang Yuan's rapid advancement, the clan is rife with speculation, and the Academy Elder faces pressure to explain. During the distribution of Yuan stones and the appointment of class and vice-class monitors, the elder reluctantly names Fang Yuan as class monitor due to his first-place achievement. However, Fang Yuan publicly rejects the position, much to the elder's and other students' shock, claiming lack of talent and asserting his right to refuse.

continuityMutations.content: He successfully re-establishes his extortion racket, physically dominating the new class monitor and demonstrating his contempt for the clan's official hierarchy.
He is humiliated and physically defeated by Fang Yuan, demonstrating the hollowness of his new authority against Fang Yuan's raw power.
He is forced to pay Fang Yuan despite his new position, highlighting his powerlessness against his brother.
He is forced to pay Fang Yuan despite his new position, realizing his new authority is limited.

S-REV-075.prose:
The wind blew gently, the students carried the Yuan stone allowance they had just received, walked out of the classroom, each feeling refreshed. "I really don't know what Fang Yuan was thinking, to actually give up the position of class monitor!" "Hehehe, his brain is broken, probably thinking about killing all day, let's not pay attention to this kind of lunatic." "Speaking of which, that day when he barged into the academy, I was really shocked. It was too scary, after returning that day, I had nightmares for the whole night. " The students, in twos and threes, walked in groups. "Hello, class monitor." "Yes." "Hello, class monitor." "Yes, yes." Gu Yue Mo Bei swaggered around, and everywhere he went, the students bowed to him in greeting. His face was filled with uncontrollable excitement and intoxication. This was the charm of power. Even if it was a little different treatment, it would make people more sure of their own value. At this time, the sun was setting in the west, the setting sun was like blood, Mobei looked at it, his heart joyfully thinking: "Why didn't I notice this before, this red sunset is really cute …" "Hmph, just being a class monitor and you're so arrogant, what's so great about it." Guyue purposely walked at the back, not wanting to greet Guyue Mobei. "I really don't know what Fang Yuan was thinking, to actually give up the position of class monitor. But it's also fortunate, or else how could I, who was ranked third, get the position of vice class monitor? "Guyue Mobei was puzzled, but also glad. "Hello, vice class monitor." At this time, an ordinary student walked past him, immediately bowed and greeted him. "Hehe, nice to meet you too." Guyue Cheng nodded and smiled. As the student walked over, he naturally thought to himself, The feeling of being a vice-chairman isn't bad. I think the feeling of being a chairman is even better.

How great would it be if I wasn't the deputy chairman, but the chairman! " Chicheng, who had just been rejoicing over this, was now yearning for the position of class president. Under the family's system, each level of power was like a big carrot, deeply tempting him. "Although I only have C grade aptitude, I believe that everything will get better and better." Guyue was hopeful for the future. However, at that moment, Guyue Fangzheng, who was also the deputy chairman, was in a terrible mood and had an ugly expression on his face. "Big brother, you!" He stared dumbfoundedly at the school's entrance, where a lonely figure was blocking the way. "Old rules, one Yuan stone per person." Fang Yuan stood with his arms crossed and said calmly. Fangzheng opened his mouth, and after a few tries, he finally said, "Big brother, I'm the deputy chairman now!" "Indeed." Fang Yuan nodded expressionlessly, and glanced at Fangzheng. "The subsidy for a deputy chairman is up to five Yuan each time. Then you hand over three Yuan stones. " Fangzheng was dumbfounded, and for a moment, he couldn't say a word. A group of teenagers surrounded Guyue Mobei as they walked over. Seeing Fang Yuan blocking the school's entrance, Guyue Mobei was furious, and pointed at Fang Yuan. "Fang Yuan! How dare you try to stop us?! I'm the chairman now, and you, an ordinary student, have to bow and greet me when you see me! " What answered him was Fang Yuan's fist. Guyue Mobei was caught off guard, and was hit by the fist. He couldn't help but take a few steps back, and his face was full of disbelief. "You hit me, how dare you hit me?

I'm the chairman! " What answered him again was still Fang Yuan's fist. Bang bang bang. After a few exchanges of offense and defense, Guyue Mobei was knocked to the ground by Fang Yuan, and he fainted. The surrounding teenagers were all dumbfounded, and for a moment, they didn't know how to react. Everything was different from what they had imagined! The guards at the entrance watched everything unfold before their eyes, and couldn't help but whisper among themselves. "Fang Yuan knocked down the new chairman, what should we do?" "Nothing!" "What do you mean?" "Just watch, and then call the others to clean up the place." "But …" "Hmph, what kind of person is Fang Yuan, and you want to provoke him? Think about what happened to Wang Da and Wu Er! " The guard who asked the question immediately shivered, and didn't say anything else. The two guards at the entrance both straightened their bodies. They allowed the robbery to happen around them, as if they were deaf and blind, unable to hear or see anything. Fang Yuan dealt with Guyue Mobei, and then Fangzheng and Chicheng. Only then did the other youths realize that nothing had changed. Fang Yuan was still the same Fang Yuan, and the robbery would still happen. "One Yuan stone per person, three for the vice chairman, eight for the chairman." Fang Yuan announced the new rules. The teenagers sighed, and obediently took out their Yuan stone. When they walked out of the hall, someone suddenly slapped his head, and shouted, "I got it, no wonder Fang Yuan doesn't want the chairman position, he wants to continue extorting us!" "That's right. Every time he extorts us, he gets fifty-nine Yuan stone, and now it has grown to sixty-eight.
S-REV-075.summary: As students leave the academy, Guyue Mobei, now the class monitor, basks in his new authority, while Guyue Cheng, a vice-class monitor, also feels a surge of ambition. Fang Yuan, however, positions himself at the academy entrance and resumes his extortion racket, demanding Yuan stones from everyone, including the new class monitors. When Guyue Mobei protests, Fang Yuan brutally attacks and knocks him out. The guards, remembering past incidents, refuse to intervene. The other students, including Fangzheng and Cheng, are forced to pay, realizing that Fang Yuan's rejection of authority merely allowed him to continue his profitable coercion, leaving them all, especially the new 'leaders,' in a worse financial state.

continuityMutations.content: He understands that his authority is constrained by the larger political interests of the Guyue clan's leadership.
He learns that Jia Fu has returned and Jia Jin Sheng is missing, an urgent clan matter.
He reveals the critical information about Jia Fu's return and Jia Jin Sheng's disappearance.
He has returned to Guyue village.
His whereabouts are currently unknown, a matter of urgency for the clan.
He places high hopes on Fangzheng as an A-grade genius and expects him to develop resilience through challenges.
He expects his grandson to grow through setbacks.
A place where the Academy Elder strategizes and deals with sensitive clan matters, often under pressure from higher authorities.

C-REV-93.transition: Enters the office with an urgent message.

S-REV-076.prose:
If he were the chairman, he would get ten Yuan stones at most. "Many people came to a sudden realization. "Too treacherous, too cunning, too vicious!" Someone slapped his thigh, and said angrily. "Sigh, if that's the case, the chairman and vice chairman are nothing. They are still being robbed, and there are still only two Yuan stone left, exactly the same as us. " It was unknown who said this, but when the teenagers heard it, they couldn't help but fall silent. Bang! The academy elder fiercely slapped the table, and flew into a rage. "This Fang Yuan is too much, what is he trying to do? He even dares to rob, robbing the chairman of eight Yuan stone, and the vice chairman of three Yuan stone. If that's the case, what's the difference between the chairman and the other normal students?! "The academy elder tried his best to lower his voice, and his words were filled with anger. Fang Yuan rejecting the chairman position was equivalent to refusing to be part of the family's system. To put it more seriously, it was a form of betrayal to the family. This had already made the academy elder very angry. Following that, Fang Yuan robbed his classmates. His hands were stretching further and further, and had already exceeded the academy elder's bottom line. After being extorted like this, the chairman and vice chairman's power and position would be completely weakened. Over time, the normal students would also lose their respect and interest towards these two positions. Fang Yuan's actions, seemed small, but the significance was huge. This was already using his own strength to challenge the family's system! This was a scene that the academy elder absolutely did not want to see. He was grooming the family's new hope, and not a traitor to the family. However, even though Fang Yuan's actions had challenged his bottom line, the academy elder knew that he could not personally deal with this matter.

If he really did that, the first person who would not let him off would be the clan leader. The second and third people who would have opinions against him would be Guyue Lian and Guyue Mo Chen. The clan leader had placed his hopes on Guyue Fangzheng. Fangzheng was, after all, the only A grade genius in the past three years. The clan leader needed a tenacious and independent genius, not a delicate flower that needed to be cared for. At the same time, Chi Lian and Mo Chen also hoped that their respective grandsons could grow up in this kind of setback. If the academy elder intervened and punished Fang Yuan on behalf of the students. If word got out, it would be "The future successor of the Mo and Chi family couldn't beat Fang Yuan, so he had to ask for help from his elders." How ugly would that sound? This would be a huge blow to the Mo and Chi family's reputation. The academy elder was obviously not afraid of a mere Fang Yuan, but he was worried that if he interfered, he would attract pressure from the clan leader, the Mo family, and the Chi family. This was practically the entire upper echelon of the Guyue family. How could he, a mere elder, withstand it? "The root of this matter still lies in Fang Yuan's secret. What did he rely on to advance to the intermediate level so easily? " The academy elder suppressed the anger in his heart and focused his gaze on the three investigation reports on the desk. On the first report, there was a detailed background of Fang Yuan's family. Fang Yuan came from a good background this time, his identity was not suspicious, and his background was also clean. Both his parents died, and he was taken in by his uncle and aunt. But they did not get along, and ever since he entered the academy, Fang Yuan had been living in the academy dormitory. On the second report, there was a record of Fang Yuan's life. He had early intelligence at a young age, and was looked upon favorably by the clan, thinking that he might have an A grade talent. But after the Awakening Ceremony, he was tested to be a C grade, causing the clan to be greatly disappointed. On the third party's report, there was Fang Yuan's recent whereabouts. His daily life was very simple, almost three points and one line.

During the day, he attended classes in the academy, and at night, he slept in the dormitory. He was very hardworking in his cultivation, and every night, he would undergo Gu Master cultivation to nourish his aperture. Sometimes, he would go out for a trip to the only inn in the village to improve his meals and buy wine to drink. He had a soft spot for wine, and liked to drink green bamboo wine. Under his bed in the dormitory, there were tens of jars of green bamboo wine. The academy elder looked at the three reports in detail, and in his heart, his impression of Fang Yuan deepened. "Both parents died early, and he is not on good terms with his uncle and aunt … no wonder this kid Fang Yuan has no sense of belonging to the clan. He was personally crowned as a genius by the clan, and then personally plucked off the title, falling from the sky to the ground … no wonder he is so unruly, eccentric, and cold. His life is so simple, and he is hardworking in his cultivation, all because he is holding back his anger, unwilling to admit defeat, and wants to prove to the clan that he can do it! That's why when I suppressed him, he fought back so fiercely … " As the academy elder thought of this, he could not help but sigh softly. The more he understood Fang Yuan, the more he understood Fang Yuan. Of course, understanding did not mean forgiveness. Fang Yuan contradicted him, offended his dignity, and refused to be the class monitor, and even robbed his classmates. This was something he could not tolerate. Shaking the information in his hands, the academy elder frowned again, "Although this information is detailed, it has nothing to do with the secret of Fang Yuan's advancement. It's already been a few days, and this bunch of people are too outrageous! " Dong dong dong. At this moment, there was a knock on the door. "Come in." The academy elder said. The door opened. It was the clan leader Guyue Bo's personal guard, "The clan leader has ordered for Sir Elder to go to the clan leader's pavilion, there is an important matter to discuss." "Oh, what is it?" The academy elder stood up from his seat, he could feel the importance of this matter from the personal guard's tone and expression. "The Rank four Gu Master Jia Fu has returned, and his brother Jia Jin Sheng's whereabouts are unknown!"

The personal guard answered. "Hiss …" The academy elder immediately sucked in a breath of cold air.
S-REV-076.summary: In his office, the Academy Elder rages over Fang Yuan's continued defiance and the undermining of the clan's system, realizing Fang Yuan's actions challenge the foundation of their authority. He reviews investigation reports on Fang Yuan's past, finding nothing to explain his rapid advancement, only confirming his difficult background and eccentric personality. He acknowledges that direct intervention against Fang Yuan is impossible due to the political calculations of the Clan Leader and other influential families who want their heirs to develop through adversity. His contemplation is interrupted by a personal guard of Clan Leader Guyue Bo, who delivers the urgent news that Rank four Gu Master Jia Fu has returned, but his brother Jia Jin Sheng is missing.

continuityMutations.content: The implications of Jia Jin Sheng's disappearance are dire for Guyue village's trade and reputation.
Jia Fu is physically present and asserting dominance over the Guyue clan leadership.
His actions (standing) are intended to project power and determination to both the Guyue clan and his own father.
Is responsible for the academy and its students, including Guyue Fang Yuan.
Understands the severe implications of Jia Jin Sheng's disappearance for Guyue village and their trade relations.
Initially views Fang Yuan's stubbornness as a clear sign of guilt, then reinterprets it as a facade to hide the Liquor worm, and his innocence regarding Jia Jin Sheng's murder.
Has been missing for several days, leading to suspicion of his death.
Is known for threatening people and having a contentious personality.
Is considered a burden by his father to Jia Fu.
His disappearance is implied to be part of a larger internal Jia clan power struggle.
Is anxious about his missing brother, Jia Jin Sheng, and feels responsible for him.
Uses his Rank four Gu Master status to exert pressure on the Guyue clan.
Is trying to appear determined to his father and the Guyue clan regarding his brother's disappearance.
Realizes he is a target in the internal Jia clan power struggle, specifically from Jia Gui.
