Identified by Guyue Bo as an 'unpolished gem' to be trained by Fang Yuan's challenges.

relationshipMutations.type: Accusation and foiled attempt at framing

C-REV-76.transition: Cupped fists and turned to leave with his retinue.

S-REV-081.prose:
Chapter 59 Jia Fu was in a dilemma. He had already eliminated Fang Yuan as a suspect and was almost certain that Jia Gui was the mastermind. "But what can I do even if I know the truth?" Jia Fu's heart was filled with grief and indignation. "I don't have any evidence. If I were to testify against Jia Gui in front of my father, my father would probably think that I'm trying to frame him!" Jia Fu was very astute. He looked at Fang Yuan with a sharp glint in his eyes. Jia Jin Sheng had followed him everywhere. Now that Jia Jin Sheng was missing, Jia Fu would naturally be held responsible for not taking good care of him! Since he couldn't testify against Jia Gui, he had to give his father an explanation. And this explanation was right in front of him! "That's right. If I use this Fang Yuan as a scapegoat, I can barely explain myself. As long as I get past this hurdle, I might be able to get back twice the amount. "Jia Fu's heart was filled with evil thoughts. He suddenly raised his voice and interrogated Fang Yuan, "Fang Yuan, how can you prove that you didn't harm Jia Jin Sheng?" The elders couldn't help but be stunned. This matter was obviously an internal strife within the Jia Family. Why are you still holding onto my clansman? Only Family Head Guyue's face darkened and his gaze turned sharp as he stared at Jia Fu. "Fang Yuan, do you have any witnesses to prove that you weren't there and didn't have time to harm Jia Jin Sheng? If you don't have any, then you're the murderer! "Jia Fu pointed at Fang Yuan and glared at him. "This Jia Fu is trying to push my clan's Fang Yuan out as a scapegoat.

This is preposterous! "At this moment, all the elders came to their senses, and their expressions became unfriendly. They had been scheming against each other for a long time. With just a little thought, they understood Jia Fu's position and intentions. "Witnesses? Of course I do! I've already arranged it. " Fang Yuan sneered inwardly, but on the surface, he showed an expression of being unable to explain himself, opening his mouth but unable to say anything. "You don't need to say anything else. Just tell me if you have any witnesses or not!" Jia Fu raised his voice again and suppressed Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan put on an indignant expression and finally squeezed out two words through his teeth, "No." "Haha. Then you are … "Jia Fu was about to announce the verdict loudly. "Wait!" The Academy Elder took a step forward and stood in front of Fang Yuan, his face solemn. "Of course he has a witness. I am his witness!" "You?" Jia Fu was surprised. "That's right, it's me." The academy elder's tone was a little weak in front of the rank four Jia Fu. However, when he saw Clan Leader Guyue Bo's encouraging gaze, he felt more confident and raised his head. "These days, Fang Yuan has unexpectedly advanced to the Intermediate Level. I've sent people to investigate in secret.

His daily whereabouts are all recorded. There is no time for him to harm Jia Jin Sheng. " "Yes, that's right …" Fang Yuan was hidden behind the academy elder, and no one could see the faint smile at the corners of his mouth. Jia Fu's face was ashen. He didn't expect the academy elder to suddenly stand out and protect Fang Yuan. More importantly, the Guyue Clan Leader did not object to it. This meant that the Guyue Clan wanted to protect this Fang Yuan. "I understand now! I wholeheartedly wanted to make Fang Yuan a scapegoat, but I did it from my own point of view and did not consider their feelings. That's right, if Fang Yuan were to be the scapegoat, the Guyue Clan would have to bear the infamy of harming the Jia Clan. They would have to face the Jia Clan's revenge in the future, and their reputation would be tarnished. In the future, the merchant caravans wouldn't dare to come and trade. That would be a huge loss! " Thinking of this, Jia Fu wanted to slap his own head in frustration. This was what the Guyue Clan's higher-ups were thinking. Fang Yuan was only a C Grade. If he really harmed Jia Jin Sheng, handing him over was not a big deal. But the point was, now that his suspicions had been cleared, if they still handed him over, wouldn't the Guyue Clan suffer a huge, unnecessary loss? Knowing that this conflict was irreconcilable, Jia Fu gritted his teeth and decided to persist to the end. He said, "If that's the case, why don't I use the Footprint Gu. Once this Gu is used, it will show the footprints of the last thirty thousand steps. " The academy elder immediately snorted in displeasure. Jia Fu's words showed that he didn't believe him. But he had no reason to stop him, so he moved to the side. "Come and test it!"

Fang Yuan looked at Jia Fu and laughed coldly, walking in front of him with his head held high. He was full of confidence, because he had already predicted this factor. Thus, he had been hiding in the village these few days, not even stepping into the rock crevice or the secret cave. Under the watchful eyes of the Guyue Clan's higher-ups, Jia Fu did not play any tricks. The Footprint Gu's shape was very special, like a human foot. Its material was like a translucent frozen milk, giving off a smooth and tender feeling. The surface even had a layer of yellowish-green fluorescence. The size was not big, only the size of a palm. Jia Fu held it in his hand, his primeval essence gushing out and pouring into the Footprint Gu. The Footprint Gu became brighter and brighter, and suddenly with a bang, it exploded into a large amount of yellowish-green fluorescent powder. With a whoosh, Ying Fan enveloped Fang Yuan and spun around him once before flying out of the discussion hall's door. As the fluorescent powder flew, a series of footprints appeared on the ground. These footprints were all emitting a yellowish-green fluorescent light, and were exactly the same size as Fang Yuan's two feet. These were the footprints he had just entered the hall. The footprints extended from the clan leader's pavilion to the academy dormitory, and then circled around the academy. Other than that, it reached the village's inn. The yellowish-green fluorescent powder flew less and less, finally disappearing at the thirty thousandth footprint. When the results came out, everyone checked and found out that Fang Yuan was innocent, there was no doubt about it. Jia Fu sighed deeply, and took out a small jade box from his pocket. He opened the jade box, and there was only a jade piece in it. The jade piece was a translucent emerald green color, and a Gu worm was sealed inside. It was a stick insect. Its body was slender and slender, and it was the color of jade. Its entire body was like a round bamboo tube. A stick worm's body was usually longer than a palm, but this one was not, and was only the length of a fingernail.

On its surface, there was a faint white light. "Green jade body, white light covering the body, this is the Bamboo Gentleman!" Immediately, an elder recognized this Gu worm and exclaimed. Even clan leader Guyue Bo was moved, and could not help but advise, "Brother Jia, this Bamboo Gentleman is a Rank four Gu worm, it is not easy to refine. Why waste it here? " Jia Fu shook his head, looking at Fang Yuan, "This Bamboo Gentleman was obtained by chance when I was young, when I cut open a rock. The rock was only cut halfway, and did not continue. As everyone knows, this Gu worm feeds on sincerity, and is born with the ability to detect lies. Only a gentleman who has never lied since he was young can refine and feed this Gu. " "Fang Yuan, you only need to cut open the rock, and put the weak Bamboo Gentleman into your aperture. Whatever I ask you, you'll answer. Then take out the Gu, and let us see if it changes color. If it changes color, it means you are lying! " "No problem." Fang Yuan did not hesitate, and immediately cut open the jade piece, and did as Jia Fu said. Once the Bamboo Gentleman appeared in the aperture, it immediately let out a faint green light, illuminating the entire primeval sea. Fang Yuan immediately felt that if he told a lie, the Bamboo Gentleman would be able to sense it, and its body would change from green to other colors. However, the reason why he agreed to it was because he had the confidence. "Spring Autumn Cicada!" With a thought, the sleeping Spring Autumn Cicada woke up, and let out a trace of aura. This aura was extremely grand, and immediately suppressed the Bamboo Gentleman. The Bamboo Gentleman let out a green light, and immediately shrunk back into its body. Its entire body curled up, trembling in fear. How could it have the energy to detect lies? Jia Fu started to ask, and his first sentence was straight to the point: "Fang Yuan, did you harm my brother Jia Jin Sheng?"

"No!" Fang Yuan answered resolutely. Jia Fu asked again: "Do you know anything else about him?" Fang Yuan shook his head: "I don't." Jia Fu asked again: "Was there any falsehood in what you said to us earlier?" Fang Yuan shook his head again: "No." "Alright, you can take out the Bamboo Gentleman now." After three questions, Jia Fu said. Fang Yuan took out the Bamboo Gentleman, and everyone looked over, only to see that the Bamboo Gentleman's surface was still dark green, without any change. The clan elders let out a sigh of relief. Jia Fu's expression also calmed down. He kept the Bamboo Gentleman, and cupped his fists towards Guyue Bo: "I have offended you this time, brother Guyue." "No matter, to let the truth be known is what we want to see." Guyue Bo waved his hand, and then sighed, "But it is a pity for this Bamboo Gentleman." The Bamboo Gentleman had the ability to detect lies, and was a Rank four Gu Master, so it was very valuable. But feeding and refining it was not easy. It could only be refined by a sincere gentleman. As long as other Gu Masters told a lie, refining the Bamboo Gentleman would definitely fail, and the Bamboo Gentleman would die on the spot. Its food was sincerity. As for living in the aperture of a sincere gentleman, it could only survive by eating the gentleman's sincerity. Now that the Bamboo Gentleman was released, it was extremely weak, but it had no food to recover its energy. After Fang Yuan used it just now, death was already a foregone conclusion. Jia Fu shook his head, looking at the dying Bamboo Gentleman in his hands, as if it was not a pity. He said in a deep voice: "I have already tried my best to investigate this matter, but it was beyond my abilities. When I return to the clan, I will hire God of Arrest Tie Xue Leng with a large sum of money, and I will definitely investigate this matter thoroughly!

Goodbye. " Finishing, he cupped his fists towards Guyue Bo, and turned to leave. Neat and tidy, but it also had some elegance. Looking at the backs of Jia Fu and the rest leaving, Guyue Bo let out a long sigh of relief: "You guys can leave too." He waved his hand towards the clan elders, and as if thinking of something, said: "Academy elder, stay." Without losing a single hair, Fang Yuan walked out of the clan leader pavilion unscathed. ================================================== Chapter 60 "Tribe leader, what matter do you have with me?" The academy elder stood respectfully at the side. "Nothing much, sit, I have a story to tell you." Guyue Bo squinted his eyes, speaking leisurely. "I am all ears!" The academy elder chose the seat closest to the tribe leader and sat down. Tribe leader Guyue Bo then told him Ren Zu's story. Speaking of which — Ever since Ren Zu said the correct names, he subdued the Rules and Regulations Gu. His first order was for them to capture a lifespan Gu for him. Rules and Regulations Gu were a square and a circle Gu, when they worked together, they could capture tens of thousands of Gu in the world, a lifespan Gu was not a problem. Ren Zu used the lifespan Gu and immediately regained his youth, returning to his twenty years old age. But at this moment, the Rules Gu said to him: "Oh human, although you subdued us, every time you order us, you have to add a rule. Rules Gu added: "We captured lifespan Gu for you, this is our first order. Our new rule is, we will not capture Gu worms for you again. " That is to say, if Ren Zu wanted to capture lifespan Gu in the future, the Rules Gu would not help. Ren Zu nodded, he could only agree. He opened his mouth and gave his second order: "Then, other than lifespan Gu, please capture all the Gu in the world for me." Rules and Regulations Gu received this order, and immediately, Rules Gu turned into an infinitely large circle, including space and time. Rules Gu turned into an infinitely large square, covering the entire world.
S-REV-081.summary: Jia Fu, convinced of Jia Gui's guilt but lacking evidence, attempts to frame Fang Yuan for Jia Jin Sheng's disappearance in front of the clan elders and Guyue Bo. The Academy Elder, at Guyue Bo's subtle prompting, defends Fang Yuan. Jia Fu then insists on using a Footprint Gu, which clears Fang Yuan. Undeterred, Jia Fu uses a rare Bamboo Gentleman Gu to detect lies, but Fang Yuan, using the Spring Autumn Cicada, bypasses it, leading to his full exoneration. Frustrated, Jia Fu vows to hire a powerful investigator.

continuityMutations.content: Guyue Bo's strategy is to use Fang Yuan's actions to toughen other clan youths, rather than suppressing him.
Guyue Bo believes 'blood ties' and magnanimity are more important than rigid rules in clan governance.
Guyue Bo will personally mentor Guyue Fangzheng.
Fang Yuan is Guyue Fangzheng's twin brother, which makes him politically significant to the clan.

S-REV-082.prose:
Goodbye. " Finishing, he cupped his fists towards Guyue Bo, and turned to leave. Neat and tidy, but it also had some elegance. Looking at the backs of Jia Fu and the rest leaving, Guyue Bo let out a long sigh of relief: "You guys can leave too." He waved his hand towards the clan elders, and as if thinking of something, said: "Academy elder, stay." Without losing a single hair, Fang Yuan walked out of the clan leader pavilion unscathed. ================================================== Chapter 60 "Tribe leader, what matter do you have with me?" The academy elder stood respectfully at the side. "Nothing much, sit, I have a story to tell you." Guyue Bo squinted his eyes, speaking leisurely. "I am all ears!" The academy elder chose the seat closest to the tribe leader and sat down. Tribe leader Guyue Bo then told him Ren Zu's story. Speaking of which — Ever since Ren Zu said the correct names, he subdued the Rules and Regulations Gu. His first order was for them to capture a lifespan Gu for him. Rules and Regulations Gu were a square and a circle Gu, when they worked together, they could capture tens of thousands of Gu in the world, a lifespan Gu was not a problem. Ren Zu used the lifespan Gu and immediately regained his youth, returning to his twenty years old age. But at this moment, the Rules Gu said to him: "Oh human, although you subdued us, every time you order us, you have to add a rule. Rules Gu added: "We captured lifespan Gu for you, this is our first order. Our new rule is, we will not capture Gu worms for you again. " That is to say, if Ren Zu wanted to capture lifespan Gu in the future, the Rules Gu would not help. Ren Zu nodded, he could only agree. He opened his mouth and gave his second order: "Then, other than lifespan Gu, please capture all the Gu in the world for me." Rules and Regulations Gu received this order, and immediately, Rules Gu turned into an infinitely large circle, including space and time. Rules Gu turned into an infinitely large square, covering the entire world.

A square and a circle formed a huge net that enveloped the entire world. When they shrunk and returned to Ren Zu's palm, all the Gu in the world, other than lifespan Gu, were captured by them. Ren Zu was overjoyed, this way, all the Gu in the world belonged to him, from now on, he was the master of the world! But when he opened the net, with a swoosh, a huge stream of Gu flowed out. The Gu worms that Rules and Regulations Gu had painstakingly captured all flew away. When Ren Zu hurriedly closed the net, there were only five Gu worms left. "Why is this?" Ren Zu was shocked. Rules and Regulations Gu answered him: "Oh human, there are thousands of Gu worms in the world, they come in all shapes and sizes, you have neither strength nor intelligence, how can you subdue them? We can only capture Gu worms for you. You have to subdue them yourself to make them work for you. " Then they said: "This is your second order, we will also add a second rule — from now on, we can only catch one Gu for you at a time" Ren Zu could only nod, he carefully lifted the net, only revealing a small gap. Of the remaining five Gu worms, there was strength Gu and wisdom Gu. Seeing this, Ren Zu was very happy. He said to the strength Gu: "Oh strength Gu, do you regret leaving me back then? If you submit to me now, I can give you back your freedom. " Strength Gu said: "Oh human, you are wrong. The reason I didn't fly away wasn't because I didn't have the chance, but because I wanted to stay. It's impossible for you to subdue me. I'll only submit to existences stronger than me, but you can't. However, we can make another deal. Give me your young man, and I will listen to your orders for the time being. " Ren Zu heard this and was slightly reluctant. He had just obtained his youth, was he going to lose it now? But he thirsted for strength, he knew that with strength, he would become stronger, and life would become easier.

Moreover, with strength, he could subdue even more Gu worms. Thus, Ren Zu agreed to the strength Gu, and made a second deal with it. Ren Zu became middle-aged in an instant. The strength Gu flew out of the net of rules, and landed on Ren Zu's shoulder. With strength, Ren Zu's confidence was boosted. He said to the wisdom Gu: "Oh wisdom Gu, do you regret leaving me back then? If you submit to me now, I can give you back your freedom. " Wisdom Gu said: "Oh human, you are wrong. I didn't fly away not because I didn't have the chance, but because I wanted to stay. It's impossible for you to subdue me. I only submit to existences with greater wisdom than me, but you can't. However, we can make another deal. Give me your middle-aged man, and I will listen to your orders for the time being. " Ren Zu heard this and did not want to make another deal. He treasured his life more than before, and he knew that once he sold his middle-aged man, he would only be left with old age. Not long later, the strength Gu and wisdom Gu would leave him, just like last time. Ren Zu did not want to make a deal, but he did not want to give up the wisdom Gu either. Wisdom Gu was anxious, and could only take a step back: "Alright, human, you win. I lost to you this time, as long as you tell me how you captured me, I will admit defeat and not take anything from you. From now on, you can use me. " Ren Zu heard this and was overjoyed, before the rules Gu could stop him, he blurted out: "I used the rules Gu to capture you." Wisdom Gu laughed heartily: "I've remembered, so these two Gu are called Rules and Regulations. Haha, now that I know your names, you can't capture me anymore. " Saying so, it turned into a ray of light and flew out, disappearing in the blink of an eye. Rules and Regulations Gu grumbled: "Oh human, we have told you long ago.

You better keep our names to yourself, don't let other existences know. Otherwise, we will be used by other existences. Great, the wisdom Gu already knows our names, this is troublesome. " Ren Zu realized that he had been tricked by the wisdom Gu, and was extremely regretful. He knew that he had lost the only chance to capture wisdom using rules. At this point, Guyue Bo's story came to an end. He looked at the academy elder, his gaze containing deep meaning. The academy elder could not help but stand up from his seat. He had heard of Ren Zu's Gu Master long ago, but now that Guyue Bo was talking about it, it naturally had deeper meaning. His gaze flashed, and he understood something in his heart, and immediately bowed towards Guyue Bo, saying respectfully: "Lord clan leader, this story of yours, is it a metaphor? You compared Fang Yuan to the wisdom Gu, and the clan to Ren Zu. Although Ren Zu used rules to capture the wisdom Gu and trapped it in a net, it still escaped in the end. " At this point, the academy elder paused, thinking for a while, and looked at Guyue Bo: "Could it be that lord clan leader, you want me to let Fang Yuan go, and not suppress him anymore? But he is getting more and more overboard … " Guyue Bo stopped the academy elder's words, and gestured for him to sit down and speak. The academy elder sat down again, and heard Guyue Bo sigh: "Oh you, you are still so perceptive, a smart person, able to understand with just a hint. But your breadth of mind is still too small, and you only care about your own little territory. Let me tell you now, the academy is small, the clan is big. " "I know what you are worried about, you are afraid that the other students will be suppressed by Fang Yuan, and eventually lose their morale. Hehehe. "Guyue Bo shook his head, and pointed at the academy elder:" You worry too much. " "What do you think the clan is for? To rely on your academy to nurture new people? No, behind every student, there is still their parents, their elders, their good friends. As long as these people are supporting us, encouraging us, and looking forward to us, our Gu Yue clan's younger generation will have confidence and motivation. " "Fang Yuan has indeed exceeded my expectations time and time again, and has a hint of a sudden appearance.

I have been paying attention to Fangzheng in secret, and I have long known about Fang Yuan's extortion and robbery. Let him continue robbing, and use him to train Fangzheng, Mobei, and Chicheng, these unpolished gems. This is very good, at least this batch of students has the most solid fist and leg skills I have seen. " The academy elder's face showed worry: "But lord clan leader, too many setbacks is not good, it will grind the unpolished gems into pieces. Especially now that Fang Yuan has the Liquor worm, this worm is of great help to a Rank one Gu Master. I am worried that during this Job Transition period, under Fang Yuan's pressure, the other students will not be able to turn things around. " "Then let them not be able to turn things around!" Guyue Bo snorted coldly, showing a trace of the magnanimity and coldness of a leader, "What is this little setback? Is it scarier than death? With the support of the elders in the clan, if they still can't hold on, it means they are not unpolished gems, and have no value in nurturing them. The clan has new students entering the academy every year, and if this batch doesn't succeed, there is always the next batch. As for Guyue Fangzheng … from tomorrow night onwards, I will personally guide him in secret. " "To have the clan leader's personal guidance, that is Guyue Fangzheng's luck." The academy elder sucked up at the right time. Guyue Bo's expression softened a little, and he looked at the academy elder, reminding him: "Do you know why you are still an academy elder even though you have been an academy elder for tens of years? Be more magnanimous. I know that Fang Yuan has offended your authority and made you lose face, but why do you have to be so calculative with a junior? " "I also know that this Fang Yuan has some intelligence at an early age, but he is still a young man, young and impulsive. Otherwise, he wouldn't have injured the guards and made things difficult for you in front of everyone. He has been suppressing his anger, and that is understandable. Falling from a genius to a mere mortal, it is normal for him to be hostile towards the clan. " "He is actually still very childish. Just look at how he tried to hide the Liquor worm. How could the Liquor worm be hidden? He is not mature, and still has naive thoughts.

Don't think of him as a scary person. By comparing him to the Wisdom Gu, I have overestimated him. At most, he is a little clever, but he doesn't have any great wisdom. If he had hidden his mid-level cultivation without batting an eyelid, or accepted the position of class monitor indifferently, then he would really be scheming. " "Clan leader, what do you mean?" The academy elder raised his eyebrows. "What I mean is, if Fang Yuan is unhappy with the clan, then let him vent his frustrations. If an ant spits at an elephant, will the elephant care? Emotions should be released, and not blocked. After he has vented, he will naturally integrate into the clan. Our Guyue clan, since the first generation, has been around for almost a thousand years. There are many people who are unhappy with the clan, but in the end, did they overturn the clan? " "The clan does not only have rules, there is also blood ties. Ren Zu wanted to use rules to catch wisdom, but not only did he fail, the rules were also known by wisdom. The meaning behind this is profound … rules are dead, people are alive, and ties are deep. If you blindly use rules to catch people, it will instead increase hatred, and cause Fang Yuan to be further away from the clan. Fang Yuan is only a C grade, if he is lucky, he will only be a low level clan elder in a few decades. But he is still Guyue Fangzheng's twin brother, do you understand? " "I understand!" Hearing Guyue Bo's last sentence, the academy elder suddenly understood. "Hmm … if the clan only has rules, then it is a pile of stiff dead objects. But if it increases the blood ties, then it is alive. "Guyue Bo nodded slowly," There is one more thing, I want to give you, I hope you will remember it. " "Clan leader, please enlighten me." Guyue Bo's gaze was distant, looking at the moonlight outside the window, "The sea can hold all rivers, and the sea is big … remember it, then leave."

"Yes, clan leader, I will leave now." The academy elder retreated.
S-REV-082.summary: After clearing the hall, Guyue Bo detains the Academy Elder and recounts the allegorical tale of Ren Zu's attempts to capture Gu worms. Through this story, Guyue Bo explains his philosophy of clan governance, emphasizing that rigid rules are insufficient and that 'blood ties' are crucial. He reveals his awareness of Fang Yuan's aggressive behavior and his intention to use it as a crucible to temper other clan youths like Guyue Fangzheng, whom he plans to personally guide.

continuityMutations.content: He believes Jia Gui is responsible for Jia Jin Sheng's death and plans to frame him.
He harbors intense anger and a desire for revenge against Jia Gui.
He observes Jia Fu's deep-seated suspicion and anger towards Jia Gui.
He successfully manipulated events to direct Jia Fu's suspicion and anger towards Jia Gui, diverting blame from himself.
He plans to use his apparent diligence in investigating Jia Jin Sheng's death to deflect blame from himself and frame Jia Gui, ensuring his father believes his 'attitude'.
He is intensely angry at Jia Gui, believing him to be the true culprit behind Jia Jin Sheng's death and vows revenge.
He is surprised by Jia Fu's suspicion of Jia Gui.
He successfully orchestrated a complex plan to divert blame for Jia Jin Sheng's death onto Jia Gui, using truth and falsehood to manipulate various factions.
He has a deep understanding of survival skills, including making rope from natural materials, gained from his past life.
He meticulously tests new environments for traps and dangers, employing various methods before direct engagement.
He is interfering with academy affairs and has started secretly teaching Guyue Fangzheng, showing favoritism.
Home to the Guyue village and various beast nests.

relationshipMutations.type: Intensified animosity and intent to betray

C-REV-76.transition: Rode the Treasure Brass Toad away from Guyue village, leaping continuously along the mountain path.

C-REV-99.transition: Rode the Treasure Brass Toad away from Guyue village, leaping continuously along the mountain path.

S-REV-083.prose:
Chapter 61
Tonight's moon was especially round.
The moonlight was like a gauze, shining on Qing Mao mountain.
Every time the Treasure Brass Toad leapt, it would cover a distance of a hundred meters.
Because it was leaping forward, the steep and narrow mountain path could not restrict or obstruct it.
Jia Fu and the rest sat on the Treasure Brass Toad, leaving the Guyue village and rushing back to the caravan.
The wind whistled in their ears, and their vision shook along with the Treasure Brass Toad's leaps.
The moonlight shone on everyone's faces, and everyone was silent. Jia Fu's expression was as cold as ice.
After a while, one of Jia Fu's confidantes couldn't help but ask, "Master, what should we do?
Jia Jin Sheng is dead, how will master explain this to master when he returns?
Should we find a scapegoat first … "
Jia Fu shook his head, but ignored him, "Do you know the story of Ren Zu?"
The aide was stunned, not expecting Jia Fu to reply like this.
He did not know how to reply at this moment.
Jia Fu continued, "Ren Zu had the Rules and Rules Gu, and captured all the Gu in the world. He gained strength, but lost wisdom.
Right now, there were three Gu left in his net.
He opened it and saw that these three Gu were Attitude Gu, Belief Gu and Suspicion Gu.
Ren Zu was not willing to let them go, so these three Gu could only make a bet with Ren Zu.
As long as Ren Zu opened the net, they would split into three directions and escape.
Whoever was caught by Ren Zu would be subdued.
Tell me, what did Ren Zu catch in the end? "
The aide seemed to understand, and replied, "It was the Attitude Gu!"
"Do you know why?" Jia Fu asked again.
The aide shook his head.
Jia Fu chuckled. "That's because your attitude says it all.
Whether father 'believes' or 'suspects', I have already expressed my 'attitude'.
When Jia Jin Sheng went missing, I immediately started investigating in the caravan, and once I found any clues, I rushed back to the Guyue village without stopping.
In the village, I risked being attacked by the Guyue tribe to confront them.
I did not even sit down, and to verify Fang Yuan's words, I even used the Rank four Bamboo Gentleman. "
"After returning to the clan, I will hire the God of Arrest and invite Tie Xue Leng to investigate this matter.
Regardless of whether Jia Jin Sheng is dead or alive, as his brother, I have already done what I should do. My attitude has already been made clear!
I've already thought it through. I don't need a scapegoat. I'll just go back honestly because I really didn't do it!
If he found a scapegoat, he might fall into Jia Gui's trap.
If I can find someone to take the blame, he can naturally find someone to reverse the verdict. "
The confidant was secretly surprised, "Master, do you really suspect Young Master Jia Gui?"
"Hmph, who else could have done so well if not him?"
Speaking up to this point, Jia Fu's face twisted, and his eyes were about to spit out flames of anger. "Previously, I didn't do that to him because of our brotherhood.
I didn't expect him to be so treacherous. Since you're so heartless, don't blame me for being unjust! "
What he didn't know was that there was a pair of eyes watching him from afar.
Fang Yuan stood on the hillside and watched quietly.
The moon tonight was beautiful and bright.
The golden full moon hung high in the night sky, illuminating the mountains and earth.
Nearby, the green mountains were lush and the grass was lush.
The entire mountain was filled with pine, cypress, and fir trees, as well as the Qing Mao Mountain's unique Qing Mao bamboo.
Large patches of dark green water poured down from the top of the mountain and flowed to the foot of the mountain.
The mountains in the distance were continuous, blurring into a dark shadow under the moonlight.
The winding mountain road meandered down like a sheep's intestines. Sometimes it was blocked by the forest, but it continued to stretch out.
Jia Fu and the others rode on the Treasure Brass Toad and advanced along the mountain path.
After continuously leaping, his figure was finally covered by the forest.
Although the mountainous terrain did not restrict the Treasure Brass Toad's speed, it was still able to reach the Treasure Brass Toad.
But Jia Fu did not dare to recklessly pass through Qing Mao mountain. If he barged into the beast nest, even with his Rank four cultivation, he would still be in a difficult situation.
Therefore, following the mountain path was the most appropriate choice.
Not long ago, Fang Yuan had been watching the caravan leave with an umbrella on this hillside.
Now, he was standing here again, watching Jia Fu leave.
"The trouble of killing Jia Jin Sheng has finally been solved." His eyes were deep, and his heart was calm and tranquil.
Ever since he killed Jia Jin Sheng that night, he had been thinking about how to deal with the aftermath.
He was very clear that he had no foundation. If the truth was revealed, Guyue's tribe would definitely sacrifice him.
But if he kept hiding it, the paper would not cover the fire.
A brilliant lie was a mixture of truth and falsehood. There was truth in the falsehood, and falsehood in the truth.
He had to divert the trouble!
This situation was like a chessboard with two opposing sides.
On one side was Jia Fu's caravan, and on the other side was Guyue's tribe's village.
In this game, whether it was Guyue Bo, the academy elder, or Jia Fu, they were all chess pieces. Even he, Fang Yuan, was one of the chess pieces.
To protect this chess piece that represented himself, he could only make use of the opposing sides and find an opportunity in the gap.
A few days ago, Fang Yuan had started to plan.
He first used the two guards to put on a good show on the stage set up by the academy elder.
He then hid the existence of the Liquor worm to arouse the tribe's curiosity and attract the attention of the higher-ups.
At the same time, he asked the academy elder to investigate in secret.
Next, he robbed his classmate to show his impulsiveness, unruliness, and dissatisfaction with the tribe, "showing weakness" to the higher-ups of Guyue.
Then, he calculated the days and waited for Jia Fu.
During the confrontation, he showed his childishness and panic, which invisibly led everyone's thoughts.
He let them discover the "truth" themselves.
Finally, he made use of the conflict of interest between Guyue's tribe and Jia Fu to make the academy elder, who had been investigating him, testify for him.
The Bamboo Gentleman was a small accident, but he was still a Rank four. Under the suppression of the Spring Autumn Cicada, the Bamboo Gentleman ironically became the best proof for Fang Yuan.
In the end, not only did Fang Yuan explain the origin of the Liquor worm perfectly, he also pushed the blame to the innocent Jia Gui, while he escaped unscathed.
"The academy elder was left behind. It seems that Guyue Bo wants to interfere with the academy's affairs and cancel the suppression on me.
With his style, he does have the magnanimity to do so.
But his true goal isn't me, his main motive should be Gu Yue Fangzheng.
One of the reasons why I made a big fuss was to cause a commotion and attract the attention of the higher-ups.
Even if Guyue Bo does not show up, Guyue Mo Chen and Guyue Lian will make a move to protect their reputation. "
"As for Jia Fu, he should have already determined that Jia Gui is the culprit.
The fire of revenge is already burning in his chest. Hehe, I am really looking forward to it.
After my interference, the fight between these two brothers will immediately escalate.
I wonder if the Gu Fighting Tournament will be brought forward? "
"Right, there is also that Divine Investigator Tie Xue Leng.
Tie Xue Leng … hmph. "
Fang Yuan muttered these two words in his mouth. After a while, he smiled lightly, "In the righteous path, this person is quite a character.
It is a pity that he is very busy with work.
It will not be easy to invite him just because of this matter.
If Jia Fu wants to make his stance clear, he will definitely invite him. However, it is hard to say when, it will be at least two to three years later. "
In two to three years, he would be at Rank two or even Rank three.
At that time, his life would be a whole new world.
The night wind blew, and the fresh mountain air was fragrant.
Fang Yuan breathed in, feeling refreshed.
Looking into the distance, his field of vision was wide. The mountains were like a painting, and it was peaceful under the moonlight.
"The bright moon shines on the pines, the clear spring flows over the rocks." Fang Yuan recited, and could not help but think of a fable from Earth.
A group of monkeys chased after the moon. When they saw the moon in the well, they wanted to fish for it.
The monkeys at the back would grab the tails of the monkeys in front, and the monkeys in front would grab the tails of the monkeys in front. Just like that, the monkey at the front would finally touch the water in the well.
When it stretched out its hand, the water would shake and the moon would scatter.
The people of this world were often like this.
When they saw the shadow of the moon, they would think that it was the real moon.
Little did they know that it was only the moon in the well, the moon in their eyes, and the moon in their hearts.
"In this life, I wish to become the real moon, to leave the heavenly mountains, to play with the clouds and seas, to reflect the past and present, to walk above the dark heavens." Fang Yuan's eyes were clear, and his pupils reflected the beautiful green mountains.
On the hillside, a skinny youth stood silently.
A golden moon, like a disk, hung high in the night sky.
It had existed since ancient times, traversing through the night sky, and faintly imprinted the youth's tiny shadow on the bluestone.
S-REV-083.summary: Jia Fu and his entourage travel on the Treasure Brass Toad, leaving Guyue village. Jia Fu, cold and calculating, reveals his plan to his confidant: to feign diligence in investigating Jia Jin Sheng's death and blame his brother, Jia Gui, for the murder. His face twists with anger as he vows revenge against Jia Gui. Unbeknownst to Jia Fu, Fang Yuan watches their departure from a hillside, satisfied that his manipulation has set Jia Fu against Jia Gui.

continuityMutations.content: He knows how to make rope from plants, a skill from his past life.
He meticulously tests new, unknown environments for safety before proceeding.
Contains the inheritance of the Flower Wine Monk.
The soil inside the tunnel is strangely crimson and emits a dim light.

C-REV-01.transition: Drilled through a narrow stone crack to exit the secret cave and then returned.

S-REV-084.prose:
Chapter 62
The night sky in early summer was beautiful.
There were no clouds in the sky, and the sparkling stars shone with a moving light.
The sandalwood crickets took the place of the dragonpill crickets. They sang lyrical songs in the grass, by the mountain streams, and on the branches.
The Guyue village was lit up with lights, as if reflecting the starry sky.
Green bamboo buildings stood tall in the night wind, and under the starry sky, there was a peaceful and quiet atmosphere.
Fang Yuan was not in the village, but had snuck into the secret cave in the rock crack.
He half-knelt on the ground, his right hand on the screen wall, his palm emitting a ball of blue moonlight.
On the screen wall, the original image had disappeared, and it was no different from the surrounding stone walls.
If not for Fang Yuan clearly remembering the location, who would know that the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance was hidden under the screen wall?
On the night of a month ago, the screen wall changed, and the Flower Wine Monk's secret treasure suddenly appeared.
The screen wall first showed the Flower Wine Monk's blood-soaked body, threatening to leave behind an inheritance.
Then there was a line of words in blood, reminding people that if they broke the screen wall, the cave would appear.
After that, the words disappeared, and the power of the Photo-audio Gu on the screen wall was completely dissipated. The screen wall also returned to being a normal mountain wall.
Although he knew about the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, Fang Yuan did not have the time to explore it.
Because of this accident, he killed Jia Jin Sheng on the spot, and that night he was busy cleaning up the scene.
Then, to deal with the upcoming interrogation, he carefully set up a trap, and his activities were limited to the village.
Until Jia Fu left, the academy elder stopped the secret investigation. After more than ten days, the rumors died down, and Fang Yuan secretly snuck back here.
The Bronze Sea in his aperture slowly descended, and Fang Yuan mobilized waves of primeval essence, pouring it into the Moonlight Gu in his right palm.
The Moonlight Gu emitted a ball of gentle moonlight, and the moonlight flickered continuously. Under its effect, the stone wall was continuously shaved off, and large amounts of stone powder fell.
This was Fang Yuan's exquisite control of the Moonlight Gu. When he first opened the stone, he used this method.
Compared to stone opening, this method was rather crude.
However, this method was a little too gentle when it came to breaking through this thick stone wall.
This was the sixth consecutive day that Fang Yuan had used the Moonlight Gu to grind the stone wall.
There was already a thick pile of dark red stone powder on the ground.
Logically speaking, the soil of Qing Mao Mountain was all green mud.
However, the soil here was strangely crimson and emitted a dark light.
Fortunately, with this source of light, Fang Yuan did not need to prepare a torch.
To avoid arousing suspicion, Fang Yuan did not use any tools.
Iron hammers and pickaxes were undoubtedly more convenient for him to break through the stone walls, but this way, the sound of the wall breaking would echo in the summer night.
Regardless of whether it sounded weak or loud from the outside, Fang Yuan had to put an end to these suspicions.
Details often determine success or failure.
For Fang Yuan, being cautious was more of a habit than a virtue.
In his previous life, he had been careless, but he soon learned a painful lesson.
It is often said that the older a person is, the more timid he becomes.
Actually, it wasn't that he was timid, but he was cautious and patient.
After five hundred years, the word 'cautious' had been engraved into his bones.
"Huff …" Breathing heavily, Fang Yuan slowly stopped the infusion of primeval essence.
He sat down on the ground, he was really tired.
The entire image wall that was half a person's height had already been grinded away by him by three inches.
He wiped the sweat off his forehead, moving his shoulders and stretching his legs.
Because he had been squatting for a long time, waves of numbness could be felt from his legs.
Dong dong dong.
Fang Yuan clasped his fingers and knocked on the stone wall.
Hearing this sound, he was slightly happy, knowing that the stone wall was getting thinner.
He then closed his eyes to calm down, feeling the situation in his aperture.
There was less than twenty percent of the green copper primeval sea left.
"Continue to work hard!" Fang Yuan gritted his teeth and stretched out his right hand again, touching the stone wall.
The aqua blue moonlight continued to shine for a quarter of an hour, and Fang Yuan's movements suddenly stopped.
He moved his right hand away and happily found that there was a small hole in the stone wall.
He immediately stood up and kicked with his foot.
With a swoosh, the hole immediately expanded to the size of a bamboo basket.
Fang Yuan cautiously took a few steps back, he felt a stifling air gradually spreading out from the entrance of the cave, before spreading into this secret cave.
The ventilation of the secret cave was not good, so Fang Yuan thought for a while and chose to drill out of the crack, returning to the outside world.
After a long while, he finally turned around.
The stifling air in the secret cave was much better than before.
Fang Yuan continued to widen the hole, sometimes using the Moonlight Gu, sometimes using his hands to pull, and sometimes using his feet to kick.
After a while, he finally widened the hole to a size where he could easily enter.
Looking from the hole, there was a straight tunnel that slanted downwards.
The tunnel was not wide at the start, but it got wider the further down it went.
When a person entered the tunnel, they had to bend their waist and lower their head, but when they reached the latter half of the tunnel, they could straighten their bodies and walk with large strides.
The four walls of the tunnel were also made of strange red soil, emitting a layer of dim red light.
This allowed the scene in the tunnel to be clearly seen.
But the tunnel was very long, extending beyond his field of vision. Because of the angle, Fang Yuan could not see what was at the end of the tunnel.
He stood at the entrance of the tunnel and did not immediately step in, but squinted his eyes and stood on the spot.
Strength inheritance was different from inheritance.
Inheritance referred to the things left behind by a Gu Master after he died.
The person who found the inheritance would usually obtain all the things on the corpse at once.
Strength inheritance referred to the Gu Master who was on the verge of death, did not want his own path to be extinct, or to benefit his descendants, or to leave a final mark in the world, and so on, and so on.
Taking the Flower Wine Monk as an example, the reason why he set up this inheritance was very clear, it was to nurture an avenger, to help him take revenge on the Guyue clan!
If the person in the future could pass these tests, they could obtain all sorts of benefits.
The person who passed the final test would mean that he or she had obtained the complete strength inheritance.
According to the division of the strength inheritors, strength inheritances were naturally divided into righteous and demonic inheritances.
Righteous inheritances were usually designed to test the person's character and character.
Those who failed midway would not have to worry about their lives.
Demonic inheritances were complicated.
Demonic cultivators were often crazy and stubborn, or cold and emotionless, or they killed people like flies, and could not be judged by common sense.
Some demonic inheritances were designed to test one's mind.
There were many riddles, and many people would be stuck in it for their entire lives, thinking hard but to no avail.
Some demonic inheritances were extremely simple, just a secret room with Gu worms and Yuan stone placed inside.
Some demonic inheritances were extremely cruel, and failure midway often meant death.
What's more, some demonic lords' inheritances were simply lies, and were a huge trap in itself.
They followed the principle of harming others without benefiting themselves, and even before they died, they would try their best to set up a trap for others.
"This inheritance of the Flower Wine Monk, what kind would it be?" Fang Yuan pondered.
He had his previous life's memories, and he was very clear about many famous demonic inheritances in the future.
But this inheritance was not discovered by anyone in his previous life, and he knew nothing about it.
"Logically speaking, the possibility of it being a trap is not high.
Otherwise, the Flower Wine Monk would not have designed this image wall.
But would there be a trap? "
Fang Yuan picked up a piece of rock and threw it into the cave.
The rock bumped against each other in the tunnel, and quickly rolled out of Fang Yuan's sight. He could only hear a series of sounds echoing in the tunnel.
Fang Yuan was deep in thought.
The result of throwing the rock to test the road seemed to be safe.
But he still did not enter the tunnel, and instead took out some stone powder, and evenly scattered it near the entrance of the tunnel that he had just opened.
At the same time, he sprinkled a thin layer at the entrance of the secret cave's stone crack.
Then he drilled through the narrow stone crack at the entrance, and left this place.
In an extremely hidden bush a few hundred meters away from the riverbank, he found the green bamboo wine that he had brought with him this time.
He opened the wine jar, and fiercely drank a mouthful, and then purposely spilled some of the wine, wetting his clothes and making him smell of alcohol.
Carrying the wine jar, he returned to the village. When he reached the dormitory, it was exactly midnight.
If he often did not return for a night, it would arouse suspicion.
This was very good, going out in the first half of the night, and returning in the second half of the night.
When he was looking for the Liquor worm, Fang Yuan had already done this. With a previous record, this kind of behavior was not out of the ordinary.
The stars disappeared, and the sun rose. The night was silent.

Chapter 63
The dazzling morning sun lit up Qing Mao Mountain.
In the academy, the elder was explaining the main points in detail, "Tomorrow, we will choose the second Gu worm to refine.
Everyone has the experience of refining Gu worms, so this time we can consolidate our experience.
As for the choice of the second Gu worm, everyone needs to think carefully.
Combining these few days of cultivation experience, as well as your understanding of yourself, make a comprehensive consideration.
Normally speaking, it is best to pair it with the vital Gu. "
A Gu Master's first Gu worm was called the vital Gu. Once chosen, it was no doubt the cornerstone of development.
After that, the second Gu worm, the third Gu worm and so on were all based on this cornerstone to determine the specific direction of the Gu Master's cultivation.
Hearing the academy elder's words, the youths could not help but ponder.
Only Fang Yuan was snoring on the table.
He had worked hard for half the night yesterday, and after returning to the dormitory, he continued his Gu Master cultivation, nurturing his aperture.
The sky had just brightened, and he only started to sleep.
The academy elder glanced at Fang Yuan, frowning slightly, but did not say anything.
Ever since the clan leader Guyue Bo had said those words to him, he had adopted a laissez-faire attitude towards Fang Yuan.
"What Gu worm should I choose?" Many students could not help but look at Fang Yuan as they pondered.
"Speaking of which, Fang Yuan already has a second Gu worm."
"Yes, that is the Liquor worm. To be able to get a Liquor worm after cutting open rocks, his luck is too good!"
"If I had the Liquor worm, I would also be able to advance to middle stage first, right?"
The thoughts in the minds of the students rose one after another. There were those who were envious and those who were jealous.
Ever since that day, after the interrogation, Fang Yuan's Liquor worm was also successfully exposed.
The origins of the Liquor worm did not raise any suspicions.
While the clansmen were relieved, they were also deeply moved by Fang Yuan's luck.
"Why don't I have such good luck, sigh!" Guyue Cheng, who was also a C grade talent, sighed in his heart.
A long time ago, his grandfather had gone around asking people to purchase the Liquor worm for him.
Unexpectedly, even though he was the successor of a branch bloodline, Guyue and Fang Yuan got it first.
Compared to Chicheng's lament and jealousy, Fangzheng, who was also the vice-chairman, was in high spirits.
"Big Brother, I will definitely surpass you." He glanced at Fang Yuan and said in his heart before looking away.
These days, his eyes are shining, filled with a surging passion for life.
His cheeks were rosy, his forehead glowed, and even his steps were brisk.
The Academy Elder saw all this and immediately understood that Clan Leader Guyue had already begun to secretly teach Fangzheng.
Of course, this kind of preferential treatment couldn't be said out loud.
The academy elder turned a blind eye to this.
It was night time again.
Fang Yuan squeezed into the secret cave again.
Ring ring ring …
A hare was struggling violently in his hand, and a bell was tied around its neck.
This was a hare that Fang Yuan had caught on the mountain, and the bell was naturally tied by him.
After a day, the stuffy air in the secret cave had completely dissipated, and the air was fresh.
The tunnel entrance was wide open, and it was silent inside.
Fang Yuan half squatted on the ground, and first carefully examined the ground.
He had scattered stone powder on both areas last night, and this thin layer of stone powder was not eye-catching.
"The stone powder at the entrance of the tunnel is still in its original state. It seems that during the time I was away, no unclean things crawled out of the tunnel.
There is a footprint at the entrance of the secret cave, but I stepped on it just now.
It seems that no outsiders have been here. "Fang Yuan observed for a while, and relaxed.
He stood up, and used his strength to pull off the dead vines on the wall.
Then he sat on the ground, using his legs to suppress the hare, and used his free hands to rub the vines.
Normal Gu Masters wouldn't know how to do this, but Fang Yuan had too much life experience. In his previous life, there were many times when he was poor, and couldn't even afford to feed his Gu worms, and they all starved to death.
For a period of time, he only had primeval essence, but no Gu worms. He was like a mortal, and even living was difficult.
Out of desperation, he learned to rub straw rope, weave straw shoes, straw hats, and other things to sell, in exchange for some Yuan stone fragments to barely survive.
Now that he was rubbing straw rope, Fang Yuan's memories surfaced again.
The bitterness and suffering of that time, turned into the silent smile on his face.
The rabbit under his legs struggled from time to time, and the bell rang.
A pair of lovers lingered for a long time, and thousands of twists and turns.
Slowly, slowly, over the years, the years gathered together. There were twists and turns, twists and turns, and entanglements.
Rub straw rope, isn't it experiencing life?
In the secret cave, the red light was dim, and youth and vicissitudes intertwined on Fang Yuan's face.
Time also seemed to stop here, quietly admiring the young man rub straw rope.
Ring ring ring …
An hour later, the wild rabbit quickly scuttled into the tunnel, and the bell on its neck rang. In a few breaths, it was out of Fang Yuan's sight.
The straw rope in Fang Yuan's hands was tied to the wild rabbit's hind leg, and now it was being dragged by the wild rabbit as it rapidly swam outwards.
After a while, the straw rope stopped moving.
But this did not mean that the wild rabbit had reached the end of the tunnel. It could have been killed by the trap, or it could have stopped halfway.
Fang Yuan began to pull the rope back, and as the rope gradually tightened, he tugged hard.
A force immediately came from the other end of the straw rope.
Next, the straw rope continued to swim outwards.
Evidently, the wild rabbit on the other side was suddenly pulled by the force, and in a panic, it started to scurry inwards again.
This repeated several times, and the wild rabbit seemed to have finally reached the end of the tunnel. No matter how Fang Yuan tugged at the straw rope, the straw rope only tightened and tightened, tightened and loosened.
Maybe the wild rabbit had reached the end of the tunnel, or maybe it had fallen into some trap and was trapped.
It was very simple to verify the answer.
Fang Yuan began to pull the rope, but how could the wild rabbit resist his strength? Eventually, he used the straw rope to forcefully pull the wild rabbit out.
The wild rabbit continued to struggle on the other end of the straw rope, but the straw rope was made from the Wine Sack Flower Gu and Rice Sack Grass Gu, and although it had withered for many years, it was still very tough, and could not be compared to ordinary straw.
The wild rabbit once again jumped back into Fang Yuan's hands. Fang Yuan carefully inspected the wild rabbit, and seeing that there were no wounds on its body, he let out a breath of turbid air.
"Currently, it seems that this tunnel should be safe."
With this result, the wild rabbit lost its use, and Fang Yuan crushed it to death, casually throwing the corpse on the ground.
He could not let this wild rabbit go, animals also had memories. If it came back here again, and attracted outsiders like the Liquor worm, it would be terrible.
He took a deep breath, and after a few tests, he carefully stepped into the tunnel.
Although there was a wild rabbit to scout, there were many traps that were specifically targeted at humans.
A small animal like the wild rabbit could not be triggered.
Thus, Fang Yuan had to be on guard.
The tunnel was a straight line, extending diagonally into the ground.
And the deeper he went, the wider the tunnel became.
When Fang Yuan first entered the tunnel, he had to bend his back and lower his head, but after fifty steps, he could hold his head high and chest out.
After another hundred steps, he could swing his arms left and right.
The tunnel was actually not long, only about three hundred meters, but Fang Yuan spent a whole hour before he reached the end of the tunnel.
Along the way, he was very careful, exploring with each step.
When he reached the end, he was already sweating profusely.
"There is no detection Gu worm, this is troublesome."
Fang Yuan wiped the cold sweat off his forehead, and after confirming it was safe, he calmed down and carefully looked at the end of the tunnel.
With this observation, he was stunned.
At the end of the tunnel, there was a huge rock blocking him.
The surface of the rock was smooth, and it protruded towards Fang Yuan's direction, like Jia Fu's round belly.
It was this huge rock that blocked Fang Yuan's path forward.
Other than this huge rock, there was nothing beside Fang Yuan.
"Could it be that because of an accident, the middle section of the tunnel caved in, causing a blockage?" Fang Yuan's gaze focused. This was a very likely possibility.
Before the Flower Wine Monk died, he urgently created this inheritance.
He used the Thousand Li Earthwolf Spider to hastily create a tunnel in the mountain.
The tunnel led deep into the mountain, guiding the inheritor forward.
However, hundreds of years had passed, and this tunnel could not withstand the corrosion of time. At some point, a section of the tunnel had fallen into disrepair, and collapsed.
In life, all sorts of accidents would happen.
"If this is really the case, then wouldn't I have to stop here?"
He walked forward and touched the rock. This huge rock that blocked his path, just the exposed surface area was as big as a door.
One could imagine the thickness of its entire body.
Fang Yuan could use the Moonlight Gu to grind away the rock wall, but to grind away such a huge rock, he would need at least a year or two of hard work.
"Looks like I need to use tools, like pickaxes and shovels, to break open the huge rock.
But if I do this, I will inevitably expose many traces.
Some knocking sounds will also be heard. "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan frowned deeply.
He was considering the risks and benefits.
If the risks were too high, he would rather give up on this inheritance.
After all, if others found out about this secret, not only would his previous arrangements and hard work be wasted, his life might even be in danger!
S-REV-084.summary: Fang Yuan secretly enters the hidden cave in Qing Mao mountain and uses his Moonlight Gu to meticulously grind away the screen wall, revealing the entrance to a tunnel. He then carefully tests the tunnel for traps, using a thrown rock and later a hare tied with a handmade rope, before cautiously entering the red-soiled passage. He discovers a massive rock blocking the path, contemplating the risks of forceful excavation.

continuityMutations.content: He understands that Guyue Bo is secretly mentoring Guyue Fangzheng.
He is secretly receiving preferential instruction from Guyue Bo.
He is determined to surpass Fang Yuan.
He is envious of Fang Yuan's luck in acquiring the Liquor worm.
He has adopted a 'laissez-faire' attitude towards Fang Yuan due to clan leader Guyue Bo's intervention.
He is receiving secret, preferential instruction from clan leader Guyue Bo.
He is determined to surpass his older brother, Fang Yuan.
He is envious of Fang Yuan's Liquor worm and wishes he had such luck.

relationshipMutations.type: Increased rivalry and determination to surpass

Some knocking sounds will also be heard. "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan frowned deeply.
He was considering the risks and benefits.
If the risks were too high, he would rather give up on this inheritance.
After all, if others found out about this secret, not only would his previous arrangements and hard work be wasted, his life might even be in danger!
S-REV-085.summary: The Academy Elder lectures students on choosing their second Gu worm, emphasizing careful consideration. Fang Yuan, exhausted from his night's activities, sleeps through the class, observed with a frown by the Elder who now adopts a laissez-faire approach due to Guyue Bo's influence. Other students reflect on Fang Yuan's luck with the Liquor worm, while Guyue Chicheng feels envy and Guyue Fangzheng, secretly mentored by Guyue Bo, silently vows to surpass his brother.

continuityMutations.content: His disappointment at the lack of rare Gu worms (Jade Skin Gu, Black/White Boar Gu) in the academy's Gu room, reflecting the clan's mid-level resources.
His strategic decision to acquire a Little Light Gu, aligning with his long-term cultivation plan.
Acquires a Little Light Gu, which aligns with his long-term development strategy.
Discovers the Flower Wine Monk intentionally blocked the secret cave passage with a man-made rock and that the 'key' is hidden in damp, loose soil nearby.
Uncovers an Earth Treasury Flower Gu and extracts a White Boar Gu from it.
Realizes the Flower Wine Monk's intent to leave a Gu worm for an inheritor through the Earth Treasury Flower Gu.
Chooses a Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu for endurance in combat.
Chooses a Bronze Skin Gu for defense.
Is manipulated by Guyue Bo into striving to be the first to reach Rank Two in exchange for a Jade Skin Gu.
Learns that clan leaders assess character and potential from seemingly simple choices like Gu worm selection.
Guyue Bo recognizes his low self-esteem and uses it to motivate him.
Chooses a Dragonpill cricket Gu for dodging ability.
Intentionally blocked the secret cave path with a man-made rock and left an Earth Treasury Flower Gu with a White Boar Gu inside for a future inheritor.
Replenished with Gu worms only once a year.
Requires thousands of Yuan stone daily to feed its Gu worms.
Many desirable Gu worms are often out of stock due to student selection.

S-REV-086.prose:
Chapter 64 The sun rose slowly, it was a new day. The students lined up, all excited, standing in front of the academy's Gu room. Today was a good day to choose the second Gu worm! Fang Yuan was the first to advance to middle stage, so he had the priority to choose, so he stood at the front of the line. Behind him were Guyue Mo Chen, Guyue Fangzheng, and Guyue Cheng. Creak. The Gu room's door was opened by the guards, and Fang Yuan was the first to step in. Although the Gu room was not big, it had a world inside. The surrounding walls had small square holes, big and small, and inside were all kinds of utensils. There were stone basins, jade plates, cages woven from grass, and pots made from purple clay. All kinds of Gu worms, all rank one, were stored in these utensils. To feed these Gu worms, the academy consumed thousands of Yuan stone every day. Fang Yuan looked around, and found that many utensils were empty, with no Gu worms. The Gu worms in the Gu room were only replenished once a year. When choosing their vital Gu, most of the youths chose the Moonlight Gu, and now there was no Moonlight Gu in the Gu room. There were no windows around the Gu room, only a small skylight on the roof. Sunlight shone in through the skylight, forming a rectangular golden spot on the floor of the Gu room. The first time Fang Yuan entered the Gu room, he had a target, and he chose the Moonlight Gu. But now, he only had a few targets to choose from. But these targets depended on whether there were goods in the Gu room. Fang Yuan walked along the left wall, looking carefully as he walked. After five steps, he paused. In a square near his shoulder, there was a copper bowl, and in the copper bowl was a Gu worm. This Gu worm looked like a bedbug, flat and wide, with a small head and an oval body. Its whole body was yellow, emitting a copper-like metallic luster. This was a Copper Skin Gu.

Close combat Gu Masters often chose it. The academy's martial arts instructor raised such a Copper Skin Gu. Once it was activated, its body would turn yellow, and its defense would increase greatly. Fang Yuan had broad horizons, so of course he wouldn't be interested in such a Gu worm. He continued to walk forward and saw another rock skin Gu. The Stone Skin Gu was similar to the Bronze Skin Gu, but its body was grey, like a work of art made of stone. After the six Rock Skin Gu, there was the Iron Skin Gu. Iron Skin Gu and Copper Skin Gu were very similar in appearance, with only minor differences. It stayed quietly in an iron bowl, not moving at all. His entire body exuded a cold, steel-like light. There were clans in human society, and there were also clans among Gu worms. The three Gu that Fang Yuan saw were all from the same series. They had similar appearances and functions. "Iron Skin Gu, Copper Skin Gu, Stone Skin Gu, Jade Skin Gu … If there is a Jade Skin Gu, I might as well choose it this time," Fang Yuan muttered, a trace of anticipation rising in his heart as he continued to walk forward. But he was destined to be disappointed. After the Iron Skin Gu, it was a bunch of Beast Skin Gu. Jade Skin Gu and Beast Skin Gu were also from the same series as the Bronze Skin Gu. But their values were very different. Beast Skin Gu was the most common, its market price was slightly lower than the Stone Skin Gu, but there were many ways to advance, and it could be refined with many other Gu worms. The Jade Skin Gu was the rarest Gu in the series. Its market price was second only to the Liquor worm, and when the price fluctuated, it would be the same as the Liquor worm. Fang Yuan took a look, but did not find the Jade Skin Gu. He was not disappointed, but smiled in relief, "Guyue village is only a mid-sized clan, and the academy's Gu room can only be considered mid-level. Asking for the Jade Skin Gu here is a bit high. " At this time, the left wall had been inspected, so Fang Yuan changed to another wall and continued to walk. This wall had the most Longhorn Beetle Gu.

Like the Skin Gu, the Longhorn Beetle Gu was also a large clan among Rank one Gu worms. They looked similar, with a long cylindrical shape with a slightly flat back. Most of them were black, emitting a metallic luster. A pair of antennae were extremely long, longer than the body, and when their strong jaws opened and closed, there was a 'kacha, kacha' sound, like they were sawing wood. Thus, some local Gu Masters called them 'Sawing Tree Men'. The first thing that entered Fang Yuan's eyes was a Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu. Its body was the color of red iron, and its pair of antennae were thicker than a normal Longhorn Beetle's antennae. Every short distance, there was a bamboo joint. This Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu was very popular in the market. Some time ago, in the caravan that came to Guyue village, there were people selling this Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu in large quantities. The Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu could give the Gu Master temporary huge strength. It was known as the strength of a bull, and could be maintained for five breaths of time. But it had two flaws. One was that every activation consumed too much primeval essence. Rank one middle stage required 10% primeval essence, if converted to initial stage, every use would require 20% primeval essence. The other was that there were repercussions. If the Gu Master's physique was weak, using this Gu too much would cause muscle strain, or even rupture. Usually, only Gu Masters with strong physiques would use it. With Fang Yuan's small physique, there was no need to think about it. Fang Yuan also knew himself, and walked past the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu, and continued to look. "Eh? This Gu is not bad. "His footsteps slowed. This was a Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu. Its body was slightly slimmer than the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu, and its body was dark yellow. Its pair of long antennae did not have bamboo joints, and were yellow at the root, gradually turning black at the tip.

The Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu could temporarily give the Gu Master great strength. This strength was explosive, and could only be maintained for five breaths. But for the Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu, it could grant the Gu Master endurance, greatly reducing the Gu Master's stamina consumption, and could last for fifteen minutes. At the same time, there were no repercussions. Among the Rank one Gu worms, the Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu had a high market price, comparable to the Moonlight Gu, second only to the Jade Skin Gu, and even lower than the Liquor worm. Fang Yuan looked around, and there was indeed only one Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu in this Gu room. "This Gu worm is not bad, but it does not match my direction." Fang Yuan shook his head, and gave up on this Gu worm. Soon, he walked to the corner of the wall. He had already finished looking at the second wall, but there was nothing he was satisfied with. The Gu worms in the Gu room were only of this level, and there was not much hope of getting anything good or surprising. Fang Yuan turned to the third wall, and continued looking. This wall had the most Boar Gu. Boar Gu was also a series of Gu worms. There were Flower Boar Gu, Pink Boar Gu, Black Boar Gu and White Boar Gu. The Pink Boar Gu had the lowest value, and almost no Gu Masters chose it. Because it only had one ability, and that was to gain weight. After the Gu Master injected their primeval essence, the Pink Boar Gu would modify the Gu Master's body, causing the Gu Master to gain weight. No matter how small or skinny the Gu Master was, it could turn into a chubby fatty. There were only two or three Pink Boar Gu in this Gu room, as if they disdained to collect and feed them. The Flower Boar Gu had the most, dozens of them, lining up in a row. These Gu worms were all spotted, either black and white, black and pink, or white and pink. There were even a few that were black, white and pink. The Flower Boar Gu's effect was similar to the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu, temporarily increasing the Gu Master's strength. The Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu was known to have the strength of a bull, while the Flower Boar Gu had the strength of a boar. The Flower Boar Gu expended the same amount of primeval essence as the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu, but it could last for ten breaths of time, twice as long as the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu.

Moreover, because the Gu Master's strength was smaller, the side effects were naturally not as severe as the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu. "The Flower Boar Gu is the most common Gu, and is sold the most in the market. Its market price is only half of the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu, and it can be said to be cheap but good. But in the Boar Gu family, the remaining two Gu are worth a lot, even more than the Jade Skin Gu and the Liquor worm! "Fang Yuan's eyes flashed with thought. A Black Boar Gu or White Boar Gu was sold for six hundred Yuan stone in the market, and was often bought by people the moment it appeared. The Black and White Boar Gu's ability was to modify the Gu Master's body, increasing the Gu Master's strength from the roots. Although the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu could give the Gu Master the strength of a bull, it could only last for five breaths of time. If the strength was too much, the Gu Master would not be able to handle it, and there would be strong side effects. The Black and White Boar Gu increased the Gu Master's strength bit by bit, accumulating over time, but as long as they had it, it was the Gu Master's. Even if the Black and White Boar Gu died, the strength would still remain in the Gu Master's body. Because of this, the Black and White Boar Gu's prices were higher than the Liquor worm. Most people thought that the Liquor worm's value was slightly lower than the Black and White Boar Gu. The Liquor worm could only refine primeval essence, and in an intense battle, the Gu Master's primeval essence could be easily depleted. For the rest of the battle, the Gu Master could only rely on his fists and legs, and his own strength. This was the value of the Black and White Boar Gu, it was even more reliable than the Liquor worm. "If I can refine a Black or White Boar Gu, that would be pretty good." Fang Yuan was just thinking about it, there was only one Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu in this Gu room, how could there be rare Gu worms like the Black and White Boar Gu? He strolled around, looking at all the Gu worms, but there really wasn't any that he wanted. Finally, he found a Little Light Gu at the corner of the room. There were a total of five Little Light Gu in the Gu room. This Gu had a very peculiar shape, like a five-pointed star, and was only half the size of a fingernail. This Gu was mainly used in conjunction with the Moonlight Gu, and was one of the most commonly seen support Gu worms. Fang Yuan chose this one, and it could be considered passable, at least it was in line with the direction of development in his heart. "Fang Yuan is out." "After so long, he's finally out."
S-REV-086.summary: Fang Yuan enters the Gu room first, observing the limited selection of Gu worms. He evaluates various 'Skin Gu' and 'Longhorn Beetle Gu' series, noting their market value and utility, but finds none suitable for his true goals. He then assesses 'Boar Gu' series, recognizing the rarity of Black and White Boar Gu. Ultimately, he chooses a Little Light Gu, considering it a passable choice for his current needs, while the other students wait impatiently outside.

continuityMutations.content: His acquisition of the Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu for endurance.
His acquisition of the Bronze Skin Gu for defense.
His acquisition of the Dragonpill cricket Gu for dodging.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked leisurely out

S-REV-087.prose: "I wonder what Gu he chose?" "He has the Liquor worm, and this is already his third Gu, I'm afraid he can't afford to raise it, hehe." Fang Yuan leisurely walked out of the Gu room, and the students stood outside for a long time, somewhat restless. "It's my turn! I wonder if Fang Yuan chose that Gu worm? "Guyue Mo Chen saw Fang Yuan come out, and hurriedly took big steps into the Gu room. He looked around, and immediately found the only Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu, and could not help but be overjoyed, immediately taking it away. Soon after, Fangzheng also walked in. "I have the Moonlight Gu to attack, what I lack is a Gu worm for defense." Guyue Fangzheng considered for a long time, and finally chose a Bronze Skin Gu. Guyue Mo Chen was the fourth to enter the Gu room. "I need the ability to dodge, so that in future battles, I can hit others, but others can't hit me. This way, I will be invincible. "He looked left and right, and finally chose a Dragonpill cricket Gu. ================================================== Chapter 65 As the sun set and the moon rose, night fell. This was a hidden courtyard in the Guyue village. A tall locust tree with lush foliage, its thick and wide canopy was like a jade canopy, covering the entire courtyard. The moonlight was gentle like water, passing through the leaves of the locust tree and spilling into the courtyard. A gust of wind blew, the leaves rustled and the shadow of the tree swayed. Under the shadow of the tree stood two people. Clan leader Guyue Bo looked at Fangzheng with a gentle gaze, "Fangzheng, today you chose the second Gu, I wonder what it is?" "Reporting to clan leader, today I chose a Bronze Skin Gu." Guyue Fangzheng stood up straight, his face filled with reverence as he answered. Guyue Bo nodded, muttering, "Not bad, you chose well." Guyue Fangzheng stood in front of Guyue Bo, his body tensed up nervously. Hearing Guyue Bo's praise, he did not know how to respond, and could only smile, "Lord clan leader, I chose randomly."
S-REV-087.summary: After Fang Yuan exits the Gu room, the other students quickly enter to make their selections. Guyue Mo Chen eagerly claims the Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu. Guyue Fangzheng, after careful consideration, chooses a Bronze Skin Gu for defense. Guyue Cheng selects a Dragonpill cricket Gu to enhance his dodging abilities, each choice reflecting a particular combat strategy.

continuityMutations.content: His understanding that a leader's words and actions are inherently political, and direct instigation could cause internal strife.
His desire to cultivate a future clan leader with political wisdom, not just strength.
His recognition of Fang Yuan's superior political wisdom despite his C-grade aptitude, and Fangzheng's low self-esteem.
His newfound understanding of how Gu worm choices reveal character and potential, as taught by Guyue Bo.
His commitment to becoming the first Rank Two Gu Master to earn the Jade Skin Gu and overcome his insecurity.
Analyzes the personalities and combat styles of young Gu Masters based on their Gu worm choices.
Subtly instigates competition among the younger generation, particularly Fangzheng, to identify and cultivate a future leader with A-grade aptitude.
Uses Fangzheng's insecurity and ambition to motivate him to advance quickly, offering a Jade Skin Gu as an incentive.

S-REV-088.prose:
"I wonder what Gu he chose?" "He has the Liquor worm, and this is already his third Gu, I'm afraid he can't afford to raise it, hehe." Fang Yuan leisurely walked out of the Gu room, and the students stood outside for a long time, somewhat restless. "It's my turn! I wonder if Fang Yuan chose that Gu worm? "Guyue Mo Chen saw Fang Yuan come out, and hurriedly took big steps into the Gu room. He looked around, and immediately found the only Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu, and could not help but be overjoyed, immediately taking it away. Soon after, Fangzheng also walked in. "I have the Moonlight Gu to attack, what I lack is a Gu worm for defense." Guyue Fangzheng considered for a long time, and finally chose a Bronze Skin Gu. Guyue Mo Chen was the fourth to enter the Gu room. "I need the ability to dodge, so that in future battles, I can hit others, but others can't hit me. This way, I will be invincible. "He looked left and right, and finally chose a Dragonpill cricket Gu. ================================================== Chapter 65 As the sun set and the moon rose, night fell. This was a hidden courtyard in the Guyue village. A tall locust tree with lush foliage, its thick and wide canopy was like a jade canopy, covering the entire courtyard. The moonlight was gentle like water, passing through the leaves of the locust tree and spilling into the courtyard. A gust of wind blew, the leaves rustled and the shadow of the tree swayed. Under the shadow of the tree stood two people. Clan leader Guyue Bo looked at Fangzheng with a gentle gaze, "Fangzheng, today you chose the second Gu, I wonder what it is?"
