"Reporting to clan leader, today I chose a Bronze Skin Gu." Guyue Fangzheng stood up straight, his face filled with reverence as he answered. Guyue Bo nodded, muttering, "Not bad, you chose well." Guyue Fangzheng stood in front of Guyue Bo, his body tensed up nervously. Hearing Guyue Bo's praise, he did not know how to respond, and could only smile, "Lord clan leader, I chose randomly."

"You think I'm praising you randomly? It's not. " Guyue Bo stared at Fangzheng, a faint smile on his lips, "You know, from the choice of a Gu worm, you can often see a person's nature." "You chose the Bronze Skin Gu for defense. Paired with the Moonlight Gu, it is one for offense and one for defense. This shows that your nature is pure and honest. In this world, one for offense and one for defense, one for righteousness and one for strangeness, one for yin and one for yang, one for softness and one for toughness, this is the way of the king. " "And Guyue Mobei chose the Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu, this Gu increases endurance and can fight for a long time. This shows the Mobei's tenacious nature. " "As for Guyue Cheng, he chose the Dragonpill cricket Gu, increasing his dodging ability. This shows that he doesn't like to attack forcefully. He's smart and good at currying favor, but at the same time, it also shows his weak side. " Guyue Fangzheng was dumbfounded. He had never thought that he could see so much logic from such a simple matter. He couldn't help but look at Guyue Bo with even more respect. "Clan leader, what Gu did my brother choose?" Fangzheng suddenly thought of Fang Yuan and immediately asked. Guyue Bo laughed, "Your brother chose the Little Light Gu. Using this Gu to support the Moonlight Gu can make the moonblade attack stronger. This shows that his temperament is radical, aggressive, and easy to go to extremes. " "Indeed, big brother seems to be like this," Fangzheng murmured softly. Guyue Bo saw Fangzheng's expression and memorized it. As long as one was in a high position, he would definitely have something special about him. Although Guyue Bo and Fangzheng had not interacted face to face for a long time. But Guyue Bo's sharp and experienced gaze had already seen through Fangzheng. He told Fangzheng that Mobei and Chicheng's choices had their own deep meaning.

It was to help Fangzheng analyze these two, looking forward to him defeating these two and establishing his position as a leader with A grade aptitude. But Guyue Bo wouldn't say it out loud, and wouldn't directly instigate Fangzheng to do something. As the clan leader, every word and action had political attributes. If he directly instigated Fangzheng to deal with Chicheng and Mobei, if these words got out, it might be misunderstood as the clan leader's political intentions. If that was the case, the impact would be huge, and internal strife within the clan might even affect the entire village. Another point was that Guyue Bo also hoped that Fangzheng would be able to understand his intentions on his own. He spent time and effort to personally groom Fangzheng, not to groom a Rank four or five lackey. A lackey without political wisdom was a double-edged sword. He wanted to groom the future leader of the clan! "I helped Fangzheng analyze Mobei and Chicheng's temperament, but he didn't realize the deep meaning hidden within. Instead, he asked me about Guyue and Fang Yuan's situation. It seems that Fang Yuan had left him with quite a bit of trauma, but he was still in his rebellious phase, and it was understandable that he wanted to suppress Fang Yuan. Sigh, if only Fangzheng had Fang Yuan's wisdom, I've seen many youths these years, but in terms of political wisdom, Fang Yuan is definitely number one. It's a pity that he only has C grade talent. " Guyue Bo sighed in his heart, but the smile on his face became warmer. He took out a Gu worm from his pocket. "This is — Jade Skin Gu?" Fangzheng saw this Gu worm, and his eyes brightened, calling out softly. Guyue Bo said, "Compared to the Copper Skin Gu, this Jade Skin Gu is much more outstanding. Not only does it consume less primeval essence, its defense is also stronger than the Copper Skin Gu. Fangzheng, do you want it? " "Clan leader!" Fangzheng was shocked, and he looked at Guyue Bo, stammering, "I, of course I want it." "If you want it, I can give it to you." Guyue Bo's smile became gentler, "But as the clan leader, I have always been fair and just, I can't just give it to you for no reason. So, I have a condition.

" Fangzheng nodded his head, his eyes wide open, "What condition?" The smile on Guyue Bo's face disappeared, and his expression turned solemn, "I want you to be the first to break through Rank one and reach Rank two, becoming the first in terms of cultivation! And this Jade Skin Gu will be your early reward. " "Ah, advance to Rank two?" Guyue Fangzheng showed hesitation. He had just advanced to Rank one middle stage, after middle stage was upper stage, and after upper stage was peak stage. But now, Guyue Bo wanted him to become the first Rank two Gu Master. "Why, are you afraid? Then this Gu can only be given to others. "Guyue Bo pretended to take back the Jade Skin Gu. Guyue Fangzheng was agitated by these words, and immediately became hot-headed, shouting, "No, I promise you! I will defeat everyone and become the first Rank two Gu Master! " "That's more like it." Guyue Bo showed a warm smile again, and placed the Jade Skin Gu in Fangzheng's hands. In his heart, he thought, "Fangzheng, oh Fangzheng, I know you have a low self-esteem, but this low self-esteem is harmful to your growth. And the best way to get rid of this feeling of inferiority is to succeed. You have A grade aptitude, advancing to Rank two is your greatest advantage, and it is also the easiest success for you to achieve. You must work hard. If you fail even in this, I will be too disappointed. " At the same time, Fang Yuan entered the secret cave in the rock crack again, going to the end of the tunnel. This time, he did not bring any iron spade, shovel, iron hammer or any other tools, but carefully observed his surroundings. The night before, he suffered a setback here, and on the way back to the village, he felt something was wrong. Today, in the dormitory, after using the Spring Autumn Cicada to refine the Little Light Gu, he suddenly had a flash of inspiration, and realized something was amiss. "This huge rock blocking the way, isn't it too smooth and round? This is man-made. That is to say, the Flower Wine Monk purposely set up this huge rock to block the way.
S-REV-088.summary: Under the moonlight in a hidden courtyard, Clan leader Guyue Bo praises Fangzheng's choice of the Bronze Skin Gu, using it as an opportunity to analyze the natures of Fangzheng, Mo Chen, and Cheng based on their Gu selections. Guyue Bo subtly instigates Fangzheng to strive for leadership by offering him a rare Jade Skin Gu if he becomes the first to reach Rank Two, expertly leveraging Fangzheng's insecurity and ambition for his own political agenda, while inwardly lamenting Fang Yuan's C-grade talent despite his wisdom.

continuityMutations.content: His realization that the Flower Wine Monk deliberately constructed the cave's obstruction and left a 'key' near the rock.
His discovery of the Earth Treasury Flower Gu and its function as a container for other Gu worms.
His acquisition of a White Boar Gu, a rare and valuable Gu worm.
A hidden passage deliberately obstructed by the Flower Wine Monk.

S-REV-089.prose:
" Fangzheng nodded his head, his eyes wide open, "What condition?" The smile on Guyue Bo's face disappeared, and his expression turned solemn, "I want you to be the first to break through Rank one and reach Rank two, becoming the first in terms of cultivation! And this Jade Skin Gu will be your early reward. " "Ah, advance to Rank two?" Guyue Fangzheng showed hesitation. He had just advanced to Rank one middle stage, after middle stage was upper stage, and after upper stage was peak stage. But now, Guyue Bo wanted him to become the first Rank two Gu Master. "Why, are you afraid? Then this Gu can only be given to others. "Guyue Bo pretended to take back the Jade Skin Gu. Guyue Fangzheng was agitated by these words, and immediately became hot-headed, shouting, "No, I promise you! I will defeat everyone and become the first Rank two Gu Master! " "That's more like it." Guyue Bo showed a warm smile again, and placed the Jade Skin Gu in Fangzheng's hands. In his heart, he thought, "Fangzheng, oh Fangzheng, I know you have a low self-esteem, but this low self-esteem is harmful to your growth. And the best way to get rid of this feeling of inferiority is to succeed. You have A grade aptitude, advancing to Rank two is your greatest advantage, and it is also the easiest success for you to achieve. You must work hard. If you fail even in this, I will be too disappointed. " At the same time, Fang Yuan entered the secret cave in the rock crack again, going to the end of the tunnel. This time, he did not bring any iron spade, shovel, iron hammer or any other tools, but carefully observed his surroundings. The night before, he suffered a setback here, and on the way back to the village, he felt something was wrong. Today, in the dormitory, after using the Spring Autumn Cicada to refine the Little Light Gu, he suddenly had a flash of inspiration, and realized something was amiss. "This huge rock blocking the way, isn't it too smooth and round? This is man-made. That is to say, the Flower Wine Monk purposely set up this huge rock to block the way.

Why would he set up such a barrier here? "Fang Yuan showed a pondering expression. He observed his surroundings again. The ground in the tunnel was flat, and the top was a dome. The walls on both sides were made of a single piece of red soil, emitting a dim light. "Eh?" When his gaze swept across the ground again, he found something suspicious. The ground next to the huge rock blocking the way had a dark colour. This colour difference was not obvious, and in such a dim light, if one did not observe carefully, it would not be easy to notice. Fang Yuan squatted down, and touched the ground with his hand. Immediately, he felt a damp sensation. No wonder the colour was so dark, it was because it was wet. But this tunnel was dry, where did the water come from? Fang Yuan used his finger again, and rubbed the damp soil. He found that there was indeed something wrong with the soil. It was very loose and soft, not as sticky as dry red soil. Fang Yuan's eyes flashed. His experience and intuition told him that there was a high possibility that the Flower Wine Monk's "key" was hidden here. And this "key" was the key, to allow Fang Yuan to continue moving forward. Fang Yuan began to dig the soil. The soil was very loose, and it did not take much effort. When he dug an inch into the ground, there was a special fragrance that seemed to enter Fang Yuan's nose. "This fragrance is rich and luxurious, but not vulgar. It seems elegant and refined, could it be …" Fang Yuan's heart moved, and he thought of a possibility, and his hands moved even faster. As he dug, a dark gold light suddenly appeared from the soil. "It really is this!"

Fang Yuan's eyes shone, and his hands became more meticulous. He carefully dug the surrounding soil, and expanded the hole. After a while, a dark gold flower bud that was buried in the ground appeared in front of him. It was two inches deep into the ground, and was the size of a regular stone mill. The surface of the flower bud was as fine as silk, and the dark gold color made it seem quiet and mysterious, yet noble and elegant. "It really is the Earth Treasury Flower Gu!" Fang Yuan saw this, and let out a long breath of turbid air. He was not in a hurry to open the petals, but sat on the ground to rest for a while, wiping the soil off his hands. Then he slowly stretched out his hand, and gently opened the dark gold petals. The Earth Treasury Flower Gu was like a combination of lotus and cabbage. Its petals were one after another, tightly stuck together, thick and smooth to the touch. Fang Yuan peeled off the petals one by one, as if he was peeling off rolls of silk. And this large dark gold petals, once separated from the main body, quickly dissipated. It was like pieces of snowflakes, melting in the air. After Fang Yuan peeled off the outer fifty to sixty petals, the flower bud's volume was reduced by more than half, and the flower core was exposed. The petals in the flower core were smaller in size, and their thickness was also thinner, and the texture was softer and more delicate. It was not like silk, but more like a thin piece of paper. Fang Yuan's movements became more and more gentle, and after a few breaths, he successfully peeled off a petal. The petals became more and more transparent. After a while, Fang Yuan peeled off a paper-like petal, and he stopped. Right now, the Earth Treasury Flower Gu only had a thin layer of petals left in the center. These petals overlapped with each other, wrapping into a fist-sized ball shape. The petals were translucent, and as thin as paper. The inside of the petals was filled with a golden liquid. In the middle of the golden nectar, a Gu worm was sleeping soundly. Fang Yuan concentrated, but he could only see a blurry image of this Gu worm, and could not tell what kind of Gu it was.

As he got closer, his breath hit the flower core. The ball in the flower core immediately trembled, and the golden liquid, wrapped by the petals, also shook lightly. Gu worms would starve to death without food, and only a small number of Gu worms could seal themselves. To preserve Gu worms, Gu Masters thought of many ways. The Earth Treasury Flower Gu was one of them. The Earth Treasury Flower Gu was a one-time consumable Gu. Once it was planted on the ground, it could not be moved. Its food source was very simple, earth energy. As long as it was planted on the ground, with enough earth energy, it could survive. It only had one use, and that was to keep other Gu worms in the flower core, immersing them in the golden liquid. This golden liquid could simulate a sealed state to a certain extent, causing the Gu worms immersed in it to fall into a deep sleep. "The Flower Wine Monk planted the Earth Treasury Flower Gu here, and the Gu worm in the flower core should be left for the inheritor." Fang Yuan stretched out his finger, gently pinching the remaining petals, and carefully tore a hole. The golden liquid flowed out from his finger, like soybean oil. As the golden liquid flowed out, the flower core slowly shriveled. Fang Yuan rubbed his fingers, twisting open the extremely soft petals, and took out the sleeping Gu worm. This was a very cute ladybug. It was only the size of a thumb's nail. Its entire body was milky white, and from its back, it looked like a circle. Its head only occupied a small part of the circle, and the rest was its fat belly and shiny carapace. Its six tiny limbs, also milky white, were hidden under its belly. "White Boar Gu!" Fang Yuan's eyes flashed with joy.
S-REV-089.summary: Fang Yuan returns to the secret cave, this time without tools, and realizes the large rock blocking the path was man-made by the Flower Wine Monk. He deduces a hidden 'key' and investigates the ground, finding a damp, loose patch of soil. Digging carefully, he uncovers an Earth Treasury Flower Gu. He delicately peels its petals, revealing a golden liquid and a sleeping Gu worm within, which he identifies as a White Boar Gu, a rare and powerful find.

continuityMutations.content: His daily Yuan stone consumption exceeds two Yuan stones, requiring at least five Yuan stones per day with living expenses and cultivation.
The White Boar Gu requires an entire adult pig every five days.
He plans to hunt wild boars personally to feed the White Boar Gu and conserve Yuan stones, avoiding suspicion.
He has exposed the Liquor worm without suspicion, allowing him to openly purchase wine.
He possesses the Flower Wine Monk's strength inheritance, which he perceives as an invisible resource to cultivate outside the clan system.
He understands his current weakness as a C-grade talent and uses it as a protective umbrella, but recognizes this will change as he grows stronger.
He faces a severe shortage of Yuan stones and a need for a consistent food source for his numerous Gu worms, particularly the White Boar Gu.
He knows the dangers of the wilderness and the need for caution, despite the clan's regular clean-ups.
He quickly assesses threats and adapts his combat strategy, as demonstrated when facing Wang Er.
He believes in the fundamental equality of all beings in the face of death, viewing it as a natural process.
Mortal villages at the foot of Qing Mao Mountain are under the rule of the three major Gu Master clans.
These villages provide servants but their inhabitants are not chosen to become Gu Masters, due to the clans' strict bloodline and kinship policies.

S-REV-090.prose:
Chapter 66
These days, the temperature was getting higher and higher.
At noon, the scorching sun shone brightly, wantonly spreading its passion.
The caravan left, and the inn's business quieted down again.
Fang Yuan stepped into the dining hall, immediately attracting the attention of the waiters.
A familiar face immediately ran over, a flattering smile on his face: "Ah, young master, you're here!
Please come in and have a seat. "
"Give me a jar of wine, a kilo of beef, and a few side dishes." Fang Yuan stepped into the dining hall, walking towards his usual position by the window.
The waiter's face showed a difficult expression: "Young master, I'm sorry, the last time the caravan came, the shopkeeper sold the green bamboo wine.
Now we don't have this wine here. "
Fang Yuan nodded, not surprised: "Then give me a jar of rice wine, and tell the shopkeeper to brew more green bamboo wine this year, I want to order a hundred jars.
As for the deposit, you can calculate first and report to me. "
Now that the Liquor worm had been exposed, and no one was suspicious, there was no need to worry about buying wine.
"Okay, I will definitely pass on your words!
Young master, you can rest assured. "The waiter patted his chest, his tone confident.
Soon, the wine and dishes were served.
Fang Yuan ate and drank while looking out the window.
The hot weather, coupled with the fact that it was time to eat, there were few people on the streets.
The sun shone on the ground and the lush green bamboo houses.
Some barefoot, muddy mortal farmers walked in front of them, carrying shovels and shoulder poles.
Obviously they had just finished their farm work and were rushing home.
Two children, in front of them holding a small windmill on a bamboo frame, ran quickly with their little legs.
The ones behind chased, crying.
It seemed that the urchin in front had snatched the windmill.
At this time, two young Gu Masters, wrapped in green belts, walked quickly, looking like they were in a hurry.
"Scram, don't block the way!" A Gu Master pushed the farmer in front of him.
The farmers hurriedly evaded.
"Hmph." The two young Gu Masters walked over with cold arrogance.
Fang Yuan watched, his eyes slightly absent-minded, a part of his mind already divided into the aperture.
In the aperture, the water membrane flowed silently, the green copper primeval essence sea surged with waves.
The Liquor worm was bobbing up and down in the Primordial Sea. Sometimes it rolled around comfortably, and sometimes it completely curled up into a ball.
The Spring and Autumn Cicada fell into a deep slumber and hid itself.
The round White Boar Gu flapped its wings and flew in the sky, circling around.
The White Boar Gu and the Black Boar Gu were equally famous, both being rare Rank one Gu worms.
Their selling price in the market was even higher than the Liquor worm.
However, although they had the same function and appearance, their future advancement paths were different.
The Black Boar Gu and the Green Silk Gu fused to form the Rank two Black Mane Gu, and the Rank three Steel Mane Gu.
As for the White Boar Gu, the best way to advance it was to fuse with the Jade Skin Gu to refine it into the Rank two White Jade Gu, and then to the Rank three Sky Canopy Gu.
The Steel Mane Gu could make a Gu Master's hair as hard as steel needles, combining both attack and defense.
The Sky Canopy Gu causes the Gu Master's skin to be as hard as white jade, and at the same time reduces the effects of attacks like moonblades.
Fang Yuan's heart was filled with faint joy.
Obtaining the White Boar Gu was only one aspect. What truly made him happy was the Flower Wine Monk's strength inheritance.
"The White Boar Gu can increase strength, and the Flower Wine Monk also set up a huge rock to block the path. It seems he wants me to refine this White Boar Gu, and when I have strength in the future, I can push the rock away and continue moving forward.
This should be the first test. "
"Following the Flower Wine Monk's intentions in setting up this round, I can deduce that in the following inheritance, there will definitely be a second and third round.
The most important thing is that I can be sure that this strength inheritance he set up is not a huge trap, but a sincere one. "
"With this inheritance, I can reach Rank three even faster, and leave this Qing Mao mountain to roam the world and gain the upper hand!"
What did a Gu Master need the most when cultivating?
The answer was only one word — resources.
If Fang Yuan wanted to cultivate, he needed resources.
But the clan's resources were limited, and if he wanted resources, he had to fight for them.
Not only did he have to fight for them, he also had to win in the fight.
To him, the more he fought, the more he won, the more his trump cards would be exposed, and the more people would be afraid of him.
When the fear accumulates to a certain extent, it would form a suppression, stopping him from moving forward.
Fang Yuan killed a family servant, why didn't the Mo family pursue it?
He robbed all his peers, why didn't the elders punish him?
Fang Yuan rebelled against the clan, not entering the system, why did the clan leader choose to tolerate him?
It was all because he was weak, a C grade talent.
They were confident in their strength, and disdained to kill the weak.
Under the clan's system, haggling with the weak Fang Yuan was not only shameful, it would also make people feel that he was cold and heartless, ruining his social network.
Weakness was Fang Yuan's current protective umbrella.
But as he continued to fight for resources, Fang Yuan's performance would become stronger and stronger.
This would make people focus on him, fear him, and rope him in.
No matter which camp Fang Yuan chose, he would be suppressed and restricted by the other camp.
And the restriction and suppression would slow down his growth.
Fang Yuan was very clear of his current situation.
His current situation was very mysterious, it seemed like he had offended everyone, but in reality, he had offended no one.
But as time passed, as his cultivation increased, this conflict would arise and intensify.
Fang Yuan knew that this conflict would intensify sooner or later, but the later it intensified, the better it would be for his growth.
Therefore, the Flower Wine Monk's power inheritance had appeared at the right time!
With this power inheritance, he would have an invisible resource.
With this resource, he would be able to leave the system, walk his own path, calmly cultivate, and secretly accumulate strength.
Once he entered the system, he would have to choose a side. Even if he didn't fight, he would definitely be affected by politics and faction wars.
Once he entered the system, he would be a chess piece.
He had to first become a qualified chess piece, only then would others be assured to use him.
Only then would he have the chance to climb up, and when he climbed up, he had to be careful not to be used as a sacrificial pawn.
Fang Yuan knew this process all too well.
No matter how smart he was, he couldn't do anything about this situation.
This was the rule!
Most importantly, he only had C grade talent, and to the clan, there was no desire to invest in him.
Often, he would be treated as a sacrificial pawn.
Therefore, the best path of development was to develop alone. That way, most of the competition could be avoided.
In the hearts of the village's higher-ups, the image that they had painstakingly created could be maintained.
"In this world, it's easy to do things in the dark, but hard to do things in the open.
With the Flower Wine Monk's power inheritance, I can cultivate in secret, accumulate strength, and not attract attention, and not be suppressed.
But the robbery and extortion still have to continue. If I suddenly stop, it will arouse suspicion. At the same time, I also need Yuan stone. "Fang Yuan thought about his future plans.
He really needed Yuan stone.
Other people of the same age would start to refine and feed their second Gu worm.
But he had refined the Little Light Gu, and obtained the White Boar Gu.
He had a total of four Gu worms.
Previously, when he fed the Moonlight Gu and the Liquor worm, he consumed almost one Yuan stone a day.
Now, when he fed the Gu worms, his daily consumption of Yuan stone was slightly more than two!
Adding on his cultivation needs and living expenses, he would need at least five Yuan stone a day!
Five Yuan stone was enough for a mortal family of three to live on for five months.
Although he had hundreds of Yuan stone on hand, it was not enough for such a long term expenditure.
More importantly, the Gu Master's expenditure would increase in the later stages.
Especially after advancing to Rank two, every time the Gu worm was combined, it would require a considerable amount of money.
Thinking of this, Fang Yuan was deeply worried.
Yuan stone was a problem. Just by robbing and extorting his classmates and his savings, he could only delay the outbreak of this problem.
Other than that, he had another problem, and that was the feeding of the White Boar Gu.
The food of the White Boar Gu was pork.
The word "boar" meant pig.
The food of the Boar Gu was pork.
The Black and White Boar Gu's appetite was huge. Every five days, they had to eat an entire adult pig's meat.
In this world, the price of pork was not cheap. Mortals would only slaughter a pig during the new year, to get some meat.
Without the large scale breeding techniques on Earth, the price of pork and beef was not something mortals could afford.
At the same time, Qing Mao mountain's terrain was steep, and the living area was small. How much space was there to rear livestock?
The mountain people lived off the mountain, and the river water. The occasional pork that the mountain people could eat were mostly wild boars hunted by hunters.
"Looks like I have to hunt personally from now on, and kill the pigs for meat." Fang Yuan's eyes shone.
Just by buying pork from the village, firstly, it would waste Yuan stone, and secondly, it would attract suspicious gazes. Even if you love to eat pork, you wouldn't eat it so frequently and in so much quantities, right?
If he hunted personally, not only would this problem be solved, it would also ease the financial pressure.
"Waiter, bill please!" Thinking of this, Fang Yuan did not hesitate any longer. After paying the bill, he walked out of the inn.
The academy was on holiday these few days, and the goal was to let the students refine the second Gu worm.
Fang Yuan decided that he would make use of this time to go out of the village and find out the situation, then kill the pigs for meat.
S-REV-090.summary: Fang Yuan orders food and wine at a quiet inn, learning that his preferred green bamboo wine is out of stock, so he orders a large quantity for future brewing. While eating, he observes the mundane street life, including mortals and arrogant Gu Masters. His mind, however, is occupied with his Gu worms and the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, leading to extensive planning about his cultivation path, resource needs, and the political dangers of the clan system.

continuityMutations.content: He recognizes the disadvantage of not having a detection Gu in the wilderness.
He decides to seek information from old hunters about trap locations to navigate the wilderness more safely.
He is considered the best hunter in his village, specializing in wild boars, inheriting skills from his father, Old Man Wang.
He desires to leave Qing Mao Mountain and travel the world, viewing it as a mark of true manhood.
He possesses significant combat skill for a mortal, with fast and stable archery and powerful close-quarters fighting.
The wilderness around Qing Mao Mountain is dangerous, requiring at least Rank three cultivation for solo exploration.
The clan's Gu Masters regularly 'clean up' the area around the village, making it safer but also reducing the prevalence of wild beasts.
The mountain is divided among three major villages (Guyue, Xiong, Bai), which also control numerous mortal villages at the foot of the mountain.

C-REV-01.transition: He moved carefully through the endless mountain forest, eventually descending towards the foot of the mountain.

S-REV-091.prose:
Chapter 67
In the endless mountain forest, Fang Yuan carefully moved forward.
Sunlight shone through the tall trees, creating a patch of scattered tree shadows.
The grass around his feet was lush, wild flowers blooming.
His ears were filled with the chirping of birds, or the sound of flowing water.
The further away from the village, towards the outskirts, the more dangerous it was.
Thus, Fang Yuan was even more careful.
The wilderness was extremely dangerous, a Gu Master had to have at least Rank three cultivation to be able to explore the wilderness alone.
But this did not mean it was safe. Many Rank three Gu Masters died in the wilderness, and even Rank four.
Fierce beasts, poisonous insects, man-made disasters, and the occasional bad weather, all caused the loss of life.
However, the wild boar that Fang Yuan wanted to kill appeared near the village.
Otherwise, the mountain hunters would not be able to catch wild boars occasionally.
"Every once in a while, the clan's Gu Masters will move out to clean up the surroundings of the village.
This kind of environment is considered safe for a Rank one middle stage Gu Master like me.
But I still have to be careful, wild beasts and Gu worms are mobile. "
Fang Yuan used his previous life's experience to search carefully.
Time passed slowly, but Fang Yuan did not find anything.
"Damn it, Mt. Cyan Spear is still too big for the current me.
I don't have a detection Gu, and I am not familiar with the environment here. Plus the village's surroundings are cleaned up regularly, it is too difficult to find the wild boar.
Go to the foot of the mountain! "
Fang Yuan's search was fruitless, so he changed his mind and headed towards the foot of the mountain.
Qing Mao mountain had three big villages, Guyue village, Xiong village and Bai village.
Xiong village was at the front of the mountain, Guyue village was at the waist of the mountain, and Bai village was at the back of the mountain.
Other than these three villages, there were tens of villages at the foot of the mountain, and mortals lived there.
The three villages divided these villages, and became the masters behind the scenes.
Once they lacked servants, they would choose from these villages.
But they would not choose Gu Masters.
To nurture Gu Masters, they would only nurture their clansmen.
Even though they knew that among these mortal villagers, there were people with cultivation talent.
Although the ratio was small, they still did not take them.
In this world, bloodline and kinship were extremely important. Holding power in the hands of relatives was the foundation of a stable family policy.
Many mountain strongholds, in order to expand their scale, would recklessly bring outsiders into the clan. In the end, it would lead to the outflow of power, which would lead to internal strife. As a result, they would either fall into ruin or decline.
No matter which world it was, the foundation of political power was always the military. This was the truth.
And the army was a mechanism of violence. It was power.
Only with power would one have status and authority.
Of course, the family system wasn't the same, and there would be new blood.
Every year, there would be outsiders marrying into the family and getting rid of their slave status. The children they gave birth to would be surnamed Guyue, the new generation of clansmen.
It was as if a stream had been drawn into a deep pool.
Do not underestimate this stream. Without it, the pool would be stagnant and would rot sooner or later.
With it, there would be living water, and the deep pool would slowly grow.
Fang Yuan's former personal maidservant, Shen Cui, had this idea. She wanted to climb up the social ladder and break away from her slave status.
Fang Yuan went down the mountain. After walking for half an hour, he could vaguely see smoke rising from the bottom of the mountain.
After walking for a while, he saw a village in the distance on a wide hillside. It was situated next to a small river.
The nearby villages were all under the rule of the Guyue Mountain Stronghold.
Although the vicinity of the village was not as safe as around the mountain stronghold, it was cleaned regularly.
If mortals could survive in such an environment, it was naturally acceptable to Fang Yuan.
"Hmm?" On the mountain road close to the village, Fang Yuan keenly discovered traces on the ground.
His past experience told him that this was the trace of a wild boar.
"Chase!" Fang Yuan's spirit was lifted. He followed the trace and gradually went deep into the mountain forest.
Green moss covered the dark stones, and ancient cypress trees formed a large forest.
Under the scorching sun in the summer, the mountain forest seemed even more serene.
The lush bushes suddenly moved.
A few mountain deer that were eating the rich wild grass immediately raised their heads. They stared cautiously at the grass and their ears twitched.
The grass that was half the height of a person suddenly separated, and a young man came out of the grass.
This young man had pale skin, short black hair, and wore simple linen clothes. It was Fang Yuan.
Swoosh swoosh swoosh.
The few wild deer were startled. Their four slender and vigorous legs suddenly moved. They jumped and jogged. In an instant, they rushed out and disappeared from Fang Yuan's sight.
"These wild deer are all female deer. Their fur can be cut and made into warm fur coats. Deer meat is also food for some Gu worms.
If it is a male deer, the antlers and antlers are even more precious. Some golden antlers are even necessary for Gu worms to advance. "
The wilderness was full of danger, but it also contained rich treasures.
Fang Yuan glanced at the direction where these wild deer escaped and retracted his gaze.
His goal this time was the wild boar, not these wild deer.
He continued forward.
Buzz buzz buzz.
Such a sound came from ahead, causing Fang Yuan to stop in his tracks.
"Beehive." He looked from afar and saw a beehive hanging on a tree.
The beehive was huge, about the size of a wicker basket. It was a greyish yellow color.
Dozens of bee soldiers flew around the beehive, and there were worker bees entering and exiting from time to time.
"There is honey in the beehive. Honey is the food of the Bear Power Gu. Thus, the Xiong village needs a lot of honey.
This beehive is only a small beehive. The probability of it producing a Gu is not high.
If I had a Gu worm like the Bronze Skin Gu, I could risk being stung by the bees to collect the honey. Unfortunately. "Fang Yuan thought to himself.
In this world, not all insects were Gu.
Gu were the essence of heaven and earth, carriers of laws. How could they be so cheap?
In a swarm of insects, only the insect king was a Gu worm.
But this also depended on the size of the swarm. If the size was too small, there would be no Gu worm.
Take this bee swarm in front of him for example. Because the swarm was too small, the probability of it having a Gu was not high.
Fang Yuan circled around the beehive and continued forward.
The traces of the mountain boar became more and more obvious. Fang Yuan knew that he was getting closer and closer to this wild boar.
He became more and more careful. Wild boars were also very dangerous.
Wild boars were not domesticated pigs. If an adult wild boar fought with a tiger, the tiger might not win.
In this strange world, wild beasts were not simple.
"Hmm?
This situation! "
When Fang Yuan finally found the wild boar, it was lying in a big pit. At the bottom of the pit were sharpened Green Spear Bamboos. The wild boar was stabbed by the Green Spear Bamboos, and blood was flowing out.
Looking at the blood in the pit, this wild boar had been in the trap for at least fifteen minutes.
But this wild boar was still struggling with all its might. Its mouth was puffing and howling, and it still had a lot of energy.
"This trap was obviously set by a hunter.
I didn't expect to pick up such a bargain. "Fang Yuan smiled, but his expression was serious.
These traps were also a threat to him.
If he fell into this trap, he would probably die in fifteen minutes.
Although the surroundings of the village were cleaned regularly, hunters often came here to hunt and set up many traps.
Some traps could be recognized, but some were designed to be hidden. If Fang Yuan did not notice, he might fall into it.
"This mountain is all over, and any corner could be set up by hunters.
But hunters would often tell each other the location of a trap when they set up a trap.
Looks like I have to find an old hunter and get him to tell me about the traps here.
Also, with this information, I won't have to find a needle in a haystack like this. "Fang Yuan thought in his heart.
This was the disadvantage of not having a detection Gu.
However, it was not easy to find a good investigative Gu worm.
In a short period of time, if he had information from hunters, he would be able to deal with it.
Thinking like this, Fang Yuan turned his wrist and a moonblade flew out, easily hitting the wild boar.
Whoosh.
With a soft sound, the entire moonblade sank into the wild boar's neck, instantly creating a thin and long wound.
Then with a puchi sound, a fountain of blood spurted out.
The blood that spurted out caused the wound to become bigger and bigger, and more and more blood spurted out.
The wild boar howled, struggling like it was dying, but its movements became smaller and smaller …
Fang Yuan watched in silence, his face calm.
The wild boar's life was gone. Its eyes were wide open, and the muscles on its body were still twitching. Warm blood filled the pit, and the thick smell of blood assaulted his senses.
"Live or die, this is the main theme of nature." He sighed in his heart.
At this moment, faint voices could be heard.
"Brother Wang Er, in our village, no one is better at hunting than you, especially wild boar hunting.
Your family's Old Man Wang is the king of hunters within a hundred miles. He is famous, who doesn't know him? "
"Yes, yes, Brother Wang Er, you have inherited Old Man Wang's legacy. Hunting a wild boar is naturally a piece of cake!"
"Brother Wang Er, why didn't Little Sister come with you today?"
After the flattering voices, a cold and hard voice sounded, "Hmph!
How can hunting a wild boar show off my skills?
Today, I'm going to kill three wild boars for you to see!
Also, Er Goudan, don't think about my sister, or I'll beat you up!! "
Er Goudan said, "Men and women should get married, is it illegal for me to like Wang's sister?
Plus, it's not like I'm the only one who likes her. Which man in our village doesn't like her?
Brother Wang Er, you're already nineteen this year, it's time for you to get married and have kids. "
That cold and hard voice sounded again, "Hmph, as a man, how can I be greedy for such a little beauty!
One day, I'll walk out of this Qing Mao Mountain and travel the world. I'll see the world, then I'll be worthy of being a man! "
As he spoke, four young hunters walked out from the forest.
The leader was tall and lanky, with a bow and arrows on his back. His muscles were bulging, and his eyes were bright. He had a sharp aura.
When he saw Fang Yuan, his brows immediately furrowed, shouting: "Hmm?
Which village are you from? How dare you try to take advantage of me, Wang Er.
Get lost! "

Chapter 68
"Scram?" Fang Yuan heard Wang Er's words and laughed coldly, waving his palm forward.
Swoosh.
With a soft sound, the eerie blue moonblade shot out quickly.
At the same time, he kicked the ground and rushed towards the four hunters.
"Gu Master?!" When the hunters saw the moonblade, someone immediately shouted in shock.
The moonblade was already flying towards them, and they quickly scattered to dodge.
Puff.
One of them could not dodge in time, and his right forearm was hit by the moonblade. Immediately, the bone and flesh separated, and his wrist and half of his forearm fell to the ground.
"Ahhhhh!"
He laid on the ground, screaming in pain and fear.
His left hand was like an eagle's claw, subconsciously grabbing his right arm tightly.
The front of his right arm continued to spurt out scarlet blood.
Soon, the ground was dyed red.
"Spare my life!"
"We did not mean to offend you!"
The other two Gu Masters saw their companion's tragic state, and their faces turned pale, without a trace of blood.
They quickly knelt down, kowtowing to Fang Yuan.
"Hmph, a bunch of useless things, what are you afraid of?
Isn't it just a Gu Master student! "
Only Wang Er remained standing. Fang Yuan did not say a word and attacked. This made him shocked and angry. He spread his arms back, and with a movement of his waist, he held the bow and arrow on his back in his hands.
"Stop, if you come any closer, I will shoot you!" Wang Er retreated as he nocked an arrow, roaring at the same time.
"Hmm?" Fang Yuan squinted his eyes. This Wang Er was a bit troublesome.
When a normal person saw a Gu Master, which one would not be afraid? But he could maintain his composure, which showed that he had some guts.
Swoosh.
Another moonblade flew out, shooting towards Wang Er.
"You don't know how to appreciate favors." Wang Er snorted coldly, and his killing intent rose.
His footsteps slightly shifted, and he dodged the moonblade, shooting an arrow at the same time.
The arrow flew quickly, with a swoosh, it arrived in front of Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan lowered his body and head slightly, dodging the arrow. He continued to rush forward, quickly closing in on Wang Er.
Wang Er was very courageous. He immediately threw away the bow and arrow in his hand and raised his fist, which was as big as the mouth of a bowl, and brazenly met Fang Yuan.
He was tall, with a broad back and a thin waist. He was at least half a meter taller than Fang Yuan.
The sun shone from behind him. Fang Yuan rushed towards him, his face shrouded in a layer of shadow.
In the shadows, his eyes were like a wolf's, seething with killing intent!
"No!"
"Stop!"
The two hunters, seeing that they were about to collide violently, cried out in terror.
"Die!"
Wang Er's eyes emitted a ferocious glint, and the muscles on his face contorted. He was both malevolent and insane, like a bloodthirsty wolf.
His two fists, one on the left and one on the right, struck at Fang Yuan.
Whoosh.
His fists were fast and heavy, bringing along a gust of wind!
Fang Yuan watched as the fists grew bigger and bigger in his eyes. His expression did not change, but he suddenly took a wrong step.
Swoosh.
At this critical moment, he dodged the fist, forcefully twisted his body, and rushed to the side of Wang Er's left hand.
Wang Er laughed sinisterly, waved his fists, and immediately chased after Fang Yuan's back.
But at this moment, a dazzling ray of sunlight shone into his eyes.
His back was originally facing the sunlight, but when he suddenly turned his head, the dazzling sunlight shone on his eyes, causing him to feel a stinging pain in his eyes, and his vision turned white.
Fang Yuan sneered, his body somersaulted in the air, dodging Wang Er's fist, and at the same time, swung his right hand.
Chi!
The third crescent blade flew in the direction of the sunlight.
Wang Er's hair stood on end, and he felt an unprecedented sense of danger.
He hurriedly tilted his head, and in the next moment, the blue crescent blade flew past.
"Brother Wang Er, be careful!"
"Did you dodge it?"
The two hunters kneeling on the ground, at this moment, forgot to beg for mercy, and stared with their eyes wide open.
The dazzling sunlight shone on their faces.
At this moment, time seemed to have slowed down.
The surrounding sounds also seemed to have disappeared, and the world was silent.
The afternoon sun formed a white background, and in this background, Wang Er's figure was simplified into a black shadow. He leaned back in the air, his strong body raised in an arc, like a drawn bow, full of masculine beauty.
He slowly tilted his head, wanting to dodge the attack of the crescent blade.
The crescent blade flew in the air, like a snail.
The blue light, under the illumination of the sunlight, seemed as if it did not exist.
The white background, the black figure, and the blue crescent blade, these three formed a dazzling stage that condensed life and death in an instant.
The crescent blade flew over.
The black figure that represented Wang Er, followed the momentum, and slowly fell.
He seemed to be safe and sound.
"Phew!" Seeing this, one of the young hunters let out a breath of turbid air.
"We dodged it!" The other hunter was already cheering in his heart.
But at this moment!
A small piece of the black figure's head was separated, and blood red liquid, along with the separation of the black figure, splashed in all directions.
The blue crescent blade gradually dissipated in the air.
As for the black figure, it was like a broken bow. The power it contained instantly dissipated with a loud bang. In an instant, it turned into a sad but beautiful leaf that floated silently on the ground.
The pupils of the two hunters suddenly shrunk to the size of a needle tip!
Their mouths slightly opened, wider and wider, until they reached their limit.
Splat.
Bright red liquid, splashed on the two's faces.
The two touched with their hands — —
It was blood!
They suddenly woke up!
In their perception, time had suddenly returned to normal, and they could hear the noise again.
There was the sound of birds chirping, the sound of flowing water, and the screams of their companions grabbing their broken arms.
"Brother Wang Er — —?" One of the hunters shouted, his voice full of fear.
All along, Wang Er was their leader.
"He's dead!" The other hunter let out a sorrowful cry, and his face instantly became extremely gloomy.
"Brother Wang Er was our strongest hunter. Just a moment ago, he was still talking and laughing with us, and the next moment, he died!"
"We shouldn't have angered the Gu Master. How can we mortals be a match for a Gu Master!"
The two hunters were shocked and terrified. For a moment, they were like two statues, kneeling on the ground.
Fang Yuan crawled up from the ground.
Just now, in order to avoid Wang Er's punch, he flipped in the air and lost his balance.
After shooting a crescent blade, he fell to the ground.
But this flip was worth it. If he was hit by Wang Er's punch, he would probably vomit blood on the spot.
After all, Fang Yuan did not have any defensive Gu worms, and his body was still that of a fifteen-year-old.
Now that he stood up, other than the slight pain from his shoulder landing on the ground, there was nothing else.
"This Wang Er is very strong, even stronger than that Mo family's slave, Gao Wan!
If a normal student met him, they would definitely lose.
Even a Rank one upper stage Gu Master would fall to his hands due to carelessness. "Fang Yuan looked deeply at Wang Er's corpse.
During the Rank one period of a Gu Master, outstanding mortal martial artists were still a threat.
This Wang Er was indeed a good fighter.
His arrows were fast and stable. Just based on this, it was comparable to a crescent blade.
Even the crescent blade's attack was slightly inferior, not as wide as his bow and arrow's coverage.
His punches and kicks had also reached the peak of a mortal. His muscles and bones were strong, and he was ruthless and ruthless.
With Fang Yuan's current small body, he could not take it head-on.
If it was any other student, they would definitely lose.
But Wang Er's misfortune was that he met Fang Yuan.
The moment he appeared, Fang Yuan noticed the bow on his back and immediately deduced that he could not fight long range with him.
The crescent blade's attack range was only ten meters.
The bow and arrow's attack range was much further than the crescent blade's.
Thus, Fang Yuan gave up on long range combat and quickly closed in, assuming a close combat stance.
Wang Er had no choice but to give up his bow and arrow, wanting to fight close combat with Fang Yuan.
But Fang Yuan did not want to fight close combat with Wang Er. He cleverly used the angle and the sunlight to create a flaw in Wang Er's defense, and then shot out the third crescent blade.
He had already advanced to middle stage, and using the Liquor worm to refine his primeval essence, the crescent blade's attack reached the level of an upper stage Gu Master.
At such a close distance, and with Wang Er's blurred vision, hitting Wang Er was inevitable.
"But this Wang Er is really capable.
I originally wanted to decapitate him, but at the critical moment, he relied on his senses and reflexes, forcefully dodging most of the attack, causing my crescent blade to only slice off half of his skull. "
"Life and death is the main melody of nature.
All beings are equal, all beings have the right to live, and all beings have the possibility of being killed.
In life, there may be nobility and lowliness.
But in the face of death, what is the difference between a person's death and a pig's death?
It's just death. "
Fang Yuan took one last look at Wang Er's corpse, sighing in his heart.
S-REV-091.summary: Fang Yuan cautiously explores the Qing Mao Mountain wilderness, finding the area too vast without detection Gu, and decides to head to the mountain's foot where mortal villages reside. He finds wild boar tracks, leading him to a trapped wild boar, already mortally wounded in a hunter's pit. As he finishes off the boar, a group of mortal hunters led by Wang Er, who claims the trap, confronts him. Fang Yuan, asserting his Gu Master status, swiftly and brutally kills Wang Er and injures another hunter, terrifying the remaining mortals.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan killed his son, Wang Er, and is now threatening his family for a map.
Fang Yuan killed her brother, Wang Er, and is threatening her family.
Old Man Wang is a famous hunter with valuable knowledge of the local terrain.
Fang Yuan is a powerful and ruthless Gu Master who killed Wang Er and is threatening his family.
Fang Yuan is a powerful and ruthless Gu Master who killed Wang Er and is threatening his family.
Is the daughter of Old Man Wang and sister of Wang Er.
Her brother Wang Er is killed by Fang Yuan, and she is subsequently killed by Fang Yuan.
Is the father of Girl and Wang Er, and a renowned hunter.
Attempts to deceive Fang Yuan by providing an incomplete map of the hunting grounds.
His son Wang Er is killed by Fang Yuan, and he is subsequently killed by Fang Yuan.
Possesses extensive knowledge of the local terrain, traps, and wild beast distribution, documented in a hidden animal skin map.
Kills Wang Er, Old Man Wang, and Girl to obtain a valuable hunting map and eliminate potential threats.
Acquires a comprehensive animal skin map detailing hunting grounds, traps, and beast distributions.
His actions reinforce his reputation for ruthlessness and lack of empathy, which other characters acknowledge.
Recognizes Jiang He's attempt to extort him and navigates the situation with shrewdness, using his clan identity to his advantage.
Is the son of Old Man Wang and brother of Girl.
His prior offense against Fang Yuan leads to his death and the subsequent tragedy of his family.
Witnesses Fang Yuan kill Old Man Wang and Girl, intensifying his fear and subservience.
Cooperates with Fang Yuan out of fear for his life, including slandering Old Man Wang.
Home of Old Man Wang's family, implying a life of solitude away from the main village.

relationshipMutations.type: Intense hatred and desire for revenge

S-REV-092.prose:
Chapter 69
The trees were rooted in the mountain soil, extending their emerald green hands towards the sky.
Thick and solid tree trunks faced each other from afar.
The luxuriant branches and leaves crisscrossed in midair.
Surrounded by these trees, there was a wooden house.
The wooden house was made of thick and solid tree trunks, revealing an honest and solid feeling.
The wooden house wasn't built recently, but was a bit old, so the surface of the wooden house was covered in moss, and some of the tree trunks even had tender branches.
The wooden house was surrounded by a tall bamboo fence made of Green Spear Bamboo.
There were vegetable fields in front and behind, and in the middle of the vegetable fields was a well.
At this moment, a young and beautiful girl was fetching water from the well.
Although her clothes were extremely simple, it couldn't hide her face.
She was about sixteen years old, with a pair of big black eyes, black and white clearly defined, pure like crystals.
The sunlight shone through the overlapping lush leaves and shone on her face, making her skin look like white snow. It also showed a kind of transparent blush and warmth.
Her black hair drooped mischievously, covering half of her cute earlobes.
Her pink lips were pursed, biting her pearly white teeth, and her face showed that she was trying very hard.
She laboriously lifted the bucket filled to the brim, from the depths of the well.
He took another deep breath and moved the wooden bucket to the gray brick floor beside the well.
"Phew!"
The girl puffed up her pink cheeks, exhaled a mouthful of turbid air, and used her white hand as a fan, fanning her cheeks.
Hearing the sound of the wooden bucket falling to the ground, the door of the wooden house creaked open, and an old man walked out from inside.
The old man's hair was a mix of black and white, and his face was full of wrinkles. Although his old eyes seemed to have experienced the vicissitudes of life, they would occasionally flash with a sharp light.
He was like an old tiger, although old, the tiger's might was still there.
"Girl, this bucket is too heavy, I already said to let father carry it.
Why are you secretly watering the vegetables behind my back? "The old man looked at the girl beside the well, his face revealing a loving expression.
"Father!"
The girl called out sweetly, "You came back so late from hunting yesterday, you should have slept a little more this morning.
It's just a bucket. Look, didn't I just bring it up? "
"You always like to show off!" The old man's tone was helpless, but his eyes were filled with love.
He strode to the well, reached out a hand, and easily grabbed the bucket of water. "Come, little girl, I'll water the vegetables with you."
The air was filled with the fragrance of wild grass and flowers. The summer wind blew over passionately. When it brushed past the treetops, it turned into a wave of fresh and serene air.
On the vegetable field in front of the wooden house in the mountain, his daughter used a ladle to scoop up water and carefully watered the vegetables.
The father was in charge of fetching water, and the two buckets took turns.
The warm atmosphere of a family permeated the small space.
After a while, the old man stood beside the well, wiped the sweat off his forehead, and sighed deeply. "Sigh, I'm getting old after all. I can't lift it anymore after a few times."
The young girl turned her head and smiled like a flower. She said angrily, "Father, you finally know.
You're already so old, and you always like to show off. How many times have I told you, let second brother go hunting. At your age, you should lie at home and enjoy life. "
"Hehehe."
The old man laughed and nodded, "With your second brother's ability, it's indeed enough for him to roam this mountain forest.
Especially his archery, it's even better than when I was young.
But there's one thing I'm worried about. He's too wild, and relies on his strength to fly.
Sigh, young people love to fantasize, and more or less have this problem. "
"Father … …" The young girl dragged out her voice.
The old man laughed even more happily, and joked, "Yes, and you.
You're not young anymore, it's time to find a husband.
Father will look for one for you. Our daughter is unique in this area, you don't have to worry about not being able to find a good family! "
The young girl's face suddenly turned red, and she was so embarrassed that she couldn't say anything.
The old man looked at the sky, as if he was looking at a beautiful future. He sighed leisurely, "When your second brother suffers a bit and restrains his temper, I'll stop and never go up the mountain again.
I'll find a good husband for you, and watch you get married and have children. It's best if you have a big fat boy. Hehe, I'll be satisfied with taking care of my grandson.
A person's life is really not easy.
As a hunter, how many of them have a good beginning and a good ending?
Sigh, the companions from when we were young are all gone now. There's only me left. "
"Father, you're wrong."
The young girl smiled and consoled, "What do you mean there's only you left? Don't you still have us?"
"Hehe … … hmm?" The old man laughed and was about to speak when he suddenly heard movement, and turned around.
The bamboo fence door was kicked open from the outside.
"You're Old Man Wang?" Fang Yuan's face was cold, and his eyes were eerie. He held a lump of moonlight in his right hand and walked in first.
The old man was shocked. Seeing the moonlight in Fang Yuan's hand, he quickly knelt on the ground, "This old man greets Lord Gu Master!"
"Old Man Wang, your son dared to offend me. I've already killed him.
Bring his corpse here! "Fang Yuan looked down at the old man kneeling on the ground, and went straight to the point.
He had just finished speaking when two young hunters walked in from outside the fence. One of them was in front, and the other was behind, carrying Wang Er's corpse.
Seeing this corpse, Old Man Wang's body trembled!
"Second brother —!"
The young girl screamed mournfully and immediately rushed over, pouncing on Wang Er's corpse. Her face was instantly covered in tears.
"Sister Wang … …" The two young hunters saw the girl of their dreams crying in front of them. They couldn't bear it, and wanted to persuade her, but they couldn't say anything.
"Old Man Wang, I heard you're a hunting chief, the most famous hunter in the nearby villages.
You're so old, but you can still hunt in the mountains, and every time you hunt, you get a good harvest.
That's good. "
Fang Yuan paused for a moment, and then continued with a blank expression, "Now draw me a map, indicating the location of all the traps in the nearby mountains, as well as the distribution of wild beasts that you've observed over the years.
If you draw it, I'll forgive your son for offending me.
If you can't draw it — hmph. "
These villages were under the control of the Guyue Stronghold.
The villagers in these villages were all serfs of the Guyue Clan.
Now that Wang Er had offended his superiors and offended his master, according to the clan rules, his whole family would be implicated!
Old Man Wang's body trembled again, and he almost fell to the ground.
To him, this kind of blow was too big and too sudden.
"Murderer, you're the murderer who killed my second brother!
You treat human life as grass, and now you're here to denounce me?
I want to avenge my second brother!! "The young girl shouted, her voice full of hatred and anger towards Fang Yuan. She suddenly rushed toward Fang Yuan.
But she was still on the way, when a figure suddenly rushed out and blocked her.
The one who blocked her was not the two young hunters, but her old father.
"Bastard!"
Old Man Wang let out a low roar, swung his hand, and with a slap, the young girl fell to the ground.
"Your second brother is already dead, do you want to die too?
Do you want me, your father, to live the rest of my life alone?! "The old man said this, tears flowing down his old face, and his whole body trembled violently.
"Father!"
The young girl was beaten awake, her eyes were full of tears, and her voice was full of pain, unwillingness, grievance, pity, hatred, helplessness, and all kinds of complex emotions.
The old man turned around, facing Fang Yuan, his knees went soft, and he knelt on the ground again, and his forehead touched the ground, deeply kowtowing at Fang Yuan's feet.
His voice was choked, trembling, "Lord Gu Master, my son offended you, and indeed deserved to die!
I will draw a map for you now, please be magnanimous, and spare us. "
Fang Yuan's expression softened a little, and he looked down at the old man, "Don't worry, as long as you draw it truthfully, I will definitely spare you.
But you better not lie to me, if I find any suspicious points, your lives will be in danger! "
"I understand, I understand." Hunter Wang kowtowed non-stop, "Lord Gu Master, please allow me to go back and get a pen and paper."
"No need."
Fang Yuan waved his hand, and looked at the two young hunters who came to threaten him, ordering, "Go to the house, find me a pen and paper, and bring it out."
"Yes, Lord Gu Master." The two young men's legs trembled, but under Fang Yuan's deterrence, they did not dare to disobey.
"Lord, the pen and paper are on the square table in the kitchen," Old Man Wang said from the side.
Fang Yuan's gaze faintly flashed, but he did not speak.
The two hunters broke into the wooden house, and quickly came out with a pen and paper.
The paper in the Southern Border was made of specially made bamboo paper. The paper was very hard, and the paper had a faint green color.
This kind of paper was suitable for the humid climate of the Southern Border.
If it was Xuan paper, after seven or eight days, it would be wet from the humidity.
The old man held the pen and knelt on the ground, drawing black lines one after another.
Some were curved, some were straight.
He drew more than ten pieces of bamboo paper, and after a while, he presented the bamboo paper to Fang Yuan with both hands.
Fang Yuan glanced at it, and split the bamboo in half, handing it to the two young hunters, "Take a look, see if there is anything wrong.
Every time you find a mistake, I will reward you with a Yuan stone! "
S-REV-092.summary: A young girl fetches water at a tranquil mountain home, soon joined by her father, Old Man Wang, creating a warm family scene. This peace is shattered by Fang Yuan's arrival, who callously reveals he killed Wang Er, the family's son/brother, for offending him. Fang Yuan then demands a map of the hunting grounds from Old Man Wang, threatening his remaining family. The girl's emotional outburst is violently silenced by her father, forcing him to comply with Fang Yuan out of desperation.

continuityMutations.content: Old Man Wang attempted to deceive him by omitting information from the map.
The animal skin map contains valuable, detailed information about hunting grounds, including a red cross marking a large wild boar herd not present on Old Man Wang's earlier map.
Fang Yuan is capable of executing people without hesitation, even after they've complied.
Fang Yuan is capable of executing people without hesitation, even after they've complied.

S-REV-093.prose:
Chapter 70
The two young hunters held the bamboo paper, their hands trembling, and their eyes glowing faintly.
"This is Hunter Wang's life's experience and effort.
Hunters like us, although we communicate, we also communicate about the location of the traps.
But we don't tell them about the distribution of the beasts.
The information on this bamboo paper is the information accumulated by Hunting Leader Wang's ancestors. "
"So there's a herd of wild deer in this valley. Haha, if I kill this herd of wild deer, I won't have to worry about food for at least three months!
Ah, there's a nest of mountain bears beside this stream?
That was close, I hunted near here last time.
Write it down, write it all down! "
This precious information could be said to be a hunter's rice bowl!
Often, it was not the experience of a generation, but the blood and lives of their ancestors and fathers.
As for Old Man Wang's family, they had always been hunters for a living.
When it came to Old Man Wang, his ancestry had reached its peak, and he was publicly recognized as the number one hunter.
The information in the hands of such a person was naturally the most detailed and accurate.
The two young hunters examined the bamboo paper for more than a quarter of an hour, flipping it several times. Only when Fang Yuan urged them did they reluctantly return the bamboo paper.
During this time, Old Man Wang kept kneeling on the ground, his forehead touching the ground to show his respect.
The young girl was still lying on the ground, dumbfounded.
"No problem, Lord."
"The positions of the traps on the bamboo paper are all correct."
The two replied.
"Lord Gu Master, this concerns the lives of me and my daughter, I would never dare to lie to you!" The kneeling Old Man Wang quickly shouted, kowtowing to Fang Yuan.
"Hmm, not bad," Fang Yuan shook the bamboo paper in his hand, and suddenly changed the topic, "But I don't believe it."
Old Man Wang jerked his head up as if he had been electrocuted. He saw a dark blue moon blade growing larger and larger in his eyes.
Chi.
A head flew up, blood splattering.
"Ah!!!"
"Lord, this!"
The two young hunters were caught off guard by this turn of events, and their faces were filled with shock.
"Father!" The girl let out a shrill scream as she threw herself at Old Man Wang's headless corpse.
But halfway through, a crescent blade shot over and hit her right in the face.
Plop.
She immediately fell to the ground, no longer breathing.
A thin red line slowly appeared on her beautiful face, from her forehead to her lips and chin.
The red line widened, and scarlet blood slowly seeped out, flowing down half of her nose and half of her lips.
It flowed into the black soil and dyed half of her face bright red.
On the other hand, the other half of her face was still as delicate and beautiful as before, white and rosy, and when reflected under the blue sky, it seemed crystalline and translucent like a work of art.
"Not bad." Fang Yuan glanced at the girl on the ground and nodded with satisfaction.
Using Rank one middle stage primeval essence, the moonblade could cut Gu.
Now, using Rank one middle stage primeval essence to activate the moonblade, it could break bones and even cut steel!
"Sister Wang!" A young hunter witnessed the death of his sweetheart with his own eyes. He immediately collapsed to the ground powerlessly.
"Lord Gu Master, please spare our lives!"
The other hunter saw Fang Yuan turn around and stared at them, and was almost scared out of his wits, kneeling on the ground with a plop.
"Get up, go in and search!" Fang Yuan said coldly, "I know that every hunter's house would keep a beast skin map.
On it is the terrain, the location of the traps, and the distribution of wild beasts.
If you find it for me, I'll let you live. "
"Yes, yes, yes, we will search now.
Lord Gu Master, please wait a moment! "The two crawled up in a flurry and stumbled into the wooden house.
Sounds of rummaging could be heard in the wooden house.
But after a while, the two young men searched through the wooden house, but could not find the beast skin map.
"Lord, please wait a little longer, we will find it soon!"
The two young men's faces were filled with fear and panic. Their actions became more and more violent, and the table, bowls and chopsticks were smashed by them.
"Damn it, where is it?"
"Come out, come out quickly!"
They mumbled, trembling nervously, and their eyes were bloodshot.
"Useless things." Fang Yuan slowly walked into the wooden house.
"Lord!
Lord!
Spare us, sob sob sob … "The two young men trembled like they were electrocuted, and fell to the ground, crying and kowtowing to Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan did not care about the two kneeling on the ground, but looked at the wooden house.
There were four bedrooms in the wooden house, a living room and a kitchen.
All the furniture and decorations were piled up like garbage, as if they had been looted.
Fang Yuan walked slowly, and his footsteps made light thudding sounds on the wooden floor.
"It has indeed been rummaged, but it shouldn't be.
Almost every hunter has an animal skin map, passed down from their ancestors. Generation after generation, the maps were constantly engraved and modified, recording the distribution of the beasts and the layout of the traps. This is a hunter's livelihood.
How could it not be? "
Fang Yuan's eyes were dark, and he kept thinking, "Moreover, I just tested Old Man Wang, and deliberately let the two young hunters into the house to search for the paper and pen.
Old Man Wang immediately called out the location of the paper and pen. He should be worried that the two young hunters would find the animal skin map.
The animal skin map must be in this wooden house! "
Fang Yuan looked around, and suddenly had a flash of inspiration. His eyes fixed on the fireplace in the living room.
The fireplace was connected to the chimney, and was used to warm the house in autumn and winter.
There were still some black charcoal left in the fireplace.
Fang Yuan walked to the side of the fireplace, and slowly squatted down. He casually picked up the iron tongs leaning against the fireplace, and turned over the charcoal that had been burnt black.
Most of the charcoal still retained the shape of a wooden stick, and its texture was very brittle. With a little force, it would break into two pieces.
"Hmm?"
After a while, Fang Yuan suddenly found a piece of charcoal. It was very hard and very heavy, unlike the other charcoal.
He used the tongs to take out the long piece of charcoal, and threw it on the ground. The charcoal on the surface immediately broke into countless black pieces.
Then the bamboo tube inside was revealed.
When the two young hunters saw this, they immediately let out a low cry of surprise.
Fang Yuan picked up the bamboo tube, found the cover at one end, and opened it.
With a slight tilt, he poured out a map inside.
This map was much heavier than the stack of bamboo papers, and was made of a white animal skin.
The animal skin map was very large, about a meter long and half a meter wide. On it, there were black, green, red, yellow, and blue lines, which outlined a complex topographic map.
Fang Yuan's eyes swept over it, and he was slightly surprised.
This map covered a very large area, and some of the corners were very far from the village. As a mortal, it was really not easy for him to explore these places.
His eyes focused, and he found the distribution of five wild boar herds on the map.
Two small wild boar herds, two medium wild boar herds, and one large wild boar herd.
In the center of this large wild boar herd, there was a red cross drawn with a line.
Seeing this cross, Fang Yuan could not help but sneer.
On his bamboo paper, there was absolutely no such cross!
The two young hunters also looked at the bamboo paper, and did not find anything wrong.
This was because their knowledge was limited, and they only knew a few places.
This red cross was already far away at the corner of the map.
From this, it could be seen that Old Man Wang was cunning!
This animal skin map was the reason why Fang Yuan killed Old Man Wang.
He needed this animal skin map to hunt wild boars, but how could he be at ease when it was drawn by someone else?
This way, a map that was personally obtained was more reliable.
In his previous life, what kind of words had Fang Yuan not heard before?
Just because of the word "scram", it was not enough to make him kill Wang Er.
When he heard the conversation of the four people beside the trap, he immediately had the intention to kill.
Killing Wang Er would reduce the resistance, and he would be able to obtain this map more smoothly.
Then why not kill him?
Fang Yuan did not kill for the sake of killing, killing was just a method.
This method could solve the problem more directly, so why not use it?
Old Man Wang also had to die. Even if he could let go of the hatred of his son, Fang Yuan could not.
Didn't they know the saying, "If the roots are not removed when weeds are cut, they will grow again when the spring wind blows"?
What, you said that killing the innocent?
Haha, no matter what world it was, as long as one lived in this world, there would be entanglement of cause and effect. How could there be innocent?
If a man killed a pig, was the pig innocent?
The big fish ate the small fish, and the small fish ate the shrimps. There was only a food chain in nature, and there was no such thing as innocent.
In this world, anyone could live, anyone could die, and no one was innocent!
S-REV-093.summary: Old Man Wang draws a hunting map for Fang Yuan, but Fang Yuan, suspicious, has the other hunters verify it. Despite their confirmation, Fang Yuan executes Old Man Wang with a moon blade, then kills the grieving Girl with another moon blade. He then forces the two terrified hunters to search the house for a hidden beast-skin map, which Fang Yuan eventually locates within the fireplace. Fang Yuan's internal monologue reveals his cold calculations and justification for his brutal actions, seeing killing as a direct solution.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan is a member of the Guyue clan and has a notorious reputation.
Fang Yuan is a member of the Guyue clan and has a notorious reputation.
Fang Yuan is the notorious Guyue Fang Yuan, known for his ruthlessness and recent Gu acquisitions.
Jiang He is the Guyue Gu Master stationed in this village and knows his brother, Jiang Ya.
Is a Rank two Gu Master stationed in the village by the Guyue clan.
Attempts to extort Fang Yuan by feigning concern for the clan's assessment and the villagers' deaths.
Is aware of Fang Yuan's reputation for ruthlessness and his recent acquisition of valuable Gu.

relationshipMutations.type: Reluctant acceptance and potential future alliance/debt

S-REV-094.prose:
Chapter 71
The beast skin map was very thick, unlike a folded piece of paper that could be easily carried around.
Fang Yuan could only roll up the beast skin and put it back into the bamboo tube. He then tied the two ends of the bamboo tube with hemp rope and carried it on his back.
The two hunters stared at the bamboo tube, their eyes showing unavoidably greed.
They were not idiots, they knew the value of this map.
Although Gu Masters did not care about this beast skin map, to mortals, especially hunters like them, it was a treasure.
This was something passed down from the Wang family's ancestors.
For Old Wang to become a famous headhunter, this map definitely had a lot to do with it.
This was a true family heirloom.
"Let me ask you, is there anyone else in Old Man Wang's family?" Fang Yuan's eyes flashed as he asked coldly.
The two youngsters kneeling on the ground, upon hearing Fang Yuan's words, shuddered. Thinking of their current situation, the greed on their faces faded away and was replaced by fear.
"No more, their family is all dead, Lord Gu Master!"
"Hunter Wang originally had a wife, but over ten years ago, she was killed by a wild wolf that invaded the village.
Before his wife died, she gave birth to two boys and a girl for Old Man Wang.
But the eldest son, Wang Da, died on the mountain while hunting three years ago.
There is no one else in the Wang family. "
The two young hunters hurriedly replied.
"So it's like this …" Fang Yuan squinted his eyes. He looked at the two kneeling on the ground and knew that they were not lying.
Life and death were in his hands, the possibility of them lying to him was very small.
But he still asked, "You are not lying to me?"
"We dare not lie at all, Lord!"
"I, I remember!
Old Man Wang actually had a wife, Wang Da's wife.
But after Wang Da went missing, the wife also died of love. That year, the village even specially sent down a chastity memorial.
But I heard that Wang Da's wife wanted to remarry, but was forced to death by Old Man Wang.
My Lord, you killed Old Man Wang, which is a good thing for the people. "
Another person hurriedly echoed, "That's right, that's right.
Actually, Sir, we have long found this Old Man Wang to be an eyesore.
Hmph, what's so great about it? It's just that it's better at hunting than us.
They were clearly all mortals, but they made it seem like they were special, moving out of the village to live here.
As juniors, we sometimes wanted to ask him for advice, but he chased us away and forbade us from appearing near the wooden hut again! "
Fang Yuan listened quietly while nodding. Although the two of them began to belittle Old Man Wang in order to save their lives, it was not difficult to detect the resentment in their mouths.
Fang Yuan guessed that the two youngsters were just pretending to ask for their hunting experience. They were probably coveting the beauty of the Wang family's daughter.
As a result, he was discovered by Old Man Wang and was taught a lesson several times.
"There's no need to say more about getting rid of the tyrants and bringing peace to the people. The reason I killed this time was because I coveted this beast hide.
Hmm, I am quite satisfied with your performance, you can leave now. "
Fang Yuan's tone softened, and at the same time, the right hand behind his back shone with eerie moonlight.
The two youngsters kneeling on the ground heard Fang Yuan's words and were pleasantly surprised.
"Thank you, Sir, for sparing our lives!"
"Sir, we will forever remember your generosity and kindness!!"
The two of them were crying and snot, their foreheads knocking against the ground, producing a light thudding sound.
After kowtowing a few times, they immediately turned around and left.
Although Fang Yuan was younger than them, after they personally witnessed Fang Yuan's style of doing things, they were incomparably terrified and did not want to face Fang Yuan again.
"Wait." At this time, a voice suddenly came.
The voice had just finished speaking when a Gu Master jumped down from the treetop with a swoosh.
"You can't leave, explain everything that happened here clearly."
The Gu Master who jumped down was wearing a dark blue tight suit with a red belt. In the middle of the belt was a metal plate, and on the metal plate was carved a big "2".
This Rank two Gu Master had a skinny body and narrow eyes.
His wrists were covered with arm guards, and his calves had sturdy leggings. His whole person exuded a sense of competence.
"Commoner greets Lord Jiang He!"
The two young hunters had just stood up and wanted to leave, but upon seeing this Gu Master, they immediately knelt down again, prostrating themselves to the ground.
They all knew this Gu Master, he was the Gu Master stationed in the village.
Every year, in order to strengthen their control over the surrounding areas and prevent other forces from infiltrating, the Guyue village would send Gu Masters to be stationed there, at the same time strengthening the border defense.
This Gu Master called Jiang He did not care about the two hunters kneeling on the ground, but looked at Fang Yuan and asked coldly, "I am the Guyue village's Gu Master, Jiang He, and you are?"
Fang Yuan laughed lightly and stretched out his right palm. In his palm, the Moonlight Gu was emitting a ball of moonlight.
