The Gu Master Jiang He saw the moonlight in Fang Yuan's palm, and his gaze softened. The Moonlight Gu was the symbol of the Guyue clan, and it could not be faked.
"This matter is simple. Old man Wang's second son offended me, and I killed the whole family in a fit of anger.
The two of them can testify for me. "Fang Yuan confidently admitted, pointing at the two young hunters kneeling on the ground.
Fang Yuan spoke the truth, and the two hunters hurriedly nodded without a trace of hesitation.
Jiang He was stunned for a moment, then laughed loudly, "Good kill!
A mere serf dared to offend the master, he deserved to be killed!! "
But immediately after, he changed the topic and said with deep meaning, "But junior, you making things difficult for me by doing this.
Although this Old Man Wang lives alone here, they are still the villagers that I am responsible for.
I was sent by the clan to be stationed in the village to protect the villagers and guard against them.
Now that you have killed these people, the population of the village will decrease, and at the end of the year assessment, the clan's evaluation of me will drop. "
Fang Yuan's gaze flashed, and he immediately knew that this Jiang He wanted to extort money from him.
He laughed and said directly, "What's so difficult about this?
Senior, just report it as it is.
Just say that I killed the whole family, and it has nothing to do with you. "
Jiang He heard this, and his eyelids twitched. He was secretly angry that this Fang Yuan did not know how to appreciate favors, and his tone became very serious, "Then I will handle it impartially.
Junior, if you are not afraid of the clan's investigation, then report your name. I will record it in detail and truthfully submit it in the report. "
His words were very threatening, and if it was any other teenager, they might have been scared by these words.
But Fang Yuan saw his weakness, and immediately said, "Senior, just report it as it is. Right, my surname is Guyue, and my name is Fang Yuan."
"So you are Fang Yuan!" Jiang He's face was obviously surprised, "I have recently heard my younger brother talk about you.
You beat up all your classmates, extorted them in public, and every time you get sixty Yuan stones.
Every time my younger brother talks about it, he is envious of how easy it is for you to earn money.
Also, you unexpectedly got a Mudskin Toad and a Liquor worm in stone gambling.
Your luck is really enviable.
Right, my younger brother is Jiang Ya, you should have met him long ago. "
"So it is him."
Fang Yuan nodded, and admitted, "Indeed, every time I buy moon orchid petals, it is from Jiang Ya's shop."
"Hahaha, if that is the case, then we are acquaintances.
Forget it, I, Jiang He, will take responsibility for this matter! "Jiang He said this, patting his chest with his hand, putting on a look of righteousness.
He was taking advantage of the situation, how could he really report this matter.
After reporting it, the clan's evaluation of him would still drop.
He might as well sell a favor to Fang Yuan, and as for the death of Old Man Wang's family, he could just report it as a wild beast attack.
Who told this old man Wang to be so unconventional, moving out of the village and building a wooden house here to live in solitude!
Jiang He was not afraid of this matter being exposed. They were just a few mortal slaves, and their lives were as cheap as grass. If they died, then so be it. Even if the clan found out he was hiding it, they would not care about such a small matter.
"It is just that junior, you have not left the academy yet, and do not have my Gu Master clothes.
Otherwise, when that Wang Er saw this clothes, he would know your identity as a Gu Master, and why would he offend you?
Junior, you are a smart person, don't you think so? Hehe. "Jiang He said again.
Fang Yuan's gaze flashed. Jiang He's words were subtle, but in fact he was warning himself — don't run out of the academy to wander around, and in the future, it would be best not to kill people and cause trouble in the area he was in charge of.
"Then thank you senior for your advice." Fang Yuan cupped his fist and bowed, saying goodbye to Jiang He, and directly left.
S-REV-094.summary: Fang Yuan questions the two remaining hunters about Old Man Wang's family, confirming all are dead. The hunters, fearing for their lives, slander Old Man Wang to appease Fang Yuan. Suddenly, a Rank two Gu Master, Jiang He, arrives and interrogates Fang Yuan about the massacre. Fang Yuan openly admits his actions, causing Jiang He to initially praise him before attempting to extort Fang Yuan by citing clan assessments. Fang Yuan, recognizing the ploy, deflects Jiang He's demands by revealing his own Guyue clan identity and notorious reputation from his brother, Jiang Ya. Jiang He, realizing Fang Yuan is not easily intimidated and seeing an opportunity to gain favor, relents and offers to cover up the incident, warning Fang Yuan to be more discreet in the future.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan gains physical and combat experience from hunting the wild boar, demonstrating his tactical prowess and efficient use of Gu worms.
Fang Yuan demonstrates advanced combat tactics against wild boars, leveraging knowledge of their weaknesses and his Gu worm abilities.
Fang Yuan understands the primeval essence consumption of Gu worms and the limitations of his current equipment.
Fang Yuan's strength has increased significantly, allowing him to lift a wild boar, a direct result of using the White Boar Gu.
Fang Yuan uses his knowledge and experience to decipher the beast skin map, identifying dangerous areas and puzzling symbols.
Fang Yuan reflects on his previous life, comparing his current progress and the cultivation levels of his peers.
Fang Yuan prioritizes inheriting the Flower Wine Monk's strength over immediate academy rewards, understanding the long-term benefits of a low profile.

Old Man Wang is revealed to have intentionally marked the beast skin map misleadingly, likely to lead potential inheritors like Fang Yuan to their death via a King Boar, as a form of indirect revenge for his son.
The aperture is where Gu Masters store and activate their Gu worms and cultivate primeval essence.
Leads to the location of the Flower Wine Monk's strength inheritance, currently blocked by a massive rock.

S-REV-095.prose:
Chapter 72 In the dark night sky, the moon hung high up like a silver plate, shedding moonlight like water. In the summer wind, the dense forest lightly stretched out its thick green leaves, and the waterfall flowed, but it could not cover up the noise of sandalwood crickets. Fang Yuan stepped on the lush green grass, quietly approaching a wild boar. This wild boar was burying its head, huffing and puffing as it dug into the green mud on the ground, looking for worms in the grass and mud. Wild boars were omnivorous animals. Not only did they eat worms, they also stole bird eggs, and were good at preying on wild rabbits, mice, and even venomous creatures like snakes and scorpions. Fang Yuan slowly approached this wild boar from behind. Under the bright moonlight, the wild boar's grey and black fur could be clearly seen. Its body was strong and sturdy, its limbs thick and short. The mane on its back was long and stiff, and its ears also had sparse fur, standing upright like needles. It was on all fours, and each foot had four toes, but only the middle two were on the ground. Its tail was thin and short, occasionally swinging it to chase away the surrounding flying mosquitoes. Suddenly, it stopped digging into the soil to eat, and raised its head. At the same time, its pair of erect, pointy ears quickly trembled a few times. Although Fang Yuan stopped in time, this wild boar still discovered him and quickly turned around, letting out a warning growl. Fang Yuan was not surprised. Wild animals were not like domestic animals, they were all very alert. Especially wild boars, their sense of smell was very sensitive, and they could often find well-hidden nests. Even if this wild boar did not hear anything, when Fang Yuan was within a hundred meters, it would be able to smell Fang Yuan's scent, and similarly sense Fang Yuan's presence. Although Fang Yuan now had five Gu worms on him, the Spring Autumn Cicada, Liquor worm, Moonlight Gu, Little Light Gu, and White Boar Gu, his equipment was not reasonable or complete. If he had a Qi Lock Gu that could conceal his scent, and a Silent Steps Gu that could conceal his footsteps, he would be able to silently get within ten steps of the wild boar. However, with the addition of these two Gu worms, Fang Yuan would have to raise seven Gu worms. The consumption of Yuan stone would be too great, and it would be difficult to support.

Ordinary Gu Masters could only feed four to five Gu worms of the same rank. Thus, Gu Masters often did not move alone, but formed groups of five, with at least three people. Within the team, there would be someone in charge of scouting, someone in charge of advancing, someone in charge of attacking, someone in charge of healing, and someone in charge of defending. Fang Yuan did not stop and continued to approach the wild boar. The wild boar growled, a lock of white mane visibly standing up on its neck, a symbol of its agitation. Finally, when Fang Yuan approached and broke the bottom line of the wild boar's heart, the wild boar's front legs dug the ground three times, then it opened its strong four legs, lowered its head, and rushed towards Fang Yuan. Its upper canine teeth were exposed, flipping upwards, forming two snow-white fangs. Under the moonlight, the fangs shone with a cold light, piercing towards Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan did not have any defensive Gu worms. If he was pierced by these fangs, his stomach would be pierced, and even his intestines would be pierced. At that time, even if he did not die, he would be heavily injured. "Moonlight Gu." Fang Yuan's face was calm, and with a thought, the Moonlight Gu residing in his right palm immediately absorbed primeval essence, emitting a faint blue moonlight that reflected the moonlight in the night sky. The wild boar rushed over, and Fang Yuan's right palm met it head-on. With a swoosh, the moonblade flew out, hitting the wild boar's face, and immediately blood splattered. The wild boar howled in pain, and turned its anger into motivation, charging even faster. In the blink of an eye, it was only a few steps away from Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan nimbly leaped to the side, rolling on the ground and flipping sideways! The wild boar rushed straight past him, and with a bang, it directly hit a small tree behind Fang Yuan. The small tree was only as thick as an adult's arm. After being hit by the wild boar, it immediately suffered a devastating blow, and the entire tree trunk broke apart, growing into two sections. Fang Yuan stood up, quickly approaching the wild boar, and at the same time, his right hand continuously swung the moonblade. The faint blue moonblade drew a straight line in the air, shooting towards the wild boar.

On the wild boar's black and gray fur, several thin and long wounds immediately appeared. The wounds were very deep, and scarlet blood continuously flowed out. Fang Yuan used his high-grade primeval essence to activate the moonblade, and could instantly cut through the hardest bones of the human body. But on this wild boar, it could only cause flesh wounds, and could not harm the bones. A small wild boar was already so tough, and the harsh living environment of this world was evident! The wild boar growled, and once again rushed towards Fang Yuan. As it ran, the bloody wounds on its body continuously tore open, and the boiling hot blood flowed out like it was free. Fang Yuan used the same trick again, and with another flip, he dodged its attack. Although the wild boar was tough, and had a fierce momentum, it had a weakness, and that was its weak ability to change directions. The faster it was, the harder it was to change directions. This way, almost every attack would be in a straight line. As long as the Gu Master was brave and careful, it was not hard to dodge. Swoosh swoosh swoosh. Every time the wild boar rushed over, Fang Yuan would swing his hand a few moonblades. This added new wounds on top of its old ones, and the angrier it got, the more blood it lost. After a few times, its movements slowed down, and its roars revealed a sense of weakness. "Little Light Gu." This time, Fang Yuan not only activated the Moonlight Gu, but also mobilized his primeval essence, injecting it into the Little Light Gu. After the Moonlight Gu was refined, it stayed in Fang Yuan's right palm, turning into a light blue crescent pattern. After the Little Light Gu was refined, it also stayed in his right palm, forming a milky white pentagram pattern. At this time, dark green primeval essence was injected into the two Gu at the same time. The Moonlight Gu emitted eerie blue moonlight, while the Little Light Gu emitted a milky white light. The milky white light blended into the moonlight, and the originally small moonlight immediately doubled in size.

"Go." Fang Yuan slashed with his right hand, and an enlarged moonblade flew out. The moonblade created by the Moonlight Gu alone was only the size of a palm. But with the help of the Little Light Gu, this moonblade doubled in size, and its attack power also doubled! Swoosh! The moonblade hit the wild boar's neck, and instantly sank into its black grey fur. Then it flew out three to four meters from the other end, and quickly dissipated in the air. Puchi … The wild boar stood on the spot, and froze for a moment. Then, blood gushed out like a rapid scarlet fountain. It fell to the ground, half of its head cut off, and was washed away by the gushing blood. Only a small piece of skin and flesh remained. A thick stench of blood assaulted his nostrils. Fang Yuan did not dare to delay, and pointed at the wild boar on the ground. The White Boar Gu that was residing in his aperture immediately turned into a milky white light, and shot into the wild boar's body. Fang Yuan stood on the spot, his face filled with nervousness and vigilance. Although the beast skin map indicated that this area was relatively safe, but there were always accidents in nature. What if a fierce beast was attracted by the stench of blood? After a while, the White Boar Gu flew back shakily. The wild boar had already lost more than half its original weight, and only its grey fur was left, as well as its innards. As for the wild boar's meat, most of it was eaten by the White Boar Gu. But the strange thing was, even though the White Boar Gu ate pork that was a thousand times bigger than itself, its body size did not change at all. Not even a drop of blood was on it, and it was still in that milky white ladybug form. "After eating this, I'll come back five days later to slaughter the boar."
S-REV-095.summary: Fang Yuan stealthily approaches a wild boar in the moonlit forest. Despite the boar's keen senses, Fang Yuan initiates combat using his Moonlight Gu, inflicting wounds. He skillfully dodges its charges, wearing it down with moonblades. After a prolonged fight, he uses an enlarged moonblade (with Little Light Gu) to decapitate the boar, then uses the White Boar Gu to consume its meat.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan learns the precise duration and effects of the White Boar Gu's strength transformation, including the onset of severe pain if overused.

C-REV-01.transition: Returns to the academy dormitory to cultivate

S-REV-096.prose:
Fang Yuan kept the White Boar Gu, but did not leave immediately. Instead, he took out a knife, and cut off the two tusks of the wild boar. On the wild boar's body, there were three things that were worth a bit of money. The first was the pork, the second was the fur, and the third was the tusks. But now, the wild boar's meat was almost all eaten up by the White Boar Gu. The fur was also full of cuts from the moonblade, and even if it was taken off, there was not much meaning. Only this pair of tusks had some value. It could be used as food for some Gu worms that ate teeth, or as an item for some Gu worms to advance. Fang Yuan hid this pair of tusks in the secret cave in the rock crevice, and returned to the academy dormitory. He did not sleep immediately, but sat cross-legged on the bed, and started to cultivate. In the aperture, the primeval sea rose and fell, the tides rising and falling. Fang Yuan was now a middle stage Gu Master, and after using the Liquor worm to refine it, he obtained upper stage primeval essence. Thus, ordinary people of the same age would have middle stage pale green primeval essence, but Fang Yuan's primeval essence was upper stage dark green. But after killing a wild boar, Fang Yuan's primeval essence was left with 23%. A Rank one Gu Master's battle strength was not very strong. Or it could be said that nature's environment was too harsh. Although the moonblade could break bones, but to kill a normal wild boar, Fang Yuan had to use 20% of his upper stage primeval essence. "White Boar Gu." He closed his eyes, and his mind entered the aperture. In the aperture, a dark green primeval essence rushed upwards, and poured into the White Boar Gu's body. The White Boar Gu immediately let out a dazzling white light, and the white light shone on Fang Yuan's body. If seen from the outside, Fang Yuan's body was emitting a faint white light from the inside out. Every inch of Fang Yuan's skin, every muscle, was bathed in this white light.

A numb and itchy feeling surged in Fang Yuan's heart. The white light transformed Fang Yuan's muscles, allowing the strength to enter his body bit by bit, and from then on, it would stay there, never to be lost. But after a while, this numb feeling turned into pain. This kind of pain, at first it was numb like being electrocuted, and then it turned into an excruciating pain, as if every muscle was cut by a knife! Fang Yuan hurriedly stopped the White Boar Gu. Going too far is as bad as not going far enough. The White Boar Gu could not be overused, and could only be used for 15 minutes a day. After this time, it would cause pain, and it would become more and more intense. If he forcefully used it now, he might even die from the pain! ================================================== Chapter 73 Time flew by, and in the blink of an eye, it was already the middle of June. In the summer night, the golden moon hung high in the sky, illuminating the green mountains. The wind blew, and the leaves and moonlight floated together. The cicadas chirped and frogs drummed together. Occasionally, there would be a wolf howl, coming from afar and echoing on the green mountains. At a riverbank, the stream washed out a white smooth rock. Beside the riverbank, a battle was going on. A wild boar was covered in deep wounds. It kicked with its four legs and charged at Fang Yuan again. Blood spurted from its wounds, leaving a bright red mark. Fang Yuan did not panic at all as he fought. This wild boar was already seriously injured and on the verge of death, but it was precisely this state that made wild beasts the most dangerous. They would burst forth with the last light of their lives, becoming even crazier and more difficult to deal with. If one was not careful, they would tumble and have their intestines crushed by their fangs.
S-REV-096.summary: After securing the boar's tusks in his secret cave, Fang Yuan returns to his dormitory to cultivate. He uses the White Boar Gu to enhance his strength, experiencing intense physical transformation that transitions from numbness to excruciating pain, forcing him to stop. He reflects on his primeval essence level and the harshness of the world, acknowledging the limitations of his Gu worms.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan demonstrates the ability to physically overpower a wild boar, a significant increase in his raw strength.

S-REV-097.prose:
A numb and itchy feeling surged in Fang Yuan's heart. The white light transformed Fang Yuan's muscles, allowing the strength to enter his body bit by bit, and from then on, it would stay there, never to be lost. But after a while, this numb feeling turned into pain. This kind of pain, at first it was numb like being electrocuted, and then it turned into an excruciating pain, as if every muscle was cut by a knife! Fang Yuan hurriedly stopped the White Boar Gu. Going too far is as bad as not going far enough. The White Boar Gu could not be overused, and could only be used for 15 minutes a day. After this time, it would cause pain, and it would become more and more intense. If he forcefully used it now, he might even die from the pain! ================================================== Chapter 73 Time flew by, and in the blink of an eye, it was already the middle of June. In the summer night, the golden moon hung high in the sky, illuminating the green mountains. The wind blew, and the leaves and moonlight floated together. The cicadas chirped and frogs drummed together. Occasionally, there would be a wolf howl, coming from afar and echoing on the green mountains. At a riverbank, the stream washed out a white smooth rock. Beside the riverbank, a battle was going on. A wild boar was covered in deep wounds. It kicked with its four legs and charged at Fang Yuan again. Blood spurted from its wounds, leaving a bright red mark. Fang Yuan did not panic at all as he fought. This wild boar was already seriously injured and on the verge of death, but it was precisely this state that made wild beasts the most dangerous. They would burst forth with the last light of their lives, becoming even crazier and more difficult to deal with. If one was not careful, they would tumble and have their intestines crushed by their fangs.

Fang Yuan's expression was calm, and his dark eyes flashed with a cold light under the moonlight. He had five hundred years of experience. On one hand, he was immersed in the battle, and on the other hand, a part of his mind was out of the battle, constantly vigilant of his surroundings. There were several times when he was hunting wild boars, and other creatures came to disturb him. Once, it was a wild boar, a few times it was a wild wolf, and even a stray tiger. As time passed, the wild boar's attack finally slowed down. Fang Yuan's eyes lit up. He suddenly took a few steps and suddenly approached the wild boar. Then, he lowered his body and lifted the wild boar. "Ha!" Fang Yuan shouted, his face flushed red. He used his hands to lift the wild boar high up. The wild boar struggled weakly. Fang Yuan's body swayed, and he used all his strength to throw the wild boar. With a muffled bang, the wild boar was smashed into a huge rock on the riverbank. It howled miserably, accompanied by the crisp sound of ribs breaking. It fell from the huge rock, and hot blood gushed out from its ears, nose, and mouth. It struggled a few more times, and finally stopped breathing. The surroundings returned to calm. The river gurgled, carrying the scarlet pig's blood into the distance. "With my current strength, I can already carry a pig! Let's try the boulder in the tunnel tonight. "Fang Yuan stood in the same spot, panting heavily.

There was a hint of excitement in his eyes. These days, he had been using the White Boar Gu to reflect his body and increase his strength. He could clearly feel that his strength was getting stronger and stronger. In the past, he could only use the Crescent Blade to fight the wild boar. But now, he could even carry the wild boar. His strength had grown by leaps and bounds. Of course, the White Boar Gu would not increase Fang Yuan's strength limitlessly, its limit was the strength of one boar. At this limit, he could no longer use the White Boar Gu to increase his strength. "I can carry a wild boar now, but that doesn't mean I can wrestle with a pig. It was just like how a strong man could carry another strong man, but there might not be a difference in strength between the two men. My strength can still continue to grow. " After feeding all the boar meat to the White Boar Gu, Fang Yuan used his knife to remove the boar's teeth. Finally, he cut up the already damaged skin of the wild boar before going to the secret cave in the rock crack. As for the boar's corpse, he did not need to deal with it. In the summer night, wild beasts roamed about frequently. Not long later, some wild beasts would smell the blood and rush over to clear the area for Fang Yuan. Taking a step back, even if someone found out, it was not a problem. The wounds on the boar's body were 'processed' by Fang Yuan with his knife, and there were no traces of the Crescent Blade attack. Returning to the secret cave shrouded in scarlet light, Fang Yuan threw the two wild boar teeth to a corner. The wild boar teeth collided with each other, creating a crisp sound. In this corner, there was already a small pile of wild boar teeth. These were the results of Fang Yuan's recent hunting. Fang Yuan went straight into the tunnel, once again arriving at the bottom of the tunnel.
S-REV-097.summary: Weeks later, Fang Yuan is seen battling another wild boar by a riverbank. This time, his increased strength allows him to physically lift and smash the boar against a rock, killing it directly rather than relying solely on Gu worms. He notes his significant improvement and anticipates using his enhanced strength to tackle the boulder guarding the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan realizes the immense strength required to move the rock blocking the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, indicating his current strength is insufficient.
Fang Yuan deciphers that Old Man Wang intentionally included deceptive markings on the beast skin map, specifically a 'King Boar' area, likely a trap for his son's avengers.
Fang Yuan identifies new, unexplained red circles on the beast skin map, indicating further mysteries or important locations.
Fang Yuan acknowledges that his peers, Guyue Fangzheng, Mo Chen, and Cheng, are catching up and will likely surpass him in cultivation stages soon due to their talent and clan support.
Serves as a clandestine storage for Fang Yuan's collected items and a gateway to the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.

S-REV-098.prose:
There was a hint of excitement in his eyes. These days, he had been using the White Boar Gu to reflect his body and increase his strength. He could clearly feel that his strength was getting stronger and stronger. In the past, he could only use the Crescent Blade to fight the wild boar. But now, he could even carry the wild boar. His strength had grown by leaps and bounds. Of course, the White Boar Gu would not increase Fang Yuan's strength limitlessly, its limit was the strength of one boar. At this limit, he could no longer use the White Boar Gu to increase his strength. "I can carry a wild boar now, but that doesn't mean I can wrestle with a pig. It was just like how a strong man could carry another strong man, but there might not be a difference in strength between the two men. My strength can still continue to grow. " After feeding all the boar meat to the White Boar Gu, Fang Yuan used his knife to remove the boar's teeth. Finally, he cut up the already damaged skin of the wild boar before going to the secret cave in the rock crack. As for the boar's corpse, he did not need to deal with it. In the summer night, wild beasts roamed about frequently. Not long later, some wild beasts would smell the blood and rush over to clear the area for Fang Yuan. Taking a step back, even if someone found out, it was not a problem. The wounds on the boar's body were 'processed' by Fang Yuan with his knife, and there were no traces of the Crescent Blade attack. Returning to the secret cave shrouded in scarlet light, Fang Yuan threw the two wild boar teeth to a corner. The wild boar teeth collided with each other, creating a crisp sound. In this corner, there was already a small pile of wild boar teeth. These were the results of Fang Yuan's recent hunting. Fang Yuan went straight into the tunnel, once again arriving at the bottom of the tunnel.

Walking in the tunnel, the sound of his footsteps echoed in the tunnel. His vision was filled with a dim red light. Nothing had changed, the huge rock was still there, quietly lying in front of him. As for the hole where he dug out the Earth Treasury Flower, it had already been filled up by Fang Yuan. Drink. Fang Yuan came to the front of the huge rock, raising both his hands and pushing with all his might. However, his face swelled up, and he used all his strength, but the huge rock did not move an inch. "Right now, if I use all my strength, I can barely lift a wild boar. But this huge rock is at least the weight of five or six wild boars. It's not strange that I can't push it. The Flower Wine Monk's inheritance of strength is not that easy! "Fang Yuan's eyes flashed, calculating in his heart. He was not discouraged, and went out of the tunnel, returning to the secret room above. Taking out the bamboo tube leaning against the wall, Fang Yuan sat cross-legged on the floor, opened the lid of the bamboo tube, and poured out the animal skin map and bamboo paper. He opened up the animal skin map, and began to memorize it. From time to time, he would use his finger to draw shallow marks on the ground, to help him memorize. From the day he obtained this map, he had been doing this. Fang Yuan did not have a storage Gu, and could not carry the animal skin map with him. It would be very inconvenient to carry a bamboo tube on his back in battle. Thus, Fang Yuan put in a lot of effort, preparing to memorize the animal skin map in his mind. Although some things are troublesome, it is best to do it. In a person's life, those who are afraid of trouble and do not actively solve it will often end up in a troublesome situation. This logic, Fang Yuan understood in his previous life.

"When I was young, my memory was really good. Right now, I have already memorized most of the map in my mind. If I was old, I would probably forget it while memorizing it. Hehehe … of course, if I had a bookworm, I would feed it this animal skin map, and from then on, as long as I do not lose the bookworm, I would always remember this map clearly. " Fang Yuan had the Liquor worm and the White Boar Gu, and began to covet the bookworm. The bookworm's value was similar to the Liquor worm and the White Boar Gu. They were all rare Rank one Gu worms, and had a high market price. Moreover, they were always out of stock. In his previous life, Fang Yuan did not get the Liquor worm or the White Boar Gu, but he unexpectedly got a bookworm. This bookworm continued to advance, and accompanied him for a whole sixty years. "Forget it, bookworms have always been rare, and I won't be able to get one in a short period of time. Actually, after my rebirth, my current situation is many times better than the same period in my previous life. At this time in my previous life, I was still at Rank one initial stage, while others like Fangzheng, Chicheng, and Mobei had already reached upper stage, leaving me far behind. "Fang Yuan was not the kind of person to waste time on an insignificant problem, and felt relieved after thinking about it. He was quite satisfied with his current progress. He was at middle stage, and so were the others. With C grade talent, it was not easy to keep these A grade and B grade talents at the same age. Among them, the Liquor worm played a huge role. Other than that, it was Fang Yuan's rich experience in cultivation that aided them. There was also another reason, which was him. He robbed and extorted all his classmates, and under the guidance of their elders, these people worked hard to train their martial arts. Thus, unknowingly, it took away their energy, and reduced the time they had to nurture their aperture walls. This caused their cultivation in this life to be slightly weaker than in Fang Yuan's previous life.

But even so, they were not far from upper stage. The early stage of a Gu Master's cultivation was relatively easy, and results could be seen in a short period of time. Especially Guyue Fangzheng, Guyue Mo Chen, and Guyue Cheng, their cultivation was already showing signs of surpassing Fang Yuan. As they continued to cultivate, these three, be it their talent, or the strong support behind them, had already started to show an obvious advantage. Fang Yuan used the Liquor worm to create a difficult lead, but now it was almost non-existent. Of course, this was also because he had been hunting recently, using the White Boar Gu to increase his strength, and diverting a lot of his energy and time. "According to this estimation, not long after, someone will advance to upper stage first. The first upper stage person will get thirty Yuan stones as a reward. But I don't intend to fight for this reward. "Fang Yuan had already made his decision. If he temporarily abandoned the White Boar Gu, and focused on advancing to upper stage, he might have a chance of winning. But this was not what Fang Yuan wanted. Thirty Yuan stones might be good, but he did not lack Yuan stones. The main reason was that he needed to keep a low profile, and hide himself. Only by reducing the attention of others, could he safely inherit the Flower Wine Monk's strength inheritance. This was his main goal. "The academy's various rewards are just to motivate the students to train harder, and is also a part of the clan system. It's not wise to be entangled in such petty gains. " Fang Yuan retracted his thoughts, and looked at the beast skin map again. The beast skin map had two sides, the front side recorded the day, and the back side recorded the night situation. On it, all sorts of colored lines crisscrossed. These lines, whether they were straight lines or curved lines, all had a special meaning. Only Old Man Wang knew, but he was already dead.

But even if he was alive, and forced to explain, he might not be able to speak the truth. These days, Fang Yuan relied on his own knowledge and experience, and compared it to the bamboo paper, and almost succeeded in deciphering everything. "The red cross should represent danger, a forbidden area. This area with the red cross is faintly surrounded by wild boars, it should be a King Boar. With my current strength, meeting a King Boar would mean death. Hmph! " Fang Yuan thought of Old Man Wang, and could not help but snort coldly. The red cross in this area was not on the bamboo paper. If Fang Yuan really believed this bamboo paper, he would probably die under the fangs of King Boar one day. This Old Man Wang was really shrewd. He wanted to avenge his son, but did not do it himself, and wanted to borrow the strength of King Boar. In this way, if he killed Fang Yuan, he could still stay out of it. "But what does the red circle in these three places represent?" Fang Yuan was puzzled. This was the last point of doubt on the beast skin map. The three red circles were marked in three very remote places, and at the same time, they were very far away from each other, and there were not many beasts in the surroundings. It was considered a relatively safe place in the wilderness. "The red cross represents the forbidden area, so what does the red circle represent?" Fang Yuan fell into deep thought again. "Usually, red is the most eye-catching. Old Man Wang marked these three places with red circles, which means that these three places are very important to him. It is a pity that these three places are too far away, or else I would know it myself.
S-REV-098.summary: Fang Yuan returns to his secret cave, depositing more wild boar teeth. He enters the tunnel and attempts to move the massive rock blocking the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance, but fails, realizing he needs even more strength. He then meticulously studies and memorizes the beast skin map, uncovering Old Man Wang's deceptive markings and pondering the significance of new red circles. He reflects on his peers' cultivation progress, acknowledging their impending advancement despite his own unique advantages.

continuityMutations.content: Is the first student to advance to upper stage cultivation.
Recognizes the mid-year assessment has changed from his past life, confirming the 'butterfly effect' of his actions.
Plans to use the mid-year assessment to build a better image with the clan elders.
Believes he has finally surpassed his brother, Fang Yuan.
Realizes the mid-year assessment has changed from his previous life, indicating a 'butterfly effect', and plans to use it to improve his public image without compromising his independence.
Confirms the mid-year assessment has changed from honey collection to boar hunting.
Considers using the wild boar tusks from the secret cave for the assessment, but decides against it due to risk, then reconsiders for image building.
Understands the necessity of appearing to integrate into the family system to avoid being targeted by the higher-ups.
Inferred that letting Mobei, Chicheng, and Fangzheng go during extortion was misinterpreted by the Academy Elder as a sign of him 'lowering his head' to the family.
Discovered a hidden treehouse with a portrait of himself, leading him to deduce that Wang Da faked his death, became a demonic Gu Master, and is seeking revenge.
Affirms his decision to kill Old Man Wang and his family was correct, as it prevented them from becoming obstacles and ensured his control over the situation.
Announces the mid-year assessment details.
Believes Fang Yuan's decision not to extort key students signifies him 'lowering his head' and integrating into the family system.
Orders close attention to the safety of Fangzheng, Chicheng, and Mobei during the assessment.
Is unsatisfied that Fangzheng surpassed him in cultivation.
Is gloomy about Fangzheng's progress despite his own efforts and connections, attributing it to A-grade aptitude.
Students are rewarded with Yuan stones for advancement.
Mid-year and end-of-year assessments are held to temper students.

S-REV-099.prose:
Chapter 74
The summer was scorching, the mountain winds were warm, and Qing Mao Mountain was steaming hot.
In the blink of an eye, it was already the end of June.
"Guyue Fangzheng!" In the academy, the elder called out his name.
Guyue Fangzheng walked out from his seat, and came in front of the academy elder.
Under the envious gazes of his peers, Fangzheng received a heavy bag of Yuan stones.
"Fangzheng, you are the first to advance to upper stage, this is your reward. You did well, continue to work hard." The academy elder smiled happily, and patted Fangzheng's shoulder.
Fangzheng grunted, his face full of excitement.
With excitement, he received the bag of money and walked back to his seat.
"I finally did it.
First to advance to upper stage, brother, did you see that? I finally won against you for once! "
His eyes were shining, and his gaze swept towards Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan was still lying on the table, sleeping soundly.
Last night, he hunted a wild boar, and after returning to the dormitory, he used the White Boar Gu to illuminate his body, and absorbed the natural primeval essence from the Yuan stone, and used the Liquor worm to refine it.
Finally, he used his upper stage primeval essence to nourish his aperture walls.
He worked all the way until dawn.
He hurriedly ate his breakfast, and once class started, he fell asleep on the table.
He was too tired, and a Gu Master's cultivation could not replace sleep.
"Hmph, even if you don't admit it, pretending to be asleep is the truth.
Brother, I have finally surpassed you!
This is the first time, and there will be a second time, and a third time! "
Fangzheng clenched his fists. This success meant a lot to him.
He finally tore a hole in the heavy haze that Fang Yuan had shrouded his heart for a long time, and revealed a ray of light.
Although this ray of light was small and thin, it gave Fangzheng unlimited hope and encouragement!
"Hmph, I can't believe I lost to Fangzheng." Guyue Mobei sat on his seat with his arms crossed, feeling a little unsatisfied.
"Is this the advantage of Grade A? Damn it …" Guyue Cheng's face was gloomy. As he cultivated, he deeply felt the benefits of having an excellent aptitude.
Even though he had his grandfather, Guyue, to support him, and he had tried his best, he was still left behind by Fangzheng.
"If I had a Liquor worm and grandfather's help, I might be able to defeat Fangzheng!
The detestable Fang brothers!
Younger brother is an A grade, so he's a notch above us.
Although her brother was a C-class, he had a liquor bug.
Why are the two of them taking all the good things in this world? "Guyue felt very indignant.
"This time, Fangzheng is the first to break through to the Advanced level."
"That's right, who asked him to have an A grade aptitude."
"Yeah, even Mobei, Chicheng and Fang Yuan lost to Fangzheng.
Fangzheng is now the only one who can take the lead. "
"Fang Yuan only has a Liquor worm, but he's too disappointing.
He's so dispirited all day, even sleeping in class. He might as well give me his Liquor worm. "
The surrounding students discussed, expressing their unwillingness, helplessness and envy.
The academy elder called out names one by one, and students continuously walked up to receive their Yuan stone allowance before returning to their seats.
"Everyone, quiet down." After the allowance was given out, the academy elder patted the table.
In an instant, the entire academy quietened down.
"In a flash, all of you have already mastered your second Gu worm, and even broke through to the Advanced level.
In the past half a year, all of you have studied hard, and now that you have a certain level of foundation, it's time for you to temper yourselves in the wild.
A real battle isn't a battle between grass puppets and wooden puppets. "
"Next is the notice for the mid-year assessment. Three days later, the mid-year assessment will be held, and all students must participate!
The content of the assessment is to hunt a wild boar.
The number of wild boar tusks collected will be recorded, and the more tusks collected, the better the result.
After the assessment, each wild boar tusk can be exchanged for ten Yuan stone.
Also, teams are allowed to hunt. "
Once the academy elder said this, the entire academy was in an uproar.
"It's finally time for the mid-year assessment!"
"Every batch of students will study in the academy for a year, and there will be a mid-year assessment and an end-of-year assessment.
Looking at the time, it should be the mid-year assessment soon. "
"The content of every batch's assessment is different. To think that this year's mid-year assessment is to hunt wild boar tusks."
"What should we do?
My talent is only D grade, and my vital Gu is not an offensive Gu like the Moonlight Gu, how can I hunt wild boars? "
"Didn't you hear it just now? The elder said that teams are allowed to hunt.
Those of us with poor talent, or lacking Gu, can help each other and work together!
When the time comes, we'll just split the boar's tusks among us. "
"Each wild boar tusk can be exchanged for ten Yuan stone, and this is the academy's incentive for us to hunt more wild boars.
According to the market price, one Yuan stone can be exchanged for twenty wild boar tusks. "
The students all had different expressions, some were happy, some were worried, some were ready to go, and some were calling friends.
Even Fang Yuan was slightly moved.
"It's changed!
I clearly remember that in my previous life, the mid-year assessment was to collect wild honey.
Who would have thought that it would be changed to hunt wild boar tusks.
Is this the butterfly effect? "
A butterfly flapped its wings, and it could cause a storm on the other side of the ocean.
Small variables, through layers upon layers of influence, could finally brew into a huge change.
Since his rebirth, Fang Yuan had made many changes, and his current situation was different from his previous life.
In his previous life, he had already been left far behind by Fangzheng and the rest, but in this life, he stubbornly stood in the first echelon of students.
In his previous life, he did not kill Jia Jin Sheng, and did not even see Jia Jin Sheng's face.
But in this life, not only did he kill Jia Jin Sheng, he even dug out a deeper secret of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
These changes, were like a butterfly flapping its wings, and indirectly began to affect the surroundings.
The change in the contents of the mid-year examination was only the first obvious sign.
"If I continue to influence things like this, will the history that is about to happen change beyond recognition?
If that happens, the advantage of my rebirth will be greatly weakened. "
Fang Yuan looked calm on the surface, but he sighed in his heart.
A sense of helplessness and urgency shrouded his heart, but he quickly adjusted and recovered.
"No matter what, since it has already happened, there is no way to stop it.
I need to actively change myself. Even if everything becomes unrecognizable in the end, I won't slow down the pace of my growth because of these things! "
"In my previous life, I faced an unknown future, don't tell me that I lack courage in this life?
Hehe, even if the world is full of thorns, I will still cut through them, and open a path of blood! "
"Every fang can be exchanged for ten Yuan stone, this price is really high.
Should I sell the pile of wild boar fangs in the secret cave?
If I take out the wild boar fang, will it attract suspicion?
No, maybe according to the current political situation of the Guyue family, if I publicly throw out these fang, I might be able to gain something from the fire. "
Fang Yuan shook his head, this was too risky.
If he really threw out these wild beast fangs, what would he get?
A hundred plus Yuan stone?
"Wait, Yuan stone is not important.
Maybe I can use this chance, to build up my image. "As Fang Yuan thought of this, his eyes flashed.
What he needed was to silently make a fortune, and keep a low profile.
If the secret of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance was discovered, he might not even be able to keep his life.
But his current position, was a little awkward.
He was the opposite of all his classmates, and was outside of the system. In the hearts of the higher ups, he was a rebellious, dissatisfied, and cold minded C grade youth.
This was not a good impression, it was equivalent to being labeled as a disloyal person.
But the family needed loyalty, in reality, any organization needed loyalty.
No matter which world, loyalty was one of the values that was promoted with great fanfare.
Loyalty to the family, loyalty to the country, loyalty to the leader, loyalty to love, loyalty to friendship, etc.
As Fang Yuan's cultivation increased, the higher ups would pay more attention to him, and at the same time, when necessary, the family would take strong measures against Fang Yuan.
When that time comes, Fang Yuan would really be in a passive position.
Fang Yuan did not like to be in a passive position, he liked to have the initiative firmly in his hands.
Because of the previous series of events, Fang Yuan could only move around and borrow their strength to create this impression, it was also a way to protect himself against the current situation.
Now that there was no problem in protecting himself, Fang Yuan needed to become stronger!
So, he needed to change this impression, to let the higher ups think that he had already lowered his head and joined the family system.
But this change could not be too sudden, it would make the higher ups suspicious.
More importantly, this joining system was just a facade, Fang Yuan could not really join, he would be controlled and restricted by others.
He had too many secrets on him.
He needed a lot of free space, so in reality, he was still a lone ranger.
The mid-year examination was a good opportunity for him.
"Looks like I need to do some planning, I'll start with the robbery and blackmail later." Fang Yuan's gaze was firm, everything was going according to his plan.
S-REV-099.summary: Fangzheng proudly receives Yuan stones for being the first to reach upper stage, reveling in his perceived victory over Fang Yuan, who is asleep. Other students express envy and frustration at the Fang brothers' advantages. The Academy Elder announces the mid-year assessment, which now involves hunting wild boars, a change that Fang Yuan recognizes from his previous life, prompting him to consider how to navigate this new development strategically to improve his image within the clan.

continuityMutations.content: Believes Fang Yuan's recent actions indicate he is 'lowering his head' to the family system.
Reports to the Academy Elder about Fang Yuan's actions during the extortion attempts, specifically that he let Mobei, Chicheng, and Fangzheng go without taking their Yuan stones.

S-REV-100.prose:
Chapter 75
"You said that although Fang Yuan defeated Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei in his extortion of the students, he let them go and did not take their Yuan stones?" Hearing the guard's report, the Academy Elder showed a slightly surprised expression.
"I dare not lie to you, sir. That is indeed the case." The kneeling guard immediately replied.
"Mm." The Academy Elder did not deny it and waved his hand, "I understand this matter. You may leave."
"Your subordinate will take his leave."
As the guard left, the Academy Elder immediately fell into deep thought.
Originally, he was concerned about this matter because he was worried that after Fangzheng received the thirty Yuan stones as a reward, he would be extorted by Fang Yuan.
If that was the case, then the academy's Yuan stones as a reward would have no meaning at all. They might as well give them all to Fang Yuan.
If Fang Yuan really did this, then the academy would definitely not allow it. The Academy Elder had already prepared to punish Fang Yuan severely.
But what he did not expect was that not only did Fang Yuan not have any designs on the thirty Yuan stones, he even let go of Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng.
"Fang Yuan has hundreds of Yuan stones on him. Maybe he does not care about the thirty Yuan stones, this is understandable.
But why did he give up on extorting Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng? "
The Academy Elder pondered, his furrowed brows slowly relaxing.
He somewhat understood.
Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng could be said to represent the three major powers of the family.
Fang Yuan letting go of these three people meant that he was taking the initiative to express his goodwill to the three major powers.
This could also be understood as Fang Yuan's change of heart. It was a signal that he wanted to lower his head to the family.
"This is understandable.
As he continued to train, even though Fang Yuan has the Liquor worm, it was enough for him to clearly understand the inadequacy of his C grade talent.
After causing a ruckus a few times and venting out most of his dissatisfaction and unwillingness, I'm guessing he's feeling a lot of discouragement and depression now. "
"It seems that the patriarch's words are reasonable. After all, Fang Yuan is only a fifteen-year-old boy. How can he challenge the family's system?
He has already begun to accept the modern world. When he finds his place, integrating into the family is inevitable. "
Thinking of this, the Academy Elder heaved a sigh of relief, and his mood became joyful.
Three days passed in a flash.
Soon, it was time for the mid-year exam.
"Quick, quick, quick! I've lured the wild boar here!" A youth shouted anxiously as he ran.
Both of his calves were wrapped in a circle of light green whirlwind.
It was these two whirlwinds that allowed him to surpass the speed of an ordinary person at such a young age.
However, the wild boar behind him was getting faster and faster, and the distance between them was getting closer and closer.
The scorching sun pierced through the forest and shone on the wild boar's body, illuminating its two tusks.
"The wild boar is here, pull the rope tight!"
The four youths lying in ambush suddenly pulled up the thick hemp rope hidden in the bushes, instantly forming a horse tripping rope.
The sprinting youth jumped over the tripping rope with a light leap and continued to run forward.
However, the wild boar that followed him was heavily tripped and fell on the ground, sliding five to six meters away.
"Ouch!" The four youths were also dragged by the rope and fell on the ground like the wild boar.
"Go!" The youth who was sprinting ahead had already turned around and shouted.
The few who fell on the ground crawled up in a flurry and surrounded the wild boar.
…
Crack.
A small sapling, under the wild boar's charge, directly broke its trunk and the tree crown fell to the ground.
"So close!"
Guyue Cheng wiped the cold sweat off his forehead, feeling a lingering fear, "Luckily I used the Dragonpill cricket Gu in time and jumped three meters to the left, otherwise I would have ended up like this small tree."
…
Swoosh swoosh swoosh!
The moonblades danced in the air and landed on the wild boar's body, causing thin wounds one after another.
Guyue Mo Chen's expression was excited, his eyes shining, his mind completely immersed in this battle.
Half an hour later, the wild boar lost too much blood and finally fell down.
Guyue Mo Chen breathed roughly and also sat on the ground. His body was covered in mud or green grass, and he was also sweating profusely.
"Fighting with a live wild boar is really different from training with wooden puppets and grass puppets.
I spent half an hour to kill a wild boar, I wonder how the others are doing? "
…
On a hidden hill, a temporary shed was built.
The shed resisted the scorching sun, stubbornly casting a shady shadow.
Under the shed, there were a few chairs, and the academy elder was sitting on the main seat.
Sitting beside him were all the elders of the clan.
There were also a few Gu Masters standing behind them.
In the forest around the shed, there were also some Gu Masters hiding.
At this time, there was a sudden commotion in the forest ahead.
Whoosh.
A Gu Master's figure was like a shadow, breaking out of the forest and sprinting over, before kneeling outside the shed.
"How's the situation?" The academy elder asked him.
"Reporting to Lord Elder, up until now, there are no casualties among the students." The Gu Master quickly replied.
"Not bad, not bad."
"The mid-year exam has already passed by the morning, and there are actually no injuries.
This situation is rare in previous years. "
"Looks like it's all thanks to the academy elder's teaching."
The other clan elders heard this and nodded in satisfaction, praising him.
The academy elder shook his head slightly, he knew the reason.
This was all because of Fang Yuan's sudden appearance, extorting his classmates, causing this batch of students to train hard in their basic martial arts, thus leading to the current situation.
He looked at the Gu Master kneeling on the ground and continued to ask, "So up until now, who's the one with the better results?"
The Gu Master immediately replied, "Reporting to Lord, up until now, Guyue, Fang Yuan, Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng are the top four.
Among them, Chicheng has already killed three wild boars, Fangzheng and Mobei have killed five, and Fang Yuan has the most, with eight already. "
"Oh?
I didn't expect this Fang Yuan to be in the lead for now! "
"Throughout the years, A and B grade students have actually been suppressed by a C grade. This situation is extremely rare."
"Doesn't he have the Liquor worm, which means he has upper stage green copper primeval essence. Being able to have such results is understandable."
"I believe that after this, Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng will definitely surpass him.
Although he has the Liquor worm, his primeval essence recovery speed is far from the A and B grade students' match. "
The other clan elders started to discuss.
"You may leave."
The academy elder waved his hand at the Gu Master kneeling on the ground, "Instruct the others to do their defensive work.
Especially the safety of Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei, they need to pay close attention! "
"Yes, Lord." The Gu Master retreated.
This kind of outdoor battle, for most of the students, was their first time.
Thus there was a risk, but the clan had already made arrangements.
Dozens of Rank two Gu Masters were hidden in the forest, monitoring the safety of the entire assessment.
At the same time, a few Rank three clan elders were guarding here, ready to deal with any sudden situations.
The fiery sun slowly set from the highest point in the sky, nearing the northwestern mountains.
The sunset glow was like pieces of burning clouds, this was the last warmth of the sun.
The afterglow shone on the forest, and another wild boar fell to the ground.
"Twenty-three," Fang Yuan calculated in his heart, then he squatted down and skillfully peeled off a pair of tusks.
He carried a bag on his back, and the bag was filled with many wild boar tusks.
At the same time, he had another bag, containing the tusks he had gotten from killing boars in secret.
These tusks were originally stored in the secret cave in the rock crevice, but Fang Yuan had secretly taken them out two nights ago, stored them in a bag, and buried them in a hidden place.
"I am familiar with the terrain and distribution of the wild boars. At the same time, I have high stage primeval essence to activate the Moonlight Gu, along with the Little Light Gu.
The others' efficiency in hunting boars is definitely not as high as mine.
Just with this bag on my back, I can definitely get first place.
I wonder what kind of expression the others will have when I take out another bag later?
Hehe. "
Fang Yuan looked up at the sky, it was time to take out the other bag.
At this thought, a map suddenly appeared in his mind.
These days, he had already memorized the beast skin map.
Fang Yuan was very clear of his current location. As long as he turned left and followed a mountain stream for fifteen minutes, he would reach the place where he buried the bag.
But just as he was about to move, he suddenly hesitated.
"From my current location, the nearest red circle is only five to six hundred meters away.
This is a rare opportunity, should I go there and take a look? "
Once this thought appeared, it could not be stopped.
Since he had already won, Fang Yuan still had a lot of time.
"That beast skin map has three red circles. These three places are very important to Old Man Wang.
It is also the only map mark that I can't guess, so I don't know what it means.
Let's go take a look! "
Fang Yuan naturally knew that there would be Gu Masters secretly monitoring the assessment, but he needed such a witness.
Immediately, he pretended to continue hunting wild boars, and walked into the depths of the forest.
Fifteen minutes later, he reached the red circle mark on the map.
A treehouse was hidden in the luxuriant leaves of a giant tree. If one did not look carefully, they would not be able to detect it.
"This is the temporary residence of Old Man Wang when he hunts?" Fang Yuan frowned, a suspicion rising in his heart.
He climbed into the treehouse.
When he saw the scene in the treehouse, his expression changed!
S-REV-100.summary: A guard reports to the Academy Elder that Fang Yuan, despite having extorted other students, spared Fangzheng, Mobei, and Chicheng from losing their Yuan stones. The Academy Elder, surprised, misinterprets this as Fang Yuan showing goodwill and 'lowering his head' to the family, believing Fang Yuan is beginning to accept the clan system. This perceived shift in Fang Yuan's attitude brings relief to the elder.

continuityMutations.content: Is leading the mid-year assessment in wild boar tusks.
Is tracking student performance in the assessment and is surprised by Fang Yuan's lead.
Engages in a real battle with a wild boar during the assessment.
Home to various wild beasts, including boars.
Monitored by Gu Masters during student assessments.

Chapter 75

Guyue Mo Chen's expression was excited, his eyes shining, his mind completely immersed in this battle.

Guyue Mo Chen breathed roughly and also sat on the ground. His body was covered in mud or green grass, and he was also sweating profusely.
"Fighting with a live wild boar is really different from training with wooden puppets and grass puppets.
I spent half an hour to kill a wild boar, I wonder how the others are doing? "
…
On a hidden hill, a temporary shed was built.
The shed resisted the scorching sun, stubbornly casting a shady shadow.
Under the shed, there were a few chairs, and the academy elder was sitting on the main seat.
Sitting beside him were all the elders of the clan.
There were also a few Gu Masters standing behind them.
In the forest around the shed, there were also some Gu Masters hiding.
At this time, there was a sudden commotion in the forest ahead.
Whoosh.
A Gu Master's figure was like a shadow, breaking out of the forest and sprinting over, before kneeling outside the shed.
"How's the situation?" The academy elder asked him.
"Reporting to Lord Elder, up until now, there are no casualties among the students." The Gu Master quickly replied.
"Not bad, not bad."
"The mid-year exam has already passed by the morning, and there are actually no injuries.
This situation is rare in previous years. "
"Looks like it's all thanks to the academy elder's teaching."
The other clan elders heard this and nodded in satisfaction, praising him.
The academy elder shook his head slightly, he knew the reason.
This was all because of Fang Yuan's sudden appearance, extorting his classmates, causing this batch of students to train hard in their basic martial arts, thus leading to the current situation.
He looked at the Gu Master kneeling on the ground and continued to ask, "So up until now, who's the one with the better results?"
The Gu Master immediately replied, "Reporting to Lord, up until now, Guyue, Fang Yuan, Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng are the top four.
Among them, Chicheng has already killed three wild boars, Fangzheng and Mobei have killed five, and Fang Yuan has the most, with eight already. "
"Oh?
I didn't expect this Fang Yuan to be in the lead for now! "
"Throughout the years, A and B grade students have actually been suppressed by a C grade. This situation is extremely rare."
"Doesn't he have the Liquor worm, which means he has upper stage green copper primeval essence. Being able to have such results is understandable."
"I believe that after this, Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng will definitely surpass him.
Although he has the Liquor worm, his primeval essence recovery speed is far from the A and B grade students' match. "
The other clan elders started to discuss.
"You may leave."
The academy elder waved his hand at the Gu Master kneeling on the ground, "Instruct the others to do their defensive work.
Especially the safety of Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei, they need to pay close attention! "
"Yes, Lord." The Gu Master retreated.
This kind of outdoor battle, for most of the students, was their first time.
Thus there was a risk, but the clan had already made arrangements.
Dozens of Rank two Gu Masters were hidden in the forest, monitoring the safety of the entire assessment.
At the same time, a few Rank three clan elders were guarding here, ready to deal with any sudden situations.
The fiery sun slowly set from the highest point in the sky, nearing the northwestern mountains.
The sunset glow was like pieces of burning clouds, this was the last warmth of the sun.
The afterglow shone on the forest, and another wild boar fell to the ground.
"Twenty-three," Fang Yuan calculated in his heart, then he squatted down and skillfully peeled off a pair of tusks.
He carried a bag on his back, and the bag was filled with many wild boar tusks.
At the same time, he had another bag, containing the tusks he had gotten from killing boars in secret.
These tusks were originally stored in the secret cave in the rock crevice, but Fang Yuan had secretly taken them out two nights ago, stored them in a bag, and buried them in a hidden place.
"I am familiar with the terrain and distribution of the wild boars. At the same time, I have high stage primeval essence to activate the Moonlight Gu, along with the Little Light Gu.
The others' efficiency in hunting boars is definitely not as high as mine.
Just with this bag on my back, I can definitely get first place.
I wonder what kind of expression the others will have when I take out another bag later?
Hehe. "
Fang Yuan looked up at the sky, it was time to take out the other bag.
At this thought, a map suddenly appeared in his mind.
These days, he had already memorized the beast skin map.
Fang Yuan was very clear of his current location. As long as he turned left and followed a mountain stream for fifteen minutes, he would reach the place where he buried the bag.
But just as he was about to move, he suddenly hesitated.
"From my current location, the nearest red circle is only five to six hundred meters away.
This is a rare opportunity, should I go there and take a look? "
Once this thought appeared, it could not be stopped.
Since he had already won, Fang Yuan still had a lot of time.
"That beast skin map has three red circles. These three places are very important to Old Man Wang.
It is also the only map mark that I can't guess, so I don't know what it means.
Let's go take a look! "
Fang Yuan naturally knew that there would be Gu Masters secretly monitoring the assessment, but he needed such a witness.
Immediately, he pretended to continue hunting wild boars, and walked into the depths of the forest.
Fifteen minutes later, he reached the red circle mark on the map.
A treehouse was hidden in the luxuriant leaves of a giant tree. If one did not look carefully, they would not be able to detect it.
"This is the temporary residence of Old Man Wang when he hunts?" Fang Yuan frowned, a suspicion rising in his heart.
He climbed into the treehouse.
When he saw the scene in the treehouse, his expression changed!
S-REV-101.summary: Three days later, the mid-year assessment begins in the Qing Mao Mountain Wilds, with students hunting wild boars. Various students, including Guyue Chicheng and Guyue Mo Chen, are shown engaging in the hunt. The Academy Elder, observing from a hidden shed with other clan elders, tracks student progress. Fang Yuan, having skillfully hunted numerous boars, is currently leading the assessment, secretly planning to use his hidden stash of tusks to ensure first place and further his image-building facade, while also noting the elders' underestimation of his abilities.

continuityMutations.content: Discovers a hidden treehouse containing a portrait of himself with a dagger through it, indicating a personal threat.
Deduces that Wang Da faked his death, became a demonic Gu Master, and is seeking revenge.
Faked his death three years ago and became a demonic Gu Master.
Is seeking revenge on Fang Yuan for killing his family.
Was hiding the truth about his son, Wang Da, and omitted information from the map to protect him.
Was murdered by Old Man Wang's family to prevent her from revealing Wang Da's secret.
Is revealed to have been hiding the truth about his son, Wang Da, and his activities.
Drew a map for Fang Yuan but omitted critical information to protect his son.
Is revealed to have faked his death three years ago and become a demonic Gu Master.
Is now seeking revenge on Fang Yuan for killing his family.
His ambition to roam the world and calmness before Gu Masters is attributed to his interaction with his brother, Wang Da.
One of Wang Da's secret residences.
Contains clues to Wang Da's faked death and revenge plot.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked into the depths of the forest, then climbed into a treehouse

S-REV-102.prose:
Chapter 75
"You said that although Fang Yuan defeated Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei in his extortion of the students, he let them go and did not take their Yuan stones?" Hearing the guard's report, the Academy Elder showed a slightly surprised expression.
"I dare not lie to you, sir. That is indeed the case." The kneeling guard immediately replied.
"Mm." The Academy Elder did not deny it and waved his hand, "I understand this matter. You may leave."
"Your subordinate will take his leave."
As the guard left, the Academy Elder immediately fell into deep thought.
Originally, he was concerned about this matter because he was worried that after Fangzheng received the thirty Yuan stones as a reward, he would be extorted by Fang Yuan.
If that was the case, then the academy's Yuan stones as a reward would have no meaning at all. They might as well give them all to Fang Yuan.
If Fang Yuan really did this, then the academy would definitely not allow it. The Academy Elder had already prepared to punish Fang Yuan severely.
But what he did not expect was that not only did Fang Yuan not have any designs on the thirty Yuan stones, he even let go of Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng.
"Fang Yuan has hundreds of Yuan stones on him. Maybe he does not care about the thirty Yuan stones, this is understandable.
But why did he give up on extorting Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng? "
The Academy Elder pondered, his furrowed brows slowly relaxing.
He somewhat understood.
Mobei, Chicheng and Fangzheng could be said to represent the three major powers of the family.
Fang Yuan letting go of these three people meant that he was taking the initiative to express his goodwill to the three major powers.
This could also be understood as Fang Yuan's change of heart. It was a signal that he wanted to lower his head to the family.
"This is understandable.
As he continued to train, even though Fang Yuan has the Liquor worm, it was enough for him to clearly understand the inadequacy of his C grade talent.
After causing a ruckus a few times and venting out most of his dissatisfaction and unwillingness, I'm guessing he's feeling a lot of discouragement and depression now. "
"It seems that the patriarch's words are reasonable. After all, Fang Yuan is only a fifteen-year-old boy. How can he challenge the family's system?
He has already begun to accept the modern world. When he finds his place, integrating into the family is inevitable. "
Thinking of this, the Academy Elder heaved a sigh of relief, and his mood became joyful.
Three days passed in a flash.
Soon, it was time for the mid-year exam.
"Quick, quick, quick! I've lured the wild boar here!" A youth shouted anxiously as he ran.
Both of his calves were wrapped in a circle of light green whirlwind.
It was these two whirlwinds that allowed him to surpass the speed of an ordinary person at such a young age.
However, the wild boar behind him was getting faster and faster, and the distance between them was getting closer and closer.
The scorching sun pierced through the forest and shone on the wild boar's body, illuminating its two tusks.
"The wild boar is here, pull the rope tight!"
The four youths lying in ambush suddenly pulled up the thick hemp rope hidden in the bushes, instantly forming a horse tripping rope.
The sprinting youth jumped over the tripping rope with a light leap and continued to run forward.
However, the wild boar that followed him was heavily tripped and fell on the ground, sliding five to six meters away.
"Ouch!" The four youths were also dragged by the rope and fell on the ground like the wild boar.
"Go!" The youth who was sprinting ahead had already turned around and shouted.
The few who fell on the ground crawled up in a flurry and surrounded the wild boar.
…
Crack.
A small sapling, under the wild boar's charge, directly broke its trunk and the tree crown fell to the ground.
"So close!"
Guyue Cheng wiped the cold sweat off his forehead, feeling a lingering fear, "Luckily I used the Dragonpill cricket Gu in time and jumped three meters to the left, otherwise I would have ended up like this small tree."
…
Swoosh swoosh swoosh!
The moonblades danced in the air and landed on the wild boar's body, causing thin wounds one after another.
Guyue Mo Chen's expression was excited, his eyes shining, his mind completely immersed in this battle.
Half an hour later, the wild boar lost too much blood and finally fell down.
Guyue Mo Chen breathed roughly and also sat on the ground. His body was covered in mud or green grass, and he was also sweating profusely.
"Fighting with a live wild boar is really different from training with wooden puppets and grass puppets.
I spent half an hour to kill a wild boar, I wonder how the others are doing? "
…
