Fang Yuan naturally knew that there would be Gu Masters secretly monitoring the assessment, but he needed such a witness.
Immediately, he pretended to continue hunting wild boars, and walked into the depths of the forest.
Fifteen minutes later, he reached the red circle mark on the map.
A treehouse was hidden in the luxuriant leaves of a giant tree. If one did not look carefully, they would not be able to detect it.
"This is the temporary residence of Old Man Wang when he hunts?" Fang Yuan frowned, a suspicion rising in his heart.
He climbed into the treehouse.
When he saw the scene in the treehouse, his expression changed!

Chapter 76
The space in the treehouse was not big, but there were many things inside. It was extremely messy at first glance.
On the floor in the middle of the room, there was a thick, dark yellow blanket.
Against the wall in the room, there was an iron stove for burning firewood. There was even a copper kettle on top of the stove.
There was black ash in the stove, and beside it was a small pile of unburned firewood.
Although it was summer, the nights in the mountains were still cold and gloomy.
Although the iron stove was small, it could keep the entire treehouse warm when it was lit.
There were two windows in the treehouse. Two or three hemp ropes were tied around the outer edge of one window, across the treehouse, and then fixed to the outer edge of the other window.
There were a few tattered clothes on the hemp ropes. The clothes were patched and obviously belonged to an adult. There was still some moisture on them, indicating that they had not been completely dried.
The afterglow of the setting sun shone through the window into the treehouse.
The interior of the treehouse was dim, and the handles of the axes and hunting knives at the corner of the walls were wrapped in animal skins.
There were even dark red bloodstains on the blades.
On the other wall, there was a piece of bamboo paper, and a dagger was stuck in the middle.
There was a young man's face drawn on the bamboo paper. It was Fang Yuan's face!
All of this indicated that recently, a person had come to this hidden treehouse and lived in seclusion.
This person's goal was obvious. It was Fang Yuan, who was drawn on the bamboo paper.
The dagger stuck in the paper vividly expressed his sinister intentions!
Fang Yuan, the person in question, could not help but be moved by such a scene.
"What does this person want? Why is he targeting me?
No, maybe it's not me, but Fangzheng. "Fang Yuan's mind was in turmoil.
Fangzheng was an A grade talent. He was the only A grade talent in the past three years in the Guyue clan. He was the hope of the Guyue clan.
If he could be trained, he would be the next generation's flag.
But training always required a process.
During this process, there would be natural disasters and disasters.
Let's not talk about natural disasters for now.
As everyone knew, Qing Mao Mountain did not only have the Guyue Village, but also the Bai Village and the Xiong Village.
These two forces would definitely not be happy to see the traditional overlord, the Guyue Clan, successfully nurture an A-grade Heavenly expert.
Therefore, assassinations were a common occurrence.
In this world, there were very few geniuses, and those who could grow up smoothly were few and far between.
A grade aptitude Gu Masters were not unheard of.
Three years ago, the Guyue Clan had appeared.
In earlier eras, they had appeared many times.
But among the three great villages of Qing Mao mountain, in all these years, only one A grade heaven had been nurtured. That was Bai Ning Bing of Bai village, who had already reached Rank three.
This phenomenon alone was enough to explain many things.
"Is this person from the Bai Clan or the Xiong Clan?
Are we going to start killing Guyue Fangzheng now? "Fang Yuan frowned as he stared at the portrait on the wooden wall.
"But why would this treehouse be marked on Old Man Wang's beast skin map?
Could it be that Old Man Wang is a spy secretly developed by other forces?
No, this person is targeting me! "
Fang Yuan's eyes shone with a sharp light.
At this moment, he recalled many scenes.
The first time, beside the trap, he heard the conversation of the four young hunters —
A hunter said, "Brother Wang Er, you are already nineteen this year, you should get married and have kids."
Wang Er said, "Hmph, as a man, how can I be greedy for such a little beauty!
One day, I will walk out of this Qing Mao mountain and roam the world, seeing the world. I am worthy of my manly body! "
The second time was after he made his move. Wang Er was abnormally calm.
He drew his bow and aimed at Fang Yuan.
The other three were already begging for mercy.
The third time was Fang Yuan's question.
"Let me ask you, is there anyone else in Old Man Wang's family?"
A hunter answered, "Hunter Wang originally had a wife, but more than ten years ago, she was killed by a wild wolf that invaded the village.
Before his wife died, she gave birth to two boys and a girl for Old Man Wang.
But the eldest son, Wang Da, died three years ago while hunting in the mountains.
There is no one else in the Wang family. "
"I, I remember now!
Old Man Wang actually had a wife, Wang Da's wife.
But after Wang Da disappeared, his wife also died of love. That year, the village even specially sent down a chastity memorial arch.
But I heard that Wang Da's wife wanted to remarry, but was forced to death by Old Man Wang.
You killed Old Man Wang, you are getting rid of the tyrant and bringing peace to the people, it is for the good of the people. "
Another person hurriedly added, "That's right, that's right.
Actually, Lord, we have long disliked this Old Man Wang.
Hmph, what's so great about him, isn't he just better at hunting than us?
We are all mortals, but he makes it seem like he is very special, moving out of the village and staying here.
As the younger generation, we sometimes want to ask him for advice, but he directly chased us away, and did not allow us to appear near the wooden house again! "
Old Man Wang's family, moved out of the village, living alone …
Eldest son, Wang Er, died three years ago while hunting in the mountains …
Wang Da's wife, wanted to remarry, but was forced to death by Old Man Wang, and received a chastity memorial arch …
Old Man Wang chased away all the young people who asked him for advice on hunting …
Old Man Wang wholeheartedly hid the beast skin map, and on the bamboo paper that he gave to Fang Yuan, there was no sign of these three red circles …
Wang Er was young, but he was very calm in front of Gu Masters.
At the same time, he did not marry, and had ambitions beyond mortals …
The key point was that the red circle on the beast skin map was a hidden habitat.
There were obvious signs of human activity here.
At the same time, this person had strong ill intentions towards Fang Yuan or Fangzheng …
If these clues were separated, it would not be easy for others to detect them.
But once they were linked together, there was something fishy!
The more Fang Yuan thought, the more he felt that the layers of fog shrouding his eyes were getting thinner and thinner.
The afterglow of the setting sun shone through the window, shining on his face, so thick that it was like a smear of blood.
The surroundings seemed to have sunk into a deathly silence. Was there someone spying on him from behind?
Suddenly, Fang Yuan's eyes brightened, his vision seemed to penetrate through time, and he saw the truth!
"Wang Da did not die."
At this moment, his eyes shone brightly!
"Not only did he not die, he even got lucky and became a demonic Gu Master!"
It was not that mortals did not have the talent to cultivate, but the clan system had always tightly controlled the cultivation methods of Gu Masters.
But in this world, there were no absolutes.
There were cases of mortals becoming Gu Masters, like encountering the Hope Gu in the wild, and opening their aperture.
Or inheriting a certain strength inheritance, or receiving the private teachings of a certain clan member, etc.
But such Gu Masters were never accepted by the clan, and could at most become the hired thugs of the clan.
Thus, they, who were unwilling, became lone Gu Masters. The cultivation conditions were incomparably tough, and as time passed, to fight for resources, they had to kill and rob, thus entering the demonic path.
"Because of some kind of opportunity, most likely from a Gu Master's corpse, he obtained a fortune, and Wang Da became a Gu Master three years ago.
In order to deceive people, he released fake news of his death, but in reality, no one had seen his corpse.
After Old Man Wang's family knew of this, they moved out of the village, taking the risk of being attacked by wild beasts and living alone, all to continue hiding this truth. "
"But there were some disagreements, Wang Da's wife did not agree, maybe she wanted to report it to the Guyue village.
The Wang family could only kill this wife, and purposely released some fake news.
Things like wanting to remarry, or forcing her to die, they firmly covered the truth under these rumors. "
"Every once in a while, Wang Da would return home to live.
Old Man Wang would chase away those youngsters who came to ask for advice.
After Wang Er and his brother Wang Da interacted, his fear towards Gu Masters gradually disappeared, and he naturally wanted to become a Gu Master himself, and have the ambition to roam the world! "
"Because he was worried that Wang Da's whereabouts would be exposed, Wang Er did not rashly marry at such an old age.
Wang Da could not always live at home, so Old Man Wang drew three red circles on the beast skin map. These three places should be such secret residences.
A crafty rabbit has three burrows, so Wang Da took turns to live in these residences, living in the cracks between the forces of the three villages. "
The meaning of these three red circles was finally clear!
Red usually represented eye-catching and important. To Old Man Wang, this was his eldest son's residence.
So when Fang Yuan wanted Old Man Wang to draw the map, he did not draw these three red circles on the bamboo paper, to protect his eldest son.
At the same time, he also drew fewer red crosses, wanting to take revenge for killing him.
"Maybe every year at a fixed time, Wang Da would return home to live for a period of time.
When he came back, he saw his family dead.
After secretly asking around, he found out about me, so he used a dagger to nail my portrait on the wall, to take revenge! "
Based on his previous life's experience, Fang Yuan was almost sure that this was the truth.
If other forces wanted to assassinate Fangzheng, they could be more secretive.
There was no need to develop a mortal spy like Old Man Wang.
After all, Old Man Wang lived at the foot of the mountain, and not in the Guyue village.
"To think that I provoked a demonic assassin for a beast skin map.
This world is really strange. "Fang Yuan could not help but laugh coldly.
He killed Wang Er first, then Old Man Wang and Wang Jiamei, to directly get the beast skin map.
Old Man Wang was the number one hunter in the surrounding villages, his beast skin map was definitely valuable.
At that time, he thought: It's just three mortal lives, what's the big deal, I'll just kill them casually.
In this world, everyone has the right to live, and anyone can die.
But now, a demonic Gu Master popped out!
Regarding this, Fang Yuan did not have the slightest bit of regret, but instead felt lucky.
If he had been merciful, Wang Er, Old Man Wang and Wang Jiamei would have been huge obstacles to get the Wang family's beast skin map.
To protect Wang Da's secret, they would definitely not take out the real thing.
Wang Er's battle strength could already kill an ordinary Rank one upper stage Gu Master.
Old Man Wang was old but ruthless. In a real battle, he was even more of a threat than Wang Er.
Even if he got the real thing, Old Man Wang would tell Wang Da the details, and Wang Da would immediately know Fang Yuan's exact information.
No matter how he dealt with it, he was in the dark, and Fang Yuan was out in the open. The initiative was firmly in his hands.
"Luckily, I killed right from the start!
No matter what, I have always been in control of the situation.
This way, even if I can't get the real thing, I won't lose anything, and can still rob other hunters.
Moreover, I killed Old Man Wang and that girl so that this Wang Da would waste time to gather information about me.
Needless to say, the two young hunters who survived must have been killed by him. "Fang Yuan's heart was clear.
There were only a few people who knew, and Wang Da would not make a move on Jiang He. Once Jiang He died, the clan would send people to investigate.
And if the two hunters went missing on the mountain, it would be easy to manipulate.
Jiang He would not expose this matter for the clan's evaluation of him, and would instead cover for Wang Da.
S-REV-102.summary: Fang Yuan, after accumulating many boar Tusks, decides to investigate a red circle mark on Old Man Wang's map. He discovers a hidden treehouse, messy but clearly recently occupied, with axes, knives, and a portrait of himself pinned to the wall with a dagger. This sinister discovery prompts Fang Yuan to piece together various past clues, deducing that Old Man Wang's son, Wang Da, faked his death three years ago to become a demonic Gu Master and is now seeking revenge against Fang Yuan for killing his family.

continuityMutations.content: Wang Da is a Rank 2 demonic Gu Master with C-B grade aptitude, around 40-70% primeval essence, and likely possesses concealment Gu worms.
Wang Da will likely attack during the mid-year exam when Fang Yuan is outside the village.
Wang Da probably knows Fang Yuan has the beast skin map and will be looking for him based on wild boar distribution.
To survive, he needs to choose an escape path opposite to where Wang Da expects him to go, specifically towards the King Boar territory.
Fang Yuan deduces Wang Da's cultivation, Gu worms, and likely attack strategy based on limited information, demonstrating his cold, calculating nature and understanding of the demonic path.
Fang Yuan decides to flee rather than fight, prioritizing survival over honor, aligning with his 'demonic path' philosophy.
Fang Yuan uses the King Boar's territory and his knowledge of Wang Da's perception of the beast skin map to create an unexpected escape route.
Fang Yuan quickly assesses the changed atmosphere at the assessment site and deduces the general truth of the assassination attempt on Fangzheng.
Fang Yuan claims a bag of wild boar teeth he 'found' to win the mid-year exam, further demonstrating his opportunism.
Wan Er is Wang Da's murdered wife, whose heart was used to refine Love Separation Gu, symbolizing his ultimate sacrifice for power.

S-REV-103.prose:
Chapter 77
In the treehouse, Fang Yuan's thoughts were in turmoil.
With the wisdom accumulated from his previous life, Fang Yuan sensed Wang Da's existence.
Then what was Wang Da's strength like?
Fang Yuan had never seen this Wang Da before, but just based on the things in front of him, it was enough for him to analyze a lot of information.
"Courage is built on the foundation of strength. He collected my information and still wants to take revenge on me. With such confidence, it seems his cultivation is above Rank one!"
"For the past three years, he's been wandering around these three places marked with red circles. It's been difficult for him to survive in the gaps between the three mountain strongholds. Almost every day, he has to face the danger of being discovered and surrounded. This means that he doesn't have the ability to venture out alone.
And roaming the world alone requires a Gu Master's cultivation to be at least Rank three. "
"This way, my initial estimate is that his cultivation is Rank two."
Fang Yuan's eyes shone with a cold light, "Let's see, he went missing three years ago and is now Rank two. His aptitude should be C to B grade, and the primeval essence in his aperture should be around 40-70%."
"These three years, he was able to survive in the cracks.
At the same time, he was able to stay in the house under Jiang He's eyes, so he must have some Gu worms that can conceal his tracks. "
In a battle between Gu Masters, the most important thing was information.
Although Fang Yuan did not have any detection type Gu worms, with his experience and wisdom, he could roughly analyze Wang Da's cultivation and Gu worms.
Soon, he drew the outline of a Rank two demonic Gu Master, harboring the hatred of having his family killed, and hiding somewhere to kill him.
"I can kill others, others can naturally kill me.
This is nothing. "Fang Yuan could not help but laugh.
In this world, everyone has the right to live, and everyone has the chance to die.
Those who kill, will be killed.
Since you killed, you have to be prepared to be killed as well.
If you are killed like this, then so be it. There is no big deal, and there will be no regrets.
This is the path you choose.
Fang Yuan had a deep understanding of this.
This was the enlightenment of the demonic path!
"If Wang Da wants to kill me, then this mid-year exam is definitely a great opportunity.
Usually, the students live in the village. With his Rank 2 cultivation, it's impossible for him to sneak into the village. That would be courting death. "
"He might have analyzed the possibility that I would come out to hunt.
But Qing Mao Mountain was so big, it was too difficult for him to hide his tracks and search for me alone.
He's most likely to make a move now. "
"He is a Rank two Gu Master, and one that has been struggling to survive for the past three years, living a precarious life, tempering himself into a demonic Gu Master.
With my current combat strength, I'm definitely not a match for him.
But that doesn't mean I don't have a chance to live. "
Run!
Fang Yuan instantly decided on this direction.
There was nothing to be ashamed of in order to survive. Since he couldn't fight, he would escape.
It was simply impossible for a Gu Master to make a breakthrough in battle.
It was possible to challenge higher ranks, but that was built on the foundation that the Gu Master had a special Gu worm.
Fang Yuan had many Gu worms, but the Spring Autumn Cicada was in deep slumber and could not be used.
Liquor worm, White Boar Gu, Little Light Gu, Moonlight Gu, they were not trump cards to challenge higher ranks.
Fighting to the death despite knowing he couldn't win, that was the stupidity of being 'hot-blooded'.
Even if he won, it would just be fate's favor.
Fang Yuan was cautious all his life. Even if he had a trump card, as long as the chances of winning were small, he would choose to avoid fighting.
He liked to control the situation, using all sorts of methods to maximize his chances of winning.
He loved to fight battles that he would definitely win.
Only when he had no other choice would he take the risk and fight.
Thus, what he often did was to bully the weak, plunder resources, and get stronger.
When he was strong enough to surpass his original enemy, he would come back to take revenge, which was to continue bullying the weak.
There was nothing shameful about this. Those who, in order to prove their bravery, took the initiative to challenge, risking their lives to fight a strong enemy, were the real idiots.
But this value was always promoted. This was because any organization needed the continuous sacrifice of individuals to protect the interests of the organization's higher-ups.
Just think about it, survival was the prerequisite for all activities.
To survive, to realize the ideals in one's heart, that was a person's greatest courage.
To die for an ideal, that was a fool.
To drag out an ignoble existence for an ideal, that was a true warrior!
On Earth, Han Xin was humiliated under someone's crotch, Cao Cao was hunted down until his beard and robes were cut, King Gou Jian, in order to survive, gave his enemies shit to show his loyalty …
So, screw glory, reputation and face!
No matter which world's organization, they would promote this value.
The more sacrifices were needed, the more they would promote this.
For example, the army.
"Then where should I go to reduce the chances of encountering Wang Da to the minimum?" A map appeared in Fang Yuan's mind.
"Wang Da already knows I have the beast skin map, he should be hiding in the forest now, looking for me according to the distribution of wild boars on the map.
I can't go to these places, I can only go in the opposite direction, only then can I fight for a chance of survival. "Thinking of this, a slightly crazy escape route vaguely formed in Fang Yuan's mind.
…
In the forest at dusk, the shadows of the trees overlapped, the wild grass was lush.
A pair of scarlet eyes, hidden in the deep shadows.
The hatred and anger in his eyes could not even be washed away by the torrential river, it could not be extinguished.
"Fang Yuan, I've finally found you …" Wang Da gritted his teeth, chewing on this name in his heart.
Under his gaze, not far away, a skinny, pale faced young man was rushing through the forest.
The enemy was right in front of him, but Wang Da did not make a move, instead his gaze moved towards several other locations.
At these locations, there was a Gu Master invigilator hidden.
To prevent cheating and to first treat casualties, there were tens of Rank two Gu Masters scattered around the area.
There were also a few Rank three clan elders, guarding the mountain slope far away.
Wang Da carefully moved through this forest, he had already collected a lot of relevant information.
"If I want to kill Fang Yuan, I must first eliminate these three Gu Masters.
Otherwise, once I show myself, I will be attacked.
Maybe I can kill Fang Yuan at the first moment, but I will also be surrounded and killed by the Gu Masters who come later. "
"I am Rank two middle stage, I still have 50% primeval essence in my body.
To strike first and kill these three Gu Masters, it is very difficult.
I need to strike consecutively in a short period of time.
Otherwise, once they find out about their comrade's death, their vigilance will increase, and my whereabouts will be exposed … "
"Shadow Follower Gu." Wang Da slowly closed his eyes, chanting in his heart.
Soon after, his body quickly turned into a lump of thick darkness, moving through the shadows of the trees.
Everything was silent.
In a dense bush, a Rank two Gu Master from the Guyue clan squatted down, yawning in boredom.
"So boring, accompanying these juniors, it's like a babysitter." This Gu Master muttered, not noticing that a shadow had already shrouded him.
A pair of bony hands slowly stretched out from the darkness.
This pair of hands was extremely pale, the joints wide, ten sharp nails protruding out, the nails were dyed with a layer of dark purple, emitting a slight fishy smell.
"What is this smell?" The Guyue clan Gu Master twitched his nose, subconsciously frowning.
He was just about to check, but it was already too late.
Wang Da was like a poisonous snake pouncing on its prey, striking out like lightning!
One hand covering the Gu Master's nose.
The other hand pierced through the Gu Master's back.
The dark purple nails were as sharp as blades, his five fingers easily entered the Gu Master's body, blocking his heart.
The poison on the nails, in an instant, corroded the heart.
And through the blood, it spread throughout the Gu Master's body.
The Gu Master's body tensed, and he no longer breathed.
Although they were both Rank two Gu Masters, with a sneak attack, the battle ended just as it started.
"I used a total of ten percent primeval essence, there is still forty percent left." Wang Da paid attention to his aperture, and did not stop, turning into a lump of darkness again.
A moment later, the second Gu Master hiding behind the rocks also suffered from Wang Da's vicious attacks.
His pupils shrunk to pin size, and he fell to the ground.
The poison wreaked havoc in his body, and soon his whole body turned purple, as two streams of dark purple blood flowed out of his nose.
"Thirty percent primeval essence left." Wang Da muttered, his body turning into a lump of darkness again.
"Who is it!"
The third Gu Master was hiding on a tree branch, he sensed something was wrong at the crucial moment, and when Wang Da attacked, he turned around, his two hands firmly blocking Wang Da's two poisonous hands.
"Damn it!"
Wang Da laughed sinisterly, his ten fingernails growing crazily, reaching five centimeters in an instant, stabbing into the Gu Master's forearm, piercing through his skin.
The blood flowing out of his forearm quickly turned dark purple.
"This is Love Life Separation?!" The third Gu Master saw this, and was immediately shocked.
The poisonous purple gas had already infected his face.
He knew he did not have any poison resistant Gu worms, and would definitely die this time. His expression suddenly changed, and he shouted, "Then let's die together!"
He opened his mouth, and suddenly stuck out his tongue.
There was a crescent moon mark on his tongue, it was the Moonlight Gu.
A moonblade flashed out, hitting Wang Da's left shoulder, and then shot out from his back.
Blood splattered everywhere.
Wang Da grunted, his body swaying a few times, but the Gu Master's eyes had already turned white, and there was no more breath.
"That's right, this is Love Life Separation …" Wang Da stood up shakily on a sturdy branch, smiling bitterly.
Love Life Separation, known as the number one poison among Rank two Gu worms!
To refine it, you need a Rank one survival grass, a widow spider, a red needle scorpion, and a lover's heart.
In order to refine this Gu worm, Wang Da killed his beloved wife with his own hands, and dug out her heart!
"Everything is for survival, I can only choose strength … this is the resolution of the demonic path!" Wang Da's eyes were red, and he stared at the young man in the distance.
"I gave up on love, leaving only familial love, but you took it away!
Fang Yuan … "He growled in a low voice," I will make you regret everything you have done! "
S-REV-103.summary: In the treehouse, Fang Yuan uses his past life wisdom to analyze Wang Da's strength and likely strategy, deducing him to be a Rank 2 demonic Gu Master seeking revenge. Recognizing his current combat disadvantage, Fang Yuan decides to strategically flee, articulating his pragmatic 'demonic path' philosophy of prioritizing survival over heroic sacrifice. He devises an escape route that leverages Wang Da's limited information about him.

continuityMutations.content: There are tens of Rank 2 Gu Master invigilators and a few Rank 3 clan elders guarding the assessment area.
Guyue Sou is an experienced Rank 2 Gu Master, and there is another middle-aged Gu Master specializing in close combat.
He killed his wife, Wan Er, to refine the Love Separation Gu.
He was the target of Wang Da's assassination attempt, mistaken for Fang Yuan.
He instinctively used Jade Skin Gu to defend against Wang Da's attack, but was still poisoned by Love Separation.
He uses a Flash Gu and hair-based armor/spikes in combat.
He uses Rock Skin Gu and Jade Wind Wheel in combat.
Wang Da's primary motivation is an all-consuming hatred for Fang Yuan, stemming from the death of his family.
Wang Da is a cunning and ruthless Rank 2 demonic Gu Master, tempered by three years of precarious survival, possessing Love Separation and Phantom Tracking Gu.
Wang Da plans to eliminate Gu Master invigilators before attacking his target, demonstrating tactical thinking.
Wang Da justifies his brutal actions, including killing his wife, as necessary for survival and his 'demonic path'.
Wang Da mistakenly believes Fangzheng is Fang Yuan, leading to his demise.
Fangzheng becomes the accidental target of Wang Da's assassination attempt, mistaken for Fang Yuan.
Fangzheng instinctively activates Jade Skin Gu under extreme duress, saving his life but still suffering from Love Separation poison.
Fangzheng is left in a state of shock and unconsciousness after the assassination attempt.
Guyue Sou is an experienced Rank 2 Gu Master, capable of using Flash Gu and defensive hair armor, showcasing his combat prowess.
A close-combat focused Rank 2 Gu Master, skilled in using Rock Skin Gu and Jade Wind Wheel.

"I gave up on love, leaving only familial love, but you took it away!
Fang Yuan … "He growled in a low voice," I will make you regret everything you have done! "

Chapter 78
"Kill!" Wang Da let out a low roar and suddenly flew down from the treetop.
Just as he was about to reach his enemy, three moonblades suddenly flew over, blocking his path.
"Why is there a fourth Gu Master?"
Wang Da's heart sank, forcefully twisting his body in mid-air, narrowly dodging two of the moonblades. The last one, he could not avoid, hit his left leg.
Bam.
Wang Da fell to the ground, looking down at his left leg. There was a deep and long wound on his left leg, already bleeding profusely.
"Damn it …" Wang Da gritted his teeth, his heart moved, "Phantom Tracking Gu!"
In the blink of an eye, he turned into a mass of dense black shadow, his speed exploding as he silently retreated.
At this time.
A Gu worm flew out, and at the same time, an old voice could be heard —
"Flash Gu, explode."
The Gu worm suddenly exploded, forming a dazzling white light.
The white light made people unable to look at it directly, suddenly appearing, illuminating the dark forest.
"Ah!"
Wang Da let out a miserable cry, the black shadow that his body had turned into had nowhere to hide under the white light, immediately returning him to his original state.
Although the Flash Gu was only Rank one, it was also a consumable Gu.
But it countered Wang Da's Phantom Tracking Gu, once the black shadow was eliminated by the white light, the Rank two Phantom Tracking Gu had to recuperate for three hours before it could be used again.
Everything in nature is balanced, everything has a weakness.
Although the Phantom Tracking Gu's stealth ability was strong, it also had a huge weakness.
After Wang Da was countered, his heart sank to the bottom.
This fourth Gu Master was clearly more experienced, using some unknown Gu worm to conceal himself, he was truly a formidable opponent.
More importantly, Wang Er could not use the Phantom Tracking Gu for the time being, he had no way out.
"I am Guyue Sou, lad, if you surrender now, my clan might spare your life!" A white haired silver bearded Rank two Gu Master appeared in Wang Da's vision.
"Spare my life, hmph, I will kill you first!" Wang Da knew that if he was delayed, there would be more Gu Masters coming after him.
He had to quickly get rid of this fourth Gu Master.
"I only have 20% of my True Essence left. Whether it's for revenge or to save my life, I have to kill this old man first!" Wang Da roused his spirits and pounced towards Old Guyue.
Guyue snorted coldly. His hair and fine hairs instantly grew wildly and entangled with each other. In the blink of an eye, they formed a set of needle-like snow-white armor.
When Wang Da saw this, his expression changed.
This experienced Gu Master was like a hedgehog, causing Wang Da to have a feeling of not knowing where to start.
His Rank two number one poison Gu, Love Separation, was extremely poisonous and could cause blood to freeze, but it did not have strong offensive capabilities and could only be used for sneak attacks.
Wang Da only had two Gu worms, Love Separation and the Shadow Follower Gu. If he had a defensive Gu worm, he would not have been hit by the moonblade.
"Hmph, if I can't deal with you, I will kill Fang Yuan first!" Wang Da was not stupid. After three years of living, he was cunning and ruthless.
He sprinted, attempting to go around Old Guyue and attack the murderer of his family.
"Don't even think about it!"
Old Guyue activated his True Essence, and his needle-like hair clothes suddenly extended out two spikes that spun like a spiral. In an instant, they extended five to six meters and shot towards Wang Da.
Wang Da lowered his body and brushed past the two snow-white spikes by a hair's breadth.
On his hands, his ten fingernails were as long as half his palm. They were purple to the point of turning black, and a smoke-like faint purple poison gas lingered around them.
"Die!" Wang Da had already gone crazy from the battle. He laughed sinisterly as he quickly got closer to his target.
In his eyes, Fang Yuan's face was filled with shock and fear.
Bloodthirsty killing intent had already filled Wang Da's mind.
He seemed to be able to hear Fang Yuan's indignant breathing as he pierced his skin.
"Don't even think about it!"
Just as he was about to succeed, a figure suddenly appeared and blocked Wang Da's path.
A fifth Rank two Gu Master was rushing over from afar!
"It's Love Separation?" This was a middle-aged man. Facing Wang Da's crazy charge, his expression was firm and unwavering.
Rock Skin Gu!
The middle-aged man's primeval essence surged, and dense red steel primeval essence rose like smoke. His exposed arms instantly turned from yellow to grey.
At the same time, his arms inflated like balloons, turning into a pair of thick stone arms.
Both sides got closer and closer. Wang Da's expression was crazed and distorted, while the middle-aged Gu Master's expression was solemn as he stretched out his arms and grabbed towards Wang Da.
"You want to catch me so slowly?" Wang Da could not help but show a mocking expression.
The middle-aged Gu Master's arms were already covered with a thick layer of rock skin. Even Wang Da's nails could not penetrate it.
But this pair of stone arms was too heavy, and its speed was too slow.
Wang Da felt he could easily dodge it.
"Is that so?
Jade Wind Wheel! "
The middle-aged Gu Master gave a low shout, and suddenly, a pair of jade green whirlwinds, like two armbands, appeared around his stone arm.
The stone arms' speed immediately increased!
"How can this be … urgh!" Wang Da's face was filled with shock as he was swept away by the stone arms.
The middle-aged Gu Master had rich battle experience, if he had used the Wasp Gu and Jade Wind Wheel from the start, Wang Da would not have fallen so easily.
Wang Da was swept away by the heavy stone arms, and fell to the ground, feeling dizzy.
His chest, which was hit, felt heavy.
Puff.
He struggled to get up, and could not help but spit out a mouthful of blood.
"I only have 5% primeval essence left, I'm going to die." He checked his aperture, and laughed bitterly.
Seeing Fang Yuan not far away, his face showed a crazed determination. "Even at death's door, I will drag you down with me!"
Ahhhhh!
He ignored his injuries, and charged forward.
"Stop him!" The middle-aged Gu Master was anxious. He was a pure close combat Gu Master, and did not have a long range Gu worm.
He was too far away.
The old Gu Master had already rushed over, his white hair condensing into finger-sized spiral needles. The needles flew like snakes, extending five to six meters, catching up from behind and piercing Wang Da's body.
But Wang Da did not care, and continued to charge forward.
"Die!" He shouted arrogantly, his ten fingers already growing to half a meter long.
The middle-aged Gu Master rushed over, and seeing this, his expression changed. He could not stop him in time.
Just as Wang Da was about to succeed, a blue jade light burst out from the opposite side.
"Jade Skin Gu!" Under the stimulation of life and death, Fangzheng screamed hysterically.
In an instant, his entire body's skin had turned into a layer of solid jade skin.
Wang Da's ten fingers were like blades, stabbing towards him.
Although Love Bie Li did not have strong offensive abilities, the Jade Skin Gu was after all a Rank one Gu, and could not block Wang Da's fingernails.
Roar!
The old Gu Master saw that Fangzheng was about to die, and shouted anxiously. His eyes opened wide, and more snow-white needles shot out, piercing through Wang Da's body.
Then the needles were like snakes, first piercing through Wang Da's back to his chest, then coiling around his neck, arms, and legs.
Boiling hot blood gushed out from Wang Da's body. In an instant, his white hair was dyed red.
His whole body was covered in white hair, like a wild boar that fell into a trap and was stabbed by a bamboo spear. His momentum was halted, and he could not move forward.
A strong sense of dizziness assaulted him, and Wang Da laughed bitterly, knowing that death was coming.
He could not accept this!
His vision became blurry, and at the moment of death, the most profound impression in his memory surfaced once again.
"Wan Er …" He could not help but call out his wife's name. A knife appeared in his hand, and pierced through his wife's body.
"Why?"
His wife looked at Wang Da, shock and confusion appeared on her beautiful face, as she stared at Wang Da's eyes.
Wang Da's eyes were red, and his whole body was trembling. He squeezed out three words from his teeth, "I'm sorry."
His wife smiled, her smile was filled with love, and not a bit of hatred.
"I understand." She said.
She wanted to stretch out her right hand, and before she died, she wanted to touch Wang Da's face for the last time.
But halfway through, her hand fell down.
Killing his wife and stealing her heart, refining love separation, and from then on, he had the strength to step onto the demonic path!
Regret?
Since then, Wang Da asked himself countless times.
Regret!
Regret was worse than death. So he swore to himself, that he would protect the only family he had left!!
But.
But …
"If I could do it all over again, Wan Er, I would still do it …" Unbridled tears gushed out from Wang Da's red eyes.
Fangzheng stared with his eyes wide open.
His whole body was shining with jade light.
From the start to the end, he was in deep confusion and bewilderment.
An unfamiliar Gu Master was crazily rushing towards him, as if he was going to cut him into a thousand pieces.
But Fangzheng did not know him at all.
The dense aura of death caused Fangzheng to be unable to move, his mind was blank, and he could only activate the Jade Skin Gu subconsciously.
Wang Da's fingers pierced through the jade skin, penetrating one centimeter, and then stopped moving.
He died.
When he died, his face was covered in tears!
"Finally … it's over?" Fangzheng breathed roughly, his eyes lost their focus, and looked very empty.
Then, a strong dizziness hit him.
Plop.
He also fell to the ground.
Love separation, the number one poison of Rank two, although it did not pierce through the jade skin, the poison had already entered the body.
S-REV-104.summary: Wang Da, fueled by hatred, stalks a young man he believes to be Fang Yuan, planning to eliminate the surrounding Gu Master invigilators first. He brutally assassinates two Rank 2 Gu Masters using his Love Separation Gu and Shadow Follower Gu. The third Gu Master manages to wound him before succumbing to the poison. Guyue Sou and another Gu Master then engage Wang Da, using strategic Gu worms like Flash Gu to counter his stealth. Despite his ferocity and determination to kill 'Fang Yuan,' Wang Da is ultimately overwhelmed, sustains fatal injuries, and dies with tears of regret for his past actions and for failing his family.

continuityMutations.content: Wang Da mistook Fangzheng for him and attempted an assassination.
He successfully used the King Boar territory as a diversion to escape Wang Da.
He secured first place in the mid-year assessment by claiming a bag of wild boar teeth he 'found'.
Fangzheng was carried away by clan elders after an assassination attempt.
The Academy Elder is responsible for the students' assessment and safety, expressing concern over Fangzheng's assassination.
The Academy Elder suspects the Bai or Xiong clans are behind Fangzheng's assassination, linking it to inter-clan rivalry.

S-REV-105.prose:
Chapter 79
A wild boar the size of an elephant was resting in the mud.
It had its eyes closed, half kneeling and half lying down. Its tusks were clean and shiny like blades.
The light of dusk shone on its dark black fur.
Its huge belly was white, rising and falling with each breath it took, emitting a humming sound.
King Boar!
Fang Yuan was a few hundred meters away from it, but he still carefully walked downwind.
"Although I can kill wild boars now, against this King Boar, I can only run.
Even a Rank two Gu Master can't kill it.
If I can't figure out the Gu worms on its body, I might fail miserably. "
Kings of beasts like these usually had Gu worms on their bodies.
On the wild boar king's body, there were usually boar Gu.
Pink Boar Gu and Flower Boar Gu were the majority.
Other than Boar Gu, there would also be Beast Skin Gu or Thorn Caterpillar Gu.
In this world, there were all sorts of Gu worms.
Some Gu worms lived on strong wild beasts and had a symbiotic relationship with the wild beast.
When the wild beast was attacked, the Gu worms on its body would sense the danger and help the wild beast fight against the strong enemy.
This King Boar was huge, and its strength far surpassed normal boars. Fang Yuan was not its match, not to mention it had one or more mysterious Gu worms on its body.
However, Fang Yuan's reason for coming here was not to kill this King Boar.
Instead, he was trying his best to avoid Wang Da's revenge.
Wang Da knew that Fang Yuan had the beast skin map, and Fang Yuan stood on his side and beat him at his own game.
He didn't go anywhere else, but headed towards the location marked by the red cross on the King Boar.
Although King Boar was dangerous, it was still a wild beast and didn't have the intelligence of a human.
Old Man Wang, as a mortal, could find this place and retreat safely. Why couldn't Fang Yuan do the same?
Going against the flow might seem risky, but there was a chance of survival.
As they got further and further away, King Boar was left behind by Fang Yuan.
If it was on a map, his route would be a big circle, bypassing the red cross, forming a full arc, and finally arriving at the hillside where several clan elders were overseeing. There, he would conduct the mid-year assessment on the spot.
An hour later, a young man with grass all over his body, his coarse clothes cut by the thorns, and his feet covered in mud, trudged to this hillside with a bag on his back.
This battered and exhausted youth was precisely Fang Yuan.
"I'm finally back safe and sound.
Here, with an elder overseeing things, their safety was greatly guaranteed.
But I can't be careless. "Fang Yuan secretly heaved a sigh of relief as he slowly walked up the hill.
There was a simple shed on the hillside, and dozens of students were gathered near the shed.
The guards of the academy were counting the number of pig teeth in the students' bags.
Of the several clan elders who were originally guarding this place, only the Academy Elder was left. The others were nowhere to be found.
"Why is there something wrong with the atmosphere?" Fang Yuan frowned slightly, his sharp senses telling him that something big had happened.
As he neared the shed, he could hear the discussions of the students around him.
"Did you hear? There was an assassination just now, and a few Rank two Gu Masters died in an instant."
"Really?"
"It's true. I came early and saw Guyue Fangzheng being carried away by a few clan elders, leaving in a hurry."
"Guyue Fangzheng is too unlucky, to encounter such a thing during the assessment."
"Hehe, you don't understand.
The enemy's target is Guyue Fangzheng, he is an A grade talent. "
"I wonder if he will die?"
"Even if he doesn't die, he will be skinned alive.
Maybe after he is injured, his aptitude will drop. "
…
Fang Yuan's footsteps not only slowed down, his heart was like a clear mirror, immediately deducing the general truth of the matter.
"Wang Da wanted to kill me, to take revenge for his family.
But after I found the treehouse, I immediately changed my route and rushed towards King Boar.
Wang Da did not expect this, and missed me, but unexpectedly found Fangzheng.
His source of information was those few hunters, and he did not know that I have a twin brother.
He thought Fangzheng was me, and wanted to kill him, but was stopped by the surrounding Gu Masters.
Now the question is — is Wang Da dead? "
Fang Yuan frowned.
Wang Da successfully escaped, Wang Da was captured, or Wang Da was killed. These three scenarios would affect his plans and arrangements.
After thinking for a while, Fang Yuan decided to act according to the original plan.
The academy elder's expression was ugly. Fangzheng was actually assassinated.
Without any clues, he would never have guessed that Fangzheng was helping Fang Yuan block the calamity, and instead linked it to the Bai and Xiong clans!
Fangzheng was the only A grade genius in Guyue village in the past three years, the Bai and Xiong clans naturally would not sit by and watch him grow.
Sending Gu Masters to carry out assassinations, nipping him in the bud, this was very normal.
Even the Guyue village was doing this.
Secretly sending Gu Masters to assassinate the other two clans' genius students.
"The assassin was killed on the spot, I wonder how Fangzheng's injuries are?" The academy elder was worried.
At this time, the guard handed over a piece of paper.
The academy elder took the paper, and absentmindedly read, "In this year's examination, the results are as follows … Guyue city, 16 wild boar teeth, Guyue Mobei, 14 wild boar teeth …"
Only then did the surrounding students' attention get drawn over.
The results were clear at a glance.
The D grade students, although working together, could only get three to four wild boar teeth.
Most of the students in the third and second grades had eight or nine pills.
More than ten boar teeth was an excellent result.
The best was Guyue city, with sixteen.
Next was Guyue Mobei. As for Fangzheng, he had ten.
Guyue Mobei's face was full of pride. He was lucky this time, encountering two wild boars fighting, thus benefiting from it.
Guyue Mobei, on the other hand, was very indignant, he actually let Guyue City suppress him.
The academy elder continued to announce, "Next, I announce, the first in this examination is …"
"Wait!" Fang Yuan stepped out from the crowd.
"Fang Yuan, you're late.
The examination has already ended an hour ago, according to the rules, the number of wild boar teeth you got, will be reduced by four as punishment. "Guyue City immediately shouted.
Fang Yuan ignored him, he opened the bag on his back, then grabbed the bottom of the bag and hung it upside down in front of everyone.
Hua.
Dozens of shining white wild boar teeth, quickly piled up beside his feet.
"This!" Chicheng's mouth was wide open.
Mobei and the others all stared with their eyes wide open.
"How can there be so many?
This is too much! "The academy elder looked at Fang Yuan, his expression carrying a hint of surprise," Fang Yuan, did you hunt all of these? "
Fang Yuan cupped his fists and answered, "I only hunted about ten myself.
But I accidentally found a bag, probably hidden by a hunter.
There were many wild boar teeth inside.
I thought for a while, the mid-year examination is for us to try our best to gather as many wild boar teeth as possible in one day.
There's no written rule that we must kill wild boars, so I brought them here. "
As soon as these words were spoken, the entire place was in an uproar.
"How can you do this?"
"This luck is too good!"
"This is too fake. Could he have missed the question and then cheated?"
The academy elder stared closely at Fang Yuan. After staring for a while, he announced, "In this examination, Fang Yuan is first."
…
The atmosphere in the Patriarch's Pavilion was quite heavy.
Guyue Bo sat on the main seat, while the rest of the elders sat in two rows, suppressing their anger.
"Guyue Yao Ji, you are our clan's number one healing Gu Master, let me ask you, how is Fangzheng's situation?" Clan leader Guyue Bo asked one of the clan elders.
Guyue Yao Ji was an old woman with a stooped back and a face full of wrinkles like tree bark.
She coughed twice and slowly said, "Reporting to Patriarch, the current situation has been stabilized.
Fangzheng's life was not in danger, but he was still unconscious.
His aptitude did not decline because of this. "
"It's good that it did not decline."
Guyue Bo let out a long breath and asked the punishment hall elder on the left, "Did you find out about the assassin?"
The punishment hall elder was not as experienced as Guyue Yao Ji. He immediately stood up from his seat and lowered his head, "Found out. Thirty-five years old, male, identity unknown. Suspected to be a demonic Gu Master, possessing two Gu worms.
One is a Shadow Bug, the other is a Love Parting. "
Guyue Bo nodded, "Looks like he is an assassin. Love Separation … the number one poison in Rank 2.
It is not strange that he could kill three of our Gu Masters. "
"Clan leader, do we still need to investigate this!
If it is not the Bai clan, then it is the Xiong clan! "Guyue Lian shouted, his eyes looking like they were about to spit fire.
"Shadow Worm, Love Separation … this does not seem like a spy that the Bai clan and Xiong clan secretly nurtured.
Maybe it is a foreign demonic Gu Master who wanted to attach himself to the clan. After receiving instructions, to express his loyalty, he came to assassinate Fangzheng.
No matter what, the other two villages will definitely not be able to get away with this matter. "Gu Yue Mo Chen said coldly.
These two elders in power, although they did not get along normally, once an external enemy appeared, they would put aside their differences and work closely together.
Guyue Bo nodded, he thought so too.
Wang Da had disappeared for three whole years without any news. In the hearts of the villagers, he was long dead, thus his identity was a mystery.
Guyue's higher-ups did not know about this. Normally, they would not care about the death of a serf.
Everyone's gazes were focused on the Bai clan and Xiong clan.
At this time, the academy elder walked in.
"Lord clan leader …" He had a worried expression. Just as he opened his mouth, Guyue Bo answered, "Academy elder, don't worry. Fangzheng is fine, his aptitude is still A grade."
The academy elder's expression immediately relaxed.
"Oh right, are the other students safe?
How are their results in this examination, what is Fangzheng's rank? "Guyue Bo asked casually.
The academy elder answered truthfully. When he said that Fang Yuan had accidentally picked up a bag of wild boar teeth and got first place, Guyue Bo's gaze flashed.
The hall was silent. All the clan elders seemed to have sensed something and quietly observed their surroundings. The originally tense and resentful atmosphere also became subtle.
S-REV-105.summary: Fang Yuan successfully evades Wang Da by heading towards the dangerous King Boar territory, using it as a strategic diversion. He arrives at the hillside assessment site, battered but safe, and immediately senses a changed, tense atmosphere. Upon hearing student whispers, he quickly deduces that Wang Da mistakenly attacked Fangzheng, and ponders Wang Da's fate. He then presents a bag of 'found' wild boar teeth, claiming first place in the assessment through cunning, surprising the other students and the Academy Elder.

continuityMutations.content: Fangzheng is stable but unconscious, his A-grade aptitude is intact.
The assassin was an unknown, thirty-five-year-old male demonic Gu Master with Shadow Bug and Love Separation.
The assassination attempt on Fangzheng is likely a political attack from the Bai or Xiong clans.
Fang Yuan won the mid-year assessment by 'finding' a bag of wild boar teeth.
Guyue Bo is the clan patriarch, concerned about the assassination attempt on Fangzheng and its implications for inter-clan politics.
Guyue Bo suspects rival clans are involved in the assassination, aligning with the Academy Elder's assessment.
Guyue Yao Ji is the clan's top healing Gu Master, responsible for Fangzheng's recovery.
The Punishment Hall Elder is responsible for investigating the assassin's identity and methods.
Guyue Lian advocates for immediate retaliation against the Bai or Xiong clans following the assassination attempt.
Guyue Mo Chen analyzes the assassin's Gu worms to infer their origin, suggesting it might be an external demonic Gu Master.

C-REV-11.transition: Walked into the pavilion to deliver assessment results.

S-REV-106.summary: The Guyue clan elders convene in the Patriarch's Pavilion, discussing the assassination attempt on Fangzheng. Guyue Yao Ji reports Fangzheng's stable but unconscious condition, confirming his A-grade aptitude is unharmed. The Punishment Hall Elder identifies the assassin as an unknown demonic Gu Master with Love Separation. The elders, particularly Guyue Lian and Guyue Mo Chen, immediately suspect rival clans, escalating inter-clan tensions. The Academy Elder then reports the assessment results, including Fang Yuan's unexpected first place, creating a subtle shift in the room's political atmosphere.

continuityMutations.content: That someone secretly helped Fang Yuan, likely Guyue Mo Chen or Guyue Lian, to gain influence over Fangzheng.
The burden of clan leadership hinders his cultivation and personal desires.
Fang Yuan has likely been recruited by one of the powerful clan elders and is beginning to integrate into the family system.
Guyue Bo considers the political implications of Fang Yuan's unexpected success, suspecting Guyue Mo Chen or Guyue Lian of covertly recruiting Fang Yuan to gain influence over Fangzheng.
Guyue Bo feels the burden of coordinating clan interests, facing external threats from rival clans, and managing internal political struggles, which has slowed his cultivation and aged him.
Guyue Bo decides to personally tutor Fangzheng and offers a symbolic reward of thirty primeval stones to Fang Yuan, aiming to conciliate internal factions and manage external threats.
Guyue Mo Chen is suspected by Guyue Bo of having secretly recruited Fang Yuan to influence Fangzheng.
Guyue Mo Chen is observing the situation and Fang Yuan's actions, considering whether to recruit him.
Guyue Lian is suspected by Guyue Bo of having secretly recruited Fang Yuan to influence Fangzheng.
The Academy Elder observes the clan's political dealings regarding Fang Yuan, believing Fang Yuan has been recruited and is integrating into the family system.
The Academy Elder accepts Guyue Bo's order to pass a message and reward to Fang Yuan.
The Dark Hall Elder accepts Guyue Bo's order to plan a response to the external threat targeting Fangzheng.
Wang Da's death is confirmed, officially ruled a suicide, but implicitly understood to be related to Fang Yuan's actions.
Guyue Fangzheng is the subject of clan political maneuvering due to his A-grade talent, with Guyue Bo taking him under his personal tutelage.
The central hub for clan governance and political decision-making.

S-REV-107.prose:
Chapter 80 In the hall, clan leader Guyue Bo was expressionless, his eyes deep as he sat at the head of the table. The remaining dozen or so elders were all sitting upright with their heads lowered. They only used the corner of their eyes to vaguely glance left and right, trying to discern some clues from the expressions of the people around them. The atmosphere became strange. "Fang Yuan being able to get first place, there must be a deeper meaning behind it. He actually said he found a bag with a wild boar's tusk on the way, this is too fake. " "This bag can only be prepared by someone in secret, it is impossible for Fang Yuan to do it alone. That is to say, someone is secretly helping Fang Yuan. " "This year's mid-year examination is different from the past. Because we need to mobilize tens of Rank two Gu Masters to monitor and observe, the contents of this examination are not only known by the academy elder, but also many other clan elders. " "To prepare this bag in advance, only the clan elders present, or even the clan leader!" The clan elders were all experienced, having been in the political arena for many years, they immediately thought of many things. Fangzheng was an A grade talent, if he was nurtured to Rank four, what would that be? That would be the next clan leader! Fang Yuan was Fangzheng's brother, although he was only a C grade talent, just this bit of blood relationship was worth investing in! To clan leader Guyue Bo, if he secretly helped Fang Yuan and brought him into his system, it would be a good bond for Fangzheng in the future. To the clan elders, Fangzheng was the only A grade talent in recent years, and had already been brought into the clan leader's faction. If he was really nurtured, the clan leader's faction would become even stronger. If the clan elders took Fang Yuan in for their own use, using this blood relationship, he would be an extremely useful chess piece to deal with Fangzheng in the future. So, the tens of people sitting in this hall all had the motive to help Fang Yuan. But who could it be? Guyue pondered, "I did not recruit Fang Yuan, who could be helping him in secret? Was it that old fellow Mo Chen?

That was possible. Although Fang Yuan had killed his family's servants, they were nothing. Even if they were all dead, he wouldn't feel any heartache. It was more likely that the Patriarch would take in Guyue Fangzheng and then pull Guyue and Fang Yuan over. This way, he would have more control over Fangzheng! It's just that … the usual practice is to recruit them at the end of the year. To make a move in the middle of the year, this is breaking the rules. " "It's not a violation of the rules, but it's indeed a violation of the law. Who thinks so highly of Fang Yuan? Who thinks more highly of him than me? "Guyue and Mo Chen were also thinking. As a matter of fact, after Fang Yuan killed Gao Wan and dismembered his corpse as a gift, he had a whole new level of respect for Fang Yuan, and even had some thoughts of recruiting him. However, this kind of recruitment usually happened at the end of the year, when the students graduated from the academy. The fact that Fang Yuan had been recruited ahead of time caught Guyue and Mo Chen off guard. Guyue Bo's gaze was mainly focused on the faces of the two authoritative elders, Guyue Mo Chen and Guyue Lian. This clan leader thought more deeply and more deeply. Fang Yuan had brazenly told a lie and won first place. This behavior had a sense of unscrupulousness, and it was also a signal to the outside world. It was to let them see that Fang Yuan was under my protection! I had taken him in ahead of time, so you'd better not touch him. Who could this person be? In the Guyue family, the political structure was a tripartite balance of power. Aside from the Patriarch, there was Guyue Lian representing the Chi bloodline, and Guyue Mo Chen representing the Mo bloodline.

Guyue Bo was well aware that he hadn't done anything to recruit Fang Yuan. Then the biggest suspects were Guyue Lian and Guyue Mo Chen. "These two old fellows' acting skills are getting better and better. Just by looking at their expressions, I really can't tell. Could it be that it wasn't them, but some other small power? " Guyue Bo observed and guessed without leaving a trace. He didn't know that the other elders were the same as him, observing, suspecting, and trying to figure it out. The academy elder was also guessing, but he had always maintained a neutral position, dissociating himself from the political struggle, so his thoughts were much simpler: "So Fang Yuan was recruited by one of the elders. No wonder he let Fangzheng, Mobei, and Chicheng go when he was extorting. I guess the person who recruited him was either the Patriarch, Chi Lian, or Mo Chen. This is a good thing! This means that he has already recognized reality, and has begun to integrate into the family. No matter what, he is still a part of the family. In the future, he will completely integrate into the family, and will be willing to dedicate his life to the family! " After a moment of silence, Guyue Bo couldn't see any clues, so he opened his mouth: "It is impolite not to reciprocate, the other party actually started to target Fangzheng, our Guyue Family is not easy to bully, we must return the favor! Dark Hall Elder, plan this matter first, then report to me. " "Understood, Lord Patriarch." The Dark Hall Elder immediately nodded his head in agreement. "As for Guyue Fangzheng, I am worried that his spirit will be affected by this unforeseen event. He is A grade aptitude, to our family, there is no need to say more. From today onwards, I will tutor him alone. "Guyue Bo said again. No elder raised any objections.

Actually, many people knew that the Patriarch had secretly given Guyue Fangzheng special treatment. Bringing this matter up now, even though it went against the principle of fairness, but the reason was sufficient, and the elders couldn't stop him. "As for Guyue Fang Yuan …" Guyue Bo purposely dragged out his words. At that moment, all the elders perked up their ears. Could it be that the Patriarch secretly helped Fang Yuan? Guyue Bo looked around, he was also observing the expressions of the surrounding elders. But he was destined to be disappointed. Thus, he could only continue: "It was not easy for him to obtain first place with C grade aptitude. I will personally reward him with thirty pieces of primeval stones. Academy Elder, pass a message to him, tell him to work hard. " "Yes, Lord Patriarch." The Academy Elder bowed and accepted the order. "Thirty Primordial Stones, what is the meaning of this insignificant reward?" The clan elders all frowned. "No matter who secretly recruited Fang Yuan, these 30 Yuan stone are my goodwill. After all, other than Guyue, there is still the Bai Clan and Xiong Clan. "Guyue Bo sighed in his heart. Fangzheng's assassination was due to an external enemy. Fang Yuan's cheating was due to internal strife. To deal with external enemies, one naturally had to use forceful methods. To deal with internal strife, Patriarch Guyue Bo was mainly conciliatory, in order to avoid too much internal strife, which would cause the overall strength of the family to decline. "Alright, this matter will be settled like this for now. Everyone, step down and focus on your work.

The prosperity of the family is inseparable from everyone's performance. "Guyue Bo waved his hand. "Yes, Lord Patriarch. Then we will take our leave. " The elders left one by one, and after a few breaths, only Guyue Bo was left in the hall. He sighed deeply, using his fingers to massage his temples. As the Patriarch, he was the person with the highest authority in the Guyue clan. But it was not easy for him, he had to coordinate the interests of many parties. He could not do as he pleased. The power in the clan was intertwined, passed down from generation to generation, and had a long history, with many restrictions. Externally, he had to face the arrogant Xiong Clan, and the rising Bai Clan. Internally, he had to deal with the complicated political struggles in the clan. Although he was middle-aged, his hair had already turned white. "These years as the Patriarch, although I have sufficient resources, my cultivation progress has been slow, and my mind has been burdened by the clan's affairs. Sometimes, I really want to be a lone ranger, free and relaxed. Without any burden, my steps would naturally be light, and maybe I can walk even further on the path of cultivation. " Guyue Bo sighed in his heart. Once you enter the clan's system, you will have responsibilities, and with responsibilities, it will not be easy, and you will not be able to cultivate wholeheartedly. But conversely, if you don't enter the clan's system, the clan will not provide you with resources. Without resources, a lone Gu Master's cultivation will also have a hard time. This formed a contradiction, a vicious circle. It was this vicious circle that shackled the future of many, burying many people's talents and talents! Wang Da died.
S-REV-107.summary: In the Clan Leader's Hall, Guyue Bo presides over a tense meeting, observing the elders closely as they discuss Fang Yuan's unexpected exam success. Everyone suspects that someone secretly aided Fang Yuan, seeing it as a power play for influence over Fangzheng. Guyue Bo, despite his suspicions, doesn't find concrete evidence, and makes calculated decisions to personally tutor Fangzheng and give Fang Yuan a nominal reward, aiming to manage internal politics and external threats.

continuityMutations.content: Wang Da's death and the hunters' disappearance have been successfully covered up, securing his past actions.
Jiang He is now a complicit ally due to their shared secret.
Fang Yuan was responsible for the deaths of Wang Da and the hunters, and that concealing this protects his own career.
Fang Yuan receives news of Wang Da's death and the other hunters' disappearance, securing his earlier actions.
Fang Yuan secures a pragmatic alliance with Jiang He due to their shared secret regarding Wang Da.
Fang Yuan has significantly increased his physical strength through training with the White Boar Gu.
Fang Yuan discovers a second secret chamber from the Flower Wine Monk's legacy and acquires a Jade Skin Gu.
Fang Yuan realizes the new Jade Skin Gu presents a significant feeding challenge, requiring jade.
Fang Yuan discovers a massive horde of jade eye stone monkeys in the underground stone forest, realizing they are a source of jade but also a grave threat.
Jiang He confirms Wang Da's death and the disappearance of the other hunters, implicitly covering up Fang Yuan's actions to protect his own reputation.
Jiang He offers Fang Yuan a 50% discount at his cousin's shop as a bribe for silence and a means of fostering an alliance.

relationshipMutations.type: pragmatic alliance based on shared secret

S-REV-108.prose:
Three days later, Fang Yuan got the news. At the same time, he heard from Jiang He that the two young hunters had indeed gone missing when they went hunting in the mountains. As for the hunter whose right hand was cut off by Fang Yuan, he 'committed suicide' at home due to depression. When Jiang He said this, he looked at Fang Yuan with a profound gaze. He saw Wang Da's corpse later, and naturally recognized his identity. But he did not dare to say Wang Da's true identity. He was a Gu Master stationed in the village, and had responsibilities. As long as one entered the system, regardless of position, they would have responsibilities. Wang Da had been a demonic Gu Master for more than three years, but as a Gu Master stationed in the village, he did not investigate. If it was really investigated, it would be a big stain on his resume, and his future in the clan would be ruined. He also tried his best to suppress the strange deaths of the three young hunters. "Fang Yuan, we are all acquaintances now. From now on, if you buy anything from my cousin Jiang Ya's shop, you will get a 50% discount!" At one time, Jiang He said to Fang Yuan. The others were all dead, and only he and Fang Yuan knew the truth of this matter. But if this matter was exposed, it would not have much impact on Fang Yuan. Because he only killed three serfs, even if he killed thirty, the clan would not pursue it. At most, it would be a symbolic punishment like "a dozen Yuan stone". Jiang He took the initiative to bribe, and Fang Yuan naturally did not refuse. To Fang Yuan, this matter was full of surprises and thrills from beginning to end, but the good thing was the result was good. After this matter, Fang Yuan, who had no foundation in the clan, gained half an ally, and a non-existent backer. It was this mysterious backer that gave Fang Yuan a second layer of protection. When he gradually became no longer weak, this protection would play a key role, at least able to support his cultivation until Rank two, and not attract too much pressure.

Now, he could clearly feel the academy elder's attitude towards him softening. More than ten days passed in a flash. After Guyue Fangzheng and Guyue Mobei, Fang Yuan and Chicheng successfully advanced to Rank one upper stage at almost the same time. Although the robbery and extortion still continued, he no longer robbed Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng's Yuan stone. He became more and more low-key, and his strength also grew at a speed several times faster than in his previous life. ================================================== Chapter 81 Time flew by like a white steed, summer passed and autumn came. In the tunnel, Fang Yuan once again stood in front of the boulder blocking the way. Because the weather was getting colder, he wore a simple long sleeved shirt. But his body was no longer as skinny as it was a few months ago. His chest, arms, legs, and abdomen all had obvious muscle groups. These muscles were not protruding like the boulder, but had a streamlined shape. Together with Fang Yuan's growing body, and his white skin, it gave off a youthful and energetic feeling. "Since three days ago, the White Boar Gu can no longer increase my strength. That means, I already have the strength of a boar, and have reached the Flower Wine Monk's goal. Today, I will push this boulder again! " Fang Yuan's eyes flashed, his right leg stepped forward, his left leg behind, forming a bow step. He placed both of his hands on the surface of the boulder, took a deep breath, and exerted force. The boulder, under the push of his hands, slowly moved, then slowly moved, and finally rolled forward. The path blocked by the boulder was a slanted tunnel. The Flower Wine Monk had processed the boulder into a spherical shape, and was most suitable for rolling. This was probably his intention, to let the successor push the boulder, and roll it up. "Ten steps, twenty steps, thirty steps …" Fang Yuan pushed forward step by step, silently calculating in his heart, "Last week, I pushed forty-five steps, and my stamina was exhausted, so I had to give up. This time, I wonder how far I can push it?
S-REV-108.summary: Fang Yuan receives news from Jiang He about Wang Da's 'suicide' and the disappearance of the other hunters, confirming the successful cover-up of his past actions. Jiang He, implicated in the cover-up, offers Fang Yuan a bribe in the form of a discount, solidifying a pragmatic, unspoken alliance. Fang Yuan acknowledges the temporary protection this provides, allowing him to continue his cultivation and progress to Rank one upper stage, while maintaining a low profile.

continuityMutations.content: The White Boar Gu has reached its limit in increasing his strength.
He has acquired a Jade Skin Gu, filling a defensive gap in his abilities.
The Jade Skin Gu requires jade for food, presenting a new resource challenge.
He has discovered a vast underground stone forest inhabited by a horde of dangerous jade eye stone monkeys, whose eyes are a source of jade.
The Flower Wine Monk's legacy is further revealed through a second secret chamber containing a Jade Skin Gu and an underground stone forest with a challenge.
Part of the Flower Wine Monk's legacy, containing physical challenges.
A part of the Flower Wine Monk's hidden legacy, containing a Gu worm.
A natural formation within Qing Mao Mountain, housing a large beast horde of jade eye stone monkeys.
Part of the Flower Wine Monk's legacy, representing a new challenge.

C-REV-01.transition: Pushed a heavy stone door open to reveal a vast cavern

S-REV-109.prose:
Now, he could clearly feel the academy elder's attitude towards him softening. More than ten days passed in a flash. After Guyue Fangzheng and Guyue Mobei, Fang Yuan and Chicheng successfully advanced to Rank one upper stage at almost the same time. Although the robbery and extortion still continued, he no longer robbed Fangzheng, Mobei and Chicheng's Yuan stone. He became more and more low-key, and his strength also grew at a speed several times faster than in his previous life. ================================================== Chapter 81 Time flew by like a white steed, summer passed and autumn came. In the tunnel, Fang Yuan once again stood in front of the boulder blocking the way. Because the weather was getting colder, he wore a simple long sleeved shirt. But his body was no longer as skinny as it was a few months ago. His chest, arms, legs, and abdomen all had obvious muscle groups. These muscles were not protruding like the boulder, but had a streamlined shape. Together with Fang Yuan's growing body, and his white skin, it gave off a youthful and energetic feeling. "Since three days ago, the White Boar Gu can no longer increase my strength. That means, I already have the strength of a boar, and have reached the Flower Wine Monk's goal. Today, I will push this boulder again! " Fang Yuan's eyes flashed, his right leg stepped forward, his left leg behind, forming a bow step. He placed both of his hands on the surface of the boulder, took a deep breath, and exerted force. The boulder, under the push of his hands, slowly moved, then slowly moved, and finally rolled forward. The path blocked by the boulder was a slanted tunnel. The Flower Wine Monk had processed the boulder into a spherical shape, and was most suitable for rolling. This was probably his intention, to let the successor push the boulder, and roll it up. "Ten steps, twenty steps, thirty steps …" Fang Yuan pushed forward step by step, silently calculating in his heart, "Last week, I pushed forty-five steps, and my stamina was exhausted, so I had to give up. This time, I wonder how far I can push it?

" Forty steps, forty-five steps … After a while, Fang Yuan broke the original record. But he was also extremely tired. Forty-six steps, forty-seven steps … Fang Yuan could clearly feel, at this step, his stamina was almost depleted. Forty-eight, forty-nine steps … He gathered his remaining strength, and advanced another two steps. Finally, he could not walk anymore, his whole body was drenched in sweat. Using his shoulders and legs to support himself against the boulder, he took a few deep breaths. "Should I give up?" Fang Yuan could not help but think. This was a slanted tunnel, and on the way back, he would expend a lot of stamina. After all, the round stone still had to roll down, and during this process, he still had to support it. If he directly let go and ran, the round stone would roll faster and faster. He didn't want to be crushed into a pile of meat paste by the round stone in time. But after thinking about it, Fang Yuan felt a little unwilling, so he pushed a few more steps. The fiftieth step. He suddenly felt the pressure from the boulder lessen. It turned out that the boulder had rolled up a flight of stairs. Fang Yuan pushed a few more steps and went around the boulder. He found himself in a secret room. This secret chamber was about the same size as the secret cave in the stone crack. Fang Yuan temporarily named it the Second Chamber. There was nothing in the secret chamber, and the walls were made of a strange red soil that emitted a dim red light. On the other side of the secret room was a crude gray stone door. It should be the work of the Flower Wine Monk in a hurry.

Fang Yuan rested for a while and did not immediately push open the stone door. Instead, he made a new discovery. He noticed that the ground in front of the stone door was wet. "Could it be …" A thought appeared in Fang Yuan's mind. He squatted down and stretched out his hands, pushing aside the soft and wet soil. The second Earth Treasury Flower! Fang Yuan laughed heartily and carefully pushed aside the petals, taking out the Gu worm that was soaking in the golden nectar. Activating his primeval essence, it was instantly refined. This was a Jade Skin Gu. It looked like a bug, flat and wide, with a small head. Its light green body was oval in shape, emitting a layer of jade light. "After I got the White Boar Gu, I was still thinking about where to get another Jade Skin Gu. That way, I can fuse it into the White Jade Gu. To think that the Flower Wine Monk had already prepared one for me. "Fang Yuan's thoughts moved quickly, thinking about the effects of this Jade Skin Gu. This was already Fang Yuan's sixth Gu worm. Although he had five Gu worms before, none of them could be used for defense. With the Jade Skin Gu, he could finally fill the gap in his defense. Sometimes, defense often meant offense. This was not hard to understand. Take Fang Yuan for example, he used the White Boar Gu to raise his strength to the strength of a boar. Logically speaking, this kind of strength could allow him to smash soft rocks with one punch, but Fang Yuan had never done so before. Because he knew that his defense was not strong enough.

If he punched, the rocks would shatter, but his fist would also be a bloody mess. Now that he had the Jade Skin Gu's defense, he could fully display his strength. Of course, there were good and bad sides to the influence. The Jade Skin Gu's value was high, and its defense was one of the best among the Rank one Gu worms. But it was not easy to feed. Every ten days, it had to eat two taels of jade. Jade was more expensive in the market, so let's not talk about it. The main problem was the source. Fangzheng also had a Jade Skin Gu, but he had the support of the clan leader, who provided him with jade. If Fang Yuan wanted to obtain jade, he could only buy it, but it was too easy to give himself away. "Originally, to feed the White Boar Gu, I needed to kill wild boars regularly, and that was already troublesome. Now that I have this Jade Skin Gu, am I supposed to go mining everywhere? "Fang Yuan laughed bitterly, as a new problem appeared in front of him. Keeping the Jade Skin Gu and keeping it in his aperture, Fang Yuan slowly pushed open the stone door. The stone door was heavy, and if Fang Yuan did not have the White Boar Gu to increase his strength, he would not have been able to push it open. But now, with Fang Yuan's two hands pushing, the stone door slowly opened. The scene outside the door appeared in front of Fang Yuan, and his field of vision suddenly expanded! This was no longer a narrow tunnel or a secret cave, but a spacious underground stone forest. Fang Yuan roughly estimated, and with just a rough estimate, he knew that this underground stone forest had an area of at least thirty mu! On Earth, a standard football field was only eleven mu. "I should be inside Qing Mao mountain, and this space should be naturally formed." Fang Yuan looked at the surrounding stone walls. The stone walls of this space were all above sixteen meters, and the ceiling was naturally a stone wall.

From the ceiling, huge dark red stone pillars hung down. Every stone pillar emitted a faint red light, and so did the surrounding stone walls. Just like the tunnel and the secret cave, although the light in this space was dim, it was enough for Fang Yuan to see some things clearly. Fang Yuan looked around, and saw that the stone pillars were like inverted trees, with no branches, and only a lonely trunk was left. The surface of the stone pillars was not smooth, and was filled with small black holes. Countless stone pillars of different sizes hung down, forming an inverted stone forest within the mountain. Nature was such an uncanny workmanship. Fang Yuan was knowledgeable, and was not surprised. He only stared at the black holes on the stone pillars, and his brows furrowed. He somewhat understood the Flower Wine Monk's intention in setting up the Jade Skin Gu. "If I'm not wrong …" Fang Yuan flipped his right hand, and shot out a moonblade. The eerie blue moonblade drew a straight line in the air, and accurately shot into one of the black holes on the stone pillar. From the black hole came a sharp and angry cry. With a swoosh, a grey monkey flew out of the hole, and suddenly pounced towards Fang Yuan. Chi chi chi. Fang Yuan shot out three moonblades in a row.
