The monkey could not borrow strength in the air, but its tail was extremely agile, and as it swung, it actually caused its body to somersault in the air. After dodging two moonblades, it was finally hit by the third moonblade. With a plop, it fell to the ground, dead. It died, but did not shed a single drop of blood. The grey body suddenly turned to stone, and in an instant, it turned from a body of flesh and blood into a stone monkey statue. The statue's posture, the expression on its face, was exactly the same as the monkey's before it died, lifelike. After two breaths, the stone monkey's surface made a cracking sound, and cracks rapidly spread from inside to outside of its body.

Then, with a crack, it broke into small pieces of stone. "It really is an underground beast horde, jade eye stone monkey." Fang Yuan walked closer and squatted down, pushing aside the rubble, and took out two jade green round beads. These two round beads were the eyes of the jade eye stone monkey. After this strange creature died, its body would turn into grey rubble, and only its eyes would turn into two jade round beads. Every jade bead was extremely heavy, weighing at least one tael. This meant that as long as he killed the jade eye stone monkey, the Jade Skin Gu's food problem would be solved. "But I not only need to feed the Jade Skin Gu, I also need to continue inheriting the Flower Wine Monk's legacy. The next clue to the Flower Wine Monk's legacy should be somewhere in this stone forest. " Fang Yuan frowned. This was troublesome. He tried to take a few steps forward, his gaze focused on the stone pillar. On the seventh step, on the stone pillar closest to him, in the densely packed stone holes, pairs of green eyes gradually lit up. Immediately, a drop of cold sweat flowed down from Fang Yuan's forehead. He quickly retracted his foot, and the countless green eyes in the small black hole dimmed again. Obviously, each pair of eyes represented a jade eye stone monkey. The jade eye stone monkeys were extremely agile, and Fang Yuan had to use four moonblades to kill one. On each stone pillar, there were at least a hundred jade eye stone monkeys. And in the entire stone forest, who knew how many of these monkeys there were. With Fang Yuan's current strength, if he were to be surrounded by four monkeys, he would die with a grievance. If the defense of the Jade Skin Gu was included, Fang Yuan alone could at most deal with twelve jade eye stone monkeys. But luckily, these monkeys usually slept in the black hole, and when they were hungry or thirsty, they would gnaw on the stones around them. The stone pillar was their home, and also their food.

Unless one was within ten meters of them, or provoked them, they would not come out. In the words of Earth, they were a group of house monkeys.
S-REV-109.summary: Weeks later, Fang Yuan, now noticeably more muscular from using the White Boar Gu, successfully pushes the enormous boulder past his previous record, discovering a hidden staircase and the 'Second Secret Chamber.' Inside, he finds and refines a Jade Skin Gu, a crucial defensive worm. However, he immediately recognizes the challenge of feeding it. Pushing past a heavy stone door, he steps into a vast 'Underground Stone Forest' filled with countless jade eye stone monkeys, realizing they are both a source of jade for his new Gu and an overwhelming threat.

continuityMutations.content: Acknowledges that his C-grade aptitude and time spent on other tasks are reasons for his slower cultivation progress compared to Fangzheng.
Reaffirms his belief that the next clue to the Flower Wine Monk's power inheritance should be somewhere in the stone forest.
Observes the competitive and hierarchical nature of the Gu Master clan system, where success and cultivation level dictate status and survival.

A Rank two upper stage Gu Master, representing the Chi faction. Was once considered an A-grade talent but tested as B-grade, leading to a calmer temperament. He is one of the most elite Rank two Gu Masters in the clan.
To find clues to the Flower Wine Monk's next power inheritance in the stone forest.
面临元石短缺问题，难以支撑 Gu 虫的培养和未来的晋升。
A Rank two upper stage Gu Master, representing the Chi faction.
Was once considered an A-grade talent but tested as B-grade, leading to a calmer temperament. He is one of the most elite Rank two Gu Masters in the clan.
Believed by Fang Yuan to contain clues to the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.

S-REV-110.prose:
Chapter 82 The autumn wind rustled, and red leaves fell. The weeds were yellow, and red or orange wild fruits hung on the branches. "Hmph!" The black wild boar's hair stood up, its four hooves stampeding on the ground. The ground on the mountain was covered in a thick layer of fallen leaves. The wild boar charged over, bringing with it a gust of wind, and the fallen leaves danced behind it. Fang Yuan stood there quietly, looking at the wild boar getting closer, his face cold. Kill! He suddenly took a big step forward, and then his legs took turns to move, not dodging, but charging towards the wild boar. The wild boar's two snow white tusks pierced through the air, emitting killing intent. Fang Yuan dodged the tusks, and slammed his shoulder into the wild boar's head. Just as they were about to collide, a light green jade light flashed on Fang Yuan's shoulder. Jade Skin Gu! Bam. With a muffled sound, the two fiercely collided. Fang Yuan took three steps back, while the wild boar took one step back. Honestly speaking, between the two sides, Fang Yuan was slightly stronger. But Fang Yuan's two legs could not support the wild boar's four hooves, and at the same time, the wild boar's center of gravity was much lower and more stable than Fang Yuan's. But the wild boar's head was hit by Fang Yuan, and although it was still standing, its fat body was already shaking. Fang Yuan shouted, and charged forward again, his left hand pressing on the wild boar's tusks, and his right fist raised high. The light green jade light formed a thin membrane, covering the surface of his fist. Bam. The fist smashed down, and the wild boar immediately cried out in pain, struggling with all its might. The muscles on Fang Yuan's left arm bulged, and the veins popped out, like earthworms coiling around his arm, tightly restraining the wild boar. At the same time, his right fist continued to be raised high, and then smashed down heavily. Bam bam bam.

Every time his fist hit the wild boar's head, the jade light on his fist would explode once. The wild boar was smashed by the fist until it was dizzy, and its struggling became weaker and weaker. "Final blow!" Fang Yuan's eyes flashed with electricity. He stretched his upper body and straightened his right arm, raising it to the highest point. Then, he bent his right elbow and smashed it down. The green jade light stuck closely to Fang Yuan's right elbow. Following Fang Yuan's movements, it drew a green shadow in the air. Bang! Fang Yuan knelt on one knee and smashed the wild boar's skull with his elbow. The wild boar did not even have the time to let out a final scream before it suddenly stopped. A pig's head was completely deformed. The broken white skull pierced through the black skin and was exposed. Fresh blood and brain matter flowed out slowly, dyeing the layers of withered leaves in a brilliant scarlet color. A bleak autumn wind blew over. It rolled up a few fallen leaves and blew away the steam from the pig's blood. "Life should be as splendid as the summer flowers. Death should be as beautiful as autumn leaves, "Fang Yuan murmured, appreciating the scene. The living were strong and brilliant, while the dead were cold and silent. Between life and death, there was such a strong contrast, showing the cruelty of nature, and the brilliance of life. "No matter which world, the victor is splendid and brilliant, while the loser is cold and desolate. The difference between victory and defeat, to me, is the difference between life and death. Because walking on the demonic path, once one fails, it usually means death. " Fang Yuan leaned against the boar's corpse and sat cross-legged on the ground. He let out the White Boar Gu and let it eat the boar, before sending a portion of his consciousness into his aperture. The dark green bronze primeval sea in his aperture was rising and falling, waves rising and falling.

When the primeval sea was at the great circle, it occupied 44% of the aperture's volume. In the intense battle earlier, Fang Yuan had used the Jade Skin Gu many times to increase his defense, causing his primeval essence to be consumed. Now, he only had 36% of his primeval essence left. Calculating, he had only used 80% of his primeval essence, not even 10%. But because this was Rank one peak stage dark green primeval essence, the consumption was huge. Rank one initial stage was jade green primeval essence. Rank one middle stage was pale green primeval essence. Rank one upper stage was dark green primeval essence. Rank one peak stage was dark green primeval essence. Concentrated was the essence. Activating the Moonlight Gu once required 10% of the jade green primeval essence, but when converted to pale green primeval essence, it only required 5%. The dark green primeval essence was reduced by half, and so was the dark green primeval essence. That is to say, 10% dark green primeval essence was equivalent to 20% dark green, 40% pale green, and 80% jade green. Using the Jade Skin Gu consumed 80% of the dark green primeval essence, and when converted to Rank one initial stage jade green primeval essence, it was 64%! If Fang Yuan was still at initial stage, his aperture would only have 44% primeval essence, and after using half of it, the primeval sea in his aperture would be completely used up. "The higher the Gu Master's cultivation, the stronger their battle strength, and this is reflected in their primeval essence. The higher the rank, the darker the color of the primeval essence, and the more durable it is. But my dark green primeval essence was refined by the Liquor worm on the basis of upper stage primeval essence. Unlike Fangzheng, who has already advanced to Rank one peak stage. "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan's gaze flashed. Time passed quickly, and it was already late autumn. It had been more than two months since Wang Da's assassination. Fangzheng was poisoned, and had been unconscious for seven days and seven nights. When he woke up, it was as if he had changed into a different person. He became extremely hardworking, and his cultivation was extremely arduous. Some people say, every tribulation in life is a fortune akin to gold.

Regardless of whether this was true or not, Fangzheng had indeed learned a lot from this tribulation. He was like an unpolished jade, and after being polished, the beautiful jade inside was revealed. He was the first student to advance to upper stage, and not long ago, he was the first to advance to Rank one peak stage, once again leaving his peers behind. The radiance of A grade aptitude began to shine from his body. "I am not far from the peak, at most ten days to half a month. Speaking of which, I have never stopped nurturing my aperture, but C grade aptitude cannot be compared to A or B grade aptitude. At the same time, there is another reason … "Fang Yuan thought of this, and his mouth opened, letting out a silent bitter laugh. Every once in a while, he would hunt jade eye stone monkeys, and feed them to the Jade Skin Gu. At the same time, he would continue to search in the stone forest, in order to find clues to the Flower Wine Monk's next power inheritance. The terrain of the stone forest was rather complicated, and huge rocks hung vertically from the ceiling. If Fang Yuan was not careful, he would get too close to a stone pillar, and attract the attack of the jade eye stone monkeys. There were many times when Fang Yuan was chased by tens of jade eye stone monkeys. The most dangerous time was when he was retreating, he stepped into the warning line of another stone pillar, and attracted the pursuit of two groups of over a hundred stone monkeys. Luckily, these jade eye stone monkeys had a shut-in nature, and every time they chased, they would not chase too far. After chasing for a distance, they would often return home, and continue to shut-in. Even so, there were many times when Fang Yuan was on the brink of death. At crucial times, the Jade Skin Gu played a very good defensive role. Such explorations required Fang Yuan to invest large amounts of time and energy, and this was the main reason why his cultivation progress was so slow. "But even so, it's much better than my previous life. Also, exploring the stone forest is not without results. At least I know that there are no problems with the surrounding stone walls. My initial guess is that the next clue to the power inheritance should be somewhere in the stone forest. " As Fang Yuan was deep in thought, a black shadow stepped over the dead branches, approaching. This was a wandering old wolf. It had a brown fur coat, and was limping. One of its eyes was disabled, and its remaining left eye emitted a cruel and alert green light.

It stared closely at Fang Yuan, its nose twitching. Wolves were like dogs, and had a keen sense of smell. It should have been attracted by the smell of pig blood. Wolves were usually pack animals, but there were also wandering crippled wolves like this. There was competition within the wolf pack, and to maintain the vitality of the entire pack, they would get rid of the crippled old wolves with low battle strength. Fang Yuan quickly stood up, quietly looking at this old wolf. In the past, when he killed a wild boar, he would have little primeval essence left, and his battle strength would decrease greatly. When encountering wild beasts, he would choose to avoid them. But these few months, his battle strength had increased rapidly, and with the Jade Skin Gu, it was more than enough to deal with a crippled wolf. The entire mountain was covered in red leaves. The setting sun shone down. One man and one wolf were fifty steps apart, quietly looking at each other. In the wolf's eyes, a green light shone, revealing a cruel and cunning intent. As for Fang Yuan's eyes, they were deep and dark, emitting a cold intent. The White Boar Gu came out. It had eaten its fill, and flew back into Fang Yuan's aperture in satisfaction. The old wolf looked at the wild boar on the ground, only bones and skin were left, the meat was almost eaten up by the White Boar Gu. The green light in the wolf's eyes shrunk, and it took a few steps back, before turning around and entering the forest. To be able to survive until now, this old wolf naturally had a certain level of intelligence. It sharply sensed Fang Yuan's terror, and cautiously chose to retreat. It came suddenly, and left in a hurry. There was no noise from the wild boar's charge, no noise from the tiger's growl. The battle with Fang Yuan started and ended in silence. "Under the theme of life and death, who knows how many wonders nature has nurtured." Fang Yuan stood on the spot, not giving chase. There was nothing on this old wolf that was worth his time.

Howl! But at the next moment, the old wolf's miserable howl was heard. The wolf howl suddenly erupted, and instantly stopped. As such, there was a thick aura of death. Crack, crack. From the forest, there was the sound of twigs being stepped on. The sound was unrestrained, getting closer and closer. Fang Yuan's pupils shrunk. "To be able to get rid of that crafty old wolf in an instant …" His gaze became colder. ================================================== Chapter 83 The footsteps got closer, and soon the dark green bushes at the edge of the slope were forcefully separated. A tall man stepped onto the slope and appeared in Fang Yuan's vision. He had a head full of short black hair, each strand of hair was straight and strong. He was bare-chested, and his skin was crimson red. He was nearly two meters tall, and in the late autumn chill, he gave people the feeling that he was a moving furnace. It was as if every breath he took could raise the surrounding temperature. On his waist hung a group of wild beasts' corpses. There was a fox, a wild rabbit, a pheasant, and the old wolf that had just left. Seeing Fang Yuan, he was slightly stunned, and immediately took big steps, brushing past Fang Yuan's shoulder. "Guyue Shan." Looking at the back of the huge man, Fang Yuan thought of a name. This person was the representative of the Chi faction, Rank two upper stage cultivation. Speaking of which, his experience was similar to Fang Yuan's. This person was also gifted. When he was young, he was already very strong. When he was ten, he accidentally killed an adult servant. When he was twelve, he could pick up a heavy stone mill and play with it like a frisbee.
S-REV-110.summary: Fang Yuan expertly hunts and kills a wild boar using his Jade Skin Gu, then reflects on the harsh realities of life and death, and his own cultivation progress compared to Fangzheng. He then encounters a crippled old wolf, which he allows to leave, only for it to be killed by Guyue Shan, a powerful Gu Master who brushes past Fang Yuan without a word.

continuityMutations.content: Considers winning first place in the year-end examination for the 150 Yuan stone reward and priority to choose a Gu worm.
Has reached Rank one peak stage, despite his C-grade aptitude.
Experiences secret amusement and lack of surprise at Fangzheng's Rank two advancement, having anticipated it.
Tested as Rank one middle stage.
Tested as Rank one peak stage, has B-grade talent and is Guyue Lian's grandson.
Tested as Rank one peak stage.
Achieved Rank two initial stage, surpassing all his peers, including Fang Yuan, Mobei, and Chicheng.
Excitedly believes he has surpassed Fang Yuan, feeling a new sense of confidence and independence from his brother's shadow.
Received a Jade Skin Gu from clan leader Guyue Bo, implying special favor and support for his advancement.
Conducts the cultivation level assessments during the year-end examination.
Provided Fangzheng with a Jade Skin Gu, supporting his advancement to Rank two.
Transformed into an extremely hardworking and arduous cultivator after a poisoning incident, becoming the first to reach Rank one upper stage and then Rank one peak stage among his peers.
Oversees the academy's year-end examinations and announces important information regarding rewards and future opportunities.
Present at the academy examination, signifying the importance of the event and the promising students.
Site of the year-end examination, where students' battle skills are tested.

S-REV-111.prose:
At that time, he was looked upon favorably by the clan, and was thought to be an A grade talent. But after the Awakening Ceremony, he was tested to be only a B grade talent. He was originally arrogant and condescending, but after this incident, his temperament changed, and he became much calmer. Although he was only a B grade, in his year, he was the number one student. After a year of schooling, he left the academy and worked hard, and soon he stood out. After a few years, he had become an elite among the Rank two Gu Masters in the clan. Happiness could not teach people the truth of life, only pain could. "In the clan, youngsters attend the Awakening Ceremony at fifteen and enter the academy. They graduate from the academy at sixteen and form a five-man team to complete the clan's missions. At the same time, they have the right to inherit the clan's assets and split the clan. From the age of sixteen, their cultivation continues to improve, and the difficulty of the missions continue to rise, and their status continues to rise. Some were dead, and some were alive. Some are crippled, their cultivation drops, and they struggle at death's door. Some go through hardships and become Rank three Gu Masters, promoted to clan elder, and become a higher-up. " Fang Yuan's eyes flickered as he thought of many things. The further a Gu Master cultivates, the harder it gets, the harder it is to advance. Adding on the harsh living conditions, there were very few who could advance to the third rank. "Speaking of which, it's almost winter. I have been in the academy for almost a full year. Every batch of students had two major assessments. The first was the mid-year assessment, and the content was different for every batch. The second segment was the year-end exam. The content remained the same, it was all arena battles. After the arena battle, I won't be able to stay in the academy's dormitory anymore. I have to move out. " Where would he live after moving out?

It was impossible for Fang Yuan to live with his uncle and aunt. They were more than happy to do so. In this world, sixteen was the age of adulthood, the age of initiation. In addition, Fang Yuan had too many secrets, so he had to live alone. "In my previous life, when I graduated from the academy, I had just completed the middle stage of the first transition. In this life, the situation would be much better. By then, he would definitely be at the peak of the first transition. But to be able to achieve so much with C grade talent, it wasn't without a price. In the process, I used up a large amount of Yuan stone. " Fang Yuan frowned. He didn't have much Yuan stone left. Due to his limited talent, the amount of Yuan stone he used for cultivation was much more than Fangzheng, Chicheng and Mobei. He raised six Gu worms by himself! Other than that, refining the Liquor worm, nurturing the aperture, activating the White Boar Gu to increase its strength, etc, all required primeval essence. After the primeval essence was used up, just the recovery speed of a C grade talent would not be able to satisfy his needs. He could only use Yuan stone to absorb the natural primeval essence within to replenish it. Luckily, he had the Spring Autumn Cicada, and had obtained Gu from the Earth Treasury Flower twice. Thus, refining Gu worms did not require a large amount of Yuan stone. This made him feel slightly better. But after this, he would have to rent a house and buy some household items after he graduated from the academy. After the peak, he would have to charge for Rank two. This process would use up a large amount of Yuan stone. After Rank two, he would have to fuse Gu worms, and every fusion would require a large sum of money. Just these alone, his increasingly strained financial situation would not be able to support it. Furthermore, even if he could get through this, he would have to continue feeding Gu worms and continue to cultivate. During the mid-year examinations, if he had not used the wild boar tusks to exchange for a large amount of Yuan stone, relieving a large portion of his stress, he would not have been able to hold on.

If not, he would not have been able to hold on. "Yuan stone, Yuan stone … the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance did not provide Yuan stone, what a pity. The Yuan stone that he extorted from his classmates is the main source of support. But after the students graduate from the academy, the academy's allowance will stop, so I cannot continue extorting. But the first place in the year-end examinations seems to be able to get a hundred and fifty Yuan stone as a reward. "Fang Yuan pondered in his heart. If he could get first place, with the one hundred and fifty Yuan stone, his huge financial pressure would be slightly alleviated. … Time passed quickly, autumn passed and winter came. In the academy's battle arena, the three arenas had already been constructed. Beside the arenas, near the bamboo walls of the arena, there was a shed with a long table and reclining chairs. The academy elder, clan leader and a few other clan elders were all sitting under the shed. It was snowing lightly. Fifty-seven students stood upright in the arena. Their noses were red from the cold, and as they breathed, they breathed out hot air. The academy elder said loudly, "In the blink of an eye, a year has passed. In this year, you have all received training in the academy, and already possess the basic qualities of a Gu Master. Tomorrow is the year-end arena examination, it will test the results of your studies! At that time, not only will the clan leader and a few elders be present, there will also be your seniors and your seniors observing from the side, picking out those who perform well and accepting them into different groups. " "Tomorrow, your performance will greatly affect your future. The first place in the examination, not only will you get a hundred and fifty Yuan stone as a reward, you will also have the priority to choose your Gu worm! Now, you will begin your final cultivation examination in the academy! " After saying this, the academy elder nodded towards the Gu Master standing at the side. The middle-aged female Gu Master received the signal, and read out the first name on the list, "Guyue Jin Zhu!" A young girl walked out of the crowd with a nervous expression, walking in front of the Gu Master. The Gu Master stretched out her hand, touching the girl's abdomen, closing her eyes to feel for a while, before opening them and announcing, "Guyue Jin Zhu, Rank one middle stage. Next, Guyue Peng.

" One by one, the youths went up for the examination, and walked down, returning to the group. Their expressions were different, some disappointed, some happy. The worst result was naturally Rank one initial stage. Without exception, they were all D grade talents. Most of their cultivation was Rank one middle stage, and among these people, only a few had D grade talent, while most of them had C grade talent. "Guyue City." The middle-aged female Gu Master called out. Among all the people of the same age, the shortest Guyue City puffed out his chest and walked out. After a round of examination, the middle-aged female Gu Master opened her eyes, "Guyue City, Rank one peak stage!" From the start of the examination, this was the first Rank one peak stage Gu Master. The clan elders present could not help but nod lightly. An elder recognised him, saying softly, "This is Guyue Lian's grandson, B grade talent, no wonder." Outside the shed, the youths were also whispering to each other. "Chicheng is Rank one peak stage, I wonder if Mobei is? The two of them are sworn enemies. " "To be able to rise to the peak, they are all B or A grade. Sigh, us D and C grade are poor, there is no point in being envious. " "Hmph!" Guyue Mobei snorted coldly, looking at Chicheng's smug look, he felt unhappy. Guyue Fangzheng secretly clenched his fists, his lips pursed, as if he was holding in his anger. "Guyue Mobei." Soon, the examining Gu Master called out. Mo Bei, who had a horse-like face, walked out quickly. "Guyue Mobei, Rank one peak stage." With such a voice, he walked back, not wanting to be outdone as he glanced at Guyue City. The examination continued, and the snow in the air became smaller, until it finally stopped.

The air was cold and fresh. "Guyue Fang Yuan." The middle-aged female Gu Master called out. Fang Yuan was expressionless, walking up. After a while, the female Gu Master opened her eyes, looking at Fang Yuan in surprise, saying loudly, "Guyue Fang Yuan, Rank one peak stage!" "Rank one peak stage, did we hear wrongly? Fang Yuan actually cultivated to this level? "The youths were shocked. "Sigh, he got lucky, having the Liquor worm to nourish his aperture. Although it is only C grade, compared to B grade and A grade, he is not at a disadvantage. "Some of the youths said jealously. This was especially true for some of the teenagers with C grade aptitude. They comforted themselves with a sour tone, "It's nothing. The Liquor worm cannot refine Rank two primeval essence, Fang Yuan will not have this advantage in the future. " "Although it is the peak stage, it is still C grade talent, nothing to worry about." Mobei and Chicheng looked at Fang Yuan, then quickly shifted their gazes, looking at Fangzheng who was still standing in the group. In their hearts, the A grade talent Fangzheng was the true competitor. "Brother, you really surprised me. But now, watch carefully … "Fang Zheng's eyes shone brightly as he watched Fang Yuan walk down step by step, revealing an expression of great anticipation. "Guyue Fangzheng." The female Gu Master's voice came slowly. "That A grade talent?" For a moment, the clan elders all focused their gazes on Fangzheng. Fangzheng walked out from the crowd, he could feel the pressure from these gazes, making him slightly nervous. But when he saw clan leader Guyue Bo smiling at him, the nervousness in his heart melted. He walked to the middle aged female Gu Master.

The female Gu Master closed her eyes, then suddenly opened them, shouting in a surprised tone, "Guyue Fangzheng, cultivation — Rank two initial stage!" Boom. The youths immediately exploded into a wave of noise. "What, he actually reached Rank two?!" "As expected of an A grade talent." "Amazing, now Mobei, Chicheng and Fang Yuan are all left behind by him." "This Fangzheng!" For a moment, Mobei and Chicheng looked at Fangzheng in shock. "Hehehe, it's even higher than my previous life …" Fang Yuan lowered his eyelids and laughed. He was not too surprised, he had noticed Fangzheng's expression earlier and could vaguely guess the result. "A grade talent in the end." "Our clan's hope." "It's all thanks to lord clan leader's nurturing …" The clan elders praised. For a moment, Fangzheng became the focus of everyone's attention. Half a year ago, Guyue Bo gave him a Jade Skin Gu, making him the first person to advance to Rank two. He did it! "Lord clan leader, I did not let you down, I did it! From today onwards, I will do even more, gaining more recognition from the clan elders, gaining more recognition from the people around me. Brother, I have already left you behind, you are no longer a shadow in my heart. I, Guyue Fangzheng, am no longer the Guyue Fangzheng of the past! " Fangzheng shouted excitedly in his heart, his eyes shining with a dazzling radiance. This radiance, is called confidence!
S-REV-111.summary: Fang Yuan reflects on his impending graduation and the financial strain of his cultivation, contemplating the year-end examination's rewards. Later, at the snow-covered Academy Arena, students undergo cultivation assessments. Guyue Jin Zhu, Guyue City, Guyue Mobei, and Fang Yuan are all confirmed as Rank one peak stage. However, to everyone's surprise, Fangzheng is announced as Rank two initial stage, dramatically surpassing his peers and becoming the focus of the clan elders' praise. Fang Yuan, though seemingly unfazed, registers the development with secret amusement.

continuityMutations.content: The clan leader instructed not to recruit Fang Yuan due to his disharmonious relationship with Fangzheng and a desire for observation.
The clan leader instructed not to recruit Fang Yuan due to his disharmonious relationship with Fangzheng and a desire for observation.
Fangzheng and Fang Yuan are twin brothers, with Fangzheng being an A-grade talent and Fang Yuan a C-grade talent.
Fang Yuan is a 'battle maniac' who doesn't care about life and death in combat.
Fangzheng is a good seedling, talented and dependable, whose growth could alleviate the burden of fighting Bai Ning Bing.
Fang Yuan has 'guts' and is 'lawless,' even bullying his younger brother.
Fangzheng's cultivation to Rank two in the academy with solid foundational skills is rare, and he is highly valued by the clan leader.
He believes primeval essence level determines victory.
She is worried about Mo Bei's performance and wishes to help him against Fangzheng.
She views Fang Yuan as a 'battle maniac' similar to Chi Shan.
He is an arch-enemy of Mo Yan's faction, and observes the battles intently.
His eyes flicker with interest during Fang Yuan's daring combat style.
He views Fangzheng as the seed of hope to fight Bai Ning Bing.
He is ashen-faced when his grandson, Chi Cheng, is defeated by Fangzheng.
His grandson is taking the exam this year.
He believes Fangzheng will be this year's number one.
He struggles to adapt to Fangzheng's close-combat style.
He sustains numerous wounds in his fight against Fangzheng.
He is shocked by Fang Yuan's unimaginable dodging skills.
She is evenly matched with Mobei for a time but loses due to stamina.
He aims to defeat Fangzheng to 'kill two birds with one stone'.
He relies on his Scarlet Pill Cricket Gu for agility and avoids close combat.
He accurately assesses Mobei's use of a Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu.
He believes in relying only on himself, viewing companions as excuses for the weak.
Annual year-end exams are held here where Gu Masters observe and recruit students for their groups.

S-REV-112.prose:
Chapter 84
The sky was clear after the snow.
Early in the morning, Gu Masters entered the academy one after another.
"The annual year end exam is starting again.
Hehehe, think about it, the scene of me leaving the academy more than ten years ago is still fresh in my mind. "
A middle-aged Gu Master, his long green hair hanging down his back, stood in front of the academy and sighed.
"Boss, go in quickly, you love to be sentimental."
A young female Gu Master beside him, her lips red like blood, her hands in the pockets of her pants, a blade of grass in her mouth, rolled her eyes.
"Hehehe, Yao Hong, don't worry.
It doesn't matter if you go in sooner or later.
Anyway, the clan leader has already taken care of us, and our new members for this year have already been decided. "The green haired Gu Master laughed.
"That A grade genius called Fangzheng?"
The female Gu Master called Guyue Yao Hong scoffed and said unhappily, "The clan leader wants our group to be babysitters!"
"But this babysitter mission is not easy to complete." The green haired Gu Master sighed, "Forget it, let's go in first."
As time passed, more and more Gu Masters walked into the academy and stood still in the battle stage.
These Gu Masters were male and female, some were young, some were middle-aged, and there were even quite a number of elders.
After a year of learning in the academy, the Gu Masters would come out and form small groups to complete the clan's missions.
These Gu Masters who came to the battle stage were the representatives of each group, here to observe the students' performance, and if they liked them, they would be accepted into their own group.
To the group, this was to absorb new blood and expand.
As for the new members who joined the group, under the guidance and guidance of the older members, they could quickly adapt to the new environment and complete the clan's missions more efficiently, at the same time reducing casualties.
The sun gradually rose, and the students entered one after another.
"So many people today." The youngsters exclaimed.
"Look, that's Lord Qing Shu.
Our Guyue village's number one Rank two Gu Master, Lord Qing Shu's temper is famous for being gentle. "Someone pointed at the green haired male Gu Master and exclaimed.
"Chi Shan senior is here too."
"That's the Mo family's Miss Mo Yan!"
Qing Shu, Chi Shan and Mo Yan were the shining stars of the Gu Masters, and the students were familiar with them.
"Sigh, I can't get into the group of those three seniors.
I only have D grade aptitude, and my Natal Gu is only a Warm Silk Spider. I can only do logistics in the future. "A young man sighed and asked his friend beside him," What about you? "
"Oh, I've already contacted them through my connections.
He's my uncle's cousin's sister's godson. "
…
While the students were observing these Gu Masters, Qing Shu, Chi Shan, Mo Yan and the others were also observing these students.
"Eh?
There are actually two Guyue Fangzheng. "Yao Hong couldn't help exclaiming in surprise when she saw Fang Yuan and Fangzheng in the crowd.
The green-haired male Gu Master Guyue Qing Shu sighed helplessly, "Didn't you read the information I gave you yesterday?
Fangzheng had a twin brother who looked very similar.
However, his brother is only a C grade talent. "
"So that's how it is.
Oh, I seem to have heard of him. He's the Fang Yuan who wrote poems in his early years?
Then should we take him in? "Yao Hong suddenly slapped her forehead, speaking whatever came to her mind.
Qing Shu shook his head slightly, "The clan leader specially instructed us not to recruit him.
It seems like he wants to observe something.
Moreover, the relationship between these two brothers isn't harmonious.
Even if we have the intention to recruit him, I think Fang Yuan won't join. "
Yao Hong didn't mind, curling her lips, "Among all the groups, we are publicly recognized as the number one. Joining us means a bright future.
As long as it's a student, they will be moved.
How could he not be willing? "
Qing Shu laughed lightly, "That's because you don't understand him. You should take a look at the information I gave you first."
At this time, the clan leader Guyue Bo, the authoritative clan elder Guyue Lian, Guyue Mo Chen and the others entered in a line.
They walked to the shed and sat down.
"This year, not only did the clan leader come, even Chi Lian and Mo Chen, the two elders, are here."
Seeing this, be it the students or the Gu Masters, they were all excited. There had never been such a situation in the previous years.
"That's not strange, Chi Lian and Mo Chen's grandsons are in this year."
"Fangzheng is the successor that the clan leader is grooming, the seed of hope to fight against that Bai Ning Bing.
The clan leader naturally has to observe him carefully. "
Clamorous discussions came from the crowd.
"Little brother, you have to perform well." Mo Yan looked at Mo Bei in the crowd, muttering in her heart.
Her group had the most people and was the largest.
Right now, she was surrounded by a circle of Gu Masters, showing off her imposing manner.
As for her arch-enemy, Gu Yue Chi Shan from the Chi faction, he was standing alone. His body was tall and mighty, taller than his surroundings, like a red pagoda standing there, like a crane in a flock of chickens.
After secretly sizing up Chicheng, he retracted his gaze.
After a short speech from the clan leader, the year end exam began.
Battles were happening on the three stages at the same time.
At once, there were shouts, shouts, the sound of moonblades flying, the sounds of fists and legs hitting each other, and the discussions of the Gu Masters below the stage all converged into one.
"This year's fist and leg standards are quite high." Soon, Yao Hong saw the difference.
"Hehehe, this is all thanks to Fang Yuan." Guyue Qing Shu laughed.
"What do you mean?" Yao Hong did not understand.
Qing Shu explained it to him.
Yao Hong could not help but click her tongue in wonder, "Fang Yuan this lad, he has quite the guts, he is somewhat lawless.
Hehe, he even dares to bully his own little brother, interesting. "
She looked at Fang Yuan and Fangzheng in the crowd, pondering in her heart — between these two, who is the elder brother, who is the younger brother.
"Next battle, Guyue Jin Zhu versus Guyue Mobei." On a stage, the hosting Gu Master shouted.
Guyue Mobei jumped up, while Guyue Jin Zhu walked up the stage with a solemn expression.
Both sides bowed, and without saying much, they started fighting. In an instant, blue moonblades danced in the air.
Both sides continued to shoot, and at the same time, moved and dodged.
Although Jin Zhu was a girl, her fundamentals were quite solid, and in a short period of time, she was evenly matched with Mobei.
But as time passed, her stamina gradually ran out, and she fell into a disadvantage.
Finally, she was drenched in sweat, and had no strength left, so she could only admit defeat.
On the other hand, Mobei's face was not red, and he was not even panting.
"A Gu worm that increases endurance, it might be the Yellow Camel Longhorn Beetle Gu …" Below the stage, Fang Yuan observed, and immediately saw through Guyue Mobei's actual situation.
Fang Yuan had six Gu worms in his possession, but this was an exception.
In the hands of people of the same age, everyone would usually only have two Gu worms.
Not only because of the financial pressure to feed the Gu worms, but also because the usage of Gu worms required constant practice, and accumulated rich experience.
Biting off more than one could chew, the students had just started their Gu Master cultivation, and two Gu worms were enough for them to practice and grasp.
Only Fang Yuan was an exception, because of his rich experience from his previous life, he could quickly grasp every Gu worm in his hands, and use them in a methodical manner.
The test continued.
"Damn it, he's jumping like a rabbit!"
On another stage, a youngster angrily shouted, "Guyue Cheng, are you a man, do you dare to fight hand to hand with me!?"
"Tsk, only an idiot would fight hand to hand with you." On the stage, Guyue Cheng laughed in disdain.
He relied on the Scarlet Pill Cricket Gu, and jumped here and there with great agility.
And his opponent only had a Flower Boar Gu, although it could temporarily increase the strength of a boar, it was useless.
The astute Chicheng did not even want to fight close combat with him.
In the end, his chest was hit by Chicheng's moonblade, and he lost too much blood, losing the match.
The healing Gu Masters below the stage immediately rushed up to treat his injuries.
As time passed, many students were mercilessly eliminated, and at the same time, many youngsters began to show their talents.
Chicheng, Mobei, Fang Yuan, Fangzheng …
At noon.
The students with D grade aptitude had all been eliminated.
Their talents were limited, and they chose logistics type Gu worms. These Gu worms were suitable for production, transportation and so on.
But if they were used in battle, the help they could provide to the Gu Master was too low.
"Junior, your vital Gu is a vitality grass, right? Our group needs a healing Gu Master."
"Senior, I want to join your group, my vital Gu is the Moonlight Gu."
"Sorry, our group does not lack offensive Gu Masters."
…
Every group had already started to accept newcomers, and the students were also choosing their groups.
The battles on the stage were not very entertaining. After a few matches, there were not many highlights, and there was nothing to write home about.
Because many people chose the Moonlight Gu, normally, when two sides fought, they would first use moonblades to shoot.
Usually, the one who used up all their primeval essence would lose.
If both sides ran out of primeval essence, then they would fight with their fists and legs.
In the end, there would always be one person who fell.
Be it the students, Gu Masters or the clan elders, they were all slightly interested, and some were about to doze off.
By evening, there were only a few students left on the stage.
"It's finally over." Some Gu Masters yawned, barely keeping their spirits up.
At this moment, a Gu Master shouted, "Next match, Guyue Fangzheng against Guyue Mo Chen!"
S-REV-112.summary: The annual year-end exam begins at the Gu Master Academy with veteran Gu Masters, including Guyue Qing Shu and Guyue Yao Hong, observing to recruit new talent. Clan leaders like Guyue Bo, Guyue Lian, and Guyue Mo Chen are also present, reflecting the political importance of the event. Fang Yuan and Fangzheng are spotted, prompting discussion about their twin status and Fang Yuan's C-grade talent. Early battles unfold, with many students eliminated, and recruitment efforts for new talents begin.

continuityMutations.content: He desires to defeat Fang Yuan to shatter the 'shadow' in his heart and achieve rebirth.
He has learned and applies the clan leader's battle experience, including specific dodging movements and counter-attacks.
He feels gratified seeing Fangzheng apply his teachings in battle.
He hopes his grandson will defeat Fangzheng to bring honor to the Chi clan.
He intends to train fiercely to avenge his humiliation by Fangzheng tenfold.
His fighting spirit is severely damaged when Fangzheng points out his weakness.
The primary venue for the year-end exam combat trials.

S-REV-113.prose:
Chapter 85
Fangzheng and Mo Chen both walked onto the stage.
"Fangzheng, don't think that I will lose just because you are rank two!
Today, I will challenge someone of a higher rank. "The Mobei clenched his teeth, his expression solemn as he encouraged himself in his heart.
Facing a rank two Fangzheng, he indeed felt a sense of pressure.
"Come." Fangzheng shouted and suddenly rushed forward.
The Mobei's heart skipped a beat, this Fangzheng did not play by the rules.
Usually, they would shoot first, then punch and kick.
This time, he actually rushed forward as soon as he made his move, did he want to fight with punches and kicks?
"Isn't he afraid of being injured by my moonblade during the fight?" The Mobei was very doubtful.
Of course, he was not worried for Fangzheng, but he knew that if he fought with Fangzheng in close combat, at such a close distance, if Fangzheng shot a moonblade, he would not be able to dodge it.
The Mobei hurriedly retreated, attempting to increase the distance between them, at the same time, he flipped his wrist and slashed out a moonblade.
Fangzheng did not panic in the face of danger, he rolled on the ground, dodging the moonblade, and continued to rush forward.
At the same time, a ball of moonlight appeared in his hand.
The Mobei looked at the moonlight condensed in his hand, he could not help but feel nervous, retreating again and again.
Although he had trained hard in basic punches and had trained in moonblade, he was still slightly inferior to Fangzheng, who had always been personally trained by the clan leader.
The Mobei could not adapt to this kind of fighting style, and immediately fell into a disadvantage.
"Eh?
Things are getting interesting over there. "The battle on the stage had attracted quite a few people.
"To be so close, this Fangzheng is quite daring." Yao Hong could now distinguish between Fang Yuan and Fangzheng.
Fang Yuan's expression was cold, emitting a mature and gloomy aura.
Fangzheng's expression was firm, radiating sunlight.
"It should be thanks to the clan leader's training.
In a fight between ordinary students, the distance between the two is usually ten meters.
Beyond this distance, the moonblade would dissipate.
If it's less than this distance, the students won't be able to react in time. "
Guyue and Qingshu's eyes flashed. "Fangzheng's current combat range has been reduced to six meters.
He was also very familiar with dodging the crescent blades.
It seems that not only does the Clan Leader value Fangzheng, Fangzheng has also put in a lot of effort and suffered a lot. "
"Little Brother!"
Mo Yan watched as Mobei was forced into a disadvantageous position by Fangzheng. Her face was filled with worry and anxiety. She really wanted to go up and help and beat up Fangzheng.
Chi Shan's face was expressionless. He just watched without saying a word.
Fangzheng got close to the Mobei, and after reducing the distance to six meters, he no longer got close. Instead, he used the Moonlight Gu to exchange shots.
The Mobei reacted hurriedly and was flustered. There were a few times when he was almost hit by the Moon Blade.
On the other hand, Fangzheng was confident.
Even if he could not dodge in time, he still had the Jade Skin Gu as his trump card.
As long as he maintained the jade green light, he could defend against the Moon Blade.
Seeing the Mobei being suppressed by him, Fangzheng could not help but recall the past.
Under the moonlight, the Clan Leader taught him the dodging movements step by step, imparting his experience without holding anything back.
"Lord Clan Leader, I will not let you down." Fangzheng's eyes shone brightly. The more he fought, the more courageous he became!
"Fangzheng, you have talent, and you are hardworking and diligent.
To have such results, it is all because of your sweat and tears.
This is the result of your hard work.
That's it, Fangzheng, this is the spirit. Go, show your brilliance! "
Under the shed, the Clan Leader's heart rippled. On the surface, he sat there, watching quietly with a smile on his face.
Although the Mobei struggled with all his might and resisted tenaciously, after fifteen minutes, his body was already filled with countless wounds.
The blood that gushed out dyed his clothes red.
The Gu Master in charge saw this and announced, "This round, Guyue Fangzheng wins."
"I haven't lost yet!" The Mobei shouted stubbornly. His body was bathed in blood, and he was swaying.
But after struggling for a while, he was forcefully taken away by the Gu Masters on the stage for treatment.
"This level of battle is already at the level of a year after graduation."
"A grade genius is a genius after all."
"I heard he was personally taught by Lord Clan Leader, how can he not be strong?"
Seeing this result, the Gu Masters below the stage let out waves of praise.
Guyue Fangzheng panted as he walked down the stage.
Three Gu Masters surrounded him and healed him, at the same time providing Yuan stones for him to quickly recover his primeval essence.
After resting for a while, Fangzheng recovered to his peak condition and went up the stage again.
This round, he was going against Guyue Cheng.
Chicheng looked at Fangzheng and laughed dryly, "Very good!
Fangzheng, you defeated that Mobei kid, now I will defeat you, killing two birds with one stone. "
He seemed to be very confident.
Fangzheng pursed his lips, not saying a word as he continued to charge forward.
"Dragonpill cricket Gu!" Chicheng willed, and a layer of orange-red light appeared on his legs.
He lightly jumped and instantly retreated ten meters away.
The distance that Fangzheng had just closed in was immediately widened.
"Hehehe."
Chicheng laughed proudly, "Fangzheng, you don't have a Gu worm to increase your speed, and with just your two legs, you can't catch up to me.
Although this stage is not big, it is enough for me to move around.
Your tactics are useful against Mobei, but against me, it is useless. "
"Is it like this?" Fangzheng stopped his steps and stood on the spot, staring at Chicheng with a burning gaze.
A smile appeared on his face, and his eyes showed determination as he said loudly, "Just dodge like this. Every time you use the Dragonpill cricket Gu, you will expend a certain amount of primeval essence.
You only have Rank one peak stage green copper primeval essence, but I already have Rank two red steel primeval essence, three times more durable than you.
Your aptitude is not as good as mine, and when you run out of primeval essence in the end, you will definitely lose! "
You! "Chicheng could not help but be moved. He only saw his advantage, but did not see his weakness.
Now, he had to admit that Fangzheng's words were reasonable, and his fighting spirit immediately suffered a heavy blow.
"What, Fangzheng advanced to Rank two?!"
The surrounding Gu Masters were in an uproar. The results of the cultivation test had just been obtained yesterday, and were only spread within a small circle. Most of them did not know about this.
"A grade genius is still A grade after all, amazing.
This Fangzheng, he might really be our clan's star of hope. "
"Bai clan's genius Bai Ning Bing is really too strong.
If Fangzheng can grow up, he might be able to contend against Bai Ning Bing. "
"This lad is a little interesting.
Cultivating to Rank two in the academy, and having such solid foundational skills, this situation is really rare.
No wonder the clan leader poured so much effort into him. "Yao Hong muttered.
Qing Shu also sighed, "The clan leader's nurturing is only a part of it. Don't look down on this lad. Ever since he survived the assassination, he became very hardworking, and cultivated very hard.
He is a good seedling, talented and very dependable.
If he can really grow up … sigh, I feel that my burden is getting heavier. "
"Hehehe." Clan leader Guyue Bo could not help but chuckle.
He had once analyzed Chicheng's weakness to Fangzheng.
Now that he saw that Fangzheng could put it to use, Guyue Bo felt extremely gratified.
"Looks like Fangzheng should be this year's number one." Beside the clan leader, Guyue Mo Chen said.
Guyue Lian snorted coldly, staring at the stage.
Of course he hoped that his grandson could defeat Fangzheng.
That way, he would gain face for the Chi clan.
But things did not go according to plan. On the stage, Chicheng's fighting spirit suffered a setback, and after fighting with Fangzheng, he could not display his original strength, making many mistakes.
In the end, Crimson Castle was caught by Fangzheng's mistake and swept off the stage.
"Guyue Fangzheng wins!" The Gu Master shouted.
Guyue Lian's face was ashen.
At once, Fangzheng was the center of attention.
He was in the limelight.
"Fangzheng defeated Mobei and Chicheng consecutively, he has both brains and courage, looks like this time's number one is definitely him." Someone praised.
"Makes sense, I also have high hopes for him.
Unfortunately, he cannot join our group. "Groups were selecting students, and students were also selecting groups.
An outstanding seed like Fangzheng had already been selected.
"Fangzheng is the clan leader's faction, while Mobei and Chicheng are the future leaders of the Mo and Chi factions respectively.
Looks like from today onwards, Guyue clan will be the clan leader's faction, suppressing the two great elders. "Someone had a deeper vision.
On the other two stages, the battles continued.
Fangzheng walked down the stage early, listening to the praises of the people around him, he was overwhelmed with emotions, feeling like he had been reborn.
It was different. It was different from before.
His heart was filled with the excitement of being acknowledged, the excitement of being appreciated, and the happiness of being affirmed.
Gusts of winter wind blew, and in the cold wind, he felt the warmth of spring.
"Final battle, Guyue Fangzheng against Guyue Fang Yuan!" A moment later, a Gu Master hosting the stage shouted.
S-REV-113.summary: Fangzheng enters the stage, quickly confronting Mobei who struggles against Fangzheng's aggressive, close-combat style, which was personally taught by the clan leader. Fangzheng wins, then faces Chi Cheng, who attempts to evade Fangzheng's tactics using his speed Gu. Fangzheng, however, outmaneuvers Chi Cheng psychologically by highlighting his primeval essence disadvantage, leading to another victory. His impressive performance draws praise from the crowd and solidifies his position as a rising star, much to the satisfaction of Guyue Bo and the dismay of Guyue Lian. Fangzheng feels reborn and affirmed by his successes.

continuityMutations.content: He knows Fang Yuan's primeval essence is green copper and at 44% capacity.
He knows his primeval essence is green copper and at 44% capacity.
He accurately assesses Fangzheng's combat style, weaknesses, and even thoughts due to his 500 years of experience.
He demonstrates exceptional dodging ability and brutal close-quarters combat, inflicting severe damage on Fangzheng.
Fang Yuan's presence and actions inflict a deep psychological shadow, causing him to panic and forget his abilities.
He suffers severe physical injuries, including a bruised scalp, blood loss, and a nearly pierced palm, with his Moonlight Gu severely damaged.
He wants Fangzheng to defeat Fang Yuan to overcome a psychological shadow.
He observes Fang Yuan's combat talent with solemnity.

S-REV-114.prose:
Chapter 86
The final battle, Guyue Fangzheng against Guyue Fang Yuan!
"Oh, interesting."
"To think that in the end, it would be a battle between brothers."
"Fangzheng …" Seeing this, the smile on the clan leader's face disappeared, "The biggest shadow in your heart is your brother Fang Yuan.
Defeat him, you have red steel primeval essence and also the Jade Skin Gu, having both offense and defense, you have a huge advantage.
Shatter this shadow, and you will be reborn! "
Finally, it was time for the decisive battle.
The two brothers stood on the same stage, looking at each other from afar.
The setting sun was like blood …
The light of the setting sun was like a luxurious carpet covering the stage.
Extremely similar faces.
The younger brother's battle intent was burning, while the older brother's gaze was deep.
"Brother …" Fangzheng clenched his fists, staring at Fang Yuan, his tone firm, "Admit defeat!
I am already Rank two, my red steel primeval essence is more than eighty percent, while your green copper primeval essence is only forty-four percent.
You have no chance. "
Fang Yuan looked at his brother indifferently, "You know my primeval essence very well.
But don't say such nonsense.
If primeval essence can determine victory and defeat, then what's the point of fighting? "
Fangzheng was stunned, but soon after, the fighting intent in his eyes burned fiercely.
In fact, in the depths of his heart, he did not want Fang Yuan to admit defeat.
But Fang Yuan was his elder brother after all, so he had to say this out of both sentiment and reason.
If he did not say it, it would be too heartless.
"Since brother insists, then I can only make my move!" Before he finished speaking, Fangzheng charged towards Fang Yuan.
"This move again!" Below the stage, Mobei could not help but grit his teeth at this scene.
He made up his mind to train himself fiercely when he returns, and return this humiliation to Fangzheng tenfold in the future!
"Fang Yuan is finished, he doesn't have my dragonpill cricket Gu." Chicheng crossed his arms and sneered, gloating at Fang Yuan's misfortune.
Fangzheng sprinted forward, instantly closing the distance between him and Fang Yuan.
A ball of moonlight lit up in his hand.
Fang Yuan's expression was as still as steel. He watched Fangzheng approach him quickly, but he stood still. His right palm also slowly rippled with water-like blue moonlight.
Suddenly!
Fang Yuan stomped hard on the ground and took a few steps forward. Instead of retreating, he charged towards Fangzheng.
"This!" Fangzheng did not expect Fang Yuan's attack. He could not help but panic and hurriedly shot out a crescent blade.
Fang Yuan rushed over, twisted his body, and the crescent blade brushed past his shoulder.
His face was cold, he did not roar, nor was he ferocious, but in his silence, he was brewing an absolute and cold aura.
Fangzheng subconsciously retreated. His limit was six meters, but now Fang Yuan was less than five meters away from him.
Now it was his turn to increase the distance.
Chi chi chi.
As Fangzheng retreated, he flipped his right palm continuously, sending out crescent blades in an attempt to force Fang Yuan back.
Fang Yuan's steps were quick and compact, his body extremely agile. Every time he moved, he avoided the crescent blades by a hair's breadth.
"This Fang Yuan, he is even more daring!" Yao Hong exclaimed.
"Such a battle, he really doesn't care about life and death." Qing Shu was also speechless.
"Another battle maniac!" Mo Yan gritted her teeth, looking at Chi Shan who was not far away.
Chi Shan was still expressionless, but his eyes were flickering.
The commotion in the crowd stopped, everyone focused on the battle on the stage.
The crescent blades brushed past Fang Yuan's body, reflecting a blue light on Fang Yuan's face.
His indifferent expression never changed. Every time he dodged a dangerous and calm attack, his combat talent was clearly displayed!
Outside the stage, the clan leader and clan elders all showed a solemn expression.
Chicheng and Mobei, on the other hand, had their mouths wide open, watching in shock as Fang Yuan dodged the crescent blades in an unimaginable manner.
How did he do it?
Countless students had a big question mark in their hearts.
Hmph, with five hundred years of battle experience, how could Fangzheng, who had been taught by a Rank four Gu Master for a year, compare to Fang Yuan, who had five hundred years of battle experience?
In Fang Yuan's eyes, Fangzheng was as shallow as a clear stream. No matter how the stream flowed, where it flowed, or how it turned between the steep mountain rocks, he could clearly see through to the bottom of the water.
Every attack of the crescent blades did not happen suddenly, it required a process.
Fangzheng had to turn his wrist, this was the best sign.
In Fang Yuan's eyes, every shake of Fangzheng's shoulder, every turn of his wrist, every step he took, gave him a lot of information.
Every time Fangzheng attacked, retreated, dodged, Fang Yuan could see through it in an instant. He could even guess what Fangzheng was thinking.
Fangzheng's mind was already in a daze!
The shadow that Fang Yuan had cast over his heart for over a decade rapidly spread into darkness, dragging him into the abyss.
His flustered emotions made him forget about the Jade Skin Gu.
Fang Yuan's forceful advance made him nervous, making him breathless, making him unable to think of anything else.
This was the difference in experience, this was the difference in foundation!
In Fang Yuan's mind, his foundation was more important than the Spring Autumn Cicada, it was his greatest reliance.
He did not need to rely on the clan leader, elders, relatives, friends, or Gu worms.
He had always relied on himself!
In this world, he was the only one who could be relied on!!
Companions, comrades-in-arms, it was just an excuse for the weak to hide their incompetence and hope for others to save them.
Finally, he was close to Fangzheng!
Bam.
Fang Yuan's fist shot out stealthily, hitting Fangzheng's abdomen.
Fangzheng immediately bent over, the strength of the fist almost made him vomit.
He quickly used his arms to protect his head, lowering his body and taking a big step back. At this critical moment, his solid foundation was displayed.
"Where did he go?" Fangzheng's eyes widened, his eyes moving rapidly, searching for Fang Yuan's figure between the gaps of his arms.
"Behind me!" The moment this thought appeared, Fangzheng felt a fierce blow on his waist.
He lost his balance and fell to the ground.
But Fangzheng had undergone tough training, following this momentum, he somersaulted on the ground, and at the same time flipped his palm backwards, shooting out a moonblade.
This movement was the battle experience that the clan leader had imparted to him.
If it was a normal person, they would be following closely behind Fangzheng, unable to react in time and would be hit by this moonblade.
Even if it did not hit, they would be forced to retreat.
But who was Fang Yuan?
Even Guyue Bo could not compete with him in terms of experience.
Fang Yuan moved slowly, he did not chase after him.
Instead, he circled around and got closer to Fangzheng.
The moonblade pierced through the air as expected.
Fangzheng thought that he had put some distance between them. He stood up and was about to regroup when he heard a whooshing sound.
"That's the wind from the fist!" At that moment, Fangzheng had the time to think.
Then, he was hit by Fang Yuan's fist on his ear.
Bam.
Fangzheng felt his vision go black, a strong wave of dizziness made him lose his balance, and he fell to the ground.
He lay on the ground for two breaths before he recovered. When his vision became clear, Fangzheng saw Fang Yuan's two feet standing in front of him.
He immediately understood how ugly his situation was.
He lay on the ground like a dog, while Fang Yuan stood high up, looking down at him.
"Damn it!" Fangzheng was furious, and wanted to get up.
Under the watchful eyes of the crowd, Fang Yuan raised his right foot and stomped down.
Bam.
Fangzheng's head was stomped on by Fang Yuan. It was like a stone ball hitting the ring, making a loud sound.
"Damn it!" Fangzheng was furious, and wanted to get up again.
Fang Yuan looked at him coldly, and stomped again.
Bam.
Fangzheng's head hit the ring violently. His scalp was bruised, and blood flowed continuously.
"Damn it!
Damn it! "Fangzheng gritted his teeth so hard that they almost broke. The rage in his chest almost burned his entire body.
He raised his head again, and wanted to get up.
Bam.
Fang Yuan stomped for the third time. This time, he stepped on his head, and did not let go.
A huge force pressed down, and Fangzheng's face was pressed hard against the ring.
Fangzheng's face was almost deformed. He panted heavily, but he could not struggle.
He felt like there was a huge rock pressing on his head. No matter how he struggled, the rock would not budge.
"Right, how could I forget, there's still the Moonlight Gu!" In this desperate situation, Fangzheng suddenly thought of the Moonlight Gu.
The moonlight in his right palm suddenly shone brightly.
But how could Fang Yuan not notice it?
With a soft sound, he shot out a moonblade, and hit Fangzheng's right palm.
Ah!
Fangzheng suddenly let out a miserable howl. The pain made his body tremble violently as if he was electrocuted.
His palm was almost pierced by Fang Yuan, and his pale bones were exposed.
The Moonlight Gu in his palm also suffered a heavy blow, and was on the verge of death!
S-REV-114.summary: The final battle is announced: Guyue Fangzheng vs. Guyue Fang Yuan. Fangzheng, confident in his Rank two status and Gu worms, urges Fang Yuan to surrender, but Fang Yuan dismisses him. Fangzheng charges, but Fang Yuan, utilizing his five hundred years of battle experience, expertly dodges Fangzheng's moonblades and closes the distance. Fang Yuan then brutally dominates the close-quarters fight, stomping on Fangzheng's head multiple times and severely injuring him, including his Moonlight Gu, leaving Fangzheng defeated and humiliated, while Fang Yuan remains cold and unwavering.

continuityMutations.content: Fangzheng possesses the Jade Skin Gu, a defensive Gu worm he had kept secret.
The Academy Elder suspects Fang Yuan's strength is abnormal and tries to find hidden Gu worms.
Fang Yuan is aware of and expects the clan's attempts to inspect and control him.
Fang Yuan has a 'second secret cave' where he hid the White Boar Gu and Jade Skin Gu, unknown to others.
Guyue Bo is disappointed by Fangzheng's defeat and suspects Fang Yuan of having a mysterious backer.
Guyue Jiao San exists and is a low-status Gu Master who unexpectedly invites Fang Yuan to his team.
Fang Yuan successfully hides the White Boar Gu and Jade Skin Gu from the academy elder during his inspection.
Fang Yuan allows the public to attribute his strength to natural talent, distracting from his true methods and hidden Gu worms.
Fang Yuan understands the clan leader's attempt to use team assignments to uncover his supposed backer or force him into a political faction.
Fang Yuan accepts Guyue Jiao San's invitation to join his team to avoid being a pawn in the clan's political game.
Fang Yuan suspects Guyue Jiao San has ulterior motives for inviting him into his team.
Fangzheng gains invisible strength and resolve from the crowd's cheers and past memories of support.
Fangzheng reveals his trump card, the Jade Skin Gu, in response to Fang Yuan's pressure.
Fangzheng suffers a severe psychological blow by being defeated after activating his hidden power and building up immense confidence.
Guyue Bo attempts to use Fangzheng's defeat to subtly investigate Fang Yuan and his supposed backer, and to control Fang Yuan's future alignment within the clan.
Guyue Bo's plans for Fangzheng's growth and confidence are shattered by Fang Yuan's victory.
Guyue Bo's offer of team choice is a test to discern Fang Yuan's loyalties or uncover a mysterious backer.
Guyue Bo is disappointed by Fang Yuan's choice to join a low-status team, as it thwarts his immediate political maneuvering.
The Academy Elder uses the pretense of healing to inspect Fang Yuan's aperture for hidden Gu worms.
The Academy Elder's suspicions about Fang Yuan's strength and lack of visible Gu worms remain, despite finding nothing.
Guyue Jiao San unexpectedly invites Fang Yuan to join his team, disrupting the clan elders' plans.
Guyue Jiao San's warm attitude is a mask, indicating he has ulterior motives for inviting Fang Yuan.

relationshipMutations.type: Disgust and frustration due to disrupted plans

S-REV-115.prose:
Chapter 87
"Looks like the two of them aren't on good terms," Yao Hong muttered.
"This Fang Yuan is too cruel. How could he treat his own brother like this?" Many people frowned in displeasure.
"Fang Yuan is too cruel. He extorted our Yuan stone for a whole year!
Now he's treating his own brother like this. "The students gritted their teeth. Fang Yuan's cruelty had ignited their hatred for a common enemy.
"Fangzheng, stand up! Stand up!
Defeat Fang Yuan, "one of the students shouted.
"Defeat Fang Yuan, defeat Fang Yuan!" Instantly, countless youths began to respond.
"This Fang Yuan is indeed a detestable fellow." Mo Yan snorted coldly, somewhat gloating.
"Fangzheng, you can do it! Stand up!
Defeat the devil, Fang Yuan! "
"Fangzheng, stand up. We're with you."
"Fangzheng, you can do it! You can do it!"
The crowd was excited. Their cheers reached Fangzheng's ears.
Whoosh!
Whoosh!
Whoosh!
Whoosh!
Fangzheng panted heavily. These voices reached his heart and gave him an invisible strength!
Scenes of the past replayed in his mind.
On the streets, the clansmen were pointing and gossiping.
"That's Fang Yuan. He's a future genius. Don't underestimate him!"
"Who's behind him?"
"Oh, he should be Fang Yuan's younger brother. I don't know his name."
…
Uncle and Aunt smiled. "Fang Yuan, the entire village is now discussing your latest poem!
Very good. Uncle and Aunt are proud of you. "
Fang Yuan waved his hand. His expression was calm. "It's just an improvisation."
Uncle and Aunt nodded and said to Fangzheng, "Learn from your brother. If you're half as good as him, we won't have to worry."
…
Under the moonlit night, deep in the courtyard.
Patriarch Guyue Bo looked at Fangzheng and said gently, "Fangzheng, you must have confidence.
You have to discover yourself and believe in yourself. "
"But, Lord Patriarch …"
Guyue Bo patted his shoulder and encouraged him, "The shadow in your heart can't be removed by others.
You can only rely on yourself. I look forward to that day. "
…
The night before the year-end assessment.
Shen Cui stood under the light and looked at Fangzheng affectionately: "Gongzi, I believe that you will win first place.
I have always believed in this!
Good luck! "
…
It was the time of departure in the morning.
His uncle and aunt stood at the door to send him off. "Fangzheng, after the year-end assessment, you'll be able to leave the academy.
We are very pleased to see you grow!
Go, let everyone see the excellence of Class A! "
Also …
Under the setting sun, in a dark corner, a female classmate was sobbing. "The allowance is only three Yuan stone every time. Fang Yuan took one away, and I only have two left.
I can't afford to feed my Moonlight Gu anymore. "
Fangzheng's heart softened. "This is my Yuan stone, I'll lend it to you."
The female classmate took the Yuan stone and said with tears in her eyes, "Fangzheng, you're the best. Please defeat your brother so that he can no longer do evil to the academy!"
Fangzheng was silent.
Unbeknownst to him, a group of classmates had appeared in front of him.
"Fangzheng, you have Class A talent. You can definitely do it."
"Fang Yuan is too hateful. He keeps bullying us.
You're our only hope. "
"Fangzheng, from today onwards, we'll follow you.
We'll support you! "
"Everyone …" Fangzheng looked around and saw pairs of eager eyes. He was so touched that he couldn't speak.
…
Everyone …
Everyone has been waiting for me.
My classmates, Uncle and Aunt, Shen Cui, and the clan leader!
Everyone is waiting for me, looking at me, supporting me ….
How can I lose?
How can I fall here?
How can I!
Thump, thump, thump, thump.
His heartbeat was like a drum beating in his chest. Fangzheng's eyes were shining.
I can't fall here!
I want to break the shadow, I want to stand up!!
Fangzheng clenched his fists tightly. The pain left him at this moment. He felt like there was a lion in his chest, waking up from its slumber and opening its mouth to roar!
Hot blood was boiling in his body.
Stand up, stand up!
Break the shadow, break the darkness!
"Ahhhhh!" Fangzheng opened his mouth and shouted. His body began to emit an emerald green crystalline light.
"What is that?" The crowd was silent.
"It's the Jade Skin Gu!" Someone shouted.
Boom!
The students erupted into cheers that soared to the heavens.
"Fangzheng, do your best!"
"Fangzheng, we support you!"
Finally, there was only one chant left — "Stand up, stand up!"
"Everyone … I can hear your cheers."
Fang Zheng pressed his fist against the ground, his teeth almost breaking from gritting so hard. Fang Yuan's pressure did not seem to be that strong, he slowly and firmly stood up step by step.
The cheers became louder.
"My blood is boiling!"
"We are going to make a comeback."
The Gu Masters, upon hearing such shouts and screams, started to be moved.
"Yes, Fangzheng, this is it!
Stand up, stand up, throw away the past, throw away the shadow. The you who stands up, will be a new you! "The clan leader's eyes shone brightly, cheering for Fangzheng in his heart.
"It's the Jade Skin Gu …" Fang Yuan's eyelids drooped. He retracted his leg and watched as Fangzheng stood up. The Jade Skin Gu's light shone on his face, turning it green.
Fangzheng had been hiding his trump card, the Jade Skin Gu, and did not publicize it, so no one knew about it.
"Fangzheng stood up!" The cheers were like a flood, exploding.
"He stood up!" The clan leader's eyes shone, and he could not help but stand up from his seat.
At this moment, he saw the resolute rise of an A grade genius!
He saw the bright future of the Guyue clan!
"I stood up, brother, I will defeat you!"
Fangzheng's eyes burned with the flames of fighting spirit. His entire body was enveloped in a crystalline green light as though he was wearing a layer of resplendent jade armor!
"Wow, this defense, even the moonblade can't penetrate it.
Looks like Fangzheng is going to win. "Yao Hong raised her eyebrows and whistled.
"Indeed.
Even if Fang Yuan had the Little Light Gu to amplify the moonblade, it would at most cause Fangzheng's primeval essence to be consumed twice as much as before.
In terms of primeval essence consumption, Fang Yuan was not Fangzheng's match.
After this battle, Fangzheng will rise! "Qing Shu said with a faint smile.
"Fangzheng actually has a Jade Skin Gu, but he only remembered to use it now.
Looks like Fang Yuan's strong attack stunned him.
But now, victory is already waving at him. "Mo Yan crossed her arms as she watched, her eyes flickering with uncertainty.
Time seemed to stop at this moment.
On the stage, the two brothers stood facing each other.
The distance between them was so close, yet so far.
Fangzheng's face was determined, while Fang Yuan's expression was still cold.
"Little brother …" He calmly looked at Fangzheng, his lips curling into a cold smile, "You still have a long way to go if you want to defeat me."
He raised his right fist high up, his right arm stretching out, almost like a bow.
"Big brother, you're going to lose!" Fangzheng looked at Fang Yuan's raised fist, feeling amused.
As long as I have enough primeval essence, even the Little Light Gu's amplified moonblade cannot break this jade light defense, not to mention your fist?
Unless you use the Flower Boar Gu or the Brute Force Longhorn Beetle Gu to increase your strength greatly.
But even so, you still need a defensive Gu worm …
Fang Yuan did not speak, he used his fist to give the most direct answer.
The next moment, his right fist whistled through the air, fiercely hitting Fangzheng's cheek.
Bam!
With a loud bang, fresh blood splattered, and the jade light shattered into pieces. Like a broken mirror, it scattered in the air, and then suddenly disappeared.
"What?!"
Fangzheng suddenly suffered such a huge blow, he was stunned, his neck almost broken as he staggered backwards.
Fang Yuan followed closely, taking a bow step. This time, he raised his left fist and pulled it downwards, before punching diagonally upwards!
Bam!!
The other half of Fangzheng's cheek also suffered a heavy blow, his head fiercely tilted backwards, blood and the shattered jade light flying everywhere.
Bam, bam, bam.
He took three steps back, his ears buzzing, and a dizziness ten times stronger than before assaulted him.
"How … how could this be!" His vision turned black, and he fell backwards —
Plop.
Fangzheng fell to the ground, the green light on his body dissipating as he fainted.
The cheers and shouts stopped abruptly.
The students' happy and excited expressions were still frozen on their faces, unable to change in time.
The whole battle stage was dead silent.
Fang Yuan's fists were bloody, even his pale finger bones could be seen.
Drop after drop of bright red blood dripped onto the stage.
Whoosh …
A gust of cold winter wind blew, freezing all the hot blood.
Fang Yuan's hair slightly trembled in the wind, he stood upright on the stage, as if the person with half crippled fists was not him!
His cold gaze was still calm as he slowly scanned the surroundings.
Everyone was silent.
In the shed, the clan leader was still standing, staring at him with a dumbfounded expression.
"Sorry to disappoint you." Fang Yuan said softly.

Chapter 88
On the stage, Fangzheng fainted on the ground, motionless.
As for Fang Yuan, his face was still cold, standing in the middle of the stage.
After a short moment of silence, the audience went into an uproar.
"How can this be?" Someone hugged his head, showing an expression of disbelief.
"Two punches to break the defense of the Jade Skin Gu, this, this, this …" Someone was dumbfounded.
"Too ruthless, even the jade light was destroyed by him, does he not feel any pain?" Many female Gu Masters sucked in a breath of cold air.
"Without using any defensive Gu worms, he directly hit the jade light with his bare hands, this is true self-harm!"
Even the male Gu Masters looked at Fang Yuan's heavily injured hands, their eyes twitching, shocked by Fang Yuan's ruthlessness.
Being ruthless to others, easy.
Being ruthless to yourself, difficult.
Fang Yuan broke the defense of the Jade Skin Gu with his bare hands, not only was he ruthless to his own brother, he was also ruthless to himself!
"I'll go take a look." The academy elder could not sit still, throwing these words, he jumped onto the stage himself.
He first squatted down, checking on the fainted Fangzheng, and heaved a sigh of relief.
Fangzheng was fine, just that his head was hit hard, and he was unconscious.
"It's hard to imagine, under the defense of the Jade Skin Gu, being hit so hard with bare hands."
The academy elder was secretly shocked. He raised his head, looking at Fang Yuan, a sharp light flashing in his eyes.
"Fang Yuan, let me treat you." The academy elder stood up, taking a few big steps to Fang Yuan's side, grabbing Fang Yuan's forearm.
Fang Yuan's hands were badly injured, not to mention the blood and flesh, even the white bones of his hands were exposed.
Because of the heavy hit, there were even obvious cracks on the surface of his fingers.
"How much pain must this be, but Fang Yuan doesn't even frown." Even the academy elder's heart shuddered upon seeing such injuries.
His tone became somewhat complicated as he said to Fang Yuan, "Bear with it. The treatment will be very itchy and very painful."
As he spoke, he spread open the five fingers of his right hand, emitting a burst of blue moonlight.
The moonlight grew brighter and brighter, turning the academy elder's right hand translucent.
At first glance, the academy elder's entire right hand seemed to have transformed into a piece of blue jade.
The blood vessels and bones inside seemed to have turned into jade.
The academy elder gently covered Fang Yuan's injured fist with his right hand.
It was like a piece of cold jade touching a bloody wound.
