Fang Yuan felt a heart-wrenching pain, but he gritted his teeth and didn't make a sound.
The academy elder's palm emitted a gentle moonlight, which nourished Fang Yuan's wounds.
The cracks on the phalanx were healing rapidly.
The torn skin and flesh were also rapidly regenerating and healing.
Fang Yuan suddenly felt extremely itchy. He took a few heavy breaths.
The academy elder's face was calm. While he was treating Fang Yuan's wounds, he split a bit of his attention and followed Fang Yuan's arm into his aperture.
In the aperture, the dark green bronze primeval essence was rippling.
A Liquor worm with a fat head and brain swam freely in the Primordial Sea.
The four walls of the aperture were a single white crystal wall.
This fully displayed Fang Yuan's Rank one peak cultivation.
The academy elder did not withdraw his attention, but instead scanned through Fang Yuan's entire body.
Finally, he found the Moonlight Gu and the Little Light Gu on the skin of Fang Yuan's right palm.
"There are no other Gu worms. Could it be that Fang Yuan really used his own strength to break the Jade Skin Gu's defense with his bare hands?
This kind of strength has already surpassed an adult mortal's.
He's only fifteen years old, how can he have such great strength? "The academy elder's eyes shone with a hint of doubt.
"Sir elder, thank you for your treatment." Fang Yuan pulled his palm out of the elder's hand and moved it around.
Although there was still some pain, the wound had already healed.
If it was on Earth, this kind of injury would require a year or two of recuperation, and there would even be serious side effects.
This was the mystical part of this world.
Now, Fang Yuan's hands had already healed. It was just that when he moved his hands and grabbed at the air, it was extremely weak.
After seven to eight days, this weak side effect would also disappear.
However, Fang Yuan was not grateful to the academy elder.
His injuries could also be treated by other healing Gu Masters. He knew very well that the academy elder's real motive was to take the opportunity to check his aperture.
Fang Yuan had already expected this, and placed the White Boar Gu and Jade Skin Gu in the second secret cave.
As for the Spring Autumn Cicada, it was Rank six, and if it was focused on hiding, even the Rank four Guyue Bo might not be able to detect it.
The academy elder did not find anything, and his brows furrowed.
Although he still had many suspicions in his heart, but in front of so many people, he could not ask directly.
"Fang Yuan, your performance was not bad. Work hard."
Finally, the academy elder patted Fang Yuan's shoulder and announced loudly, "For this year's end of year examination, Fang Yuan gets first place!"
From the moment the academy elder stepped onto the stage, the audience had been watching quietly.
Now that they heard the elder's announcement, there was another wave of commotion.
"To think that in the end, it was actually Fang Yuan who had the last laugh!"
"He's just a C grade, but he actually defeated the Rank two Fangzheng who had the Jade Skin Gu. Did he cheat?"
"Probably not.
Just now, the academy elder personally treated him, it was actually a test.
Even he did not find any problems, so Fang Yuan should not have cheated. "
"Fang Yuan's hands are heavily injured, that's to be expected.
But for a fifteen year old youth to have such strength, it has already far surpassed an adult. Isn't this still suspicious? "
"What's there to be suspicious about?
In this world, there are always some freaks with extraordinary talent.
If it's not strength, then it's intelligence. Actually, Fang Yuan's strength is not that terrifying. Think about that person. "The Gu Master who spoke used his eyes to look at Chi Shan who was standing proudly in the crowd.
Immediately, someone realized, "That's true.
When Chi Shan was just a few years old, his strength was already greater than an adult's.
Don't tell me that Fang Yuan is also such a freak? "
"Can't be wrong.
When Fang Yuan was a child, he had already composed poems.
Those poems had spread throughout the entire village.
At first, everyone thought that he was an A grade, but to think that he was only a C grade.
But it seems that the heavens had other intentions.
Giving him some compensation in terms of strength. "
"But he is still a C grade. If he was a B grade, he might be another Chi Shan.
Hmph, actually it's not that big of a deal.
Gu Master cultivation still focuses on talent.
In the future, if he gets a Black Boar Gu, he can raise his strength to be even greater than him.
So it's nothing much, he can only be arrogant for a while. "Someone shrugged, his tone indifferent.
Fang Yuan walked down the stage, his ears perked up as he listened to the crowd's discussion, laughing coldly in his heart.
The Liquor worm's origin, Fang Yuan had already created a perfect excuse. But once the Jade Skin Gu was exposed, Fang Yuan would not be able to explain it.
Thus, he had to hide it secretly and not use it in front of everyone.
As for the crowd's thoughts and explanations, it was the direction that Fang Yuan wanted to guide the public's opinion.
Taking a step back, even if the clan's higher-ups were suspicious, they would only suspect his mysterious backer.
"Half a year ago, I took the risk and used the wild boar's tusk to create a second layer of protection, and it has already started to take effect." Fang Yuan's eyes were as deep as the abyss.
Clan leader Guyue did not sit down. He kept standing, his brows furrowed.
The development of this matter was indeed beyond his expectations.
He did not care about Fang Yuan obtaining first place.
It was just a year end exam's first place, he did not care about it at all.
What he was worried about was Guyue Fangzheng.
There was no doubt that today's blow was too heavy for Fangzheng.
If Fangzheng was beaten by Fang Yuan to the point where he could not retaliate and lost the battle, it would be fine.
But when he tried his best and his hopes rose, he was beaten down by Fang Yuan's two fists.
This kind of psychological trauma was likely to affect his growth.
"Under my guidance and arrangement, Fangzheng was the first to advance to upper stage, then to peak stage, then to Rank two. He continued to accumulate success and built up his confidence.
However, this confidence would probably be reduced to ashes after this battle.
Sigh, all my hard work has gone up in smoke. "
Guyue Bo sighed in his heart. Naturally, he developed a faint sense of disgust towards Fang Yuan.
If Fang Yuan lost to Fangzheng, then everything would be perfect.
But Fang Yuan actually won, this was really … a little hateful.
Not only the clan leader, but the other clan elders' gazes were deep and complicated.
"Fang Yuan's strength is so great, is he a freak like Chi Shan?"
"Speaking of which, Fang Yuan is a freak, being able to compose poems before the age of ten.
As he continues to grow, it is not a big deal to have more strength. "
"But there is also another possibility, and that is man-made.
Fang Yuan has a mysterious backer behind him, maybe this backer helped him. "
"Then who is this backer behind him?"
…
The elders' hearts were in turmoil, but they didn't show the slightest change on their faces.
Clan leader Guyue Bo was silent for a moment, then suddenly revealed a smile, "Fang Yuan, you obtained first place with C grade talent, this is an unprecedented feat!
First place will be rewarded with a hundred Yuan stones, and you will also have priority in choosing Gu worms.
Now, I will reward you again. You can choose any group to join.
No matter what group it is, as long as you want it, just say it on the spot and you can join! "
Once he said this, the Rank two Gu Masters and students looked at Fang Yuan with envy.
There were differences between groups, and joining an outstanding group meant a bright future.
Guyue Bo's reward was really generous.
"Although this reward was decided by me, I believe all the clan elders here will agree." Guyue Bo's smile became wider, looking at the clan elders beside him.
The clan elders led by Guyue Lian, Guyue Mo Chen, all had solemn expressions. At most, some frowned, but they did not stop him.
Fang Yuan's heart jumped.
Trouble is coming.
S-REV-115.summary: Fueled by the crowd's cheers and memories of support, Fangzheng activates his hidden Jade Skin Gu, rising with renewed determination to face Fang Yuan. Despite the seemingly impenetrable defense, Fang Yuan brutally defeats Fangzheng with two bare-fisted punches, shattering the jade light and knocking Fangzheng unconscious, while severely injuring his own hands. The crowd is stunned, and the academy elder treats Fang Yuan's raw wounds, using the opportunity to secretly inspect him for hidden Gu worms. The clan leader then attempts to subtly force Fang Yuan into a specific team, but Fang Yuan thwarts this by accepting an invitation from the unknown Guyue Jiao San.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan now wears the dark blue Gu Master battle robe, indicating his Rank one status.
Fang Yuan is philosophical, linking Jiao San's behavior to the Ren Zu legend about 'Attitude' being a mask.
Guyue Jiao San is actively observing Fang Yuan and maintains a deceptively warm demeanor.

S-REV-116.prose:
Chapter 89
Fang Yuan could already see the deeper meaning behind this move. This was a small test from the clan leader.
He scanned the martial arts field. The three best teams in the clan were all here.
They were the Qingshu team representing the clan leader's faction, the Chi Shan team representing the Chi faction, and the Mo Yan team representing the Mo faction.
If a normal student joined any of these three teams, it would mean that they had a strong backer and a bright future.
But for Fang Yuan, it was the opposite.
In the eyes of the higher-ups of the clan, he had already been labeled as a force.
If he joined any of these three teams, he would be in big trouble.
For example, if he joined the Chi Shan team, the Chi family would naturally know that he didn't recruit Fang Yuan.
His first thought was — Fang Yuan was obviously someone else's chess piece. What was he trying to do by joining his team?
His second thought was — the mysterious force that recruited Fang Yuan ahead of time had already broken the rules.
Now that Fang Yuan joined his team, the elders would definitely think that he recruited Fang Yuan ahead of time.
Then wouldn't he be the scapegoat?
No, he had to detain Fang Yuan, monitor him, investigate him!
He had to get concrete evidence and dig out the mysterious backer.
But the truth was that Fang Yuan had no backer!
"If I join one of these three teams, it would be the same as offending one of the three biggest forces in the clan.
Absolutely not!
Sigh, I originally wanted to join Jiang He's team with a low profile.
But behind Jiang He's team, there is the shadow of the elders from the torture chamber.
Now that everyone is watching, it's extremely inappropriate for me to join rashly. "Fang Yuan couldn't help but hesitate.
Clan Leader Guyue Bo's smile deepened, and he continued, "Fang Yuan, if you don't choose, then I will assign you."
The clan elders beside him watched quietly, their expressions unmoving, like statues.
"Hmph, you're starting to force me."
Fang Yuan's eyes flashed. He immediately guessed what Guyue Bo was going to say next. He was either going to send Fang Yuan to the Chi Shan Group or Mo Yan Group.
Guyue Bo naturally knew that he did not recruit Fang Yuan.
To him, this could not only eliminate his own suspicion, but also weaken his political opponents and expose the mysterious force. It could be said to be killing three birds with one stone.
This move of diverting the trouble to someone else, it looked simple but it was actually very profound, showing Gu Yue's proficient political skills.
"No, I can't let Guyue Bo give me orders.
Looks like I can only choose a mixed team. "Fang Yuan was about to speak.
At that moment, a voice came from the crowd. "Why don't you join our group?
Our team is lacking a point of attack. "
Who was it?
For a moment, everyone looked in the direction of the voice.
The person who spoke was neither tall nor short. His dark yellow skin made him look sickly.
A pair of triangular eyes shone brightly.
"It's the sickly snake, Guyue Jiao San." Someone revealed his identity.
"Guyue Jiao San?
He's just a mixed team with no background! "The clan leader and elders all revealed disappointed expressions.
"Jiao San …" An undetectable dark light flashed across Fang Yuan's eyes.
He had never met this Guyue Jiao San before, and he couldn't remember if this person existed.
Why did Jiao San invite him to join?
Was it simply because he got first place in the examination?
How could that be!
Only someone as childish as Fangzheng would have such naive thoughts.
However …
Since Jiao San had personally invited them, it was a breakthrough in the current situation.
"The higher-ups of the clan must be very disappointed.
Haha. "
Fang Yuan couldn't help but smile as he thought of this. He lowered his eyelids to hide the light in his eyes.
"Then I'll join your group." Fang Yuan agreed, stopping Guyue Bo's words.
"Is this Fang Yuan stupid?"
"He didn't join those excellent groups, but chose to join the sickly snake's group!"
"There must be something wrong with his brain, Jiao San's personality, haha …"
The students and Gu Masters started discussing, looking at Fang Yuan like he was an idiot.
The clan leader and elders' faces darkened.
Today's probing was actually disrupted by a Guyue Jiao San!
No … maybe this Jiao San was a pawn in the game.
No matter what, they had to investigate this Guyue Jiao San!
Three days later.
It had been snowing for a day, and now it was getting lighter. Pure white snowflakes danced in the air along with the wind.
The entire Qing Mao mountain was covered in a layer of white clothing.
Many branches were bare, only the evergreen pine trees and green spear bamboos did not change their color, standing proudly in the snow.
A group of five ran on the snowy ground.
The leader was neither tall nor short, with a sickly yellow face, it was Guyue Jiao San.
As he ran, he looked at the silent Fang Yuan, his face showing a warm smile, "Fang Yuan, don't be nervous.
Although this is your first time carrying out a family mission, the mission content is relatively simple.
Just follow us and learn as you do. "
"Okay." Fang Yuan replied lightly, his eyes looking straight ahead, his expression calm.
It was already winter.
As they ran on the snowy ground, the cold winter wind became even stronger.
When he took a breath, it was like eating a mouthful of smoothie. His chest felt cold.
Fang Yuan's face was already pale, and now under the reflection of the snow, he looked even paler.
As he ran, small snowflakes fell on his short black hair, shoulders and eyebrows.
What was different from before was that Fang Yuan had changed his clothes.
This was a dark blue battle robe.
He wore long sleeves and trousers.
His calves were tied with bamboo, and his feet were made of bamboo.
On his forehead was a sapphire blue headband, the end of the headband fluttering in the air as Fang Yuan ran.
On his waist, there was a wide belt.
The belt was navy blue, with a copper plate on the front.
On the copper plate, there was a "1" carved, very obvious.
This was a Gu Master's attire, showing Fang Yuan's status as a Rank one Gu Master.
The youngsters had to study in the academy for a year, before they had the right to wear such attire.
This attire had a special meaning, once worn, it meant that one had surpassed the mortal class, breaking away from the lowly and stepping into the noble class, standing in the upper class of the human society.
Even though Rank one Gu Masters were at the bottom of the upper class, from now on, any mortal who saw Fang Yuan would have to avoid him and greet him respectfully.
Guyue Jiao San's gaze shone. This attire on Fang Yuan, along with his indifferent expression, immediately gave off a cool and capable aura.
As he ran, he continued to speak to Fang Yuan, "When we carry out missions, we often have to move quickly.
Running is the norm, Fang Yuan, are you used to it? "
"Still okay." Fang Yuan was a man of few words, looking at this Guyue Jiao San from the corner of his eyes.
Jiao San's warm smile made him think of the legends of Ren Zu.
It was said that Ren Zu used the Rules and Regulations Gu, taking away his strength and intelligence, leaving behind three Gu worms, one Suspicion, one Trust and one Attitude.
Ren Zu grabbed the Attitude Gu.
According to the bet, the Attitude Gu was subdued into Ren Zu's hands, telling him, "Human, you caught me, I can only blame it on my bad luck.
From now on, I will be used by you.
As long as you put me on, you will be able to use me. "
The Attitude Gu's appearance was like a mask, Ren Zu put it on his face, but he could not put it on no matter how hard he tried, even if he tied it with a rope, it would fall off.
"What is going on?" Ren Zu was puzzled.
The Attitude Gu laughed, "I know, human, so you don't have a heart.
Attitude is the mask of the heart, without a heart, how can you wear me? "
Ren Zu finally understood, he had already given his heart to hope.
He no longer had a heart.
A person without a heart cannot wear an attitude mask.
In other words, a person with a heart, attitude is a mask.
"The warm attitude is only the mask that this Guyue Jiao San is wearing, what is his true motive?" Fang Yuan pondered.
This Jiao San, who was called the "sick snake", was observing Fang Yuan, while Fang Yuan was also secretly observing him.
S-REV-116.summary: Three days later, Fang Yuan embarks on his first clan mission, running through the snowy Qing Mao Mountain with Guyue Jiao San and his team. Fang Yuan wears his new dark blue Gu Master battle robe, signifying his elevated status. As Jiao San maintains a warm, seemingly friendly demeanor, Fang Yuan internally reflects on the nature of 'attitude' as a mask, suspecting Jiao San's true motives, while both subtly observe each other during their journey.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan recognizes Jiao San's initial 'friendly' actions and the strenuous run as deliberate attempts to assert dominance over him.
Fang Yuan demonstrates superior knowledge and skill in identifying and collecting permafrost soil, surprising his teammates.
Jiao San's authority and control over the team are implicitly challenged by Fang Yuan's unexpected competence.
Kong Jing possesses a Rank Two Big Belly Frog Gu used for logistics, capable of storing items and spitting out tools.

Fang Yuan understands Jiao San's actions (running through snow, Yuan stone distribution, mission selection, rental house suggestions) are part of a coordinated effort by his uncle and aunt to control and hinder him, specifically to prevent him from claiming his inheritance.
Fang Yuan recognizes his current Rank One cultivation is insufficient to directly confront or assassinate his uncle and aunt without significant risk and clan investigation.
Fang Yuan identifies advancing to Rank Two as the most direct and safest method to circumvent Jiao San's blockade and claim his inheritance.
Fang Yuan remembers renting a specific dilapidated bamboo building in his previous life after being cast out by his uncle and aunt.
Fang Yuan understands the difficulty of breaking through to Rank Two with his C-grade talent (44% primordial essence) due to the need for sustained impact on the aperture walls, which heal quickly.
Jiao San is actively working with Fang Yuan's uncle and aunt to prevent Fang Yuan from claiming his inheritance by continuously assigning him to missions and controlling his evaluation.
Jiao San feigns care and mentorship towards Fang Yuan while subtly trying to suppress him and control his access to resources and opportunities.
Kong Jing actively supports Jiao San's efforts to manipulate Fang Yuan, including a 'suggestion' for Fang Yuan to rent a cold, unhealthy basement.
Dangerous terrain with hidden pitfalls and traps, requiring specific knowledge to navigate safely.
Home to various wild animals like squirrels and deer.
Contains large amounts of permafrost rotten soil.
Responsible for issuing clan missions and approving family property divisions.
Maintains records of family property ownership.
Known for its low rent and day-by-day payment options due to its poor condition.

S-REV-117.prose:
Chapter 90
In the snow, the five-man team was running.
Guyue Jiao San looked at the sky and said, "It's getting late, this mission is to collect permafrost rotten soil. Although it is simple, it takes a long time.
We need to increase our speed, everyone follow me and try not to fall behind.
Fang Yuan, if you can't hold on, just tell us, it's alright.
You are a newbie, we will take care of you. "
Guyue Jiao San's smile was very friendly.
Fang Yuan nodded, not saying a word.
The other three members exchanged glances. Actually, it was still early, and Jiao San's actions were unnecessary.
In fact, he just wanted to show Fang Yuan his power.
The three of them knew this, but did not expose him.
In fact, this kind of show of power was common.
When a newbie joined a group, the older members would more or less show some of their power to get rid of the newbie's arrogance, so that it would be easier to command and manage them in the future.
"Let's go." Jiao San lightly shouted, taking a step forward and rushing out.
Fang Yuan's gaze shone, and he and the other three increased their speed, following closely behind.
The bamboo shoes stepped on the snow, leaving a series of deep footprints.
The mountainous terrain was bumpy, and it was not easy to walk.
Especially after being covered with a layer of snow, it was easy to slip and fall.
At the same time, the snow was unpredictable. Who knew if there were sharp rocks or pits under the snow?
If they stepped into a hunter's trap, they would be even more unlucky.
Living in this world was tough, and travelling seemed easy, but in fact, it required a lot of knowledge.
Many newbies suffered because of this.
Only after a long period of training and suffering could a Gu Master accumulate enough experience to avoid these obstacles.
The cold winter wind assaulted his face as Fang Yuan sped along the snowy ground.
Sometimes he jumped, sometimes he ran, sometimes he climbed, and sometimes he moved, following closely behind Jiao San.
The entire Qing Mao mountain was covered in a layer of snow, and many trees were bare, without a single leaf.
Occasionally, squirrels or wild deer would be disturbed by this group of people, scurrying far away.
Half an hour later, Jiao San suddenly stopped, having reached his destination.
He turned around and looked at Fang Yuan with a smile, praising: "Not bad!
Fang Yuan, you really deserve to be the top scholar of this year. You actually followed behind me and didn't fall behind. "
Fang Yuan smiled and said nothing.
He was already familiar with this kind of display of strength.
In fact, running through the snow had become a "traditional program."
Many teams used this to suppress the arrogance of the newcomers.
The two of them stood there and waited for a while before the other three team members arrived.
Hu, hu, hu …
They were panting heavily, their foreheads dripping with sweat, their faces flushed red. Two of them bent over and supported themselves with their hands, while the last one collapsed onto the snowy ground.
Jiao San glared at the three of them and bellowed: "Stand up straight!
Aren't you ashamed?
Look at Fang Yuan, and then look at yourselves.
Hmph, after this mission is completed, all of you should go back and reflect on yourselves. "
The three of them quickly stood up straight, but their heads were lowered. They did not dare to raise their heads from Jiao San's scolding and did not dare to retort.
However, the way they looked at Fang Yuan had changed.
"That's weird, why is this Fang Yuan so experienced?
I didn't even see him fall once! "
"Sigh, our strength is only average, how can we compare to this monster?"
"Hmph, we didn't get to watch a good show, and instead became the sacrificial lambs.
This guy … "
"Alright, focus." Jiao San pointed to the front, "This small valley is our destination.
There is a large amount of frozen soil that we can collect.
We will split up here and collect the frozen soil. We will gather here in an hour.
Kong Jing, distribute the tools. "
Just as Jiao San finished speaking, the male team member called Guyue Kong Jing stood up.
He opened his palm, and a yellow light shot out from his aperture, hovering in the middle of his palm.
The yellow light dissipated, revealing the true appearance of a golden back frog.
This golden frog was chubby, and its snow-white belly was extremely big. When it swelled up, its entire body looked like a round ball.
The frog's mouth and eyes were pushed up to the top of its head, compressed together.
Fang Yuan's gaze shone, immediately recognizing this Gu worm.
This was a Rank two Gu worm — Big Belly Frog.
Soon after, traces of red steel primeval essence flowed out from Kong Jing's hand, and was absorbed by the big belly frog.
Gua.
The big-bellied frog let out a loud cry. It opened its mouth and spat out a miniature shovel.
The iron shovel flew in the air, quickly becoming bigger, and in a blink of an eye, it landed on the ground, becoming half a person tall.
Gua gua gua …
It called out a few times, spitting out a tool each time.
Finally, on the snowy ground in front of everyone, there were five iron shovels and five wooden boxes.
The wooden boxes were tied with two hemp ropes.
Gu Masters had a huge burden when feeding their Gu worms, thus their numbers were limited.
In the early stages, it was hard for Gu Masters to face complex environments alone, and there were all sorts of troubles, thus they often moved in small groups.
In a small group, there would be someone scouting, someone attacking, someone defending, someone healing, and someone in charge of logistics.
This male Gu Master, Kong Jing, was obviously a logistics Gu Master.
The big belly frog he had was a typical logistics Gu worm, with a large space in its stomach, used for storage.
Of course, every Gu worm had its strengths and weaknesses.
The big belly frog's weakness, besides the limited storage space, was that every time it spat out something, it would make a sound. This was really annoying.
Especially when the Gu Master was hiding in the battlefield, if it was not handled properly, they would expose their location.
Also, the big belly frog could not store Gu worms, and was not immune to poison, so poisonous items could not be stored.
After distributing the tools, the five of them each had an iron shovel and a wooden box.
"Let's go." Jiao San waved his hand, leading the way into the valley.
Fang Yuan carried the iron shovel, carrying the wooden box, and chose another direction.
"He's a newbie after all, going in excitedly.
Hehe. "
"How can permafrost soil be so easy to collect?
If we don't distinguish it carefully, we might just collect normal permafrost soil, wasting all our efforts. "
"In fact, it is very hard to distinguish it.
The colour of permafrost soil is not much different from normal permafrost soil.
Especially under the cover of snow, newbies can only rely on luck to dig it out. "
The three members looked at Fang Yuan's back, laughing coldly in their hearts.
However, an hour later, when they saw Fang Yuan return with a box full of permafrost soil, they were dumbfounded.
Including Jiao San, their wooden boxes were at most half filled with permafrost soil.
Seeing Fang Yuan's wooden box, they were too embarrassed to show their results.
"It's all permafrost soil!" A member inspected it carefully, and was even more shocked.
"Fang Yuan, how did you collect so much permafrost soil?" A female member could not hold back her curiosity and suspicion.
Fang Yuan raised his eyebrows, the snow light shining on his eyes, making them look clear and penetrating.
He smiled lightly, "The academy elder mentioned it before.
Permafrost soil is a common resource that is produced after the snow and ice froze the swamp.
It has a tinge of purple in the black, and the smell is actually very smelly, but because of the snow and ice, it cannot be smelled.
It is the food of the smelly fart fat worm, and it is also very fertile. It is often mixed in the soil, and used to grow wheat, vegetables and fruits.
The family gave this mission, it should be used to fertilize the moon orchids in the underground cave. "
His words caused the four of them to freeze in place.
"These theories will naturally be taught in the academy.
However, it was quite difficult to link theory with reality.
Did this Fang Yuan personally collect permafrost soil before? "The three members looked at each other.
Guyue Jiao San's eyes flashed, and he smiled, "Fang Yuan, you did well."
He praised, but the warm smile on his face was now a little stiff.
Jiao San turned his head, and continued to speak to everyone, "This way, our mission should be completed.
Everyone, pass the shovels and wooden boxes to Kong Jing, let's go back. "
By the time they returned to the village, it was already afternoon.
The five of them came out of the internal affairs hall, and Jiao San distributed the six Yuan stones.
He got two for himself, and the rest got one each.
Seeing how easily the Yuan stone was obtained, some of the members had smiles on their faces.
Fang Yuan silently kept the Yuan stone, and did not make a sound.
He only thought in his heart, "When a newcomer joins a team, the family will increase the rewards, as a form of support for the newcomer.
The reward for collecting permafrost soil is at most two Yuan stones.
Because of me, it is twice as much.
According to logic, they should be taking care of me.
If running through the snow is a show of strength, and collecting permafrost soil alone is making things difficult for me, then giving out Yuan stones like this is suppression. "
It was just one or two Yuan stones, Fang Yuan did not care about it.
He was just curious, he and Guyue Jiao San had never met each other before, why would he suppress him?
"Could it be …" A light flashed in Fang Yuan's mind.
(Author's note: Damn … who can tell me why, I had already released the chapter on time.
It was the same last time, I didn't manage to release it on time.)
S-REV-117.summary: A five-man team, including Fang Yuan, runs through the snowy Qing Mao Mountain on a mission to collect permafrost rotten soil. Guyue Jiao San uses the run as a power display, attempting to humble Fang Yuan, who easily keeps pace while the other three members struggle. During the collection, Fang Yuan impresses everyone by efficiently gathering a full box of the correct soil, exposing Jiao San's and the other members' mediocrity and increasing their resentment towards him.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan learns the specific clan rules regarding mission completion, evaluation, and the right to give up missions based on Rank.
Fang Yuan realizes that Jiao San's actions are orchestrated by his uncle and aunt to control him and block his inheritance.
Jiao San is acting as a tool for Fang Yuan's uncle and aunt, attempting to manipulate Fang Yuan through team dynamics and mission assignments.
Mother Shen is sent by Fang Yuan's uncle and aunt to persuade him to return home and prevent him from renting a house independently.

relationshipMutations.type: antagonistic, supportive of Jiao San's manipulation
persuasive, acting on behalf of uncle/aunt

C-REV-01.transition: Walks along the street with the team after leaving the Internal Affairs Hall.

S-REV-118.prose:
==================================================

Chapter 91
The five stood at the side of the street.
Guyue Jiao San smiled warmly, saying to Fang Yuan, "Brother Fang Yuan, your performance really impressed us.
It seems we made the right decision to invite you.
You just graduated from the academy, so there are some things you don't understand.
Let me introduce to you. "
"First, clan missions, every Gu Master completes at least one every month.
The more completed, the more perfect the mission, the higher the evaluation. "
"Second, missions are issued by the internal affairs hall or the external affairs hall. Gu Masters can only choose one at a time, and once accepted, they have to complete it."
"Third, under special circumstances, the Gu Master can choose to give up on the mission.
But the evaluation will be greatly lowered.
At the same time, Rank one Gu Masters do not have the right to give up, only Rank two Gu Masters have this right.
But they can only give up one mission every year. "
"Fourth, the clan evaluation is very important.
It concerns your future in the clan.
The higher the evaluation, the brighter and brighter your future. "
Fang Yuan listened and nodded.
He was very familiar with these things.
Guyue Jiao San was not wrong, nor misleading, but there were many other important things that he did not say.
"Alright, we have just completed the permafrost decaying soil mission.
Next, I have accepted a mission to capture wild deer.
The danger is low, it is very suitable for Fang Yuan to practice. "Jiao San said to Fang Yuan.
Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart, but said, "Thank you for your help, group leader."
Guyue Kong Jing immediately said, "Brother Fang Yuan, you should thank group leader.
Simple missions, although easy to complete, have low rewards.
Group leader did this to take care of you. "
The other two female Gu Masters also added, "That's right, that's right, little brother Fang Yuan, words of gratitude are not as good as actual actions.
How about we treat group leader to a meal? "
"Brother Fang Yuan, you just left the academy, and the society is very complicated.
Relationships are very important.
If you have anything you don't understand, just ask us during the meal. "
Guyue Jiao San laughed and waved his hand: "Don't make things difficult for Fang Yuan.
He just graduated from the academy, so he doesn't have much Yuan stone on hand. He's very short of money. "
"Impossible!
Let's not talk about anything else. Just the first place in the year-end assessment alone should be rewarded with a hundred Yuan stone, right? "
A female Gu Master purposely called out, then showed a slightly jealous expression, "Speaking of which, I am really envious, a hundred Yuan stone is a huge sum to us."
"Team Leader, you're wrong about our Brother Fang Yuan.
How could he be so petty?
Brother Fang Yuan, am I right? "Guyue Kong Jing laughed heartily and seemed to be very happy.
The other female Gu Master got close to Fang Yuan and said in a friendly manner: "Little brother Fang Yuan, let me tell you this out of goodwill.
You don't have to curry favor with us, but you have to curry favor with the team leader.
Do you know, a portion of our group's evaluations are written by the team leader?
If he says it's outstanding, then it's outstanding. If he says it's bad, then it's bad. "
"Not bad, not bad.
Evaluation is very important to us Gu Masters. If we are evaluated to be outstanding, we will be noticed by the clan's higher-ups.
In the future, when we have more experience, we can save many years of hard work! "Kong Jing immediately added.
Throughout the entire process, Guyue Jiao San was smiling as he watched.
Finally, he waved his hand, his expression benevolent and his smile amiable: "Sigh, don't talk nonsense.
My evaluations are all fair and objective, I won't be easily bribed by you guys.
But, Fang Yuan, don't worry, you are a newbie. Since you have joined our group, I will take care of your evaluation accordingly. "
If it was a normal youngster, he would have been bewitched and moved by these people's words.
They were bullying newbies who did not know the rules, and were naive and childish.
But Fang Yuan's eyes were clear and calm.
The team leader participates in the evaluation of the group, this was a fact.
This was the clan's system, delegating power to the team leader, giving him the authority to manage each group.
But it would not be as serious as these people said.
The evaluation of the clan, the team leader's evaluation was only a small part, the rest were matters of the clan's internal affairs hall.
Taking a step back, even if the team leader's evaluation of the group was very influential, so what?
Fang Yuan did not care about this evaluation at all.
He had already made up his mind to quickly raise his cultivation to Rank three and leave this place.
He had never thought of wasting a hundred years in this clan, and working hard for the clan for the rest of his life.
In the eyes of these short-sighted Gu Masters, evaluation was the most important thing.
But to Fang Yuan, the so-called evaluation was nothing!
So these Gu Masters' threatening words were completely useless against Fang Yuan.
"I know what you've said.
I still have some matters to attend to, I will leave first. "Fang Yuan was silent for a while before saying.
Eh?
At once, these four Gu Masters showed a shocked expression.
"What does this mean?
Did you not hear what we said just now? "A female Gu Master stared with her eyes wide open, screaming in her heart.
"Is there really no problem with your comprehension?" Guyue Kong Jing at this moment really wanted to grab Fang Yuan's collar and interrogate him.
Jiao San's mouth twitched uncontrollably.
Fang Yuan's indifference made their echoing of each other look like a farce.
It made their plan become a joke.
Looking at Fang Yuan's back view as he turned to leave, the anger in his heart was indescribable.
"Aiya, Fang Yuan, don't be in such a hurry to leave, don't listen to their nonsense."
Jiao San forcefully swallowed his anger, forcing a smile as he quickly walked up and blocked Fang Yuan, "You are going to rent a house right, we will accompany you.
I have some connections, I am quite familiar with renting a house. "
"I am indeed going to rent a house, the academy hostel is uninhabitable.
What advice does group leader have? "Fang Yuan raised his eyebrows, his expression calm.
"I know a few houses, they are cheap, and the location is good." Jiao San laughed enthusiastically, leading the way.
…
"This house of mine, fifteen Yuan stone a month, no bargaining."
"Pfft, eight Yuan stone and you want to rent my house?
Dream on. "
"You have to pay a deposit, one for three.
That's what everyone else does. "
"My house has good feng shui, and it is secluded at night.
The key is the clan leader's pavilion, you know how good the location is.
The price is really not expensive, just twenty-five Yuan stone a month. "
Until the sky darkened, Fang Yuan still had not decided which house to rent.
"Little brother Fang Yuan, you are too stingy.
The village is only so big, the market price is like this. "
"I say, we should rent the house near the clan leader's pavilion, the second floor is spacious and the scenery is good.
Little brother Fang Yuan, don't be too thrifty, it's only twenty-five Yuan stone.
The prize you have is enough for you to stay for a full four months. "
The two female Gu Masters persuaded with ill intentions.
Fang Yuan shook his head, "I don't have much Yuan stone, I can't waste it like this."
"Then let's rent the basement, it's cheaper." Guyue Kong Jing's eyes flashed with coldness, suggesting.
Fang Yuan snorted in his heart, this Kong Jing is so vicious!
The mountain was already very humid, and now that it was winter, living in the basement without ventilation, it was easy to catch a cold.
Even if one did not catch a cold, staying here for a long time would cause problems with the joints.
Seeing that Fang Yuan did not reply, Jiao San said, "Actually the first floor of the main hall is not bad.
If you share it with others, the rent will be cheaper. "
Fang Yuan shook his head, "I want to live alone, I don't like sharing."
Guyue Kong Jing snorted, saying unhappily, "You don't want to do this, you don't want to do that.
It's not that I'm scolding you, little brother Fang Yuan.
You're too picky, your standards are too high, it's not practical. "
Fang Yuan heard this, laughing coldly in his heart, "Even if there is a house that fits the criteria, as long as it's a house that you recommend, I will not accept it."
He was pretending to be polite, just to be cautious, to see if there were any traps.
Immediately, just as Fang Yuan was about to say goodbye to these people, Mother Shen appeared.
"Young master Fang Yuan, I've finally found you.
The academy hostel is uninhabitable, Master and Madam have already prepared a banquet, and specially asked me to invite you home.
It's better to stay at home, why do you need to rent a house outside? "She persuaded.
She finally came …
Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart, this Mother Shen was really accurate, finding this place so quickly, someone must have informed her!
Just as he had expected, the mastermind behind the scenes was his uncle and aunt!!
And this Jiao San was the shackle that Uncle and Aunt used to restrain him.
Fang Yuan's silence, looked like he was hesitating.
"Fang Yuan, why don't you just stay at Uncle and Aunt's house.
Why go through so much trouble?
Renting a house will cost quite a lot of Yuan stone. "
Guyue Jiao San said with 'concern', he looked at the side of Fang Yuan's face, a dark light flashing in his eyes.
S-REV-118.summary: Jiao San 'educates' Fang Yuan on clan mission rules and then assigns him to a new deer-capturing mission, while he and his team attempt to manipulate Fang Yuan into currying favor and spending money. Fang Yuan, seeing through their ploys, frustrates their efforts during a house hunt. Mother Shen then arrives, inviting Fang Yuan to live with his uncle and aunt, confirming Fang Yuan's suspicions about their involvement.

continuityMutations.content: Uncle reveals the two-step process for claiming inheritance: application without mission, then completion of a specific inheritance mission via a small group.
Uncle confirms that Jiao San is a pawn in their scheme to indefinitely block Fang Yuan's inheritance through continuous mission assignments.
Aunt confirms that the family property records are held by the Internal Affairs Hall, making it difficult to deny Fang Yuan outright.
Uncle is the mastermind behind the plot to prevent Fang Yuan from claiming his inheritance, using clan rules and Jiao San to create obstacles.
Uncle is aware of the specific clan rules regarding inheritance claims, including the cultivation prerequisite and the mission requirement through small groups.
Aunt is complicit in her husband's schemes to deny Fang Yuan his inheritance, initially panicked but then reassured by his detailed plan.
Aunt is aware that the family property they are withholding from Fang Yuan is 'clearly recorded in the Internal Affairs Hall,' implying a past wrongful acquisition or retention of said property.

S-REV-119.prose:
==================================================

Chapter 92
In the hall, the lights were bright.
On the round dining table, the wine and dishes were already cold.
The bright red candlelight flickered, casting the shadows of Uncle and Aunt on the wall.
The shadows of the two joined together, swaying gloomily with the candlelight.
Mother Shen knelt in front of them.
Uncle broke the silence. "I didn't expect this Fang Yuan to be so hell-bent on going against me.
Sigh, I originally wanted to persuade him nicely, to let him stay at home first, then find a reason to kick him out.
I didn't expect that little bastard to not fall for it!
He was determined to reject my invitation. There was no room for discussion!
He won't even take a step forward! "
Aunt gritted her teeth, looking a little panicked. "This unruly little bastard is already sixteen years old.
If he asks for the family property, we can't not give it to him.
The family property that we obtained back then was clearly recorded in the Internal Affairs Hall, we can't go back on our words.
What should we do?! "
"You can leave first." Uncle waved Mother Shen away and sneered. "Don't be anxious.
I've been thinking of a plan for the past year.
First, to split the family property, one must have a cultivation of rank one intermediate stage.
Fang Yuan has already reached this point, and is already at the peak of his cultivation. He even won first place at the end of the year, it's really impressive.
Hehe … "
"But to successfully split the family property, it's not that easy!
Rank one intermediate stage cultivation is only a prerequisite.
To split the family property, Fang Yuan has to apply for it, and after the Internal Affairs Hall approves, they will issue a mission to see if Fang Yuan has the qualifications.
This is also to prevent the family property from being divided randomly, causing internal friction and weakening the family's strength. "
Aunt came to a sudden realization. "In that case, Fang Yuan has to complete this mission to obtain his parents' inheritance."
"That's right." Uncle laughed sinisterly. "But the Internal Affairs Hall's missions are issued for small groups.
This family property mission is no exception.
If Fang Yuan wants to complete it, he must rely on the strength of the small group, he can't rely on himself.
The family is doing this because they want to unite the group and improve their cohesiveness. "
His aunt laughed heartily. "Master, you are too wise.
He asked Jiao San to bring Fang Yuan into the group. This way, Fang Yuan would need their help to complete the inheritance quest.
However, Jiao San is one of us. Fang Yuan won't be able to complete this mission alone. "
A smug look flashed across his uncle's eyes as he said, "Hmph, even if I can't recruit him, I have other ways to deal with him.
Not to mention completing the mission, even if he wanted to apply for the separation of the family and accept this mission, it might not be possible! "
…
Night fell and the snow stopped.
As Fang Yuan walked along the street, the bamboo buildings along the way were all covered with a layer of white frost.
His feet made light sounds as he stepped on the snow.
As the cool air entered his body, Fang Yuan's mind became extremely clear.
After rejecting Mother Shen, Fang Yuan ignored Jiao San and the others who urged him to stay and left on his own.
"So it was like this."
He thought as he walked, "Uncle and Aunt are trying to stop me and delay me, making me lose the chance to get back the inheritance."
"After the new year, I will be sixteen and have the right to split the family.
My parents are dead and my brother has found new parents. As long as I succeed, the inheritance will be mine.
But to get back the inheritance, there are two steps, and each step is very important. "
"The first step is to apply for the inheritance at the internal affairs hall without any mission.
The second step is to complete the family inheritance mission issued by the internal affairs hall. Only then will I have the right to get the inheritance. "
"Jiao San and Aunt and Uncle are jackals of the same tribe. Not to mention the second step, just the first step is to stop me."
The clan rules state that Gu Masters can only complete one mission at a time.
This is to prevent Gu Masters from accepting too many missions and causing a vicious competition within the clan.
Jiao San continued to accept missions. After completing the permafrost rotten soil mission, he immediately took on a new mission to capture wild deer.
The clan missions are issued to the entire group. That is to say, according to the clan rules, Fang Yuan must complete this mission to capture wild deer before he has the right to apply for the inheritance.
"But at that time, I believe Jiao San will accept another mission.
As the group leader, he will always be one step faster than me when it comes to handing in missions.
I am one step away from applying for the inheritance mission, but he is stuck in front of me. "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan's eyes flashed.
These schemes are really annoying, like an invisible rope that is restraining Fang Yuan's footsteps.
But Fang Yuan did not regret entering this group.
The situation at the battle stage put him in a tough spot.
Jiao San's invitation helped Fang Yuan out of his predicament.
If he did not enter this group, he believed that Uncle and Aunt would have other tricks up their sleeves.
Now that he is in the group, he can see through their plans and counterattack easily.
"To solve this problem, it is not that there is no way.
The simplest and most direct method is to get rid of Jiao San and assassinate Uncle and Aunt. Then no one will fight with me for the inheritance.
But this method is too risky.
They are Rank two Gu Masters, and my Rank one cultivation is still too low.
Even if I kill them, there is no way to clean up the mess.
Unless there is a good opportunity, I can take advantage of it … But such opportunities are hard to come by. "
Fang Yuan could kill the family servant Gao Wan, he could kill Old Man Wang's family.
That is because they are mortals, servants, their lives are as worthless as grass. Killing them is like killing a dog or breaking a blade of grass, it does not matter.
But to assassinate a Gu Master, that is a huge problem.
Gu Masters all have the surname Guyue, they are all clansmen.
No matter who dies, it will attract the clan's punishment hall to investigate.
Fang Yuan evaluated his own strength. The risk of killing now is too high, he might be killed instead.
Even if he killed them, the punishment hall's investigation would be even more troublesome.
Not only will his actions be monitored, they might even find out about the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
"To get rid of a small problem and attract a problem that is a hundred times bigger than the problem, this is not a wise move.
Hmm?
I'm here. "Fang Yuan muttered to himself, stopping in front of a broken bamboo building.
This bamboo building was already in ruins, like an old man with one foot in the grave, bending over in the cold winter wind, struggling at death's door.
Looking at this bamboo building, Fang Yuan's face showed a trace of reminiscence.
This was the house he rented in his previous life.
In his previous life, when he was chased out by Uncle and Aunt, he had less than fifteen Yuan stone.
After sleeping on the streets for a few days, he found this place.
The rooms here were too old, so the rent was much lower than other places.
Furthermore, while other places would settle their accounts by month or quarter, this place was the only place that was settled by the number of days.
"I don't know if Uncle and Aunt set up other places.
But my previous life's memories tell me, at least not here. "Fang Yuan knocked on the door.
Half an hour later, he settled the rental agreement, and was brought to a room on the second floor by the landlord.
The old floorboards made a worrisome sound when one stepped on them.
The facilities in the room were simple, there was only a bed and a quilt.
There were many patches on the quilt, but there were still holes, revealing the yellowed cotton inside.
There was an oil lamp at the head of the bed, and after the landlord lit it up, he left.
Fang Yuan did not sleep, but sat cross-legged on the bed, and started to cultivate.
The primordial sea in the aperture rose and fell, waves rose and fell.
Every drop of primordial water was dark green.
The four walls of the aperture were made of a sturdy white crystal film, translucent.
This was the scene of a Rank 1 Peak.
Suddenly, the green bronze primordial sea started to surge with huge waves.
Like wild beasts suddenly going berserk, they started to attack the aperture walls in a suicidal manner.
Boom boom boom … …
Huge waves rose, and fiercely crashed against the aperture walls. The splashing waves shattered into green crystals, and then completely dissipated.
In a short period of time, 44% of the primordial sea rapidly decreased, and a large amount of primordial essence was being expended.
On the thick and sturdy crystal film, cracks started to appear.
But it was just cracks, and this was far from enough.
If Fang Yuan wanted to break through the Rank 1 Peak and advance to Rank 2, he had to completely destroy this crystal film, and then rebuild it!
The dark green primordial essence continued to attack the crystal film, and the cracks on the crystal film increased, gradually forming a whole piece.
In some places, the cracks deepened, and became even more obvious.
But as the primordial sea was completely depleted, and without primordial essence to continue attacking, the cracks on the crystal film started to heal, and the cracks started to disappear.
Fang Yuan was not surprised, he retracted his consciousness, and opened his eyes.
The oil lamp was already extinguished, and there was not much oil to begin with.
The room was pitch black, and only a small amount of light from the snow could be seen through the cracks of the window.
There was no furnace in the room, and it was not warm.
Fang Yuan sat cross-legged on the bed, and after not moving for a long time, he could already feel the coldness in his body gradually increasing.
His black pupils merged into one with the darkness.
"Actually, to break through Jiao San's blockade, there is a simpler and safer method than killing.
That is to advance to Rank 2!
Rank 1 Gu Masters do not have the right to give up on missions, but Rank 2 Gu Masters have one every year.
If I advance to Rank 2, I can directly give up on my mission, and apply to split from the family. "
"But breaking through to Rank 2 is not an easy task." Thinking of this, Fang Yuan sighed.
He got off the bed, and slowly paced around the small room.
From initial stage to middle stage, from middle stage to upper stage, this was a small realm advancement.
From Rank 1 Peak stage to Rank 2 Initial stage, this was a huge breakthrough.
The difficulty between the two could not be compared.
Simply put, to break through the crystal film, one needed an explosive force, and in a short period of time, a strong enough impact force to break the crystal film.
But Fang Yuan only had C grade talent, and the primordial essence in his primordial sea was only 44%.
If he used his full strength to attack the crystal film, his primordial essence would be used up in a short while.
Just like just now, after his primordial essence was used up, he would not have the strength to continue attacking.
And the crystal film had the ability to recover, and in a short while, it would be completely healed.
Fang Yuan's previous efforts would be in vain.
"To break through the crystal film and reach Rank 2, not counting special circumstances, one would need at least 55% dark green primordial essence.
And my talent is limited, at most 44%.
That's why people often say that talent is the second most important factor in a Gu Master's cultivation! "
Thinking of this, Fang Yuan slowly stopped in his tracks.
Unknowingly, he had already walked to the window, and casually pushed it open.
Through the window, snow covered the mountain.
Under the moonlight, the snow was like white jade, and the world in front of him was like a crystal palace, untainted by a speck of dust.
The snowy light shone on Fang Yuan's young face. His expression was calm, his eyebrows relaxed, and his eyes were like a spring under the moon.
The cold wind blew, and the young man suddenly laughed, "It's just a little frost."
S-REV-119.summary: In their home, Fang Yuan's uncle and aunt confirm their detailed scheme to prevent him from claiming his inheritance. The uncle explains the clan's inheritance rules, which require a Rank One intermediate stage cultivation and the completion of a specific mission through a small group. They reveal their intention to use Jiao San to continuously assign Fang Yuan missions, thereby blocking his access to the inheritance application, while the aunt expresses relief and admiration for the plan.

continuityMutations.content: Fang Yuan considers and rejects assassinating his uncle and aunt due to the high risk and potential clan investigation.
Fang Yuan identifies advancing to Rank Two as the key to circumventing Jiao San's mission blockade and claiming his inheritance.
Fang Yuan confirms the limitations of his C-grade talent (44% primordial essence) in breaking through to Rank Two.

C-REV-01.transition: Walks along the street after rejecting Mother Shen and the team.
