The situation at the battle stage put him in a tough spot.
Jiao San's invitation helped Fang Yuan out of his predicament.
If he did not enter this group, he believed that Uncle and Aunt would have other tricks up their sleeves.
Now that he is in the group, he can see through their plans and counterattack easily.
"To solve this problem, it is not that there is no way.
The simplest and most direct method is to get rid of Jiao San and assassinate Uncle and Aunt. Then no one will fight with me for the inheritance.
But this method is too risky.
They are Rank two Gu Masters, and my Rank one cultivation is still too low.
Even if I kill them, there is no way to clean up the mess.
Unless there is a good opportunity, I can take advantage of it … But such opportunities are hard to come by. "
Fang Yuan could kill the family servant Gao Wan, he could kill Old Man Wang's family.
That is because they are mortals, servants, their lives are as worthless as grass. Killing them is like killing a dog or breaking a blade of grass, it does not matter.
But to assassinate a Gu Master, that is a huge problem.
Gu Masters all have the surname Guyue, they are all clansmen.
No matter who dies, it will attract the clan's punishment hall to investigate.
Fang Yuan evaluated his own strength. The risk of killing now is too high, he might be killed instead.
Even if he killed them, the punishment hall's investigation would be even more troublesome.
Not only will his actions be monitored, they might even find out about the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
"To get rid of a small problem and attract a problem that is a hundred times bigger than the problem, this is not a wise move.
Hmm?
I'm here. "Fang Yuan muttered to himself, stopping in front of a broken bamboo building.
This bamboo building was already in ruins, like an old man with one foot in the grave, bending over in the cold winter wind, struggling at death's door.
Looking at this bamboo building, Fang Yuan's face showed a trace of reminiscence.
This was the house he rented in his previous life.
In his previous life, when he was chased out by Uncle and Aunt, he had less than fifteen Yuan stone.
After sleeping on the streets for a few days, he found this place.
The rooms here were too old, so the rent was much lower than other places.
Furthermore, while other places would settle their accounts by month or quarter, this place was the only place that was settled by the number of days.
"I don't know if Uncle and Aunt set up other places.
But my previous life's memories tell me, at least not here. "Fang Yuan knocked on the door.
Half an hour later, he settled the rental agreement, and was brought to a room on the second floor by the landlord.
The old floorboards made a worrisome sound when one stepped on them.
The facilities in the room were simple, there was only a bed and a quilt.
There were many patches on the quilt, but there were still holes, revealing the yellowed cotton inside.
There was an oil lamp at the head of the bed, and after the landlord lit it up, he left.
Fang Yuan did not sleep, but sat cross-legged on the bed, and started to cultivate.
The primordial sea in the aperture rose and fell, waves rose and fell.
Every drop of primordial water was dark green.
The four walls of the aperture were made of a sturdy white crystal film, translucent.
This was the scene of a Rank 1 Peak.
Suddenly, the green bronze primordial sea started to surge with huge waves.
Like wild beasts suddenly going berserk, they started to attack the aperture walls in a suicidal manner.
Boom boom boom … …
Huge waves rose, and fiercely crashed against the aperture walls. The splashing waves shattered into green crystals, and then completely dissipated.
In a short period of time, 44% of the primordial sea rapidly decreased, and a large amount of primordial essence was being expended.
On the thick and sturdy crystal film, cracks started to appear.
But it was just cracks, and this was far from enough.
If Fang Yuan wanted to break through the Rank 1 Peak and advance to Rank 2, he had to completely destroy this crystal film, and then rebuild it!
The dark green primordial essence continued to attack the crystal film, and the cracks on the crystal film increased, gradually forming a whole piece.
In some places, the cracks deepened, and became even more obvious.
But as the primordial sea was completely depleted, and without primordial essence to continue attacking, the cracks on the crystal film started to heal, and the cracks started to disappear.
Fang Yuan was not surprised, he retracted his consciousness, and opened his eyes.
The oil lamp was already extinguished, and there was not much oil to begin with.
The room was pitch black, and only a small amount of light from the snow could be seen through the cracks of the window.
There was no furnace in the room, and it was not warm.
Fang Yuan sat cross-legged on the bed, and after not moving for a long time, he could already feel the coldness in his body gradually increasing.
His black pupils merged into one with the darkness.
"Actually, to break through Jiao San's blockade, there is a simpler and safer method than killing.
That is to advance to Rank 2!
Rank 1 Gu Masters do not have the right to give up on missions, but Rank 2 Gu Masters have one every year.
If I advance to Rank 2, I can directly give up on my mission, and apply to split from the family. "
"But breaking through to Rank 2 is not an easy task." Thinking of this, Fang Yuan sighed.
He got off the bed, and slowly paced around the small room.
From initial stage to middle stage, from middle stage to upper stage, this was a small realm advancement.
From Rank 1 Peak stage to Rank 2 Initial stage, this was a huge breakthrough.
The difficulty between the two could not be compared.
Simply put, to break through the crystal film, one needed an explosive force, and in a short period of time, a strong enough impact force to break the crystal film.
But Fang Yuan only had C grade talent, and the primordial essence in his primordial sea was only 44%.
If he used his full strength to attack the crystal film, his primordial essence would be used up in a short while.
Just like just now, after his primordial essence was used up, he would not have the strength to continue attacking.
And the crystal film had the ability to recover, and in a short while, it would be completely healed.
Fang Yuan's previous efforts would be in vain.
"To break through the crystal film and reach Rank 2, not counting special circumstances, one would need at least 55% dark green primordial essence.
And my talent is limited, at most 44%.
That's why people often say that talent is the second most important factor in a Gu Master's cultivation! "
Thinking of this, Fang Yuan slowly stopped in his tracks.
Unknowingly, he had already walked to the window, and casually pushed it open.
Through the window, snow covered the mountain.
Under the moonlight, the snow was like white jade, and the world in front of him was like a crystal palace, untainted by a speck of dust.
The snowy light shone on Fang Yuan's young face. His expression was calm, his eyebrows relaxed, and his eyes were like a spring under the moon.
The cold wind blew, and the young man suddenly laughed, "It's just a little frost."

==================================================
S-REV-120.summary: Fang Yuan, having dismissed Jiao San and Mother Shen, walks through the snowy village, confirming his uncle and aunt's manipulative plan to deny his inheritance. He outlines the two-step inheritance process and recognizes Jiao San's role in blocking him with successive missions. After securing a cheap, dilapidated room, he attempts to break through to Rank Two but fails due to his C-grade talent, leading him to realize that advancing his cultivation is the most effective and safest counter-strategy, despite its difficulty.

continuityMutations.content: His plan to use a 'stupid method' of forcefully pushing his cultivation to Rank Two using Yuan stones.
His suspicion that Fang Yuan might be attempting to break through to Rank Two independently.
His disdain for Fang Yuan as 'just a young newbie' despite his year-end exam performance.
His C-grade aptitude is 44% primeval essence storage.
Intentionally misled Jiao San's group about his whereabouts and intentions to cultivate undisturbed.
Successfully broke through to Rank Two using a difficult and resource-intensive method.
Used his connection with Old Man Wang's family to secure a safe, discreet place to cultivate with Jiang He's help.
Is aware of the significant mental and physical toll his forced advancement took, highlighting his extreme willpower.
Was completely misled by Fang Yuan's deception, believing he was attempting to cultivate in the rented room or had encountered wild beasts.
His anger and embarrassment over Fang Yuan's absence reveal his desire to assert dominance over new group members.
Immediately interpreted Fang Yuan's note as an attempt to breakthrough and devised a plan to interrupt him.
Follows Jiao San's orders and attempts to aid in his schemes, even suggesting actions to further their plan.
Successfully located Fang Yuan's rented room based on the clues he left.
All property in the village belongs to the Guyue clan.
Mortals are serfs and servants raised by the lord.

S-REV-121.prose:
Chapter 93 After a sleepless night, the moment the sky brightened, Fang Yuan went out to buy things. The house was simple and the bedding was old. If he stayed here for a long time, the cold would invade his body and he would fall sick. Although Fang Yuan had used up most of his Yuan stone, he still had to buy his daily necessities. These things could not be saved. First was the bedding. He needed at least two new cotton blankets. Other than that, he also needed bed sheets and blankets. He had to buy another oil lamp to light up the house, and he had to save up at least two pots of oil. Fang Yuan thought for a while. Although the room was not big, it could fit a small table and chair, so he bought it. Most importantly, there was a stove. In winter, if there was no stove to keep warm, he would still wake up from the cold in the middle of the night. Other than these, Fang Yuan also bought some rations. He also prepared some water, enough to last him for seven days. The winter sun rose slowly, giving off a lazy glow. Guyue, Jiao San and the other Gu Masters stood at the village's northern gate, waiting anxiously. "Something is wrong, we agreed on this place and time last night. But it has already been fifteen minutes, why hasn't this Fang Yuan appeared yet? "A female member said. "Don't be impatient, let's wait a while more. It is inevitable for newbies to be late. " Jiao San laughed. He was worried about not being able to find a chance to suppress Fang Yuan, but he did not expect him to come knocking on his door the next day. "Let's just wait a while. But he wants the group leader to wait for him with us, this kid is too arrogant! "Guyue said to Kong Jing, his tone indignant.

But after half an hour, Fang Yuan was still nowhere to be seen. Jiao San's face was covered in a layer of darkness. "This brat, did he remember the wrong location? We agreed to meet at the northern gate. "Kong Jing was suspicious. "I will continue waiting here, you guys go search at the other gates." Jiao San ordered, and the three members could only follow. After a while, they returned to Jiao San with nothing. "This Fang Yuan couldn't have seen through our plan and left the group, right?" A female Gu Master said. "You think too highly of him. Even if he's first in the year-end exam, he's still just a young newbie. His age is there for all to see. "Kong Jing curled his lips. Jiao San's face was gloomy: "Whether he sees through it or not is secondary. The most important thing now is to find him. My only worry now is that he has abandoned us and started to strive for the second transition on his own. Upon reaching the second transition, one would be able to voluntarily give up on a mission and directly apply to the Internal Affairs Hall to split from the family. Find him! Find him for me. The village is only so big, and there are only so many houses for rent. We must find him and not give him the time to break through to the second job transition! " "Yes!" … In the room, Fang Yuan sat cross-legged on the bed. In front of him, there were a few open money bags, which contained all the Yuan stone he owned. "I don't have much Yuan stone left." Fang Yuan sighed, his expression grave.

Yuan stone was the fundamental driving force for a Gu Master to advance. If there was a lack of Yuan stone, the recovery of primeval essence would depend on the body's own recovery ability, greatly reducing the cultivation speed. At the same time, if there was not enough food, the Gu worms would starve to death. Fang Yuan's Yuan stone had once reached a thousand during his days in the academy. But it could not withstand the exhaustion over time. Among the Gu Masters in the same batch, he only had three Gu worms. However, after Fang Yuan obtained first place in the year-end exam, he entered the Gu room and chose a Little Light Gu for free. He had to make a choice. If he gave up, it would attract suspicion. But in this way, the number of Gu worms in his hands had reached as many as seven! No doubt, this was a heavy financial burden. "If this continues, I can only hold on for two months. So I have to get back my inheritance, that is the best financial support. But to get back my inheritance, the first step is to advance to Rank two. "Fang Yuan's gaze was dark. To Fang Yuan, advancing to Rank two was not easy. Gu Master cultivation, the first was resources, the second was aptitude. Without aptitude, the Gu Master's cultivation would be harder, and their future achievements would be lower. Aptitude from low to high was divided into D grade, C grade, B grade, A grade. But this was only a rough division. In fact, every grade of aptitude had its own detailed scale. Take C grade for example, the storage limit of primeval essence in the aperture was at least 40%, and at most 59%. Fang Yuan's primeval essence was only 44%. In this C grade range, he was only below average. To advance to Rank two, he needed at least 55% dark green primeval essence. This was not a problem for A and B grade Gu Masters. To those C grade Gu Masters with 55% primeval essence, 56% primeval essence … all the way to 59% primeval essence, they could easily pass through.

So for C grade Gu Masters, as long as they accumulated to a certain level, most of them would advance to Rank two. Only a small portion of them could reach Rank three. Thus, once their aptitude was tested, most people's life achievements could be predicted. Fang Yuan was treated coldly, but he could not blame people for being biased. "Although my C grade aptitude is only 44%, it's not impossible for me to break through the crystal barrier and reach the second transition. The most basic method is to find a Gu worm that can raise my aptitude. The second method is to get a support Gu worm like the Liquor worm, which can help the Gu Master break through the barrier. Once again, I can get help from a teacher. But using heterogeneous primeval essence has a huge side effect, unless I can find a Cleansing Water Gu and wash away the heterogeneous aura. " Fang Yuan thought in his heart as he took out the Yuan stone from the bag, using his fingers to rub the smooth surface of the Yuan stone. "However, none of these methods are suitable for me right now. I don't have a teacher to help me, and even if I did, I would not leave my aperture in someone else's hands. Gu worms like the Liquor worm are very rare, for me to be able to get the Liquor worm is already very lucky. As for aptitude raising Gu worms, I got them in my previous life, thus I could cultivate to Rank six realm. I also know where to get them, but with my current cultivation, I cannot enter those places. Even if I get them, I can't keep them or even use them. " "But other than these methods, there is also the second most stupid method. That is to use Yuan stone to forcefully push! "Thinking of this, Fang Yuan's eyes shone brightly, his hands gripping the Yuan stone tightly. A Gu Master's cultivation, the first is resources, and the second is aptitude. In a situation where aptitude is lacking, resources can be used to make up for it. "My primeval essence is at most 44%, and I do not have enough foundation to break through the aperture walls. But if I absorb primeval essence while breaking through, and persevere for a period of time, I can break through the aperture walls in at most four to five days! " Having made up his mind, Fang Yuan resolutely closed his eyes, his mind sinking into the aperture. The green copper primeval sea surged again, the waves continuously rushing towards the crystal membrane aperture walls. But this time, in order to prevent primeval essence from being consumed prematurely and having no excess strength to maintain the cracks, allowing the aperture walls to recover, Fang Yuan purposely slowed down the impact. This way, the green copper primeval essence's consumption rate was greatly reduced, but the rate at which the cracks on the crystal membrane increased also decreased.
S-REV-121.summary: After a sleepless night, Fang Yuan buys essential supplies for his rented house, preparing for a long period of cultivation. Meanwhile, Jiao San's group waits impatiently at the northern gate for Fang Yuan, who fails to show up for their agreed meeting. Jiao San, suspecting Fang Yuan's intentions, orders his group to search for him, fearing he might attempt to advance to Rank Two independently.

continuityMutations.content: His belief that Fang Yuan's note is an application for leave and a deliberate attempt to breakthrough Rank Two.
His misinterpretation of Fang Yuan's activities, believing Fang Yuan is delayed by coal excavation or has encountered wild beasts.
His knowledge that Fang Yuan paid a month's rent, bought many things, and asked about cheap coal/stone.
His recognition that the Landlord is a Gu Master and has connections, requiring him to control his temper.
Leveraged his status as a Gu Master and property owner to demand compensation from Jiao San for damages.
Unknowingly provided information that furthered Fang Yuan's deception regarding his coal-digging activities.

S-REV-122.prose:
But Fang Yuan was still absorbing the natural primeval essence in the Yuan stone. The recovery rate of primeval essence was slightly greater than the recovery rate of the cracks on the crystal membrane. Although the progress was extremely slow, and could not compare to 1% of the effect of using primeval essence with all his strength, but in the long run, there was hope of success. But like this, other than the necessary eating and excreting, Fang Yuan had to cultivate non-stop. The more time he wasted, the more Yuan stone he wasted, and the more effort he put in would go up in smoke. At most, he could stop for fifteen minutes, and if there was no more primeval essence to continue attacking, the crystal membrane would completely recover. Thus, once he started to attack, he had to persevere until he succeeded, and could not be disturbed. Once he stopped for too long, he would have to start all over again. Fang Yuan did not have that many Yuan stones on hand, he could do it a few more times. Time passed quickly while cultivating, and in the blink of an eye, the sun had already set. Under the dusk, Jiao San's face was covered in frost, his voice low, "After searching for a day, you still haven't found him?" "No, leader." Kong Jing wiped the cold sweat off his forehead, "That lad did not even rent the house we recommended. I don't know where he went. " "Hmph! Continue searching tomorrow, we must find him. Remember to search the inn as well. I don't believe it, the village is only so big, no matter where he hides, there will be traces of him! "Jiao San waved his sleeves and left. At noon of the second day, their search finally bore fruit. A female Gu Master excitedly ran to Jiao San, reporting, "I found it, I found it! Fang Yuan is in an old bamboo building, renting a room on the second floor. According to the landlord's description, it should be him. " "Hmph, it's just as I expected. He really hid and tried to breakthrough to Rank two. "Jiao San laughed sinisterly," Let's go, let's go to his house and greet him. He's a newbie, we need to show some concern.

" "Hehehe …" Everyone laughed coldly. The four immediately went to Fang Yuan's house. There was a piece of bamboo paper on the door. Jiao San took it down and opened it. On the bamboo paper was Fang Yuan's handwriting, basically saying that he was going into closed door cultivation for a few days, not going out at all, and trying to breakthrough to Rank two. If outsiders saw it, do not disturb them. If Jiao San saw it, it would be an application for leave. Jiao San snorted, throwing the bamboo paper away. How could I let you breakthrough to Rank two so easily? He laughed coldly, knocking on the door. Knock knock knock. "Brother Fang Yuan, are you here?" He purposely raised his voice, "We are here to see you. Seriously, you should have told us about something like going into seclusion first. " There was no reply. Knock knock knock! Jiao San knocked on the door. "Brother Fang Yuan, I'm not trying to criticize you, but you are acting on your own. Since you have already joined our group, you should listen to orders, obey the group, and move together. We have already accepted the mission to catch wild deer, this is for you to practice. Why don't you stop first, let's finish this mission first, then you can cultivate. "Jiao San squinted his eyes, his face was gloomy, but his tone was gentle. There was still no reply. Jiao San suddenly raised his voice, "Brother Fang Yuan, why haven't you replied? Nothing happened to you, right? Breaking through to Rank two is not so simple. You could've asked us for some advice first.

Fang Yuan! Did you hear that, not good, did he faint? " Jiao San talked to himself, his face cold, but his tone was filled with concern. The other three members watched from the side. Kong Jing interrupted at the right time, "Leader, you might have guessed it correctly. Fang Yuan did not reply for a long time, let's go in and save him! " "Fang Yuan! Fang Yuan, quickly open the door. You are not saying anything, we are really worried about you. If you don't open the door, we will break in. You are a newcomer, we can't let you fall into danger! "Jiao San shouted. But there was no reply. Jiao San smirked, turning his head to signal Kong Jing. Kong Jing understood, and kicked fiercely. With a bang, the entire door was sent flying, crashing onto the bed! ================================================== Chapter 94 "Fang Yuan, hang in there, we are here to help you!" Jiao San had a concerned expression, shouting as he strode into the room. But at the next moment, he was stunned. There was no one in the room, Fang Yuan was not here. The four were silent. "How could this be, where is he?" Jiao San broke the silence, feeling embarrassed and angry. He had been acting for half a day, but it was a one-man show, and Fang Yuan was not even in the room. The three looked at each other, not expecting such an outcome. "This is strange, if Fang Yuan is not here, why would he paste that note on the door?" Kong Jing said carefully.

"Hurry and call the landlord over!" Jiao San raised his leg and kicked the door away. "You are looking for me, hmph, I am looking for you. As soon as he came to my building, he made a scene and even kicked my door in. Young man, you are quite capable. "The landlord was an old man, but his tone was strong. To have extra houses in the Guyue village that could be rented out, they were all Gu Masters. Gu Masters' strength and status were above mortals. Mortals did not dare to do this business, and in fact, they did not have any property. All the properties in the village belonged to the Guyue clan. The mortals who lived here were all serfs and servants raised by the lord. "Senior, we are looking for a young man, he is our group member." Facing the landlord, Jiao San controlled his temper. An old Gu Master like the landlord, although he was old and no longer working outside, he still had connections and a network. However, they still had connections and a network. Although they had retired to the second line, they still had a lot of power. Without some trump cards and connections, how would he dare to do business? This world was not peaceful, it was filled with violence and plundering. The landlord shook his head, his tone harsh, "I do not care about the tenant's whereabouts, but I know that you broke my door, so you have to compensate." "Hehe, this is our fault, we should compensate." Jiao San laughed dryly, his heart filled with anger, but he still compensated Yuan stone, and even gave a little more. The landlord's expression immediately became much better. "If the young man who rented this house is the person you're looking for, then he hasn't been back for a day. He paid a month's rent, and yesterday morning bought a great many things, and asked me where I could buy coal and stone cheaply. "There's no need to buy it. There's a valley to the east of the stronghold. There's a bare mine there that we can excavate directly."

He thanked me and left. After that, he never came back. " "Is that so." Jiao San looked at the decorations in the room. Indeed, the bedding on the bed was brand new. There was a square table and chairs, which were second-hand goods. They looked quite sturdy. The stove was empty. There were no coal stones in it. Jiao San let out a long breath and calmed down. "It seems that Fang Yuan was delayed by the coal excavation. Forget it, let's come back tomorrow. "He walked out of the room first. However, on the third day, Fang Yuan did not appear. Jiao San and the others stood in the room and hesitated. "It doesn't take that long to dig for coal. Fang Yuan wants to go into closed door cultivation, maybe he wants to dig a bit more at once. But that time is already long past. Did something happen to him while he was digging? "Kong Jing guessed. Jiao San nodded his head, pointing at the bedding and stove that Fang Yuan bought: "This kid is very stingy. He paid a month's worth of Yuan stone, and bought so many things. He even specially pasted a note on the door, he probably wants to go into closed door cultivation here. Unfortunately, he was unlucky. These days, because of the expansion of the wolf den, the wild beasts around the stronghold have become more active. Maybe he met some wild beasts. " "Team leader is wise!"
S-REV-122.summary: After days of searching, Jiao San's group locates Fang Yuan's rented house. They find a note from Fang Yuan indicating he's in closed-door cultivation, which Jiao San immediately dismisses as a ruse. Jiao San and Kong Jing stage a dramatic forced entry, only to discover a completely empty room. An angry landlord appears, demanding compensation for the damaged door. Jiao San, now embarrassed and furious, pays the compensation and misinterprets the landlord's information about Fang Yuan buying coal as a delay in his cultivation, vowing to return.

continuityMutations.content: Successfully advanced to Rank Two, gaining red steel primeval essence.
His strategic use of the rented house and coal-digging clue to mislead Jiao San.
His surprise and eventual respect for Fang Yuan's successful Rank Two breakthrough.
His awareness of Fang Yuan's successful breakthrough to Rank Two.
Helped Fang Yuan hide and cultivate, becoming complicit in his secret advancement.
Was initially doubtful of Fang Yuan's success but became more deferential and enthusiastic after Fang Yuan reached Rank Two.
Is motivated by a fear of clan punishment if Fang Yuan were to die in his care, which would reveal the secret of Old Man Wang's family.
His attitude towards Fang Yuan shifts from skeptical to respectful and almost eager to please after Fang Yuan achieves Rank Two.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked through falling snow from the village at the foot of the mountain.

S-REV-123.prose:
The two female members praised at the same time, flattering him. Jiao San laughed loudly: "Hahaha, I was just worrying about how to deal with him. Although we have a mission to capture wild deer, let's not rush out. If we meet this kid in the wilderness, we can't just leave him to die, right? " "Hehehe." The other three members couldn't help but laugh. On the fourth day. Inside the aperture, waves of dark green water kept surging, crashing against the walls of the aperture. The translucent white crystal wall was already filled with deep cracks, crisscrossing each other. This was the result of Fang Yuan's hard work for three days and three nights, without any sleep or rest. At most, when he could not take it anymore, he would quickly eat a meal to solve the problem of excretion. These days, Fang Yuan had been purposely suppressing the waves, and at the same time, absorbing the natural primeval essence from the Yuan stone. Thus, after such a long time, the green copper primeval sea had only gone from its limit of 44% to 20%. As time passed, when the green copper primeval sea had only 13% of its water left, the crystal wall could not hold on any longer, and reached its limit. Kacha … The originally thick and sturdy crystal wall was broken, countless crystal shards fell down, landing in the primeval sea, creating waves. In the blink of an eye, it turned into a crystal white dot, and completely disappeared. What replaced the crystal wall was a brand new white light wall. This was the Rank 2 light wall, although there were not many changes, and it still emitted white light, but it was much more dazzling than the Rank 1 light wall. At the same time, a trace of light red primeval essence was formed in the primeval sea, and mixed in the bottom of the aperture, in the shallow dark green primeval sea. This was the red steel primeval essence that only a Rank 2 beginner stage had! "Success, I finally broke through to Rank 2!" Fang Yuan suddenly opened his eyes, and a ray of light instantly lit up the dark room. But immediately, a strong sense of dizziness came over him. "Continuous training for four days and three nights, the intensity is very high, my body can't take it anymore." Fang Yuan smiled bitterly, and slowly laid down, "The training process was not disturbed, it seems that the set I set up in the rented house has already worked. The money spent was worth it. I will rest well for the night, and return to the village tomorrow.

" Thinking of this, a strong sense of drowsiness came over him. Fang Yuan forced his eyelids open, and with his strong willpower, he covered his body with the quilt at the head of the bed. When he closed his eyelids, in just a few breaths time, he fell into a deep sleep. The previous training had already used up a large amount of his mental energy. This sleep lasted until the afternoon of the second day. When Fang Yuan opened his eyes, he felt that his mental energy had recovered by more than half, but there was still a feeling of weakness in his bones. He pushed open the door, and walked out of the room for the first time in five days. This movement immediately attracted someone. This person had long and thin eyes, and a skinny body, it was Jiang Ya's brother, Jiang He. Seeing the haggard Fang Yuan, he let out a breath of turbid air, and said: "You finally came out, phew, if you didn't come out in a few days, I would have really broken the door and come in. After all, if you died here, I would have to bear a huge responsibility. " Fang Yuan smiled, and did not say anything. The winter sun shone through the window, and on his body and face, it made him look even more pale and weak. As early as five days ago, he purposely asked the landlord, and gave Jiao San and the rest clues about the coal. Then he left the village, and went straight to the village at the foot of the mountain. Because of his relationship with Old Man Wang's family, Jiang He had become half his ally. Using this relationship, Fang Yuan lived in the village for the past few days, and without any disturbance, he successfully broke through to Rank two. Of course, the rock crack secret cave was much more secretive than Jiang He's, but it was not safe. Fang Yuan also had to consider the possibility that if Jiao San and the rest insisted on looking for him, they might find the rock crack secret cave. Although this possibility was small, once the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance was found, Fang Yuan's life would be in danger. Fang Yuan was cautious in his actions, and naturally would not take this risk. At the same time, Jiang He's side was also safer. Although they had a common secret, Jiang He would not kill him because of this. The trouble and risk of killing a Gu Master was too great. Without enough benefits, Jiang He would not have the motive to commit murder. On the contrary, because he had to keep the secret, Jiang He would be more worried about Fang Yuan's safety. Once Fang Yuan died, the clan's punishment hall would investigate, and maybe Old Man Wang's family's secret would be unearthed.

Seeing Fang Yuan come out safely, Jiang He heaved a sigh of relief. But very quickly, he felt the aura on Fang Yuan's body, and his expression changed, "To think that you really succeeded and broke through to Rank two in one go!" He was very surprised in his heart. Five days ago, when Fang Yuan came to find him and explained his intentions, he was actually a little disdainful. To absorb the natural primeval essence in the Yuan stone while breaking through to Rank two, this method used both the mind and the spirit, and it consumed a lot of energy. Normally speaking, a Gu Master must have extremely strong willpower, patience, and at least a few years of cultivation experience. With these cultivation experiences, a Gu Master can absorb the primeval essence in the Yuan stone as a kind of instinct. At the same time, they can skillfully control the primeval sea waves, and suppress the impact to a certain degree. And this degree must be just right. Not only can it resist the aperture wall's self-recovery, but it can also not be used up too quickly, complementing the primeval essence recovery and replenishing it in time. In Jiang He's opinion, Fang Yuan's chances of success were almost zero, but he did not expect him to succeed in one go. Fang Yuan laughed indifferently, "I was just lucky. I plan to go back to the village today, but before that, it would be best if I can have a meal. " "Hehehe, Brother Fang Yuan, since you're here, of course I'll take care of your food and drink." Jiang He patted his chest, his attitude becoming even more amiable. Although he was not optimistic about Fang Yuan's future, now that Fang Yuan had successfully advanced to Rank two, it meant that he had passed a hurdle and already had the qualifications to be on equal footing with him. After a sumptuous banquet, Jiang He personally sent Fang Yuan to the village entrance. "Brother Fang Yuan, be careful on this trip. Recently, the wolf nest has been a little chaotic, causing the wild beasts around the village to move more frequently. Eh, it's snowing again. "Jiang He paused for a moment, then continued," In my opinion, don't leave. How about staying for a night? " Ever since Fang Yuan had advanced to Rank two, he had become even more enthusiastic. But Fang Yuan insisted on leaving, and bade farewell to Jiang He. Snow fell bit by bit, quietly, like pure white fur, slowly drifting down. The light of the setting sun dyed the snow into a golden color. Bits of snow fell on Fang Yuan's head and shoulders.

Far away, the Guyue village stood quietly on the mountainside, in sight.
S-REV-123.summary: After four days and three nights of intense, continuous cultivation, Fang Yuan successfully breaks through to Rank Two, forming red steel primeval essence. Exhausted but triumphant, he rests. Upon emerging, he is greeted by Jiang He, who expresses relief and surprise at Fang Yuan's success, having initially doubted his unconventional method. Fang Yuan reveals his strategic use of the rented house as a decoy and his deliberate misdirection of Jiao San, confirming his successful deception. After a meal and a cautious farewell from Jiang He, Fang Yuan departs the village as snow begins to fall.

continuityMutations.content: He realizes the current beast tide is an unpredictable deviation from his past life memories, presenting both danger and opportunity.
He learns about the 'small beast tide' and its potential to escalate into a larger one, and the village's response.
He has recently advanced to Rank two.
He feigns injury and incompetence to manipulate battlefield outcomes and avoid suspicion.
He prioritizes his own survival and advancement, even at the cost of others' lives, and uses opportunities like the beast tide to his advantage.
He has recently advanced to Rank two, making him arrogant but still somewhat inexperienced.
He is an effective leader, making quick decisions and showing some tolerance and strategic thinking.
He uses a snake letter Gu to sense heat and identify creatures, crucial for the group's navigation and combat.

S-REV-124.prose:
Chapter 95
"Let's go, don't fall behind!"
"The people in front are fighting a bloody battle and are waiting for our support."
"Follow closely, it's easy to get lost fighting at night, especially the newbies!"
…
On the mountain road back to the village, from time to time, groups of five would run past Fang Yuan.
"What happened?" In less than five hundred meters, Fang Yuan had already seen the thirteenth wave group.
He couldn't help but ponder. Five hundred years of memories was too long and complicated.
Speaking of which, ever since Fang Yuan was reborn, he had never given up on his memories.
But there were still many memories that seemed to be shrouded in a thick layer of fog. If he forced himself to remember, he would only get lost in the fog, which was not worth it.
Only a few memories that left a deep impression, like a crystal pearl necklace, ran through the 500 years of Fang Yuan's previous life.
Obviously, what was happening now was not in this pearl necklace of memories.
Guyue's life in the village was just the early stages of the early stages. It had been too long.
And …
"Maybe this didn't happen in my previous life, but because of my change, there was a change. Who knows?"
Just like that, he pondered as he walked.
Unknowingly, Fang Yuan arrived at the north gate of the village.
Coincidentally, another group was about to set off.
"Hmm?"
Seeing Fang Yuan, one of the people in the group suddenly stopped. "Fang Yuan, why are you still here?"
"What's wrong?" Fang Yuan looked up. The person who spoke was none other than one of his classmates, Guyue Cheng.
Chicheng immediately frowned. "Aiya, don't you know?
There's already a small beast tide forming near the village.
If left unattended, it will gradually form into a large beast tide. When that happens, the village at the foot of the mountain will be destroyed.
Our village doesn't have these lowly mortal slaves, so sometimes it's very inconvenient. "
Oh, so that's why? "Fang Yuan's eyes flashed.
With this reminder, he remembered that there seemed to be such a thing in his memories.
In this world, it was difficult for humans to survive.
Almost every few years, there would be a beast tide.
Humans needed resources and space to live.
Beasts and insects also needed it!
It would be easier to understand if the Beast Tide was explained as a battle between humans and wild beasts.
Take Qing Mao Mountain for example. Every three years, there would be a large scale wolf tide attacking the various mountain strongholds.
"According to my calculations, the real wolf tide should be next year.
However, this was the root of the current small beast tide.
As the wolf pack continued to expand, the living space of the other beasts in the surroundings was constantly shrinking.
After accumulating for a long time and reaching a certain limit, the migration of the beasts would occur.
Migrating groups of beasts will naturally affect other groups of beasts. "
"Because of this mutual influence, there is a certain chance that the influence will be amplified, and the large groups of beasts will migrate at the same time, resulting in a beast tide.
If we don't control the situation in time, the beast tide will grow bigger and bigger. Although it won't threaten the existence of the entire Guyue Stronghold, if we don't do anything about it, the strength of the stronghold will be weakened. "
"Wait!
If that's the case … hehehehe. "
Fang Yuan's eyes suddenly shone brightly, but he quickly lowered his eyelids, concealing the changes in his eyes.
Seeing that Fang Yuan didn't speak, Chicheng continued, "Currently, the internal affairs hall and external affairs hall have already sent out the mobilization order and issued an urgent mission.
Fang Yuan, don't think of slacking off, your group has already set off in the morning, you have to go too.
However … "
Saying so, Chicheng purposely dragged out his words, "The beast tide is full of danger, all kinds of wild beasts will appear. Especially fighting at night, it's much more dangerous than fighting in the day.
You are just a small Rank one Gu Master, not like us Rank two Gu Masters, you have to be careful.
Hehehe! "
As he said so, he purposely puffed out his chest and touched his belt, his expression proud.
His belt was no longer the green color of a Rank one Gu Master, but the red color of a Rank two Gu Master.
At the same time, the metal plate at the front of the belt was engraved with the word 'two'.
Not long ago, Guyue Cheng successfully advanced to Rank two with his grandfather Chi Lian's help.
"I just heard this news, but since it's like this." Fang Yuan smiled, "Then I'll go with you.
Once we reach the front line, I'll leave the group and return to my group. "
"What?
Tsk, who wants to bring you along! "Chicheng crossed his arms, curling his lips in disdain.
Fang Yuan's tone was unhurried, "Clan rules: Lone Gu Masters will merge with nearby groups, and have the duty to continue fighting.
Chicheng, you don't even know this? "
"You!" Chicheng stared, about to explode.
"Indeed." Chi Shan who had been silent, opened his mouth.
He was nearly two meters tall, with a stocky back and a bear's waist. His upper body was bare, and his muscles were as thick as steel.
His whole body's fiery red skin seemed to emit heat.
Without a doubt, he was the leader of this group.
Seeing him open his mouth, even if Chicheng was the Chi faction's inheritor, he could not help but shut his mouth.
Chi Shan expressionlessly looked at Fang Yuan, continuing, "Let's go, you follow."
His voice was deep, his words short and concise, giving off an unquestionable feeling.
Fang Yuan shrugged unconcernedly, agreeing to it.
Chicheng sneered, looking at Fang Yuan with ill intentions, emphasizing in a strange tone, "Then you have to follow!"
Fang Yuan did not pay attention to him.
"Hmph, what's with the arrogance.
He's just a Rank one Gu Master. "Chicheng angrily muttered, but due to Chi Shan's authority, he did not dare to be too presumptuous.
Immediately, the group of six left the door, running down the mountain along the mountain path.
Guyue Shan took the lead. He was big, but his speed was not slow.
Other than him and Chicheng, the other group members were two males and one female, their expressions cold.
Along the way, Chi Shan's group started to show the elegance of the three strongest groups.
Everyone's breathing was even, their footsteps were fast and calm.
Only Chicheng was in a sorry state.
But he used the Scarlet Pill Cricket Gu from time to time, barely keeping up.
Moreover, it could be seen that he had received good experience. Although he stumbled, he did not fall.
At the foot of the mountain, Chi Shan gestured, and the group stopped.
Huff huff huff …
Chicheng was already three hundred meters behind, the last to arrive.
His face was pale, breathing heavily, looking at Fang Yuan with an incredulous expression.
Along the way, Fang Yuan had been following closely behind. Up until now, he was only panting slightly.
He did not look like a rookie at all.
"Chicheng, remember to regulate your stamina."
Chi Shan turned around, reminding Chicheng, and then glanced at Fang Yuan, his eyes showing appreciation.
The other group members also looked at Fang Yuan with a more relaxed expression.
"We are nearing the beast tide.
Chicheng, Fang Yuan, come to the middle of the group. "Chi Shan looked at the dark forest ahead and said.
These words made Fang Yuan re-evaluate this Chi Shan.
This big guy seemed to have some tolerance.
The middle of the group was usually the safest.
Although Fang Yuan was not from the Mo faction, Chi Shan still maintained the attitude of a rookie.
Compared to him, the sickly snake Jiao San paled in comparison.
The sky had already turned completely dark, the layers of dark clouds causing the snow to darken.
Chi Shan group had already changed their formation, their speed greatly decreasing as they jogged in the complicated terrain of the forest.
Fang Yuan and Chicheng were in the middle of the group. On the left was the tall Chi Shan, and on the right was an old man.
At the back was a young woman with long blue hair.
And right in front, was a male Gu Master called Chi She.
He was this group's investigative Gu Master. He let out hissing sounds, his tongue sticking out from time to time.
At this moment, his tongue had already split apart and turned into a bright red snake tongue.
As they went deeper into the forest, wild beasts started to appear in the surroundings.
Suddenly, Chi She said, "There are three mid-sized creatures ahead, suspected to be wild deer."
"Disperse." Chi Shan's expression did not change, immediately giving the order.
The six people did not change their direction, heading straight ahead.
The three wild deer charged towards them, changing directions and dispersing.
Not long after, Chi She's expression changed, "A group of mid-sized creatures, suspected to be turtleback old apes."
"Shift." Chi Shan said.
The team immediately turned to the left, bypassing the group of troublesome apes.
This was the advantage of investigative methods, they could predict in advance and make the correct adjustments.
"Chi She should be using a snake letter Gu.
This Rank two Gu worm can sense heat.
But there are three obvious flaws. First, its sensing range is small, second, it can be easily interfered with, and third, it cannot detect cold-blooded creatures.
But no matter what, it's better than nothing.
I have advanced to Rank two, and will need an investigative Gu to survive in the wild in the future. "Fang Yuan thought.
Suddenly, Chi She hurriedly said, "A mid-sized creature, suspected to be a white tiger.
It has discovered us, and is quickly approaching! "
"Fight." Chi Shan's tone was heavy.
Howl!
A fierce tiger suddenly rushed out from the bushes ahead, and the group encountered it head-on.
If not for Chi She's early warning, they might have been caught unprepared.
But now, everyone was already prepared for battle.
First, the old man on the right suddenly puffed up his cheeks, opened his mouth, and spat out a white sticky object.
The object suddenly expanded in mid-air, turning into a large spider web, using its strong stickiness to trap the white tiger's head.
The white tiger struggled fiercely in the web, and Chi Shan suddenly took a step forward, punching the tiger's head.
His fist flashed with a metallic luster, and with a bang, the tiger's head was smashed into pieces, and the white tiger died.
The group did not stop, crossing over the tiger's corpse and continuing forward.
Chi She once again replaced Chi Shan's position, leading the way.
The whole process was smooth like flowing water, and all the group members showed tacit understanding.
"The whole process took less than three seconds. If I were to deal with this tiger alone, I would need at least five minutes to deal with it." Fang Yuan's gaze flashed.
These Gu Masters had the same cultivation as him, all Rank two. The main difference was still the Gu worms.
The Gu worms they used were all Rank two Gu worms, complementing each other.
The ones in Fang Yuan's hands, however, were all Rank one.
Gu Master, Gu Master, Gu came before the Master, and Gu worms had a huge impact on the Gu Master's actual battle strength.
"Although I advanced to Rank two, I still need Rank two Gu worms to display the battle strength of a Rank two Gu Master.
But I don't have much Yuan stone left, and a large portion was used to advance to Rank two, and every time I fuse a Gu worm, it costs a lot. "
Fang Yuan was thinking, when Chi She suddenly said, "We found the sickly snake group."
S-REV-124.summary: Fang Yuan, pondering the divergence of current events from his past life memories, arrives at the village's north gate. He encounters Guyue Cheng and Chi Shan's group, learning about the escalating 'small beast tide' that threatens the village. Despite Guyue Cheng's disdain, Fang Yuan uses clan rules to join Chi Shan's group, aiming to exploit the situation for his own benefit. Chi Shan reluctantly accepts him, showing a pragmatic leadership style.

continuityMutations.content: He observes the effective use of a Rank two investigative Gu (snake letter Gu) and the coordinated combat tactics of experienced Gu Masters, informing his future strategies.
He notes Fang Yuan's unexpected physical endurance and stamina.

S-REV-125.summary: Chi Shan's group moves through the dark forest, showcasing efficient coordination and Chi She's investigative Gu. They expertly bypass a group of wild deer and apes, then confront a white tiger, dispatching it swiftly with a combined effort. Fang Yuan observes their teamwork and Gu worm usage, contrasting it with his own limited resources, and plans for his future needs, secretly noting the group's strengths and weaknesses. Chi Shan also notes Fang Yuan's unexpected stamina.

continuityMutations.content: He successfully manipulates the situation to cause Hua Xin's death, eliminating a potential threat and weakening Jiao San's group.
He becomes convinced of Fang Yuan's incompetence and stupidity, believing Fang Yuan is responsible for Hua Xin's death and the King Boar's escape.
He learns that Jiao San was tasked by Guyue Dong Tu to delay his growth, but not to kill him.
She is killed by King Boar due to Fang Yuan's actions.
He wants to injure Fang Yuan and delay his growth, acting on a promise to Guyue Dong Tu.
He blames Fang Yuan for Hua Xin's death and expresses intense frustration at Fang Yuan's feigned incompetence.
She is killed by King Boar due to Fang Yuan's intentional manipulation of the situation.
She witnesses Fang Yuan's actions that lead to Hua Xin's death and his subsequent 'mistakes'.

S-REV-126.prose:
Chapter 96
"We found the sickly snake group on the left, they are in a stalemate with a large wild beast." Half a second later, Chi She reported again, with more details this time.
"What's the situation?" Chi Shan frowned.
"That's right."
Chi Tou's tongue flickered in and out, "Jiao San's Red Crag Python only has one shop.
It is fighting with a … King Boar! "
Everyone's expression changed.
"King Boar, I want to refine a Gu worm and need the tusks of a wild boar.
No doubt, King Boar's tusks are the most suitable. "Fang Yuan's heart moved. In fact, he already had the intention to kill King Boar.
"That King Boar?" The blue haired female Gu Master raised her eyebrows.
"Other than that one, there isn't a second one nearby.
But with the sickly snake group's strength, wanting to devour this King Boar is too greedy. "The old Gu Master snorted in disdain.
Old Man Wang could figure out the terrain of this mountain, so these Rank two Gu Masters who were active on Qing Mao mountain would naturally be even more clear.
There was another reason why they didn't eliminate this King Boar in advance.
Chi Shan pondered for a while and said, "Go help."
"Hehe, I'm afraid they won't appreciate it." The old Gu Master laughed coldly.
"Even if we don't go help, we have to send someone over!" Chicheng glanced at Fang Yuan beside him and said in an unhappy tone.
The group slightly changed direction and moved towards the left.
Chi Shan and the rest had always looked down on them and disliked Guyue and Jiao San.
But as a family, when facing an external enemy, even if they had a grudge, they would still unite.
This was the cohesiveness of this world's clans.
It was also because of this cohesiveness that there were undying hundred year clans and even thousand year clans.
The group passed through a forest in the dark and arrived at a depression.
The four Gu Masters of the sickly snake group were surrounding King Boar and engaged in an intense battle.
In the middle of the battle, King Boar, who was as large as an elephant, was entangled with a red python that was as thick as a bowl.
This red python's entire body was made of dark red stones that were very hot.
It was like a thick chain wrapped around King Boar's body.
King Boar howled angrily and kept rolling on the ground. His snow-white fangs pierced through the night sky and drew streaks of cold light in the air.
Its body was covered with wounds of various sizes, and its tail was broken.
Some of them were flipped open, revealing bright red wounds. They were right next to the Red Rock Python's body and had already been scorched by the high temperature.
Chi Shan's team stopped approaching and stood in the distance to watch.
After a few glances, the old Gu Master realized: "I was wondering why the sickly snake had such guts.
So this King Boar was already injured. Tsk, this despicable person took advantage of it. "
"Do you guys think that this King Boar has the Black Boar Gu?" Chicheng's eyes shone with excitement.
Fang Yuan's expression did not change as he watched quietly.
At this time, Jiao San Si and the rest also noticed the situation here. Immediately, the logistics Gu Master Guyue Kong Jing left the battle and ran over.
"So it's Lord Chi Shan.
There are no problems here, we can settle it.
There are many beast groups at the frontlines and we need everyone's support. "Kong Jing said to everyone.
"Hmph, what can be settled?
You are lying through your teeth. I think this Red Rock Python can't hold on much longer. "The old Gu Master's eyes were sharp and his words hit the nail on the head.
"They are just afraid that after we attack, we will split the loot." The blue haired female Gu Master directly exposed Jiao San Si and the rest's thoughts.
"This King Boar is yours." Chi Shan said and looked at the old Gu Master.
The old Gu Master snorted, but still bent down and vomited, spitting out a white sticky spider web.
The spider web expanded in the air and spread out, trapping King Boar.
King Boar struggled intensely in the spider web, breaking strand after strand of spider web, but it could not escape.
Using this time, sickly snake Jiao San quickly recalled the Red Rock Python.
Then together with the healing female Gu Master in the group, they carried out emergency battlefield healing on the Red Rock Python.
The Red Rock Python's stone body had many cracks in the intense battle just now.
Under the healing, the cracks shrunk and disappeared.
"Fang Yuan, it's time for you to return.
Do you still want to stay in our group? "Chicheng said unhappily.
Fang Yuan slowly took a step forward, walking out from behind Chi Shan.
Guyue Kong Jing was blocked by Chi Shan's huge body earlier and did not notice Fang Yuan. Now that he saw him, his expression turned weird.
Jiao San turned around and saw Fang Yuan, and was overjoyed, "Fang Yuan, you are finally here!
Quick, the spider web is about to break. You have more strength, go and suppress King Boar and stall for time.
We need time to heal the Red Rock Python. "
Without a defensive Gu worm and with only Rank one cultivation, getting close to King Boar was undoubtedly risky.
Chi Shan looked at Fang Yuan, "Let's go."
Saying so, he took big steps and left.
He did what he said. Although King Boar's value was not small, he did not hesitate and turned to leave.
Seeing Chi Shan's group leave, Jiao San and the rest heaved a sigh of relief.
From start to finish, they did not say a word of thanks.
Jiao San continued to shout, "Fang Yuan, quick, King Boar is very strong, the spider web is about to collapse.
If you perform well this time, I won't pursue the matter of you leaving the group. "
"Okay."
Fang Yuan agreed, and quickly walked to King Boar. He stretched out his hand and grabbed onto King Boar's two huge fangs.
He used all his strength to press down, and King Boar was immediately suppressed, its struggling reduced.
"Good job!" Jiao San praised, but his triangular eyes shone with a cold light.
This Fang Yuan came at the right time, this small scale beast horde was a great opportunity!
Jiao San had never thought of killing Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan was his group member, and with Fang Yuan's death, the clan's evaluation of him would drop.
This was not in line with his interests.
He only promised his uncle Guyue Dong Tu that he would delay Fang Yuan's growth.
As long as he was sixteen years old, he would receive a sum of money from Guyue Dong Tu.
In fact, even though he was stingy and sinister, he had never thought of killing Fang Yuan.
This was not only because the death of a Gu Master would attract a thorough investigation from the punishment hall, and the risk was too high. Most importantly, it was because of the clan's philosophy — blood is thicker than water, and family comes first.
Unless it was revenge for killing one's father or stealing one's wife, there was no such thing as internal strife.
Just like what the Guyue clan leader had said to the academy elder, other than rules and regulations, there was also a strong sense of familial love.
Any organization's existence must have rules and values, these two foundations.
"Using this chance, I'll injure Fang Yuan and let him return to the village and lie on the bed.
Let's see if he can still breakthrough to Rank two!
Of course, I can't do it myself, it would be terrible if they found out.
Anyway, there are so many wild beasts in the beast horde, I'll just borrow their strength. "
Guyue Jiao San laughed coldly in his heart, but he asked, "Fang Yuan, how much longer can you hold on?"
"I can still hold on for a while, don't worry, leader." Fang Yuan replied firmly.
"Very good, Hua Xin, quickly go and plant the corroding blood grass Gu." Jiao San ordered loudly as he healed the red rock python.
"Yes!" A female Gu Master walked up.
She came to King Boar's side, and stretched out both her hands, raising her two little fingers.
On the fingernails of her little fingers, there was a faint mark of a purple vine coiling around it.
Light red Scarlet Iron True Essence appeared and circled around her cute little finger. Then, it completely disappeared into the vine mark.
The vines immediately became active, and a thin tentacle grew out from her fingernails.
The tentacle slithered like a snake, extending to the corner of King Boar's mouth, before moving along its teeth and entering deep into its stomach.
"Hehehe …" Fang Yuan's lips that were hidden in the night sky suddenly curled up into a sinister smile.
Others would care about familial love, and would not easily kill their own clansmen; this was a huge violation of traditional values.
But he did not care about these values at all.
The strength that was exerted on King Boar's fangs suddenly retracted.
King Boar howled in anger, all of his strength burst out, and his fangs fiercely shot upwards. Fang Yuan used both his hands to support the two fangs, and along with this huge force, he was thrown high into the air.
King Boar fiercely swung his head, and his long fangs swept horizontally. The female Gu Master was right beside him, and could not defend against this sudden change. She was hit by the fangs, and immediately screamed in agony.
Then, her slim body was struck by the wild boar's fangs, and with a crack, she broke into two.
The female Gu Master flew horizontally, and like a broken sack, she was swept into the air, and fell down with a plop.
She landed on the ground, her eyes wide open, and died on the spot.

Chapter 97
The female Gu Master's body was like a doll, broken at the waist. Her upper body was on the ground, and her lower body was bent at an angle. Her buttocks were on the ground, and her feet were pointing towards the sky.
Far away, Fang Yuan also landed from the sky.
He first smashed into the tree crown, breaking many branches and leaves before falling onto the snow.
He nimbly flipped his body and stood up from the snow. Because he had activated the Jade Skin Gu, other than the slight pain on his back, he was unharmed.
On the battlefield, there was a moment of silence before Jiao San's angry roar could be heard, "Fang Yuan, didn't you say you could still hold on!"
Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart, but his body suddenly slanted and he almost fell. He used his hands to hold onto the tree trunk to maintain his balance.
He pretended to have sprained his ankle and could not walk, but his gaze swept the surroundings to see if there were any other Gu Masters.
Facing the beast tide, the Gu Masters were all doing their best to fight, they simply could not focus on their own matters, and did not have the leisure to observe Fang Yuan.
Although he had been observing in the dark and did not find any other Gu Masters, even so, Fang Yuan still chose to disguise himself.
From there, sounds of intense battle could be heard.
Evidently, King Boar had escaped, and was fighting with the red rock python again.
Fang Yuan moved over step by step, his face anxious. He fell on the ground a few times, the mud, grass and snow stuck to his body, looking extremely pathetic.
Finally, he returned to the edge of the battlefield.
On the battlefield, three humans and a pig were entangled.
The red rock python's body was tightly wrapped around King Boar's body, as well as the latter's two hind legs.
King Boar's two hind legs could only move around randomly, causing it to roll on the ground and struggle at times. With its two front legs, it charged around randomly.
There were more wounds on its body, and the boiling pig blood had already dyed the ground red.
Seeing that Fang Yuan had arrived, Guyue Kong Jing who was the furthest away shouted, "Fang Yuan, you bastard, you caused Hua Xin's death!"
"I-I didn't mean to.
But I can't hold on anymore. "Fang Yuan shouted.
"F * * k, if you can't hold on, then why were you so confident just now!
If you can't, then you can't. You'll kill someone by talking nonsense like that! "
Gu Yue Kong Jing opened his mouth and stared furiously. If not for the fact that he was fighting, he really wanted to go up and give Fang Yuan two slaps.
"So, sorry.
I won't do it again. "Fang Yuan quickly said.
"Fang Yuan, I will settle the score with you later!" The sickly snake Jiao San roared, feeling immense pressure.
The dying Boar had gone mad, and the red rock python's body was full of cracks.
"Kong Jing, don't bother with Fang Yuan.
Quickly take out the Blade Scale Net! "Jiao San saw that the Red Crag Python was on the verge of collapse and his forehead was filled with cold sweat as he hurriedly shouted.
"Yes!" Kong Jing quickly took out the Big-bellied Frog and activated his Zhenyuan, spitting out a barbed wire net.
The barbed wire was covered with sharp spikes and shiny blades.
"Fang Yuan, grab the other end and rush up with me to trap King Boar." Kong Jing shouted.
"But I sprained my ankle, I can't walk anymore!" Fang Yuan had an anxious expression as he limped over.
"Useless thing!" Kong Jing had no choice but to do it himself. He dragged the blade scale net with both hands and threw it towards King Boar.
King Boar was trapped by the blade scale net, and instantly let out a loud cry as fresh blood gushed out.
It had a premonition that death was coming, and it struggled even more violently.
However, as it struggled even more violently, the blade scale net became tighter, and its injuries became more severe.
And because the red rock python's body was made of stone, it didn't suffer much damage from the blade scale net.
"What a pity for its fur!" Jiao San's eyes flashed with a hint of regret.
"Finally done." Kong Jing let out a long breath.
At this moment, Fang Yuan shouted, "Let me help you!"
Chi chi chi chi chi.
Several moonblades flew out and landed on the blade scale net, cutting through the iron wire.
Under King Boar's intense struggle, the hole was pulled open, and the blade scale net broke into pieces, allowing King Boar to escape.
In an instant!
Kong Jing stared with his eyes wide open, staring blankly at the scene.
"F * ck, f * ck …" The other female Gu Master no longer cared about her ladylike image, and loudly cursed.
"I, I seem to have gotten into trouble.
I wanted to help you! "Fang Yuan shouted, his voice sincere and innocent.
Jiao San dodged King Boar's charge, and rolled on the ground. Before he got up, he shouted, "Fang Yuan —!
You idiot, look at what you have done!
You are a pig teammate!!! "
"Group leader, you have to believe me, I really didn't do it on purpose." Fang Yuan defended himself.
"Shut up, you are not allowed to attack now, stay at the side!" Jiao San shouted, and rolled again, dodging King Boar's kick.
Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart, but he obeyed and retreated tens of steps.
"All of you, retreat!" Jiao San snorted, and started to show his true trump card, breathing out two traces of yellow poison gas from his nostrils.
The poison gas continued to flow out of his nostrils, increasing in quantity, and gradually forming a yellow poison cloud.
King Boar and Jiao San's figures could be vaguely seen outside the poison cloud.
Kong Jing and Fang Yuan retreated to the yellow cloud to watch the battle.
Fang Yuan said to the remaining female Gu Master, "Heal my leg.
I sprained my ankle! "
The female Gu Master was furious, "My good sister is dead, and you only sprained your ankle!
Why don't you go and die?! "
Fang Yuan felt wronged, "I didn't want this to happen."
A sharp light flashed in his eyes.
Should he make a move, and get rid of these people?
Now was a good chance to make a move.
In their subconscious, they would never expect that I would have killing intent.
If the Sickly Snake group is eliminated, the restriction on me would lessen.
But …
If this process is seen by other Gu Masters, I will be doomed.
The crime of killing a tribesman is the most unforgivable crime in this world. Not only will they be executed, they will also be tortured for seven days and seven nights in public.
Of course he was not afraid of death, but for such a small group, it was not worth the risk.
To kill them, he had to use the beast tide, and he had to be clean himself.
Unfortunately, King Boar was about to die. After this battle, the Sickly Snake group suffered heavy losses, and their battle strength was at its limit, they had to leave the battlefield.
What a pity, such a good chance …
Fang Yuan felt a wave of regret.
But he had already done his best, if he went any further, the smell of a trap would be too strong.
The others were not idiots, they would definitely sense it, and the other Gu Masters might also see it, and the risk would be huge.
Five minutes later, King Boar fell to the ground with a plop.
The yellow mist dissipated, and Jiao San stood there panting, his face pale.
He had used his trump card, and had little primeval essence left.
"You guys dissect the corpse, quickly, bring the spoils of war and we will retreat!" Jiao San shouted.
Fang Yuan and the rest surrounded King Boar, and started dissecting the corpse.
King Boar's blood was boiling, and the smell of blood was thick.
The surrounding was a dark forest, and there were roars of wild beasts, as well as the sounds of intense battles.
But there were no other wild beasts in this small battlefield.
This was the majesty of a beast king.
Wild beasts had their own rules.
King Boar's thick aura caused ordinary wild beasts to tremble in fear. When the beast tide advanced here, they would split into two.
Of course, if a stronger beast group or beast king appeared, they would not care about King Boar's aura.
But at this moment, pairs of blue eyes suddenly appeared in the surrounding darkness.
Gu Masters' screams and howls could be heard from other places.
"It's wolves, a wolf group!"
"The lightning wolf group actually appeared!"
"Damn it, why would there be a wolf group, now is not the time for the wolf tide to erupt?!"
"Retreat, don't care about King Boar, we need to retreat as well!" Jiao San shouted. The surrounding people's faces also turned pale.
A single lightning wolf was not scary.
But once the lightning wolves formed a group, even King Boar would have to avoid them.
More importantly, lightning wolves had high endurance, and their speed was fast, and they were best at chasing.
At such a critical moment, Jiao San could not care about anything else, abandoning the other three and escaping backwards.
"Group leader, wait for me." Kong Jing shouted in fear, and quickly followed.
"I do not have a Gu worm to increase my speed, I cannot escape.
Jiao San and the rest do not have much primeval essence left, even if they have a Gu worm to increase their speed, they cannot escape from the lightning wolves! "Under the threat of death, Fang Yuan's heart was as calm as snow.
He decisively chopped the female Gu Master's neck with a knifehand strike, knocking her out.
Then, he dragged her into the Wild Boar King's open stomach.
The Wild Boar King's belly had already been cut open with a deep and long gash.
Fang Yuan squeezed into the bloody body of the wild boar, and at the same time he dragged the female Gu Master, using her body to block the outside and cover his body.
The wolf group rushed over, and most of them chased after Jiao San, Kong Jing and the rest of the retreating Gu Masters. The remaining portion surrounded King Boar's corpse and started to eat.
Fang Yuan was inside the wild boar's body, and he could clearly hear the sound of the lightning wolves chewing and swallowing, as well as the shaking when they bit.
"A lightning wolf group actually appeared in the first beast tide. This is an accident, the clan will definitely send reinforcements.
King Boar's body is huge, and the lightning wolves will need some time to devour his insides.
As long as I can hold on for a while, I will be able to survive. "
Fang Yuan was deep in thought.
Jiao San and Kong Jing, if there were no accidents, were already dead.
They did not have much primeval essence left, and were not good at speed. In such a short distance, they would definitely be killed by the wolves.
In a panic, people would make stupid choices.
Under the pressure of death, there were very few people who could be as clear-headed as Fang Yuan, and instantly choose the best response.
Even King Boar's flesh was eaten, revealing Fang Yuan who was hiding inside.
The number of lightning wolves that Fang Yuan faced was definitely not as many as the others.
According to his experience, there were at most five, and he still had a fighting chance.
His chances of survival were much higher than the others.
The sound of the lightning wolves biting and tearing could be heard continuously, and it was getting closer.
Most of King Boar's flesh had already entered the mouth of the lightning wolves.
If a normal person was in such a situation, they would feel that every second was like a year.
But Fang Yuan closed his eyes instead, and took out the spare Yuan stone and held it in his palm, racing against time to recover his primeval essence.
S-REV-126.summary: Chi Shan's group discovers Jiao San's group in a brutal stalemate with a King Boar. Fang Yuan recognizes the King Boar as a valuable target. Despite initial reluctance, Chi Shan's group provides minimal aid, webbing the King Boar. Fang Yuan deliberately causes Hua Xin's death by feigning a struggle, allowing the King Boar to strike her. He then pretends to be injured and incompetent, thwarting Jiao San's efforts to subdue the King Boar, successfully destabilizing Jiao San's group and intensifying their animosity.

continuityMutations.content: He successfully avoids the lightning wolf pack by hiding inside the King Boar's carcass, a testament to his extreme pragmatism and survival instincts.
He abandons his remaining group members to save himself from the lightning wolves, likely leading to his death.
He follows Jiao San in a panicked retreat, likely leading to his death.

C-REV-146.transition: Fleeing in panic from the lightning wolves

C-REV-134.transition: Fleeing in panic from the lightning wolves
