==================================================
S-REV-127.summary: As Jiao San's group finally subdues the King Boar, a lightning wolf pack suddenly appears, surprising everyone as it's not the season for a wolf tide. Jiao San and Kong Jing flee, abandoning the remaining Gu Masters. Fang Yuan, reacting with ruthless efficiency, knocks out the remaining female Gu Master and hides inside the King Boar's carcass, using her body as a shield. He calmly regains his primeval essence while wolves devour the boar around him, banking on clan reinforcements and his strategic advantage for survival.

continuityMutations.content: The knowledge that he can manipulate situations and kill comrades without immediate repercussions due to clan rules and his cunning.
A deep-seated hatred and desire for retribution against Fang Yuan for the death of the female Gu Master.
Suspicion regarding Fang Yuan's lack of injuries despite his bloody appearance, and his aggressive behavior.
Feigned injury and grief to ensure Jiao San's death and avoid suspicion.
Intentionally cultivated a cold-blooded reputation to justify his desire to act alone.
Used the legal loopholes of the clan's 'emergency refuge' rule to justify abandoning comrades.
Had feelings for the deceased female Gu Master and was deeply affected by her death.
Accused Fang Yuan of hiding behind a woman and causing her death.
Was suffocated by Fang Yuan under the guise of grief.
Discovered Fang Yuan had no wounds despite being covered in blood.
Reminded Fang Yuan of the clan rules regarding deceased Gu Masters' worms.
A small-scale beast horde composed of old, weak, sick, or disabled lightning wolves, pushed out by the wolf king due to limited resources.

C-REV-01.transition: Walked away from the battlefield, pondering

S-REV-128.prose:
Chapter 98 The primeval essence that Fang Yuan recovered in the boar's stomach was not used in the end. This beast horde was under the watchful eyes of Guyue's higher-ups, and the appearance of the lightning wolf pack was just a small accident. Very quickly, Guyue's higher-ups made a swift response. The three elders personally led the team and quickly stabilized the situation. Ten minutes later, Fang Yuan could hear the sounds of fighting from outside the boar's stomach, as well as the cries of the lightning wolves. He quickly kicked the female Gu Master in front of him away, and crawled out with his body covered in blood. Fang Yuan was not worried about the lightning wolves, but he was worried that he would be affected by the aftershocks of the battle. If a Gu Master's technique hit the boar's corpse by accident, then wouldn't he be wronged? Who could he find to reason with then? Suddenly, a living person crawled out of the boar's stomach. This caused the Gu Masters who were fighting with the lightning wolves to be shocked. Fang Yuan's body was covered in blood, and there was even a King Boar's intestine wrapped around his leg. His body emitted a pungent smell of blood, causing the Gu Masters to frown. But Fang Yuan did not mind. He took a few deep breaths and stretched his limbs, looking around the battlefield as if nothing had happened. As he expected, there were a total of five lightning wolves. But these lightning wolves were all old, weak, sick, or disabled. They were the lowest in the wolf den. As the wolf pack grew stronger day by day, the wolf king would chase the old and weak out of the wolf pack in order to protect the young and strong lightning wolves due to limited resources. These lightning wolves gathered together and first attacked the surrounding beast groups, then the beast groups influenced each other, finally forming this small scale beast horde. Under the attacks of the Gu Masters, the five lightning wolves quickly suffered casualties. They had eaten too much, and their stomachs were round, affecting their battle strength. At the same time, the newly arrived Gu Masters all had ample primeval essence in their apertures, and their battle strength was at its peak, unlike Jiao San and the rest. Primeval essence was especially important to Gu Masters. A phoenix in trouble was no better than a chicken. With less primeval essence, the Gu Master's battle strength would fall.

And a Gu Master without primeval essence could not even be compared to a mortal. So why was the Liquor worm and Black and White Boar Gu so precious? It was also reflected in this aspect. Firstly, with the Liquor worm, it can refine primeval essence, allowing the Gu Master to store more primeval essence. And the Black and White Boar Gu's amplification to a Gu Master's strength does not require primeval essence to display its effects. And for the Black and White Boar Gu, after one person uses it, it can be given to another person to use, thus it has great collective value. The battle lasted for a while before it ended. The five lightning wolves fell one after the other, and the reinforcement team that rushed over did not go any deeper. Their Quintessential Essence had been greatly consumed, and their combat prowess had been greatly reduced. For the sake of safety, they stopped where they were. While resting, he waited for reinforcements to arrive. In a group of five, the investigative Gu Master was on guard while the other three were using Yuan stone to quickly replenish their primeval essence. The healing Gu Master squatted down and inspected the female Gu Master's corpse. "Dead …" The healing Gu Master sighed deeply, looking at his sorrowful expression, he seemed to know this female Gu Master. Fang Yuan looked on coldly. This female Gu Master that he had knocked unconscious had been blocking in front of him. Now, he had lost his right chest and a calf. On his arm, there was a huge bite wound from the lightning wolves, revealing his pale forearm bone. But these wounds and the large amount of blood loss were not the true cause of her death. The true cause of her death was the paralysis of her heart. The bite of the lightning wolves carried electricity. The electricity flowed through the unconscious female Gu Master's body, causing her heart to be paralyzed. The once beautiful and sexy body was now lying on the ground, motionless. After death, there was no trace of her previous elegance left, only an ugly corpse. "She's dead, it's all your fault! As a man, why did you hide behind a woman?

You are a disgrace to men! "The healing Gu Master raised his head and stared at Fang Yuan. Fang Yuan shrugged his shoulders indifferently, his face calm, "The truth is, she fought with me for the position inside. But I won in the end, and I am glad about this. " "Bastard!!" The healing Gu Master rushed up. Bam. Fang Yuan raised his leg and kicked him away. The healing Gu Master's battle strength was usually weak, and due to the clan rules, he did not dare to use his Gu worms. With just his physical strength, how could he be Fang Yuan's match? "Damn bastard!" The healing Gu Master climbed up dejectedly, wanting to rush up again, but was stopped by the investigative Gu Master. "If you think I committed a crime and caused her death, then you can report it to the punishment hall, I will accept it." Fang Yuan looked at the healing Gu Master indifferently and left. "Damn it! Damn it!! " The healing Gu Master's eyes seemed to be spewing fire, staring fiercely at Fang Yuan's back. He wanted to rush up, but was held back by the others. "Calm down!" "Even if we report it to the punishment hall, the clan will not punish him!" "We all know you have feelings for her, although the clan rules cannot punish him, we can spread the news …" Under the persuasion of the group members, the healing Gu Master slowly calmed down, lowering his head and sobbing. "The boat is in trouble, a man grabbed a wooden plank and was temporarily saved. At this time, another man swam over, also wanting to grab that wooden plank. However, this wooden plank can only hold one person's weight, in order to save the first man, he pushed the second man away, causing him to drown in the sea. The rescued man was put on trial, but was not convicted. This is the wooden plank incident on Earth.

" "It means, in order to save yourself, if you have no choice but to endanger someone else's life, you will not be punished. On Earth, it is the emergency refuge in the punishment hall. In this world, there are similar clan rules. That is to say, even if the healing Gu Master reports it to the punishment hall, I will not be punished. But … " Fang Yuan pondered as he walked back. He walked at a steady pace, unhurried and unhurried. Along the way, Fang Yuan would find corpses on the ground from time to time. Most of them were wild beasts, of all kinds, and there were even some Gu Master corpses. At the same time, small groups of reinforcements were rushing to the frontlines. When they met Fang Yuan on the streets, most people would cast a strange and puzzled gaze at this bloodstained young man. Fang Yuan did not mind, his gaze deep as he continued to ponder. "But … if I was found to have knocked out the female Gu Master, I would be severely punished for 'murdering my own kin'. But at that time, no one should have seen that scene. Jiao San and Kong Jing both had their backs to me, running for their lives. Hmm? " Fang Yuan's footsteps paused. He saw Kong Jing and Jiao San's corpses. The former's body had been gnawed beyond recognition, while the latter's body was preserved in a relatively good condition. That snake Gu, the red rock python, had already turned into pieces of rock, completely dead. And beside the sick snake, there were more than ten lightning wolf corpses. Obviously, Jiao San fought back before his death, and there was an intense battle. "Hmm, not bad. This way, other than me, the other four in the group are all dead." Fang Yuan evaluated in his heart, feeling slightly happy. "This way, there are fewer obstacles around me … eh?" Fang Yuan stopped, he had just seen Jiao San's finger twitch slightly.

"Not dead yet, such a tenacious life …" Fang Yuan laughed coldly, his killing intent surging. At this time, more than ten healing Gu Masters came running from the front. "Quick, save the injured!" "These are our clansmen, saving one life is another!" "If they are confirmed dead, remember to retrieve the Gu worms." … Fang Yuan's gaze froze. What to do? The enemies were so close, if he wanted to kill Jiao San, it would be a huge risk. No matter if he used his hand or the moonblade, there would be traces left behind. In front of these Gu Masters, there was no time to clean up the traces. Then … should he let Jiao San go just like that? Speaking of which, even if Jiao San was saved now, he might not survive. No! "If I can get rid of Jiao San, the obstacles in my path will be greatly reduced. If I let go of such a good opportunity, it would be difficult for it to appear again. " Thinking of this, Fang Yuan had a flash of inspiration. He slowly half-knelt beside Jiao San, taking off his shirt and covering Jiao San's face and upper body. He had been in the boar's stomach for a long time, and the boar's blood had already soaked his shirt, causing it to be heavy and wet. The shirt was tightly stuck to Jiao San's nose and mouth, preventing him from absorbing air. Fang Yuan half-knelt on the ground, watching quietly, his face showing a solemn and pained expression. At this time, a Gu Master walked over, "Little brother, I am the medicine hall's Gu Master, let me take a look …" "Get lost!" Fang Yuan shouted angrily, pushing him away. The Gu Master fell on the ground, but was not angry, instead consoling, "Little brother, my condolences! I know how you are feeling, I also understand the pain of seeing your clansmen die in front of you. But you are covered in blood, your injuries are not light. For these sacrificed clansmen, you have to live well.

Come, let me treat your injuries. " Fang Yuan did not speak, he was silent, his lowered face shrouded in a shadow. He allowed this Gu Master to inspect his body. The results of the inspection surprised the Gu Master. Fang Yuan's body was covered in blood, looking terrifying, but in fact, there was not a single wound on his body! But the Gu Master quickly retracted his thoughts, focusing his attention on Jiao San. "My apologies, the clan wants to take back the Gu worms." The Gu Master sincerely looked at Fang Yuan, then slowly took off the bloody shirt. Jiao San's half-opened eyes had lost their luster. The Gu Master skillfully used his fingers to pry open Jiao San's eyelids, looking at his pupils and touching his neck, but he could not feel any pulse. Dead. Completely dead. The Gu Master did not suspect anything, sighing and placing his hand on Jiao San's abdomen. There was still some warmth in his abdomen, and the aperture in his body was slowly disappearing. There was not a single Gu worm inside. The Gu Master looked at Fang Yuan, saying unintentionally, "Every Gu Master's Gu worms are recorded clearly. After the Gu Master dies, his Gu worms will be left to the inheritor. Taking it without permission is against the clan rules. " Fang Yuan was fearless, meeting the Gu Master's gaze, "Of course I know this. Are you suspecting that I stole the group leader's Gu worms? " Taking these Gu worms was risky and troublesome. If other secrets were exposed, the gains would not make up for the losses. Fang Yuan knew that although he had the Spring Autumn Cicada and could instantly refine Gu worms, it was not easy to sell them in the clan. It was not worth it to get himself into trouble for such a small profit. Other than that, there was another point. His current financial situation was not good, even if he took them, he might not be able to keep them.

Facing Fang Yuan's question, the Gu Master quickly laughed, "Of course I did not mean that. The dead cannot come back to life, little brother, please restrain your grief. For the sake of those who have died, you should live well! " Fang Yuan slowly stood up. He stared at the sick snake's corpse with a sorrowful expression, concentrating for a while. The night wind whistled in his ears. "You are right." After a long while, Fang Yuan broke the silence, his gaze cold, saying with deep meaning, "For the dead, I should live well." ================================================== Chapter 99 Internal affairs hall, interrogation room. The winter sun shone through the only skylight, shining on the ground. The specks of dust slowly floated in the light pillar, revealing even the smallest details. The light pillar shrouded a chair. Fang Yuan sat on this chair, bathing in the sunlight. In front of him, in front of the wall shrouded in shadows and darkness, there was a long table. Three clan elders were sitting behind the table. The interrogation had been going on for an hour. "Fang Yuan, are you sure you did not make any mistakes in what you just said?" One of the clan elders asked. "Yes." Fang Yuan lowered his eyelids, looking at his toes. The sunlight shone on his fair face, making him look like a white statue. He had already expected this situation. After all, the other four Gu Masters in his group were all dead, and only he was alive. In fact, every Gu Master would be interrogated to a certain extent, to help the clan gather information on the battlefield. However, Fang Yuan had already been interrogated for an hour, and it was clear that someone was targeting him, making things difficult for him. This was completely understandable.
S-REV-128.summary: Fang Yuan emerges from the King Boar's stomach, covered in blood, after the beast horde is largely suppressed. He coldly observes the dead Female Gu Master whom he had kicked away, and then a Healing Gu Master confronts him, blaming him for her death. Fang Yuan dismisses the accusation and physically retaliates. Later, he encounters a still-living Jiao San and, under the guise of grief, suffocates him with his blood-soaked shirt to eliminate an obstacle, all while deceiving an arriving Medicine Hall Gu Master.

continuityMutations.content: The clan's explicit attempts to integrate him into a group structure or leadership role.
Her personal reason for hostility towards Fang Yuan: her daughter's death in the beast horde.
Questioned Fang Yuan about the battlefield situation and his actions.
Her daughter, a healing Gu Master in the sickly snake group, died, fueling her resentment towards Fang Yuan.
Attempted to find loopholes in Fang Yuan's story to prosecute him but failed.
Advised Fang Yuan to join a new group or become a group leader, emphasizing the difficulty of solo missions.

C-REV-01.transition: Left the Internal Affairs Hall and walked out onto the streets

S-REV-129.prose:
Facing Fang Yuan's question, the Gu Master quickly laughed, "Of course I did not mean that. The dead cannot come back to life, little brother, please restrain your grief. For the sake of those who have died, you should live well! " Fang Yuan slowly stood up. He stared at the sick snake's corpse with a sorrowful expression, concentrating for a while. The night wind whistled in his ears. "You are right." After a long while, Fang Yuan broke the silence, his gaze cold, saying with deep meaning, "For the dead, I should live well." ================================================== Chapter 99 Internal affairs hall, interrogation room. The winter sun shone through the only skylight, shining on the ground. The specks of dust slowly floated in the light pillar, revealing even the smallest details. The light pillar shrouded a chair. Fang Yuan sat on this chair, bathing in the sunlight. In front of him, in front of the wall shrouded in shadows and darkness, there was a long table. Three clan elders were sitting behind the table. The interrogation had been going on for an hour. "Fang Yuan, are you sure you did not make any mistakes in what you just said?" One of the clan elders asked. "Yes." Fang Yuan lowered his eyelids, looking at his toes. The sunlight shone on his fair face, making him look like a white statue. He had already expected this situation. After all, the other four Gu Masters in his group were all dead, and only he was alive. In fact, every Gu Master would be interrogated to a certain extent, to help the clan gather information on the battlefield. However, Fang Yuan had already been interrogated for an hour, and it was clear that someone was targeting him, making things difficult for him. This was completely understandable.

As long as he was human, he would have social connections, and there would be a chain of people behind him. "Then can you describe the situation on the battlefield in detail?" The elder continued to ask. "Yes. I used a few days and broke through to Rank two. Just as I returned to the village entrance, I met the Chi Shan group … after finding Jiao San and the others, I joined the group. At that time, they were fighting with King Boar … "Fang Yuan spoke with his usual calm tone. He had exposed his Rank two status, and without the corresponding Gu worm to conceal it, his Rank two aura could not be concealed. Now that Sickly Snake and the others were dead, he could make up whatever he wanted. However, Fang Yuan only hid some important details, and most of the things he said happened. This was Fang Yuan's fifth time narrating. The three clan elders frowned as they listened. They could not find any loopholes, but they knew one thing — he was making up lies, and they were afraid of saying too much. If he said it a few more times, there would naturally be loopholes. But after five times, Fang Yuan's narration was slightly different each time, but the content was the same. "It should be true." The three clan elders looked at each other, communicating with their eyes. However, one of the elders was not satisfied. One of her daughters was a healing Gu Master in the sickly snake group, she was the one she doted on the most, but in the end, she died tragically in the wolf's mouth. This caused her to feel resentful. At this moment, she looked at Fang Yuan with a cold gaze. "Fang Yuan, let me ask you, you used the Moon Blade to cut open the Scaly Blade Net, why did you do that?" The middle-aged female elder asked sternly. "Because I panicked, I wanted to make a contribution, but in the end, I helped more than I helped," Fang Yuan said. "Then let me ask you again, when you hid in the pig's stomach, did you purposely let the female Gu Masters in the same group block the calamity for you?" The elder asked again.

"I don't know. I was so scared that I wanted to hide inside King Boar's body, but she got inside and fought with me for the position inside. She did not rob me, was bitten by the electric wolf body, died. I'm ashamed, "Fang Yuan replied. The middle-aged female elder gritted her teeth. Fang Yuan's answer was very cunning, only stating a fact. In fact, he did not say his own subjective intentions. This caused the elder who wanted to suppress him to be unable to find any evidence to use against him. Naturally, she was furious, but could do nothing about it. Under such circumstances, Fang Yuan could not be judged guilty … Three days had passed since the small beast tide. The casualty figures were tallied, causing the clan's higher-ups to have ugly expressions. In the past small beast tides, although there were losses, it was definitely not this serious. The reason was because of the lightning wolf pack. If it was before, there would be at least three small beast tides before these wolf packs would appear. In this world, the environment was harsh, and survival was difficult. To humans, to survive, other than competing with other humans for resources, they also had to fight against ferocious beasts, as well as the harsh weather. And these battles were often extremely difficult. The small beast tide was only the prelude, the truly terrifying thing was the large wolf tide a year later. At that time, there would be tens of thousands of lightning wolves attacking the village, along with the terrifying thunder crown wolf head. The female elder unwillingly asked a few more questions. Finally, under Fang Yuan's impeccable answers, she chose to give up. "Then Fang Yuan, what do you plan to do next?" Another clan elder asked with deep meaning in his words. "I plan to apply for the family separation mission, inherit the inheritance left behind by my parents, and live on well," Fang Yuan said frankly, there was no need to hide this. Because the sickly snake group was almost completely wiped out, only Fang Yuan was left. Thus, he did not need to use the Rank two Gu Master's right to give up missions, and could accept the family separation mission.

The elder who asked the question nodded, then shook his head and said to Fang Yuan, "You still don't understand what I mean. Other than you, your group members have all been sacrificed. My suggestion to you is to join another group. The internal affairs hall's mission difficulty is designed for small groups, and it is very difficult for one person to complete it. Whether it is your family separation mission or the monthly compulsory mission, it is the same. " Fang Yuan was silent, not replying. The elder continued, "Of course, there is another choice. You are already a Rank two Gu Master, and have the qualifications to become a group leader. As long as you pass an assessment mission, you can create your own group. Which one do you want to choose? " Fang Yuan blinked, "I haven't decided yet, I need time to think about it." "Then you can leave. After you go back, think about it quickly. The reorganization of the group will take place in the next few days. After this period, it will be difficult for you to join a group again, "the elder said with concern. Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart, he would not choose either of these two paths. He had too many secrets on him, and moving alone was not only safer, it was also more convenient for him to act. Otherwise, if he had to move with others, wouldn't it annoy Fang Yuan to death? After leaving the interrogation room, Fang Yuan did not immediately leave the internal affairs hall, but instead applied for the family separation mission. In the end, he was told that he was busy recently, and would come back in three days. Walking out of the main door of the internal affairs hall, he looked at the sky. It was only a winter afternoon, and it was extremely ordinary. The winter day was bleak, and the cold wind pierced the bone. The air seemed to be filled with sorrow and heaviness. "Today is a collective memorial service, Guyue and Jinzhu died, Fang Yuan, do you know?" Mobei and a group of youths passed by here and stopped.
S-REV-129.summary: Fang Yuan undergoes a prolonged interrogation by three clan elders regarding the beast horde. He maintains a calm demeanor, giving consistent yet evasive answers about his actions, including his deliberate use of the 'Emergency Refuge' clause to justify abandoning comrades. The Middle-aged Female Elder, whose daughter died in the horde, attempts to corner him but fails due to his cunning and the clan's rules. The elders then try to guide him into joining a group or becoming a leader, but Fang Yuan remains noncommittal, secretly intending to reject their propositions.

continuityMutations.content: The public condemnation and widespread negative reputation he has intentionally cultivated within the clan.
The shame and embarrassment he feels due to his brother's actions and public perception.
His role in actively spreading negative rumors about Fang Yuan.
Felt ashamed of Fang Yuan's reputation and actions.
Spread negative rumors and criticisms about Fang Yuan's actions during the beast horde.

S-REV-130.prose:
The elder who asked the question nodded, then shook his head and said to Fang Yuan, "You still don't understand what I mean. Other than you, your group members have all been sacrificed. My suggestion to you is to join another group. The internal affairs hall's mission difficulty is designed for small groups, and it is very difficult for one person to complete it. Whether it is your family separation mission or the monthly compulsory mission, it is the same. " Fang Yuan was silent, not replying. The elder continued, "Of course, there is another choice. You are already a Rank two Gu Master, and have the qualifications to become a group leader. As long as you pass an assessment mission, you can create your own group. Which one do you want to choose? " Fang Yuan blinked, "I haven't decided yet, I need time to think about it." "Then you can leave. After you go back, think about it quickly. The reorganization of the group will take place in the next few days. After this period, it will be difficult for you to join a group again, "the elder said with concern. Fang Yuan laughed coldly in his heart, he would not choose either of these two paths. He had too many secrets on him, and moving alone was not only safer, it was also more convenient for him to act. Otherwise, if he had to move with others, wouldn't it annoy Fang Yuan to death? After leaving the interrogation room, Fang Yuan did not immediately leave the internal affairs hall, but instead applied for the family separation mission. In the end, he was told that he was busy recently, and would come back in three days. Walking out of the main door of the internal affairs hall, he looked at the sky. It was only a winter afternoon, and it was extremely ordinary. The winter day was bleak, and the cold wind pierced the bone. The air seemed to be filled with sorrow and heaviness. "Today is a collective memorial service, Guyue and Jinzhu died, Fang Yuan, do you know?" Mobei and a group of youths passed by here and stopped.

Other than Mobei, there was also Fangzheng, Chicheng, and the others. Mobei and Chicheng usually did not get along, but today, they seemed to have forgotten each other's grievances and walked together. "Brother, Jinzhu has been studying and living with us for a year. Come with us, "Fangzheng said. Guyue and Jinzhu … … In Fang Yuan's mind, the figure of a young girl suddenly appeared. She had once fought evenly with Mobei in the arena, but lost because of her lack of stamina. She was a hardworking girl. However, under death, no matter if it was beautiful or ugly, it was all the same. Most people would feel that it was a pity, but in Fang Yuan's eyes, it was already very common. "Oh, she's also dead? But birth, old age, sickness, and death are all human nature, after seeing it many times, it will fade away. You guys go, I don't have time. "Fang Yuan brushed past the crowd. "This guy!" Immediately, many youths started to feel indignant. "So cold-blooded and heartless … …" "He doesn't care about schoolmates at all!" "Hehe, recently the news has spread throughout the clan, you guys should have heard about it. The reason why Fang Yuan was able to survive was because he hid in a pig's stomach, and used a female Gu Master in his group as a shield. " "What a disgrace, to drag out an ignoble existence, he doesn't have any manliness." Chicheng crossed his arms and sneered. "Brother … …" Fangzheng lowered his head and gritted his teeth. Hearing such discussions, as Fang Yuan's younger brother, he felt a wave of shame. Fang Yuan walked, the sarcasm behind him getting further and further away, until he could not hear them clearly. His heart was calm. So what if they insulted me? If they want to scold me, then scold me.

So what if they scold me? Short-minded people often get angry because of cursing, and happy because of praise. But in fact, these are just other people's opinions of you. Because of other people's views, those who live are destined to be pitiful people. In fact, after some intentional people purposely spread the news, Fang Yuan's reputation was already very bad. Sacrificing a female companion to protect himself, although such an act would not be punished, it would be condemned by the public. But this was the situation that Fang Yuan wanted to create. Once you enter the system, you are a chess piece, you have no choice but to follow the rules. To Fang Yuan, it was too much of a hindrance. He needed resources, and even more so, he needed to be alone. So he wanted to be a loner. So what if he was ostracized by others? Hehe, only the weak-hearted would be afraid of being ostracized. If this situation were to happen on Earth, no matter who it was, they would be dead. After all, two fists cannot fight against four hands, social connections were the guarantee of survival. But in this world, as long as one's cultivation was strong, one person could fight against ten people, a hundred people, or even ten million people. So what if they were ostracized, if they were in the way, they could just kill them. If there were no resources, they could just take it by force. The rules of every world were different, and it determined that there would be differences in social forms, resulting in differences in human behavior. The higher the martial arts level of the world, the weaker the collective concept. So in this world — Demons ran amok.
S-REV-130.summary: Leaving the Internal Affairs Hall, Fang Yuan encounters Mobei, Fangzheng, and Chicheng, who are headed to a collective memorial service for fallen clan members like Guyue and Jinzhu. Fangzheng tries to persuade Fang Yuan to join, but Fang Yuan coldly dismisses death as common, refusing to participate. This fuels the gathered youths' indignation, leading to widespread gossip and condemnation of Fang Yuan's cold-blooded actions during the beast horde, which Fang Yuan internally observes with indifference, seeing it as part of his strategy to be a loner and pursue his own strength.

Guyue Dong Tu is willing to pay to obstruct Fang Yuan and is monitoring him.
He feigns politeness to the internal affairs hall Gu Master while planning to use clan rules against Fang Yuan.
He fears Fang Yuan's rapid cultivation speed and potential to acquire inheritance.
He knows that hiring outsiders violates clan rules, providing leverage against Fang Yuan.
He extorts Yuan stones from Guyue Dong Tu by feigning difficulty in delaying Fang Yuan's mission and then promises to assign a difficult mission.

relationshipMutations.type: Corrupt alliance based on mutual benefit

S-REV-131.prose:
Chapter 100 "What? That kid is actually a Rank two Gu Master now, and even applied for a family splitting mission from the internal affairs hall! "Uncle Guyue Dong Tu's shocked and angry voice reverberated in the guest hall. "That is indeed the case. Although I took your Yuan stone, I could not stop him, so I could only tell him to come three days later to get the mission. Delaying for so many days is already the limit of what I can do. "The middle-aged male Gu Master sitting at the side said. Guyue Dong Tu snorted in his heart, he understood the meaning of this internal affairs hall Gu Master. What 'delaying for three days is already the limit', he was just trying to extort some money from him. "However, the most important thing now is to do my best to protect the family assets. This brat is really too worrisome! "Guyue Dong Tu's forehead was dripping with cold sweat.

Fang Yuan's growth speed made him feel a sense of fear. "I came specially to tell you, goodbye." The middle-aged male Gu Master stood up and was about to leave. "Don't be in such a hurry to leave, brother. There are some things that I need your help with. "Guyue Dong Tu quickly stood up and took out a money pouch, stuffing it into the male Gu Master's hand. The male Gu Master stuffed the pouch full of Yuan stone into his arms, and immediately changed the topic, laughing loudly, "Brother Dong Tu, you are too polite. What kind of relationship do we have? We've known each other for more than ten years. Don't worry, I will prepare the most difficult mission for Fang Yuan. But Fang Yuan may hire other Gu Masters, you have to be careful. " "Hehehe, don't worry about this.

Although I have retired, I still have my connections, I have already hired people to watch him. If that kid hires an outsider, he will be violating the clan rules, and I was just worried about not having anything to use against him. Hehe … " "Then I am relieved, goodbye." "I will send you off." "No need, please stay." Guyue Dong Tu looked at the Gu Master's departing figure, and the smile on his face gradually collapsed. "This Fang Yuan is clearly a C grade, how did he advance to the second transition so quickly?! Damn it, what are Jiao San and the others doing! You can't even watch over a living person. " "Sigh, now the three or four of us actually died in the beast tide. How useless. Fang Yuan had also advanced to the second transition.

In this case, he would definitely be able to receive the inheritance mission. He could no longer use the method that he had used to restrain him. However, he's all alone now, and it's really difficult for him to complete the inheritance task alone. " "That's inappropriate! This brat's luck was a little strange. Just as he asked Jiao San and the others to suppress him, a small beast tide came. What if he relied on luck again and completed the mission? I have to prepare for the worst! " The fact that Guyue was able to live up to this point in the Frozen Earth represented success in itself. Compared to the fledgling Fang Yuan, his interpersonal skills were much better. … "Collect honey wine?" Fang Yuan's eyes flashed coldly when he received the family property mission.
S-REV-131.summary: Guyue Dong Tu is shocked and angered to learn that Fang Yuan has reached Rank two and applied for a family splitting mission. He bribes an internal affairs hall Gu Master to assign Fang Yuan a difficult mission and to use clan rules against him if he seeks outside help. Dong Tu's fear of Fang Yuan's rapid progress and his desperate measures to protect his family assets are highlighted.

continuityMutations.content: The mission to collect honey wine is designed to exploit his lack of a defensive Gu worm, likely orchestrated by Guyue Dong Tu.
He needs to refine a White Jade Gu to succeed in the honey wine mission and the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
His current finances are precarious, making Gu refinement a high-stakes gamble.
He realizes his uncle (Guyue Dong Tu) is behind the difficult mission assignment.
He plans to refine a White Jade Gu to complete the honey wine mission and aid in the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance.
He understands the importance of upgrading his Rank one Gu worms to Rank two for better combat effectiveness.

S-REV-132.prose:
This mission was very troublesome, it required him to collect five taels of the golden bees' honey wine. The golden bees were the size of a fist, their bodies were black and gold, and their stingers were sharp, possessing strong offensive capabilities. That was not all, a normal small bee colony only had honey. Only in large and medium sized beehives, when enough honey was accumulated, it would ferment into the more precious honey wine. "This mission is very difficult even for a five man group. Because it's useless to have more people, the Gu Master who collects the honey wine must have a defensive Gu worm to withstand the stingers. It seems that uncle is behind this, taking advantage of the fact that I don't have a defensive Gu worm. Unfortunately … he miscalculated. "Fang Yuan sneered in his heart. Now, it was evident that the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance had hidden benefits that couldn't be said. It was easy to do things in secret, but difficult to do things in the light. The more aboveboard the action, the easier it would be for others to see through it, and the easier it would be to stop it.

On the other hand, doing things in secret and hiding one's trump cards would make others unable to see the situation clearly, and unable to deal with it properly. "However, if I want to collect the honey wine, just relying on the Jade Skin Gu is not enough. The Jade Skin Gu is only a Rank one Gu worm, if it can advance to the Rank two White Jade Gu, I believe it will be easy. " There was no need to take a risk, his rich life experience allowed Fang Yuan to avoid taking a detour. Speaking of which, Fang Yuan was now a Rank two initial stage Gu Master, but the Gu worms on him, other than the Spring Autumn Cicada, were all Rank one Gu worms. This situation was like a burly man who could use a large glaive to chop people, holding a small dagger. The dagger could not fully display the burly man's fighting strength, only by forging it into a large glaive would it be the most suitable. Fang Yuan had seven Gu worms on him. Vital Gu: Spring Autumn Cicada, Moonlight Gu, Liquor worm, White Boar Gu, Jade Skin Gu, and two Little Light Gu. Among them, the Moonlight Gu and the two Little Light Gu could be refined into the Rank two Moonglow Gu, while the White Boar Gu and Jade Skin Gu could be refined into the White Jade Gu. The Moonglow Gu represented an increase in attack power, while the White Jade Gu increased defense. If Fang Yuan had enough Yuan stone, he would naturally refine both.

But not long ago, in order to push his cultivation to Rank two, he had used up most of the Yuan stone. Now, the Yuan stone he had was only enough for one use. "No doubt, choosing to refine the White Jade Gu was the wiser choice. With the White Jade Gu, I can collect honey wine. And with the White Jade Gu, it will be helpful for the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance. But if I fail this refinement, the consequences will be severe. My finances are on the verge of collapse, and without the White Jade Gu, I cannot inherit the inheritance. If I am stuck at this step, it will seriously slow down my growth. " Fang Yuan could faintly feel a pressure. He knew he had reached a crucial moment, and if the refinement succeeded, his future would be bright. But if it failed, it would be like falling into an abyss, and if he wanted to climb back up to his current level, he would need to work even harder and spend even more time. … "Gu Masters use their own primeval sea as their foundation, and use Gu worms as their means.
S-REV-132.summary: Fang Yuan receives a challenging mission to collect golden bee honey wine, immediately recognizing it as a sabotage attempt by his uncle due to his lack of a defensive Gu worm. He dismisses the current obstacle, affirming the benefits of the Flower Wine Monk's inheritance. Fang Yuan then assesses his Gu worms, acknowledging the need to upgrade his Rank one Gu to Rank two to meet the mission's demands and further his inheritance pursuit, deciding to prioritize refining the White Jade Gu for defense despite financial strain and risk of failure.

continuityMutations.content: The principles of Gu refinement, including single refinement, fusion, and the importance of recipes.
The existence of Rank five Gu recipes, specifically for a 'Moonlight Treasure King Gu'.
The difficulty and risk of Gu fusion, including the need for consciousness manipulation and the potential for Gu worms to be damaged or die from failure.
He guides Fangzheng through the process of Gu fusion and refinement, explaining its principles.
He knows about Rank five Gu recipes, specifically one for the 'Moonlight Treasure King Gu' involving Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu.
He attempts Gu fusion for the first time, learning about its difficulty and requirements.
He learns about Rank five Gu recipes and the potential to refine a 'Moonlight Treasure King Gu'.
He experiences the difficulty and risk of Gu refinement firsthand after a failed attempt.

S-REV-133.prose:
Gu are essential to a Gu Master, and without Gu, there is no Gu Master. Other than their own cultivation, Gu Masters also need to refine Gu, nurture Gu, and use Gu. " In the room, clan leader Guyue Bo carefully explained to Fangzheng. "Refinement, nurture, and use, these three aspects, any one of them is broad and profound, and a person's whole life cannot be explored. Among them, in terms of Gu refinement, you already know how to refine a Gu worm and use it for yourself. But this is only single refinement. Other than single refinement, there is a more important fusion. " "Through fusion, you can combine many different Gu worms into a higher rank Gu worm. This is the evolution and refinement of life. Fangzheng, you are already Rank two, but your Gu worms are all Rank one. It is time to refine a Rank two Gu worm. " Fangzheng asked: "Lord clan leader, then how do I refine?"

Guyue Bo said: "To refine, you need to know the recipe. Some Gu worms cannot be fused with each other. After countless years of development and precipitation, the ancestors, through continuous practice and countless failures, summed up a lot of secret recipes. Our Guyue clan has the most in-depth research on the Moonlight Gu, and now we already have two Rank five recipes. " "What is a Rank five recipe?" "According to this recipe, by continuous fusion, you can finally refine a Rank five Gu worm. Fang Yuan, you have a Jade Skin Gu and a Moonlight Gu, which fit one of the Rank five recipes. If you follow this recipe, you can finally refine a Rank five Gu worm — Moonlight Treasure King Gu! " "Moonlight Treasure King Gu?" Fangzheng's face showed a yearning expression. "Hehehe, it is still too early to tell you about a Rank five Gu worm. Come, take out the Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu, I will guide you on how to fuse these two Gu into the Rank two Moon Raiment Gu!

" Saying so, Guyue Bo's expression turned solemn: "The most important thing in fusing Gu worms is to multitask and fuse your consciousness. Right now, the Moonlight Gu and Jade Skin Gu in your hands no longer have their wild consciousness, and have been replaced by your own consciousness. What you need to do now is to fuse these two consciousnesses together. " "Fuse together?" Fangzheng blinked, his expression confused. Guyue Bo laughed: "Don't worry, with more practice, you will be able to grasp this feeling. Let's begin. " "Okay." Fangzheng nodded, and under Guyue Bo's guidance, the light red red red steel primeval essence rose up like smoke, and lifted the Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu in the air. Fangzheng closed his eyes, and began to feel and manipulate these two Gu worms' consciousnesses. Guyue Bo was observing from outside, and saw the Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu revolving around each other like two stars. As the consciousnesses fused more and more, the distance between the two Gu worms also got closer.

After three hours of continuous experimentation, the consciousnesses in their bodies were finally manipulated by Fangzheng, and completely fused together. Immediately, the Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu burst out with a dazzling white light. The two white lights linked together, and soon formed a ball the size of a washbasin. "Maintain your current state, and then throw Yuan stone into the ball of light." Guyue Bo instructed in time. Fangzheng took out a piece of Yuan stone, and threw it into the ball of light. Strangely enough, after the Yuan stone was thrown in, it turned into a pure natural primeval essence, and completely fused into the ball of light. Only some white stone powder was left, which fluttered and fell onto the bed sheet. "Continue throwing, until you fuse into a Rank two Gu worm," Guyue Bo said. Fangzheng threw out the second piece, but at this moment, the white light suddenly disappeared, and the two Gu worms seemed to have been pushed by each other, flying in opposite directions. The fusion had failed. "Oh no, I forgot to maintain the fusion of consciousnesses."

Fangzheng immediately realized his mistake. "Don't worry, the first few failures are very normal." Guyue Bo comforted Fangzheng, and then reminded, "But you have to be careful, you can't fail too many times. Otherwise, the Moonlight Gu and Jade Skin Gu will die. " Fangzheng recalled the Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu, and as expected, found that the surface of the Moonlight Gu had a slight crack, while the Jade Skin Gu was somewhat dispirited. His heart sank, and he truly experienced the difficulty of refining Gu.
S-REV-133.summary: Clan leader Guyue Bo instructs Fangzheng on Gu refinement, explaining single refinement, fusion, and the concept of Rank five recipes. He guides Fangzheng through his first attempt to fuse a Jade Skin Gu and Moonlight Gu into a Rank two Moon Raiment Gu. Fangzheng initially struggles with consciousness fusion and, despite Guyue Bo's encouragement, fails to complete the refinement, causing minor damage to his Gu worms and making him realize the true difficulty and risk involved.

nodes.content: He is a transmigrator from Earth.

He views family members (including his brother, aunt, and uncle) and Shen Cui as mere 'passers-by' in his quest for immortality, not worthy of his emotional investment or strategic effort unless they directly impede him.
